# language_name:	Lautu Chin
# closest ISO 639-3:	clt
# year_short:	scraped 2026
# year_long:	Not available
# title:	Lautu Chin
# URL:	https://www.bible.com/bible/2640

40001001	Abraham samingsahlaa, David samingsahlaa ta a cuopa Messiah Zingsuv thukina ca hinghaahingtana a cuo.
40001002	Abraham ca Isak paa ta a cuo, Isak ca Jakob paa ta a cuo, Jakob ca Judah hne a nuta zaw paa ta a cuo,
40001003	Judah ca Perez hne Zerah paa ta a cuo (Ama nung ca Tamar ta a cuo), Perez ca Hezron paa ta a cuo, Hezron ca Aram paa ta a cuo,
40001004	Aram ca Amminadab paa ta a cuo, Amminadab ca Nahshon paa ta a cuo, Nahshon ca Salmon paa ta a cuo,
40001005	Salmon ca Boaz paa ta a cuo (A nung ca Rahab ta a cuo), Boaz ca Obed paa ta a cuo (a nung ca Ruth ta a cuo), Obed ca Jesse paa ta a cuo,
40001006	Jesse ca Siepahruo David paa ta a cuo. David ca Solomon paa ta a cuo (a nung ca Uriah napuvnung khata na a cuo),
40001007	Solomon ca Rehoboam paa ta a cuo, Rehoboam ca Abijah paa ta a cuo, Abijah ca Asaph paa ta a cuo,
40001008	Asaph ca Jehoshafat paa ta a cuo, Jehoshafat ca Joram paa ta a cuo, Joram ca Uzziah paa ta a cuo,
40001009	Uzziah ca Jotham paa ta a cuo, Jotham ca Ahaz paa ta a cuo, Ahaz ca Hezekiah paa ta a cuo,
40001010	Hezekiah ca Manasseh paa ta a cuo, Manasseh ca Amos paa ta a cuo, Amos ca Josiah paa ta a cuo,
40001011	Josiah ca Jekhoniah hne a nuta zaw ama paa ta a cuo, capa cuo lieca Israel ming ca Babilon ruo luo sii ta amaa da.
40001012	Babilon luo sii ta amaa da khu taata: Jaekhoniah ca Salathiel paa ta a cuo, Salathiel ca Zerubbabel paa ta a cuo,
40001013	Zerubbabel ca Abiud paa ta a cuo, Abiud ca Eliakim paa ta a cuo, Eliakim ca Azor paa ta a cuo,
40001014	Azor ca Zadok paa ta a cuo, Zadok ca Akhim paa ta a cuo, Akhim ca Eliud paa ta a cuo,
40001015	Eliud ca Eleazar paa ta a cuo, Eleazar ca Matthan paa ta a cuo, Matthan ca Jakob paa ta a cuo,
40001016	Jakob ca Josef paa ta a cuo, Josef ca Mary navaapa ta a cuo, Mary ca Messiah tapa Zingsuv nung khata a cuo.
40001017	Cacuonakaw Abraham taata David te chuohraa hlyipaliy, David taata Babilon luo sii ta amaa dana te ta chuohraa hlyipaliy, Sii ta amaa dana taata Messiah puvna te ta chuohraa hlyipaliy ta a cuo.
40001018	Zingsuv Khrih a puvna zya ca hinghaahingta a cuo. A nung Mary ca Josef ta pahaa te cuorasala amaa hlaw hluo khata Thlaapa Pathe ta nu a hnyi aa tapa kha pachang sa pata a cuo.
40001019	A navaapa Josef ca a dangsapa ta cuote, Mary kha zaapuv pachang ta thuo pachipa a khing li nakawta a paruvta tah a che riypata khue a khuo.
40001020	Cahaa cata tue riypa a pacuo nguoluoning kha Abyipa avuoming pakha ta a muo lie zaa luo te, “David saming Josef, Mary hing napuv ta a la riypata ciy kha, nu a phyapa hing Thlaapa Pathe taata tlihing a cuo.
40001021	Ama ta saacapaa hnyi'a te a ming ca Zingsuv tapata na paphya aa, tahematapakieca ama ta a cawsaa zaw kha ama suena taata a khuo'a yi.
40001022	Hingpa bangkhuo a cuopa hing Abyipa ta profet pakaa taata a ripa a tlingna riypatana a cuo:
40001023	“Mang tie, Lesaa pathepa pakha ta nu phya'a te saacapaa pakha a hnyi aa, ama ca Immanuel tapata ming ama paphya aa,” a ri khingna ca, “Khazing ca kiema'a liena a aw,” tana pata a cuo.
40001024	Josef ca aa hmungna taata aa kya cha tiyta Abyipa avuoming ta ama changpa haakhata Mary ca napuv ta aa la.
40001025	Cuorasala saacapaa a sa hluo bangkhuo nung hne vaa cuo khyi vyi. Saacapaa ca Zingsuv tapata ming a sa.
40002001	Herod siepahruo a cuo nguoluo-ning, Judea pe Bethlehem khy lie Zingsuv a puv khutaa khata ning-chiy luo taata mingsing tie kha Jerusalem luo vya chiy yite,
40002002	“Judah siepahruo, zaa puv thaapa haatiyta ca khaapaliema a aw? A aasiy aa luopa kha hmung pate na ama kha abie riypata ma vya chiy,” ama ta.
40002003	Siepahruo Herod ta capa bie a thyi tiyta a thlaa zang laalaw te Jerusalem khy ming bangkhuo zaw ama thlaa a zangsa ra.
40002004	Ama ta tluobyilepa tie hne phungbiesaya tie zaw kha pakiy yite, “Messiah ca khaapaliema a puv aa?” tapata a hiehriy yi.
40002005	Iema ta, “Judea pe Bethlehem khy lie,” ama ta. “Profet ta a cape siypa ca:
40002006	‘Judah ruo chunglie a awpa Bethlehem, nama ca Judah pe khypuv zaw hrawlie hing a cawcepa ta cuo changchiy vaciy. Na chung taahingta luochiytuv pakha pya'a te i cawsaa Israel ming kha luo a chiy'a yi,’” a ta.
40002007	Cacuonakaw Herod ta mingsing tie kha a paruvta tah ku yite khaapa cuo lie kha tama aasiy aa luo tapa kha a hiehriy yi.
40002008	Cakhutaata Bethlehem luo kha pathlie yite, “Si ungla haatiy kha a phasa pata va huv tie ung, nama hmung pata a cuo kieca, vaa'a ang te i bie ra khu riypata, kama kha ina pachang sa pakhaa ungciy,” tapata bie a taa yi.
40002009	Siepahruopa bie naa ama thlie khu taata amaa thu ca a kya luo ningta ama hmungpa aasiy ca haatiy awna hmang a dadaw lie a daa nate ta ama hmielie kha a sile.
40002010	Aasiy a daapa ama hmung tiyta ama palung a tluo hringhruo.
40002011	Ingchung luo kha amaa ngie ca haatiy kha a nung Mary hne ama hmung; ama pakhuv pane yite ama kha amaa bie. Ama suethiy thingkaw kha pahaw yite, ama lasaw: siyy, frankinsens ziyhmyi, hne mura ziyhmyi kha ama pi.
40002012	Mingsing tie ca Herod'a luo kaa li riypata ama muo lie a raaring pina ama hmung nakawta luo hrang ziy yite ama ruo luo kha ama kaa.
40002013	Iema ama si khu taata Abyipa avuoming pakha ca Josef muo lie kha a luo te, “Thu la haatiy hne a nung hing Izipt ruo luo a ruokhyi tie yi. Kama ta kaa riypata ica chang hluo li ama lie kha nama aw aa, tahematapakieca Herod na haatiypa hing thie riypata a huv aa,” a ta.
40002014	Cakhutaata Josef ca thu te haatiy hne a nung kha Izipt ruo luo zuo ta a ruo khyi yite
40002015	capa lieca Herod a thiy nate ama aw. Hingpa hing Abyipa ta profet pakaa taata, “I saacapaa ca Izipt ruo taa pya riypata i u,” a tapa bie tlingna riypatana a cuo.
40002016	Herod ta mingsing tie na naa dung yi tapa a pachang tiyta a hi a haa suesaa. Cacuonakawta mingsing tie'a taata a pachangpa cuo hne tuepuo pata Bethlehem hne a cahriy lie a awpa khy zaw taata haatiy kung hning raw bangkhuo kha thie riypata naw a pi yi.
40002017	Cahaa cata profet Jeremiah ta a za ripa bie ca a vya tling. A ripa ca:
40002018	“Ramah khy chunglie ueryi aa thyi. Caana hne khi-una ueryi ta a cuo. Rachel ta a saa zaw kha a caa yi. Panguo khu cuo the vyi, Tahematapakieca ama thiy diy nakaw,” tapata a cuo.
40002019	Herod a thiy khu taata Izipt ruo lieca Abyipa avuoming pakha Josef muo lie kha a luo te,
40002020	“Thu la haatiy hne a nung kha la yi la Israel ruo luo si tie ung, tahematapakieca haatiy thie a tingpa tie kha ama thiy tli,” a ta.
40002021	Cacuonakawta Josef ca thu te, haatiy hne a nung kha la yite Israel ruo luo ama si.
40002022	Cuorasala Arkhelaus na a paa Herod kha a thle te Judea ruo lie siepahruo a cuo tapa kha Josef ta a thyi tiyta capa luo ca si nguo vyi. A muo lie bie ama changpa haata Galilee pe luo kha a si.
40002023	Profet tie ta ama za ri ciepa, “Ama ca Nazarethpa tapata a cuo aa,” tapa bie a tling thena riypata Nazareth khy lie kha khy a sa.
40003001	Ca cuo ning ca tiynawtuv Johan ca Judea ruochung lie kha a vya luo te,
40003002	“Nama suena kha a ngiepachiy ung, tahematapakieca Vuoruo Pena na a ngie tli,” tapata phung a ri.
40003003	Profet Isaiah ta, “Ueryi suokha ca ruochung lie kha u te: ‘Abyipa luopuv kha sapa tie ung, a luopuv kha padang tie ung’” tapata a za ri tiyta Johan hingna a za ta khing hnuochuopa ta a cuo.
40003004	Ama ca kala-uv hming ta taapa caw kha a tue te a se lie kha savang tesaw aa saw, a sa ca khawbyapa hne khyitiy ta a cuo.
40003005	Jerusalem taa hne Judea pe bangkhuo taa cuose, Jordan cavaa kie khyta bangkhuo taata cawsaa zaw kha ama'a luo ca pya yite,
40003006	ama suena kha a phu yite Jordan cavaa lie kha tiy a naw yi.
40003007	Cuorasala Johan ta Farasi ming hne Sadusi ming zaw tiy a naw riypata amaa vawpa kha a hmung tiyta, “Pariy ciypathla zaw, a vya tlung riypa Khazing hihaana chung taata a ruo riypata ahungma a raaringna caa pi yi? a ta yi.
40003008	Sue a ngiepachiyna hne aa phuvpa hringzya kha hnyi tie ung.
40003009	Niema hne niema kha, ‘Malie a sa a vyatuv Abraham na ma hnyi tapata rue kha ung;’ ica chang yi: Khazing ca hing alung chung taahingta Abraham samingsahlaa zaw kha a sa khu yi.
40003010	Ahryi ca thingkungpa thabaw lie pahlaa pacie pata cuote thyiphaa a pathyi lipa thingkungpa bangkhuo ca hu pata myi chung luo thawpa ama cuo aa.
40003011	Kama ca nama sue a ngiepachiy-napa paluosana ta tiy ta tiy ica naw yi, cuorasala kama laata a le viepapaa ca i hnang taata a vaw'a te kama hing ca a phyipakaw a cyipale riypa tahmuo a tla va ang. Ama ta Thlaapa Pathe hne myi ta tiynawnapa aca pi'a yi. Ama ca kama laata a le vie karaa.
40003012	A kuv lie sazinapa pahraa kha a cyi te sa kha a zi diy aa. A chuo ca be luo kha raw'a te asiypa ca a thiy buo lipa myi luo kha a hmaw aa,” a ta.
40003013	Capa cuo ning ca Zingsuv ca Galilee taakhata Jordan cavaa luo kha Johan kuv ta tiy a naw riypata aa vaw.
40003014	Cuorasala Johan ta, “Kama hingna nama kuv ta tiy a naw riypa a cuo ang, nama tlaku ma kama'a luo a vaw ciy?” a ta.
40003015	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Ata hing ca hinghaahingta cuo thluo se, tahematapakieca a dangna bangkhuo a tlingna riypata hinghaahingta ma tue riypa hing a phapa tana a cuo,” a ta. Cacuonakawta Johan ca a naa a tla.
40003016	Zingsuv ca tiynawna hmung te tiy chung taata a kya thu pahne ta vuoruo kha sungkha ta a pahaw te Khazing Thlaapa kha thuvruv haata zaa zu te a cunglie a zaa cang pakha a hmung.
40003017	Vuoruo taata ueryi suokha ta, “Hingpapaa hing i duepa i Saacapaa tana a cuo, a cunglie hing i palung a tling,” a ta.
40004001	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ca Setaa ta pasupaliy riypata Thlaapa ta ruochung luo kha a sikhyi.
40004002	Zingsuv ca ning sawliy hne zuo sawliy chung sa uv te a nang a diy hringhruo.
40004003	Pasupaliytuv ca a vaw te, “Khazing Saacapaa hmisi ta na cuo kieca hingpa alung zaw hing viechuo ta pali tie,” a ta.
40004004	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Caapathepa na a ri, ‘Cawsaapa hing sa ta dyi hring'a vyi, cuorasala Khazing ta a ripa bie tana a hring aa,’” a ta.
40004005	Cakhutaata Setaa ta Zingsuv kha khypuv pathepa biena-ing a daw lie kha chi te,
40004006	“Khazing Saacapaa ta na cuo kieca hingpa taahingta a thawpathla tie, tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, ‘Khazing ta nama cuo hing ta a avuoming naw pi'a yite, iema ta ama kuv ta ca cawchue'a yite, alung lie na phyi a phaw'a vaciy, a ta kha,’” a ta.
40004007	Zingsuv ta, “Caapathepa ta, ‘Na Byipaapa na Khazing kha va dyapasya kha,’ a ta,’” tapata a palie.
40004008	Cakhutaata Setaa ta Zingsuv kha a suosapa tluocung luo kiekhyi te chuelyi pena bangkhuo hne a rungnaana bangkhuo kha a pahmung sa.
40004009	Setaa ta, “A bung la inaa bie cakieca hingpa bangkhuo hing ica pi aa,” a ta.
40004010	Zingsuv ta, “Setaa, cakuo buo! Caapathepa ta, ‘Na Byipaapa Khazing kha abie la, ama re dyi kha va hrie tie,’ a ta pakha,” a ta.
40004011	Cakhutaata setaa ta pya se te, avuoming ta sungkha ta a zuv yite ama za mangsang.
40004012	Zingsuv ca Johan na ama patuv tapa kha a thyi tiyta Galilee luo kha a si.
40004013	Ama ca Nazareth kha thuse te Zebulun hne Naftali pe, riyliy kielie a awpa Kapernaum khy lie kha a aw.
40004014	Hinghaahingta a tue napa ca profet Isaiah ta,
40004015	“Zebulun hne Naftali ruo, Riyliy luopuv kie, Jordan cavaa huesuo, Jentail ming ruo Galilee—
40004016	Zingna chunglie a awpa cawsaa zaw ta, khena lepuv kha ama hmung aa. Thiyna ruo ningdiy rawlie a awpa tie cunglie, khena ca a kya luo tli,” a za tapa kha a tlingna riypatana a cuo.
40004017	Capa cuo taacata Zingsuv ta, “Nama suena kha a ngiepachiy tie ung, tahematapakieca vuoruo pena na a ngie tli!” tapata phungri hruo a pathu.
40004018	Zingsuv ca Galilee riyliy kielie a cakuole pata, Simon (Piter ama tapuopa) hne a nuta Andru riyliy lie asue ama vaa nguoluopa kha a hmung yi, tahematapakieca iema ca ngaavaapa tana ama cuo.
40004019	Zingsuv ta, “Kama hing na ziy tie ung, cawsaa a patuvpa tana ica tue'a yi,” a ta.
40004020	Amaa sue kha thuse paluo yite ama kha ama ziy.
40004021	Capa hmang taacata a va cakuo vie pata a hrangpa uvcanu pahning, Zebedi saacapaapa Jeim hne a nuta Johan kha ama paa Zebedi hneta sawkawpalaw chunglie amaa sue ama thyi nguoluo pa khata hmung yite a u yi. Zingsuv ta ku yite,
40004022	ama sawkawpalaw hne ama paa kha thuse paluo yite ama kha ama ziy.
40004023	Zingsuv ca Galilee ruochung bangkhuo kha tlaw te, apungna-ing lie kha a pacuv yi, vuoruo pena thuophaabie kha chang yite pasanapa phangphang a angpa tie kha a patluo sa yi.
40004024	Cacuonakawta a thuohlaa ca Siria ruochung ting khata pathuo te, a pasapa bangkhuo kha ama'a luo ama vya chiykhyi, pasana phangphang ta a pasapa tie, khuevuo ta a tuepa tie, siy te a thiychiethepa tie, hne a pakyapa tie bangkhuo kha a patluo sa diy yi.
40004025	Galilee, Dekhapolis, Jerusalem, Judea, hne Jordan cavaa huesuo luo ruo taata cawsaa hluvpuv khata ama ca ama ziy.
40005001	Zingsuv ta cawsaazaapuv kha a hmung tiy yi ta tluocung luo kha kie te aa tu khu taata ziytuv tie kha ama'a luo amaa vaw.
40005002	Bie ri kha pathu te a pacuv yi:
40005003	Thlaapa luota a siy a pasapa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo, tahema-tapakieca vuoruo pena ca iema huopa tana a cuo.
40005004	Ngiechi pacuorung pata a caapa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo, tahematapakieca Khazing ta ama hnaa a panguo'a yi.
40005005	A nang a nepa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo, tahematapakieca alyi ru na ama cu aa.
40005006	A dangna kha nangdiy tiyhriepa haata a khingpa ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo, tahematapakieca ama khingna kha patling sapa ama cuo aa.
40005007	Nangduena a hnyipa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo, tahema-tapakieca Khazing ta iema kha nang a due ra'a yi.
40005008	A palung a pathepa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo, tahematapakieca Khazing na ama hmung aa.
40005009	Arena a tuepa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo, tahematapakieca Khazing ta i saata a ta'a yi.
40005010	A dangnapa kawlieta hrisaa-thieruena a angpa ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo, tahematapakieca vuoruo pena ca iema huotana a cuo.
40005011	Kama kawlieta cawsaa ta ca pachie yite, ca hrisaathierue yite, a pha lipa a phangphang kha aa hmuo lipa ta aca thawsue kie yi ca thluechiypa tana nama cuo.
40005012	Nama palung tluo sala nama thaa pha se, tahematapakieca vuoruo lieta nama lawmuo a lesa aa. Hinghaahingtana niema hluo taapa profet tie zaw kha za ese yite ama za hrisaa.
40005013	Niema ca chuelyi paciy tana nama cuo. Cuorasala paciy ca a iena kha a vie kieca tuokhaatama pa-ie sa pakhaa khu pata a cuo aa? Thlahnena a hnyi li tli nakawta thaw pata tlawpuo riypa dyina a cuo tli.
40005014	Niema ca chuelyi khena tana nama cuo. Tluocung lie tlapa khypuv ca khaapatahmuo pakhuo khu vyi.
40005015	Ahunghmuo myi-ing ama vuo tiyta beke khaakhung buo vayi. Cuorasala myivuona cunglie kha khang yite ingchung bangkhuo kha a khe diy.
40005016	Cahaa cata nama khena ca cawsaa hmielie kha khe se; tahematapakieca hmangpha nama tuepa kha hmung'a yite vuoruo lie nama Paa ming kha ama pathuosa aa.
40005017	Moses phungbie hne profet tie pacuvnapa kha para riypatana aa zuv tapata na rue kha ung. Para riypata a zuv va ang, patling sa riypa tuv tana i zuv.
40005018	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Alyi hne vuoruo a ra hluo li phungbie lie a cawcepa caasuo suokha a cuo zaw, phungbie chung taata ra'a vayi, a bangkhuo ta a tling diy hluo li ra'a vayi.
40005019	Cacuonakawta ahungtahmuo cuose phungbie chunglie a cawcepa suokha kha ziy li pata para te malie zaw kha cahaa cata a pacuv kie yi ca ama ca vuoruo pena chunglie a cawcepa ta a cuo aa. Cuorasala ahunghmuo cuose phungbie kha ziy te malie zaw kha cahaa cata a pacuv kie yi ca vuoruo pena chunglie a lepa ta a cuo aa.
40005020	Ica chang yi: phungbie saya tie hne Farasi ming laa hingta namaa dang vie li kieca vuoruo pena chung luo a ngie khu'a va ungciy.
40005021	Hluo ningta ca, “Lie va naw kha; lie a nawpa ca bieripana na a ang aa,” ama za ta pakha nama thyi.
40005022	Cuorasala kama ta ca: a uv a nu, a sieta cunglie a hi a haapa ca bieripana kha nama ang aa; a uvta a nuta, a sieta kha, siysaa ri li pata a esepa ca bieripana zung luo chiykhyi pata cuo'a ung cate, a uv a nu, a sieta kha, ‘a ngaapa,’ a tapa ca hell myi chung luo tla riypata aa tlapa nama cuo aa,” a ta.
40005023	Cacuonakawta nama lasaw kha bienatluophie lie nama pi tiyta, na uv na nu, na sieta pakhakha ta na cunglie a palung a tling lipa kha naa thyi kieca
40005024	na lasaw kha bienatluophie hmielie chi siy la a catli pata cakuo la na uvnu, na sieta hne a rena kha va tue tie. Cakhutaacata vya kaa la na lasaw kha Khazing ca pi tie.
40005025	Tazaa caa cyipa hneta bieripana zung luo nama vaale ning khata ama kha a rena tue tie. A cuo li kieca tazaa caa cyi pata bieribyi kuv cung luo, bieribyi ta paliy zung luo ca chiykhyi'a te thaw pathla pata na cuo aa.
40005026	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: lu riypa bangkhuo na lu diy hluo li thawchung taata pya'a vaciy.
40005027	Nungvaathingsuena tue kha ung ama ta tawpa ca nama pachang.
40005028	Cuorasala kama ta ca: canung pakha kha suehnekhingna pathiypalung hne a mangpa ca a palung chunglie ta nungvaathingsuena kha capa nung hne cata a tue tli.
40005029	Cacuonakaw na cacuo ming ta aca pasue sa kieca, cakhyi la thaw tie; na pangpa palang ta hell luo tlapa laa taca na pangpa chebuo suokhakha naa sungpa ca a pha vie.
40005030	Na cacuo kuv ta aca pasue sa kieca, te la thaw tie. Na pangpa palang ta hell luo tlapa laa taca kuvphyi suokhakha a sungpa ca a pha vie.
40005031	Ahunghmuo cuose a napuv ama kieca manapa caa pacyi se, tapata ripa a cuo hyi.
40005032	Cuorasala kama taca hinghaahingta ica chang yi: Capaa ta a napuv kha capaa hrangpa hne suena kawlie ta li pata a hrangpa kawlieta a ma kieca a ama kha nungvaathingsuena a patue sapa ta a cuo, capa nung a hlawpapaa zaw kha nungvaathingsuena a tuetuv ta a cuo ra.
40005033	“A hmuo li pata chie a sa'a va ungciy, cuorasala Abyipa'a lie nama tue ciepa biekuona kha patling sa tie ung,’ tapata hluo ningta ama za ripa kha nama thyi.
40005034	Cuorasala ica chang yi: Chie a sa kha ung; vuoruo ming caba pata chie a sa kha ung, tahematapakieca Khazing a tuna tana a cuo.
40005035	Alyi ming caba pata chie a sa kha ung, tahematapakieca Khazing phyi pathlana tana a cuo. Jerusalem ming caba pata zaw chie a sa kha ung, tahematapakieca siepahruolepa awna khypuv tana a cuo.
40005036	Nama luv nama puo caba pata zaw chie a sa kha ung, tahematapakieca nama suobuv buvkha hmuota nama paruo sa khu li pahaata pavaw sa khu va ungciy.
40005037	‘A cuo,’ ‘Cuovyi,’ tapa dyi kha ri tie ung, hingpa laa hingta a hlyipa bangkhuo ca a pha lipapaa'a taata a vawpa tana a cuo.
40005038	“Ming cuota ming, haa cuota haa, tapata ama ripa kha nama thyi.
40005039	Cuorasala ica chang yi: phalina a tuepa kha thlu ri kha ung. Cuorasala cawsaa pakhakha ta na cacuo luo be aca tung kieca, kuo kha luo kha va chawpa vie tie.
40005040	Na buohryi a khing nakawta tazaa aca cyi kieca, na buohryicungle zaw kha pi chiy vie tie.
40005041	Cakhutaata pakhakha ta hruohra li pata kilometer suokha aca cakuo sa kieca, kilometer suohning te khata va cakuo tie.
40005042	Chechiy caa hiepa kha va pi la; du caa cyipa kha va thlu kha.
40005043	“Nama viesaa kha due ungla nama carie kha hue tie ung, ama za ta tawpa kha nama thyi.
40005044	Cuorasala kama taca hinghaahingta ica chang yi: Nama cariepa tie kha due ungla caa hrisaathieruepa tie cuo khata thlaa chuo tie ung;
40005045	cahaacatana vuoruo lie a awpa nama Paa saata ta nama cuo aa. Tahematapakieca ama ca cawsaa chiepa hne cawsaa phapa cunglieta ning kha pachiy sa kaluo te, aa dangpa hne aa dang lipa cunglieta kha khy a pasaa sa kaluo.
40005046	Caa duepa dyi nama due kieca khaapa lawmuo ma nama hmung aa? Ngukhyituv tie tahmuo cahaa cata ama tue ra cuo vama?
40005047	Na uvnu hne na sieta zaw dyi kha bie naa chang kie yi ca, malie laata namaa nanang vie napa a aw ma? Khazing a bie lipa tie hmuo cahaa cata ama tue ra cuo vama?
40005048	Vuoruo lie a awpa nama Paa a tling pahaata niema zaw a tlingpa cuo ra tie ung.
40006001	Biena luota hmangpha nama tuepa kha malie ta na hmung naaseyi tapata zaapuv hmielieta va tue kha ung. Cahaa cata nama tue kieca vuoruo lieta a awpa nama Paa'a taata lawmuo khaahmuo hmung'a va ungciy.
40006002	Cacuonakaw hmangpha nama tue tiyta phahruocuo tie ta cawsaa malie pathuosa naaseyi tapata apungna-ing hne azaa luopuv lie hmyakaa tung yite ama tuepa haata tue kha ung. Biehmisi tana ica chang yi, iema ca ama lawmuo kha ama hmung diy tli.
40006003	Cuorasala niema ca hmangpha nama tue tiyta nama cacuo luo kuv ta a tuepa kha nama cavyi luo kuv tahmuo a pachang li riypata va tue tie ung.
40006004	Cahaa cata a paruv ta nama tuepa a hmungtuvpa nama Paa khata nama lawmuo kha aca pi'a yi.
40006005	Thlaa nama chuo tiyta phahruo a cuo pakhipa tie kha lu kha ung. Iema ca cawsaa ta malie hmung naaseyi tapata luopuv a tawna lie hne apungna-ing lie a daa pata thlaa chuo kha ama tlechuo sa. Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: iema ca ama lawmuo kha ama hmung diy tli.
40006006	Cuorasala thlaa nama chuo kieca nama khuo luo a ngie ungla, ingchiy kha khaa ungla, ming ta hmung khu a aw lipa nama Paa'a luo kha chuo tie ung. A paruv ta nama tuepa a hmungtuv nama Paa ta nama lawmuo kha aca pi'a yi.
40006007	Thlaa nama chuo tiyta Jentail ming ta bie a hluvsa ma ri kieca malie a thyi thlu aa tapata siyluo a hnyi lipa bie a syisa ama ripa haakhata thlaa chuo kha ung.
40006008	Iema ca va lu lie ungciy, tahematapakieca nama Paa ta nama hie hluo ta khaapama namaa hu tapa kha a pachang diy tli.
40006009	Cacuonakaw hinghaahingta thlaa chuo tie ung: Vuoruo lie a awpa ma Paa, Na mingpathepa ca pa-uvsathyi pata aw mangsue.
40006010	Na pena tlung paatie se; Vuoruo lie haata alyicung lie na khingnapa tling paatie se.
40006011	Ningting ta maa hupa sa ca ata ning zaw malie pi tie.
40006012	Malie ta ima cunglie ama sue ningta maa ngiethepa haayita, Ma suenapa kha malie a ngiethe ra tie.
40006013	Pasupaliyna luo malie pachiy sa li pata, A pha lipa chung taata malie khuo tie.
40006014	Malie ta nama cung lie ama tuepa suena kha namaa ngiethe kieca, vuoruo lie a awpa nama Paa ta niema zaw acaa ngiethe ra'a yi.
40006015	Cuorasala malie kha namaa ngiethe li kieca niema suena zaw kha nama Paa ta caa ngiethe ra'a vayi.
40006016	Sa namaa uv tiyta phahruocuo tie haata nama hmiephya a pachie sa kha ung. Sa amaa uvpa kha cawsaa ta malie pachang naaseyi tapata ama hmiephya kha amaa pachie sa. Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: iema ca ama lawmuo kha ama hmung diy tli.
40006017	Sa namaa uv tiyta nama hmie kha a siy ungla nama luv zaw kha sathu a thuv tie ung,
40006018	tahematapakieca sa namaa uvpa kha malie ta ca pachang lipa yi ta hmung khu lipa nama Paa kyalya ta aca pachang'a yi. Cahaa cata a paruv ta nama tuepa a hmungtuv nama Paa ta nama lawmuo kha aca pi'a yi.
40006019	Thinghlaa ta ning te a pabung khunapa hne a se ta ce te a ra khunapa, a ruvhangpa ta a paruv khunapa alyi lieta nama suethiy kha pacung kha ung.
40006020	Thinghlaa ta ning te a pabung khu linapa hne a se ta ce te a ra khu linapa vuoruo lieta nama suethiy kha pacung tie ung.
40006021	Tahematapakieca nama sue a awna lie khana nama pathiypalung zaw a aw ra aa.
40006022	Ming ca pangpa cuota myi-ing tana a cuo. Cacuonakawta na ming a pha kieca nama pangpa ca a khe diy aa.
40006023	Cuorasala na ming a pha li kieca na pangpa ca zingna chunglie tana a aw aa. Cacuonakaw na chunglie a awpa khena ca zingna ta a cuo sue kieca capa zingna ca a zing suesaapa a cuo aa.
40006024	Ahungtahmuo byi pahning re hriepa pakhaw the'a vyi; pakha kha due'a te a hrangpa pakha kha a hue aa, pakha'a lie kha zangtluo aa tla pata aw'a te a hrangpa pakha kha siysaa ri li pata a aw aa. Khazing re hne hnyirungna re ca hrie pakhaw the'a va ungciy.
40006025	Cacuonakawta ica chang yi, “Ning riy dang riypa kawlie cuose, nama pangpa hne abuv-ase riypa kawlie cuose, ningting hringna kawlieta nama palung rie thyi kha se. Hringna ca sa laata biepuv vie te pangpa ca cawsie laata a biepuv vie cuo vama?
40006026	Pavaa zaw hing mang tie ung: saciy vaa vayi, sa zaw la yite be luo raw vayi. Cuorasala vuoruo lie a awpa nama Paa ta ama riy a pabi thluo yi. Niema ca pavaa laata nama sungnaa vie karaa cuo vama?
40006027	Nama palung rie a thyi nakawta nama hringnapa siymaluo pakha chuo a pasyi sa vie khupa pakha chuo nama aw ma?
40006028	Cacuonakaw khaapanakawma cawsie kawlie nama palung rie a thyi? Ruo lie paapaapa khiy pacuo tie ung, tuokhaatama ama lethaw, re hrie vayi, cawsie cuota palaa hrie vayi.
40006029	Ica chang yi, Siepahruo Solomon khahmuo, khatluv kha ta a hnyirung raalaa pa khata a hnyirungna hne a cawsie kha hingpa paapaapa paakha puvthenapa tluv hing ta vyi.
40006030	Ata ning hring te mawluo myi chung luo hmaw riypa, ruo lie aphuv kung zaw hmuo a pangituv Khazing ta niema changchiy ca ca pangi li pata aca aw'a yi ma? Nama zangna hing a caw hringhruo de!
40006031	Cacuonakawta, ‘Khaapama ma ning aa? khaapama ma dang aa? Khaapama maa tue aa?’ tapata nama palung rie thyi kha se.
40006032	Hingpa hing ca Khazing a zang lipa tie ta ama palung rie a thyikhyi tawpa tana a cuo. Vuoruo lie a awpa nama Paa ta hingpa bangkhuo hing namaa hu diy tapa kha a pachang.
40006033	Cacuonakawta Khazing pena hne aa dangna kha huv taa ungla hmanghrangpa bangkhuo zaw hing aca pi puo ngiethie'a yi.
40006034	Cacuonakaw mawluo cuota nama palung rie thyi kha se, mawluo ta ama cuota a palung rie thyi thluo se. Ata ning'apa ruvnaana hing ata ning cuota aa de.
40007001	Nama zaw bie ripa pa na cuo li riypata malie bie kha va ripa kha.
40007002	Tahematapakieca malie bie na ripa pa haakhata nama zaw bie ripa pata na cuo aa. Malie cuota nama na hmuopa panangna khata na nama zaw panangpa ta na cuo aa.
40007003	Na ming chunglie thingtung hmuo siysaa ri li pata tuokhaatama na uvnu ming chunglie mingbuo kha na mang?
40007004	Na ming chunglie thingtung a aw pata tuokhaatama na uvnu ca, ‘na ming chunglie mingbuo kha ca lapa'a ang,’ na ta the?
40007005	Nama, phahruo a cuopa, nama ming chung taata thingtung kha thuepathla taa lamuo na uvnu ming chunglie mingbuo thue riypa kha siephele khata na hmung the'a ta.
40007006	A pathepa hmang kha uv va pi kha ung. Nama lungvaa kha va hmielie va thaw kha ung. A phyi ta a chaapuo khu taata caa vya palichiy'a te a ca sie'a yi.
40007007	Hie ungla pi pata nama cuo aa; huv ungla nama hmung aa; cakhaw ungla ingchiy kha aca pahaw'a yi.
40007008	Tahematapakieca a hiepa bangkhuo ca pipa cuo'a yite, a huvpa bangkhuo ca ama hmung aa, a cakhawpa bangkhuo ca ingchiy kha pahaw pata ama cuo aa.
40007009	Nama saata ta viechuo acaa hiepa yi ta alung a pipa pakha chuo nama aw'a ma?
40007010	Ngaa acaa hiepa yi ta pariy a pipa pakha chuo nama aw'a ma?
40007011	Niema a pha lipa tie ta nama saata kha tuokhaatama hmangphapa i pi aa tapa nama pachang kieca, vuoruo lie a awpa nama paa changchiy taca ama'a lie a hiepa tie kha hmangphapa khatluv tama a pi'a yi?
40007012	Malie ta ima cunglie vya tue yi se tapata nama khingpa haakhata malie cunglie kha va tue tie ung. Ama cana phungbie hne profet tie pacuvna ta a cuo.
40007013	Chiypakaa baata taakhata a ngie tie ung. Tahematapakieca rana luo a sipa chiypakaa ca ku te a luopuv zaw a na, a ziypa zaw ama hluvsa.
40007014	Cuorasala hringna luopuv a sipa chiypakaa ca baa te a luo zaw a ruv, a hmungpa cawsaa zaw ama cawta.
40007015	Profetpakhipa tie kha a raaring tie ung. Tuv vang a buv pata niema'a luo a vaw yite, cuorasala ama chung luo ca cahnie a hruopa na ama lu.
40007016	Iema ca ama thyipaa kha mang ungla nama pachang aa. Ahling kung taata mingsuv thyi ama lu buo ma? Saakuvmuokalaw kung taata thyikuv ama lu buo ma?.
40007017	Cahaangiethiecata thingkung phapa ta thyiphapa pathyi te thingkung pha lipa ta thyiphalipa a pathyi.
40007018	Thingkung phapa ta thyiphalipa pathyi vyi, thingkung pha lipa ta thyiphapa pathyi ra vyi.
40007019	Thyiphapa a pathyi lipa thingkung bangkhuo ca hu pata myi luo thawpa a cuo aa.
40007020	Cahaa cata profetpakhipa tie ca ama thyipaa khata nama pachang aa.
40007021	“Abyipa, Abyipa naa tapa bangkhuo vuoruo pena chung luo a ngie diy'a vayi, cuorasala vuoruo lie a awpa i Paa khingna a tuepa dyina a ngie aa.
40007022	Capa ning thue ca cawsaa hluvpuv ta, ‘Abyipa, Abyipa! na ming ta Khazing thuophaabie ma za ri, na ming ta khuevuo zaw za papya yi pate, na ming ta kharuehaa hmang zaw ma za tue cuo vama?’ ama ta aa.
40007023	Catiyta kama ta, ‘Ca pachang buo vayi ang. Cakuo ung, cawsaa pha lipa zaw, i ta'a yi,’ a ta.
40007024	“Cakhutaata i bie hing thyi te a ziypa ca alung cunglie ing a sapa cawsaa singpapaa haatana a cuo.
40007025	Khy a saa, tiy a le, thliy khuopuv ta a vya hruo te capa ing ca a nuo tiyta alung cunglie sapa a cuo nakawta a lie vyi.
40007026	I bie thyi raalaa te a ziy lipa ca viehnang cunglie ing a sapa a ngaapapaa haatana a cuo.
40007027	Khy a saa, tiy a le, thliy khuopuv ta a vya hruo te a nuo ca capa ing ca a lie te, a ra patlaa diy,” a ta.
40007028	Zingsuv ta hing bie palang a ri khu taata cawsaazaapuv ca a pacuv na zya kha ama kharue a haasa,
40007029	tahematapakieca phungbie saya tie haakhata cuo li pata nawhnyituv tie haakhata a pacuv yi.
40008001	Zingsuv ca tluocung taakhata za cung te cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama ziy.
40008002	Caahminghmaa a phyapa pakha a vaw te a hmielie a pakhuv pane te, “Abyipa, na khing kieca ina pathe sa khu ciy,” a ta.
40008003	Zingsuv ta a kuv pazuo te a hrie, “I khing. Pathe tie,” a ta. Capapaa ca a pasana taata sungkha ta a tluo.
40008004	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta, “Ahunghmuo chang kha yi, cadyiseca tluobyipa'a luo kha vaa la vaa pahmung sa tie, cakhutaa cawsaa hmiekunglie i tluo tli tapa paluosana ta Moses ta tue riypa a tapa hriykhungrina kha tue tie”, a ta.
40008005	Zingsuv ca Kapernaum khy luo a vaa ngie ning kha riebyi pakha ta a vya taw te,
40008006	“Abyipa, i changtaapa pakha ca pakya te a pasa a ruv hringhruo nakawta ing liena a laa thluo,” a ta.
40008007	Zingsuv ta, “A vaw'a ang te i patluo sa aa,” a ta.
40008008	Riebyipa ta, “Abyipa, kama ca i ingchung luo nama a vaw riypata a tla va ang. Cuorasala na ryi kaakha na pathlie kieca i changtaapa ca a tluo aa.
40008009	Kama zaw hing Abyi le viepa rawlie a awpa i cuo pahaata, i rawlie rieka i hnyi ra. Pakha kha, “Cakuo,” i ta kie cakuo te, a hrangpa pakha kha, “A vaw,” i ta kieca aa vaw; cakhutaa i sii kha, “Hingpa hing tue,” i ta kieca a tue,” a ta.
40008010	Zingsuv ta capa bie ca a thyi tiyta a nang-uosa te a ziypa tie kha, “Hinghaapa zangna a hnyipa Israel ming pakha hmuo hmung buo va ang.
40008011	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: hinghaapaapa zangna hing Israel ming chunglie hmuota hmung va ang. Ica chang yi, ningchiy ningtla taata cawsaa hluvpuv ca a vaw'a yite, vuoruo pena chunglie kha Abraham, Isak, Jakob zaw hneta sa ama ning pakhaw nguoluo ning kha
40008012	vuoruo pena a cu riypa tie tlaku kha ale khyzingna luo thawpa ta cuo'a yite, ama lie kha caa yite ama haa ama rie aa,” a ta.
40008013	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta riebyipa kha, “Cakuo tie; na zangna haata na cuota tuepa cuose,” a ta. Riebyipa changtaapa ca capa cuo lie cata a tluo.
40008014	Zingsuv ta Piter ing luo kha a ngie ca, Peter piynung ca luvce ta za pasa te iehmang lie aa zie pakha a hmung.
40008015	A kuv kha hrie te, a nge lingpa kha tluo te, thu te ama kha a mangsang.
40008016	Capa zuoluo cata khuevuo ta a tuepa cawsaa a hluvpuv kha ama'a luo ama vya chiykhyi. A ryi kaakha ta thlaapa kha papya diy te a pasapa bangkhuo kha a patluo sa yi.
40008017	Hingpa hing profet Isaiah ta, “Ama ta ma tluo linapa kha la te ma pasana zaw kha phya te a sikhyi,” a tapa a tlingna riypata a cuo.
40008018	Zingsuv ta a thaalie cawsaa hluvpuv kha a hmung tiy yi ta, riyliy huesuo luo vaa riypata a chang yi.
40008019	Phungbie saya pakha a vaw te, “Saya, na sina bangkhuo tana ica ziy aa,” a ta.
40008020	Zingsuv ta, “Cahnie zaw ta khue hnyi yite pavaa zaw ta buv ama hnyi, cuorasala Cawsaa Saacapaa ca luv china hmang hmuota hnyi vyi,” a ta.
40008021	Ama a ziytuv a cuopa a hrangpa pakha ta, “Abyipa, kaa'a ang te i paa kha va paby taa thi'a ang,” a ta.
40008022	Zingsuv ta, “Na ziy tie, a thiypa tie khata ama'a thiypa ca paby thluo yi se,” a ta.
40008023	Zingsuv ca sawkawpalaw luo kie te ziytuv tie ta ama paziy.
40008024	Thliychie khuopuv ta a vya hruo te sawkawpalaw ca tiylaw ta buvkhung aa nang, cuorasala Zingsuv ca aa hmung.
40008025	Ziytuv tie ta vaa yite ama pathu. “Malie khuo tie, Abyipa! vuotaa ma thiy diy'a nang hing” ama ta.
40008026	Zingsuv ta, “Zangna diydyapa zaw, Khaapanakawma nama thlaa a zang?” a ta yi. Cakhutaa thu te thliy hne riyliy kha a chuo ca nesiyliy khata ama die.
40008027	Ama kharue ta haa te, “Tuokhaapa cawsaa ma a cuo ryarya, thliy hne riyliy tahmuo a ri amaa ngie,” ama ta.
40008028	Zingsuv ca riyliy huesuo Gadara ama tapa ruo luo kha a va chiy tiyta khuevuo ta aa hryipa cawsaa pahning ca thluo taata kya pya yite ama kha amaa taw. Hingpa tie hing ciy amaa chiysa nakawta capa luopuv ca ahungtahmuo ziy nguo vayi.
40008029	Sungkhapuv ta khi yite, “Khazing Saacapaa, tuokhaama malie na tue khing? A cuo aa de hluo tama kiema riethyi pi riypata naa vaw,” ama ta.
40008030	Iema'a taata a hla lina hmang lie va a hluvpuv kha ama tle nguoluo.
40008031	Khuevuo tie ta Zingsuv kha paakie yite, “Malie na papya kieca va chung luo hue malie pangie sa thi tie,” ama ta.
40008032	Zingsuv ta, vaa ung! a ta yi. Cacuonakaw pya yite va chung luo ca ama vaa ngie. Va bangkhuo ca lungkuo taata riyliy chung luo a zupathla yite tiy lieta ama thiy diy.
40008033	Va a khiepa tie ca khychung luo kha a ruo yite khuevuo a hnyipa cunglie a cuopa bangkhuo kha ama va chang.
40008034	Cacuonakaw khychung taata cawsaa bangkhuo kha Zingsuv a taw riypata pya yite, ama hmung ca, ama ruo taata pya riypata paa ama kie.
40009001	Zingsuv ca sawkawpalaw chung luo kha kie te riyliy kha va te pakhaa te a khy luo kha a pha.
40009002	A pakyapa pakha kha a pangphaa hne a vya puvle yite amaa luo amaa vaw khyi. Zingsuv ta khatluv tama ama zang tapa kha a hmung tiy yi ta a pakyapapaa kha, “I sapaa, na palung a cahra sa, na suena ca a ngiethe pata a cuo tli,” a ta.
40009003	Cakhutaa phungbie saya tie chekha ta iema hne iema kha, “Hingpapaa hing Khazing ese patana bie a ri,” amaa ta.
40009004	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta khaapama ama rue tapa kha a pachang nakawta, “Khaapanakawma hmang pha lipa ca nama rue?
40009005	“Na suenapa ca a ngiethe pata na cuo tli,” tapa ma a na vie, a cuo li kie, ‘Thu la cakuo tie,’ tapa ma?
40009006	Cuorasala Cawsaa Saacapaa ta hing chuelyi lie hing sue a ngiethe khuna naw a hnyi tapa kha nama pachang the na riypatana a cuo ta te a pakyapapaa kha, “Thu, na pangphaa kha a la lah ing luo cakuo,” a ta.
40009007	Cawsaapapaa ca thu te ing luo a cakuo.
40009008	Cawsaazaapuv ca ama kha ama hmung tiyta, ama nang ta uosa te, cawsaapa zaw'a lieta hinghaapa nawhnyina a pipa Khazing kha ama pathuosa.
40009009	Zingsuv ca a vya cakuole pa khata Matthai ama tapapaa ngukhyina zung lie aa tu nguoluo pakha hmung te, “Na ziy tie,” a ta. Matthai ca thu te ama kha a ziy.
40009010	Cakhutaata sa ning riypata ingchung lie aa tu ning kha, ngukhyituv hluvpuv, hne a suepa tie kha a vaw yite Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie'a lie kha amaa tu ra.
40009011	Farasi tie ta ama hmung ca ziytuv tie kyihuo khata, “Khaapanakawma nama sayapa hing ngukhyituv tie'a nata a suepa zaw hneta sa a ning?” ama ta.
40009012	Zingsuv ta a thyi tiyta, “A tluopa cawsaa ca siybyi a hu vayi, a pasapa dyina a hu yi, a ta.
40009013	Cakuo ungla, ‘Hriykhung a rina laata cawsaa nangdue thena khana i khingpa ta a cuo,’ a tapa Caapathepa bie ta a ri khingna kha va rue tie ung. Cawsaa aa dangpa ku riypata a vaw va ang, a suepa ku riypatana i vaw,” a ta.
40009014	Cakhutaata Johan a ziytuv tie kha Zingsuv'a luo a vaw yite, “Khaapanakawma kiema hne Farasi ming hing sa maa uv lawmaw pata nama caa ziytuv tie hing sa uv li pata ama aw?” ama ta.
40009015	Zingsuv ta, “Nungchiyna pyi luo kupa tie ca napuv a chiytuvpapaa iema'a lie a aw kalie chung ca ngiechi pata ama aw the'a ma? Nung a chiytuvpapaa kha iema'a taata aa chena cuo kha vya tlung'a te cathue cata sa kha ama uv thluo'a lie.
40009016	Ahungtahmuo cawhlungpa kha cawthaapa ta abie thla buo vayi, a pangbie khata tlaa khyi hryly'a te a khue kha a ku hryly aa.
40009017	Cahaa cata savang ungthyi hlungpa chung luo kha mingsuv tiy ahrang raw buo vayi, ama raw kieca savang kha kyi'a te mingsuv tiy kha a zuv diy aa, savang ungthyi zaw a ra diy puo aa. Calaacata savang thaapa chung luo kha mingsuv tiy ahrang ama raw kieca a suohning ta amaa bang hne aa,” a ta.
40009018	Zingsuv ta capa bie iema'a lie a ri nguoluo ning kha apungna-ing uvthyi pakha a vaw te, a hmiekunglie kha a pakhuv pane te, “Ata bala hingna i sacanungnung a thiy, cuorasala a vaw la a cunglie na kuv na khang kieca a tluo aa,” a ta.
40009019	Zingsuv ca thu te ziytuv tie hne khata ama kha ama paziy.
40009020	Capa ning cata kung hraa hlyihning chung thiylang pasana ta a pasapa canungnung pakha ca Zingsuv hnang luo taakhata a vaw te a pangpeta kha a taw.
40009021	Amaa na ama ta, “a pang hing i taw khu kieca i tluo aa,” aa ta.
40009022	Zingsuv ca a vya pali te capa nung ca a hmung. “I sacanung, na palung a cahra sa, na zangna na caa patluo,” a ta. Capahnecata canungnung ca a tluo.
40009023	Zingsuv ca Judah ming uvthyipapaa ingchung luo kha a ngie tiyta khang hne daa hne tung yite cawsaa amaa kalaa patlawpa kha a hmung ca,
40009024	“Pya diy ung, hingpa haatiynung hing thiy vyi, aa hmung nguoluo,” a ta. Ama bangkhuo ta ama pahnyisue.
40009025	Cuorasala cawsaa ama pya diy pahne ta Zingsuv ca haatiynung khuo luo kha a ngie te, a buo ta va patuv te a kya thu.
40009026	Capa thuohlaa ca a cahriy ruo bangkhuo ta a pathuo diy.
40009027	Zingsuv ca capa hmang taacata pya te a cakuole pa khata mingcuepa pahning ta vya paziyle yite, “David Saacapaa, ngie malie chi thi tie,” ta yite ama khi.
40009028	Zingsuv ca ing chung luo a ngie tiyta mingcuepa pahning ca ama'a luo kha amaa vaw. Zingsuv ta, “Kama hingta ica patluo sa khu yi tapata nama zang ma?” a ta yi. “Abyipa, ma zang,” ama ta.
40009029	Zingsuv ta ama ming kha hrie te, “Nama zangnapa haata cuose!” ta yite,
40009030	ama ming ca a vuo pakhaa. Zingsuv ta, “Hingpa kaw hing ahunghmuo pachang sa'a va ungciy,” ta te iema kha a cusa pata a thlu yi.
40009031	Cuorasala cakuo yite Zingsuv thuohlaa kha capa pe bangkhuo khata ama pathyi.
40009032	Iema ama cakuo khu taata khuevuo a hnyi nakawta bie a ri the lipa pakha kha Zingsuv'a luo amaa vaw khyi.
40009033	Khuevuo a papya khu pahne ta, cawsaapapaa ca bie a ri khu. Cawsaa bangkhuo ama kharue ta haasa te, “Israel ming chunglie hinghaapa hmang hing hmung buo va puv,” ama ta.
40009034	Cuorasala Farasi ming ta, “Khuevuo tie byipa ming tana khuevuo a papya khu,” ama ta.
40009035	Zingsuv ca khypuv khyta bang-khuo kha tlawle te, apungna-ing chunglie kha vuoruo pena thuophaabie kha pacuv yite, pasanapa phangting ta a pasapa zaw kha a patluo sa yi.
40009036	Cawsaazaapuv kha a hmung tiy yi ta iema cunglie kha kawpacuona a hnyi, tahematapakieca khietuv a hnyi lipa tuv haata riethyi vuosuo pata ama aw nakawta a cuo.
40009037	Cacuonakaw ziytuv tie kha, “Sa hrie riypa a hluvsa a aw raalaa pata a hrietuv ca a cawta dyina a aw yi;
40009038	cacuonakaw sa hrie riypa a hnyituv Abyipa'a luo kha sa a hrietuv a hluvsa a za pathlie riypata thlaa chuo tie ung,” a ta.
40010001	Zingsuv ta ziytuv hlyihning tie kha ku yite a pyalyipa thlaapa tie papya khuna hne pasana bangkhuo patluo sa khuna kha a pi yi.
40010002	Hingpa hing lucuotuv hlyihning tie ming ta a cuo: pakhana ta Simon (Piter ama tapa paa) hne a nuta Andru; Zebedi saacapaapa Jeim hne a nuta Johan;
40010003	Filip hne Bartholomew; Thomas hne ngukhyituv Matthai, Alfeas saacapaapa Jeim, hne Tadias;
40010004	Phangcuo Simon hne Zingsuv a lyituv Judas Iskariot ta ama cuo.
40010005	Zingsuv ta pahraahlyihning tie kha pathlie yite a raw luo haahingta bie a taa yi: “Jentail ming ruo luo cuose, Samaria ming khy luo cuose a ngie kha ung.
40010006	Cuorasala Israel mingphang chung taata a viepa tuv zaw'a luo kha vaa tie ung.
40010007	Vaa ungla thuophaabie kha va phu tie ung, ‘Vuoruo pena ca aa ngie tli!’
40010008	A pasapa kha patluo sa tie ung, a thiypa kha pathu pakhaa ung, caahminghmaa ta a pasapa kha pathe sa ungla khuevuo kha papya tie ung. Niema ca a selawpa ta nama hmung, cacuonakaw a selawpa ta pi tie ung.
40010009	Siy, ngu hne thiyhring tuokaa kha a cake kha ung.
40010010	Khy tlawna riypa sahrie, buohryi zunghning, phyipakaw hne khuecahryi zaw kha a phya kha ung. Rehrietuv ca amaa hupa kha ring riypa ama cuo.
40010011	Tuokhaapa khypuv cuose khyta cuose namaa ngie tiyta palung tluosa pata ingtlung caa pa-awpa tie'a luo kha a ngie ungla nama si hluo li ama ing lie kha va aw ung.
40010012	Ama ingchung luo namaa ngie tiyta bie a chang ung.
40010013	Capa ing ca aa phuv kieca ama cunglie diena tlung sala, aa phuv li kieca diena ca niema'a luo vya kaa se.
40010014	Pakhakha ta niema kha ca cuhluo lipa yi ta, nama bie zaw kha naa a thlie li kieca, khapa ing a cuo li kie khy kha nama sise tiyta nama phyipazaa lie buvcing kha a cakhawsue siy tie ung.
40010015	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Bierinapa ning thueta ca Sodom hne Gomorrah khy khana capa khy laa cata a diy vie aa.
40010016	Naathlie tie ung! Cahnie hraw luo pathliepa tuv haatana niema kha ica pathlie yi. Cacuonakawta pariy haata sing ungla thuvruv haata nama nang ne se.
40010017	A raaring tie ung! Bierina zung luo ca chiykhyi'a yite apungna-ing lie kha asung ta aca tuv'a yi.
40010018	Kama kawlieta iema hne Jentail ming cunglie tehte cuo riypata uvtuv byi hne siepahruo hmie luo kha aca chiykhyi'a yi.
40010019	Bierina zung luo aca chiykhyi tiy yi ta tuokhaatama i ri aa tapa hne khaapa ma i ri aa tapa kha nama palung rie thyi kha se. Na ri riypa ca khapa cuo lie kha pi pata na cuo aa.
40010020	Bie a rituv hing niema cuo va ungciy, cuorasala nama Paa'a taata Thlaapa ta niema hmuo pata bie a ri patana a cuo.
40010021	Uvcanu mamaa kha thie riypata malie kuv luo a pi'a yite, nung hne paa zaw ta saata kha cahaa cata ama tue aa, saata zaw khata nung hne paa kha a du'a yite thie riypata malie kuv luo kha ama pi aa.
40010022	Kama kawlieta cawsaa mekaa ta aca hue'a yi. Cuorasala a chuona te ta a ang pathla khupa ca khuo pata ama cuo aa.
40010023	Khy kha lieta hrisaathieruena nama ang kieca khy hrang luo kha a ruo tie ung. Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Cawsaa Saacapaa aa zuv hluo ta Israel ruo khy bangkhuo hing patlung diy hmuo'a va ungciy.
40010024	“Siengaachie ca a saya laata le vie vyi, sii zaw a byipaapa laata le vie vyi.
40010025	Siengaachie pakha ca a saya tluv a ta kieca aa de, sii pakha zaw a byipaapa tluv a ta kieca aa de. Ingchungkhue lie a luv ce kha Beelzebul ama ta kieca, ingchungkhue ming changchiy ca khatluv tama thuo pachipa ama cuo aa,” a ta.
40010026	Cacuonakaw iema kha ciy kha ung. Pahruvpa bangkhuo hing pahawpa cuo'a te, a paruv ta tuepa bangkhuo hing pachang pata a cuo aa.
40010027	A zingna chunglie ica changpa yi hing a khena chunglie va ri ungla a paruv ta nama thyipa kha ingcung taata phu tie ung.
40010028	Pangpa dyi thie khu te thlaapa a thie khu lipa kha ciy kha ung, pangpa hne thlaapa a suohning ta hell chunglie a thie khupa kha ciy vie tie ung.
40010029	Mingbaw sahning ca piesepa suokha tana ama zaa cuo vama? Cuorasala khapa mingbaw sakha kha hmuo nama Paa pachang li pata alyi luo tla'a vyi.
40010030	Nama luv lie nama suobuv hmuota a ri diy.
40010031	Cacuonakawta nama thlaa zang kha se, niema ca mingbaw a hluvpuv laata nama sungnaa vie.
40010032	“Cacuonakawta cawsaa hmielie kama naa cuokhyipa ahunghmuota vuoruo i Paa hmiekunglieta i cuokhyi ra aa.
40010033	Cuorasala malie hmielie naa thawpa ca vuoruo i Paa hmielie ama zaw kha i thaw ra aa,” a ta.
40010034	“Alyi luo diena phya riypatana aa vaw tapata na rue kha ung. Diena phya riypata a vaw va ang, cuorasala zueziy phya riypatana i vaw.
40010035	I vaw hnuochuopa ca saacapaa kha paa padu sa riypa, sacanung kha nung padu sa riypa hne, munung kha navaapa nung padusa riypatana a cuo.
40010036	Nama carie tie ca nama chungkhue cawsaa mamaapa khatana ama cuo aa.
40010037	“Kama laata a paa a cuo li kie a nung a due viepa ca kama hneta a phuv vyi; a saacapaa a cuo li kie a sacanung a due viepa ca kama hneta a phuv vyi.
40010038	Ahunghmuo cuose a vieluo kha a puv pata kama hnang naa ziy lipa ca kama hneta a phuv vyi.
40010039	Ahunghmuo a hringnapa kha pabang a khingpa ca a hringnapa kha pahli'a te, cuorasala kama cuota a hringnapa a pahlipa ca hringna kha a hmung aa.
40010040	“Niema caa cuhluopa ca kama kha na cuhluo te, kama naa cuhluopa ca kama naa pathliepa kha a cuhluo.
40010041	Profet kha profet a cuo nakaw ta a cuhluopa ca profet lawmuo kha hmung'a te, aa dangpa cawsaa kha aa dang nakawta a cuhluopa ca a dangna lawmuo kha a hmung aa.
40010042	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: ahunghmuo cuose hing lieta a cawcepa pakha hing kama naa ziytuv a cuo nakawta tiy cakaapa nuokha a pipa ca lawmuo kha hmung li pata aw'a vyi,” a ta.
40011001	Zingsuv ca ziytuv hlyihning kha bietaana a hnyi khu taayita, capa khypuv chunglie ta pacuv riypa hne phungri riypata capa hmang taa ca a pya.
40011002	Tiynawtuv Johan ca Zingsuv ta a tuepa hmang kaw kha thaw-ing chung taata a thyi tiyta, a hnangziytuv tie' a taakhata
40011003	bie taa te, “Nama hing a vaw riypapaa ta na cuo ma, a cuo li kie cawsaa hrangpa ma huo kalie'a ma?” a pata sa yi.
40011004	Zingsuv ta, “Vaa ungla nama thyipa hne nama hmungpa hing Johan ca va chang tie ung:
40011005	mingcuepa tie ta ama hmung, a phyi cabiepa tie ta ama cakuo, caahminghmaa a phyapa tie ama pathe, a naa ruepa tie ta ama thyi, a thiypa tie thupakhaa yite a siypasapa tie kha thuophaabie changpa ama cuo.
40011006	Kama kawlieta a palung a ra lipa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo,” a ta.
40011007	Johan ziytuv tie ama kaa taata Zingsuv ta zaapuv kha Johan kaw a chang yi: “Khaapa mang riypata ma ruochung luo kha nama vaa? Thliy ta a canyipa phiepahlaa kung ma?
40011008	Khaapa mang riypata ma nama va pya? Cawsie phasapa a tuepa pakhakha hmung riypata ma? Cawsie phasapa a tuepa tie ca siepahruo ing lie muo ama aw ta.
40011009	Khaapa hmung riypata ma nama va pya? Profet ma? Aa hmuo, profet laata a le viepa na a cuo.
40011010	Johan kaw hing Caapathepa ta, ‘Mang tie, nama cuota luo a sa riypata i biephyatuv kha, na hmie luo i pathlie lu aa,’ a tapa khana a cuo.
40011011	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Canung ta ama sapa hrawlieta Tiynawtuv Johan laata a le viepa aw vayi. Cuorasala vuoruo pena chunglie a cawcepa ca Johan laata a le vie.
40011012	Tiynawtuv Johan chuo taata ata ning tepa hingta vuoruo pena ca a duna khuopuv ta ang te, a dutuv tie ta hruohra ta la amaa ting.
40011013	Johan chuo te khata profet bangkhuo hne Moses phungbie ta vuoruo pena kaw hing ama ri;
40011014	ca bie ca nama zang khing kieca, Johan hing a vaw riypa Elijah khatana a cuo.
40011015	Thyina naa a hnyipa ca thyi tie ung!
40011016	“Ata chuo cawsaa zaw hing khaapa hne tama i pakhingpuo'a yi? Chadawtluo lie a tu yite phuvkha hne phuvkha a khisuepa haatiy tie hne tana amaa lu.
40011017	‘Ramang maca tungpa yi, cuorasala luo va ungciy. Caana hlaa maacaa ngiypa yi, cuorasala caa va ungciy.’
40011018	Johan ca ning li dang li pata aa vaw tiyta, ‘khuevuo na a hnyi e ama ta’;
40011019	Cawsaa Saacapaa ca ningpuo dangpuo te aa vaw tiyta, ‘Mang tie ung, ning a rangpa hne sahmaa a rangpa, ngukhyituv tie hne a suepa tie viesaa tana a cuo,’ ama ta. Cuorasala, singna ca aa hmuo tapa kha a thyipaa na a paluo sa,” a ta.
40011020	Zingsuv ta kharuehaana hmang hluv vie bangkhuo a tuenapa khy ming kha ama suena amaa ngiepachiy li nakawta a mawchie yi.
40011021	“Khorazin khy hne Bethsaida khy, na ma cuota ciy aa chiysa hringhruo de! Niema'a lie tuepa kharuehaa hmang hing Tair hne Sidon khy lie tuepa za cuo sala, hluo ning taakhata cawchiepa a tue'a yite, buvcuo a phuv'a yite ama suena kha amaa zaa ngiepachiy'a mangtli.
40011022	Cuorasala ica chang yi: Bierinapa ning thue ca niema laa hing ta Tair hne Sidon ming cuota nangduena a aw vie aa.
40011023	Cakhutaa, nama Kapernaum khy, Vuoruo te tama naa pasuo khing? Cuo vyi, hell luo thawpa tana na cuo aa! Nama'a lie tuepa kharuehaa hmang bangkhuo hing Sodom lie tuepa za cuo sala, ata ning te hingta aa hmang aa!
40011024	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Bierina ning thue ca niema laa hing ta Sodom cuo tana nangduena a aw vie aa,” a ta.
40011025	Capa cuo ning kha, Zingsuv ta, “I Paa, alyi hne vuoruo Byipa! A singpa hne a thepa tie'a taata na nupa kha a the lipa tie cunglie na paluo sa nakawta icaa law.
40011026	A cuo, I Paa, capaca nama ta cuose tapata na khingpa a cuo.
40011027	I Paa ta hmangting bangkhuo ina pi diy tli. Paa ri li pata Saacapaa kha ahungtahmuo pachang khu vayi, cakhutaa Saacapaa hne Saacapaa ta pachang ra yi se tapata aa tlawpa tie ri li pata ca ahungtahmuo Paa kha pachang vayi.
40011028	“Hmangriy a phyapa hne a rie a thyipa bangkhuo kama'a luo a vaw tie ung, ica pahy sa hyalya'a yi.
40011029	I syihnaa kha a la pata phya ungla, kama'a taahingta a cuv tie ung; tahematapakieca kama ca a nangnepa hne raw a canawpa ta cuo ang te; a pahyna kha nama hmung aa.
40011030	Tahematapakieca i syihnaa phya ca na te i hmang ca aa hy,” a ta.
40012001	Capa cuo ning, Sabbath ning kha Zingsuv ca lu kha capiepaa le te a si. Ziytuv tie ca ama nang a diy nakawta sa-uv kha pahriy paale yite a chuo kha ama baale.
40012002	Farasi ming ta ama hmung tiyta, Zingsuv kha, “Mang tie, caa ziytuv tie ta Sabbath ning tue phung a cuo lipa ama tue hing,” ama ta.
40012003	Zingsuv ta, “David hne a cawsaa zaw ama nang a diy ning kha David ta khaapama a za tue tapa kha ri buo va ung cama?
40012004	Khazing ing chung luo kha a ngie te ama cuose, a viesaa zaw cuose, ningphung a cuo lipa, tluobyi tie dyi ta ning riypa, Khazing ama pipa viechuo ama ning pakha.
40012005	Cakhutaata Sabbath ning ta tluobyi tie ta Biena-ing chunglie Sabbath phung kha ama para thluo pata a sue tapata ama cuo lipa kha Phungbie caa-uv chunglie ri buo va ung cama?
40012006	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: biena-ing laata a le viepa na hingpa lie hing a aw.
40012007	Caapathepa ta, ‘hriykhung a rina laata nangduena na i khing vie,’ a tapa hingta khaapama a ri khing tapa kha pachang ungla ca a sue lipa kha sue phaw'a va ungciy.
40012008	Tahematapakieca Cawsaa Saacapaa ca Sabbath Byi tana a cuo.
40012009	Zingsuv ca khapa hmang taakhata pya te apungna-ing luo kha a ngie. Capa lieca a kuv a pakyapapaa kha a za aw.
40012010	Ama a pachie khingpa tie ta Zingsuv kha, “Sabbath ning ta cawsaa patluo sa phung a cuo ma?” ama ta.
40012011	Zingsuv ta, “Abiephungpa ta niema chung taa pakhakha hingta tuv sakhata dyi hnyi ungla, kha nama tuv kha Sabbath ning ta khue chung luo a tla kieca thue li pata nama aw'a ma?
40012012	Cawsaa ca tuv laata khatluv tama muo a hnyi vie! Cacuonakaw Sabbath ning ta hmangphapa tue ca a phung ta a cuo,” a ta.
40012013	Cakhutaa a kuv a pakyapapaa kha, “na kuv pazuo,” a ta. Pazuo te a kuv ca hrakha luo haakhata a tluo.
40012014	Farasi ming ca cakuo yite Zingsuv thie khuna riypa kha khue ama khuo.
40012015	Zingsuv ta capa kaw ca a pachang tiyta capa taacata a pya. Cawsaa hluvpuv ta ziy yite, a pasapa bangkhuo patluo sa yite,
40012016	ama kaw kha a ahunghmuo chang li riypata a thlu yi.
40012017	Hinghaahingta a tuepa ca profet Isaiah pakaa taata Khazing ta:
40012018	I tlawpa i changtaapa ca hingpa lie hingna a aw. I duepa ta cuote a cunglie i palung a tluo. A cunglie i Thlaapa za chi'a ang te, Ama ta a dangna bie kha mingphang bangkhuo'a luo a pathyi aa.
40012019	Ama ca khuopuv ta khi li'a pata, Ahungtahmuo a ueryi kha Luopuv lieta thyi'a vayi.
40012020	Adangna kha tena a pacuo sa hluo li A tlipa phiepahlaa kung kha thlipachung li'a pata, A thiy'a nangpa myi-ing kha pache'a vyi.
40012021	Ama ming ta mingphang bangkhuo kha a ruechuona ama hnyi aa,” a tapa patling sa riypatana a cuo.
40012022	Cakhutaa Zingsuv'a luo kha khuevuo ta aa hryi nakawta a ming cue te bie a ri khu lipa kha amaa vaw khyi. Zingsuv ta patluo sa te, bie ri khu te a ming zaw a vuo pakhaa.
40012023	Cawsaazaapuv ca ama nang uo te, “Hingpapaa hing David saacapaa ta a cuo'a ma?” ama ta.
40012024	Cuorasala Farasi tie ta capa bie ama thyi tiyta, “Hingpapaa ta khuevuo a papya khupa ca khuevuo byipa Beelzebul ta naw a pi nakawtana a cuo,” ama ta.
40012025	Zingsuv ta khaapama ama rue tapa kha pachang te, iema kha, “Khaapa ruo hmuo cuose iema hne iema a che yite a dupa tie ca rana luo na ama chiy aa. Cakhutaa khy khykha a cuo li kie ingchung khue khuekha ca a che te iema hne iema amaa du kieca a daa khu'a vayi.
40012026	Cahaa cata Setaa ta Setaa kha a papya kieca ama hne ama a dupa cuo te a ruo ca tuokhaatama a daa khu aa?
40012027	Kama na Beelzebul ming ta khuevuo a papya ang tapata a cuo kieca niema caa ziytuv tie kha haw ahungma khuevuo papya khunapa kha a pi yi? Cacuonakawta iema khana niema cuota bie a chituv a cuo'a yi.
40012028	Cuorasala kama na thlaapa cahrana ta khuevuo a papya ang tapata a cuo kieca Khazing pena ca niema'a luo a vaw tli tanapa tana a cuo.
40012029	Cawsaa thaaruvpapaa kha ciypaki taa li pata ahungma a ingchung luo a ngie pata a chechiy kha a lapa khu aa? A ciypaki taa kiedyi na a la khu aa.
40012030	Kama naa daakhyi lipa ca naa dutuv tana a cuo. Kama kha pahmyapakhaw naa bya lipa ca a cadaapatlaatuv tana a cuo.
40012031	Cacuonakaw, biehmisi tana ica chang yi: cawsaa hing ama suena phangting hne Khazing a du pata bie ama rina taata a ngiethe pata ama cuo aa, cuorasala Thlaapa a du pata bie ama ripa ca a ngiethe khu pata cuo'a vayi.
40012032	Cawsaa Saacapaa a du pata bie a ripa ca a ngiethe khu pata ama cuo aa, cuorasala Thlaapa Pathe a du pata bie a ripa ca ata chuo lie cuose, hmie luo chuo lie cuose a ngiethe khu pata cuo'a vayi.
40012033	“Thingthyi phapa lu the riypata thingkung phapa hnyi aa hu, a kung a chie kieca thingthyi a chie ra aa. Thingkung ca a thyi ta ma pa chang khu.
40012034	Pariy ciypathla tie zaw, cawsaa chiepa nama cuo pata ca tuokhaatama biephapa ca nama ri the aa? Pakaa ca pathiypalung chunglie a awpa khana a ri.
40012035	Cawsaa phapa taca hmangphapa a pacungpa chung taa khata hmangphapa pachiy te, cawsaa chiepa ta ca hmangchiepa a pacungpa chung taa khata hmangchiepa kha a papya.
40012036	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: nama pakaa taata biesiysapawpa nama ripa bangkhuo cuo khata khaapanakawma i za ri tapa kha Bierinapa ning thueta ca nama pasie sa a hu aa.
40012037	Niema bie mamaapa khata duopacupa cuo'a ung cate, niema bie mamaapa khata suephawpa nama cuo aa.
40012038	Cakhutaa Phungbie saya tie chekha hne Farasi tie chekha ta, “Saya, kharuehaa hmang suokhakha na tuepa na ma hmung khing,” ama ta.
40012039	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “A pha lipa hne Khazing hmiekunglie zangtluo a tla lipa mingphang zaw ma kharuehaa hmang a hie ungciy? Profet Jonah kharuehaa hmang ta li pata kharuehaa hmang suokha hmuo tue'a va ang.
40012040	Jonah ta ngapuv riy chunglie ningthung hne zuothung a awpa haakhata Cawsaa Saacapaa zaw alyi chunglie ningthung hne zuothung a aw ra aa.
40012041	Bierinapa ning thueta Nineveh khy ming kha a daa yite sue aca phaw'a yi, tahematapakieca iema ca Jonah phungripa ama za thyi pata sue amaa zaa ngiepachiy; ica chang yi: ama lie hingna Jonah laata a le viepa a aw!
40012042	Bierinapa ning thueta Sheba siepahruonung kha a daa te sue aca phaw'a yi, tahematapakieca ruo luohlaa puv taata Solomon singna hne a pacuvnapa naathlie repa ta a vya tlaw. Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: ama lie hingna Solomon laata a le viepa a aw!
40012043	“A pyalyipa thlaapa ca cawsaa chung taakhata pya te tiy aw lina ruocaapa chunglie kha a awna hmang huv te aa khie, cuorasala suvkha hmuo hmung vyi.
40012044	Cacuonakawta “I vya pyanapa ing luo khana i kaa pakhaa aa,” a ta. A kaa ca a ing kha a hripa, a pathesapa, hne a chikakysa pata a va hmung.
40012045	Cakhutaa vaa te ama laata a chie viepa thlaapa chiepa pasariy kha va u yite a vaw yite capa lieca ama aw. Capa cawsaapa aw zya ca a za cuotaana laa khata a chie vie. Cahaapa cana ata chuo cawsaa pha lipa zaw cunglie hing a tlung aa,” a ta.
40012046	Zingsuv ta cawsaazaapuv'a lie bie a ri nguoluo ning kha a nung hne a nuta zaw ta ama kha bie rihne riypata ale lie a daa yite ama huo.
40012047	Cacuonakaw cawsaa pakha ta, “Na nung hne na nuta zaw na bie rihne riypata ale lie caa huo yi,” a ta.
40012048	Zingsuv ta ama paa kyihuo khata, “Ahungma i nung, hne i nuta zaw ta a cuo yi?”
40012049	a ta khu taata ziytuv tie kha a kuvdaw ta daw yite, “Iema hingna i nung hne i nuta zaw ta a cuo yi!
40012050	Ahunghmuo cuo sala vuoruo lie a awpa i Paa khingnapa a tuepa ca i nuta, i sieta hne i nung ta ama cuo,” a ta.
40013001	Capa ning ngiethie cata Zingsuv ca ing taakhata pya te riyliy kielie kha a tu.
40013002	A vya hmyasuepa cawsaazaapuv kha ama hluv tuv nakawta sawkawpalaw chung luo kha kie te aa tu, zaapuv ca ngiekuo lie kha amaa tu.
40013003	Pakhingpuonabie a hluvsa kha hmuo te a pacuvpa yi ca: “Naa thlie tie ung! Saciy a vaatuv pakha saciy vaa riypata a si.
40013004	Saciy kha a vaa tiyta, chekha ca luopuv lie tla te pavaa ta amaa haa.
40013005	Chekha ca alyi a cawta dyi a aw napa lungdaa lieta ama tla. A lyi kha a chaa li nakawta saciy ca a pu paluo.
40013006	Ning kya chiy te sadaa kha a e ca a thariy aa thuv li nakawta aa uv diy paluo.
40013007	Saciy chekha ca a ahling hraw luo kha ama tla. Ahling khata kya le te a kalaa.
40013008	Saciy chekha ca alyi pha napa lie kha tla te a che ta le zakha, a che ta le sawcaruv, a che ta le sawthung ama vyi.
40013009	Naa a hnyipa ca thyi tie ung,” ta te a pachuo sa.
40013010	Cakhutaa ziytuv tie ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw yite, “Khaapanakawma cawsaa kha bie na chang tiy yi ta pakhingpuonabie ta na chang yi?” tapata ama hiehriy.
40013011	Zingsuv ta, “Niema ca vuoruo pena kaw bieparuv pachang khuna kha pi pata nama cuo, cuorasala iema ca cuo vayi.
40013012	A hnyipa kha pichiy hryly pata cuo'a te, cuorasala a hnyi lipa kha a hnyi tlakuopa hmuo lapa pata a cuo aa.
40013013	Iema'a lie pakhingpuonabie i hmuonapa siyluo ca, ‘a mang ca mang raalaa yite hmung vayi, naa ca thlie raalaa yite thyi vayi, a pachang zaw pachang ra vayi.’
40013014	Cacuonakaw profet Isaiah ta a ripa profet-biephu ca ama cunglie a tling. Naa ca nama thlie aa, cuorasala thyi the buo va ungciy, A mang ca nama mang aa, cuorasala hmungpasie buo va ungciy.
40013015	Tahematapakieca ama palung ca ping te, ama naa ta thyi khu li pata ama ming kha ama pasing; Caca ama ming kha hmung li pata, ama naa zaw thyi li pata, ama palung ta pachang the li pata, Kama'a luo kha amaa vya pali the li riypa hne, Kama ta i patluosa li riy'apa yi khatana a cuo.
40013016	Cuorasala niema ca thluechiypa tana nama cuo, tahematapakieca nama ming ta hmung te nama naa ta a thyi.
40013017	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: profet hluvpuv hne cawsaa aa dangpa tie hluvpuv zaw ta niema nama hmungpa hing ama za hmung khing hringhruo, cuorasala za hmung vayi, ama za thyi khing hringhruo, cuorasala za thyi vayi.
40013018	“Cakhutaa, saciy a vaatuv pakhing-puonabie siyluo hing naathlie tie ung.
40013019	Luopuv lie a tlapa saciy ca cawsaa pakha ta vuoruo pena kaw kha thyi raalaa te a siyluo a pachang li tiyta, a pha lipapaa kha a vaw te ama palung chunglie tuvpa saciy ca a lapa yi.
40013020	Lungdaa cunglie a tlapa saciy ca vuoruo pena kaw kha ama thyi pahne ta palung tluosa pata a cuhluopa tie kha ama cuo.
40013021	Cahaapaapa cawsaa zaw chunglie ca aa thuvpuv ta hruo a thla li nakawta a syi ru vyi. Capa bie kawlie ruvnaana hne hrisaathieruena aa vaw pahne ta amaa palise paluo.
40013022	Ahling hrawlie a tlapa saciy tapa ca vuoruo pena kaw kha thyi raalaa te cuorasala hing chuelyi khysatungbangna kaw, hne sue hne thiy khingnapa ta capa bie ca a kalaa nakawta, thyipaa hnyi khu vayi.
40013023	Alyi phanapa lie a tlapa saciy tapa ca vuoruo pena kaw kha thyi te a siyluo zaw a pachangpa kha ama cuo. Thyipaa kha hnyi te chekha ta le zakha, chekha ta le sawcaruv, chekha ta le sawthung ama vyi.
40013024	Zingsuv ta pakhingpuonabie hrangpa kha a chang yi: “Vuoruo pena ca a lu chunglie saciypha a vaa papaa hne tana aa lu.
40013025	Cawsaa bangkhuo amaa hmung chung khata, cariepa pakha a vaw te saciy hrawlie kha lubi ciy vaa te dya a ruo se.
40013026	Cacuonakawta sakung ca kya le te a uv tiyta lubi kung ca aa kya luo ra.
40013027	Ingziypa a sii zaw ca a vaw yite, ‘Abyipa, na lu lie kha saciy phapa na na vaa cuo vama? Cacuokie khaapa taata ma lubi hing ama kya pu?’ ama ta.
40013028	Ama ta, ‘Hing hmang a tuetuvpa ca ma cariepa na a cuo,’ a ta yi. Iema ta, ‘lubi hing ma va phie'a maw? ama ta.
40013029	Ama ta, ‘phie'a va ungciy, tahematapakieca lubi nama phie pata sakung kha phiepuo pathlyi'a kie ungciy.
40013030	Sa hrie tiy a ta nate le hne thluo yi se. Sa hrie cuo thueta sa a hriepa tie kha, lubi ca pakhaw ungla myipung luo thaw riypata cataw tie ung, cuorasala sa ca sa-ing luo kha raw tie ung, i ta'a yi, a ta,” a ta yi.
40013031	Zingsuv ta pakhingpuonabie hrangpa kha a chang yi: “Vuoruo pena ca cawsaa pakha ta uotuo ciy kha la te a lu lie a vaapa hne tana aa lu.
40013032	Saciy hrawlie ta a cawcepa saciy ta a cuo, cuorasala a kya le tiyta sakung hrawlie a lecepa ta a cuo, pavaa zaw kha a vaw yite ace lieta buv amaa vya tue,” a ta.
40013033	Zingsuv ta pakhingpuonabie hrangpa suokha a chang kalie yi: “vuoruo pena ca canung pakha ta la te muomuo beke zungkha lie a pyapa, capa muomuo a pathu sa diypa thiynung a cawta hne tana aa lu,” a ta.
40013034	Zingsuv ta hingpa hmang bang-khuo hing zaapuv kha a chang tiy yi ta pakhingpuonabie kha a hmuo, pakhingpuonabie hmuo li pata suokha hmuo chang vayi.
40013035	Hinghaahingta a ripa ca profet ta a ripa a tlingna riypatana a cuo. Pakhingpuonabie hmuopa ta iema kha bie i chang'a yi; Chuelyi hruothu baataata za nupa hmang kha i phu aa,” a ta.
40013036	Cakhutaata, Zingsuv ca cawsaa-zaapuv kha thuse yite ingchung luo a ngie. Catiyta ziytuv tie kha ama'a luo a vaw yite, “Lu chunglie lubi pakhingpuonabie a siyluo kha malie chang tie,” ama ta.
40013037	Zingsuv ta, “Saciypha a vaatuv ca Cawsaa Saacapaa ta a cuo.
40013038	Lu ca chuelyicung ta a cuo; saciypha ca vuoruo pena a cutuv zaw ta ama cuo. Lubi ca cawsaa pha lipapaa saata zaw ta ama cuo.
40013039	Saciy pha lipa a vaatuv cariepa ca Setaa ta a cuo. Sa hrie cuo ca chuelyi cuochuona cuota cuote sa a hrietuv tie ca avuoming ta ama cuo.
40013040	Lubi ca pakhaw yite myipung luo ama hmaw pahaakhata chuelyi cuo chuo thue ca a cuo ra aa.
40013041	Cawsaa Saacapaa ta a avuoming kha za pathlie'a yite, a pena chunglie phalina a tuetuv bangkhuo hne cawsaa a pasue satuv bangkhuo kha pahmya'a yite,
40013042	caana hne haariena a awnapa myipung chung luo kha ama thaw aa.
40013043	Cakhutaata aa dangpa ca ama Paa pena chunglie kha ning haata ama khe aa. Naa a hnyipa ca thyi tie ung,” a ta.
40013044	“Vuoruo pena ca lu chunglie ama nupa sue sungnaapa hne tana aa lu. Cawsaa pakha ta a hmung tiyta nu siy te, palung tluosa pata ing luo kaa te, a hnyipa bangkhuo kha zaa te capa lu ca a calyi,” a ta.
40013045	“Vuoruo pena ca palelungvaa phapa a huvpa sung a palipa pakha hne na aa lu.
40013046	Palelungvaa muosung ciemuopa kha a hmung tiyta a hnyipa bangkhuo kha zaa te capa palelungvaa ca a calyi,” a ta.
40013047	“Vuoruo pena ca tiyliy chung luo vaa yite ngaa phangtling a pa-uopa asue hne tana aa lu.
40013048	Ngaa a bi pahne ta asue kha ngiekuo luo a da pathla yite, a tu yite ngaa kha ama che, a phapa tie kha ama sawpaa chung luo pasuo yite a chiepa tie ca ama thaw.
40013049	Cuo chuonapa ning thueta ca capa haa ca tana a cuo aa. Avuoming kha vaale'a yite cawsaa phapa hraw taata cawsaa chiepa kha pache'a yite,
40013050	caana hne haariena a awnapa myipung chung luo kha ama thaw aa,” a ta.
40013051	Zingsuv ta, “Hingpa bangkhuo hing nama thyi the ma?” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Ma thyi the,” ama ta.
40013052	Caacuonakaw Zingsuv ta, “Vuoruo pena cuota cawpa pata a cuo tlipa phungbie saya ca, a suethiy china ing chung taata suethiy thaapa hne suethiy hlungpa a papyapa ingziypa hne tana aa lu,” a ta yi.
40013053	Zingsuv ca pakhingpuonabie bangkhuo a chang khu taayita capa hmang taacata a pya.
40013054	A khy luo kha vaa te apungna-ing lie kha a pacuv yi ca ama kharue ta haasa te, “Hingpa cawsaa hingta hingpa singna hne hmang tue khuna hing khaapa taata ma a hmung?
40013055	Lettamaapa saacapaapa khata cuo vama? A nung kha Mary ama ta cuo vama? Jeim, Josef, Simon hne Judas kha a nuta zaw cuo vayi ma?
40013056	A sieta zaw bangkhuo hinglie hingna ama aw diy cuo vama? Khaapa taata ma hingpa bangkhuo hing a hmung aa? ta yite,
40013057	Zingsuv ca cuhluo khu vayi. Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Profet ca a khy lie hne a ingchungkhue lie ri li pata hmangting lieta ama pa-uvsathyi,” a ta.
40013058	Zangna ama hnyi li nakawta capa lieca kharuehaa hmang a hluvsa tue vyi.
40014001	Capa cuo ning ca uvtuv Herod ta Zingsuv kaw kha thyi te;
40014002	a kuv rawlie abyi tie kha, “Hingpapaa hing tiynawtuv Johan tana a cuo, thiyna taa na a thupakhaa, cacuonakaw tana hingpa kharuehaa hmang hing a tue khu” a ta yi.
40014003	Herod ta a nuta Filip napuvnung Herodias kawlieta Johan kha patuv te, a cakhiy sa khu taayita thaw a za pathla.
40014004	Tahematapakieca tiynawtuv Johan ta Herod kha, Herodias naa hlawpa hing a phung ta cuo vyi,” a za ta nakawta a cuo.
40014005	Herod ta a thie khing raalaa pata zaapuv kha a ciy yi, tahematapakieca iema ta Johan kha profet tana a cuo tapata ama rue.
40014006	Cuorasala Herod puvnapa ning a vya chiy tiyta, Herodias sacanungnung ca zaapuv hmie lie kha luo te Herod ca a palung a tluo hringhruo
40014007	nakawta ama kha khaapa aa hie zaw pi riypata chie a sa te bie aa kuo.
40014008	A nung ta a pasupa haata,” Hingpa daapakhue hingta tiynawtuv Johan luv kha na pi tie,” a ta.
40014009	Siepahruopa ca a ngie a chi, cuorasala chie a sa te bie aa kuopa hne a khyche tie hmie a mang nakaw yi ta pi riypata naw pi yite,
40014010	thaw-ing chunglie Johan luv kha a pate sa yi.
40014011	Johan luv ca daa pakhue ta vya cyi yite lesaanung kha ama pi, ama ta a nung'a luo kha a cyile.
40014012	Johan a ziytuv tie kha a vaw yite a riy ca la yite ama paby; cakhutaata vaa yite Zingsuv kha ama va chang.
40014013	Zingsuv ca Johan thuohlaa a thyi tiyta capa hmang taacata pya te sawkawpalaw ta ruocakung luo kha ama seta a vaa. Cuorasala cawsaa ta capa thuo ca ama thyi tiyta ama khy cyicuo taata pya yite ama kha ama ziy.
40014014	Zingsuv ca sawkawpalaw taata kya cung te cawsaazaapuv kha a hmung yi ca, iema kha ngiechi hringhruo yite, a pasapa kha a patluo sa yi.
40014015	Capa ning zuoluo ta ziytuv tie ca ama'a luo kha a vaw yite, “Ning ta a ngie tli, ruocakung na lie a cuo. Cawsaa hing pathlie yi la, ma cahriy lie a awpa khy luo hing iemata tah ning riypa vaa calyi yi se,” ama ta.
40014016	Zingsuv ta, “Iema cakuo a hu vyi, niema ta ning riypa suokhakha pi tie ung,” a ta yi.
40014017	Iema ta, “Ma hnyipa bangkhuo ca viechuo tluo pangaa hne ngaa sahning hingna a cuo,” ama ta.
40014018	Zingsuv ta, “Kama'a luo vya cyi ung,” a ta yi.
40014019	Cakhutaa cawsaa ca aphuv cunglie a patu sa yi. Viechuo tluo pangaa hne ngaa sahning kha la te, vuoruo luo kha ang te Khazing'a luo alawna bie a ri khu taata viechuo kha chechi te ziytuv tie kha a pi yi, ziytuv tie ta zaapuv kha ama re.
40014020	Ama bangkhuo ta ning yite ama riy a bi. Ziytuv tie ta ama ning buopa kha pakhaw yite beke zung hraa hlyihning a ta.
40014021	A ningpa ca canung hne haatiy ri li pata capaa seta thawpangaa hraw ama ta.
40014022	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta cawsaazaapuv a pathlie nguoluo ning yi kha ziytuv tie ca sawkawpalaw luo kha pakie sa yite riyliy huesuo luo kha a pasi sa lu yi.
40014023	Cawsaa a pathlie diy khutaa yi khata, tluocung luo kha thlaa chuo riypata ama se ta a kie. Zingsuv ca khy a zing nate khata ama lieca ama se ta a aw.
40014024	Sawkawpalaw ca riyliy cunglie kha a hlapuv a chiy tli pata hmiepachaw ta a vya hruopa thliy aa taw nakawta tiylaw ta a cathlule ciemuo.
40014025	Zingsuv ca mawdiy khata tiy cunglie vya cakuole te ziytuv tie'a luo kha a vaw.
40014026	Ziytuv tie ta, tiy cunglie a phyi ta a vya cakuo pakha ama hmung tiyta ciy hringhruo yite, “Athlaa!” ta yite ama ciylung ta ama khi.
40014027	Zingsuv ta sungkha bala ta iema kha, “Nama thlaa zang kha se, Kama tana i cuo, ciykha ung,” a ta yi.
40014028	Piter ta, “Abyipa, nama ta na cuo pakieca tiy cunglie vya cakuo pata nama'a luo kha na pavaw sa tie,” a ta.
40014029	Zingsuv ta, “A vaw tie,” a ta. Cacuonakaw Piter ca sawkawpalaw chung taa ca cung te tiy cunglie ca a phyi ta cakuo te Zingsuv'a luo ca a vaa.
40014030	Cuorasala khuopuv ta thliy a hruopa kha a hmung tiyta ciy te tiy chung luo kha a tlale ca, “Abyipa, Na khuo tie!” tapata a khi.
40014031	Zingsuv ta yikha ta va paza te a va patuv khu taata, “Na zangnapa na a caw hringhruo de! Khaapanakawma palung luolue pata na aw,” a ta.
40014032	Ama pahning ta sawkawpalaw luo kha kie yite thliy ca a die.
40014033	Cakhutaa ziytuv tie ta sawkawpalaw chunglie ca abie yite, “Nama ca Khazing Saacapaa hmisi tana na cuo,” ama ta.
40014034	Riyliy kha va te yite Genesaret ruo luo kha ama va chiy.
40014035	Capa hmang lie cawsaa zaw khata Zingsuv ca ama pachang. Cacuonakaw a kiecahriy khy bangkhuo kha bie pathyi sa yite a pasapa bangkhuo kha Zingsuv'a luo ca amaa vaw khyi.
40014036	A pangpeta chuo ama hrie the riypata Zingsuv ca paakie yite, a pangpe a hriepa bangkhuo ca ama tluo.
40015001	Cakhutaa Farasi tie hne phungbie saya tie ca Jerusa-lem taakhata Zingsuv'a luo a vaw yite,
40015002	“Khaapanakawma caa ziytuv tie ta mingnungmingpa phungluo ama para? Tahematapakieca sa ning hluo ta ama kuv a siy vayi,” ama ta.
40015003	Zingsuv ta, “Cacuokie, Khaapanakawma niema zaw hing niema phungluo kawlieta Khazing nawbie kha nama para? a ta yi.
40015004	Khazing ta, ‘Na nung hne na paa va ciyzaa yi, a nung cuose a paa cuose chie a sapa ca thie pata cuose,’ a ta.
40015005	Cuorasala niema ta nama pacuvpa ca, cawsaa pakhakha ta a nung ma, a paa ma bya riypata chechiy a hnyipa kha, ‘Hingpa hing ca Khazing huopa na a cuo,’ a ta kieca a nung cuose a paa cuose a bya a hu va tli, nama ta.
40015006	Cacuonakawta nama phungluo kawlieta Khazing bie kha siysaa ri li pata nama aw.
40015007	Niema, phahruocuo tie! Profet Isaiah ta niema kaw a ripa hing khatluv tama aa hmuo! Isaiah ta,
40015008	‘Hingpa cawsaa zaw hingta ama pakaa dyi ta na pa-uvsathyi yite, ama pathiypalung ca kama hne aa hla hringhruo.
40015009	Cawsaa ta tuechawpa phung kha, Khazing bie haata pacuv yite, Kama ina bienapa yi hing Khaahmuo thlahne vyi,’ Khazing ta a ta,” a ta yi.
40015010	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta cawsaa-zaapuv kha ama'a luo ku yite, “Naathlie ungla pachang tie ung:
40015011	cawsaa a papya a palyituv hing a pakaa taata a ngiepa cuo li pata, a pakaa taata a pyapa na a cuo,” a ta.
40015012	Cakhutaa, ziytuv tie kha ama'a luo a vaw yite, “Na ripa hingta Farasi tie palung a pasa sa yi tapa pachang va cama?” ama ta.
40015013	Zingsuv ta, “Vuoruo lie a awpa i Paa ta a ling lipa bangkhuo ca phie pata ama cuo aa.
40015014	Iema ta tah aw thluo yi se; Iema ca mingcue tie luochiytuv mingcue luochiytuv tana ama cuo. Mingcuepa ta mingcuepa kha luo a chiy kieca ama pahning tana khue luo kha ama thlahne aa,” a ta.
40015015	Cuorasala Piter ta, “Capa pakhingpuonabie ca a siesa pata a siyluo malie chang tie,” a ta.
40015016	Zingsuv ta, “Niema zaw hing a ta tepa ta pachang the tang va ung cama?
40015017	Cawsaa pakaa chung taata a ngiepa hmang ca a riy chung luo kha chiy te ale luo a pya pakhaa.
40015018	Cuorasala pakaa taata a pyapa ca palung chung taata a pyapa a cuo nakawta cawsaa kha a papya a palyi.
40015019	A pha lipa ruena, lienawna, nungvaathingsuena, aparuvsuena, paruvna, hangna, cawsaa thuochi rina tapa bangkhuo ca pathiypalung chung taata a pyapa tana ama cuo.
40015020	Hingpa tie hingna cawsaa ca a papya a palyi sa yi, kuv a siy li pata sa ningnapa ta cawsaa kha papyapalyi sa vyi,” a ta.
40015021	Zingsuv ca capa hmang taacata pya te Tair hne Sidon pe luo kha a vaa.
40015022	Capa ruo lie a awpa Kanaan zaanung pakha ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw te, “David Saacapaa, Abyipa, ngie na chi thi tie. I sacanung kha khuevuo ta a hryi te a lalilahie dyina a chiy thluo,” a ta.
40015023	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta kaa kha hmuo palie vyi. Ziytuv tie ta, “Hingpa nung hing cakuo sa tie, malie paziyle te malie a khisue byalya,” ama ta.
40015024	Cakhutaa, Zingsuv ta, “Kama ca Israel ming hraw taata a viepa tuv tie'a luo kyalyadyi pathliepa tana i cuo,” a ta.
40015025	Cuorasala canungnung ca Zingsuv phyi thabaw lie kha a vya bu te, “Abyipa naa bya thi tie,” a ta.
40015026	Zingsuv ta, “Haatiy sa kha la pata uv pipa ca a hmuo vyi,” a ta.
40015027	Canung nung ta, “Na tapa ca a hmuo, Abyipa; cuorasala a byipaapa cabya taata a tlapa sa diydya ca uv zaw ta ama ning ra taw thluo muo,” a ta.
40015028	Cacuonakaw Zingsuv ta, “Canung nung na zangnapa na a le hringhruo! Na khingpa ca tuepa pata cuose,” a ta. Capa cuota liecata a sacanung ca a tluo.
40015029	Zingsuv ta capa hmang ca thuse khu taata Galilee riyliy kie hraw kha cahraw te tluo luo kha kie te a tu.
40015030	Cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama kha vya pangie yite, a phyi cabiepa, a mingcuepa, a pakyapa, bie a ri the lipa hne a hrangpa a pasapa hluvpuv kha amaa vaw khyi. A phyi thabaw lie kha chi yite a patluo sa yi.
40015031	Bie a ri the lipa tie ta bie ama ri the, a pakyapa tie ama tluo, a phyi cabiepa tie ama cakuopa hne mingcuepa tie ta ama hmung pakhaapa kha ama hmung tiyta zaapuv ca ama kharue haasa te Israel Khazing kha ama pathuosa.
40015032	Zingsuv ta a ziytuv tie kha ku yite, “Hingpa cawsaa zaw hing kama'a lie ningthung chung aw tli yite ata hing sa ning riypa ama hnyi li nakawta i ngie ina chisa yi. Ama nangdiy pata ca cakuo sa khing vayi ang, luopuv liena ama hyle pathlyi aa,” a ta.
40015033	Ziytuv tie ta, “Hing ruocaapa lie hing tuokhaatama hing zi cawsaa ning riypa sa ma hmung khu aa?” ama ta.
40015034	Zingsuv ta, “Viechuo tluo khazaa ma nama hnyi,” a ta. Iema ta, “Tluo sariy hne ngaa diyta a cawta,’ ama ta.
40015035	Cacuonakaw Zingsuv ta zaapuv kha alyi lie patu sa yite,
40015036	viechuo tluosariy hne ngaa kha la te, Khazing'a luo alawna bie a ri khu taata viechuo kha chechi te, ziytuv tie kha pi yite ziytuv tie ta cawsaazaapuv kha ama re.
40015037	Ama bangkhuo ta ning yite ama riy a bi. Ziytuv tie ta ama ningbuopa kha pakhaw yite beke zungsariy a bi.
40015038	Canung hne haatiy ri li pata a ningpa capaa thawpaliy ama ta.
40015039	Zingsuv ca cawsaazaapuv kha a pathlie khu taayita sawkawpalaw luo kha kie te, Magadan ruo luo kha a si.
40016001	Farasi tie hne Sadusi tie kha Zingsuv'a luo a vaw yite a suenapa ama patuv khing nakawta, vuoruo taata a cuopa kharuehaa hmang malie tuepa la ama ta.
40016002	Zingsuv ta, “Ning a tla caw ta avuo a se kieca, ‘Ningkhue na a pha aa,’ nama ta.
40016003	Mawdiy ta avuo se te khy a paning kieca, ‘Khy na a saa aa,’ nama ta. Avuo kha mang ung cate ningkhue khaama a lu aa tapa nama ridaw khu, cuorasala ata chuo pamangsana ca a siyluo pachang khu va ungciy,” a ta.
40016004	A pha lipa hne Khazing siysaa a ri lipa mingphang ta kharuehaa hmang namaa hie, cuorasala Jonah kharuehaa hmang ri li pata kharuehaa hmang hrangpa tuepa pata cuo'a va ungciy,” a ta. Cakhutaa iema kha thuse yite pya te a cakuo.
40016005	Ziytuv tie ca huesuo luo ama va pha tiyta viechuo a phyale kha ama maw.
40016006	Zingsuv ta, Farasi tie hne Sadusi tie thiynung kha a raaring tie ung,” a ta yi.
40016007	Ziytuv tie ta pakha hne pakha kha, “Viechuo ma phyale li nakaw na ama haahingta bie a ri thlu aa,” amaa ta.
40016008	Zingsuv ta khaama ama ri tapa kha a pachang nakawta, “Zangna a cawpa zaw, khaapanakawma viechuo nama hnyi lina kaw kha nama ri nguoluo thluo?
40016009	Pachang the tang va ung cama? Viechuo tluo pangaa ta cawsaa thawpangaa duo yi ang te, a hlyipa beke zung khazaa ma nama pakhaw tapa kha a thyi va ung cama?
40016010	Viechuo tluo sariy ta cawsaa thawpaliy i duo ning yi kha haw a hlyipa beke zung khazaa ma nama pakhaw?
40016011	Viechuo kaw ri vyi tapa kha tuokhaatama pachang li pata nama aw the? Farasi ming hne Sadusi ming thiynung kha a raaring tie ung!” a ta yi.
40016012	Cakhutaata ziytuv tie ta, a raaringnapa malie a pipa hing viechuo lie ama hmuopa thiynung cuo li pata Farasi ming hne Sadusi ming pacuvnapa na a cuo tapa kha ama pachang.
40016013	Zingsuv ca Sisaria Filipi pe luo kha si te ama lieca ziytuv tie kha, “Cawsaa zaw ta Cawsaa Saacapaa hing ahung ama ta ma?” tapata a hie hriy yi.
40016014	Iema ta, “Chekha ta tiynawtuv Johan aca ta yi, chekha ta Elijah ne ca ta yite, chekha ta Jeremiah a cuo li kie profet pakhakha tana a cuo, aca ta yi,” ama ta.
40016015	“Niema haw? Kama hing a ahung ina ta ung cama?” a ta yi.
40016016	Simon Piter ta, “Nama ca a hringpa Khazing Saacapaa, Messiah tana na cuo,” a ta.
40016017	Zingsuv ta, “Johan saacapaa Simon, thluechiypa tana na cuo! Tahematapakieca hingpa hing thiy hne saa taata aca pachang sapa cuo vyi, cuorasala vuoruo lie a awpa i Paa taata na a cuo,” a ta.
40016018	Cacuonakaw ica chang: nama ca Piter tana na cuo, hingpa alungpuvnung cunglie hing i Khrihsaabuv kha padaa'a ang te thiyna tahmuo te khu buo hluo'a vyi.
40016019	Vuoruo Pena taw kha ca pi'a ang te, alyi lie na khaapa ca vuoruo lie khaapa cuo ra'a te alyi lie na pahawpa ca vuoruo lie pahaw pata a cuo ra aa,” a ta.
40016020	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta Messiah a cuopa kha ahunghmuo chang li riypata ziytuv tie kha a thlu yi.
40016021	Capa cuo taakhata Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha, Jerusalem luo vaa'a ang te uvthyi tie, tluobyilepa tie hne phungbiesaya tie kuv lie ruvnaana khuopuv ta i taw aa. Ina thie'a yi, cuorasala ningthungna lieta pathu pakhaapa i cuo aa,” tapa kha a chang yi.
40016022	Piter ta Zingsuv kha a hrang luo dya cakuo khyi te a chuo. “Abyipa, hingpa hmang hing ca Khazing ta na cunglie patlung sa thi kha se,” a ta.
40016023	Zingsuv ta a vya pali te Piter kha, “Setaa, i thaa taahing cakuo! Luo naa khuotuv tana na cuo, tahematapakieca na ruenapa hing Khazing'a taata cuo vyi, cawsaa cuona taata a vawpa tana a cuo,” a ta.
40016024	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha, “Ahunghmuota kama naa ziytuv a cuo khingpa ca iema khingnapa kha thuse pata ama vieluotung kha a puv yi sala na ziy yi se.
40016025	Tahematapakieca ahunghmuota a hringna kha a khuo khingpa ca a hringna kha a sung'a te, kama kawlieta a hringna a sungpa ca hringna kha a hmung aa.
40016026	Cawsaa hingta chuelyi bangkhuo hing cu rahmuo sala a hringna a sung kie khaama a thlahne aa? A hringna kha khaapatahmuo ta calyi pakhaa khu'a va tli.
40016027	Cawsaa Saacapaa hing a Paa rungnaana cangta avuoming hneta a zuv'a te cawsaa bangkhuo kha ama rehriena haakhata a pakaa'a yi.
40016028	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Cawsaa Saacapaa hing a pena luo aa zuvpa nama hmung hluo li a thiy li riypa hingpa lie hing nama aw,” a ta yi.
40017001	Ning caruv khu taata Zingsuv ta Piter hne uvcanu tie Jeim hne Johan kha tluocung luo kie khyi yite iema selaw ta ama aw.
40017002	Ama ming hmungna lie kha Zingsuv ca a hminghmie a thle; a hmie ca ning haata khe te a caw ca ming khepahli nate ta a ruo.
40017003	Sungkhabala ta Moses hne Elijah zaa luo yite Zingsuv hne bie ama rihnepa kha ama hmung.
40017004	Cacuonakaw Piter ta Zingsuv kha, “Abyipa, hingpa lie ma awpa hing a pha hringhruo! Na khingpa a cuo kieca, thluodaa suothung; nama cuo suokha, Moses cuo suokha, Elijah cuo suokha i sa aa,” a ta.
40017005	Cahaa cata bie a ri nguoluo ning kha amyi ruopa ta buv yite, amyi chung taa ueryi suokha ta, “Hingpapaa hing i Duepa i Saacapaa na a cuo, i palung naa hmung ciemuopa tana a cuo, a ri kha a ngie tie ung,” a ta.
40017006	Capa ueryi ca ziytuv tie ta ama thyi tiyta ama thlaa zang suesaa te alyi lie kha a maa bu.
40017007	Cuorasala Zingsuv kha a vaw te a hrie khu taayita, “Thu tie ung, nama thlaa zang kha se,” a ta yi.
40017008	Cacuonakaw ama kya mang ca ahunghmuo hmung li pata Zingsuv dyi ama hmung.
40017009	Tluocung taa ama za cungpuo pata Zingsuv ta, “Hing nama hmungpa muocuo hing Cawsaa Saacapaa thiyna taata pathu pakhaapa ta a cuo hluo li ahunghmuo chang'a va ungciy,” a ta yi.
40017010	Cakhutaa ziytuv tie ta Zingsuv kha, “Khaapanakawma phungbiesaya tie ta Elijah na a vaw taa riypata a cuo ama ta?” ta yite ama hiehriy.
40017011	Zingsuv ta, “Elijah ca a vaw taa sasaw'a te hmangting bangkhuo kha a ting pacie diy aa.
40017012	Cuorasala ica chang yi: Elijah ca a vaw mangtli, cadyiseca cawsaa ta pachang va laa yite ama khing ta ama tue. Cahaa cata Cawsaa Saacapaa zaw hing iema kuv chunglie ruvnaana a ang ra aa,” a ta.
40017013	Cakhutaa ziytuv tie ta tiynawtuv Johan kaw muo malie a chang ta tapa kha ama pachang.
