40017014	Cawsaazaapuv'a luo ama vya kaa pahne ta cawsaa pakha ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw te a hmiekunglie kha a pakhuv vya pane te,
40017015	“Abyipa, i saacapaapa hing ngiechi thi tie, ama ca siypatyi the te a rie a thyi hringhruo, a siy kyry ta myi chung luo hne tiy chung luo zaw aa lie taw.
40017016	Na hnang caa ziytuv tie'a luo a vawkhyi raalaa ang te patluo khu vayi,” a ta.
40017017	Zingsuv ta, “Niema zangna a hnyi lipa, a pali a pahnaa ta a hringpa phang, kha cuo ma niema'a lie i aw kalie a hu aa? Kha cuo ma ica aw puo kalie yi a hu aa? Haatiypapaa ca kama'a luo a vaw khyi tie ung,” a ta yi.
40017018	Zingsuv ta khuevuo ca chuo te haatiypapaa chung taata a pya, capa cuo taacata haatiypapaa ca a tluo.
40017019	Cakhutaa ziytuv tie ca Zingsuv'a luo kha iema se ta a vaw yite, “Khaapanakawma khuevuo ma papya khu va,” tapata ama hie hriy.
40017020	Zingsuv ta, “Nama zangnapa a caw nakaw na a cuo. Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Uotuo hmung tie zangna nama hnyi kieca, hingpa tluo hing, ‘A hnyi,’ ta ungla a hnyi thluo aa. Niema cuota a cuo khu lipa aw'a vyi,” a ta yi.
40017021	Cuorasala hingpa phang hing ca thlaachuona hne sa-uvna ta ta li pata ca khaapatahmuo papya khu vyi,” a ta.
40017022	Ziytuv tie Galilee lie amaa tawpakhaw taata Zingsuv ta, “Cawsaa Saacapaa hing cawsaa kuv luo a catli pata pipa cuo'a te,
40017023	ama thie aa; cuorasala ningthungna lieta pathu pakhaapa ta a cuo aa,” a ta yi. Ziytuv tie ca ama ngie a chi hringhruo.
40017024	Kapernaum khy ama vya pha tiyta biena-ing ngukhyituv pakha ca Piter'a luo a vaw te, “Na sayapa hing biena-ing ngukhyi pi vama? a ta.
40017025	Piter ta, “A pi ne,” a ta. Piter ingchung luo a zaa ngie pahne Zingsuv ta vya thukhyi taa te, “Simon tuokhaama na rue? Chuelyi siepahruo tie hing a ahung ma ruohrang chechiy a ngiekhyi muo hne ngukhyi a pi yi? Ruochung ming ma a cuo li kie ruohrang ming? a ta.
40017026	Piter ta, “Ruohrang ming,” a ta. Zingsuv ta, A pha, cacuokieca ruochung ming ca pi a hu vyi.
40017027	Cadyiseca hing cawsaa zaw ama palung pasa sa li riypata riyliy luo kha vaa la kyipa va pathla tie; na thue taapa ngaa a pakaa kha cakang la ngu tuokaa phiekha na hmung aa; capaca la la nama hne kama cuota va pi tie yi,” a ta.
40018001	Capa cuo ning ca ziytuv tie kha Zingsuv'a luo a vaw yite, “Vuoruo pena lie ahungma a lece?” tapata ama hiehriy.
40018002	Zingsuv ta haatiyta pakha kha ku te ama hmielie a padaa khu taata,
40018003	“Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: a thle ungla haatiyta haahingta nama cuo li kieca vuoruo pena luo a ngie khu buo hluo'a va ungciy,” a ta yi
40018004	Cawsaa raw canaw te hingpa haatiyta haahingta a cuopa na vuoruo pena chunglie a lecepa ta a cuo.
40018005	Ahunghmuota kama ming ta hinghaapa haatiy a cuhluopa ca kama naa cuhluotuv tana a cuo,” a ta.
40018006	“Ahunghmuo cuose hingpa haatiyta pakhakha hing kama ina zangna taata luo a papiesatuv ca a rue lie sacuo rienapa alungtung ciypuo pata riyliy luo thawpa cuo sala a cuota a pha vie aa.
40018007	Chuelyicung cuota ciy a chiysa hringhruo tahematapakieca zangna a papiesatuv hmang na a hluvsa a aw. Hingpa hmang hing a cuo pari aa, cuorasala cahaapaapa a pacuosatuv cuota ca ciy a chiysa hringhruo.
40018008	“Na kuv a cuo li kie na phyi ta na zangna aca papie sa kieca te la thaw tie! Kuv hrahning hne phyi hrahning hneta chuozaa myi chung luo tlapa laata ca kuv hrakha a cuo li kie phyi hrakha aw lipa ta hringna luo a ngiepa ca a pha vie aa.
40018009	Cakhutaa na ming ta na zangnapa aca papie sa kieca, thue la thaw tie. Ming hrahning hneta hell myi chung luo tlapa laata ca ming hrakha dyi ta hringna luo a ngiepa ca a pha vie aa.
40018010	Hing haatiyta a ahung hing hmuota mangbung kha ung. Ica chang yi: iema a vetuv avuoming kha vuoruo i Paa hmiekunglie ama aw pari.
40018011	Cawsaa Saacapaa ca a viepa khuo riypatana aa vaw
40018012	Tuokhaatama nama rue? Tuv khietuv pakha ta tuv zakha hnyi sala, sakha a vie kieca, sawcakysacaky kha tluocung lie thuse'a te, a viepa sakha kha a va huv aa cuo vama?
40018013	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: a hmung tiyta a vie lipa sawcakysacaky tie cunglie laa khata a viepa sakha cunglie kha a palung a tluo vie.
40018014	Cahaa cata vuoruo lie a awpa nama Paa ta hing haatiyta zaw pakha hing hmuo vie riypa pahya vyi.
40018015	Na uvnu pakhakha ta na cunglie suena a tue kieca vaa la niema seta nama awna lie kha a suenapa kha va chang tie. Na ri a caa ngie kieca na uvnu ta na pacuo sa khu pakhaa tana ta a cuo.
40018016	Cuorasala na ri a caa ngie khing li kieca, ‘bie bangkhuo ca pachangkhyituv pahning a cuo li kie pathung hmie lieta pacu sapa cuose,’ a tapa haata bie bangkhuo caa thyikhyi riypata pakha ma pahning ma a chiy tie yi.
40018017	Iema bie zaw kha a cuhluo khu li kieca, bie bangkhuo kha Khrihsaabuv luo chiykhyi tie. Khrihsaabuv bie kha hmuo a cuhluo khu li kieca, ama ca Jentail ming a cuo li kie ngukhyituv pakha haakhata va rue tie.
40018018	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: alyi lie nama thlupa ca vuoruo lie zaw thlupa cuo ra'a te, alyi lie nama pa-awpa ca vuoruo lie zaw pa-awpa a cuo ra aa.
40018019	“Biehmisi tana ica chang vie yi: hing alyi lie pahning ta palung a lusa pata thlaa chuo ung cate nama hie kieca, nama hiepa hmang ca vuoruo lie a awpa i Paa ta aca pi'a yi.
40018020	Pahning a cuo li kie pathung i ming ta amaa hmyana lie, ama hrawlie kama i aw ra” a ta.
40018021	Cakhutaa Piter ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw te, “Abyipa, i uvnu pakhakha ta i cung lie suena a tue kieca, yi khazaa ma i ngiethe aa? Yi sariy te ma? a ta.
40018022	Zingsuv ta, “Yi sariy cuo vyi. Yi sawsariy-lesariy, a ta.
40018023	Cacuonakawta vuoruo pena ca a sii zaw rehriena cazing kha mang a tingpa siepahruo pakha hne tana aa lu.
40018024	Re a pathupa hneta tuokaa talent thawhraa a uopa a sii pakha kha ama'a luo ca a maa vaw khyi.
40018025	Lyibuo kha a thung khu li nakawta a byipaapa cata, ama, a napuvnung, a saa zaw hne a hnyipa bangkhuo kha zaa diy pata, lyibuo thung riypata bie a pi yi.
40018026	Cacuonakawta a siipaapa ca a phyi thabaw lie kha a pakhuv pane te, ‘Ngie na chi la naa ngie caw thi tie, ica thung diy aa,’ tapata paa a kie.
40018027	A byipaapa ta ngie a chi nakawta a lyibuo kha a ngiethe te a pathlie.
40018028	Cuorasala a pya pahne ta tuokaa denarii zakha a uopa a viesaa sii a cuo rapa pakha'a luo kha vaa te, a rue kha hmi te, ‘I naa uopa cakha na pi tie,’ a ta.
40018029	Sii a cuo rapa a viesaapa cata a pakhuv pane te, ‘Ngie na chi la naa ngie caw thi tie, ica thung aa’ a ta.
40018030	Cuorasala khing li pata, a lyibuo a thung diy hluo li thaw a pathla.
40018031	Sii a cuo rapa a viesaa tie ta khapa hmang a cuopa bangkhuo kha ama hmung tiyta ama palung pha li pata ama byipaapa'a luo kha vaa yite ama va chang diy.
40018032	Cacuonakaw a byipaapa cata ku te, ‘Sii pha lipa, paa ina kie nakaw cata inaa uopa bangkhuo icaa ngiethe diy.
40018033	Kama nang ica duepa haakhata na viesaa sii cunglie kha nangduena na hnyi ra riypa cuo vama? ta te,
40018034	a byipaapa ca a hi a haa laalaw nakawta a lyibuo bangkhuo a thung diy hluo li thaw a pathla.
40018035	Cacuonakawta nama uvnu kha pathiypalung hmisi ta namaa ngiethe li pata a cuo kieca vuoruo lie a awpa i Paa ta niema zaw kha cahaa cata a ca tue ra'a yi,” a ta.
40019001	Capa kaw a ri diy khu taata Zingsuv ca Galilee taakhata pya te riyliy huesuo Judea pe luo kha a si.
40019002	Cawsaa hluvpuv ta ziy yite a pasapa hluvpuv a patluo sa yi.
40019003	Farasi tie chekha ca ama'a luo kha a suena huv riypata a vaw yite; “Suokhakha kawlieta, capaa pakha ca a napuv ma riypa kha phungbie ta a pa-aw ma? tapata ama hiehriy.
40019004	Zingsuv ta, “A hruothu ningta Satuvpa ta canung hne capaa a sa tapa kha Caapathepa lie ri buo va ung cama?
40019005	‘Capanakaw cata capaa ta a paa hne a nung kha thuse'a yite a napuv hne amaa hlaw aa; pahning ca pangkha ta ama cuo aa.’
40019006	Cacuonakawta iema ca pahning cuo va tli yi, pangkha tana ama cuo. Khazing ta a pahlawpa yi ca ahungtahmuo che kha yi se,” a ta.
40019007	Farasi ming ta, “Cacuokie khaapanakawma Moses ta, ‘Capaa ta a napuv kha manapa caa pi sala a che se,’ tapata naw malie a pi?’ ama ta.
40019008	Zingsuv ta, “Moses ta napuv ma khu riypata aca pa-awpa yi ca pacuv nama ruvtuv nakawtana a cuo. Cuorasala a hruothu ta ca cahaa cata za cuo vyi.
40019009	Ica chang yi: Ahunghmuota cuose, zangtluo a tla lina kawlie ri li pata a napuv kha ma te canung hrang hne a hlawpa ca nungvaathingsuena a tuepa tana a cuo,” a ta.
40019010	Ziytuv tie ta, “Nung hne vaa kawlie hinghaahingta a cuo riypa a cuo kieca, a chiyhie li patana a pha vie,” ama ta.
40019011	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Hing pacuvnapa hing ca cawsaa mekaa ta ziy khu'a vayi, Khazing ta aa tlawpa tie cuo kyalya tana a cuo.
40019012	Cawsaa chekha ca amaa zaa puvkhyipa ta napuv a chiy khu lipa cuo yite, chekha ca cawsaa ta ama tuechaw nakawta napuv a chiy khu lipa ama cuo, chekha ca vuoruo pena kawlieta napuv chiy li pata ama aw. Hing pacuvnapa a ziy khupa ca ziy thluo yi se,” a ta.
40019013	Cakhutaata haatiy zaw kha ama luv cunglie a kuv khang pata thlaachuopa naaseyi tapata Zingsuv'a luo amaa vawkhyi. Cuorasala ziytuv tie ta a vawkhyipa tie kha ama chuo.
40019014	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta, “Haatiy kha i thaa luo a vaw yi se, thlu kha ung, tahematapakieca vuoruo pena ca hinghaapa zaw cuo hing tana a cuo,” a ta.
40019015	Ama luv cunglie kha a kuv khang te a cakuo.
40019016	Luo kha ca Zingsuv'a luo kha cawsaa pakha a vaw te, “Saya, chuozaa hringna hmung riypata khaapa hmangphapa ma i tue aa?” a ta.
40019017	Zingsuv ta “Khaapanakawma khaapama a pha tapa kaw ca ina hiehriy ciy? A phapa ca pakha kyalya dyina a aw. Hringna luo naa ngie khing kieca phungbie kha ziy tie,” a ta.
40019018	Satliepapaa ta, “Khaapa phungbie ma,” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “Lie va naw kha; nungvaathingsuena va tue kha; paruv kha; a cuo li pata malie vaa daakhyi kha;
40019019	na nung hne na paa va ciyzaa yi; nama hne nama naa duepa haata na ingpaa kha va due yi,” a ta.
40019020	Satliepapaa ta, “Hing phungbie bangkhuo hing i ziy diy tli, khaapama i tue lipa a aw kalie?” a ta.
40019021	Zingsuv ta, “Cawsaa tlingpa na cuo khing kieca na hnyipa bangkhuo kha zaa la na hmungpa tuokaa kha a siypasapa tie pi tie yi, cacuokieca vuoruo lie sue na hnyi aa; cakhutaa a vaw la na ziy tie,” a ta.
40019022	Satliepapaa ta capa bie ca a thyi tiyta, a ngie chi te a cakuo, tahematapakieca ama ca a hnyirungsapa ta a cuo.
40019023	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha, “Biehmisipa tana ica chang yi: A hnyirungpa tie vuoruo pena chung luo a ngie riypa ca a ruv hringhruo.
40019024	Ica chang pakhaa yi: Kala-uv sakha ciphang naakhue luo a ngiepa laata a hnyirungpa vuoruo pena luo a ngiepa a ruv vie,” a ta.
40019025	Ziytuv tie ta ama thyi tiyta ama kharue haa suesaa te, “Ahung cama khuona a hmung khu aa? amaa ta.
40019026	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta iema kha mang yite, “Hingpa hing cawsaa cuota ca cuo khu vyi, cadyiseca Khazing cuota ca hmangting bangkhuo hing a cuo khu,” a ta.
40019027	Cakhutaa Piter ta, “Hmangting bangkhuo thuse pata nama maca ziy mangtli. Khaapama ma hmung aa? a ta.
40019028	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: “Hmangting pathaa pakhaapa a cuo ning, Cawsaa Saacapaa hing i byithude cunglie patupa i cuo thueta, niema naa ziytuv tie zaw hing byithude hlyihning cunglie a tu'a ung cate Israel ming phanghraa hlyihning kha bie nama ripa aa.
40019029	Cakhutaa ahunghmuo cuose kama kawlieta ing cuose, a uvta a nuta cuose, a sieta cuose, a paa cuose, a nung cuose, a saata cuose, a lu cuose a thusepa ca ale zakha ta hmung pakhaa te, chuozaa hringna ru zaw a cu aa.
40019030	Cuorasala atalie hmaa a sapa a hluvpuv hing hnang chuo'a yite, hnang a chuopa a hluvpuv hing hmaa ama sa aa,” a ta.
40020001	“Vuoruo Pena ca mawdiy ta pya te a mingsuv diedung chunglie re a hrie riypa tie a huvpa Luruo a hnyituv pakha hne tana aa lu.
40020002	Ningkha thavie muo ngu tuokaa denarii phiekha pi riypata a palung a tlingpa rehrietuv tie kha a mingsuv dung luo a pathlie yi.
40020003	Maw siymaluo pacaky ta chadawtluo luo kha a pya tiyta cawsaa chekha ca khaahmuo hrie li pata amaa daathluopa kha a hmung yi ca,
40020004	“niema zaw hing i mingsuv dung luo kha vaa ungla re va hrie tie ung, aa de pata ninghlue ica pi'a yi,’ a ta. Cacuonakawta ama vaa.
40020005	Ningchung siymaluo hlyihning hne zuoluo siymaluo pathung lie zaw kha pya pakhaa te, cahaa ngiethie cata a tue.
40020006	Zuoluo siymaluo papangaa hraw ta a pya pakhaa ca cawsaa chekha amaa zaa daa thluopa kha hmung yite, ‘Khaapanakawma khaahmuo hrie li pata ningaw ta hingpa lie hing namaa daa cakhaw? a ta yi.
40020007	‘Ahunghmuota rehrie malie ama chang li nakawtana a cuo,’ ama ta. ‘Cacuokieca i mingsuv dung luo kha vaa ungla re va hrie tie ung,’ a ta yi.
40020008	Zuoluo a vya chiy tiyta diedung a hnyituvpapaa ta tluotlakhuekhuotuv kha u te, ‘Rehrietuv tie kha ku yi la a hnangcawce ce ta re changpa tie taakhata patha la a patangce ta re changpa tie te khata ama ninghlue kha pi tie yi,’ a ta.
40020009	Zuoluo siymaluo papangaa hraw ta rehrie a pathupa tie kha a vaw yite, ngu tuokaa phiekha law a pi yi.
40020010	Cacuonakawta a patangce ta re changpa tie kha ninghlue thu riypata amaa vaw ra tiyta a hluv vie ma hmung thlu'a tapata ama rue; cuorasala iema zaw kha ngu tuokaa phiekha law a pi ra yi.
40020011	Ama tuokaa kha a la yite luruo a hnyituv cunglie kha amaa cie.
40020012	‘A hnangcawce ta re changpa tie ca siymaluo pakha chung ta dyina re ama hrie, ninghlue malie na pi tiyta ningling lie ningaw ta re a hriepa kiema hneta aa khing pata na pi yi,’ ama ta.
40020013	Cuorasala ama ta iema hrawlie pakha kha, “Viesaa, na cunglie a cuo lipa tue vade ang. Ningkha ninghlue ngu tuokaa phiekha hmung riypatana palung a za tling cuo vama?
40020014	Na huopa hing a la la ing luo cakuo tie. A hnangcawce ta rehrie changpapaa hing nama zaa tana i pi ra khing.
40020015	I tuokaa cieciepa lie hing kama khing ta tue khuna i hnyi cuo vama? Cacuolikie i pahyasa nakawta nama hie tlie kanaa? a ta yi.
40020016	Cacuonakaw Zingsuv ta, hnang a chuopa ca hmaa sa'a yite, hmaa a sapa ca hnang ama chuo aa,” a ta.
40020017	Zingsuv Jerusalem luo a khaw ningta a ziytuv hlyihning kha a hrangta tah ku yite ama cakuopuole pata bie aa rue yi.
40020018	“Naa thlie tie ung, Jerusalem luo khaw'a pate Cawsaa Saacapaa hing tluobyilepa tie hne phungbie saya tie kuv luo pi pata cuo'a te thie riypata bie ama chi aa.
40020019	Cakhutaata eseluelaa pata tue riypa, tuv riypa hne vieluo lie thie riypata Jentail ming kuv luo kha ama pi aa. Cuorasala ningthungnapa lie pathu pakhaapa ta a cuo aa.
40020020	Cakhutaata Jebedi napuvnung ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a saacapaa zaw hneta a vaw yite; a hmiekunglie kha a pakhuv pane te hmang aa hu.
40020021	Zingsuv ta, “Khaapama na khing?” tapata a hiehriy. “Siepahruo na cuo thueta i saacapaa pahning tie hing na cacuo luo kuo ta pakha, na cavyi luo kuo ta pakha amaa tu riypata bie pathyi sa tie,” a ta.
40020022	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Khaapama maa hie tapa pachang va ungciy. I dang riypa panuo hing nama dang khu'a ma?” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Ma dang khu aa,” ama ta.
40020023	Zingsuv ta, “I dang riypa panuo hing nama dang khu ra sasaw aa, cuorasala i cavyi luo hne i cacuo luo a tu riypa hing ca kama ta i pikhupa cuo vyi, i Paa ta a tingpa paciepa tie huotana a cuo,” a ta.
40020024	Capa kaw ca ziytuv pahraa tie khata ama thyi tiyta uvcanu pahning tie cunglie kha ama hi a haa.
40020025	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta ku yite, “Nama pachangpa haata, Jentail byi tie ca ama uvpa tie cunglie ta a chi yite, uvtuv tie ta uvpa tie cunglie kha ama khing ta ama aw sue taw.
40020026	Niema hrawlieca cahaa cata cuo'a vyi, cuorasala niema hrawlie a lepa a cuo khingpa ca, nama changtaapa a cuo na a hu.
40020027	Niema hrawlie pakhanapa a cuo khingpa ca, nama sii a cuo na a hu.
40020028	Cawsaa Saacapaa ca hriepa pa cuo li pata, hriepatuv cuo riypa hne cawsaa hluvpuv a thla riypata a hringna pi riypata muo aa vaw ta, a ta.
40020029	Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie Jeriko taata ama pya ningtakha cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama paziy.
40020030	Luopuv kielie a daapa mingcue pahning ta Zingsuv na a vya sile tapa kha ama thyi tiyta, “David Sapaa, Ngie malie chi thi tie, Abyipa,” tapata ama khi.
40020031	Cawsaazaapuv khata chuo yite a dieta tah aw riypata ama chang, cuorasala iema ta, “Ngie malie chi thi tie, Abyipa, David Saacapaa,” tapata khuo vie ta ama khi hryly.
40020032	Zingsuv ta a daa te a ku yi. “Khaapa malie tuepa se tapa ma nama khing?” a ta yi.
40020033	Iema ta, “Abyipa, ma ming pavuo sa la tapa na ma khing,” ama ta.
40020034	Zingsuv ta ngiechisa yite ama ming kha a hrie yi. Capahnecata ama ming ca vuo te ama kha ama ziy.
40021001	Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca Jerusalem khy a thaa luo kha a vya ngie viele yite, Oliv tluo lie a awpa Bethfeih khy ama vya phapa khata, Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie pahning kha hmie luo pathlielu yite,
40021002	“Nama hmielie a awpa khy luo kha va si ungla a taata cangpa laa sakha a zaa hre thluopa kha hmung paluo'a ung cate, pathluo ungla kama'a luo namaa vya chiy aa.
40021003	Cawsaa ta cuvkhaa aca ta kie yi ca, “Abyipa na a hu,” ta ungla aca pathlie paluo'a yi,” a ta.
40021004	Hingpa hmang hing profet ta a za ri ciepa a tlingna riypatana a cuo. Profet ta:
40021005	Zion sacanung ca chang tie ung Na siepahruo na nama'a luo a vaw nguoluo Ama ca cawsaa nangnepa cuote laa na aa vya khang Laa panuta na a vya khang, va ta tie ung,” a ta.
40021006	Ziytuv tie ca si yite Zingsuv ta a changpa haa yi khata ama tue.
40021007	Laa hne a taata kha a vya chiy yite, pang kha a ke lie padie yite Zingsuv ca aa khang.
40021008	Cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama pang kha luo lie phaa yite, chekha ta chinghmya kha sa yite luo lie ama phaa.
40021009	Zingsuv hmie luo ta a cakuolepa tie hne a hnang luo taata a paziylepa zaapuv khata, “Hosanna! David Saacapaa ca pathuosa tie ung! Abyipa ming ta a vawpa ca Khazing ta thluechiy pi se! A suocepa vuoruo lie khiy Hosanna tapata pathuosa pata cuose!” ta yite ama khi.
40021010	Jerusalem luo a ngie tiyta, khypuv chung bangkhuo ca a cali te, “Ahung tama a cuo,” ta yite ama hiehriy.
40021011	Cawsaazaapuv ta, “Galilee ruo Nazareth khy ming profet Zingsuv na a cuo,” ama ta.
40021012	Zingsuv ca biena-ing luo kha a ngie te biena-ing chunglie sue a zaapa tie hne a calyipa tie kha a papya diy yi. Tuokaa a thlepa tie cabya hne valale a zaapa tie thude zaw kha nuopatyi diy te,
40021013	“Caapathepa chunglie ta, ‘I ing ca thlaachuona ing ama ta aa’; cuorasala niema ta ca a paruvpa khue tana nama tue,” a ta yi.
40021014	Mingcuepa hne a phyi cabiepa tie kha biena-ing lieca ama'a luo a vaw yite a patluo sa yi.
40021015	Cuorasala tluobyilepa tie hne phungbiesaya tie ta kharuehaa hmang a tuepa kha hmung yite, haatiy zaw ta, “David Saacapaa ca pathuosa tie ung,” ta yite biena-ing lie ama khipa kha ama thyi tiyta ama hi a haa.
40021016	Cacuonakaw Zingsuv kha, “Ama ripa ca na thyi ma?” ama ta. Zingsuv ta, “I thyi samaw! Caapathepa ta, ‘Haatiy zaw'a nata meme a pazaw kaliepa haaseta zaw kha nama pathuosana ca napa ri sa yi,’ a tapa kha ri buo va ung cama?” a ta yi.
40021017	Zingsuv ta a ruose yite, khypuv chung taakhata pya te Bethani khy luo kha vaa te capa lieca aa ri.
40021018	A mawluo mawdiy ta khypuv chung luo a vya kaa pakhaa ning kha Zingsuv ca a nang a diy.
40021019	Luopuv kielie thyikuv kung kha hmung te a va pangie ca a hnaa ri li pata khaapahmuo hmung vyi. Cacuonakaw thyikuv kung ca, “Khatiy tahmuo na thyi pathyi kha tie,” a ta. Cakhupatahne thyikuv kung ca a caa.
40021020	Ziytuv tie ta capa ca ama hmung tiyta ama nang uo te, “Tuokhaatama thyikuv kung hing sungkha ta a caa diy hmuo,” ama ta.
40021021	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: palung luoluena hnyi li pata nama zang kieca thyikuv kung lie i tuepa haa dyi hing tahmuo cuo li pata, hingpa tluo hing hmuo, ‘A hnyi la riyliy luo hue a thaw tie,’ ta ungla aa thaw aa.
40021022	Zangna hneta, thlaa nama chuo kieca nama hiepa bangkhuo ca pi pata nama cuo aa,” a ta yi.
40021023	Zingsuv ca biena-ing luo kha a ngie te a pacuv nguoluo ning yi kha tluobyilepa tie hne uvthyi tie kha a thaa luo a vaw yite, “Khaapa nawhnyina tama hingpa hmang hing na tue? Ahungma hing nawhnyina hing caa pi? ama ta.
40021024	Zingsuv ta, “Bie suokha ca hiehriy'a yi ang te ina palie khu kie ung caca khaapa nawhnyina tama hing hmang hing i tue tapa kha ica chang'a yi.
40021025	Johan ta tiy a nawpa yi hing vuoruo taata ma a cuo, cawsaa taata? a ta yi. Iema'a na iema kha a i yite, “Tuokhaatama ma pa lie'a ung? “Vuoruo taata,” ta se pala, “Khaapaakawma Johan ca nama zang va?” malie a ta aa.
40021026	“Cawsaa'a taata,” ta hyi'a pate, Johan ca cawsaa bangkhuo ta profet tapata ama zang nakawta iema ca ciy amaa chiy hyi,” amaa ta.
40021027	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv kha, “Pachang va puv,” ama ta. Zingsuv ta, “A cuo kieca, kama zaw, khaapa nawhnyina tama hingpa hmang hing i tue tapa kha ca chang raa vayi ang,” a ta yi.
40021028	Tuokhaatama nama rue? Cawsaa pakha za aw te saacapaa pahning a hnyi. A uvthyipa kha, ‘I sapaa, ata ning ca mingsuv diedung luo si la re va hrie tie,’ a ta.
40021029	Ama ta, ‘Si khing va ang,’ a ta, cuorasala a hnang taata a palung a thle te a si.
40021030	A saata a syipa'a luo kha vaa te, capa haa ngiethie cata a chang ra. ‘I si'a ne, abyipa,’ a ta, cuorasala si li pata a aw.
40021031	Hingpa tie pahning lie hing ahung hingma a paa khingnapa kha a tue? a ta yi. “A uvthyipa,” ama ta. Cacuonakaw Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: ngukhyituv tie hne siyhrawnung tie zaw na Khazing pena luo caa ngie khuo'a yi.
40021032	Johan kha aa hmuopa hringna luopuv pahmung sa riypata a vaw te zang va ungciy; cuorasala ngukhyituv tie hne siyhrawnung tie zaw ta ama zang. Nama hmung thluo patahmuo, a hnang taata nama palung kha a thle pata zang va ungciy.
40021033	“Pakhingpuonabie a hrangpa kha naathlie tie ung: “Luruo a hnyituvpa khata mingsuv diedung kha tue te, piehu a padung, mingsuv nawna khue kha cu te, rievena tluophie zaw a sa. Cakhutaata rehrietuv tie kha pahlie yite ama ca khy tlaw riypata aa tha.
40021034	Mingsuv thyi lu tiy a ta taata a cuvu la riypata rehrietuv tie'a luo kha a sii zaw a pathlie yi.
40021035	Rehrietuv tie ta a sii zaw kha patuv yite, pakha ama tuv, pakha thie yite pakha ca alung ta ama vaa.
40021036	Luruo a hnyituvpapaa ta a sii zaw kha a hluv vie ta a pathlie yi. Rehrietuv tie ta a hluo nig ama za tue taapa haakhata ama tue pakhaa.
40021037	A hnangcawce ta a saacapaapa kha pathlie te, “I saacapaa hing ca ama hmiezaa ngiethie aa,” a ta.
40021038	Cuorasala rehrietuv tie ta ama hmung pahne ta, “Hingpapaa hingna a rucutuv ta a cuo, a vaw tie ung, thie ung sala a hnyipa hing a la'a ungpuv,” amaa ta.
40021039	Cacuonakawta patuv yite diedung khungthing luo kha thaw yite ama thie.
40021040	“A cuo kieca diedung a hnyituvpa a vya chiy tiyta rehrietuv tie kha tuokhaatana a tue thlu'a mang yi nama ta ma? a ta yi.
40021041	“Capa cawsaa chiepa tie ca thie'a yite, mingsuv lu cuo ningta a cuvu a pi khupa rehrietuv tie kha diedung ca a pahlie'a yi,” ama ta.
40021042	Zingsuv ta, “Caapathepa ta: ‘Ing satuv tie ta ama thawpa alung ca Ingkiy lung ta aa li. Capa hmang ca Abyipa tuepa cuote Ma hmungna lieta nang-uo a chiy vama?’ a ta pakha ri buo va ung ca ma?” a ta yi.
40021043	Cacuonakawta, ica chang yi: “Khazing pena ca niema'a taata lapa cuo'a te, pena thyipaa pha a hnyi riy'apa tie kha pi pata ama cuo aa,” a ta.
40021044	Ahunghmuo cuose hing alung cunglie a tlapa ca kyipatlaa'a te, hing alung ta a tlasuepa ca a zapatlaa diy aa,” a ta.
40021045	Tluobyilepa tie hne Farasi ming ta Zingsuv ripa pakhingpuonabie ca ama thyi tiyta, kiema na malie a ta tapa kha ama pachang.
40021046	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv kha ama patuv khing, cuorasala zaapuv ta Zingsuv kha profet tana a cuo tapa ama zang nakawta zaapuv kha ciy yite patuv nguo vayi.
40022001	Zingsuv ta zaapuv kha pa-khingpuonabie hmuo te bie a chang pakhaa yi.
40022002	“Vuoruo pena ca a saacapaa cuota achiyhie saduona a tuepa siepahruo pakha hne tana aa lu.
40022003	A sii zaw kha pathlie yite kupa tie bangkhuo kha a chiyhie saduona luo chiy riypata a pachang sa yi, cuorasala vya chiy khing vayi.
40022004	A hrangpa sii zaw kha pathlie pakhaa yite, ‘Saduona ca ting ciepa ta a cuo tli. I cuetungpa hne sahring a thusapa zaw thie tli pate, zezaw bangkhuo ting ciepa ta a cuo tli. A chiyhie saduona luo ca a vaw tie ung, nama va ta aa,’ a ta yi.
40022005	Cuorasala siysaa ri lipa yi ta chekha ca lu luo ama si, chekha ca chadaw luo cakuo yite,
40022006	a hrangpa tie ta a sii zaw kha patuv yite, tuv yite ama thie.
40022007	Siepahruopa ca a hihaa hringhruo te a rieka kha pathlie yite capa lie a nawpa tie ca thie yite ama khy kha myi ta ama rue.
40022008	Cakhutaata a sii zaw kha, ‘Achiyhie saduona ca ting ciepa ta a cuo tli, cuorasala i kupa tie ta ca aphuv-asiy vayi.
40022009	Ata hingta a zaa luopuv luo kha vaa ungla, nama hmungpa bangkhuo kha va ku tie ung,’ a ta yi.
40022010	Cacuonakawta a sii zaw ca azaa luopuv luo kha vaa yite, ama hmungpa bangkhuo kha achie-apha ta li pata pakiy yite cawsaa ca achiyhie saduona ing ta pangkha ama ta.
40022011	Cuorasala Siepahruopa ca ama kupa tie mang riypata a vya ngie tiyta achiyhiena caw a tue lipa pakha kha a hmung.
40022012	‘Liechung, khaapanakawma achiyhiena caw a tue li pata hingpa saduona chung luo naa ngie the?’ a ta. Cuorasala khaahmuo palie vyi.
40022013	Cakhutaa siepahruopa ta a sii zaw kha, ‘A kuv hne a phyi kha ciy ungla khungthing khy zingna hmang, caana hne haa riena hmang luo kha thaw tie ung,” a ta.
40022014	Tahematapakieca, “Kupa ca hluvsa yite, a tlawpa ca ama caw,” a ta.
40022015	Farasi tie ca vaa yite Zingsuv kha a bie ripa taata a suena patuv the riypata khue ama khuo.
40022016	Cacuonakawta iema ziytuv chekha hne Herod cawsaa chekha kha pathlie yite, “Saya, nama ca aa dangpa na cuopa maca pachang. Khazing khingna biedangpa kha cawsaa hmie mang li pata na pacuv yi, cawsaa cuona mang pata pahlyipalena tue vaciy.
40022017	Cacuonakawta na ruenapa malie chang tie. Rom siepahruopa ngukhyi pi riypa hing ma phungbie ta a thlu ma a pa-aw ma?” ama ta.
40022018	Zingsuv ta atingna pha lipa ama hnyi pakha pachang te, “Phahruocuo tie! Khaapanakawma ina dyapasya ungciy?
40022019	Ngukhyi pi riypa tuokaa ca na pahmung tie ung,” a ta. Ngu tuokaa phiekha kha ama vya pi.
40022020	“Ahung hmiechang hne ahung ming ma a taa?” a ta yi.
40022021	“Siepahruopa hmiechang hne siepahruo ming,” ama ta. Cacuonakaw, Zingsuv ta, “Cacuokieca siepahruo huopa kha siepahruo pi ungla, Khazing huopa kha Khazing pi tie ung,” a ta yi.
40022022	Capaca ama thyi tiyta ama nang uo te ama kha thuse yite ama cakuo.
40022023	Capa ning ngiethie cata thu-pakhaana aw vyi a tapa Sadusi ming chekha ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw yite bie ama hiehriy.
40022024	Iema ta, “Saya, Moses ta, ‘cawsaa pakha ca saata hnyi li pata a thiy kieca a napuvnung kha a nuta tah aa hlaw'a te, a uvta cuo khata saata ama hnyi aa,’ tapata malie a pacuv.
40022025	Hingpa lie a zaa aw buopa uvcanu pasariy ama za aw. A uvthyicepa ta napuv chiy te saata hnyi li pata a thiyse, cacuonakaw nunghlyinung ca a nuta tah aa hlaw.
40022026	Cahaa ngiethie cata a pahningnapapaa zaw ca thiy te, a pathungnapapaa zaw a thiy ra ngiethie, ama pasariy yalya ta cahaa cata ama thiy.
40022027	A hnangcawce ta nunghlyinung ca a thiy.
40022028	Ama pasariy yalya ta amaa zaa hlaw nakawta thupakhaana ning thueta ahung napuv tama a cuo aa?” ama ta.
40022029	Zingsuv ta, “Nama hla karue de! Hinghaahingta nama hlapa hing Caa Pathepa hne Khazing cahrana nama pachang li nakaw na a cuo.
40022030	Athiypa tie ama thupakhaa thue hing vuoruo lie a awpa avuoming lu'a yite a chiy a hie'a va tli yi.
40022031	Athiypa thupakhaana kawlie Khazing ta aca chang payi ri buo va ung cama?
40022032	‘Kama ca Abraham Khazing, Isak Khazing, Jakob Khazing tana i cuo. Ama ca a hringpa tie Khazing tana a cuo, a thiypa tie Khazing ta cuo vyi,” a ta yi.
40022033	Cawsaazaapuv ta a pacuvnapa kha ama thyi tiyta ama nang ta a uo.
40022034	Zingsuv na Sadusi ming kha ama ri riy aw li nate ta a tue yi tapa kha Farasi ming ta ama thyi tiyta a tawpakhaw yite,
40022035	iema hraw taata phungbiesaya pakha ta a suena patuv riypata bie a hiehriy.
40022036	“Saya, nawbie hrawlie hing khaapa nawbie hingma a lece?” a ta.
40022037	Zingsuv ta, “Na Byipaapa na Khazing ca na pathiy na palung yalya, na hringna yalya hne na ruena na pacuona yalya ta due tie,”
40022038	tapa hingna a lecepa hne a biepuvcepa nawbie ta a cuo.
40022039	A suohningnapa nawbie ca ‘Nama hne nama naa due pahaata na ingpaa kha due ra tie,’ tapata a cuo.
40022040	Moses phungbie bangkhuo hne profet tie pacuvna bangkhuo hing hingpa nawbie suohning lie hingna aa khung diy,” a ta.
40022041	Farasi tie amaa hmyana lie kha, Zingsuv ta,”
40022042	Messiah hing tuokhaatama nama rue? Ahung ciypathla tama a cuo?” a ta yi. “David ciypathla,” ama ta.
40022043	Zingsuv ta, “Khaapanakawma Thlaapa ta David kha, ‘Messiah hing ‘Abyipa,’ a pata sa? David ta,
40022044	‘Abyipa ta i Byipaapa kha Na carie tie kha na phyipazaa rawlie i chi hluo li, I cacuo luo hingta a tu tie,’ a ta.
40022045	David ta Messiah ca i Byipaapa a ta kieca, tuokhaatama Messiah ca David ciypathla ta a cuo the aa?” a ta.
40022046	Zingsuv bie kha ahungtahmuo palie khu vayi, ama ning taacata ama kha ahungtahmuo bie hiehriy nguo va tli yi.
40023001	Zingsuv ta cawsaazaapuv hne ziytuv tie kha,
40023002	“Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie hing Moses thude lie a tupa tana ama cuo.
40023003	Cacuonakawta aca pacuvpa bangkhuo yi kha tue ungla ziy tie ung. Cuorasala iema ama tuepa kha ca tue ra kha ung, tahematapakieca ama pacuvna haata tue vayi.
40023004	A riysapa hmang, a phya ruvsapa kha cawsaa ke cunglie khang yite, cuorasala iema ta ca ama kuvdaw tahmuo hrie khing vayi.
40023005	Hmangting kha cawsaa hmung the riypata dyi ama tue. Ama caapathepa baw luvrina hne buorina kha pale yite ama pangpe kha ama pasyi.
40023006	Pyi chunglie kha pa-uvsathyipa tie a tuna thude lie a tu khing yite apungna-ing lie zaw kha thude phacepa lie amaa tu khing.
40023007	Chadaw tluo lie cawsaa ta pa-uvsathyina hne bie a chang pata saya, saya ta riypa kha ama tlechuo.
40023008	Cuorasala niema ca, ‘saya’ tapata ca u'a vayi, tahematapakieca Saya pakha dyi hnyi ung cate nama palang ta siengaachie ta nama cuo.
40023009	Cakhutaa ta chuelyicung lie hing ahunghmuo i Paa tapata ku'a va ungciy, tahematapakieca vuoruo lie Paa pakha dyina nama hnyi.
40023010	Cawpatuv tapata zaw ca u kha yi se, tahematapakieca cawpatuv Messiah pakha dyina nama hnyi.
40023011	Niema hrawlie a lecepa ca nama changtaapa a cuo riypatana a cuo.
40023012	Ama hne ama a palepa ca pachungpa ta cuo'a te cawsaa raw a canawpa ca cyicalangpa ta a cuo aa.
40023013	“Cuorasala, niema, phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Phahruocuo tie! Tahematapakieca Vuoruo Pena chiypakaa ca cawsaa kha nama khaa khuo, niema zaw a ngie lipa ung cata, a ngie khingpa tie zaw kha luo nama khuo.
40023014	Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie, niema ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Phahruocuo tie! Nunghlyi kha ese ung cate, dung ung cate ama ing te nama chuv; cakhutaa cawsaa hmung riypata thlaa kha a syisa ta namaa pachuo sa. Capa nakawcata nama duotena ca a pasa hringhruo aa!
40023015	Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie, niema ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo. Phahruocuo tie! Cawsaa pakha palung pathle sa riypata riyliy kha te ung cate ruo ting ta nama si. Nama hmung tlakuopa kha hell luo tla pata niema laata lehning ang riypata nama tue.
40023016	Mingcue luochiytuv tie, niema ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! ‘Cawsaa pakha ta hmangpathepa ming ri pata chie aa sa kieca chie aa sapa cata ama kha patuv'a vyi, cuorasala hmangpathepa chunglie a awpa siyy ta chie aa sa kieca chie aa sapa cata a patuv aa,’ tapata nama pacuv.
40023017	Mingcue a ngaapa tie, khaapama a biepuv vie? Siyy cama a cuo li kie siyy a pathesatuv hmangpathepa ma?
40023018	Thukhyi pakhaa ung cate, cawsaa pakha ta hriykhungrina tluophie ta chie aa sa kieca chie aa sapa ta patuv'a vyi, cuorasala hriykhungrina tluophie cunglie pipa lasaw ta chie aa sa kieca chie aa sapa ta a patuv aa nama ta.
40023019	Nama ming hing a cue suesaa ing! Pipa lasaw ma a biepuv vie pipa lasaw a pathe sapa hriykhungrina tluophie cama?
40023020	Cacuonakawta hriykhungrina tluophie ming ri pata chie aa sapa ca a cunglie a awpa yalya hne tana chie aa sa.
40023021	Hmangpathepa ming ri pata chie aa sa kieca ama ca a chunglie a awpa Khazing hne tana chie aa sa.
40023022	Vuoruo ming ri pata chie aa sa kieca Khazing byithude hne a cunglie a tupa hneta chie aa sa pata a cuo.
40023023	Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie niema ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Phahruocuo tie! Tiyhuo ca-ienapa putinan, hruohmie hne iesing zaw hmuota chehraachekha nama pi, cuorasala phungbie chunglie a biepuvsapa adangna, cawsaa ngiechi thena hne zangtluo a tlana ca siysaa ri tlung va ungciy. Capa zaw cana nama ziy riypata a cuo, a hrangpa zaw kha dyathlaa li pata.
40023024	Mingcue luochiytuv tie! Macing sakhata hmuo namaa thliy, cuorasala kala-uv ca nama paluo puo!
40023025	Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie niema ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Phahruocuo tie! Nama panuo hne pakaa ca ale luo kha pathe paalaa khata nama pasiy, a chung luo ca karuo-awna hne malie nama chuvpa chechiy ta a bi.
40023026	Mingcue Farasi tie! Panuo chung luo kha pasiy taa ungla muo, ale luo zaw kha a pathe ra'a ta.
40023027	Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie niema ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Phahruocuo tie! Niema ca thungruopa ama thuvpa thluo, ale taa mang pata a puvthesapa, a chung luo ca a thiypa ruv hne athuv-ahniepa riy ta a bi.
40023028	Cahaa cata, niema zaw ale luo taata ca cawsaa mekaa cuota nama pha, cuorasala nama chung luo ca phahruo a cuo pakhina hne suena ta a bi.
40023029	Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie niema ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Phahruocuo tie! Profet tie cuota thluo phasapa sapa ung cate cawsaa aa dangpa tie thluolung ca nama pangi nama pasuo.
40023030	“Ma mingchingmingvuo tie chuo lie hing za aw se pala, profet tie thiena lie hing zaa te ra hrahring'a va puv,’ nama ta.
40023031	Cacuonakawta niema hrahring ta profet tie zaa thiepa samingsahlaa nama cuopa kha nama paluo sa.
40023032	Nama mingchingmingvuo tie zaw ta ama za patha cie tlipa hmang ca palang lalue tie ung.
40023033	Pariy zaw, pariy saa zaw! Tuokhaatama hell luo tla riypa biechina taata nama law the aa?
40023034	Cacuonakawta profet tie hne mingsing tie hne pacuvtuv zaw kha niema'a luo i vya pathlie'a yi; chekha nama thie aa, chekha ca vieluo lie thie'a ung cate, chekha ca apungna-ing lie kha tuv'a ung cate khykha taata khykha luo namaa cadele aa.
40023035	Cacuonakawta suena a hnyi lipa Abel thiena taata hmangpathepa hne hriykhungrina tluophie a lala lie nama thiepa Berekhiah saacapaapa Zekhariah thiyse te ta, alyi lie lyipa, aa dangpa bangkhuo tie thiyse kawlieta duotena ca nama cunglie a tlung aa.
40023036	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Khapa lienawna bangkhuo kawlieta duotena ca ata chuo saa zaw cunglie hingna a tlung aa!
40023037	Vya Jerusalem, Jerusalem, profet zaw a thiepa hne Khazing ta nama'a luo a vya pathliepa tie zaw alung ta a vaapa khypuv! Yikhazaa ulu ma na cawsaa zaw bangkhuo kha aapuvnung ta a taata zaw a mathlaa rawlie a pahmya pahaayita i buo ica pazuu khuo khing, cuorasala napa tuesa khing vaciy.
40023038	Mang tie, na ing ca hri'a te a duo aa.
40023039	Ica chang yi: “Abyipa ming ta a vawpa ca Khazing ta thluechiy pi se,” tapata nama ri hluo li na hmung'a va tli ungciy,” a ta yi.
40024001	Zingsuv ca Biena-ing taakhata pya te a cakuole pa khata ziytuv tie kha a thaa luo a vaw yite, Biena-ing a phana zya kha ama rikhyi. Zingsuv ta,
40024002	“Hingpa hing nama hmung kaluo cuo vama? Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Hing alung suokha hing hmuo a pacangcang pata aw'a va tli, a palang ta pacing diypa tana a cuo aa,” a ta.
40024003	Zingsuv Oliv Tluocung lie a tu nguoluo pata, ziytuv tie kha iema se ta ama'a luo a vaw yite, “Malie chang tie, hing hmang hing khatiy tama a cuo aa? Naa vaw pakhaa na cuo hne cuo chuona riypa pamangsana ta khaapa hmang ma a aw aa,” ama ta.
40024004	Zingsuv ta, “A raaring ung, ahunghmuo a padung sa kha ung.
40024005	Cawsaa hluvpuv i ming ta a vaw'a yite, ‘Messiah tana i cuo,’ ta'a yite cawsaa hluvpuv kha ama dung aa.
40024006	Rie amaa tuvna thuohlaa hne rie amaa tuv'a nangpa thuohlaa kha nama thyi aa, cuorasala nama thlaa zang kha se. Cahaapa hmang ca ama aw aa, cuorasala a chuona ta cuo valie.
40024007	Mingphang phangkha hne phangkha, ruokha hne ruokha amaa tuv aa. Hmangting lieta cakuo tlung'a te, aling a siy aa.
40024008	Hingpa hmang bangkhuo hing nu pazipa hne na a lu aa.
40024009	Cakhutaata niema kha hrisaa riypa hne thie riypata malie kuv luo aca pi'a yi. Kama kawlieta mingphang ting ta aca hue'a yi.
40024010	Cawsaa hluvpuv ca ama zangna kha thuse'a yite, pakha hne pakha kha a lyi'a yite amaa hue aa.
40024011	Cakhutaata profetpakhipa hluvpuv kha vya pya'a yite cawsaa hluvpuv kha ama dung aa.
40024012	Phalina kha a pungzaale nakawta duena a cakingle aa.
40024013	Cuorasala a chuona te a ang khupa ca khuona a hmung aa.
40024014	Cakhutaa mingphang bangkhuo cuota tehte cuo riypata pena thuophaabie ca chuelyi khyzaa ta phupa a cuo aa; cakhutaa dyi tana a chuona ca a cuo aa.
40024015	“Profet Daniel ta a ripa, ‘Ciy aa chiypa duvsamakhiepa,” hmang pathepa lie a daa pakha nama hmung aa.” (Hingpa caa a ripa hingta thyi the se).
40024016	Judea ruo lie a awpa ta tluocung luo kha a ruo se.
40024017	A ing cunglie a awpa ca a ing chunglie a awpa hmang la riypata cung kha se.
40024018	Lu lie a awpa ta a buohryicungle la riypata kaa kha se.
40024019	Capa ning hne cuo ningta nu a phyapa canung hne haaseta a hnyipa canung ca thluechiylipa tana ama cuo.
40024020	Namaa ruona cuo hing thlasiy chung hne Sabbath ning aa chuo li riypata thlaa chuo tie ung.
40024021	Tahematapakieca chuelyi hruothu baataata a ta cuo te ta a tlung buo lipa, hmie luo cuo thue zaw a tlung li riy'apa, ruvnaana na a tlung aa.
40024022	Capa cuo ca pachang sa vie pata a cuo li kieca ahunghmuota hyazang'a vayi, cuorasala a tlawpa zaw cuota a cuo ca pachang sa vie pata a cuo aa.
40024023	Cakhutaa, pakhakha ta, ‘Mang tie, Messiah ca lie hing a aw hing,’ a cuo li kie, ‘lie hue a aw hue,’ aca ta kie zaw yima zang kha ung.
40024024	Messiah pakhipa tie hne profetpakhipa tie kha vya pya'a yite, a cuo khu kietaca Khazing a tlaw ciepa zaw khahmuo dung riypata kharuehaa hmang lesapa hne pamangsana zaw kha ama tue aa.
40024025	Maw khya ung, a cuo a tling hluo ta tlihing ica changlu yi.
40024026	Cacuonakawta cawsaa ta, ‘Mang tie! ama ca ruochung lie na a aw,’ aca ta kie zaw yima vaa kha ung. ‘Mang tie! ingkhuo chunglie na a aw,’ aca ta kie zaw yima va zang kha ung.
40024027	Ningchiy taata thinghlaa a vya cakang te ningtla te a khepahlipa haatana Cawsaa Saacapaa ca a vaw aa.
40024028	“Athiypa riy a awnapa hmang lie luotaa amaa hmyasuele aa.”
40024029	Capa ruvnaana cuo a chuo khu pahne ta, ning ca zing'a te, thlaa ca vaa'a va tli; aasiy zaw vuoruo taa za tla'a te, vuoruo lie a awpa cahrana zaw ca amaa cahang aa.
40024030	Cakhutaata Cawsaa Saacapaa pamangsana ca avuo lie aa luo aa. Cawsaa Saacapaa ca vuoruo amyi cung taata lesyi rungnaana hneta aa zuvpa kha chuelyi mingphang bangkhuo ta hmung'a yite ama caa aa.
40024031	Aa vuoming kha chuelyi kiy paliy luo pathlie'a yite, hmyakaa kha thaapuv ta tung'a yite, aa tlawpa cawsaa zaw kha chuelyi kiy paliy, avuo dena kuo kha taata kuo kha te ta ama pakiy aa.
40024032	“Thyikuvkung'a taahingta a cuv tie ung. A daw kya pakiy te a hnaa a thue tiyta cuovuo na a ngie tli tapa kha nama pachang.
40024033	Cahaa cata, hingpa hmang bangkhuo nama hmung tiyta, ama ca thlake thabaw te a vya chiy tli tapa kha pachang tie ung.
40024034	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: ata chuo cawsaa zaw ama thiy diy hluo hingta hingpa hmang bangkhuo a vya cuo aa tapa kha maw kha ung.
40024035	Vuoruo hne alyi ca ama ra aa, cuorasala kama bie ca khatiy tahmuo ra'a vyi.
40024036	Cuorasala, ahungtahmuo capa ning hne cuo ca khatiy tama a cuo aa tapa kha pachang vayi; avuoming cuose, Saacapaa cuose, pachang vayi; Paa kyalya dyina a pachang.
40024037	Cawsaa Saacapaa a vaw riypa ca Noah chuo ning hmang a cuopa haa khatana a cuo aa.
40024038	Tiypa-aa a tlung hluo, Noah palaw chung luo a ngiena te ta, cawsaa zaw ca ning dang yite, canung hne capaa zaw amaa chiy amaa hie,
40024039	tiypa-aa vya tlung te a phya diy hluo te yi ta khaama a vya tlung tapa kha pachang vayi. Cawsaa Saacapaa aa vaw thueta ca cahaacatana a cuo aa.
40024040	Cakhutaa, lu lie a awpa pahning lie kha pakha la pata cuo'a te, pakha ca thuse pata a cuo aa.
40024041	Sung a suv hnepa canung pahning lie kha pakha la pata cuo'a te, pakha ca thuse pata a cuo aa.
40024042	Cacuonakawta singvaasa pata aw tie ung, tahematapakieca khatiy ningcuo lieta ma nama Byipaapa a vaw aa tapa kha pachang va ungciy.
40024043	Ing a hnyituvpa ta a paruvpa khatiy tama a vaw aa tapa kha a pachang kieca a hmung li pata huo'a te a ing kha caphi pata paruv sa khu'a vyi tapa ca nama pachang.
40024044	Cacuonakaw, niema zaw a raaring tie ung, tahematapakieca Cawsaa Saacapaa ca nama mangkhuo lina cuo lie tana aa vaw aa.
40024045	Cakhutaata ahung cama zangtluo aa tlapa hne a singpa sii, a byipaapa ta a sii hrangpa tie uv riypa hne a cuo a hmuota tah sa a pi riypata re a pipapaa ta a cuo?
40024046	Re a hrie nguoluo ningta a byipaapa ta a vya chiyhnuepa sii ca thluechiypa tana a cuo.
40024047	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Capapaa ca a byipaapa ta a hnyipa bangkhuo a mangchiytuv ta a chi aa.
40024048	Cuorasala sii pha lipa pakha ta, ‘i byipaapa ca a vaw'a valie, a vya haa kalie aa ta te,
40024049	sii hrangpa tie kha tuvde yite, a pariypa tie hne khata ning dang yite a aw kieca,
40024050	a mangkhuo li cuo ning hne a pachang li cuo ning khata a byipaapa ca a vaw aa.
40024051	A diykariy pata a cepachung diy'a te, caana hne haa cariena a awna hmang lie kha phahruocuo tie hneta a chihne aa.
40025001	“Vuoruo Pena ca hinghaa-hingtana a cuo aa. Napuv a chiypa satliepa daw riypata ama myi-ing hne a pyapa lesaa pahraa hne tana aa lu.
40025002	Iema hrawlie papangaa ca a ngaapa cuo yite a hrangpa papangaa ca a singpa ama cuo.
40025003	A ngaapa tie ca myi-ing kha a cyi yite myitiy a cyi vayi.
40025004	A singpa tie ca ama myi-ing hne myitiy pangkha ama rawpa pung kha amaa cyipuo.
40025005	Napuv a chiypa satliepa ca a vya chiy haa nakawta lesaa zaw ca tluv yite amaa hmung.
40025006	“Zuocang a chiypa khiy ta, ‘Napuv a chiypa satliepa na a vaw tli! Thu ungla va daw tie ung,’ tapata ama khi.
40025007	Lesaa pahraa tie ca thu yite ama myi-ing kha ama vya pachie.
40025008	Catiyta ta a ngaapa tie ta a singpa tie kha, ‘Myitiy malie pibuo thi tie ung, tahematapakieca ma myi-ing na a thiy'a nang,’ ama ta.
40025009	Cuorasala a singpa tie ta, ‘Cuo the'a vyi, niema hne kiema hne malie a zu pakhaw the'a vyi, chadaw luo kha cakuo ungla nama vaa calyi patana a pha vie aa,’ ama ta.
40025010	A ngaapa lesaa tie myitiy ama vaa calyi chung ta napuv a chiypa satliepa ca vya chiy te, a ting pacie pata a awpa papangaa tie hneta achiyhie saduona luo kha a ngie yite ingchiy kha ama khaa.
40025011	“Cakhutaata cata lesaa hrangpa tie ca vya chiy yite, ‘Abyipa, abyipa, malie kya pahaw tie,’ ama ta.
40025012	Cuorasala ama ta, ‘niema kha ca pachang hrahring vayi ang,’ a ta yi.
40025013	Cacuonakawta a raaring pata huo tie ung, tahematapakieca a ning hne a cuo kha pachang va ungciy.
40025014	Vuoruo Pena ca khy tlawna luo a tha'a nang nakawta a sii zaw kha ku yite a hnyipa mangchiy riypata bie a taa siypa cawsaa pakha hne tana aa lu.
40025015	Ama hmang tue khuna cyicuo zi ta tuokaa kha a pi yi: pakha kha talent suopangaa, pakha kha talent suohning, pakha kha talent suokha lawta a pi yi. Cakhutaa ca khy tlawna luo ca aa tha.
40025016	Talent suopangaa a hmungpapaa cata a tuokaa cata sung kha pali te, a hrangpa talent suopangaa amie a hmung.
40025017	Cahaa cata talent suohning a hmungpapaa ta a hrangpa talent suohning amie a hmung ra.
40025018	Cuorasala talent suokha a hmungpapaa khata alyi kha cu te a byipaapa tuokaa kha a nu.
40025019	“Cuo syipuv khu taata capa sii tie ama byipaapa ca vya chiy pakhaa te ama tuokaa hmuonapa kha a sieta tah a tue khyi yi.
40025020	Tuokaa talent suopangaa a hmungpapaa kha hmie luo vya pya te a mie talent suopangaa a vya pi. Abyipa, kama kha tuokaa talent suopangaa ina za pi ciy. ‘Mang tie! talent suopangaa i pamie,’ a ta.
40025021	A byipaapa ta, ‘A pha ciemuo, a phapa hne zangtluo aa tlapa sii, nama ca hmang cawta kawlie zangtluo a tlapa tana na cuo, hmang hluvpuv mangchiytuv tana ica chi aa, zaa ngie la na byipaapa palungtluona hing zaa hraw ra tie,’ a ta.
40025022	Cakhutaa tuokaa talent suohning a hmungpapaa kha hmie luo vya pya ra te, ‘Abyipa, kama kha tuokaa talent suohning ina za pi ciy; mang tie! talent suohning i pamie,’ a ta.
40025023	A byipaapa ta, ‘A pha ciemuo, a phapa hne zangtluo aa tlapa sii, nama ca hmang cawta kawlie zangtluo a tlapa tana na cuo, hmang hluvpuv mangchiytuv tana ica chi aa, zaa ngie la na byipaapa palungtluona hing zaa hraw ra tie,’ a ta.
40025024	Cakhutaata tuokaa talent suokha a hmungpapaa kha a hmie luo vya pya ra te, ‘Abyipa, nama ca cawsaa tateta-iepa, saciy na vaa lina lie sa hrie cate, ciy na cyi li na lie kha a thyipaa a pahriypa na cuopa kha ica pachang;
40025025	cacuonakawta ca ciy ang te na tuokaa talent suokha ca alyi chunglie i nu, na huopa hing a la tie,’ a ta.
40025026	A byipaapa ta, ‘A pha lipa hne a thaathiypa sii, saciy i vaalina lie sa hrie ang te, ciy i cyi lina hmang lie thyipaa i pahriy tawpa napa chang sasaw cuo vama?
40025027	Cacuokieca i vya kaa thueta i tuokaa hne amie hne i hmung riypata i tuokaa ca tuokaa-ing lie na za chi riypa muo a cuo ta.
40025028	Cacuonakawta hingpapaa taahingta tuokaa kha la ungla, talent suohraa a hnyipapaa kha pi tie ung.
40025029	Tahematapakieca a hnyipa tie ca chachiypa cuo'a yite, a hlyi nate ta ama hnyi aa; cuorasala khaapahmuo a hnyi lipa ca a hnyi tlakuopa kha hmuo chuv pata a cuo aa.
40025030	Hingpa thlahnena a hnyi lipa sii hing ale khyzingna luo, caana hne haariena hmang luo kha thaw tie ung,’ a ta.
40025031	Cawsaa Saacapaa ca a rungnaana hne avuoming bangkhuo hneta a zuv tiyta, a byithude rungnaapa cunglie ca a tu'a te,
40025032	mingphang bangkhuo ca a thaa lie pahmyapa ama cuo aa. Tuvkhietuv ta tuv ca mie'a taata a chepa haata mingphang bangkhuo kha phuvhning ta a che'a yi.
40025033	Tuv tie kha a cacuo luota chi'a yite mie tie kha a cavyi luota a chi'a yi.
40025034	Siepahruo ta a cacuo luota a awpa tie kha, ‘I paa ta thluechiy a pipa tie, a vaw tie ung. Chuelyi hruothu baataata niema cuota ting ciepa Pena ru hing vya cu tie ung.
40025035	Tahematapakieca i nang diy te sa ina pi ungciy, i tiy hrie te tiy ina pi ungciy, khyche cuo ang te ing inaa patlung sa ungciy,
40025036	abuv-ase riypa i hnyi li ning caw ina pi ungciy, pasa ang te ina mangsang ungciy, thaw tla ang te ina ve ungciy,’ a ta'a yi.
40025037	Cawsaa aa dangpa tie ta, ‘Abyipa, khaapa ning ma na nang diy te sa maca pi, na tiy hrie te tiy maca pi buo?
40025038	Khaapa ning ma khyche cuo cate maacaa patlung sa, abuv-ase riy hnyi li pata aw cate caw maca pi buo?
40025039	Khaapa ning ma pasa cate a cuo li kie thaw lie aw cate maca ve buo?’ ama ta aa.
40025040	Siepahruo ta, ‘Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Hing i uvnu zaw hrawlie ta nutaacepa a cuo zaw a cunglie nama tuepa ca kama cunglie nama tuepa tana a cuo,’ a ta'a yi.
40025041	Cakhutaa a cavyi luota a awpa tie kha, ‘Niema, chie sapa tie, i thaa taahingta pya ungla Setaa hne aa vuoming cuota ting ciepa a thiy buo lipa myi chung luo kha cakuo tie ung.
40025042	Tahematapakieca i nang diy te sa na pi va ungciy, i tiy hrie te tiy na pi va ungciy;
40025043	khyche cuo ang te naa patlung sa va ungciy, abuv-ase riy hnyi li pata aw ang te caw na pi va ungciy; i pasa ning hne thaw i tla ning zaw na ve va ungciy,’ a ta yi.
40025044	Cakhutaa iema ta, ‘Abyipa, kha tiy ning ma na nang a diy, na tiy a hrie, khyche ta na cuo, abuv-ase riy hnyi li pata na aw, na pasa, thaw na tla pata ca hmung pate caa byase khing li pata ma aw buo?’ ama ta aa.
40025045	Cakhutaa ama ta, ‘Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: nutaacepa cawsaa pakha naa bya khing lipa kha, kama inaa bya khing lipa ca tana a cuo, a ta'a yi.
40025046	Cakhutaa, capa tie ca chuozaa duotena ruo luo kha si'a yite, cawsaa a dangpa tie ca chuozaa hringna luo kha ama si aa,’ a ta.
40026001	Zingsuv ta hing bie bangkhuo hing a ri khu taata ziytuv tie kha,
40026002	“Nama pachangpa haata ning hning khutaa Lawsena Pyi vya cuo'a tli te, Cawsaa Saacapaa ca vieluo lie khepuo riypata pipa a cuo aa,” a ta yi.
40026003	Cakhutaa tluobyilepa tie hne uvthyi tie ca Tluobyilecepa Kaiafas ing lie kha a hmya pakhaw yite,
40026004	Zingsuv kha a paruvta tah patuv pata thie riypata khue ama khuo.
40026005	Cuorasala iema ta, “Pyi chunglie ca tue'a va ungpuv, cawsaa na hnaa a pahnaw sue'a yi,” amaa ta.
40026006	Zingsuv ca Bethani khy, caahming-hmaa zaa phya buopa Simon ing lie a aw nguoluo ning kha
40026007	canung pakha a vaw te, alabaster ungthyi lie pangkha ta a rawpa a muo ruv ciemuopa ziyhmyi kha cabya lie a tu nguoluo pata a luv lie a bya.
40026008	Capa ca ziytuv tie ta ama hmung tiyta ama hi haa te, “A puohrie laalaw de!
40026009	Hingpa ziyhmyi hing tuokaa a dawsawli ta zaa pata siypasa tie pi riypa a cuo raalaa pata,” ama ta.
40026010	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta khapa kaw kha a pachang tiyta, “Khaapanakawma hingpa nung hing hnaa nama pahnaw? I cuota hmang phapa na a tue.
40026011	Siypasa tie ca niema'a lie ama aw pari aa, cuorasala kama ca niema'a lie aw pari'a va ang.
40026012	Ziyhmyi ina byapa hing i riy paby riypata a tingtuopa tana a cuo.
40026013	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Thuophaabie ama phu napa chuelyi hmangting lie hingpa nung a tuepa hmang hing ama maw lina ta ama ri pari aa,” a ta.
40026014	Cakhutaa ziytuv hlyihning hraw-lie pakha a cuopa Judas Iskariot ca tluobyilepa tie'a luo kha vaa te,
40026015	“Zingsuv hing nama kuv luo ica pi kie yi ca khaama ina pi'a ungciy?” a ta yi. Iema ta ngu tuokaa sawthung kha ama pi.
40026016	Ama khu yalya taakhata Judas ca Zingsuv lyina riypa cuophaa dyi kha a bya.
40026017	Ruoriy phuv li Viechuo Pyi ning kha ziytuv tie ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw yite, “Lawsena Pyi sa dung pakhawnapa ca khaapalie va pachie se pala ma na khing?” ama ta.
40026018	Zingsuv ta, “Khy chunglie cawsaa pakhapapaa luo kha vaa ungla, ‘Saya na, I cuo na a tling tli, naa ziytuv tie hne tana na ing lie Lawsena Pyi ma tue khing, caa ta,’ va ta tie ung,” a ta yi.
40026019	Zingsuv ta a changpa haa yi cata ziytuv tie ta Lawsena Pyi sa ca ama pachie.
40026020	Zuoluo ca Zingsuv hne ziytuv hlyihning ca sa ning riypata amaa tu pakhaw.
40026021	Sa ama ning nguoluo pata Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi, niema chung taa pakha ta ina lyi'a ungciy,” a ta.
40026022	Ziytuv tie ca ama ngie chi hringhruo te pakha hnang pakha ta, “Abyipa, kama i cuo maw?” ama ta kaluo.
40026023	Zingsuv ta, “Kama hne lapakhue khuekha a caphaw hnepa hingna naa lyi aa,” a ta.
40026024	Cawsaa Saacapaa ca Caapathepa lie a kaw aa capepa haakhata a thiy aa, cuorasala Cawsaa Saacapaa a lyituvpa cuo hing taca khatluv tama ciy aa chiy aa! Capapaa ca puv li pata aw sala a cuota a pha vie aa,” a ta.
40026025	A lyituv Judas ta, “Saya, kama ta i cuo maw?” ta te a hiehriy. Zingsuv ta, “Na cuo ne,” a ta.
40026026	Sa ama ning nguoluo ning kha, Zingsuv ta viechuo kha la te thlaa a chuo khu taata chechi te ziytuv tie kha a pi yi. “A la ungla ning tie ung,” hingpa hing i pangpa tana a cuo,’ a ta.
40026027	Cakhutaata panuo kha la te, Khazing kha palungtluona bie a hluo khu taata iema kha pi yite, “Nama bangkhuo ta dang tie ung.
40026028	Hingpa hing biekuona i thiyse, cawsaa hluvpuv sue a ngiethena riypata i lyipa tana a cuo.
40026029	Ica chang yi: I Paa Pena chunglie niema hne mingsuv tiy thaapa i dang hluo li hingpa mingsuv tiy hing dang pakhaa'a va tli ang,” a ta yi.
40026030	Cakhutaa hlaa sa yite Oliv tluo luo kha ama si.
40026031	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Caapathepa ta, ‘Khazing ta tuvkhietuv kha tuvsa'a te, tuvrung chunglie tuv kha ama chepatlaa diy aa,’ a tapa haata, ata zuo hrahring lie hing nama bangkhuo ta ina thuse diy'a ungciy.
40026032	Cuorasala pathu pakhaapa i cuo thueta Galilee luo kha i silu aa,” a ta yi.
40026033	Piter ta Zingsuv kha, “A hrangpa tie bangkhuo acaa ruose zaw yi ta, kama ca caa ruose buohluo'a va ang,” a ta.
40026034	Zingsuv ta Piter kha, “Biehmisi tana ica chang: Ata zuo aa a khang hluo ta yi thung te ina thaw'a ciy,” a ta.
40026035	Piter ta, “Nama hne thiy ra riypa i cuo zaw ta ca thaw'a va ang,” a ta. Ziytuv tie bangkhuo ta cahaa cata ama ta kaluo.
40026036	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ca ziytuv tie hne khata Gethsemane ama tapa hmang luo kha vaa yite iema kha, “Palie hue thlaa i va chuo chung ta hingpa lie hing zaa tu tie ung,” a ta yi.
40026037	Piter hne Zebedi saacapaa pahning tie kha aa chiyle yi. A ngie chi te a lalilahie a chiy.
40026038	Iema kha, “I pathiypalung lie ngiechina hing le tuv te vuotaa i thiy'a nang. Lie hing aw ungla a hmung li pata na huo mya ung,” a ta yi.
40026039	Acawta va cakuo vie te, alyi lie kha a bu te, “I Paa, a cuo khu pata a cuo kieca hingpa te-angna panuo hingta na law thi se! Cuorasala kama khingna haata cuo kha se, nama khingna haata cuo hriy se,” tapata thlaa a chuo.
40026040	Cakhutaata ziytuv tie'a luo kha vya kaa te amaa hmungpa kha a hmung yi ca, Piter kha, “A hmung li pata siymaluo pakha chuo hmuo na huo khu va ung cama?
40026041	Pasupaliyna chung luo nama tla li riypata a hmung li pata thlaa chuo tie ung. Pathiypalung ta a khing raalaa pata, saapa ca a thaazuo na a caw,” a ta.
40026042	Zingsuv ca a yihningnapa vaa pakhaa te thlaa a chuo pakhaa. “I Paa, hing panuo hing dang li pata law the a aw li kieca, na khingnapa haa cuo thluo se,” a ta.
40026043	Ziytuv tie'a luo kha a vya kaa pakhaa ca amaa zaa hmung ngiethie, ama ming hetahmuo haw khu vayi.
40026044	Thuse pakhaa yite, vaa te, a yi thungna thlaa a chuo pakhaa, a ri tawpa kha a ri pakhaa.
40026045	Cakhutaa ziytuv tie'a luo kha vya kaa te, “A hmung ung cate ma namaa pahy hyalya kalie? Mang tie ung! Cawsaa Saacapaa ca a suepa tie kuv chung luo pina cuo kha a vya chiy tli.
40026046	Thu tie ung, cakuo'a ungpuv. Mang tie ung, naa lyipapaa ca lie hing a vya chiy hing, a ta yi.
40026047	Zingsuv ta bie a ri nguoluo ning kha ziytuv hlyihning hraw taata pakha a cuopa Judas ca tluobyilepa tie hne uvthyi tie ta ama pathliepa, zueziy hne tungbung a cyipa cawsaazaapuv hne khata ama vya chiy.
40026048	A lyituvpapaa cata zaapuv kha pamangsana pi pacie yite, “I pahnuopapaa ca nama patuv khingpa khata cuo'a te nama patuv aa,” a ta yi.
40026049	Zingsuv'a luo kha vaa paluo te, “Saya, na cunglie diena aw se,” ta te a pahnuo.
40026050	Zingsuv ta, “Liechung, na tue khingpa ca tue tie,” a ta. Cakhupahne a vaw yite Zingsuv ca ama patuv.
40026051	Zingsuv hne a aw rapa pakha ta a zueziy kha a da te tluobyilecepa sii naacakue kha a sa pathla.
40026052	Zingsuv ta, “Na zueziy kha a kaw luo pasuo tie. Zueziy a hmuopa ca zueziy tana a thiy aa,” a ta.
40026053	I Paa kha abyana i hie kieca yikha ta avuoming rieka phuv hlyihning laata a hluv vie ina za pathliepa khu tapa kha pachang va cama?
40026054	Cuorasala cahaa cata a cuo kieca, tuokhaatama hinghaahingtana a cuo aa za tapa Caapathepa bie ca a tling khu aa?
40026055	Capa cuo ning cata Zingsuv ta zaapuv kha, “Kama ca damie tama i cuo, khaapanakawma kama patuv riypata zueziy hne tungbung a vya cyi ung cate namaa vaw? a ta yi. A ning tating ta Biena-ing lie a tu ang te ica pacuv ning yi kha ahunghmuota na patuv vade ungciy.
40026056	Cuorasala profet tie ta Caapathepa chunglie ama ripa a tlingna riypata hingpa hmang bangkhuo hing a cuopa ta a cuo,” a ta. Cakhutaa ta ziytuv tie ca ama kha thuse yite amaa ruo diy.
40026057	Zingsuv ca a patuvpa tie khata tluobyilecepa Kaiafas ing luo kha cakuo khyi yite capa lieca phungbie saya tie hne uvthyi tie kha amaa zaa hmya.
40026058	Piter ta tluobyilecepa inghmie te kha a hlapuo pata ziy yite tlawhmie luo kha a ngie te tuokhaatama hmang a vya cuo aa tapa pachang khing re pata rie a vepa tie'a lie kha a tu.
40026059	Tluobyi lepa tie hne bierituv tie palang khata Zingsuv thie the riypata a suena kha huv yite,
40026060	hanghie pata bie ri te sue a phawpa a hluvsa amaa vaw raalaa pata a suena suokha hmuo hmung khu vayi. A hnangcawce ta cawsaa pahning vya pya yite,
40026061	“Hingpapaa hingta, Khazing Biena-ing hing phi'a ang te ningthung chunglie i sa pakhaa khu aa, a ta,” ama ta.
40026062	Tluobyilecepa ta a daa te Zingsuv kha, “Palie riy hnyi va cama? Hingpa tie ta sue aca phawpa yi hing khaapa bie ma a cuo? a ta.
40026063	Cuorasala Zingsuv ca a dieta tah a aw. Tluobyilecepa ta canyi pakhaa te, “A hringpa Khazing ming ta chie a sa ang te ica ta: Khazing Saacapaa, Messiah ta na cuo kieca malie chang tie,” a ta.
40026064	Zingsuv ta, “Na ri tli cahaw! Cuorasala ica chang yi: Ata taahingta Cawsaa Saacapaa ca Cungnungce cacuo luo khata a tu'a te vuoruo amyi cung taata aa zuvpa kha nama hmung aa,” tapata a palie.
40026065	Cakhupahne tluobyilecepa ca a pang kha thlaa te, “Capaca Khazing thuo-pachina tana a cuo! Pachangkhyituv hrangpa a hu va tli puv. Khazing thuopachina bie a ripa ca niema ta nama thyi tli!
40026066	Tuokhaatama nama rue?” a ta. Iema ta, “Thiy aa phuv,” ama ta.
40026067	Cakhutaa a hmie lie kha ama paciy ta pacha yite ama tuv; chekha ta cabe yite,
40026068	“Messiah, ahungma caa cabe tapa kha malie chang tie,” ama ta.
40026069	Piter ca ingle, tlawhmie lie a tu nguoluo ning kha tluobyilecepa changtaapanung kha ama'a luo a vaw te, “Nama zaw hing Galilee pa Zingsuv hne a khepa tana na cuo,’ a ta.
40026070	Cuorasala iema bangkhuo hmielie kha a sie te, “Khaapama na ri tapa kha pachang va ang,” a ta.
40026071	Thlake luo kha a pya ca a hrangpa changtaapanung ta ama kha hmung te a thaa lie a daapa tie kha, “Hingpapaa hing Nazareth khypa Zingsuv'a lie zaa aw rapa tana a cuo,” a ta yi.
40026072	Piter ta, “hingpapaa hing i pachangpa cuo vyi,” ta te chie a sana hne aa sie pakhaa.
40026073	A cawta a aw pata, capa lie a daapa tie ta Piter ca, “Nama hing iema'a lie a aw rapa tana na cuo hrahring, na uephya tana naa hnang,” ama ta.
40026074	Cakhutaa Piter ta, “Nama ripapaa hing pachang hrahring va ang tapata chiesana hne bie i kuo,” a ta. Cakhupatahne ta aa a khang.
40026075	Piter ca Zingsuv ta a za changpa, “Aa a khang hluo ta pachang va ang ne, ta'a cate yi thung te ina thaw'a ciy,” a tapa bie kha a kya thyi pakhaa. Ale luo kha pya te khuopuv ta a caa.
40027001	Mawdiychie ta tluobyilepa tie hne uvthyi tie ca a hmya yite Zingsuv thie riypa kha khue ama khuo.
40027002	Ama kha pa-uo yite ama ciy khu taata muokiy byi Pilat kuv luo kha ama pi.
40027003	Zingsuv a lyituv Judas ta Zingsuv ca thie riypatana bie ama chi tapa kha a pachang tiyta ngu tuokaa sawthung kha la te tluobyilepa tie hne uvthyi tie kha a va pi pakhaa yi.
40027004	“Suena a hnyi lipapaa lyi ang te thiyna luo i papha sapa ca i sue,” a ta. Kiema hne khaapama aa se, nama re tana a cuo,” ama ta.
40027005	Tuokaa sawthung kha Biena-ing chunglie ca thaw siy te a pya, cakuo te a vaa pa-uosa.
40027006	Tluobyi lepa tie ta tuokaa kha a haa yite, “Hingpa tuokaa hingca thiyse tuokaa tana a cuo, Biena-ing tuokaa china lieta chi riypa ca ma phung ta cuo vyi,” ama ta.
40027007	Ama ripakhaw khu taata bi vytuvpapaa lu kha ruohrang ming thluohmang riypata ama calyi.
40027008	Capanakaw cata capa lu ca ata ning te pata Thiyse Lu tapata ama u.
40027009	Cahaa cata profet Jeremiah ta a za ri siypa bie ca a tling: “Israel ming ta capapaa calyina riypata bie ama chi ciepa muo ngu tuokaa sawthung kha la yite,
40027010	Abyipa ta bie ina pipa haata bi vytuvpapaa lu calyina ta ama hmuo,” a za ta.
40027011	Zingsuv ca muokiy byipa hmie-kunglie kha a daa te, muokiy byipa cata, “Judah ming siepahruo cata na cuo ma? tapata a hiehriy. Zingsuv ta, “Nama ta na ri cahaw,” a ta.
40027012	Cuorasala tluobyilepa tie hne uvthyi tie ta sue ama phawpa kha suokha hmuo palie vayi.
40027013	Cacuonakaw Pilat ta, “Khatluv ta ma sue aca phaw yi tapa hing thyi va cama?” a ta.
40027014	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta kaakha hmuo a palie li nakawta muokiy byipa ca a nang ta a uo.
40027015	Lawsena Pyi kyry ta muokiy byipa ta, cawsaazaapuv ta pya se tapata ama hiepa thaw a tlapa pakha kha a papyapa taw yi.
40027016	Capa cuo ning ca zaapuv ta pachangpa thaw a tlapa pakha aw te, a ming ca Zingsuv Bar-Abbas a cuo.
40027017	Cacuonakaw zaapuv kha amaa vya hmya ca Pilat ta, “Ahung hing pathlie se tapa ma ina khing ungciy? Zingsuv Barabbas ma a cuo li kie Messiah tapa Zingsuv ma?” a ta yi.
40027018	Pilat ta, i-aw ama hnyi nakawtana i kuv luo ina vya pi yi tapa kha a phasa pata a pachang.
40027019	Pilat ca bierina thude lie a tu nguoluo ning kha a napuvnung ta bie kya taa te, “Suena khaahmuo a hnyi lipapaa kha a cunglie khaahmuo za tue khya, tahematapakieca ama kawlie tana azuohnie i muo ta riethyina a hluvsa i ang,” a ta.
40027020	Tluobyilepa tie hne uvthyi tie ta cawsaazaapuv kha Bar-Abbas kha pathlie pata Zingsuv thie riypa kha ama pahie sa.
40027021	Muokiy byipa ta cawsaazaapuv kha, “Iema pahning lieta a ahung hingma pathlie se tapata ina khing ungciy?” a ta pakhaa yi. Iema ta, “Barabbas!” ama ta.
40027022	Pilat ta, “Cacuokieca Messiah tapa Zingsuv hing tuokhaatama i tue aa?” a ta. Ama bangkhuo ta, “Vieluo lie thie tie!” ama ta.
40027023	Ama ta, “Khaapa suena ma a tue? a ta yi. Cakhupahne ama ue a aw zawdya ta khi yite, “Vieluo lie thie tie!” ama ta.
40027024	Pilat ta ri tyly pata a thlahnenapa aw vyi tapa hne cawsaazaapuv ta hnaahnawnapa tlaku kha chiykhyi'a kie yi a ta nakawta, tiy kha a la te cawsaazaapuv hmielie kha a kuv a siy te, “Hingpa suena a hnyi lipa thiyse kawlie hing kama ca i pathe, niema tuepa tana a cuo,” a ta.
40027025	Cawsaazaapuv palang ta, “Hingpapaa thiyse ca kiema hne ma saming sahlaa cunglie tlung mangsue!” ama ta.
40027026	Cakhutaa Pilat ta Barabbas kha pathliepa yite, Zingsuv ca a tuv khu taata vieluo lie thie riypata a pi yi.
40027027	Cakhutaa muokiy byipa rieka tie ta Zingsuv ca muokiy byipa ing luo ca a ngiekhyi yite ama yalya ta ama cadung.
40027028	A pang kha hlepa yite pangsepa ama pabuv.
40027029	Cakhutaa ahling ta ama phiepa lakhuv kha ama pakhuv. A cacuo kuv lie kha asung pahrie yite, a hmiekung lie ama pakhuv pane yite ama tue hyalya. “Judah siepahruo ca a hring a taa pasiy se! ama ta.
40027030	Ama paciy ta pacha yite, asung kha chuv yite a luv lie amaa hluo.
40027031	Ama tue hyalya khu taata pangsepa kha hlepa yite ama pang kha ama pabuv pakhaa. Cakhutaata vieluo lie thie riypata ama kha ama pya khyi.
40027032	Ama cakuole pata Sairin khypa Simon ama tapa kha a taw yite, Zingsuv vieluo tung kha hripuo yite ama papuv sa.
40027033	Golgotha (Luvruv Hmang tana siyluo tana a cuo) ama tapa hmang luo kha ama kya chiy.
40027034	Capa lieca Zingsuv kha mangkhaa haata a khapa tiy hne ama pyapa mingsuv ama pi, a pacuo te dang khing vyi.
40027035	Zingsuv ca vieluo lie thie yite a caw kha vyisung a da yite amaa re.
40027036	Cakhutaa a tu yite ama kha ama huo.
40027037	“Hingpapaa hing Judah siepahruo Zingsuv tana a cuo,” tapa, sue ama phawnapa caa kha cape yite a luv cunglie ama taa.
40027038	Cakhutaa Zingsuv'a lieca damie pahning kha pakha a cacuo luo, pakha a cavyi luota vieluo lie ama taa ra.
40027039	A hmungpaapa bangkhuo ta ama luv ti sue yite ama bieke ta,
40027040	“Biena-ing puv hmuo para'a ang te ningthung chung ta i sa pakhaa ne a tapa paa, nama hne nama ca a khuo tie nie! Khazing Saacapaa ta na cuo kieca vieluo cung taakhata za cung tie! ama ta.
40027041	Cahaa cata tluobyilepa tie, phungbie saya tie hne uvthyi tie zaw ta tue hyalya ra yite:
40027042	“Malie ca a khuo yi, cuorasala ama hne ama ca a khuo the vyi! Israel siepahruo ta muo a cuo ta; ata bala hingta vieluo cung taa za cung sela ca ma zang'a muo.
40027043	Ama ta Khazing kha a buchuo pata Khazing Saacapaa tana i cuo aa ta; Khazing cata a khing kie ata hingta za khuo se,” amaa ta.
40027044	Ama hne vieluo ama taa hnepa damie tie zaw khata ama tue hyalya ra.
40027045	Ningchung khingkhuo taata zuoluo siymaluo pathung te ruo ting ta khy a zing.
40027046	Siymaluo pathung hrawlie kha Zingsuv ca, “Eli, Eli, lema sabachthani?” tapata khuopuv ta a khi. A siyluo ca, “I Khazing, I Khazing, khaapanakawma ina thaw ciy?” tana ta a cuo.
40027047	A thaalie a daapa cawsaa chekha ta thyi yite, “Elijah na a ku,” ama ta.
40027048	Iema hraw taa pakha ta vaa ruo pahraa te pangcaw kha la te mingsuv tiy chunglie a naw khu taata aarasung daw lie ciypuo te dang riypata a pi.
40027049	Cuorasala a hrangpa tie ta, “Aw caw, ama khuo re pata Elijah aa vaw ma a vaw vama tapa kha mang'a ungpuv,” ama ta.
40027050	Zingsuv ca khuopuv ta khi pakhaa te a huv a ci.
40027051	Cakhutaa Biena-ing pangzu ca a luv taata a lie te a tlaa. Alyi aa cahang, alung kyi te aa che.
40027052	Thluo zaw kha a pahaw yite Khazing cawsaa pathepa a thiy ciepa a hluvsa kha ama thupakhaa.
40027053	Zingsuv a thupakhaa khu taata thluo chung taa kha kya pya yite khypuv pathepa chung luo kha a ngie yite cawsaa hluvpuv'a lie kha amaa luo.
40027054	Zingsuv a huopa riebyipa hne a rieka tie ca aling aa siypa hne hmang a cuopa ting kha ama hmung tiyta ama thlaa zang hringhruo te, “Hingpapaa hing Khazing Saacapaa hmisi tana a cuo,” ama ta.
40027055	Galilee ruo taata Zingsuv zaa ziy tawpa tie hne zaa bya tawpa tie canung a hluvpuv aw yite luopaa taakhata ama mang.
40027056	Iema hrawlie ca Mary Magdalin, Jeim hne Josef nung Mary, hne Zebedi saacapaa tie ama nung zaw kha ama aw ra.
40027057	Zuoluosuo khata Arimathea khy taata Josef ama tapa, a hnyirung-sapapaa, Zingsuv ziytuv zaa cuopapaa pakha a vya chiy.
40027058	Pilat kha vaa taw te Zingsuv riy kha aa hie. Pilat ta, Zingsuv riy kha Josef pi riypata naw a pi yi.
40027059	Cacuonakaw Josef ta Zingsuv riy kha la te pawruo pang pathepa ta cataw te
40027060	ama thluo riypata alung ryi te a cupa thluo thaapa lie kha a paby. Cakhutaa lungphie lesapa ta thluopakaa kha khaa te a cakuo se.
40027061	Mary Magdalin hne Mary hrangpa pakha ca thluo luo kha a hy yite amaa tu.
40027062	A mawluo, Sabbath ning kha tluobyilepa tie hne Farasi tie ta Pilat kha a taw yite,
40027063	“Abyipa, hing a hanghiepapaa hingta a hring ningta, ‘Ningthung khutaa pathu pakhaa patana i cuo aa,’ a za tapa kha ma pachang.
40027064	Cacuonakawta a thluo kha ningthung te huo riypata naw pi tie yi, cacuolikieca a ziytuv tie ta a riy kha paruv’ a yite cawsaazaapuv kha, ‘thiyna taana a thupakhaa tli,’ ta'a yite a hnang ta malie ama dungnapa hing tawtaa ta malie ama dungnapa laata a ruv vie aa,” ama ta.
40027065	Pilat ta “A huotuv riypa rieka nama hnyi kha, vaa ungla a pha khu chung ta va pahuo sa tie ung,” a ta yi.
40027066	Cacuonakawta cakuo yite thluo khaakhuvlung kha caa ama khe khu taata a phasa pata ama pahuo sa.
40028001	Sabbath khutaa a mawluo Zaapuv ning mawdiychie ta Mary Magdalin hne a hrangpa Mary ca thluo kha mang riypata ama vaa.
40028002	Sungkha puv ta aling a siy te; Abyipa avuoming pakha ca vuoruo taata za cung te thluokhaakhuv kha hnyi te a cunglie aa tu.
40028003	A hmingsuo ca thinghlaa haata cuote a caw ca cahue haata a ngu.
40028004	Thluo a huotuv tie ca ama ciy tuv pa khata a siysa yite athiypa ama lu.
40028005	Cuorasala avuoming ta canung tie kha, “Ciy kha ung, vieluo lie ama thiepa Zingsuv nama huvpa kha ica pachang yi.
40028006	Ama ca hing lie hing aw vyi, a ripa haakhata a thupakhaa tli. A vaw ungla a laanapa hing mang tie ung.
40028007	Cakhutaa a catli pata cakuo ungla ziytuv tie kha, ‘Thiyna taa pathu pakhaa pata cuo tli te ata hing nama hmie luo khatana Galilee luo a silu tli, capa lie cana nama va hmung aa, ta ungla va chang tie ung.’ Ica changpa yi hing maw khya ung,” a ta yi.
40028008	Cacuonakaw a catlisa pata thluo taa kha kaa yite, ama thlaa a zangpuo amaa lawpuo pata, ziytuv tie chang riypata amaa ruo.
40028009	Zingsuv ta tlangkhy a taw yite, “Niema'a lie diena aw mangsue,” a ta yi. A zuchiy yite a phyi kha a paw yite amaa bie.
40028010	Zingsuv ta, “Ciy kha ung, cakuo ungla i uvnu tie kha Galilee luo si riypata va chang tie ung, capa lie cana ina hmung'a yi,” a ta.
40028011	Canung tie ama kaale nguoluo ning kha thluo a huotuvpa tie chekha ca khypuv chung luo kha vaa yite, hmang chiycuona bangkhuo kha tluobyilepa tie ama va chang.
40028012	Tluobyilepa tie ca Judah uvthyi tie hne khata a hmya yite rieka tie kha nawthuv tuokaa a hluvsa pi riypata khue ama khuo.
40028013	“Ziytuv tie ta zuo maa hmung chung a vaw yite na a riy kha ama vya paruv, nama ta aa.
40028014	Hing bie hing muokiy byipa ta a thyi sue kie zaw ma, kiema ta a palung patluo'a pate ruvnaana namaa taw li riypata maca rikuo'a yi,” ama ta.
40028015	Cacuonakawta tuokaa kha a la yite ama changpa haata ama tue. Capa bie ca Judah ming hrawlie ata ning tepa hingta ama ripa bie ta a cuo.
40028016	Ziytuv hlyikha ca Zingsuv ta a ripa haakhata Galilee tluo luo kha ama si.
40028017	Ama kha hmung yite amaa bie, cuorasala chekha ca ama palung a hring.
40028018	Zingsuv ta a ngie vie yite, “Vuoruo hne alyi lie naw hnyina bangkhuo ca pi pata i cuo tli.
40028019	Cacuonakawta si ungla mingphang bangkhuo kha naa ziytuv va pacuo sa ungla; A paa, Asaa hne Thlaapa Pathe ming ta tiynawna va pi tie ung;
40028020	cakhutaata ica changpa bangkhuo ama ziy riypata va pacuv tie ung. Hingpa hing maw kha ung, chuozaa ta niema'a lie ica aw puo'a yi, cuo chuona te ta,” a ta yi.
41001001	Khazing Saacapaa Zingsuv Khrih thuophaabie a pathanapa ca hinghaahingta a cuo.
41001002	Profet Isaiah ta, “Mang tie, i tluo-utuv ca niema cuota luo salu riypata, nama hmie luo i pathlielu aa;
41001003	ueryi suokha ca ruochung lie kha u te; ‘Abyipa cuota luopuv kha sa tie ung; a ziy riypa luo ca padang tie ung!’” a tapa haakhata a cuo sasaw.
41001004	Tiynawtuv Johan ca ruochung lie kha vya pya te sue a ngiethena riypata a ngiepachiyna hne aa patuvpa tiy a nawna kaw kha a u khyi.
41001005	Judea pe khyta bangkhuo taa hne Jerusalem khypuv taata cawsaa bangkhuo ca Johan'a luo kha vya pya yite ama suena a phu yite Jordan cavaa lie kha tiy a naw yi.
41001006	Johan ca kala-uv hming ta ama taapa caw kha a tue te a se lie kha savang tesaw aa saw, khawbyapa hne khyitiy kha a ning.
41001007	Cawsaazaapuv kha, “Kama laata hmang a tue khu vie papaa na i hnang taata a vawle nguoluo. Kama hing ca a bung pata a phyipakaw riy pathluo riypata hmuo a tla va ang.
41001008	Kama ca tiy ta tiynawna ica pi yi, cuorasala ama ca Thlaapa Pathe tana tiynawna aca pi'a yi.
41001009	Capa ningkhue lieca Zingsuv ca Nazareth pe Galilee taakhata a vaw te Jordan cavaa lie kha Johan ta tiy a naw.
41001010	Tiy chung taata a kya thu pahne ta vuoruo a pahaw te Thlaapa kha thuvruv haata a cunglie a za cungpa kha a hmung.
41001011	Vuoruo taata ueryi kha a zuv te, “Nama ca i Duepa i Saacapaa tana na cuo, na cunglie i palung a tling hringhruo,” a ta.
41001012	Cakhupahne Thlaapa ta Zingsuv ca ruochung luo kha aa chiy.
41001013	Ruochung lieca ning sawliy chung aw te Setaa pasupaliyna kha a ang. Saa a hruopa zaw hne ta ama aw; cadyiseca avuoming ta ama ca ama aw khyi.
41001014	Johan kha ama patuv khu taata Zingsuv ca Galilee luo kha vaa te Khazing Thuophaabie kha a phu.
41001015	“Cuo ca a tling tli, Khazing pena ca aa ngie tli! A ngiepachiy ungla Thuophaabie hing zang tie ung,” a ta.
41001016	Galilee riyliy kielie a cakuole pata ngaavaapa pahning, Simon hne a nuta Andru kha ngaa ama vaa nguoluo pata a hmung yi, tahematapakieca iema ca ngaa a vaapa tana ama cuo.
41001017	Zingsuv ta, “Na ziy tie ung, cawsaa a patuvpa tana ica tue'a yi,” a ta.
41001018	Amaa sue kha thuse yite ama ziyle paluo.
41001019	A cawta a va cakuo vie pata a hrangpa uvcanu tie, Zebedi saacapaa Jeim hne Johan kha amaa sue ama thyi nguoluo pata a hmung yi.
41001020	A hmung pahne yi ta a ku yi ca ama paa Zebedi hne sawkawpalaw kha rehrietuv tie hne khata thusesiy yite ama kha ama ziy.
41001021	Karpenaum khy luo kha va chiy yite Sabbath ning a vya chiy ca Zingsuv ca apungna-ing luo kha a ngie te phung a chang yi.
41001022	A pacuvnapa kha ama kharue a haasa, tahematapakieca phungbie pacuvtuv saya tie haata cuo li pata nawhnyituv pakha haata a pacuv nakaw yi ta a cuo.
41001023	Cakhupatahne ta apungna-ing chunglie a awpa, a pyalyipa thlaapa ta aa hryipapaa kha khi te,
41001024	“Naazaretpa Zingsuv, “Kiema hing tuokhaatama malie na tue khing? Malie na para khing ma? Ahungma tapa kha maca pachang, nama ca Khazing'a taata a vawpa A pathepa tana na cuo,” a ta.
41001025	Zingsuv ta, “A dieta tah aw, hingpapaa chung taahingta pya!” ta te a chuo.
41001026	A pyalyipa thlaapa cata cawsaapapaa ca khuosa ta siy te khuopuv ta a khi khu taata a chung taa cata a pya.
41001027	Cawsaazaapuv ca ama nang ta uo te pakha hne pakha kha, “Hingpa hing khaapatama a cuo? Naw hnyina cangta pacuvna thaapa tana a cuo! A pyalyipa thlaapa hmuo naw pi te a ri amaa ngie,” amaa ta.
41001028	A thuohlaa ca sungkha ta Galilee pe bangkhuo kha a ze paluo te a pathuo diy.
41001029	Apungna-ing taakhata ama pya pahne Jeim hne Johan hne khata Simon hne Andru tie ing luo kha ama vaa.
41001030	Simon piynung ca a nge ling te iehmang cunglie a zaa zie nakaw kha ama chiy pahne ama chang paluo.
41001031	Ama'a luo ca vaa te, a kuvbuo ta la te a padaa. A nge lingpa ca cakaa te iema kha a mangsang yi.
41001032	Zuoluo, ningtla khu taata a pasapa bangkhuo hne khuevuo ta a tuepa bangkhuo kha Zingsuv'a luo ca ama vya chiykhyi.
41001033	Khyming bangkhuo ca chiypakaa a thaa lie kha amaa hmya.
41001034	Pasana phangting ta a pasapa a hluvpuv kha patluo sa yite khuevuo hluvpuv zaw kha a papya. Khuevuo tie kha bie hehmuo pari sa vayi, tahematapakieca iema ta ama kha ama pachang.
41001035	Mawdiy khy dyi hluo ta Zingsuv ca thu te khyle ruoduona luo kha pya te thlaa a chuo.
41001036	Simon hne a viesaa zaw ta ama ca va huv yite,
41001037	ama hmung pahne, “Cawsaa bangkhuo tana aca huv yi,” ama ta.
41001038	Ama ta a paliepa yi ca, “Hingpa cahriy lie a awpa khyhrangpa luo zaw hing thuophaabie i phu the riypata tlaw ra'a ungpuv, tahematapakieca ama cana i vaw hnuochuopa ta a cuo,” a ta.
41001039	Cacuonakawta Galilee pe kha tlaw diy te, apungna-ing lie thuophaabie phu te khuevuo zaw kha a papya.
41001040	Caahminghmaa a phyapa pakha ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw te a pakhuv pane te, “Na khing kieca ina pathe sa khu ciy,” tapata paa a kie.
41001041	Zingsuv ta ngie a chisa nakawta a kuv va pazuu te a hrie. “Ica pathe sa khing, pathe tie,” a ta.
41001042	Caahminghmaa pasanapa ta sungkha ta thuse te cawsaapapaa ca a pathe.
41001043	A raaringna khuosa ta a pi khu taata ama kha pathlie paluo te, Zingsuv ta,
41001044	“Naathlie tie, hingpa kaw hing ahunghmuo chang'a vayi ciy; cadyiseca tluobyipa'a luo kha vaa la vaa pamang sa tie. Cakhutaata cawsaa ta a pathe tli tapa aca pachang na riypa yita Moses ta tue riypa a za tapa hriykhungrina kha va tue tie,” a ta.
41001045	Cuorasala cawsaapapaa ca pya te capa kaw ca hya zangsa pata a rile nakawta bie ca pathuo diy te, Zingsuv ca luohuo ta khychung luo a ngie nguo li pata khyle luo ruo lie kha aw te hmangting taata ama vya pangie.
41002001	Ning a cawta a ru khu taata Zingsuv ca Kapernaum luo kha kaa te, ing lie a awna kaw kha a pathuo.
41002002	Cawsaa a hluvpuv amaa vaw nakawta ing chung luo ri li pata ingle lie hmuo awna hmang a patlaw vayi. Zingsuv ta phung a chang nguoluo ning yi kha
41002003	cawsaa papaliy ta a pakyapapaa kha a vya puvle yite Zingsuv'a luo amaa vawkhyi.
41002004	Cawsaa ama chaa tuv nakawta ama'a luo kha vya chiykhyi khu vayi. Cacuonakawta Zingsuv awna a dadaw thlungkhuv kha za pahaw yite cawsaapapaa ca a zienapa pangphaa hne khata ama za pachung.
41002005	Zingsuv ta ama zangnapa kha a hmung tiyta a pakyapapaa kha, “I sapaa, na suena ca a ngiethe pata a cuo,” a ta.
41002006	Capa lieca phungbie saya chekha tie a tu ra yite ama palung chunglie kha,
41002007	“Khaapanakawma hing cawsaapa hing hinghaahingta bie a ri? Khazing na aa du! Khazing pakha dyi camuo suena a ngiethe khutuv a cuo ta, ama ta.
41002008	Zingsuv ta khaapama ama rue tapa kha a palung chunglie a pachang paluo nakawta iema kha, “Khaapanakawtama cahaa cata nama rue?
41002009	A pakyapapaa kyihuo hingta, ‘Na suena ca a ngiethe patana a cuo’, tapa ma a na vie, ‘Thu la na pangphaa kha a la la cakuo tie’ tapa ma a na vie?
41002010	Cuorasala Cawsaa Saacapaa ca sue a ngiethe khuna naw a hnyi tapa hing nama pachang riypata, ta te a pakyapapaa kha,
41002011	“Ica chang, thu la, na pangphaa kha a la la ing luo cakuo tie,” a ta.
41002012	Cawsaapapaa ca thu te a pangphaa kha a catlisa pata a la te ama hmiekunglie kha a pya. Ama bangkhuo ta ama nang uo hringhruo te Khazing kha ama pathuosa. “Hinghaapa hing za hmung buo va de puv,” ama ta.
41002013	Zingsuv ca riyliy kie luo kha a kaa pakhaa. Cawsaa bangkhuo ta a vya hmyasue yite a pacuv yi.
41002014	A cakuo puole pata Alfeas saacapaapa Levi kha ngukhyi a khyi napa zung lie aa tu nguoluo pata a hmung. Zingsuv ta, “Na ziy tie,” a ta ca thu te a ziyle paluo.
41002015	Zingsuv ta Levi ing lie zuosa ning riypata aa tu ning kha ngukhyituv tie hne a suepa a hluvpuv ca Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie'a lie kha amaa tu ra.
41002016	Farasi ming phungbie saya tie khata ngukhyituv tie'a nata a suepa tie zaw hneta Zingsuv sa a ning hne pakha ama hmung tiyta ziytuv tie kha, “Khaapanakawtama ngukhyituv tie'a nata a suepa tie zaw hneta sa a ninghne?” ama ta.
41002017	Zingsuv ta thyi te iema kha, “A tluopa cawsaa ca siybyi a hu vayi, cadyiseca a pasapa tie taca amaa hu; kama ca aa dangpa tie ku riypata a vaw va ang, a suepa tie ku riypatana i vaw”, a ta yi.
41002018	Johan ziytuv tie hne Farasi ming ca sa ama uv. Cawsaa kha Zingsuv'a luo a vaw yite, “Khaapanakawma tiynawtuv Johan ziytuv tie hne Farasi ming ca sa uv yite nama caa ziytuv tie hing uv li pata ama aw? tapata ama hiehriy.
41002019	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Napuv chiyna pyi luo kupa tie ca nungchiytuv satliepa iema hne a aw chung ta sa ama uv the'a ma? Uv the'a vayi. Nungchiytuv satliepa iema'a lie a aw chung bangkhuo ca sa uv the'a vayi.
41002020	Cadyiseca nungchiytuv satliepa kha iema'a taata ama lana ningcuo vya pha'a te, cathue cata ama uv'a lie.
41002021	“Ahungtahmuo cawthaapa ta buohryi cawpa kha a bie thla buo vayi. Ama thla kieca cawthaapa khata buohryi cawpa kha thlaa lue tyly'a te a tlaa hryly aa.
41002022	Ahungtahmuo mingsuv tiy ahrang kha savangbaw hlungpa lie raw buo vayi, ama raw kieca mingsuv khata savang kha ning chi'a te, mingsuv hne savang hne khata ama ra diy aa. Mingsuv tiy ahrang ca savangbaw thaapa lie khana ama raw,” a ta.
41002023	Luo kha ca Sabbath ning ta Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca lu kha cahrawpaale yite ama si. Ama sipuo luota ziytuv tie khata sa-uv kha ama pahriy puole.
41002024	Cacuonakaw Farasi ming ta Zingsuv kyihuo khata, “Mang tie, khaapanakawma Sabbath phungbie ta a thlupa kha ama tue?” ama ta.
41002025	Ama ta iema kha, “David ta ama hne a hnangziytuv tie ning riy hnyi li pata ama nang a diy ning ta kha khaapama a tue tapa kha ri buo va ung cama?
41002026	Khazing ingchung luo a ngie te ahunghmuo ning riypata phungbie ta a pa-aw lipa, tluobyi tie dyi ning riypa, Khazing ama pacuopa viechuo kha ning te a viesaa zaw a pipa yi kha. Capaca Abiathar tluobyilepa a cuo ningta a cuo kha,” a ta yi.
41002027	Cakhutaata, “Sabbath ca cawsaa cuota sapa cuote cawsaa hing Sabbath cuota sapa cuo vyi.
41002028	Cacuonakawta Cawsaa Saacapaa ca Sabbath Byi tana a cuo, a ta yi.
41003001	Zingsuv ca apungna-ing luo kha a ngie pakhaa te capalie ca a kuv a pakyapapaa kha a za aw.
41003002	Zingsuv kha ama pachie khing nakawta Sabbath ning ta hing a vya patluo sa ma vya patluo sa vama tapa kha ama mangkhuo.
41003003	Zingsuv ta cawsaapapaa kha, “Hmie luo hing vya pya,” a ta.
41003004	Cakhutaata cawsaazaapuv kha, “Ma phungbie ta Sabbath ning hing hmangphapa tue riypa ma malie a pa-aw ruvnaana pi riypa ma? Hringna khuo riypa ma thie riypa? a ta yi.
41003005	Cuorasala khaahmuo palie vayi. A hihaasa pata mang yite, ama palung lena zya kha a hmung tiy yi ta a ngie a chi. Cawsaapapaa kyihuo khata, “Na kuv kha vya pazuo,” a ta. Vya pazuo te a kuv ca a tluo.
41003006	Cacuonakawta Farasi tie ca apungna-ing taakhata pya yite Herod cawsaa zaw hne khata Zingsuv para riypa kha khue ama khuo.
41003007	Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca riyliy luo kha vaa yite cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama ziy.
41003008	A hmang tuepa thuohlaa kha ama thyi nakawta Judea ruo, Jerusalem khy, Idumea pe, Jordan huesuo ruo, Tair hne Sidon khypuv cahriy, taata cawsaa hluvpuv ama'a luo kha amaa vaw.
