41003009	Cawsaa ama hluv hringhruo nakawta naa vya nuosue khu'a kie yi tapata Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha sawkawpalaw suokha na pachiepa pacie tie ung, a ta yi.
41003010	Cawsaa hluvpuv patluo sa yite a pasapa bangkhuo ta ama kha taw riypata a nuo ta amaa nuosue.
41003011	A pyalyipa thlaapa aa hryipa tie ta ama kha ama hmung pahne ta a hmie lie kha a bu yite, “Nama ca Khazing Saacapaa tana na cuo,” ta yite khuopuv ta ama khi.
41003012	Zingsuv ta ahungma a cuo tapa kha ahunghmuo pachang sa li riypata a cusa pata bie a taa yi.
41003013	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca tluocung luo kha kie te a ku khingpa tie kha ama'a luo a ku yi.
41003014	Ama ta lucuotuv tapata ming a dipa hlyihning tie kha ama'a lie aw riypa, phung ri riypa hne
41003015	khachie papya khuna naw zaw hnyi riypata a tlaw yite re a pi yi.
41003016	Aa tlawpa hlyihning tie ca: Simon (Zingsuv ta Piter tapata ming a dipa);
41003017	Zebedi saacapaapa tie Jeim hne a nuta Johan (Zingsuv ta Boanerges tapata ming di yite, a siyluo ca Paci saa zaw tana pata a cuo);
41003018	Andru, Filip, Bartholomew, Matthai, Thomas, Alfeas saacapaapa Jeim, Thaddaius, phang a cuotuv Simon hne
41003019	Zingsuv a lyituv Judas Iskariot ta ama cuo.
41003020	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca ing luo kha aa diy. Cawsaa ta amaa vya hmyasue pakhaa nakawta Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca sa hmuo ning the vayi.
41003021	Cawsaa ta, “A ngaa tli ne,” ama tapa zaw kha a chungkhue tie ta thyi yite ama kha thlu riypata ama vaa.
41003022	Jerusalem taata a zuvpa phungbie saya tie ta, “Beelzebul na a hryi, capa khachie byipa ming catana khuevuo tie a papya yi,” ama ta.
41003023	Cacuonakaw Zingsuv ta iema ca ku yite pakhingpuona ta a chang yi. “Tuokhaatama Setaa ta Setaa ca a papya khu aa?
41003024	Ruo ruokha ca a phuvphuv ta a che te iema'a na iema kha amaa du kieca capa ruo ca a daa khu'a vyi.
41003025	Ingchungkhue khuekha zaw a phuvphuv ta a che te iema'a na iema kha amaa du kieca a daa khu'a vyi.
41003026	Cacuonakawta Setaa pena ca a phuvphuv ta aa che kieca a hmang khu'a vyi, ra'a te a vie aa.
41003027	Cuorasala cawsaa thaaruvpapaa kha a kuv a phyi ciy taa li pata ahunghmuo a ingchung luo a ngie pata a chechiy kha la nguo'a vayi, ama ciy taa kiedyi na ama chuv nguo aa,” a ta.
41003028	“Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Cawsaa hing ama suena hne Khazing a duna bie pha lipa ama ripa bangkhuo kha a ngiethe khu ama cuo aa.
41003029	Cuorasala Thlaapa Pathe a du pata bie pha lipa a ripa ca a ngiethe khupa cuo'a vayi; tahematapakieca chuozaa a hmangpa suena na ama tue,” a ta.
41003030	“Thlaapa chiepa na a hryi,” ama ta nakawta Zingsuv ta hinghaahingta a tapa yi ta a cuo.
41003031	Cakhutaacata a nung hne a nuta zaw kha a vaw yite, ingle lie ta a daa yite cawsaa kha ama paku sa.
41003032	Zingsuv ca cawsaazaapuv khata cadung yite, “Na nung hne na nuta hne na sieta zaw ta caa taw khing yite ale liena aca huo yi,” ama ta.
41003033	Zingsuv ta, “I nung hne i nuta zaw ca ahungkhama a cuo yi?” a ta.
41003034	A thaalie a tucadungpa tie kha mang yite, “I nung hne i nuta zaw ca lie hing ama aw hing!
41003035	Khazing khingna a tuepa tie ca i nuta, i sieta, hne i nung tana ama cuo,” a ta yi.
41004001	Zingsuv ta Galilee riyliy kielie kha a pacuv pakhaa yi. A cahriy lie a cadungpa kha ama hluv tuv nakawta sawkawpalaw chung luo kha a ngie te aa tu; zaapuv ca ngiekuo lie kha amaa tu.
41004002	Pakhingpuonabie hmuo pata hmang hluvpuv kha pacuv yite a ripa ca:
41004003	“Naathlie tie ung! Cawsaa pakha ca saciy vaa repa ta aa thu.
41004004	Saciy kha a vaa tiyta, chekha ca luopuv lie kha tla yite pavaa ta amaa haa.
41004005	Chekha ca lungdaapa, alyi a paana lieta tla te a kya daa paluo.
41004006	Ning kya chiy te sadaa panu taca a e pahne ta a hruo aa thuv li nakawta acaa diy paluo.
41004007	Saciy chekha ca ahling hrawlie tla te ahling ta a kalaa nakawta thyipaa hnyi khu vyi.
41004008	Cuorasala saciy chekha ca lyiphaa lie a tla nakawta kya daa te, le te thyipaa ama hnyi: chekha le sawthung, chekha le sawcaruv, hne chekha ca le zakha te ama vyi,” a ta.
41004009	Zingsuv ta, “Thyina riypa naa a hnyipa ca, thyise,” a ta yi.
41004010	Zingsuv ama seta a aw ning kha, ziytuv tie hne a thaa lie a awpa a hrangpa tie khata pakhingpuonabie siyluo kha ama hiehriy.
41004011	Zingsuv ta, “Khazing Pena bieparuv ca pi pata nama cuo tli, cuorasala ale lie a awpa tie ca pakhingpuonabie dyi ta pacuv pata ama cuo.
41004012	Cacuonakawta, ‘Ie ma ca ama mang raalaa pata hmung'a va yi, naa ama thlie raalaa pata thyipasie the'a vayi. Capaca Khazing'a luo kha amaa vya pali sue li riypa hne ama suena kha a ngiethe ama cuo li riypata a cuo,” a ta.
41004013	Zingsuv ta, “Hing pakhingpuonabie hing pachang khu va ung cama? Cacuokie pakhingpuonabie bangkhuo changchiy ca tuokhaatama nama pachang khu aa?
41004014	Saciy a vaatuv ta a vaapa ca Khazing bie ta a cuo.
41004015	Cawsaa chekha ca luopuv lieta a tlapa saciy haakhata ama cuo. Bie kha ama thyi tiyta Setaa kha a vaw paluo te ama chunglie saciy kha a lapa yi.
41004016	Cawsaa chekha ca lungdaapa lie a tlapa saciy haakhata ama cuo. Bie kha ama thyi pahne ta palung tluosa pata ama cuhluo paluo.
41004017	Cuorasala ama chung luo aa thuvpuv ta hruo a thla li nakawta capa bie kawlieta ruvnaana hne te-angna a aw pahne ta amaa lie paluo.
41004018	Cawsaa chekha ca ahling hrawlie a tlapa saciy haakhata ama cuo.
41004019	Bie kha ama thyi, cuorasala chuelyi khysatungbangna kawlie ta palung riethyina, hnyirung khingna, khingna hrang phangphang khata kalaa yite pale sa khu li pata thyipaa hnyi khu vayi.
41004020	Cawsaa chehrakha ca lyiphaa lie a tlapa saciy haata ama cuo. Bie kha ama thyi, cuhluo yite thyipaa kha le sawthung, le sawcaruv, le zakha te ta ama hnyi.
41004021	Zingsuv ta, “Myi-ing kha vya cyi te beke rawlie a cuo li kie iehmang rawlie a chipa ama aw buo ma? Myi-ing vuona tung liena ama chi cuo vama?
41004022	Nupa bangkhuo ca paluohuopa cuo'a te, buvkhungpa bangkhuo ca khena lie pahaw pata ama cuo aa.
41004023	Naa a hnyipa ca thyi tie ung, a ta.
41004024	A chang kaliepa yi ca, “Nama thyipa kha a phata tah rue tie ung, malie nama patangpa haakhata patangpa pa nama cuo ra aa, a cha hmuo chachiypa nama cuo kalie aa.
41004025	A hnyipa tie kha chachiypa cuo'a yite, khaahmuo a hnyi lipa tie kha ama hnyi ciepa hmuo chuv pata ama cuo aa,” a ta yi.
41004026	Zingsuv ta a ri kaliepa ca, “Khazing pena ca cawsaa pakha ta a lu lie saciy a vaapa hne tana aa lu.
41004027	Zuo ta a zie te a kya thu, saciy ca kya pu te a le, tuokhaatama a le tapa kha pachang vyi.
41004028	Chuelyi ta amata tah sahang kha a papya, hmietaace ta a hnaa panuta kha pakiy te, cakhutaata a paa kya paa te sa-uv a hnyi.
41004029	Sa hrie aa de tiyta, a hrietuvpapaa ta tuokyi kha a la te a uo.
41004030	Zingsuv ta a ri kaliepa ca, “Khazing pena hing khaapa hne tama ma ri pakhing'a ung? A cuo li kie khaapa pakhingpuonabie hmuo'a pate ma ma ri aa?
41004031	Vuoruo pena ca uotuo ciy hne tana aa lu. Ama vaa ningta ca alyi lie saciy cawcepa ta a cuo.
41004032	Ama vaa ca, kya le te uohnaasiyhnaa kung hrawlie a lece pata a cuo. A ce lesapa paka te pavaa zaw kha a ningdiy lieta buv amaa tue khu.
41004033	Zingsuv ta cahaapa pakhing-puonabie a hluvsa kha hmuo te ama thyi the riypata iema'a lie kha bie a ri.
41004034	Pakhingpuonabie hmuo li pata iema'a lie kha bie ri vyi, cuorasala ziytuv tie hne iema seta ama aw ning kha hmang bangkhuo kha a siesa pata a chang yi.
41004035	Capa ning zuoluo cata Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha, “Riyliy huesuo luo hue vaa ungpuv,” a ta yi.
41004036	Ziytuv tie ca cawsaazaapuv kha thuse yite Zingsuv kha a tu pacienapa sawkawpalaw khata ama sikhyi. Sawkawpalaw hrangpa zaw kha a aw ra.
41004037	Thliychie khuopuv ta a hruo te tiylaw ta sawkawpalaw kha chi te vuotaa a tla'a nang.
41004038	Zingsuv ca sawkawpalaw hnang luo kuo ta thude cunglie kha aa zie. Ziytuv tie ta pathu yite, “Saya, vuotaa ma thiy'a nang pahing siysaa malie ri va cama? ama ta.
41004039	Zingsuv ta thu te thliychie kha, “Ahruo kha tie” ta te a chuo, tiylaw zaw kha, “Die!” a ta. Thliy ca die te riyliy ca nesiyliy khata a aw.
41004040	Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha, “Khaapanakawma nama ciy? Ata te pata zangna hnyi va ung cama? a ta yi.
41004041	Cuorasala iema ca ama ciypuo ama nang-uopuo pata pakha hne pakha kha, “Hingpapaa hing tuokhaapa cawsaa tama a cuo? Thliychie hne tiylaw hmuona a ri a ngie de yi! amaa ta.
41005001	Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca Galilee riyliy huesuo Gerasaa pe luo kha ama va pha.
41005002	Sawkawpalaw chung taata Zingsuv a cung pahne ta thluokung lie a awpa a pyalyipa thlaapa ta aa hryipa cawsaa pakha ta aa vya taw.
41005003	Thluokung lie khy a sapa ta cuote ahungtahmuo hre khu vayi.
41005004	A kuv hne a phyi kha thaabuoliriy ta yi hluvpuv ama cakhiy, cadyiseca thaabuoliriy kha chipachung diy te ama cakhiynapa kha a ca ang patlaa diy. Ahungtahmuo hri khu vayi.
41005005	Chung hne zuo hne thluokung lie hne thluo cunglie kha khi-ule te alung kha aa pa-uo sale.
41005006	Luohlaa taata Zingsuv a vya hmung pahne ta a vya ruo te a phyi thabaw lie kha a vya bu te,
41005007	“Cungnungce Khazing Saacapaa Zingsuv! Tuokhaatama ina tue khing ciy? Duo na te thi kha tapata Khazing ming ta paa ica kie”, tapata khuosa ta a khi.
41005008	Hinghaahingta a khinapa ca, Zingsuv ta, “A pyalyipa thlaapa, hingpapaa chung taahingta pya!” a ta nakaw a cuo.
41005009	Cacuonakaw Zingsuv ta, “Na ming ahung ma?” a ta. Cawsaapapaa ta, “I ming ca ‘Hluvpuv’ tana i cuo, tahematapakieca a hluvpuv ma ta,” a ta.
41005010	Capa ruochung taacata a papya li riypa yita Zingsuv kha khuopuv ta paa a kie.
41005011	Capa kiecahriy, tluocung lie kha va a hluvpuv ama tle nguoluo.
41005012	A pyalyipa thlaapa tie ta Zingsuv kha, “Va chung luo malie pangie sa thi tie,” ama ta.
41005013	Zingsuv ta a ngiena naw a pi yi. A pyalyipa thlaapa tie ca cawsaapapaa chung taacata pya yite va chung luo ca ama vaa ngie. Va thawhning hraw ca lungkuo daw taakhata a zu yite riyliy luo ama tlasa diy.
41005014	Va a khietuv tie ca a ruo yite capa thuohlaa ca khypuv hne khyta bangkhuo ta ama pathyi sa. Cawsaa kha pya yite khaapama a cuo tapa kha ama va mang.
41005015	Zingsuv'a luo kha ama va pha tiyta khuevuo ta a zaa hryi tawpapaa kha zaa tu te, caw a tue te lungsingpyata tah a aw pakha ama hmung ca ama thlaa a zangsa.
41005016	A hmungpa tie ta khuevuo ta a hryipa cawsaapapaa hne va cunglie khaapama a tlung tapa kha cawsaa zaw'a luo kha ama va ri.
41005017	Cacuonakaw ama ruo taata pya riypata Zingsuv kha paa ama kie.
41005018	Sawkawpalaw luo Zingsuv a kie pahne, khuevuo ta a zaa hryipapaa khata, nama'a liena i vya si ra aa, a ta.
41005019	Zingsuv ta bu te, “Ing luo kha kaa hriy la na viesaa tie'a lie kha Abyipa ta khatluv tama nang aca due tapa hne na cunglie a tuepa kaw kha va chang tie yi,” a ta.
41005020	Capa cawsaapa ca cakuo te Dekhapolis ruochung kha tlaw te Zingsuv ta a cunglie a tuepa kaw kha a phu. Cawsaa mekaa ca ama kharue a haa hringhruo.
41005021	Zingsuv ca riyliy huesuo luo kha vaa pakhaa te riyliy kielie kha cawsaa hluvsa ta amaa hmya puo.
41005022	Apungna-ing uvthyi pakha ta a cuopa Jairu ca vya chiy te Zingsuv kha a hmung pahne ta a phyi thabaw lie kha a bu te
41005023	paa a kie byalya. “I sacanung ca vuotaa a thiy'a nang. Hring'a te a tluo khuna riypata a vaw la a cunglie na kuv vya khang thi tie,” a ta.
41005024	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ca capapaa hne cata ama cakuo. Cawsaa hluvpuv ta ziy yite ama kha ama hruv ama depaa patlaw.
41005025	Capa lieca thiylang pasana ta kung hraa hlyihning a pasapa canung pakha a aw ra.
41005026	Siybyi a hluvpuv ta za mang yite a hnyipa bangkhuo kha a pachuo diy raalaa pata tluo vie li pata a ruv hryly.
41005027	Zingsuv kaw kha a thyi tiyta cawsaazaapuv hraw taakhata kya pya te Zingsuv pang kha a hrie,
41005028	tahematapakieca ama ta, “A pang chuo kha i hrie kieca i tluo aa,” a ta.
41005029	Sungkha ta a thiy langpa kha a due te a pasana taata a tluo tlipa kha aa pachang.
41005030	Zingsuv ta cahranapa na i chung taata a pya tapa kha aa pachang pahne ta zaapuv'a luo kha a pali te, “Ahungma i pangpe a taw?” a ta.
41005031	Ziytuv tie ta ama kha, “Cawsaa hluvpuv ta aca hruvpaa patlaw payi na hmung thluo pata tuokhaatama ahungma naa taw, na ta,” ama ta.
41005032	Zingsuv ta ahungma a pangpe a taw tapa kha a cahriycake kha mang te a huv.
41005033	Cuorasala canungnung ta khaapama a cuo tapa kha a pachang nakawta ciysa te a cathangpuo pata a vaw te Zingsuv hmielie ca a pakhuv vya pane te a cuopa bangkhuo kha a chang.
41005034	Zingsuv ta, “I sanung na zangnapa na caa patluo sa. A diesa pata cakuo la na pasana taata va tluo tie,” a ta.
41005035	Zingsuv ta capa bie a ri nguoluo ning kha Jairu ing taata cawsaa chekha a vaw yite, “Na sacanung ca a thiy tli, khaapanakawma sayapa ca riethyi na pi nguoluo ri,” ama ta.
41005036	Zingsuv ta khaapama ama ri tapa kha siysaa ri li pata, Jairu kyihuo kha, “Ciy lieciy, zangna dyi hnyi tie,” a ta.
41005037	Piter, Jeim, hne a nuta Johan ri li pata ahunghmuo a paziy sa li pata Jairu hne khata ama si.
41005038	Jairu ing luo kha ama chiy ca cawsaa kha alyi-avuo za khue patlaw yite khuosa ta ama khipa hne ama caapa kha a hmung.
41005039	Ingchung luo kha a ngie te iema kha, “Khaapanakawma alyi-avuo khue patlaw ung cate nama caa? Haatiynung hing thiy vade, aa hmungpa muo a cuo ta,” a ta yi.
41005040	A pahnyi ta ama pahnyi sue. Cacuonakaw Zingsuv ta ingchung taata papya diy yite, haatiynung a nung hne a paa, ziytuv tie pathung hne dyi khata haatiynung awna khuo luo kha amaa ngie.
41005041	A kuv ta la te, haatiynung kyihuo kha, “Talitha, koum,” a ta. A siyluo ca, “Haatiynung, thu tie,” tanapa ta a cuo.
41005042	Haatiynung ca sungkha ta kya thu te luo a cakuo. (Ama ca kung hraa hlyihning tana a cuo). Capa hmang kawlie cata iema ca ama nang dyi a uo.
41005043	Zingsuv ta hingpa kaw hing ahunghmuo pachang sa'a va ungciy tapata khuopuv ta thlu yite, haatiynung kha ning riypa pi riypata a chang yi.
41006001	Zingsuv ca capa hmang taa cata pya te a puvnapa khy luo kha ziytuv tie hneta ama va pha.
41006002	Sabbath ning takha apungna-ing lie pacuv yite a pacuvna a thyipa a hluvpuv ca ama kharue a haasa. Hingpa bangkhuo hing khaapa taata ma a hmung? Hingpa singna hing tuokhaapa singna tama a cuo? Tuokhaapa cahrana hmang tue khuna ma a kuv ta a tuepa hing! ama ta.
41006003	Ama ca Mary saacapaapa, Jeim hne Josef hne Judas hne Simon tie uvta, lettamaapa kha cuo vama? A sieta zaw hmuota lie hingna kiema'a lie ama aw cuo vama? ta yite siysaa ri li pata ama aw.
41006004	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Profet ca ama puvna khy, ama tieriy'a nata ama chungkhue lie ta li pata ca pa-uvsathyi li pata aw vayi” a ta yi.
41006005	A pasapa chekha cunglie a kuv khang te a patluo sapa yi ri li pata kharuehaa hmang khaahmuo tue khu vyi.
41006006	Zangna ama hnyi linapa kha Zingsuv ca a kharue a haa hringhruo. Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca ama cahriy lie a awpa khy luo kha tlaw te a pacuv yi.
41006007	Ziytuv hlyihning tie kha ku yite pahning pahning ta a pathlie yi. A pyalyipa thlaapa te khuna naw kha pi yite,
41006008	“Khuecahryi ri li pata nama khy tlawna luo kha khaapahmuo a phya kha ung; viechuo cuose, sahrie cuose, tuokaa cuose a phya kha ung.
41006009	Cuorasala phanaah kha a pakaw ung, cadyiseca buohryi zunghning ta a hriy kha ung,” tapata bie a taa yi.
41006010	Ata kaliepa yi ca, “Namaa ngienapa ing lie kha nama pya hluo li ta aw tie ung.
41006011	Ingtlung caa dapa hne nama bie naa a thlie khing lipa tie kha nama pya se tiyta na ma phyipazaa lie a bepa buvcing kha iema kuo kha luo taata tehte cuo riypata a cakhawsue siy tie ung. Caca ama cuota a raaring pina a cuo aa.
41006012	Cacuonakawta pya yite cawsaa kha ama suena taata amaa ngiepachiy riypata phung ama chang.
41006013	Khuevuo hluvpuv kha papya yite a pasapa kha chiytiy thuv yite ama patluo sa.
41006014	Zingsuv thuohlaa ca khy ting ta a pathuo nakawta Siepahruo Herod zaw ta a thyi ra. Cawsaa chekha ta, “Tiynawtuv Johan na thiyna taata a thupakhaa; canakaw catana hinghaapa kharuehaa hmang hing a tue khu, ama ta.
41006015	Cuorasala a hrangpa tie ta, “Elijah tana a cuo,” ama ta. A hrangpa tie ta, hluoning profet tie haapa profet pakha tana a cuo,” ama ta.
41006016	Herod ta a thyi tiyta, “Kama ta a luv i za pate sapa yi Johan khana thiyna taata a thupakhaa,” a ta.
41006017	Herod pangpa ta cawsaa pathlie yite Johan kha a za patuv sa yi, pahre sa yite thaw a pathla. A nuta Filip napuv a cuo thluo pata napuv ta aa tuepa Herodias nakawta a tuepa a cuo.
41006018	Tahematapakieca Johan ta, “Na nuta napuv ca a hlaw riypa cuo vyi,” tapata a za chang pari.
41006019	Cacuonakaw Herodias ta a palung ruv ta Johan kha hue te a thie khing. Cuorasala thie khu vyi;
41006020	tahematapakieca Herod ta Johan kha aa dangpa hne a pathepa a cuo pakha pachang te a ciy nakawta a daakhuo. Ama ta Zingsuv bie kha a thyi tiyta a palung a kalaasa raalaa pata a bie kha naa a thlie khingsa.
41006021	Cuorasala Herodias ta cuophaa a hmung. Capaca Herod ta a puv ning alawna pyi kha tue te siepahruo chungkhue tie, cuzaa byilepa tie, hne Galilee ruo hruetuv tie sa a duo ning yi ta a cuo.
41006022	Herodias sacanungnung kha zaa ngie te a luo ca Herod hne a khyche tie kha ama palung a patluo yi. Cacuonakaw siepahruopa ta lesaanung ca, “Na khingpa palang naa hie la ica pi aa,” a ta.
41006023	Chie aa sa te a tapa ca, “Ina hiepa bangkhuo ica pi aa, i ruo khingkhuo te hmuota ica pi aa,” a ta.
41006024	Lesaanung ca pya te a nung kha a va hiehriy. “Khaapama i hie aa?” a ta. A nung ta, “Tiynawtuv Johan luv,” tapata a palie.
41006025	Lesaanung ca siepahruopa'a luo kha kaa mala te, “Ata hingta tiynawtuv Johan luv kha daa pakhue lieta na pi la tapa na i khing,” a ta.
41006026	Siepahruopa ca a ngie a chi hringhruo, cadyiseca a khyche zaw hmiemang hne bie a kuo ciepa a cuo nakawta i khing vyi.
41006027	Sungkha ta rievetuv riekapapaa ca Johan luv kya cyi riypata naw pi te a pathlie. Riekapa ca thaw-ing luo kha vaa te Johan luv kha a te.
41006028	Daa pakhue ta kya cyile te lesaanung kha a pi. Cakhutaacata lesaanung ta a nung kha a pi.
41006029	Capa thuohlaa ca Johan hnangziytuv tie ta ama thyi pahne ta a vaw yite a riy kha la yite ama paby.
41006030	Lucuotuv tie ca Zingsuv kha cadung yite ama tuepa hne ama pacuvna kaw kha ama chang.
41006031	Zingsuv ta, “Nama palang hingta ruoduona luo kha a vaw ungla sungkha a pahy tie ung,” a ta yi. Tahematapakieca cawsaa a lie bungthawpa ama hluv tuv nakawta sa ningna cuo hmuo hnyi vayi.
41006032	Cakhutaata iemata tah ruoduona luo kha sawkawpalaw ta ama si.
41006033	Cuorasala cawsaa hluvpuv ta hmung yite, ama pachang nakawta khy ting taakhata vya pya yite ama phyi ta ama si ca iema hluo ta a hmang luo kha ama va chiy lu.
41006034	Zingsuv ca ngiekuo luo cung te cawsaa hluvpuv kha a hmung yi ca a ngiechi hringhruo yi, tahematapakieca iema ca khietuv a hnyi lipa tuv hnetana amaa lu. Caacuonakawta iema kha a hluvsa a pacuv yi.
41006035	Ning a vya ngie viele tiyta ziytuv tie ca ama'a luo kha a vaw yite, “Ruocakung lieta a cuo, ning zaw a ngiesa tli;
41006036	cawsaa hing pathlie yi la a cahriy lie a awpa lu hne khy luo hing ning riypa suokhakha vaa calyi yi se,” ama ta.
41006037	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Niema ta ning riypa suokhakha pi tie ung,” a ta yi. Iema ta, vaa pate ma viechuo kha denarii zahning muo calyi'a pate ma duo'a yi,” ama ta.
41006038	Zingsuv ta, “Viechuo tluo khazaa ma nama hnyi? Va mang tie ung,” a ta yi. Va mang yite, “Tluo pangaa hne ngaa sahning,” ama ta.
41006039	Zingsuv ta cawsaa kha a phuvphuv ta che ungla aphuv cunglie kha patu sa tie ung, a ta yi.
41006040	Cacuonakawta cawsaa ca zakha phuv, sawngaa phuv tapata amaa tu.
41006041	Zingsuv ta viechuo tluo pangaa hne ngaa sahning kha la te, vuoruo luo ang te, alawna bie a hluo khu taata viechuo kha chechi te zaapuv kha re riypata ziytuv tie kha a pi yi. Ngaa sahning zaw kha a pare sa diy yi.
41006042	Ama bangkhuo ta ning yite ama riy a bi.
41006043	Cakhutaata viechuo hne ngaa azungpepa kha ama pakiy ca beke zung hraa hlyihning a bi.
41006044	Sa a ningpa capaa thawpangaa ama ta.
41006045	Cakhupahne Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha sawkawpalaw chung luo pakie sa yite riyliy huesuo Bethsaida luo kha pasisalu yite ama ca zaapuv kha a pathlie taa yi.
41006046	Zaapuv a pathlie khutaa yite tluocung luo kha thlaa chuo repa ta a kie.
41006047	Zuoluo vya chiy te sawkawpalaw tiyliy khingkhuo luo a chiy ning kha Zingsuv ca ama seta tluo lie kha a aw.
41006048	Thliy kha a pali ta aa vya hruo nakawta ziytuv tie ta sawkawpalaw maw amaa nang khyipa kha a hmung tiy yi ta, riyliy cunglie kha cakuo te mawdiy ta iema'a luo kha aa vaw. Iema kha law aa nang yi.
41006049	Cuorasala riyliy cunglie a cakuopa kha ama hmung tiyta athlaa ta ri yite,
41006050	ama thlaa zang hringhruo te khuo ta ama khi. Cuorasala iema kha sungkha ta chaw yite, “Kama tana i cuo, ciykha ung,” a ta yi.
41006051	Cakhutaata sawkawpalaw chunglie iema'a luo kha kie te thliy ca a die. Ziytuv tie ca ama nang ta a uo hringhruo,
41006052	tahematapakieca ama palung kha zingtuv te viechuo lie a tuepa kharuehaa hmang kha pachangpasie khu vayi.
41006053	Riyliy ama vya te khu taata Gene-saret lie kha cung yite sawkawpalaw kha ama hre siy.
41006054	Sawkawpalaw ama thuse pahne khata Zingsuv a cuopa kha cawsaa ta ama pachang paluo.
41006055	Cacuonakawta capa ruochung bangkhuo kha a catli pata si yite a pasapa kha ama pangphaa hne Zingsuv a aw tapata ama thyina hmang luo kha ama vya chiykhyi.
41006056	Zingsuv a cakuonapa khyta, khypuv, lu luo hne chadawtluo luo kha a pasapa ca vya chiykhyi yite a pangpeta chuo ama hrie riypata paa ama kie. A hriepa tie bangkhuo ca ama tluo.
41007001	Jerusalem taata a vawpa Farasi tie hne phungbie saya tie chekha ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a vya hmya yite,
41007002	ziytuv tie kuv a siy li pata, ama kuv pyapa ta sa ama ningpa kha ama pachang.
41007003	(Farasi ming hne Judah ming palang ca mingnungmingpa phungluo kha ziy yite kuv a siy li pata sa a ning lipa ta ama cuo.
41007004	Chadaw taata ama calyipa bangkhuo zaw kha a phung haata pasiy taa li pata ning vayi. Cakhutaata phung hrangpa a hluvsa zaw kha ama ziy: a phung haata panuo pasiyna, bi pasiyna, hne thiyhring kitali pasiyna tapa zaw ta ama cuo.)
41007005	Cacuonakawta Farasi tie hne phungbiesaya tie ta Zingsuv kyihuo kha, “Khaapanakawma caa ziytuv tie ta mingnungmingpa phungluo haata aw lipa yi ta, kuv a siy li pata sa ama ning?” ama ta.
41007006	Zingsuv ta, “Isaiah ta niema phahruocuo tie kaw a za rilu pahing aa hmuosa. A capepa ca: Hingpa cawsaa zaw hingta ama pakaapa dyi ta ina pa-uvsathyi yi, cuorasala ama pathiypalung ca kama hne a hlasa.
41007007	Inaa biepa yi hing muo hnyi vyi, cawsaa tue chawpa phung khana Khazing tuepa phung haata ama pacuv.
41007008	Niema ca Khazing nawbie kha thaw ung cate cawsaa tuepa phungluo khana nama ziy,” a ta, a ta yi.
41007009	Pazue te, “Niema phungluo pacu sa riypata Khazing nawbie thaw zya ca nama the ciemuo.
41007010	Moses ta, ‘Na nung hne na paa va ciyzaa yi, a nung hne a paa sie a pipa ca a thiy hrahring aa,” a ta.
41007011	Cuorasala niema ta nama nung hne nama paa kha, niema byana riypa i tapa hing Korban tana a cuo a ta pata a cuo kieca,
41007012	a nung a paa bya li pata a law khu, nama ta. (Korban siyluo ca Khazing'a luo pipa tanata a cuo).
41007013	A changpachaa ung cate nama za ziylepa nama phungluo ta Khazing bie kha nama pavie nama pavuvle. Cakhutaata hmang a hluvsa hinghaahingta nama tue.
41007014	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta cawsaa-zaapuv kha ku pakhaa yite, “Nama palang ta naathlie ungla pachang tie ung.
41007015	Ale taata cawsaa chung luo a ngiepa hmang khata cawsaa kha papyapalyi khu vyi, Cuorasala chung taata le luo a kya pyapa hmang tuv khana cawsaa kha a papyapalyi khu.
41007016	Thyina naa a hnyipa taca thyi mangsue,” a ta.
41007017	Cawsaazaapuv kha thuse yite ingchung luo a ngie taata a ziytuv tie ta a ripa pakhingpuonabie kaw kha ama hiehriy.
41007018	Zingsuv ta, “Niema zaw hepa ma thyi li pata a aw ra ungciy? Ale taata cawsaa chung luo a ngiepa ca cawsaa kha papyapalyi khu vyi tapa ca pachang va ung cama?.
41007019	A ngiepa ca cawsaa palung chung luo cuo li pata cawsaa riy chung luo kha a ngie te a pya pakhaa.” (Zingsuv ta sa bangkhuo ca a pathe a ta khingna a cuo).
41007020	A ri pazuepa ca, “Cawsaa chung taata a kya pyapa taca cawsaa kha papyapalyi vyi.
41007021	Cawsaa chung, pathiypalung taata a kya pyapa ruena pha lipa khana cawsaa kha, aparuvsuena, paruvna, lienawna,
41007022	nungvaathingsuena, karuo-awna, zyatena, dungviena, mang a daw lipa tuena, hietliena, malie thuopachina, a palena, ngaana hne pingruena tapa pha lipa luo a chiy.
41007023	Hing a pha lipa bangkhuo hing cawsaa chung taata kya pya te ama kha a papya a palyi.
41007024	Capa hmang taacata pya te Zingsuv ca Tair pe luo kha a si. Ing kha luo kha a ngie te, capa lie a awpa kha ahunghmuo a pachang sa khing vayi. Cuorasala a nu khu vyi.
41007025	A pyalyipa thlaapa ta a sacanungnung aa hryipa canung pakha ta Zingsuv kaw kha sungkha ta thyi te, a vaw te Zingsuv phyi thabaw lie kha aa vya bu.
41007026	Canung nung ca Siria ruo Fonisia khy lie a puvpa Jentail zaanung ta a cuo. Ama ta Zingsuv kha a sacanung chung taata khuevuo papya riypa kha paa a kie.
41007027	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Haatiy zaw kha ama riy bi pata pi taa ungsiy. Haatiy sa kha la pata uv thawpa ca a phung cuo vyi, a ta.
41007028	Cawsaanung cata, “Abyipa, cabya rawlie uv tahmuo haatiy zaw pathlapa sa diydya kha ama ning ra taw muo,” a ta.
41007029	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta, Cawsaanung kha, “Cakuo tie, khuevuo ta na sacanungnung kha a pya se tli,” a ta.
41007030	Cacuonakawta, capa cawsaanung ca ing luo kha a diy te, haatiynung khuevuo ta pya se tli te, iehmang cunglie a zaa zie pakha a hmung.
41007031	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca Tair pe taakhata kaa te Sidon cahrawpaa pata Dekhapolis pe lie a awpa Galilee riyliy luo kha a si.
41007032	Cawsaa chekha ta a naa rue te bie a ri the lipa kha vya chiykhyi yite a cunglie a kuv khang riypata Zingsuv kha paa ama kie.
41007033	Zingsuv ta cawsaa hraw taakhata ama selaw ta cakuo khyi te, a kuvdaw kha a naakary luo riy te, a paciy ta pacha te cawsaapapaa palyi ca a hrie.
41007034	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca vuoruo luo kha ang te, a huv kha pa-y te khuopuv ta a sung khu taata cawsaapa kha, “Effatha,” a ta, a siyluo ca, “a pahaw tie” tanata a cuo.
41007035	Sungkha ta a naa pavuo te, a palyi ca a hya te a siesa pata bie a ri.
41007036	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta ahunghmuo chang li riypata a thlu yi, cadyiseca thlu hryly yi ri hryly yi ama ta.
41007037	A ma kharue haa hringhruo te, “Hmang bangkhuo hing a pha pata a tue, a naa a ruepa khahmuo pathyi sa te, bie a ri khu lipa kha a pari sa khu,” ama ta.
41008001	Capa hrawning ngiethie cata cawsaazaapuv kha a vya hmya yite ning riypa khaapahmuo ama hnyi li nakawta Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha ku yite,
41008002	“Cawsaazaapuv hing i ngie na ina chi yi, tahematapakieca kama'a lie ningthung aw tli yite ata hing ning riy hnyi vayi.
41008003	Ama nangdiy pata ing luo i pakaa kie yi ca luo lieta ama hyle aa _ chekha ca luohlaasa taata a vawpa tana ama cuo,” a ta.
41008004	Ziytuv tie ta, “Hingpa ruocaa lie hing hing zaa cawsaa hing ahungma viechuo a duo khu'a yi?” ama ta.
41008005	Zingsuv ta, “Viechuo tluo khazaa ma nama hnyi?” a ta yi. “Tluo sariy,” ama ta.
41008006	Zaapuv kha alyi lie patu sa yite viechuo tluo sariy kha la te, Khazing'a luo kha palungtluona bie a hluo khu taata chechi te zaapuv re riypata ziytuv tie kha pi yite ama re.
41008007	Ngaa a cawta zaw kha hnyi yite, thluechiy a pi khu taata ziytuv tie kha a pare sa ra yi.
41008008	Ama bangkhuo ta ning yite ama riy a bi, azungpepa kha ama pakhaw ca beke ta zung sariy a bi.
41008009	Cawsaa ca thaw paliy hraw ama ta. Cakhutaacata a pathlie yi.
41008010	Ziytuv tie hneta sawkawpalaw luo kha a catlisa pata kie yite Dalmanutha pe luo kha ama si.
41008011	Farasi tie chekha a vaw yite Zingsuv hneta bie amaa i. Ama kha ama dyapasya khing nakawta, vuoruo taata kharuehaa hmang suokha ama hie.
41008012	Zingsuv ca a huv kha pa-y te, “Khaapanakawma ata chuo saa zaw ta kharuehaa hmang tue riypa ina hie yi? Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Tuokhaapa kharuehaa hmang hmuota ata chuo cawsaa zaw hmielie hing tue pata cuo'a vyi,” a ta.
41008013	Iema kha thuse yite, sawkawpalaw chung luo kha a ngie pakhaa te, riyliy huesuo luo kha a vaa.
41008014	Ziytuv tie ta viechuo vya phyale ama maw nakawta sawkawpalaw chunglie kha tluokha dyi ama hnyi.
41008015	Zingsuv ta, “Farasi tie thiynung hne Herod thiynung kha a raaring ung,” a ta yi.
41008016	Pakha hne pakha kha, “Viechuo ma hnyi li nakawna a cuo,” amaa ta.
41008017	Zingsuv ta amaa ruepa kha a pachang nakawta, “Khaapanakawma viechuo nama hnyi lipa kaw ca namaa rue? Ata tepa hingta pachangpasie khu the va ung cama? Nama palung ma aca paping yi?
41008018	Ming nama hnyi thluo raalaa pata, hmung va ung cama? Naa nama hnyi thluo raalaa pata, thyi va ung cama? A thyi the va tli ung cama?
41008019	Cawsaa thawpangaa cuota viechuo tluo pangaa i chechi ning kha azungpepa beke zung khazaa ma namaa haa?” a ta yi. “Zung hraa hlyihning,” ama ta.
41008020	Cawsaa thaw paliy cuota tluo sariy i chechi ning khahaw azungpepa beke zung khazaa ma namaa haa? a ta yi. “Zung sariy,” ama ta.
41008021	“Cakhutaa, ata te pata pachangpasie khu va ung cama?” a ta yi.
41008022	Bethsaida luo kha ama chiy. Cawsaa chekha ta mingcuepa pakha kha Zingsuv'a luo vya chiykhyi yite a hrie riypata paa ama kie.
41008023	Zingsuv ta mingcuepapaa kha a kuv ta ca-ya te khyle luo kha a pyakhyi. A ming lie kha a paciy a be khu taata, a kuv kha a cunglie khang te, “Suokha chuo na hmung ma? a ta.
41008024	Cawsaapapaa ca vuopaa kya ang te, “Cawsaa kha i hmung khu yi, cuorasala thingkungpa na a cakuole tapa haatana i hmung yi,” a ta.
41008025	Zingsuv ta cawsaapapaa ming kha a kuv ta a taw pakhaa. Cawsaapapaa ca khuosa ta mang te a ming a vya vuo nakawta zezaw bangkhuo kha a siesa pata a hmung.
41008026	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta ing luo kha padiy sa te, “Khychung luo vaa ngie khya,” a ta.
41008027	Zingsuv ca ziytuv tie hneta Sisaria Filipi pe khyta luo kha ama tlaw. Luopuv lie kha ziytuv tie kyihuo ta, “Kama hing cawsaa ta ahung ina ta yi ma? a ta yi.
41008028	Iema ta, “Tiynawtuv Johan tana na cuo,” ta yite, a hrangpa tie ta, “Elijah tana na cuo,” ama ta. A hrangpa tie ta, “Profet pakhakha tana na cuo,” ama ta.
41008029	Ama ta, “Niema haw, ahung ina ta ung cama?” a ta yi. Piter ta, “Messiah tana na cuo,” a ta.
41008030	Cakhutaa, Zingsuv ta, a kaw kha ahunghmuo chang li riypata a thlu yi.
41008031	Cakhutaacata Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha pacuv yite, “Cawsaa Saacapaa ca te-angna khuopuv ta a taw'a te, uvthyi tie, tluobyilepa tie, hne phungbie saya tie ta ama thaw aa, thie'a yite, ningthung khu taata a thupakhaa aa,” a ta yi.
41008032	Hingpa hing a siesa pata a chang yi. Cacuonakaw Piter ta a cawta cakuo khyi te a chuo.
41008033	Cadyiseca Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie'a luo kha a pali te Piter kha a chuo hriy. “Setaa, i hnang luo kha a hnyi,” a ta. “Na ruenapa hing Khazing hmang cunglie chi vaciy, cawsaa hmang cungliena na chi,” a ta.
41008034	Cawsaazaapuv hne ziytuv tie kha ku yite, “Naa ziytuv a cuo khingpa ca ama hne ama kha a thaw sala, a vieluo kha a puv pata na ziy se.
41008035	A hringna kha a khuo khingpa ca a hringna kha aa sung aa, cadyiseca kama cuo hne thuophaabie cuota a hringna a pipa ca a hringna kha a khuo aa.
41008036	Cawsaa pakha ta chuelyi hing a yalya ta cu sala, a hringna aa sung tlung kieca khaapama a thlahne aa? Thlahne'a vyi!
41008037	A hringna kha khaapa hmang tama aa thla khu aa?
41008038	Hingpa a siyhrawpa hne a suepa chuo lie hing kama hne i bie a zaakhyipa ca, Cawsaa Saacapaa ta a Paa rungnaana hne a pathepa avuoming zaw hne aa zuv thueta ama kha a zaakhyi ra aa,” a ta.
41009001	Cakhutaata, iema kha “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: hingpa lie a daapa chung taahingta chekha hing Khazing pena ca lesyina hneta aa zuvpa ama hmung hluo li thiy'a va yi,” ata yi.
41009002	Ning caruv khu taata Zingsuv ta Piter, Jeim hne Johan dyi kha a chiy yite a suopa tluo tluokha cung luo kha a kiekhyi yi. Ama ming hmung na lie kha Zingsuv ca a thle te,
41009003	a caw kha a ruona luo ta a li te aa li, chuelyi lie a awpa ahungtahmuo cahaa cata a ruona te ta pasuv khu'a vayi.
41009004	Capa lie ca Elijah hne Moses kha zaa luo yite Zingsuv hne bie amaa rue.
41009005	Piter ta Zingsuv kha, “Saya, hingpa lie awpa hing ma cuota a pha hringhruo, thluodaa suo thung sa'a pate, suokha hing nama cuo, suokha hing Moses cuo hne, suokha hing Elijah cuota a cuo aa,” a ta.
41009006	Ama thlaa a zang hringhruo nakawta Piter ca khaapama i ri tapa kha pachang vyi.
41009007	Amyi a vya zu te a ningdiy ta iema kha buv yite, ca amyi chung taacata ueryi suokha a zuv te, “Ama hing i Duepa i Saacapaa tana a cuo, a bie a ngie mya ung,” a ta.
41009008	Ama kiecahriy kha ama mang pahraa ca Zingsuv ri li pata ahunghmuo hmung vayi.
41009009	Tluocung taata ama za cungpuo pata, Zingsuv ta, Cawsaa Saacapaa thiyna taata a thupakhaa hluo li nama hmungpa hing ahunghmuo chang'a va ungciy, a ta yi.
41009010	A ri ca amaa ngie, cadyiseca iema'a na iema kha, “Thiyna taata thupakhaana,” tapa ca khaapama a ri khingna a cuo aa? amaa ta.
41009011	Cakhutaata Zingsuv kha, “Khaapanakawma phungbie saya tie ta Elijah na a zuv taa aa ama ta? tapata ama hiehriy.
41009012	Zingsuv ta, “Zezaw bangkhuo ting pacie riypata Elijah ca aa zuv taa hmisi. Cadyiseca khaapanakawma Caapathepa ta Cawsaa Saacapaa ca khuopuv ta te-ang'a te ese nutaapa ta ama tue aa ta te a cape?
41009013	Cuorasala ica chang yi, Caapathepa a ripa haata, Elijah ca a zuv tli te cawsaa ta ama khing thiy ta ama tue mangtli,” a ta yi.
41009014	Ziytuv hrangpa tie'a luo ama va chiy ca, zaapuv ta za cadung yite phungbie saya chekha hne bie amaa zaa i nguoluo.
41009015	Cawsaa ta Zingsuv kha ama va hmung pahne ta, ama kharue haasa te a ruo yite bie ama vaa chang.
41009016	Zingsuv ta, ziytuv tie kha, “Khaapa kaw ma namaa i? a ta yi.
41009017	Cawsaazaapuv chung taa pakhapapaa ta, “Saya, I saacapaapa ca khuevuo ta a hryi te bie pari sa khu vyi,
41009018	khuevuo a chunglie a vya pya kyry ta, alyi lie kha vaapatyi te, a pakaa taata abuvcaphawpa pya te a haa dyi rie te a siypakya. Caa ziytuv tie kha khuevuo papya riypata i nue yi, cuorasala papya khu vayi,” a ta.
41009019	Zingsuv ta, “Zangna hnyi hringhruo va ung ca ing? Kha cuo te khiyma niema'a lie hing i aw kalie a hu aa? Kha cuo te khiyma nama nang cawpa ta a chiyle namaa hu kalie aa? a ta yi. Haatiypa kha a vawkhyi tie ung ta yite,
41009020	amaa vaw khyi. Khachie ta Zingsuv kha a hmung pahne ta haatiypapaa kha vaapatyi te alyi lie a lie te aa pahlangle, a pakaa taata abuv dyi a pya.
41009021	Zingsuv ta a paa kha, “Hinghaahingta a ta napa hing kha cuo ma a ta tli? a ta. “A cawta baataatana a cuo,” tapata a palie.
41009022	“Cuo hluvpuv ca a thie khing nakawta myi chung luo zaw pazu te tiy chung luo zaw a pathla. Malie naa bya khu kieca malie a bya thi tie,” a ta.
41009023	Zingsuv ta, “Malie naa bya khu kieca na ta ma? Zangna a hnyipa cuota ca zezaw bangkhuo hing a cuo khu diy,” a ta.
41009024	A paa ca sungkha ta khi pathla te, “I zang; i zang linapa kha naa bya tie,” a ta.
41009025	Zingsuv ta iema'a luo zaapuv a maa vya ruolepa kha hmung te, a pyalyipa thlaapa kha, “Nama khachie, haatiypa bie a pari sa the lipa hne naa a parue sapa hingpapaa chung taahingta pya la khatiy ning hmuo a ngie pakhaa kha tie! tapata naw ica pi,” a ta.
41009026	Khachie ca khuopuv ta khi te haatiypapaa kha a siy patyi khu taata a pya. Haatiypapaa ca a thiypa riy haata ta te, cawsaa hluv vie ta, “a thiy tli,” ama ta.
41009027	Cadyiseca Zingsuv ta a buo ta la te, pathu te a kya daa.
41009028	Zingsuv ca ing chung luo a ngie khu taata, ziytuv tie ta a paruvta tah, “Khaapanakawma khachie hing ma papya khu va? ama ta.
41009029	Zingsuv ta, “Hingpa phang hing ca thlaachuona ta dyina a pya khu,” a ta yi.
41009030	Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca khapa hmang taa kha pya yite Galilee cahrawpaa pata ama si. Capa kaw ca Zingsuv ta ahunghmuo pachang sa khing vayi.
41009031	Ziytuv tie kha, “Cawsaa Saacapaa hing cawsaa kuv cung luo lyi pata cuo'a te iema ta ama thie aa, ama thie khu taata ningthung a tapata a thupakhaa aa,” tapata a pacuv yi.
41009032	Cuorasala khaapama a ri khing tapa kha pachang vayi, hiehriy riypa zaw kha a nguo vayi.
41009033	Kapernaum khy luo kha pha yite ing chunglie a aw ning kha Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kyihuo kha, “Luopuv lie kha khaapama namaa vya ile khya? a ta yi.
41009034	Cuorasala palie nguo vayi, tahematapakieca, luopuv lie kha, ‘ahungma a lece,’ tapa kha amaa vya ile.
41009035	Zingsuv ca a tu te, ziytuv tie kha ku yite, “Ahunghmuota cuose malie hrawlie a lecepa a cuo khingpa ca a cawcepa hne cawsaa bangkhuo sii ta a cuo taa hrahring na a hu,” a ta yi.
41009036	Haatiy pakha kha ku te iema hrawlie a padaa khu taata, cakuv te,
41009037	“I ming ta hinghaapa haatiy a cuhluopa ca, kama kha ina cuhluo, kama kha naa cuhluopa ca kama dyi cuo li pata kama naa pathlietuv zaw kha a cuhluo ra,” a ta yi.
41009038	Johan ta, “Saya, na ming ta khuevuo a papyapa pakha hmung pate muo, kiema malie a ziy li nakawta ma thlu ta,” a ta.
41009039	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Thlu ri kha ung, tahematapakieca i ming ta kharuehaa hmang a tuepa taca a nata tah i thuo na pachi'a vyi.
41009040	Malie a du lipa ca kiema cawsaa tana a cuo.
41009041	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi, Khrih ming namaa cyi nakawta dang riypa tiy nuokha caa pipa yi ca lawmuo kha hmung li pata aw hrahring'a vayi,” a ta.
41009042	“Ahunghmuo cuo sala, kama naa zangpa hingpa haatiy zaw pakhakha hmie lieta a pachiyna riypa a chipa ca nama rue lie sacuo rienapa lungtung pathlie pata riyliy luo pathlapa na nama cuota a pha vie aa.
41009043	Na kuv ta na zangna taata aca papie sa kieca na kuv kha te tie! A thiy buo lipa hell myi chung luo na kuv hrahning hne tlapa laa taca kuv tling li pata hringna luo naa ngiepa a pha vie aa.
41009045	Na phyi ta na zangna taa aca papie sa kieca, te tie! Phyi hrahning hne hell luo tlapa laa taca phyi tling li pata hringna luo naa ngiepa a pha vie aa.
41009047	Na ming ta na zangna taata aca papie sa kieca cakhyi la thaw tie. Ming hrahning hne hell luo tlapa laa taca ming tling li pata hringna luo naa ngiepa a pha vie aa.
41009048	Capa hmang lieca ama mathulung thiy buo li'a pata, myi zaw thiy buo'a vyi.
41009049	Cawsaa bangkhuo ca myi ta paciy haakhata pa-ie sapa ama cuo aa.
41009050	“Paciy ca a pha; cuorasala a iena kha a vie kieca, tuokhaatama na pa-ie sa pakhaa the aa? “Nama chunglie paciy kha hnyi ungla, pakha hne pakha a re tie ung,” a ta yi.
41010001	Zingsuv ca capa hmang taacata pya te Judea pe, Jordan cavaa huesuo luo kha a vaa. Cawsaazaapuv ta vya pahlaw pakhaa hyi yite a tue tawpa haakhata a pacuv pakhaa hyi yi.
41010002	Farasi tie chekha a vaw yite ama dyapasya khing pata, “Ma phungbie hingta napuv ma riypa a pa-aw ma?” ama ta.
41010003	Zingsuv ta, “Moses ta khaapa nawbie ma aca pi yi?” a ta yi.
41010004	Ama paliepa ca, “Moses taca, capaa pakha ca a napuv kha manapa caa a pi kieca a ma khu, malie a ta,” ama ta.
41010005	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Nama palung a cuo tuv nakawna hingpa nawbie hing nama cuota a cape pata a cuo.
41010006	Cuorasala sahruo thu cuo ning taakhata, ‘Khazing ta canung hne capaa a sa yi’.
41010007	‘Cacuonakawta capaa ta a paa hne a nung kha thuse'a yite a napuv kha a hlaw aa,
41010008	pahning kha pangkha ta ama cuo aa’. Cacuonakawta iema ca pahning cuo va tli yi pangkha tana ama cuo.
41010009	Khazing ta a pahlawpa yi ca ahungtahmuo che kha yi se.”
41010010	Cakhutaata ing chunglie kha ziytuv tie ta capa kaw ama hiehriy pakhaa.
41010011	Zingsuv ta, “A napuv kha ma te canung hrang a hlawpa ca aparuvsuena a tuepa a cuo.
41010012	Cahaangiethiecata a navaapa kha thuse te capaa hrang a hlawpa ca aparuvsuena a tuepa a cuo,” a ta yi.
41010013	Cawsaa ta haatiy zaw kha a kuv ta taw naa se yi tapata Zingsuv'a luo kha amaa vaw khyi, cuorasala ziytuv tie ta cawsaa kha ama chuo.
41010014	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta a hmung yi ca a hi haa te, ziytuv tie kyihuo kha, “Haatiy kha kama'a luo a vaw yi se, thlu kha ung, tahematapakieca Khazing pena ca hingpa haatiy zaw haapa cuo hing tana a cuo.
41010015	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: ahunghmuo cuose haatiy zaw haahingta Khazing pena a cuhluo lipa ca a chung luo a ngie khu'a va yi,” a ta.
41010016	Cakhutaata haatiy tie kha a paw yite, a kuv kha ama cunglie khang te, thluechiy a pi yi.
41010017	Zingsuv khy tlawna luo a tha ning kha cawsaa pakha kha a vya ruo te, a hmiekunglie a pakhuv vya pane te, “A phapa Saya, Chuozaa hringna cu riypata khaapama i tue aa?” a ta.
41010018	Zingsuv ta, “Khaapanakawma a phapa ina ta ciy? Khazing ta li pata ahunghmuo pha vayi.
41010019	Nawbie zaw ca na pachang thluo kha: Lie va naw kha; nungvaathingsuena tue kha; paruv kha; a cuo lipa bie lie malie vaa daakhyi kha; cawsaa va dung kha; na nung hne na paa va ciyzaa yi; tapata a cuopa kha,” a ta.
41010020	Capapaa cata, “Saya, hing nawbie bangkhuo hing i cawta baataata i ziy diy ciepa tana a cuo,” a ta.
41010021	Zingsuv ta mang te duena hneta a tapa ca, “Suokha dyina na bu, cakuo la na hnyipa kha zaa la tuokaa kha siypasa tie pi tie yi, vuoruo lie a hnyirungpa na cuo aa, cakhutaata a vaw la kama kha na ziy tie,” a ta.
41010022	Capa bie a thyi tiyta minghmie pha li cangta ngiechisa pata a cakuo, tahematapakieca ama ca a hnyirungsapa ta a cuo.
41010023	Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha mang paky yite,” Khazing pena luo a hnyirungpa a ngie riypa hing khatluv tama a ruv aa!” a ta yi.
41010024	Ziytuv tie ca capa bie kawlie cata ama kharue a haa sa. Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “I saa zaw, Khazing pena luo a ngie hing khatluv tama a ruv!
41010025	A hnyirungpa Khazing pena luo a ngiepa laata kala-uv ciphang naakhue luo a ngiepa na a na vie,” a ta pakhaa yi.
41010026	Iema ca ama kharue haa hringhruo te, pakha hne pakha kha, “Cata a cuo kie, ahungma khuona ca a hmung khu aa?” amaa ta.
41010027	Zingsuv ta mang yite, “Hingpa hing cawsaa cuota ca cuo khu vyi, Khazing cuota ca a cuo khu; Zezaw bangkhuo hing Khazing cuota ca a cuo khu,” a ta yi.
41010028	Piter ta, “Kiema ca zezaw bang-khuo sise pate nama maca ziy tli,’ a ta.
41010029	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Kama hne thuophaabie kawlieta a ing a lu a cuo li kie a uvnu a cuo li kie a sieta a cuo li kie a nung a cuo li kie a paa a cuo li kie a saata a cuo li kie a lu zaw a thusepa ca
41010030	ata chuo chunglie hrahring hingta uvnu hne sieta, nung hne saata, ing hne lu zaw kha le zakha ta hmung'a te, hrisaathieruena zaw a hmung aa. A vaw riypa chuo lie zaw chuozaa hringna a hmung aa.
41010031	Cuorasala atalie hmaa a sapa a hluvpuv hing hnang chuo'a yite, atalie hnang a chuopa a hluvpuv hing hmaa ama sa aa,” a ta.
41010032	Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca Jerusalem luo ama si nguoluo ning kha, Zingsuv ca hmaa luo kha a cakuolu. Ziytuv tie ca ama nang ta uo te, a hrangpa ama hnang a paziy lepa tie zaw ama thlaa a zangsa. Zingsuv ta ziytuv hlyihning tie kha a hrang ta ku pakhaa yite a cunglie a tlung riypa kaw kha a chang yi.
41010033	“Mang tie ung, Jerusalem luo ma sithaw nguoluo ung hing, Cawsaa Saacapaa hing tluobyilepa tie hne phungbie saya tie kuv luo pi pata cuo'a te, iema ta thie riypata bie chi'a yite Jentail ming kuv luo kha ama pi aa.
41010034	Ama tue hyalya aa, ama paciy ta ama pacha aa, sungpe ta chi'a yite ama thie aa, ningthung khu taata a thupakhaa aa,” a ta yi.
41010035	Cakhutaata Zebedi saacapaa Jeim hne Johan ta Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw yite, “Saya, khaapa maacaa hie zaw ta malie na tuepa riypatana maca khing,” ama ta.
41010036	Zingsuv ta, “Khaapa malie tuepa se tapa ma ina khing ungciy?” a ta yi.
41010037	Iema ta, “Na rungnaana chunglie, na cacuo luota pakha, na cavyi luota pakha a tuna naw malie pi tie,” ama ta.
41010038	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Khaapama ina hie ungciy tapa pachang va ungciy. I dang riypa panuo hing nama dang khu'a ma? A cuo li kie i tiy a naw riypa haahingta namaa naw khu'a ma?” a ta yi.
41010039	Iema ta, “Ma tue khu thluo aa,” ama ta. Zingsuv ta, “I dang riypa panuo hing nama dang khu sasaw thluo aa, tiy i naw riypa zaw hing namaa naw khu sasaw thluo aa.
41010040	Cuorasala i cacuo hne i cavyi luo a tu riypata pi khuna naw ca hnyi va ang, cuorasala capa hmang ca tingpa paciepa tie cuotana a cuo,” a ta yi.
41010041	Pahraa tie ta capa bie ama thyi tiyta, Jeim hne Johan cunglie kha ama hi a haa.
41010042	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta ama palang khata u yite, “Chuelyi ming hraw lieca uvtuv tapa tie ta uvpa tie cunglie kha a pale yite ama khing ta ama awpa kha nama pachang.
41010043	Cuorasala niema hraw lieca cahaa cata cuo'a vyi; cuorasala nama hrawlie a lecepa a cuo khingpa ca nama changtaapa a cuo riypatana a cuo,
41010044	pakhana a cuo khingpa ca nama palang sii kha a cuo riypata a cuo.
41010045	Cawsaa Saacapaa hmuota hriepa pa cuo li pata, hriepatuv cuo riypa hne cawsaa hluvpuv a thlana riypata a hringna pi riypata muo aa vaw ta,” a ta.
41010046	Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca Jeriko luo kha ama chiy. Ziytuv tie'a nata cawsaazaapuv hneta Jerusalem taata ama pya ning kha Timau saacapaapa, a mingcuepa a hielepapaa Bartimu kha luopuv kielie a zaa tu.
41010047	Nazareth khypa Zingsuv na a cuo tapa a pachang tiyta khuosa ta khi te, “Zingsuv! David Sapaa! ngie na chi thi tie!” a ta.
41010048	Cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama kha thla yite duo riypata ama chang, cuorasala David Sapaa, ngie na chi thi tie ta te khuo vie ta a khi hryly.
41010049	Zingsuv ta a daa te, “Va ku ung,” a ta yi. Cacuonakawta mingcuepaa ca ku yite, ‘Na palung tluosa se, thu tie, aca ku cuv,” ama ta.
41010050	A pang kha thaw te, a cathlu te Zingsuv'a luo kha aa vaw.
41010051	Zingsuv ta, “Khaapa na tuepa se tapa ma na khing,” a ta. Mingcuepaa ta, “Saya, I hmung pakhaa khing sa,” a ta.
41010052	Zingsuv ta, “Cakuo tie, na zangna na caa patluo sa,” a ta. Sungkha ta a ming ca vuo paluo te luopuv lie kha Zingsuv ca a ziyle.
41011001	Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca Jerusalem khy va pha tyalya'a nang caw, Bethfeih hne Bethani khy kie Oliv tluo luo kha ama va chiy. Zingsuv ta ziytuv pahning kha pathlielu yite,
41011002	“Nama hmielie a awpa khy luo kha vaa ungla, namaa ngie pahne ta, amaa khang buo lipa laa taata aa hre thluopa kha nama hmung aa. Va pathluo ungla a vya chiy ung.
41011003	Pakhakha ta, “Khaapanakawma haakhata na ma tue?” aca ta kie yi ca, “Abyipa na a hu, maca vya pi pakhaa paluo'a yi nama ta aa,” a ta yi.
41011004	Vaa yite thlake a thaa, ale luo luopuv lie laa taata aa hrepa kha ama hmung. A khuhriy ama pathluo nguoluo pata,
41011005	a kielie a daapa chekha ta, “Khaapa ma na ma tue, laa taata khuhriy ca nama pathluo? ama ta.
41011006	Zingsuv ta a changpa haa yi khata palie yite, a dale thluo ung, ama ta.
41011007	Laa taata ca Zingsuv'a luo a vya chiy yite, ama pang kha a ke lie padie yite, Zingsuv ta aa khang.
41011008	Cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama pang kha luopuv lie phaa yite, chekha ta thingce kha thli yite luopuv lieca ama phaa ra.
41011009	Hmaa a sapa cuo yi se, a hnang taata a ziypa cuo yi se, khi yite, Hosanna! Abyipa ming ta a vawpa ca Khazing ta thluechiy pi se!
41011010	Mingpa David pena a vaw riypa ca thluechiy hmung mangsue. Hosanna! A suocena vuoruo lie khiy Khazing ca pathuosa pata cuo mangsue, ama ta.
41011011	Zingsuv ca Jerusalem luo kha a ngie te, Biena ing luo kha vaa te hmangting khata a va mang diy. Ning a ngie tli nakawta ziytuv hlyihning hne khata Bethani khy luo kha ama kaa.
41011012	A mawluopa, Bethani taata ama vya kaa pata, Zingsuv ca a nang a diy.
41011013	Luohlaa taata a hnaa rungsapa thyikuv kung kha a hmung ca a thyi suokha chuo hmung'a ang ma tapata vaa te a va mang. A thaa luo a chiy tiyta a hnaa dyi a hmung, tahematapakieca thyikuv a pathyi cuo ta cuo vyi.
41011014	Thyikuv kung kha “Ahungtahmuo na thyi ca ce pakhaa kha tli yi se,” a ta. Ziytuv tie ta a ripa kha ama thyi.
41011015	Jerusalem ama va pha taata, Zingsuv ca Biena-ing luo kha a ngie te, chechiy a calyituv tie hne a zaatuv tie kha a cade diy yi. Tuokaa a thlepa tie cabya hne valale a zaapa tie thude zaw kha pali diy te,
41011016	Biena-ing lie chechiy sikhyi bungthaw li tli riypata a thlu yi.
41011017	Cawsaa kha pacuv yite a ripa ca “Caapathepa lie hinghaahingtana aa cape cuo vama? “Kama ing ca mingphang bangkhuo thlaachuona hmang tana a cuo aa. Cuorasala niema ta a paruvpa a chuona hmang ta nama pali,” a ta.
41011018	Tluobyi lepa tie hne phungbie saya tie ta capa bie ca ama thyi tiyta, Zingsuv thiena riypa luo kha ama huv. Tahematapakieca zaapuv bangkhuo ca a pacuvpa cunglie kha ama kharue a haa diy nakawta Zingsuv kha ama ciy.
41011019	Zuoluo khyzing'a nang caw ta, Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca khypuv chung taata ama pya.
41011020	A mawluopa mawdiy, luo ama cakuopuo pata thyikuv kung ca a thariy te a caa diy pakha ama hmung.
41011021	Piter ta khaapama zaa cuo tapa kha aa thyi nakawta Zingsuv kyihuo kha, “Saya, mang tie! chie na sapa thyikuv kung kha a caa diy tli,” a ta.
41011022	Zingsuv ta, “Khazing kha zang tie ung.
41011023	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: ahunghmuo ta cuo khu thlu'a vyi tana aw li pata a ripa hing a cuo hrahring aa tapa zangna hneta hingpa tluo hing, ‘Thu la riyliy luo vaa thaw tie,’ a ta kieca a ripa kha tuepa pata a cuo aa.
41011024	Caacuonakawta ica chang yi, ‘Thlaachuona ta suokhakha na maa hie thueta, i hmung tli tapata nama zang kieca nama hiepa ca pipa nama cuo aa.
41011025	A daa ung cate thlaa nama chuo tiyta pakhakha cunglie hihaana nama hnyipa kha a ngiethe ungla, vuoruo lie a awpa nama Paa ta nama suena kha acaa ngiethe ra'a yi, a ta.
41011026	(Cuorasala malie suena kha namaa ngiethe li kieca vuoruo lie a awpa nama Paa ta niema nama suena zaw kha caa ngiethe ra'a vayi.)
41011027	Jerusalem luo kha ama vya pha pakhaa. Zingsuv Biena-ing chunglie aa khie nguoluo ning kha, tluobyi lepa tie, phungbie saya tie hne uvthyi tie kha a vaw yite,
41011028	Zingsuv kyihuo kha, “Ahung nawhnyina tama hingpa hmang hing na tue? Ahungma hing hmang tue khuna naw hing caa pi?” ama ta.
41011029	Zingsuv ta, “Bie suokha ca hiehriy'a yi ang te na palie ungla, ahung nawhnyina tama i tue tapa kha ica chang'a yi,” a ta.
41011030	Johan tiynawna hing vuoruo taata ma aa zuv a cuo li kie cawsaapa'a taata ma?” a ta yi.
41011031	Iema'a na iema kha a i yite, “Vuoruo taa ne, ta pasala, ‘Cacuokie khaapanakawma Johan ca nama zang va,’ malie a ta aa.
41011032	‘Cawsaa taata ne,’ ma ta kiema, cawsaa kha ciy amaa chiy, tahematapakieca cawsaa mekaa ta Johan ca profet tapa kha ama zang,” amaa ta.
41011033	Cacuonakawta “Pachang va puv,” ama ta. Zingsuv ta, “Kama zaw ahung nawhnyina tama hingpa hmang hing i tue tapa kha ca chang raa vayi ang,” a ta yi.
41012001	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta pakhing-puonabie ta iema'a lie kha a ri, “Cawsaa pakha ta mingsuv diedung a mang te, piehu padung te, mingsuv nawna khue kha a cu, rie vena tluophie zaw kha a due. Cakhutaaca a mingsuv diedung ca rehrietuv tie kha pahlie yite khy a tlaw se.
41012002	Mingsuv lu tiy aa de tiyta a siipaapa kha pathlie te a vyipa chung taata ama a hmung riypa kha a va pala sa.
41012003	Cuorasala ama kha patuv yite ama tuv khu taata khaapahmuo pi li pata ama pathlie.
41012004	A siipaapa a hrangpa pakha a pathlie pakhaa, rehrietuv tie ta a luv lie kha tuv yite nangzaahmiechi pata ama tue.
41012005	Cakhutaata a hrangpa pakha a pathlie ca capapaa ca ama thie. A hrangpa tie zaw kha cahaa cata tue diy yite, chekha ama tuv, chekha ama thie.
41012006	Pathlie riypa pakha a hnyi kaliepa ca a due hringhruopa a saacapaapa ta a cuo. A hnangcawce ce taca a saacapaapa kha pathlie te, ‘I saacapaapa hing ca ama hmiezaa ngiethie aa,’ a ta.
41012007	Cuorasala diedung rehrietuv tie ca pakha hne pakha kha, ‘Ama hing na a rucutuv ta a cuo. A vaw tie ung, thie'a ungpuv, cacuokiena a ru bangkhuo hing kiema huopa ta a cuo aa,’ amaa ta.
41012008	Cacuonakaw patuv yite ama thie khu taata a riy kha diedung khungthing luo ama thaw.
41012009	Cakhutaacata, diedung a hnyituvpapaa ta khaapana a tue thlu'a mang nama ta ma? a ta yi. A vaw'a te a thie diy khu taayita a diedung kha a hrangpa tie'a luo a pahlie'a yi.
41012010	Caapathepa chunglie ta: Ing a satuv tie ta ama thawpa alung ca ingkiy lung tana aa li.
41012011	Capa ca Abyipa ta ma ming hmungna lie a tuepa hmang cuote, nang uo na a chiy hringhruo, tapata aa cape pakha ri buo va ung cama? a ta yi.
41012012	Hing pakhingpuonabie hing kiema muo malie a tapasue ta tapa kha ama pachang tiyta, ama patuv khing raalaa ca cawsaazaapuv kha ama ciy. Cacuonakawta ama kha thuse yite ama cakuo.
41012013	A ripa bie ta pa-uo the riypata Farasi ming chekha hne Herod cawsaa chekha kha Zingsuv'a luo ama pathlie.
41012014	Ama'a luo kha a vaw yite, “Saya, nama ca aa hmuopa kha a ripa na cuo, cawsaa aa ne aa suo thleduo vaciy, a kuo ta a daa vaciy, Khazing luopuv kha aa hmuopa haata na pacuv. Rom siepahruopa ngukhyi pipa hing ma phungbie ta a pa-aw ma? pa-aw vama? Ngukhyi ma pi'a ma, pi'a va pama,” ama ta.
41012015	Zingsuv ta a phahruo amaa cuo pakhipa kha pachang te, “Khaapanakawma ina dyapasya ungciy? Denarii phiekha kha vya cyi ungla mang'a ang,” a ta yi.
41012016	Suokha kha vya cyi yite, “Ama hing ahung hmiechang hne ahung ming ma a cuo?” a ta yi. “Siepahruopa hmiechang hne ming,” ama ta.
41012017	Zingsuv ta, “Siepahruo huopa kha siepahruo ca pi ungla, Khazing huopa kha Khazing pi tie ung,” a ta yi. Zingsuv cunglie kha ama nang dyi a uo thluo.
41012018	Thiyna taata thupakhaanapa a zang lipa tie, Sadusi ming chekha Zingsuv'a luo a vaw yite,
41012019	“Saya, Moses ta malie a capepa siypa ca: ‘cawsaa pakha ta saata hnyi li pata a napuvnung kha a thiyse biephung kieca, a thiypa uvnupa khata a thiypa a uvnupa cuota saata sa riypata nunghlyinung kha aa hlaw aa,’ ta tah a cuo.
41012020	Uvcanu pasariy aw yite, a pakhanapapaa ca napuv chiy te saata hnyi li pata a thiy.
41012021	Cakhutaata a pahningnapapaa ta canungnung ca a hlaw te saata hnyi li pata a thiy ra. A pathungnapapaa zaw kha cahaa cata cuote,
41012022	ama pasariy chunglie pakha tahmuo saata hnyi li pata ama thiy diy. A hnangcawce ta canungnung zaw kha a thiy ra.
41012023	Thupakhaana ning thueta ahung napuv tama a cuo aa, ama pasariy yalya ta ama kha amaa hlaw diy,” ama ta.
41012024	Zingsuv ta, “Caapathepa cuose, Khazing cahrana cuose nama pachang lipa hingna nama paanapa ta a cuo cuo vama?
41012025	Athiypa tie pathu pakhaapa ama cuo thue ca avuoming haata cuo'a yite, a chiy a hie'a va tli yi, vuoruo lieta avuoming khiyna ama lu aa.
41012026	A thiypa tie thupakhaana kawlieta, Moses caa-uv chunglie ruohraw a kuonapa kawlie kha Khazing ta khaapama a ri tapa kha ri buo va ung cama? ‘Kama ca Abraham Khazing, Isak Khazing, Jakob Khazing tana i cuo a tapa kha.
41012027	Ama ca a hringpa tie Khazing cuote a thiypa tie Khazing cuo vyi. Nama paa karuv!” a ta yi.
41012028	Phungbie saya pakha ca a vaw te bie amaa ipa kha a thyi yi. Zingsuv ta ama bie hiehriypa a palie thesapa yi kha a hmung tiyta, “Nawbie palang hrawlie ta khaapa hingma a biepuv ce?” tapata a hiehriy.
41012029	Zingsuv ta, “A suokhanapa ca: ‘Israel ming zaw, Naa thlie tie ung! Abyipa ma Khazing pakha kyalya hingna Abyipa ta a cuo.
41012030	Abyipa na Khazing hing na pathiy na palung yalya, na hringna yalya, na ruena yalya hne na cahrana yalya ta due tie.’
41012031	A suohningna ca: ‘Nama hne nama naa duepa haata na ingpaa kha due tie,’ tapata a cuo. Capa nawbie suohning laa cata a le viepa suokha hmuo aw vyi,” a ta.
41012032	Phungbie sayapa ta Zingsuv kyihuo ta, “Naa hmuo, Saya! Na ripa ca aa hmuo, Ama dyi hingna a cuo, ama hlyitaw taata a hrangpa aw va tli.
41012033	Khazing hing ma pathiy ma palung yalya hne ma thesingna yalya hne ma cahrana yalya hne ma due riypa'a nata kiema maa due pahaata ma ingpaa ma due ra riypa hing sahring kha myi ta rue pata bienapa hne a hrangpa hriykhung a ri napa palang laata a pha vie” a ta.
41012034	Zingsuv ta hingpapaa biepaliena a pha zya a hmung tiyta, “Vuoruo pena hneta a hlasa vaciy,” a ta. Cakhutaataca Zingsuv bie hiehriy riypa kha ahungtahmuo a nguo va tli yi.
41012035	Zingsuv ta Biena-ing chunglie a pacuv ning yi kha, “Khaapanakawma phungbie saya tie ta Messiah ca David saacapaa tana a cuo, ama ta the?
41012036	Thlaapa Pathe ta David mamaa kha pari sa te, Abyipa ta i Byipaapa kha Na carie zaw i phyipazaa rawlie i chi hluo li yi I cacuo kuo luo hingta a tu tie, a ta.
41012037	David mamaapa ta ama kha, ‘Abyipa,’ a ta kieca tuokhaatama Messiah ca David Saacapaa ca a cuo the aa?” a ta. Cawsaazaapuv ta Zingsuv bie kha palung thusa pata naa ama thlie.
41012038	Zingsuv ta a pacuvna lie yi kha, “Phungbie saya tie kha a raaring tie ung. Chadawtluo lie kha ama buohryipasiypa hne a khie pata cawsaa ta pa-uvsathyina hne bie amaa chang riypa kha a tlechuopa tana ama cuo.
41012039	Apungna-ing thude phacepa lie hne pyi chung pa-uvsathyina hmang lie a tupa kha ama tlechuo.
41012040	Nunghlyi tie kha ning baa yite ama ing te kha ama chuv, ale luo taata mang a ngie riypata thlaa kha a syisa ta ama chuo. Malie laata a pasa viepa duotena na ama hmung aa,” a ta.
41012041	Zingsuv ca Biena-ing sue pathlana kielie kha a tu te, cawsaa zaw tuokaa ama pathlapa kha a mang. A hnyirungpa a hluvpuv ca tuokaa a hluvsa ama pathla.
41012042	A siypasapa nunghlyinung kha a vaw te thiyhringtuokaa piehning a pathla ra.
41012043	Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha ku yite a changpa yi ca, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: hing siypasanung nunghlyinung hingna malie laata tuokaa a hluv vie sue thingkaw luo a pasuo,” a ta yi.
41012044	Malie ca ama hnyi hlyipa khana ama pasuo, cuorasala hingpa nung hingca a siy a pasasa raalaa pata a hnyipa bangkhuo kha a pasuo, a hringna riypa khana a pi diy,” a ta.
41013001	Zingsuv ca Biena-ing taata a kya pya pata, ziytuv pakha ta, “Mang tie, Saya, Khatluv ta a lepa alung zaw'a nata ing ma a cuo!” a ta.
41013002	Zingsuv ta, “Hing ing lepa puv hing nama hmung cuo ma? Alung suokhata hing hmuota suokha cunglie a pathang li pata a cing diy aa” a ta.
41013003	Zingsuv ca Biena-ing a riechuo Oliv tluocung lie aa tu nguoluo ningta kha Piter, Jeim, Johan hne Andru ta a paruvta tah bie ama hiehriy.
41013004	“Malie chang tie, hingpa hmang hing khatiy thuema a tlung aa? Hingpa hmang bangkhuo a vya tlingna riypata khaapa pamangsana hmang zaw ma a vya cuo aa? ama ta.
41013005	Zingsuv ta, “A raaring tie ung, ahunghmuo a padung sakha ung.
41013006	Cawsaa hluvpuv kha i ming ta a vaw'a yite, Kama hingna Ama ta a cuo ang, ta'a yite cawsaa hluvpuv kha ama dung aa.
41013007	Rie a tuvna zaw, rie a tuvna thuo zaw nama thyi tiyta nama thlaa zang kha se. Cahaapa hmang ca a tlung thluo aa, cuorasala a chuona cuo na a tlung tli tana cuo vyi.
41013008	Mingphang phangkha hne phangkha amaa du aa, ruokha hne ruokha amaa du aa, ruo ting ta aling a siy'a te, cakuo a tlung aa. Hing hmang bangkhuo hing nu a zi hruothuna haatana a cuo.
41013009	Niema zaw hrahring hing a raaring tie ung. Zung luo aca chiykhyi'a yite apungna-ing lie kha aca tuv'a yi. Kama kawlieta uvthyi tie hne siepahruo tie hmielie kha a daa'a ung cate iema'a lie kha tehte nama cuo aa.
41013010	Cakhutaata mingphang bangkhuo kha thuophaabie changpa ama cuo taa aa.
41013011	Bie ripa riypata zung luo acaa chiy tiy yi ta tuokhaatama bie ima ri aa tapa kha nama palung rie thyi pacie kha se. Cuorasala capa cuo lieta aca pi thathiypa yi bie kha ri tie ung, tahematapakieca a ripa ca niema cuo va ungciy, Thlaapa Pathe tana a cuo.
41013012	Uvta hne nuta kha thiyna phana te ta a lyi'a yite, a paa ta a saa, saata zaw ta nung hne paa kha thiyna phana te ta ama lyi aa.
41013013	Niema kha kama ming kawlieta cawsaa bangkhuo ta aca hue'a yi. Cuorasala a chuona te ta a ang khupa ca khuo pata ama cuo aa.
41013014	“‘Ciy aa chiypa duvsamakhiepa’ a awna riypa a cuo lipa hmang lie a awpa kha na ma hmung tiyta, (Caa a rituv ta a ri khingnapa siyluo kha thyi the se) Judea ruo chunglie a awpa tie ca tluo luo kha a ruo yi se.
41013015	Ing cunglie a awpa ta chechiy suokha kha la riypata ing chung luo a ngie kha se.
41013016	Lu lie a awpa ta a buohryicungle la riypata ing luo kaa kha se.
41013017	Nu a phyapa canung hne haaseta a hnyipa canung cuota hing ningkhue hing khatluv tama ciy aa chiy aa!
41013018	Hingpa hmang hing thlasiy ningta a cuo li riypata thlaa chuo tie ung!
41013019	Hingpa ningkhue lie hing Khazing ta chuelyi a sa baataata ata ning te a tlung buo lipa hne a vya tlung buo li'apa ruvnaana a tlung aa.
41013020	Abyipa ta hingpa ningkhue hing a pachang sa vie lipa kieca ahunghmuota a bang'a vayi. Cuorasala a tlawpa zaw cuo khata ca ningkhue ca a pachang sa vie.
41013021	Cawsaa pakhakha ta niema kha, ‘Mang tie, Messiah ca lie hing a aw hing!’ a cuo li kie, ‘Mang tie lie hue a aw hue,’ aca ta zaw yi ta zang lie ungciy.
41013022	Messiah pakhipa tie hne profetpakhipa tie vya pya'a yite Khazing a tlaw ciepa tie kha hmuo a cuo khu kie a hmuo lipa luopuv luo a chiy riypata kharuehaa hmang hne pamangsana zaw ama tue aa.
41013023	A raaring tie ung. A cuo a vya chiy hluo ta zezaw bangkhuo kha ica chang pacie diy yi.
41013024	Capa ruvnaana ningkhue khutaa cata, ning ca zing'a te, thlaapa ca khe'a va tli.
41013025	Aasiy zaw avuo taata za tla'a yite, vuoruo lie cahrana ca aa cahang aa.
41013026	Cakhutaata Cawsaa Saacapaa ca amyi cung taakhiyta cahrana'a nata lesyina hneta a vya luo aa.
41013027	Chuelyi dena taata vuoruo dena, chuelyi kiy paliy taata a tlawpa tie zaw pahmya riypata a avuoming kha a pathlie'a yi.
41013028	Thyikuvkung taahingta a cuv riypa a la tie ung. A daw kya pakiy te a hnaa a kya thue tiyta cuovuo na a ngie tapa kha nama pachang.
41013029	Cahaa cata hingpa hmang zaw a vya tlungpa kha nama hmung tiyta ama ca thlake te a vya chiy tli tapa kha nama pachang aa.
41013030	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: hinglie ta a awpa cawsaa zaw hing hingpa hmang a vya cuo nate ta thiy'a vayi.
41013031	Vuoruo hne alyi ca ama li aa, cuorasala i bie ca li changchiy'a vyi.
41013032	“Cuorasala capa ning hne cuo kaw ca ahungtahmuo pachang vayi, vuoruo lie a awpa avuoming, a cuo li kie Saacapaa zaw ta pachang vayi, Paa pakha kyalya dyina a pachang.
41013033	Capa cuo ca khatiy tama a vaw aa tapa kha nama pachang li nakawta a raaring ungla singvaasa pata aw tie ung.
41013034	Capa ca cawsaa pakha kha khy tlaw riypata ing taata a tha tiyta a sii zaw kha ama cyicuo ta rehrie riypa a pi siy khu taayita, chiypakaa a huopapaa zaw kha a phasa pata huo riypata, bie a cung siypapaa hne tana aa lu.
41013035	Cacuonakawta a raaringsa pata aw tie ung tahematapakieca ing a hnyituvpapaa kha khatiy tama a vya chiy aa tapa pachang va ungciy, zuoluo a cuo li kie zuocang a cuo li kie aakhang ta, a cuo li kie mawdiy
41013036	a cuo li kie namaa hmung chung tama tlangkhy aca vya chiyhnue'a yi.
41013037	Ica changpa yi hing cawsaa bangkhuo zaw i chang ra yi, a raaring tie ung!”
41014001	Hingpa hing Lawsena pyi hne Thiynung phuv lipa Viechuo pyi hluo ta ninghningna lie khata a cuo. Tluobyi lepa tie hne phungbie saya tie ta Zingsuv kha a paruvta tah patuv riypa hne thie riypata khue ama khuo.
41014002	“Pyi chung hingta ca tue'a va ungpuv, cawsaa zaw na hnaa a pahnaw sue'a yi,” ama ta.
41014003	Zingsuv ca Bethani khypa Simon, caahminghmaa ta a pasapapaa ing lie a aw ning kha canungnung pakha a vaw te alabaster ungthyi zungkha ta a muo ruv ciemuopa ziyhmyi kha vya cyi te capa ungthyi ca a tuvchi khu taata ziyhmyi kha Zingsuv luv lie a bya.
41014004	Capa lie a awpa cawsaa chekha ta hihaasa pata pakha hne pakha kha, “Capa ziyhmyi puohrie ryarya ca!
41014005	Denarii zathung laata a hluv vie ta zaa khu riypa puv! Zaa sala a siypasapa tie kha bya yi sala pha vie vama?” ta yite cawsaanung kha khuopuv ta ama mawchie.
41014006	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Amata tah aw se! Khaapanakawma nama pataw nama pahrie? Kama cuota a phasapa hne a puvthesapa re na a hrie.
41014007	Siypasa tie ca nama aw hne pari aa, namaa bya khing ning namaa bya khu pari aa, cuorasala kama ca cipari ta na aw hne'a va ungciy.
41014008	Hingpa nung hingta a tue khupa kha a tue mangtli; paby na cuo a pha hluo ta i pangpa kha ziyhmyi bya te a tingtuo mangtli.
41014009	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: chuelyi khy ting Thuophaabie ama changnapa bangkhuo lie hingpa nung a tuepa hmang hing ama maw lina pata ama rile pari aa,” a ta.
41014010	Ziytuv hlyihning lie pakha a cuopa Judas Iskariot ca Zingsuv lyi riypata tluobyilepa tie'a luo kha a vaa.
41014011	A ripa kha ama thyi pahne ta ama palung tluosa te tuokaa pi riypata bie ama kuo. Cacuonakawta Zingsuv lyi riypata aa raw cepa cuo kha a bya.
41014012	Thiynung phuv lipa Viechuo pyi a ning kha ning, Lawsena pyi saduona cuota tuvtaata ama thie ning kha, ziytuv tie ta Zingsuv kha, “Lawsena pyi saduonapa cuota khaapa lie va tingtuo yi se tapa ma malie na khing? ama ta.
41014013	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie pahning kha pathlie yite hinghaahingta bie a cuung yi: “Khypuv chung luo kha vaa ungla bi ta tiy a vya phyalepapaa kha namaa taw aa.
41014014	Capapaa ca paziyle ungla a vaa ngienapa ing a hnyituvpapaa kha, “Saya na, khaapa khuo hingma naa ziytuv tie hneta Lawsena pyi sa ma ningna riypata a cuo? a ta, va ta tie ung,” a ta yi.
41014015	Ama ta a cung duo ingkhuo kusapa, chechiy tlingsa pata ama pachie ciepa khuo kha aca pahmung'a yi. Capa lieca zuosa dungpakhawnapa ca va pachie tie ung,” a ta yi.
41014016	Cacuonakawta ziytuv tie ca khypuv chung luo kha vaa yite, Zingsuv ta a changpa dadang haakhata va hmung yite, capa lieca Lawsena pyi zuosa kha ama pachie.
41014017	Zuoluo ca ziytuv tie hne khata Zingsuv ca amaa vaw.
41014018	Cabya lie a tu yite sa ama ning nguoluo ning kha, Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi, niema hrawlie pakha, kama hne sa a ning hnepa ta ina lyi'a ungciy,” a ta yi.
41014019	Ziytuv tie ca ama ngie chi te pakha hnang pakha ta ama kha, “Kama taca cuo va ang nuo?” ta yite ama hie hriy.
41014020	Zingsuv ta, “Niema hlyihning hrawlie ta pakha, kama hne lapakhue khuekha a caphaw hnepa tana a cuo.
41014021	Cawsaa Saacapaa ca Caapathepa lie a ripa haata a thiy aa; cuorasala Cawsaa Saacapaa a lyituvpapaa ca khatluv ta aping a suvpa ma a cuo aa! Puv li pata aw hriy sala a cuota a pha vie aa! a ta.
41014022	Sa ama ning nguoluo ning kha Zingsuv ta viechuo tluokha kha la te thlaa chuo te alawna bie a hluo khu taata, chechi te a ziytuv tie kha a pi yi. “Ning tie ung,” “I pangpa tana a cuo” a ta yi.
41014023	Cakhutaata panuo zaw kha la te, Khazing'a luo kha alawna bie a hluo khu taata iema kha pi yite ama palang ta ama dang.
41014024	Ama ta, “Hingpa hing biekuona thiyse, cawsaa zaapuv cuota i lyipa i thiy tana a cuo.
41014025	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Khazing Pena chunglie mingsuv thaapa i dang hluo li hing mingsuv hing dang pakhaa'a va tli ang,” a ta.
41014026	Hlaa ama sapuo pata Oliv tluocung luo kha ama kie.
41014027	Capa lieca Zingsuv ta, “Nama bangkhuo hingta inaa ruose diy'a ungciy, tahematapakieca Caapathepa chunglie, ‘Tuvkhietuv kha tuvsa'a ang te tuv zaw ca chepatlaa pata ama cuo aa,’ a ta.
41014028	Cuorasala pathu pakhaapa i cuo khu taata nama hmie luo khata Galilee luo i si aa,’ a ta.
41014029	Piter ta, “Iema bangkhuo acaa ruose zaw yi ta kama ca caa ruose buo hluo'a va ang,” a ta.
41014030	Zingsuv ta Piter kha, “Biehmisi tana ica chang: Ata ning, ata zuo hrahring, aa yi hning a khang hluo ta, yi thung te, ina thaw'a ciy,” a ta.
41014031	Cuorasala Piter ta a cusa pata a ripa ca, “Nama hne thiy riypa hmuo cuose angla ca thaw'a va ang a ta. Ama bangkhuo ta cahaa cata ama ta ra.
41014032	Gethsemane ama tapa hmang luo kha a vaw yite Zingsuv ta, “Thlaa i chuo chung hinglie hing zaa tu tie ung,” a ta yi.
41014033	Piter, Jeim hne Johan kha a chiyle yi. Nangping vuosuona hneta bi te,
41014034	iema kha, “I palung riethyi tuv napa ta i thiy tyalya, lie hing za aw ungla zaa hmung khya ung, a ta yi.
41014035	A cawta va cakuo vie te alyi lie kha a bu te, a cuo khu kieca ruvnaanapa cuo chung taata a law khuna riypata thlaa a chuo.
41014036	“Abba , I paa! Na cuota ca khaapa bangkhuo a cuo khu diy. Hing panuo hing kama'a taata la tie; cuorasala kama khingna haata cuo li pata nama khingna haata cuo thluo se,” a ta.
41014037	Vya kaa te amaa zaa hmungpa kha a hmung yi ca; Piter kyihuo khata, “Simon naa hmung ma? Siymaluo pakha chuo a hra khu va cama?
41014038	“A hra ungla, pasupaliyna chung luo nama tla li riypata thlaa chuo tie ung. Pathiypalung ta a khing raalaa zaw ta saapa na a thaa a dyasa,” a ta.
41014039	Zingsuv ca vaa pakhaa te a chuo ciepa haakhata thlaa a chuo pakhaa.
41014040	Cakhutaata a vya kaa ca ziytuv tie amaa hmung pakha a hmung pakhaa yi; ama ming hehmuo haw khu lipa yi ta tuokhaatama ma chaw aa tapa zaw pachang vayi.
41014041	A yi thungnapa a vya kaa taata iema kha, “A hmung ung cate ma namaa pahy nguoluo kalie? Ade buo se! A cuo na a tling tli! Mang tie ung, Cawsaa Saacapaa ca a suepa tie kuv chung luo pipa tana a cuo tli.
41014042	Thu tie ung! cakuo'a ungpuv. Mang tie ung hing, kama naa lyipapaa ca a vya chiy tli hing,” a ta.
41014043	Zingsuv ta bie a ri nguoluo ningta kha ziytuv hlyihning chunglie pakha ta a cuopa Judas kha tlangkhy a vya chiy. Ama hneta tluobyilepa tie, phungbie saya tie hne uvthyi tie'a taata pathliepa, zueziy hne tungbung a cyipa cawsaazaapuv kha ama vya chiy ra.
41014044	A lyituvpapaa ta zaapuv kha pamangsana pi yite: “I pahnuopapaa hingna nama patuv khingpapaa ta a cuo aa. Patuv ungla a phata tah kingkaa ungla sikhyi tie ung,” a ta yi.
41014045	Cacuonakawta Judas ca a vya chiy tiyta, Zingsuv'a luo kha vaa paluo te, “Saya!” ta te a pahnuo.
41014046	Zingsuv ca patuv yite ama cakhiy.
41014047	Cuorasala a thaalie a daapa tie chung taa pakha ta a zueziy kha a phie te tluobyi lepa sii kha aa ce ca, a naacakue kha a sa pathla.
41014048	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Zueziy hne tungbung a vya cyi ung cate ma kama ca damie haata patuv riypata namaa vaw?
41014049	A ning tating ta biena-ing lie ca pacuv yi ang te niema hne i aw pata na patuv va ungciy. Cuorasala Caapathepa bie ca tling thluo se,” a ta yi.
41014050	Ziytuv tie bangkhuo ca Zingsuv kha thuse yite amaa ruo.
41014051	Satlie pakha, pawruo pangta dyi a buvpapaa khata Zingsuv ca dya a ziyle.
41014052	Ama kha patuv amaa nang nakawta a pang kha thuse te a cahri pata a ruo.
41014053	Zingsuv ca tluobyilecepa ing luo kha a chiy yite capa lie ca tluobyilepa bangkhuo, uvthyi tie hne phungbie saya tie ca amaa zaa hmya.
41014054	Piter ca aa hlapuv taakhata dya ziyle yite tluobyilecepa ahmie luo kha a ngie ra. Rieka tie'a lie kha a tu te myi a e ra.
41014055	Tluobyilepa tie hne uvtuv byi tie bangkhuo ta Zingsuv kha thie khu riypata a suenapa kha hmung amaa zue, cuorasala suokha hmuo hmung khu vayi.
41014056	Tehte hluvpuv ta Zingsuv kawlie kha hangbie ama ri, cuorasala ama bie kha a saw vyi.
41014057	Cawsaa chekha a vya daa yite ama a du pata hangbie ama ri.
41014058	“Cawsaa kuv ta sapa hing Biena-ing hing pacing diy'a ang te ningthung chung ta cawsaa kuv ta sa lipa biena-ing i sa pakhaa aa, a tapa na ma thyi,” ama ta.
41014059	Cuorasala capa lie ca hmuo ama bie a saw ngiethie vyi.
41014060	Cakhutaata tluobyilecepa ta iema hmie lie kha a daa te Zingsuv kha bie a hiehriy. “Palie riypa hnyi va cama? Sue aca phawpa yi ca tuokhaata?” a ta.
41014061	Cuorasala Zingsuv ca a dieta tah aw te palie vyi. Tluobyilecepa cata bie ca hiehriy pakhaa te, “Thluechiypa Khazing Saacapaa Messiah cata na cuo ma? a ta.
41014062	Zingsuv ta, “I cuo, ‘Cawsaa Saacapaa ca Cahrana cacuo luo kuo ta a tupa kha hmung'a ung cate,’ vuoruo amyi hneta aa zuvpa kha nama hmung aa,” a ta yi.
41014063	Tluobyilecepa ta a pang kha thlaa te, “Pachangkhyituv hrangpa a hu va tli puv!
41014064	Khazing a duna bie a ripa ca nama thyi. Tuokhaatama nama rue? a ta yi. Iema bangkhuo ta ama ca thiy tluo aa tla tapata sue ama phaw
41014065	Iema chunglie chekha ta Zingsuv kha ama paciy ta ama pacha, a ming kha pahruv yite ama tuv. “Ahungma caa tuv, ri pachiy tie,” ama ta. Rievetuv tie zaw ta sikhyi yite ama tuv puole.
41014066	Piter ca ahmie lie a aw nguoluopa khata tluobyilecepa changtaapa nung pakha ta a thaa luo kha aa vaw.
41014067	Piter myi aa e nguoluo pakha a hmung tiyta, ama kha mangpuo te, “Nama zaw hing Nazarethpa Zingsuv hne a zaa aw pakhawpa tana na cuo,” a ta.
41014068	Cuorasala Piter ta a sie te, “Khaapama na ri tapa hing pachang va ang,” ta te a hmiedaw luo kha a pya. Cakhupatahne ta aa a khang.
41014069	Changtaapa nung cata capa lie kha hmung te a thaalie a awpa tie kyihuo khata, “Hingpapaa hing iema chung taata pakha tana a cuo!” a ta pakhaa.
41014070	Cuorasala Piter ta aa sie pakhaa. A cawta a aw pata a thaa lie a awpa tie ta, “Iema hraw taata pakha tana na cuo hrahring, tahematapakieca Galilee ming tana na cuo,” ama ta.
41014071	Cuorasala chie a sa te bie aa kuo khu taata, “A kaw nama ri nguoluopapaa hing pachang va ang,” a ta yi.
41014072	Cakhupatahne a yi hningnapa aa a khang. Zingsuv ta, “Aa yi hning a khang hluo ta yi thung ina thaw'a ciy,” a tapa bie kha Piter ca a thyi pakhaa te khuopuv ta a caa.
41015001	Mawdiychie ta tluobyilepa tie ca uvthyi tie, phungbie saya tie hne uvtuv byi tie palang kha a catlisa pata a taw yite khue ama khuo. Zingsuv ca cakhiy yite a dale yite Pilat kuv luo kha ama pi.
41015002	Pilat ta, “Judah ming siepahruo ta na cuo ma?” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “Na ripa haata i cuo,” a ta.
41015003	Tluobyilepa tie ta Zingsuv kha sue a hluvsa ama phaw.
41015004	Pilat ta, “Palie riypa hnyi va cama? Khatluv tama sue aca phaw yi tapa hing mang tie,” a ta pakhaa.
41015005	Zingsuv ta khaahmuo ri ngiethie va laa te Pilat ca a nang ta a uo.
41015006	Lawsena pyi kyry ta Pilat ta thaw a tlapa tie chung taata zaapuv ta ama hiepa pakha kha a pathliepa taw yi.
41015007	Capa cuo ning ca Barabbas ama tapa, rie thu ningta cawsaa zaa thiepapaa ca rie a thu rapa a hrangpa tie hne khata thaw ama tla.
41015008	Cacuonakawta cawsaazaapuv ca a vya hmya yite Pilat kha iema cuota a tue tawpa haata tue riypata amaa hie.
41015009	Pilat ta, “Judah siepahruopa hing ca pathliepa yi ang sala nama khing'a ma? a ta yi.
41015010	Tluobyilepa tie ta a kuv chung luo Zingsuv ama vya pipa hing i-aw ama hnyi nakawtana a cuo tapa kha Pilat ta a phasa pata a pachang.
41015011	Cuorasala tluobyilepa tie khata cawsaazaapuv kha Barabbas papya hriy riypata Pilat luo hie riypa kha ama pasu.
41015012	Pilat ta cawsaazaapuv kha, “Cacuokie Judah siepahruopa nama tapapaa hing tuokhaata tue se tapa ma ina khing ungciy? a ta.
41015013	Iema ta, “Vieluo lie thie tie!” tapata khuopuv ta ama khi.
41015014	Pilat ta, “Khaapanakawma? Khaapa suena ma a tue? a ta yi. Cuorasala, “Vieluo lie thie tie!” ta yite khuo vie ta ama khi.
41015015	Pilat ta cawsaazaapuv palung kha a patling khing nakawta Barabbas kha a pathliepa yi. Zingsuv ca sungpe ta a chi khu taata vieluo lie thie riypata a pi yi.
41015016	Rieka tie ta Zingsuv ca muokiy byipa ahmie luo kha a ngiekhyi yite ama rieka phuv viesaa bangkhuo kha ama u ra.
41015017	Zingsuv ca pangsepa kha pabuv yite ahling ta lakhuv kha phie yite a luv lie ama pakhuv.
41015018	Saluo pi yite, “Judah siepahruopa na chuo syi mangsue!” ama ta.
41015019	Asung ta a luv lie kha chi yite, ama paciy ta ama pacha, a hmiekunglie ama pakhuv pane yite amaa bie.
41015020	Ama tue hyalya khu taata a pang sepa kha hlepa yite ama a caw kha ama pahryi pakhaa. Cakhutaata vieluo lie thie riypata ama sikhyi.
41015021	Khyta taata khypuv luo a vaw te amaa thaa lie a vya cakuolepa, Sairin khy ming, Alekzandar hne Rufas paa, Simon kha hruohra pata hripuo yite Zingsuv vieluo ca ama papuv sa.
41015022	Zingsuv ca Golgotha ama tapa hmang luo kha ama phakhyi (Golgotha a siyluo ca luvruv hmang tanapa tana a cuo).
41015023	Capa hmang lieca mura hne ama pyapa mingsuv tiy kha pi yite dang khing vyi.
41015024	Cakhutaata ama ca vieluo lie kha thie yite, a caw kha vyisung a da yite amaa re.
41015025	Vieluo lie ama thiena cuo ca maw siymaluo pacaky cuo lieta a cuo.
41015026	Ama sue ama phawnapa caa ca, “Judah Siepahruo,” ta tah a cuo.
41015027	Damie tie pahning kha Zingsuv cacuo luota pakha, a cavyi luota pakha vieluo lie ama taa ra.
41015028	(Cahaa cata Caapathepa ta, “A suepa zaw hrawlie ripuopa ta a cuo,” a tapa ca a tling.)
41015029	Luo lie a vya cakuolepa tie ta ama pahnyisue, ama luv chysue yite, “Biena-ing kha pacing diy pata ningthung ta palang a tingpapaa,
41015030	nama hne nama kha a khuo la vieluo cung taa kha za cung tienie!” ama ta.
41015031	Cahaa cata tluobyilepa tie hne phungbie saya tie zaw ta Zingsuv kha pahnyisue yite, “Malie dyi khuo yite, ama hne ama ca a khuo khu vyi.
41015032	Israel ming siepahruo Messiah ca ata hing ta vieluo cung taata za cung sala muo, hmung'a pate ma zang'a ta, amaa ta. Vieluo lie ama taa rapa pahning tie zaw khata ama pahnyisue ra.
41015033	Ningchungkhingkhuo taata zuoluo siymaluo pathung te alyicung kaakaapa ta zingna a tlung.
41015034	Zuoluo siymaluo pathung lie kha Zingsuv ca, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabakthani? ta te khuopuv ta a khi, a siyluo ca, “I Khazing, I Khazing, khaapanakawma ina thaw ciy,” tanata a cuo.
41015035	A thaa lie a daapa chekha ta thyi yite, “Naathlie tie ung, Elijah na a u,” ama ta.
41015036	Cawsaa pakhapapaa ca a ruothaw te pangcaw kha mingsuv tiy thuepa lie a naw khutaa, aarasung daw lie kha ciypuo te Zingsuv hmya lie kha a kya tuv. “Huo pachiy ung, ama kha vieluo cung taata pachung riypata Elijah ca a za cung ma tapa kha mang pachiy'a ungpuv,” a ta.
41015037	Zingsuv ca khuopuv ta khi te a huv a ci.
41015038	Biena-ing chunglie ama pangzu ca a luv taata a lie te chehning ta aa che.
41015039	A hmiepachaw pata a daapa riebyipapaa ta Zingsuv a thiyna zya kha a hmung tiyta, “Ama paa hing Khazing Saacapaa hmisi tana a cuo,” a ta.
41015040	Capa lieca luohlaa taata a suopa canung chekha zaw ama aw. Iema hrawlie ca Mary Magdalin, Jeim a syi viepa hne Joses ama nung Mary hne Salome zaw ama aw ra.
41015041	Zingsuv Galilee lie a aw ning kha za ziy yite zaa mangsang tawpa ama cuo. Jerusalem taata a khawpa a hrangpa canung a hluvpuv zaw capa lieca ama aw ra.
41015042	Sabbath hluo ta ningkhanapa, a tingdawna ning zuoluo a vya chiy tiyta,
41015043	bierituv uvthyi zaw hrawlie ta ama pa-uvsathyipa pakha, Khazing penapa a za tlung riypa a huo nguoluo papaa, Arimathea khypa Josef ca riephasa pata Pilat kha a ngie chiy te Zingsuv riy kha a hie.
41015044	Pilat ca Zingsuv a thiy tli tapa kha a thyi tiyta khuopuv ta a kharue haa te, riebyipa kha u te a thiyna taata a syi tli ma tapata a hiehriy.
41015045	Riebyipa'a taata a thiy tli tapa bie a thyi khu taata Josef ca a riy kha a pi.
41015046	Josef ta pawruo pang zungkha calyi te a riy kha pachung te a pahlaw khu taata alung ama ryipa thluo chunglie kha a paby. Cakhutaata lungkhaakhuv ta thluokhuepakaa ca a khaa siy pakhaa.
41015047	Mary Magdalin hne Joses nung Mary ta khaapalie ma ama paby tapa kha ama hmung.
41016001	Sabbath ning a chuo khu taata, Mary Magdalin, Jeim nung Mary hne Salome ca Zingsuv riy thuv riypata ziyhmyi kha ama calyi.
41016002	Ningzaa zaakha a ningkhanapa mawdiy ta thluo luo kha ama vaa.
41016003	Luopuv lieta pakha hne pakha kha, “Thluo khaakhuvlung kha ahungma malie a hnyipa aa?” amaa ta.
41016004	Ama mang ca thluo khaakhuvlung a lesapa ca a zaa hnyi tlipa kha ama hmung.
41016005	Thluo chung luo ama vaa ngie ca pangruopa a buvpa satlie pakha cacuo luo kuo ta aa tupa kha hmung yite amaa pahlusa.
41016006	Cuorasala ama ta, “Ciy kha ung, vieluo lie ama taapa Nazareth khypa Zingsuv na nama huv cuo vama? Ama ca lie hing aw va tli, a thupakhaa tli! Mang tie ung, ama chinapa hmang hing.
41016007	Cakuo ungla hing thuohlaa hing ziytuv tie hne Piter kha va chang tie ung; Ama ca, aca changlupa haa yi khata Galilee luo na a silu tli, capalie cana nama va hmung aa,” a ta yi.
41016008	Cacuonakaw pya yite thluo taakhata amaa ruo, ciysa yite ama nang dyi a uo nakawta ahung kha hmuota khaapahmuo chang vayi. [Iema'a luo ama changpa bangkhuo kha Piter hne a viesaa zaw kha a pachangta tah ama va chang. Cakhutaata Zingsuv ama hrahring khata a pathepa hne chuozaa hringna thuophaabie ca ziytuv tie hmuopa ta ningchiy taata ningtla te a pathyi sa. ]
41016009	(Zaakha lie a ningkhanapa ning mawdiy ta a thupakhaa khu taata Zingsuv ca khuevuo pasariy a papya napa nung, Mary Magdalin'a lie kha aa luo taa.
41016010	Mary Magdalin ca vaa te ama hne zaa aw hnepa tie kha ama ngiechisa pata ama caa nguoluo ning kha a va chang yi.
41016011	Cuorasala Zingsuv ca a hringpa ta aw te i hmung ne a tapa kha iema ta zang vayi.
41016012	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca ziytuv tie pahning khyta luo ama tlaw na lie kha a phang hrang ta aa luo.
41016013	Kaa yite a hrangpa tie kha ama chang, cuorasala zang vayi.
41016014	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca ziytuv hlyihning tie cabya lie amaa tu nguoluopa khata a luo te; zangna ama hnyi li nakaw hne ama palung a le tuv nakawlie kha a mawchie yi.
41016015	Cakhutaata iema kha, “Chuelyicung yalya khata si ungla sapa bangkhuo kha thuophaabie va chang tie ung.
