41016016	Zang te tiy a nawpa ahunghmuo khuopa a cuo aa, a zang lipa ca sue phaw pata a cuo aa.
41016017	A zangpa tie ca hingpa pamangsana hmang hing ama tue khu aa: i ming ta khuevuo ama papya aa, ryithaapa kha ama cyi aa;
41016018	ama kuv ta pariy kha patuv'a yite, thiysiy ama dang zaw ta tuokhaahmuo ta'a vayi; a pasapa cunglie ama kuv khang'a yite ama tluo aa,” a ta yi.
41016019	Abyi Zingsuv ca iema hne bie a ri khu taata vuoruo luo kha calang pata cuote Khazing cacuo luo khata aa tu.
41016020	Ziytuv tie ca si yite ruo ting luo kha thuophaabie ama phu; Abyipa ca iema hneta re a hrie nakawta ama phupa thuophaabie kha pamangsana hmang ta a pacu sale. )
42001001	Cawsaa hluvpuv ta kiema hraw lieta a zaa cuopa hmang kaw kha a phace pata cape a maa zaa zue.
42001002	A hruothu ningta ming ta zaa hmungpa tie malie ama changpa hne hing bie zaa phutuv tie ta kiema malie ama changsiypa haata ama cape.
42001003	Kama zaw hing hmang bangkhuo hing a hruothu taata a phasa pata i khieluo diy khu taata,
42001004	aca chang ciepa yi hne a patuv pata hmang dangpa bangkhuo kha a tlingsapa hne a hmuosapa ta na pachang riypata, hingpa caa hing na cuota suokha hnang suokha, aa paziy pata cape ra riypata bie i chi.
42001005	Herod kha Judea ruo lie siepahruo a cuo ningta, Abijah tluobyi phang a cuo rapa tluobyi Zekhariah a za aw. A napuvnung ca Aaron ciypathla ta cuote a ming ca Elizabeth ta a cuo.
42001006	Ama pahning ta Khazing minghmung lie aa dangpa cuo yite Abyipa phungbie hne nawpipa bangkhuo chunglie risie riypa aw li pata ama hring.
42001007	Cuorasala saata hnyi khu vayi, tahematapakieca Elizabeth kha cing te, ama pahning ta ama nungpuv ama macuo mangtli.
42001008	Luo kha ca ama re hrie cuo tling te Zekhariah ca a phuv zaw hne khata Khazing hmielie kha tluobyi re a hrie.
42001009	Tluobyi tie ama ziypa phung haata Abyipa hmangpathepa chung luo a ngie pata, bienatluophie cunglie rangpa-uepa rue riypata vyisung a da yite amaa tlaw.
42001010	Rangpa-uepa rue cuo ning ca cawsaa bangkhuo ca ale lie a daa yite thlaa ama chuo nguoluo.
42001011	Cakhutaata, ama'a luo kha Abyipa avuoming pakha zaa luo te rangpa-uepa ruenapa cacuo luo kuo khata a daa.
42001012	Zekhariah ta a hmung ca a ciy hringhruo.
42001013	Cuorasala avuoming khata, “Ciy kha, Zekhariah! Khazing ta na thlaachuona ca thyi te na napuvnung Elizabeth ta saacapaa aca sapa aa. A ming ca Johan nama ta aa.
42001014	Ama puvna kawlie nama palung a tluo hringhruo aa, cawsaa hrangpa hluvpuv zaw ta ama palung a ca tluo khyi'a yi.
42001015	Ama ca Abyipa hmungna lie cawsaa lepa a cuo aa. Mingsuv tiy cuose, sahmaa hne zuvre cuose, khaahmuo dang'a vyi. A za puv hluo taata Thlaapa Pathe hneta bi'a te,
42001016	Israel ming hluvpuv kha ama Byipaapa ama Khazing'a luo a vya kaa khyi'a yi.
42001017	Ama ca Profet Elijah haata a cahrapa hne hmang a tue khupa ta a cuo aa. Nungpaa zaw pathiypalung kha saata zaw'a luo maa'a yite, ri a ngie lipa tie kha cawsaa phapa tie ruena pahnyi sa pakhaa riypa hne, Abyipa cawsaa zaw kha a cuota ting pacie pata chi riypata, Abyipa hmie luo kha a silu aa.
42001018	Zekhariah ta avuoming kha, “Na ripa haata a cuo aa tapa kha tuokhaatama i pachang aa? Kama hing macuo tli ang te i napuvnung zaw a nungpuvsa tli,” a ta.
42001019	Avuoming ta, “Kama hing Gabriel tana i cuo. Khazing hmiekunglie a daa paripa cuo ang te ama ta hing thuophaa hing chang riypata nama'a luo ina za pathlie.
42001020	Cuorasala a ning hne a cuo a pha thueta a vya tling riypa i bie na zang li nakaw hingta, capa hmang a vya tlingna te, na ueryi chiy li pata, bie ri khu'a vaciy,” a ta.
42001021	Capa chung bangkhuo ca zaapuv ca Zekhariah kha huo yite, hmangpathepa chunglie cacuo nanaa a rupa kha ama kharue a haa.
42001022	A kya pya tiyta a chaw the li tli nakaw yi ta hmangpathepa chungliena muocuo suokhakha a hmung tapa kha ama pachang. A kuv a phyi dyi ta paluo sa te bie ri khu vyi.
42001023	A re hrie riypa a chuo taata ing luo kha a cakuo.
42001024	Cakhutaata a napuvnung Elizabeth ca nu kha phya te thla pangaa chung ale luo pya li pata a aw.
42001025	Elizabeth ta, “Abyipa ta tlechuona hne na za mang te i cawsaa zaw hrawlie nangzaana i za angpa kha ina lapa tli,” a ta.
42001026	A thla caruv napa chunglie kha Khazing ta avuoming Gabriel kha Galilee ruo Nazareth khy lie a awpa,
42001027	David ciypathla Josef hneta a chiyhie riypata biekuona a hnyi tlipa lesaapathenung'a luo kha a za pathlie. Capa lesaapathenung ming ca Mary ta a cuo.
42001028	Avuoming ca ama'a luo kha a zuv te, “Abyipa duena a hmung nung! Na cunglie thluechiy aw mangsue, Abyipa ca nama'a liena a aw” a ta.
42001029	Mary ca avuoming bie khata khuopuv ta a palung patawpamuo te hing bie a changna hing tuokhaapa bie a changna tama a cuo tapata a siyluo kha a rue.
42001030	Avuoming ta, “Mary, Ciykha, Khazing na vi caa hnyi.
42001031	Nu phya'a cate, saacapaa hnyi'a cate a ming ca Zingsuv tapata na sa aa.
42001032	Ama ca cawsaa lesyipa cuo'a te, Asuocepa Khazing Saacapaa ama ta aa. Abyipa Khazing ta a mingpa David thude kha a pi aa.
42001033	Jakob ciypathla zaw cunglie kha chuozaa ta siepahruo cuo'a te, a penapa ca chuo buo'a vyi,” a ta.
42001034	Mary ta avuoming kha, “Kama ca lesaapathenung tana i cuo. Tuokhaatama cahaa cata a cuo the aa?” a ta.
42001035	Avuoming ta, “Thlaapa Pathe ca na cunglie za aw'a te Khazing cahrana ca na cunglie a za tlung aa. Cacuonakawta zaa puvpa saacapaa ca a pathepa cuo'a te, Khazing Saacapaa tapata a cuo aa.
42001036	Ata zaw hing nama tieriy ta a cuopa, a cing nung ama tapa Elizabeth ca a nungpuv tli pata saacapaa kha phya te thla caruv a ta tli.
42001037	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta a tue khu lipa khaapahmuo aw vyi,” a ta.
42001038	Mary ta, “Kama ca Khazing changtaanung tana i cuo, na ripa haata i cunglie tlung thluo se,” a ta. Cakhutaa avuoming ta a thuse.
42001039	Capa chung cata Mary ca a tha te tluocung lie a awpa Judah khy khykha luo kha a pahraasa pata a si.
42001040	Zekhariah ing luo kha a ngie te Elizabeth kha bie aa chang.
42001041	Mary ta Elizabeth bie aa changpa kha Elizabeth ta a thyi pahne ta a riy chunglie a awpa nu ca a cathlu. Elizabeth ca Thlaapa Pathe ta bi te, khuopuv ta u te,
42001042	“Nama ca canung bangkhuo hrawlie thluechiycenung tana na cuo, na hnyi riypa haatiy zaw hing thluechiypa tana a cuo!
42001043	Khaapanakawma hingpa hmang hing i cunglie tlung te, i Byipaapa nung ta ina vya parie?
42001044	Nama bie inaa changpa i thyipa hneta i chunglie nu ca palungtluona hne a cathlu.
42001045	Abyipa ta ama'a luo a changpa bie hing a cunglie a tling hrahring aa tapata a zang nung ca khatluv ta thluechiypa tama a cuo!” a ta.
42001046	Mary ta, I pathiypalung ta Abyipa a pathuosa;
42001047	I hringna ca naa Khuotuv Khazing cunglie aa law,
42001048	Ri tluo lipa a changtaanung hing, ama ta inaa thyi pari! Ata ning taahingta chuo bangkhuo ta thluechiynung ina ta'a yi,
42001049	A cahracepa Khazing ta i cunglie hmanglepuv a tue mangtli. A ming ca a pathe;
42001050	Chuokha hnang chuokha ta Ama a ciyzaapa tie cunglie, a nangduena a paluosa.
42001051	Ama ta a buo kha pazuu te a hruo a tlepa tie kha ama khuekhuona hne a chepatlaa diy yi.
42001052	A cahrasapa siepahruo tie kha amaa byithude taa pacung yite, Nutaapa tie kha a calang yi.
42001053	Ama nang a diypa tie kha hmangphapa ta ama riy pabi yite, a hnyirungpa tie kha kuv cahripa ta a padiy sa yi.
42001054	A nangduena a thyi pakhaana ta, a changtaapa Israel kha aa bya tli.
42001055	Mingchingmingvuo tie'a lie hne Abraham'a lie hne a ciypathla tie cunglie chuozaa cuota bie aa kuopa haata.
42001056	Mary ca Elizabeth'a lie kha thlathung tluv a aw khu taata ing luo a kaa.
42001057	Elizabeth ca a ningthlaa vya tling te saacapaa a sa.
42001058	Abyipa na nang a due hringhruo tapa kha a ingpaa hne a tieriy zaw ta ama thyi tiyta ama palung a tluokhyi hringhruo.
42001059	A ningcarinapa lieta haatiy kha vangdaw te riypata a vawkhyi yite, a paa ming la pata, Zekhariah tapata ming paphya amaa ting.
42001060	Cuorasala a nung ta, “Cuo vyi, ama ca Johan tapata na kupa a cuo aa,” a ta.
42001061	Iema ta, “Niema phang chunglie cahaapaapa ming a phyapa pakha hmuo aw va ungciy,” ama ta.
42001062	Cakhutaata a paa kha ama kuv ta pahmungsana tue yite, haatiy ming tuokhaatama a paphya khing tapa kha ama hiehriy.
42001063	Zekhariah ta caahnaa kha a hie yite, “A ming ca Johan tana a cuo,” tapata a cape. Ama bangkhuo ta ama kharue a haasa.
42001064	Cakhupatahne Zekhariah ca bie ri khu pakhaa te Khazing kha a pathuosa.
42001065	Ama ingpaa zaw ca ama thlaa zangsa te, capa thuo ca Judea pe tluocung ruo bangkhuo kha a pathuo.
42001066	Capa thuo a thyipa bangkhuo ta pacuo syalya yite, “Capa haatiypa ca khaama a vya lu syalya aa?” ama ta. Tahematapakieca Abyipa cahrana ca a cunglie a aw.
42001067	Johan paa Zekhariah ca Thlaapa Pathe ta bi te hingpa profet-biephu hing a ri:
42001068	Israel Khazing, Abyipa cunglie thluechiy aw mangsue! A cawsaa zaw kha tlechuona hne mang yite a khuo yi.
42001069	Ma cuota a cahrapa Khuotuv kha, A changtaapa David ciypathla chung taata malie a pi. Ma cariepa tie hne malie a huepa tie kuv chung taata kiema khuo riypata, hluoning a pathepa profet tie palyipakaa taata bie a ri.
42001072	Mingchingmingvuo tie'a lie bie kuo ciepa nangduena kha pahmung sa yite, Iema cunglie a tuepa a pathepa a biekuona ca aa thyi. Mingpa Abraham kha, ma cariepa tie kuv taata palaw sa riypa hne, ciy li pata a re ma hriena riypa kha chiesana hne bie a kuo. Ma carie kuv chung taata khuo ciepa tie ta;
42001075	ma hring chung bangkhuo, a hmiekunglie a dangna hne pathena ta a re ma hrie khuna riypata a cuo.
42001076	I saa, nama ca a suocepa Khazing profet tapata kupa na cuo aa. A luo zaw sa riypata Abyipa hmie luota si'a cate,
42001077	a cawsaa zaw kha ama sue a ngiethena taata khuona kaw pachang thena pi riypata a cuo aa.
42001078	Ma Khazing nangne ngiechina thueta, cungluo taa mawdiy ningkhena ma cunglie za cung'a te,
42001079	Zingna chunglie a tupa tie hne thiyna ningdiy rawlie'apa tie kha, khena pi riypata a cuo aa. Kiema kha diena luopuv luo malie a chiy aa.
42001080	Haatiy ca lethaw te thlaapa lie a cahra, Israel ming'a lie zaapuv hmung ta aa luo hluo li ruochung lie kha a aw.
42002001	Capa cuo ning ca Siepahruo Awkastas ta Rom uvna ruo chung bangkhuo lie cawsaa mingluv ri riypata naw a papya.
42002002	Capa mingluv rina ca a yikhanapa mingluv rina cuote Kuirinias kha Siria ruo uvtuv a cuo ningta a cuo.
42002003	Cawsaa bangkhuo ca mingluv rina lie ming khung riypata ama khy cyicuo luo kha ama si.
42002004	Josef zaw Galilee pe Nazareth khy taata Siepahruo David khypuv, Judea pe Bethlehem khy luo kha a si. Tahematapakieca ama ca David ciypathla ta a cuo nakawta a cuo.
42002005	A pahaa ciepa hne nu hnyi riypata a mangkhuo nguoluopa Mary hne khata mingluv rina lie ming khung riypata ama si.
42002006	Bethlehem lie ama aw ning khata nu aw tiy a ta.
42002007	Sahrangta, saacapaata ca sa te pang ta a pahlaw khu taata cue hraky chunglie kha a pazie, tahematapakieca khyche banglaa lie kha iema cuota hmang aw va tli.
42002008	Capa hrawlie, ruo chunglie kha zuo ta ama tuv mangchiy yite ruo lie a ripa tuvkhietuv tie ama aw.
42002009	Abyipa avuoming pakha iema'a lie kha a luo te, Abyipa rungnaana ca ama cunglie a za khe nakawta ama ciy hringhruo.
42002010	Cuorasala avuoming ta iema kha, “Ciy kha ung, Cawsaa bangkhuo cuota palungtluona lepuv a cuopa thuophaapa na ica za phya yi.
42002011	Ata ning hing David khy chunglie niema caa khuotuv Abyipa Messiah ca a puv tli!
42002012	Hingpa hing niema cuota pamangsana ca a cuo aa: haaseta pakha ca pang ta pahlaw'a yite cue hraky chunglie ama paziepa kha nama hmung aa,” a ta.
42002013	Sungkhabala ta vuoruo rieka phuv lepuv ca avuoming hneta zaa luo yite Khazing kha hlaa ta ama pathuosa.
42002014	“A suocepa vuoruo lie khiy Khazing ca pathuo sa pata cuo mangsue; A duepa zaw awnapa alyi lie hing diena aw mangsue!” ama ta.
42002015	Avuoming ta thuse yite vuoruo luo ama kaa khu pahne ta tuvkhietuv tie ca pakha hne pakha kha, “Bethlehem luo kha vaa ung sala, hing a cuo nguoluopa hmang, Abyipa ta malie a changpa hing va mang'a ungpuv,” amaa ta.
42002016	Cacuonakawta si pahraa yite Mary hne Josef hne cue hraky lie ama pathlingpa haaseta kha ama va hmung.
42002017	Ama hmung tiyta haaseta kaw avuoming ta a ripa kha iema ca ama chang.
42002018	Tuvkhietuv tie ta ama ripa a thyipa bangkhuo ca ama kharue a haasa.
42002019	Cuorasala Mary ca capa bie bangkhuo kha a palung chunglie khung te a rue syalya pari.
42002020	Tuvkhietuv tie ca kaa yite avuoming ta ama changpa dala haata ama hmungpa hne ama thyipa kawlie kha Khazing ca ama pathuosa.
42002021	Ning cari khu taata, haaseta vangdaw te tiy a ta ning kha a nung ta a phya hluo taata avuoming ta ama za ri ciepa ming, Zingsuv tapa kha ama paphya.
42002022	Moses phungbie haata a pathesana cuo kha a vya tling tiyta haatiypa ca Abyipa hmie luo chiykhyi riypata Jerusalem luo kha ama sikhyi.
42002023	(Abyipa phungbie caa-uv chunglie, “Nama sahrang, capaasaata bangkhuo kha Abyipa'a luo na nama pi aa”), tapata aa cape.
42002024	Abyipa phungbie lie a tapa haata, thuvruv sahning a cuo li kie valale sahning ta hriykhung a rina tue riypata ama sipa ta a cuo.
42002025	Khapa cuo ning kha cawsaa pakha, a ming Simeon ama tapa kha Jerusalem khy lie a za aw. Ama ca cawsaa a dangpa, Khazing a ciyzaapa, Israel ming khuona hmung riypa cuo kha a huo nguoluopa cuote Thlaapa Pathe ta a awpuopa a cuo.
42002026	Thlaapa Pathe ta Abyipa Messiah na hmung hluo li thiy'a vaciy a ta.
42002027	Thlaapa ta a chiy te Simeon ca Biena-ing chung luo kha a ngie. Phungbie haata tuepa riypata a nung hne a paa ta Zingsuv kha Biena-ing luo amaa ngiekhyi ca,
42002028	Simeon ta haatiypa ca a paw te Khazing kha a pathuosa:
42002029	Abyipa, ata ning hing na changtaapa ca na biekuona haata, hnaanguota tah i hringna na pakhung sa tli,
42002030	tahematapakieca i ming ta na khuona kha i hmung tli.
42002031	Mingphang bangkhuo hmiekunglie na tingtuopa khuona ca,
42002032	Jentail ming bangkhuo cuota na khingna a paluosatuv khena hne Na cawsaa Israel ming rungnaana a phyatuv tana a cuo,” a ta.
42002033	A nung hne a paa ca haatiypa kaw a ripa kha ama thyi tiyta ama kharue a haa hringhruo.
42002034	Cakhutaata Simeon ta thluechiy pi yite a nung Mary kyihuo khata, “Hingpa haatiypa hing Israel ming a hluvpuv a maa liena riypa hne ama thuna riypata Khazing ta lieriyuopuopa na a cuo. Ama ca Khazing'a taata a zuvpa pahmungsana hne
42002035	cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama palung chunglie ama ruepa aa luona riypata amaa du riypa a cuo aa. Cakhutaata na palung hrahring kha zueziy ta aca daw aa,” a ta.
42002036	Capa ning ca Asher phang Fanuel sacanung, profet nung Anna zaw kha a za aw ra. Ama ca nungpuvsa tli te, kung sariy chung dyi a navaapa hne khy ama za sahne khu taata,
42002037	kung sawcari hne kung paliy te a nunghlyipa ta a cuo. Biena-ing kha thuse buo li pata chung hne zuo ta Khazing kha abie te sa uv te thlaa a chuo.
42002038	Capa cuota ning caci cata vya chiy te Khazing kha pathuosa te Khazing ta Jerusalem hya a pazang sa pakhaa riypa a huopa tie bangkhuo'a lie kha haatiypa kaw ca a ri.
42002039	Josef hne Mary ca Abyipa phungbie ta tue riypa a tapa bangkhuo kha ama patlung khu taata Galilee pe, ama khy Nazareth luo kha ama kaa.
42002040	Haatiy ca kya le te a kya cahra; singna hne bi te Khazing'a taata hmiephaa a hmung.
42002041	A nung hne a paa ca kung tating ta Lawsena Pyi ning kha Jerusalem luo ama tlaw taw.
42002042	Zingsuv kung hraa hlyihning a ta ning kha ama tue tawpa haata pyi luo ca ama tlaw pakhaa.
42002043	Pyi a chuo taata ing luo kha ama kaa, cuorasala haatiy Zingsuv ca Jerusalem lie a ngaa siy te a nung hne a paa ta pachang vayi.
42002044	Zaapuv hrawliena a kya si rale tapata ama rue nakawta ning kha chung ama kya si. Cakhutaakyalyata ama tieriy hne ama viesaa hrawlie kha ama huv.
42002045	Ama hmung li taata ama huv riypata Jerusalem luo kha ama kaa.
42002046	Ningthung khu taata Biena-ing chunglie ama hmung. Pacuvtuv tie hne khata a tupakhaw yite ama bie kha naathlie te bie zaw a za hiehriy nguoluo yi.
42002047	A bie a thyipa bangkhuo ca a sing zya hne bie a paliena zya yi kha ama nang ta a uosa.
42002048	A nung hne a paa ca ama hmung tiyta ama nang ta uo te, a nung ta, “I sapaa, khaapanakawma hinghaahingta malie na tue? Mang tie, na paa hne kama ca ma thlaa zangsa pata ma ca huv hing,” a ta.
42002049	Ama ta, “Khaapanakawma ina huv ungciy? I Paa ing lieca i aw riypata a cuopa kha pachang va ung cama?” a ta yi.
42002050	Cuorasala khaapama a ri tapa kha pachang vayi.
42002051	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca iema hne khata Nazareth luo za kaa te ama ri a ngiesa pata a aw. A nung ca hing hmang bangkhuo hing a palung chunglie a pari diy.
42002052	Zingsuv ca singna hne kya lethawle te Khazing hne cawsaa hmielie kha hmiephaa a hmung.
42003001	Rom Siepahruo Tiberius ta ruo a uvnapa kung hraa hlyipangaa a ta ning kha Pontius Pilat ca Judah ruo muokiy byi ta a cuo, Herod ca Galilee ruo uvtuv cuote a nuta Filip ca Iturea hne Trakhonitis pe uvtuv ta a cuo; Lisanias ca Abilen uvtuv cuote
42003002	Annas hne Kaiafas ca tluobyi lepa ta ama cuo. Capa cuo ning ca ruochung lie a awpa, Zekhariah saacapaapa Johan'a luo kha Khazing bie aa zuv.
42003003	Ama ca Jordan cavaa kiecahriy ruo bangkhuo khata tlaw te, “Sue a ngiethena cuota a ngiepachiy pata tiy a naw riypa kha
42003004	profet Isaiah caa-uv chunglie a zaa capepa haakhata a ukhyi: “Cawsaa pakha ca ruochung lie kha u te, Abyipa cuota luo kha sa tie ung, a cakuona riypa luo ca padang tie ung,
42003005	Huekaw bangkhuo ca pabi ungla, tluo lepa hne tluo cawta zaw kha pacing tie ung. Luo a kyipa kha padang ungla, luo a bupa zaw kha pame tie ung.
42003006	Cawsaapa bangkhuo ta Abyipa khuona ca hmung yi se!” a ta.
42003007	Tiy a naw riypata ama'a luo a vawpa cawsaazaapuv tie kha Johan ta, “Pariy ciypathla zaw! Ahungma a vya chiy riypa duotena hing a ruose riypata a raaringna caa pi yi?
42003008	A ngiepachiyna hne aa phuvpa hringna hnyi tie ung. Abraham samingsahlaa tana ma cuo a ta kha tie ung. Ica chang yi: Khazing ca hingpa alung hing la pata Abraham samingsahlaa ta a tue khu.
42003009	Thingkung hu riypata a hryi ca a thabaw lie kha chipa a cuo tli; thyiphaa a pathyi lipa thingkung bangkhuo ca hu'a yite myi chung luo thawpa a cuo aa.
42003010	Cawsaazaapuv ta, “Cacuokieca khaapama ma tue aa?” ama ta.
42003011	Ama ta, “Buohryicungle zunghning a hnyipa ta a hnyi lipa kha pibuo se, sa a hnyipa zaw ta cahaa cata tue se,” a ta.
42003012	Ngukhyituv tie zaw kha tiy a naw riypata a vaw yite, “Saya, khaapama ma tue aa?” ama ta.
42003013	Ama ta, “Khyi riypa tapa laata a hluv vie ta khyi kha ung,” a ta yi.
42003014	Rieka tie zaw ta, “Kiema haw khaapama ma tue aa? ama ta ra. Ama ta, “Ahunghmuota hruohra ta tuokaa va chuv kha ung. Ahunghmuo a hmuo li pata pachiypahuo pata tuokaa hie kha ung. Nama laakhaa lie kha nama palung tling se,” a ta yi.
42003015	Cawsaa ca a ruechuona hne bi yite Johan hing Messiah cata a cuo'a ma ta yite ama pacuo syalya.
42003016	Johan ta iema kha, “Kama ca tiy ta tiynawna ica pi yi, cuorasala kama laata a cahra vie karaapa pakha a vaw nguoluo te kama ca a phyipakaw riy pathluo riypata hmuo a tla va ang. Ama ta niema kha Thlaapa Pathe hne myi ta tiy aca naw'a yi.
42003017	Ama ca suo zinapa pahraa kha a cyi te suo kha a zi aa; a chuo phapa ca be luo kha raw'a te asiypa ca a thiy buo lipa myi chunglie a rue aa,” a ta.
42003018	Johan ca cawsaa kha bie a phangphang ta thuophaabie a chang yi.
42003019	Cuorasala muokiy byipa Herod ca a nuta napuvnung Herodias kha a hlaw te a hrangpa hmangpha lipa a hluvsa zaw kha a tue. Capa kawlieca ta Johan ta a chuo ca,
42003020	Johan kha thaw pathla te a zya chiepa kha a chachiy hryly.
42003021	Cawsaa bangkhuo kha tiy a maa naw khu taata Zingsuv zaw kha naw ra te thlaa a chuo nguoluo pata vuoruo ca zaa pahaw te,
42003022	Thlaapa Pathe ca thuvruv haakhata za cung te a cunglie kha a zaa cang. Cakhutaa vuoruo taata ueryi a zuv te, “Nama ca i Duepa i Saacapaa tana na cuo. Na cunglie i palung a tluo,” a ta.
42003023	Zingsuv ca re hrie a pathu ning kha kung sawthung hraw a cuo. Ama ca Josef saacapaa tana a cuo tapata cawsaa ta ama rue. Josef ca Heli saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003024	Heli ca Matthat saacapaa ta a cuo, Matthat ca Levi saacapaa ta a cuo, Levi ca Melkhi saacapaa ta a cuo, Melkhi ca Jannai saacapaa ta a cuo, Jannai ca Josef saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003025	Josef ca Mattathias saacapaa ta a cuo, Mattathias ca Amos saacapaa ta a cuo, Amos ca Nahum saacapaa ta a cuo, Nahum ca Esli saacapaa ta a cuo, Esli ca Naggai saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003026	Naggai ca Maath saacapaa ta a cuo, Maath ca Mattathias saacapaa ta a cuo, Mattathias ca Semein saacapaa ta a cuo, Semein ca Josek saacapaa ta a cuo, Josek ca Joda saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003027	Joda ca Joanan saacapaa ta a cuo, Joanan ca Rhesa saacapaa ta a cuo, Rhesa ca Zerubbabel saacapaa ta a cuo, Zerubbabel ca Shealtiel saacapaa ta a cuo; Shealtiel ca Neri saacapaa ta a cuo;
42003028	Neri ca Melkhi saacapaa ta a cuo; Melkhi ca Addi saacapaa ta a cuo. Addi ca Kosam saacapaa ta a cuo, Kosam ca Elmadam saacapaa ta a cuo, Elmadam ca Er saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003029	Er ca Joshua saacapaa ta a cuo, Joshua ca Eliezer saacapaa ta a cuo, Eliezer ca Jorim saacapaa ta a cuo, Jorim ca Matthat saacapaa ta a cuo, Matthat ca Levi saacapaa ta a cuo;
42003030	Levi ca Simeon saacapaa ta a cuo, Simeon ca Judah saacapaa ta a cuo. Judah ca Josef saacapaa ta a cuo, Josef ca Jonam saacapaa ta a cuo, Jonam ca Eliakim saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003031	Eliakim ca Melea saacapaa ta a cuo, Melea ca Menna saacapaa ta a cuo, Menna ca Mattatha saacapaa ta a cuo, Mattatha ca Nathan saacapaa ta a cuo, Nathan ca David saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003032	David ca Jesse saacapaa ta a cuo, Jesse ca Obed saacapaa ta a cuo, Obed ca Boaz saacapaa ta a cuo, Boaz ca Sala saacapaa ta a cuo, Sala ca Nahshon saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003033	Nahshon ca Amminadab saacapaa ta a cuo, Amminadab ca Admin saacapaa ta a cuo, Admin ca Arni saacapaa ta a cuo, Arni ca Hezron saacapaa ta a cuo, Hezron ca Perez saacapaa ta a cuo, Perez ca Judah saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003034	Judah ca Jakob saacapaa ta a cuo, Jakob ca Isak saacapaa ta a cuo, Isak ca Abraham saacapaa ta a cuo, Abraham ca Terah saacapaa ta a cuo, Terah ca Nahor saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003035	Nahor ca Serug saacapaa ta a cuo, Serug ca Reu saacapaa ta a cuo, Reu ca Peleg saacapaa ta a cuo, Peleg ca Eber saacapaa ta a cuo, Eber ca Shelah saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003036	Shelah ca Kainan saacapaa ta a cuo, Kainan ca Arpaksad saacapaa ta a cuo, Arpaksad ca Shem saacapaa ta a cuo, Shem ca Noah saacapaa ta a cuo, Noah ca Lamek saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003037	Lamek ca Methuselah saacapaa ta a cuo, Methuselah ca Enok saacapaa ta a cuo, Enok ca Jared saacapaa ta a cuo, Jared ca Mahalaleel saacapaa ta a cuo, Mahahlaleel ca Kainan saacapaa ta a cuo,
42003038	Kainan ca Enosh saacapaa ta a cuo, Enosh ca Seth saacapaa ta a cuo, Seth ca Adam saacapaa ta a cuo, Adam ca Khazing saacapaa ta a cuo.
42004001	Zingsuv ca Thlaapa Pathe hne a bi pata Jordan cavaa taakhata vya kaa te Thlaapa ta ruochung luo kha a sikhyi.
42004002	Capa lieca Setaa ta ning sawliy chung a pasupaliy. Capa chung bangkhuo ca khaahmuo ning li pata a aw nakawta capa cuo a chuo pahne ca a nang khuopuv ta a diy.
42004003	Setaa ta, “Khazing saacapaa ta na cuo kieca hingpa alung hing viechuo ta aa li riypata naw pi tie,” a ta.
42004004	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Caapathepa lie, ‘Cawsaa hing sa dyi ta hring vyi,’ tapata a capepa kha,” a ta.
42004005	Cakhutaa Setaa ta a suona luo kiekhyi te sungkhata lieta chuelyi ruo bangkhuo kha a pahmung sa.
42004006	Setaa ta, “Hing nawhnyina bangkhuo hne rungnaana bangkhuo hing ica pi aa. A bangkhuo hingta kama'a luo pipa cuo tli te, i khingpa ahunghmuo i pi khu yi.
42004007	Ina bie cakieca na huopa tana a cuo diy aa,” a ta.
42004008	Zingsuv ta, “Caapathepa lie, ‘Abyipa na Khazing kha bie la, ama re dyi kha hrie tie,’ tapata a capepa kha,” a ta.
42004009	Cakhutaa Setaa ta Jerusalem luo kha sikhyi te Biena-ing dawthlue lie kha a patu khu taata, “Khazing Saacapaa ta na cuo kieca hingpa taahingta a zupathla tie.
42004010	Caapathepa lie, ‘Ama ta nama khuo riypata aa vuoming kha chang tli yite,
42004011	na phyi hmuota alung lie naa phaw li riypata ama kuv ta aca cawchue'a yi,’ tapata a cape kha,” a ta.
42004012	Zingsuv ta, “Caapathepa ta, ‘Abyipa, na Khazing kha va dyapasya kha,’ a ta,” tapata a palie.
42004013	Setaa ca pasupaliyna phangphang a pachuo khu taata cuophaa a hmung pakhaa nate cuokha chung Zingsuv kha a thuse.
42004014	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca Thlaapa Pathe cahrana hne a bi pata Galilee luo kha a kaa. A thuohlaa ca capa ruo bangkhuo lieca a pathuo diy.
42004015	Apungna-ing lie kha pacuv yite cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama pathuosa.
42004016	Zingsuv ca a za lethawnapa Nazareth khy luo kha vaa te a tue tawpa haata Sabbath ning kha apungna-ing luo a vaa. Caapathepa ri riypata a daa te,
42004017	profet Isaiah caataw kha ama pi. Caataw ca pathluo te:
42004018	Abyipa Thlaapa ca i cung lie a aw. Tahematapakieca kama kha a siypasapa tie'a luo Thuophaabie phya riypata sathu na pathuv te inaa tlaw. Sii ta a ziypa tie'a lie lawna bie pathyi riypa hne, Mingcuepa tie ta ama hmung pakhaa khu riypata ina pathlie. Hrisaapa tie hya pazang riypa hne
42004019	Abyipa palungtluona kung thuophaa pathyi sa riypata ina pathlie,” tapata a capenapa kha a ri.
42004020	Zingsuv ca caataw kha kalang pakhaa te a mangchiytuv kha pi te aa tu. Apungna-ing luo a vya pungpa bangkhuo ta Zingsuv ca ming vy li pata ama mang.
42004021	Zingsuv ta, “Ata ning hing Caapathepa hing nama thyina lieta a tling mangtli,” a ta yi.
42004022	Ama bangkhuo ta ama kha ri thuophaa yite, a pakaa taata a pyapa thluechiyna bie kha ama kharue ta a haa. Iema ta, “Hingpapaa hing Josef saacapaapa kha cuo vama?” amaa ta.
42004023	Zingsuv ta, “‘Siybyipa, nama hne nama a patluo sa tie law,’ tapa phungthluv kha ina risue'a ungciy, tapa kha a phasa pata i pachang. Cakhutaata Kapernaum khy liena a tue tapata ma thyipa zaw kha na puvnapa khy lie hing tue ra tie ina ta'a ungciy.
42004024	Ica chang yi: “Ahung profet hmuota a puvna khy lie cuhluopa cuo buo vyi,” a ta yi.
42004025	Naa na thlie tie ung: Elijah chuo ning kha kung thung angkha a che khy kuo te ruo bangkhuo ta cakuo a tlung ning kha Israel ruo lie nunghlyi ama za hluvsa.
42004026	Cuorasala Elijah ca Sidon pe Zarephath khy lie a awpa nunghlyinung'a luo ri li pata a ahung'a luo hmuo pathliepa cuo vyi.
42004027	Cakhutaata Elisha chuo ning zaw kha Israel ruo chunglie caahminghmaa ta a pasapa a hluvpuv ama za aw, cuorasala Siria ming Naaman ta li pata pakha hmuo patluo sapa cuo vayi.
42004028	Apungna-ing lie a awpa bangkhuo ca capa bie ama thyi pahne ta ama hi a haasa.
42004029	Thu yite, Zingsuv kha khyle luo a dale yite ama khydaw tluo lungkuo taa kha nuopathla amaa nang.
42004030	Cuorasala Zingsuv ca iema hraw taakhata dya zuvpathla te a cakuo.
42004031	Zingsuv ca Galilee pe Kapernaum khy luo kha si te Sabbath ning ta kha a pacuv yi.
42004032	A pacuvna zya kha ama nang ta a uosa, tahematapakieca nawhnyina hne ta bie a ri nakawta a cuo.
42004033	Capa apungna-ing lieca a pyalyipa khuevuo ta a hryipapaa pakha aw te,
42004034	“Nazareth khypa Zingsuv tuokhaatama malie na tue khing? Kiema para repa tama naa vaw? Nama ca a ahungtama na cuo tapa kha ica pachang. Khazing Cawsaa Pathepa tana na cuo!” tapata khuopuv ta a khi.
42004035	Cuorasala, Zingsuv ta, “A dieta tah aw! Hingpapaa chung taahingta pya,” ta te a chuo. Khuevuo ta cawsaapapaa ca ama hmiekunglie kha vaapatyi te ruvnaana khaahmuo pi li pata a chung taata a pya.
42004036	Cawsaa bangkhuo kha ama nang uosa te pakha hne pakha kha, “Hingpa bie hing tuokhaapa bie tama a cuo? Hingpapaa hingta nawhnyina hne cahrana ta bie pi te thlaapa chiepa tie ca ama pya,” a maa ta.
42004037	Zingsuv kaw ca capa ruo chung hmangting ta a pathuo.
42004038	Zingsuv ca apungna-ing taakhata pya te Simon ing luo kha aa ngie. Simon piynung a nge ling te a pasapa kha ama ca ama chang.
42004039	Vaa te, a thaalie kha a daa te a ngelingna kha a chuo ca a nge kha a cakaa. Sungkhabala ta tluo te, thu te iema kha a mangsang yi.
42004040	Ning a tla ca a pasapa a hnyipa bangkhuo khata pasana a phangphang ta a pasapa tie kha Zingsuv'a luo ama vya chiykhyi; ama luv cunglie kha a kuv khang te ama palang ta a patluo sa yi.
42004041	Khuevuo zaw kha cawsaa hluvpuv chung taata pya yite, “Nama ca Khazing Saacapaa tana na cuo!” tapata khuosa ta ama khi. Cuorasala iema kha chuo yite bie pari sa vayi, tahematapakieca Messiah a cuopa kha ama pachang.
42004042	Khy a kya vuo pahne ta Zingsuv ca khy taakhata pya te ruoduona luo kha a cakuo. Cawsaa ta ama kha huv yite ama hmung ca, a thuse li riypa yita ama thlu.
42004043	Cuorasala ama ta, “Khazing Pena Thuophaabie ca khy hrang luo zaw hing i ri ra hrahring riypata a cuo, tahematapakieca hingpa repa hing tana pathlie hnuochuopa ta i cuo,” a ta.
42004044	Cacuonakawta Judea ruo chung apungna-ing zaw lie kha Thuophaabie ca a changle yi.
42005001	Ning kha ca, Genesaret Tiyliy kielie Zingsuv aa daa ning kha, Khazing bie naathlie riypata cawsaa kha a nuo ta a nuopuo yite amaa luo ama vaa ngie.
42005002	Zingsuv ta ngiekuo lie sawkawpalaw sahning a awpa kha a hmung. Ngaa a vaapa tie ca sawkawpalaw taakhata pya yite ama'a sue kha ama pasiy nguoluo.
42005003	Capa sawkawpalaw hrawlie khata Simon huopa luo kha kie te ngiekuo taakhata a cawta va nuo vie riypata a chang. Zingsuv ca sawkawpalaw chunglie ca a tu te cawsaazaapuv kha a pacuv yi.
42005004	Bieri a patlung taata Simon kha, “Na sawkawpalaw hing tiy a thuv viena luo hnyi la naa sue kha vaa tie,” a ta.
42005005	Simon ta, “Abyipa zuokhydyi ma vaa law pata sakha hmuo pa-uo va puv. Cuorasala vaa ungla malie na ta kieca i vaa'a tle,” tapata a palie.
42005006	Ama vaa ca ngaa a hluv hringhruo ama pa-uo nakawta amaa sue ca a tlaa puo diy'a nang.
42005007	Cacuonakaw palaw hrangpa cunglie ama viesaa tie kha ama kuv ta a kyi yite a byana ama hie. A vaw yite sawkawpalaw sahning lie kha ngaa ca a bikaluv pata chi yite tiy luo a tla khyi'a nang.
42005008	Simon ta khapa hmang kha a hmung tiyta, Zingsuv phyi thabaw lie kha a pakhuv pane te, “Abyipa, na cakuo se tie! A suepa tana i cuo!” a ta.
42005009	Ama hne a viesaa tie ca ama pa-uopa ngaa kha a hluvtuv nakawta ama nang ta a uosa.
42005010	Simon viesaa tie, Zebedi saacapaa tie Jeim hne Johan zaw kha ama nang a uosa ra. Zingsuv ta Simon kha, “Na thlaa zang kha se; ata taahingta ca cawsaa na na patuv'a tli,” a ta.
42005011	Ama sawkawpalaw ca ngiekuo lie kha chi yite, ama chechiy bangkhuo kha thuse yite Zingsuv ca ama ziy.
42005012	Luokha ca Zingsuv kha khypuv suokha lie a awpa ta capa khy lieca caahminghmaa a phyapapaa kha a za aw. Capapaa ta Zingsuv kha a hmung tiyta, a hmiekunglie kha a bu te, “Abyipa, na khingpa ta a cuo kieca ina patluo sa khu ciy,” tapata a nue.
42005013	Zingsuv ta a kuv ta va paza te a hrie. “Ica patluo sa khing, Pathe tie! a ta. Sungkhabala ta a tluo.
42005014	Zingsuv ta, “Ahunghmuo chang kha yi, cuorasala tluobyi'a luo kha tathlyalya ta vaa la vaa pamang sa tie; na tluo tli tapa kha aca pachang riypa yita, Moses phungbie lie a awpa haakhata hriykhung a rina va tue tie,” a ta.
42005015	Cuorasala Zingsuv thuohlaa ca a pathuo hryly, cawsaazaapuv ta a bie naathlie riypa hne ama pasana taata patluo sapa cuo riypata ama vya pangie.
42005016	Cuorasala Zingsuv ca dya zuvpathla te ruoduona luo kha cakuo te thlaa a chuo.
42005017	Ningkha ca Zingsuv ta a pacuv nguoluo ning yi kha Galilee ruo khy ting taata hne, Judea taa hne Jerusalem taata a vya chiypa Farasi tie hne Phungbie saya tie chekha zaw capa lieca a maa tu ra. A pasapa patluo sa thenapa cahrana ca Zingsuv cunglie kha a aw.
42005018	Cawsaa chekha ta a pakyapapaa kha a pangphaa hne a vya puvle yite, ingchung luo zaa ngiekhyi pata Zingsuv hmielie vya chi riypa kha ama zue.
42005019	Cuorasala cawsaa ama hluv tuv nakawta a chung luo kha a ngiekhyi khu vayi. Cacuonakawta thlungkhuv cung luo kha kie khyi yite thlungkhuv kha za pahaw yite cawsaa hraw Zingsuv hmiekunglie kha a pangphaa hneta ama za pachung.
42005020	Zingsuv ta ama zangnapa kha a hmung tiy yi ta, “Liechung, na suena ca a ngiethe pata na cuo tli,” a ta.
42005021	Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie ta, “Khazing thuo pachina bie a ripapaa hing ahung ta ma a cuo? Khazing pakha kyalya dyi muo sue a ngiethe khutuv ta a cuo ta,” amaa ta.
42005022	Zingsuv ta ama ruenapa ca pachang yite, iema kha, “Khaapanakawma hinghaahingta nama rue?
42005023	‘Na suena ca a ngiethe pata a cuo tli,’ tapa ma a na vie, ‘Thu la cakuo,’ tapa ma a na vie?
42005024	Cuorasala, Cawsaa Saacapaa hing chuelyi lieta sue a ngiethe khuna naw a hnyi tapa nama pachang khuna riypata ta te, a pakyapapaa ca, “Ica chang, thu la na pangphaa kha a la lah ing luo cakuo!” a ta.
42005025	Sungkha ta, cawsaapapaa ca iema zaw hmielie kha thu te, aa zienapa pangphaa kha a la te ing luo cakuo te Khazing kha a pathuosa.
42005026	Ama bangkhuo ta ama nang ta uo te ama ciy hringhruo. Khazing kha pathuosa yite “Ata ning ma hmungpa hmang ca kharuehaapa hmang na a cuo,” ama ta.
42005027	Cakhutaata, Zingsuv ca pya te ngukhyituv Levi ngukhyina hmang lie aa tu nguoluopa kha a hmung. Zingsuv ta, “Na ziy,” a ta.
42005028	Levi ca thu te, chechiy bangkhuo kha thuse te, ama kha a ziy.
42005029	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ca Levi ta a ing lie kha pyi lesapa tuepa te capa lieca ngukhyituv tie hne cawsaa hrangpa a hluvpuv zaw ca iema hne khata cabya lie amaa tu pakhaw.
42005030	Farasi tie hne ama Phungbie saya tie chekha ta Zingsuv ziytuv tie'a lie kha a cie yite, “Khaapanakawma ngukhyituv tie'a nata a suepa tie hneta nama ning nama dang pakhaw? ama ta.
42005031	Zingsuv ta, “A tluopa ca siybyi a hu vayi, cuorasala a pasapa tie dyina a hu yi.
42005032	Aa dangpa tie ku riypata a zuv va ang, a suepa tie ama suenapa pangiesapachiy riypatana i vaw,” tapata a palie yi.
42005033	Cawsaa chekha ta Zingsuv kha, “Johan ziytuv tie hne Farasi ming ziytuv tie ca ata'a na ata tah sa uv yite thlaa ama chuo; cuorasala nama caa ziytuv tie ca ning yi dang yite ama aw,’ ama ta.
42005034	Zingsuv ta, “Nungchiypyi a vya zawpa tie ca nung a chiytuvpa satlie iema'a lie a aw chung kha sa nama pa-uv sa khu'a ma? Pa-uv sa khu'a va ungciy!
42005035	Nung a chiytuvpa satlie kha iema'a taata ama lana cuo kha vya chiy'a te, capa cuo thue cata sa ca amaa uv aa,” a ta.
42005036	Zingsuv ta hingpa pakhingpuonabie zaw hing a chang kalie yi: “Ahungtahmuo caw parangpa kha cawthaapa thlaa yite a bie thla buo vayi. Cahaa cata a tue kieca cawthaapa dyi kha tlaa lakaa'a te caw parangpa lie abie a thla tiyta a tla hyi'a vyi.
42005037	Cakhutaata, ahungtahmuo mingsuv tiy thaapa kha savang ungthyi parangpa luo raw buo vayi. Cahaa cata ama raw kieca mingsuv tiy thaapa ta savang ungthyi kha tungpahaw'a te, mingsuv tiy ca a lyi diy'a te savang ungthyi kha a ra aa.
42005038	Cuorasala mingsuv tiy thaapa ca savang ungthyi thaapa lie raw riypatana a cuo.
42005039	Cakhutaa ahunghmuota mingsuv tiy hlungpa kha ama dang khu taata mingsuv tiy thaapa kha dang khing vayi. ‘A hlungpa na a pahuo vie,’” ama ta, a ta.
42006001	Zingsuv ca Sabbath ning ta lu kha cahraw paale te a si. Ziytuv tie ta sa-uv kha pahriy paale yite ama kuvpazaa lie ama cariy khu taata a chuo kha ama baale.
42006002	Farasi ming chekha ta, “Khaapanakawma phungbie ta a thlupa kha Sabbath ning ta nama tue?” ama ta.
42006003	Zingsuv ta, “David ta ama hne a cawsaa zaw ama nang a diy ning kha khaapama a za tue tapa kha ri buo va ung cama?
42006004	Khazing ingchung luo kha a ngie te muo tluobyi tie ri li pata ahungtahmuo ning hrue li riypa, Khazing ama pipa viechuo kha la te a ning ta, cakhutaata a viesaa zaw kha a pi yi cuo vama,” a ta.
42006005	Cakhutaata, “Cawsaa Saacapaa ca sabbath byi tana a cuo,” a ta yi.
42006006	Sabbath a ning hrangpa ningta kha Zingsuv ca apungna-ing luo kha a ngie te a pacuv yi. Capa lieca a cacuo luo kuv a pakyapa pakha a aw.
42006007	Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi ming chekha ta Zingsuv kha a suena ama huv khing nakawta Sabbath ning hing vya patluo sa ma tapa kha ci li pata ama mangkhuo.
42006008	Ama ruenapa kha a pachang thluo raalaa pata a kuv a pakyapa cawsaapapaa kha, “A vaw la hingpa lie hing a vya daa,” a ta. Cawsaapapaa ca pya te capa lie ca a vaa daa.
42006009	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Ica hiehriy yi: Sabbath ning hing hmangpha tue riypa ma, ruvnaana pi riypa? Hringna khuo riypa ma para riypa? a ta yi.
42006010	Iema kha mang paky yite; cawsaapapaa kha, “Na kuv kha pazuo tie,” a ta. Pazuo te a kuv ca a tluo.
42006011	Ama hi haa hringhruo te Zingsuv hing tuokhaatama ma tue aa tapa kha pakha hne pakha amaa rue.
42006012	Capa cuo ning ca Zingsuv ca thlaa chuo riypata tluocung luo kie te Khazing'a luo kha zuokhydyi thlaa a chuo.
42006013	Khy a dyi taata ziytuv tie kha ku yite hlyihning kha a tlaw yite lucuotuv a ta yi.
42006014	Ama ming ca: Simon (Piter ama tapapaa) hne a nuta Andru; Jeim hne Johan, Filip hne Bartholomew.
42006015	Matthai hne Thomas, Alfeas saacapaa Jeim hne Simon (Phang a cuokhyituv tapata ama upa),
42006016	Jeim saacapaa Judas, hne Judas Iskariot ta ama cuo.
42006017	Zingsuv ca lucuotuv tie hne tluocung taakhata za cung yite, a ziytuv hluvpuv hneta a se lie amaa daa. Judea ruo bangkhuo, Jerusalem khy hne riyliy kie khypuv ta a cuopa Tair hne Sidon khy taata cawsaa hluvpuv zaw ca capa lie ca ama aw.
42006018	Thuophaabie naathlie riypa hne ama pasana taata patluo sa riypata a vawpa cuo yite, thlaapa pyalyipa ta a tuepa tie zaw kha ama tluo.
42006019	Cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama kha hrie khu amaa zue; tahematapakieca a chung taata cahrana pya te a patluo sa diy nakaw yi ta a cuo.
42006020	Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha mang yite, A siypasapa tie ca thluechiypa tana nama cuo. Khazing pena ca niema huotana a cuo.
42006021	Ata lie a nang a diypa tie ca thluechiypa tana nama cuo. Nama riy pabipa tana nama cuo aa. Ata lie a caapa tie ca thluechiypa tana nama cuo. Palung tluo pata nama pahnyi aa.
42006022	Cawsaa Saacapaa kawlieta, cawsaa ta aca hue yi, aca thaw yi, biechie ta ca ta yite nama thuo aca pachi kie yi ca thluechiypa tana nama cuo.
42006023	Capa ningcuo a vya chiy tiyta nama palung tluo pata a cathlu tie ung, tahematapakieca nama cuota vuoruo lie lawmuo lepuv chipa tlipa tana nama cuo. Khapa haa khatana ama mingchingmingvuo tie ta profet tie kha ama za tue.
42006024	Cuorasala a hnyirungpa tie ca ngiechi aa chiypa tana nama cuo. Hring a nuona ca nama hmung tli.
42006025	Ata lie a riy a bipa tie ca ngiechi aa chiypa tana nama cuo. Nangdiy patana nama aw aa. Ata lie a pahnyipa tie ca ngiechi aa chiy hringhruo patana nama cuo. A ngiy a phie'a ung cate nama caa aa.
42006026	Cawsaa bangkhuo ta aca ri-thuophaa ning yi hing ngiechi aa chiypa tana nama cuo, tahema-tapakieca ama mingchingmingvuo tie khata profetpakhipa tie kha cahaa bala cata ama za rithuophaa taw.
42006027	Cuorasala i bie naa a thliepa niema ca ica chang yi: nama carie tie kha due ungla niema caa huepa tie cunglie kha hmangphapa tue tie ung;
42006028	chie caa sapa tie kha thluechiy pi ungla caa tuechiepa tie cuota thlaa chuo tie ung.
42006029	Cawsaa pakhakha ta na be aca tung kieca kuo kha luo zaw kha chawpa tie; pakhakha ta na buohryicungle kha aca chuv kieca na buohryi zaw kha va pi chiy vie tie.
42006030	Ahung a cuo zaw ta na chechiy caa hiepa kha va pi la, cawsaa pakhakha ta na huopa ama la kieca va hie pakhaa kha tie.
42006031	Na tuepa yi se tapata na khingpa kha malie cuota va tuepa tie yi.
42006032	Nama caa duepa dyi kha na due kie yi ca khaapa athungna ma na hmung aa? A suepa tie hmuo iema a duepa tie kha ama due the ra ca muo!
42006033	Na cunglie phana a tuepa cunglie kyalya kha phana na tue kieca khaapa pathuosana ma na hmung aa?
42006034	I hmung pakhaa aa tapata naa nguopuopa tie kyalya kha du na cyi kie yi ca khaapa athungna ma na hmung aa? A suepa tie hmuo du ama cyipa zaa hmung pakhaa riypata a suepa tie kha du ama cyi ca muo!
42006035	Cuorasala nama cariepa kha due ungla, ama cunglie phana kha tue ungla hmung pakhaa riypa kha a nguopuo li pata du cyi tie ung. Lawmuo a hluvsa hmung'a ung cate Cungnungce Khazing saata tah nama cuo aa. Tahematapakieca ama ca palungtluo a the lipa tie hne cawsaa pha lipa tie cunglie zaw a pha.
42006036	Nama Paa ca malie ngiechi a thepa a cuo pahaata malie kha va ngiechi tie ung.
42006037	“Malie bie kha va chipa kha, cacuokieca nama zaw bie chipa pata cuo'a vaciy; malie kha sue va phaw kha, cacuokieca nama zaw suephawpa cuo'a vaciy; malie kha vaa ngiethe la a ngiethe pata na cuo ra aa.
42006038	Malie kha va pi la pi pata na cuo ra aa. A bikaluv pata, a khepuo pata, a carypuo pata hne a lepathlana te ta, pi pata na cuo aa. Malie cunglie na hmuopa panangna khata na nama zaw panangpa pata na cuo ra aa.
42006039	Ama ta pakhingpuonabie suokha a chang vie yi: “Mingcue pakha ta a hrangpa mingcue pakha kha luo a chiy khu'a ma? Ama pahning ta khue luo tla'a vayi ma?
42006040	Pacuvpa ahungtahmuo pacuvtuv laata le vie vyi, cuorasala aa cuv riypa pachuo te a the diypa ca a pacuvtuv tluv a ta aa.
42006041	“Na ming chunglie a awpa thingtung khahmuo rue li pata tuokhaatama na uvnu ming chunglieta a awpa mingbuo kha na mang?
42006042	Tuokhaatama nama ming chunglie thingtung hmuo hmung the li pata na uvnu kha, “Uvnu, na ming chunglie mingbuo kha ca thuepa'a ang,” nama ta the? Phahruocuo tie! Na ming chunglie thingtung kha la taa la muo na uvnu ming chunglie mingbuo kha a sieta ta hmung'a cate na la the'a ta.
42006043	A hnaatluopa thingkung ca thyichiepa pathyi vyi; thingkung pha lipa zaw ta thyiphapa pathyi ra vyi.
42006044	Thingkung bangkhuo ca a thyi ta pachang khupa a cuo. Ahling kung taata thyikuv lu buo'a vaciy, a cuo li kie sahming kung taata mingsuv lu buo'a vaciy.
42006045	Cawsaa phapa ta a palung chunglie a awpa hmangphapa tie kha papya te, cawsaa chiepa ta a palung chunglie a awpa hmang chiepa tie kha a papya ra. Tahematapakieca palung chunglie a awpa khana pakaa ta a ri,” a ta.
42006046	“Khaapanakawma niema ta, ‘Abyipa, Abyipa na ta ung cate ica changpa yi ca tue tlung li pata nama aw?
42006047	Kama'a luo a vaw te, i bie kha naathlie te a ziypa ca khaama a lu tapa kha capa hmung'a yi ang.
42006048	Ama ca alung cunglie aa thuvsa ta khue cu te a tung kha thla te ing a sapa hne tana a lu. Cavaa tiy za le te ing kha a za phaw raalaa pata a cusa pata sapa a cuo nakawta cahang khu vyi.
42006049	Cuorasala i bie ripa thyi raalaa te a ziy lipa ca a hruo kha a cusa pata thla li pata ing a sapa hne tana a lu. Tiy za le te a za phaw tiyta capa ing ca sungkha ta a lie te a rapatlaa diy,” a ta.
42007001	Zingsuv ta hing bie bangkhuo hing zaapuv thyipa ta a ri khu taata Kapernaum khy luo kha a ngie.
42007002	Capa lie a awpa Rom riebyipa ta changtaapa pakha hnyi te a due laalaw; capapaa ca pasa te vuotaa a thiy'a nang.
42007003	Riebyipa ca Zingsuv kaw kha a thyi tiyta Judah uvthyi tie kha pathlie yite, a vaw pata a sii kha a patluo sa riypata paa apa kie sa yi.
42007004	Iema ta Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw yite khuosa ta amaa nue, “Hingpapaa hing bya a tla hrahringpa tana a cuo.
42007005	Ma mingphang malie due te apungna-ing zaw malie a sapa pata a cuo,” ama ta.
42007006	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ca iema kha a paziy yi. Ing ama va pha'a nang tlipa khata riebyipa ta a viesaa zaw kha pathlie yite, “Abyipa, na rie a pathyi khing kha. Kama ca i ing chung luo naa ngie riypata a tla va ang.
42007007	Cacuonakaw nama'a luo a vaw riypa kha a nguo va ang. Cuorasala na ryi kaakha na pathlie kieca i changtaapapaa ca a tluo aa.
42007008	Kama zaw hing i rieka tie hneta byi le viepa kuv rawlie a awpa i cuo. Pakha kha, ‘Cakuo!’ i ta kie cakuo te; A hrangpa pakha kha, ‘A vaw,’ i ta kie aa vaw; i sii a cuopa kha, ‘Hingpa hing tue,’ i ta kie a tue,” a ta.
42007009	Capa bie a thyi tiyta Zingsuv ca a kharue a haa; a hnang luo a pali te a ziypa cawsaazaapuv kha, “Ica chang yi: Hing haapa zangna hing Israel ming chunglie hmuota hmung buo va ang,” a ta.
42007010	A pathliepa tie ca riebyipa ing luo kha ama kaa tiyta a siipaapa a za tluopa kha ama hmung.
42007011	Cakhupahne Zingsuv ca Nain ama tapa khy luo kha si te a ziytuv tie hne cawsaazaapuv khata ama ziy.
42007012	Khy hukaa a vya phapa khiy ta a thiypa a vya puvlepa tie kha ama vya pya. A thiypa ca nunghlyinung saacapaa, pakha ta dyi a hnyi tlakuopa cuote khychung ming a hluvsa ta a nung ca ama vya paziy.
42007013	Abyipa ta capa nung ca a hmung tiyta ngiechi hringhruo te, “Caa kha,” a ta.
42007014	Cakhutaa va cakuo te riy thingkaw kha hrie te a vya puvlepa tie ca amaa daa. Zingsuv ta, “Satliepa, thu la ica ta!” a ta.
42007015	A thiypa ca kya thu te bie ri te Zingsuv ta a nung'a luo kha a pi.
42007016	Iema bangkhuo ca ciysa yite Khazing kha ama pathuosa. “Kiema'a liena profet lepa aa luo; Khazing na a cawsaa zaw kha minghmiepha a pi tli yi,” ama ta.
42007017	Zingsuv thuohlaa ca Judea hne a kiecahriy ruo ting khata a pathuo.
42007018	Capa thuohlaa bangkhuo ca Johan kha ama a ziytuv tie ta ama chang. Cacuonakawta Johan ta iema hraw taata pahning kha ku yite,
42007019	“A vaw riypa aca tapa yi ca nama ta na cuo ma, a cuo li kie a hrangpa ma huo kalie'a ma?” tapata Abyipa kha va hiehriy riypata a pathlie yi.
42007020	Zingsuv'a luo ama vya chiy tiyta, “Nama hing a vaw riypa paa cata na cuo ma, a cuo li kie a hrangpa ma mangkhuo kalie'a ma tapata hiehriy riypatana tiynawtuv Johan ta malie a vya pathlie,” ama ta.
42007021	Zingsuv ta cawsaa a hluvpuv kha ama pasanapa a phangphang hne thlaapa chiepa ta a tuena taayita patluo sa yite a ming cuepa zaw a pahmung sa khu patahne yi ta a cuo.
42007022	Johan taata biephyatuv tie kha, “Kaa ungla Johan kha nama hmungpa hne nama thyipa hing va chang tie ung, a ming cuepa hmung khu te a cabiepa ama cakuo, caahminghmaa a phyapa tie kha pathe sapa cuo yite a naa ruepa zaw ama thyi khu, a thiypa ca hringna luo pathu pata cuo yite Thuophaabie ca siypasapa tie'a luo chang pata ama cuo tli.
42007023	Kama naa du lipa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo,” tapata a palie yi.
42007024	Biephyatuv tie ama cakuo khu pahne, Zingsuv ta Johan kaw kha cawsaazaapuv ca a chang yi: “Khaapa hmung riypata ma ruochung luo ca nama cakuo? Thliy a hruo nakawta a canyi hyalyapa phiepahlaa kung ma?
42007025	Khaapa hmung riypata ma nama pya? Cawsie phasapa a tuepa cawsaa mang riypata ma? Cahaapa caw a tue yite a nuosa pata a awpa tie ca siepahruo ing lie muo ama aw ta!
42007026	Khaapa hmung riypa ca tama nama pya? Profet ma? A cuo, ica chang yi, profet laata a le viepa na nama hmung.
42007027	Caapathepa lie a kaw a capepa ca, ‘Mang tie, Kama ta i biephyatuv kha na hmie luo pathlielu ang te, na cuota luopuv aca sa dawle aa,’ a ta.
42007028	Ica chang yi, “A nung ta a sapa bangkhuo hrawlie Johan laata a le viepa ahunghmuo aw vayi. Cuorasala Khazing Pena chunglie a cawcepa hmuo Johan laata a le vie,” a ta.
42007029	(Ngukhyituv tie a te ra pata, a bie a thyipa cawsaa bangkhuo ta Khazing'a taata a dangna bie ca a paw yite Johan tiynawna kha ama ang.
42007030	Cuorasala Farasi ming hne Phungbie saya tie ca Johan tiynawna kha ang khing lipa yi ta Khazing ta ama cuota a tingpa kha ama thaw.)
42007031	“Ata chuo cawsaa zaw hing khaapa hne ma i taachung'a yi? Khaapa hne ma amaa lu?
42007032	Chadaw tluo lie a tu yite phuvkha hne phuvkha kha: Ramang maca tungpa yi, cuorasala luo va ungciy. Caa hlaa maacaa ngiypa yi, cuorasala caa khing va ungciy,’ a tapa haatiy hneta na amaa lu.
42007033	Tiynawtuv Johan kha viechuo ning lipa hne mingsuv dang li pata aa vaw ca niema ta, ‘Khuevuo na a hryi,’ nama ta.
42007034	Cawsaa Saacapaa ca ningpuo dangpuo pata aa vaw tiyta, niema ta, ‘Mang tie ung, a ning khu hne, a dang khu hne, ngukhyituv tie hne a suepa tie viesaa tana a cuo!’ nama ta.
42007035	Cuorasala singna a phana kaw ca a saa a nu zaw bangkhuo ta ama paluo sa,” a ta.
42007036	Farasi ming pakha ta Zingsuv kha sa dungpakhaw riypata a ku. Zingsuv ta a ing luo ca vaa te cabya lie kha a tu.
42007037	Capa khy lieca a suenung pakha a za aw. Capa nung ta Farasipapaa ing liena Zingsuv ta sa a ning tapa kha a thyi tiyta alabaster alung ruopa ta ama tuepa ungthyi ta ziyhmyi kha vya cyi te,
42007038	Zingsuv hnang luo, a phyi thabaw lie kha a tu te, caa te a mingthliy ta Zingsuv phyi kha a pacing sa nakawta a suo ta hruv te a phyi ca a pahnuo khu taata ziyhmyi a bya.
42007039	Sa ning a upa Farasipapaa ta a hmung tiyta, “Hingpapaa hing profet ta a cuo hmisi kieca ama a hriepa a suenung hing ahungma tapa hne tuokhaapa cawsaanung ma a cuo tapa kha a pachang aa,” a ta.
42007040	Zingsuv ta, “Simon ica chang khingpa na a aw,” a ta. Simon ta, “Saya, ri tie,” a ta.
42007041	Zingsuv ta, “Tuokaa ducyi a pipapaa lie tuokaa du a cyipa pahning ama aw. Pakha ta denarii zapangaa a uo te a hrangpa pakha ta sawngaa a uo.
42007042	Ama pi khu li tiyta ama pahning khata a ngiethe yi. Cacuokieca ahung kha ma ama ca a due vie aa?” a ta.
42007043	Simon ta, “Tuokaa a hluv vie a ngiethepapaa khana a due vie aa, tapatana i rue,” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “Naa hmuo,” a ta.
42007044	Canung nung'a luo kha a pali te Simon kha, “Hingpa nung hing na hmung ma? Na ing chung luo kha i vya ngie, cuorasala i phyi a siyna riypa tiy na pi vaciy, cadyiseca hingpa nung hingta i phyi kha a mingthliy ta pasiy te a suo ta a hruv.
42007045	Nama ca na pahnuo vaciy, cuorasala hingpa nung hing ca ivya ngie yalya ta ata te hing ci li ta i phyi kha a pahnuo.
42007046	Nama ca i luv kha sathu pathuv vaciy, cuorasala ama ca i phyi kha ziyhmyi ta a bya.
42007047	Cacuonakawta ica chang: a suena hluvpuv ca a ngiethe pata a cuo tli nakawta duena lepuv a paluo sa. Cuorasala a suena a cawta dyi a ngiethe pata a cuopa ca duena a cawta dyina a paluo sa ra,” a ta.
42007048	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta canungnung kha, “Na suena ca a ngiethe pata a cuo tli,” a ta.
42007049	Cuorasala saningna cabya lie ama hne a tuhnepa tie khata iema chunglie kha, “Suena hmuo a ngiethepapaa hing ahung tama a cuo?” amaa ta.
42007050	Zingsuv ta canungnung kha, “Na zangna na caa khuo tli: hnaanguota tah cakuo tie,” a ta.
42008001	Cakhutaa a ru hluo ta Zingsuv ca khypuv hne khyta hne khata tlawle te Khazing Pena kaw thuophaabie kha a ri. Ziytuv hlyihning tie khata ziy yite,
42008002	ama pasana hne thlaapa chiepa ta a tuena taayita a patluo sapa canung tie: a chung taata thlaapa chiepa pasariy a papyapa nung Mary (Magdalin tapata zaw ama ku nung),
42008003	Herod cuota mangchiykingkaatuv ta a cuopa Khuza napuvnung Joanna, Susanna, hne iema kha ama hnyi ama chie ta a byapa canung a hluvpuv ta ama cuo.
42008004	Khy kha hnang khy kha taata Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaw yite cawsaa hluvpuv amaa vya pung tiyta hing pakhingpuonabie hing a chang yi:
42008005	“Saciy a vaatuv pakha ta saciy vaa riypata aa thu. Saciy kha a vaa tiyta chekha ca luo lieta a tla nakawta cawsaa ta tlaw yite pavaa ta amaa haa.
42008006	Chekha ca lungdaapa lieta tla te a kya daa paluo raalaa pata a lyi a pahna li nakawta a caa,
42008007	saciy chekha ca a ahling hrawlie a tla nakawta kya le hne te a ahling ta a kalaa.
42008008	Saciy chekha ca lyiphaa lie tla te kya le te le zakha ta a vyi. Thyina naa a hnyipa ta thyi mangsue” a ta.
42008009	Cakhutaata a ziytuv tie ta, hing pakhingpuonabie ta a ri khingpa hing khaapatama a cuo, tapata ama hiehriy.
42008010	Zingsuv ta, “Khazing Pena bieparuv pachang khu napa ca pi pata nama cuo, cuorasala a hrangpa tie ca pakhingpuonabie ta changpa ama cuo aa. Cacuonakawta ama mang raalaa pata hmungpasie'a vayi, naa ama thlie raalaa pata pachang the'a vayi,” a ta.
42008011	Hing pakhingpuonabie siyluo ca hinghaahingtana a cuo: Saciy ca Khazing bie ta a cuo.
42008012	Luopuv lie a tlapa saciy ca Khazing bie kha ama thyi raalaa pata, Setaa kha a vaw te ama zang li riypa hne khuopa ta ama cuo li riypata ama palung chung taata Khazing bie kha a lapa pa tie ta ama cuo.
42008013	Lungdaa lie a tlapa saciy ca, Khazing bie kha thyi yite palung tluosa pata a cuhluopa tie khata ama cuo. Cuorasala ama palung chung luo a thuvpuv ta a ngie li nakawta cuokha chung dyi zang yite dyapasyana cuo a vya chiy tiyta a lie pakhaa paluopa tie ta ama cuo.
42008014	Ahling hrawlie a tlapa saciy ca, Khazing bie kha thyi yite, cuorasala palung riethyina, hnyirungna hne a nuona zaw ta ama hringna kha kalaa yite khatiy tahmuo ama thyi a hming buo lipa tie khata ama cuo.
42008015	Cuorasala lyiphaa lie a tlapa saciy ca, Khazing bie kha thyi yite, a patuv yite a dangna hne pathiypalung phya phana hneta thyi a pathyina te ta a hringkhyipa tie ta ama cuo.
42008016	Ahunghmuota myi-ing kha ama vuo tiyta beke pakhuvsue buo lipa yi ta iehmang rawlie zaw chi buo vayi. Ing chung luo cawsaa amaa ngie tiyta khe naa se yi tapata myi-ing vuonatung cunglie khana ama patu taw.
42008017	“Tahematapakieca suokha hmuo nupa cuo li'a pata suokha hmuo buvkhungpa cuo'a vyi. A paruvta tuepa hmang bangkhuo ca khena luo papya pata pachangpa hne hmungpa ama cuo aa.
42008018	“Cacuonakawta bienaa nama thlie zya kha a raaring ung; tahematapakieca a hnyipa kha pichiypa cuo'a yite, a hnyi lipa tie kha i hnyi tapata ama ruepa khahmuo lapa pata ama cuo aa,” a ta.
42008019	Cakhutaata Zingsuv a nung hne a nuta zaw kha ama'a luo amaa vaw, cuorasala cawsaa ama hluv tuv nakawta a taw khu vayi.
42008020	Ama kha, “Na nung hne na nuta zaw ta caa taw khing yite ale liena amaa daa nguoluo,” ama ta.
42008021	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta zaapuv kha, “I nung hne i nuta zaw ca Khazing bie kha thyi yite a tuepa tie khana a cuo yi,” a ta.
42008022	Ningkha ca Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca sawkawpalaw chung luo kha a ngie yite iema kha, “Tiyliy huesuo luo hue vaa ungpuv,” a ta yi. Cacuonakawta amaa thu.
42008023	Sawkawpalaw ta ama sile nguoluo ning kha Zingsuv ca aa hmung. Thliychie a vya hruo te ama sawkawpalaw lie tiy a bi nakawta ama thlaa a zang hringhruo.
42008024	Ziytuv tie ta Zingsuv kha va pathu yite, “Abyipa, Abyipa! Vuotaa ma thiy diy'a nang pa hing!” ama ta. Zingsuv ca kya thu te thliychie hne tiylaw kha a chuo yi. Die yite zezaw bangkhuo kha a die siyliy.
42008025	Ama ta, “Nama zangna ca khaalie ma a aw?” a ta yi. Iema ca ciysa yite ama nang ta a uo; pakha hne pakha kha, “Hingpapaa hing ahung tama a cuo? Thliychie hne tiylaw kha naw pi te a ri amaa ngie!” amaa ta.
42008026	Cakhutaata Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca Galilee riyliy huesuo Gerasene pe luo kha ama chiy.
42008027	Zingsuv ca ngiekuo luo a va pya pahne ta capa khy lie a awpa khuevuo ta a hryipapaa ta a vya taw. Capapaa ca cuo syipuv caw a tue li pata aw te ing lie aw li pata thluokung lie khy a sapa a cuo.
42008028	Zingsuv kha a hmung tiyta a phyi thabaw lie kha a vya bu te, a ue a aw zawdya ta khi te, “Zingsuv, Asuocepa Khazing Saacapaa! Tuokhaama ina tue khing ciy? Icaa nue, ruvnaana na pi thi kha!” a ta.
42008029	Khaapanakawma cahaa cata a khi tapa kieca Zingsuv ta thlaapa pyalyipa kha capapaa chung taa ca pya riypata naw a pi nakawta a cuo. (Cuo hluvpuv ca thlaapa pyalyipa cata patuv te, a kuv a phyi kha thaabuoliriy ta ciy yite ama huo raalaa pata, thaariy kha chipachung diy te ruopahriy luo kha a paruo taw.)
42008030	Zingsuv ta, “Na ming ahungma?” tapata a hiehriy. “I ming ca ‘Hluvpuv’ tana i cuo,” a ta. Tahematapakieca khuevuo hluvpuv kha a chunglie amaa ngie nakawtana a cuo.
42008031	Khuevuo tie khata Zingsuv kha, dena a hnyi lipa khue a thuvsapa chung luo kha malie pathla thi kha ama ta.
42008032	Capa hmang, tluope lie kha va a hluvpuv ama patle nguoluo. Cacuonakaw khuevuo tie khata Zingsuv ca va chung luo khiy malie pangie sa thi la ta yite amaa nue. Cacuonakaw naw a pi yi.
42008033	Cakhutaata khuevuo tie ca cawsaapapaa chung taakhata pya yite va chung luo ca amaa ngie. Va bangkhuo ca lungkuo taa cata a zupathla yite riyliy chung luo ama tlasa diy.
42008034	Va a khietuv tie ta cahaa cata hmang a cuopa kha ama hmung tiyta a ruo yite khypuv chung hne khyta bangkhuo ta capa thuohlaa ca ama pathyi sa.
42008035	Hmang a cuopa kha mang riypata cawsaa ca vaa yite, Zingsuv'a luo ama va pha ca khuevuo ta a pya se papaa kha caw a phata tah a tue te palung singta tah Zingsuv phyi thabaw lie a zaa tupa kha ama hmung ca ama ciy hringhruo.
42008036	Khuevuo ta a hryipapaa tuokhaatama a tluo tapa kha zaa hmungpa tie khata cawsaa zaw kha ama chang.
42008037	Gerasaa hne a kiecahriy khyta lie a awpa cawsaa bangkhuo ca ama ciysa nakawta a pya se riypa yita amaa nue. Zingsuv ca sawkawpalaw luo kha kie te a kaa.
42008038	Khuevuo ta a pya se papaa ta Zingsuv ca, “Na ma'a lie si ra thi'a ang,” tapata a nue. Cuorasala Zingsuv ta,
42008039	“Ing luo kha kaa la Khazing ta na cuota a tuepa hmang hing va chang tie yi,” ta te a pathlie. Cawsaapapaa ca cakuo te Zingsuv ta a cuota khatluv tama hmang a tue tapa kha khypuv chung bangkhuo khata a pathyi sale.
42008040	Zingsuv ca a vya kaa tiyta cawsaazaapuv ta alawna hneta ama daw, tahematapakieca ama bangkhuo ta ama kha ama za huo.
42008041	Cakhupahne Jairu ama tapa apungna-ing uvthyipapaa kha a vya chiy. Zingsuv phyi thabaw lie kha a vya bu te a ing luo cakuo riypata a nue,
42008042	tahematapakieca kung hraa hlyihning a tapa, sacanung a hnyi tlakuopa kha a thiy'a nang nguoluo. Zingsuv ca cakuo te cawsaazaapuv khata a pahlaw ta ama pahlawle.
42008043	Capa lieca kung hraa hlyihning chung thiylang pasana ta pasa te a hnyipa bangkhuo siybyi tie'a lie a hmuo diy raalaa pata pakha ta hmuo ama patluo khu li nung a aw.
42008044	Zingsuv hnang luo taakhata a vaw te a pangpe kha a hrie ca sungkhabala ta a thiy langpa ca a ping.
42008045	Zingsuv ta, “Ahungma naa hrie?” a ta. “Ahungtahmuo ca hrie va puv,” ama ta diy tiyta, Piter ta, “Abyipa, cawsaa ta ca cadung yite a nuo ta acaa nuosue patlawpa yi hing,” a ta.
42008046	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Pakhakha na naa hrie, tahematapakieca cahrana i chung taata a pyapa na i pachang,” a ta.
42008047	Cawsaanung ta ama kha a hmung ca a nu khu li tli pata a cathangsapuo pata Zingsuv phyi thabaw lie kha a vya bu te cawsaa bangkhuo hmielie ca khaapa nakawta ma Zingsuv kha a hriepa tahne sungkhabala ta a tluonapa kaw kha a ri.
42008048	Zingsuv ta, “I sacanung, na zangnapa na caa patluo sa. Hnaanguosa pata cakuo tie,” a ta.
42008049	Cahaa cata Zingsuv bie a ri nguoluo ning ca, apungna-ing a uvtuvpa ing taata cawsaa pakha vya chiy te, “Na sacanungnung ca a thiy tli, sayapapaa ca hnaa pahnaw kha tie,” a ta.
42008050	Zingsuv ta capa bie a thyi tiyta Jairu kha, “Na thlaa zang kha! zang la na sacanung ca a tluo aa,” a ta.
42008051	Ing kha a va pha tiyta, Piter, Johan, Jeim hne haatiynung a nung hne a paa ri li pata ahunghmuo ingchung luo pangie sa vayi.
42008052	Ama bangkhuo khata haatiynung kha ama caa; cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Caa kha ung; haatiynung hing thiy vyi—aa hmung nguoluo patana a cuo,” a ta.
42008053	Haatiynung a thiy tapa kha ama pachang nakawta Zingsuv kha ama pahnyisue.
42008054	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta a kuv ta patuv te, “Thu tie, i sanung,” tapata a u.
42008055	A thlaapa kha vya kaa te sungkha ta a kya thu. Zingsuv ta ning riypa suokhakha pi riypata a chang yi.
42008056	A nung hne a paa ca a ca ang ta ama ca ang, cuorasala Zingsuv ta hmang a cuopa kha ahunghmuo chang li riypata a thlu yi.
42009001	Zingsuv ta ziytuv hlyihning kha suvkha lie kupakhaw yite khuevuo bangkhuo te khuna hne pasana patluo sa khunapa cahrana hne nawhnyina a pi yi.
42009002	Cakhutaa Khazing Pena kaw ri riypa hne a pasapa patluo sa riypata a pathlie yi.
42009003	Iema kha, “Khy nama tlaw tiyta khaahmuo a phya kha ung: khuecahryi cuose, sahrie cuose, viechuo cuose, tuokaa cuose, buohryi hlepa zaw cuose a phya kha ung.
42009004	Ing caa patlung sapa tie'a lie kha capa khy taata nama pya hluo li va aw tie ung;
42009005	Ingtlung caa dapa khy tie kha sise ungla iema kha a raaringna pina pata nama phyipazaa lie a kaapa buvcing kha a cakhawsue siy tie ung,” a ta yi.
42009006	Ziytuv tie ca a tha yite khyta bangkhuo kha tlaw yite Thuophaa Bie kha hmangting ta chang yite a pasapa kha ama patluo sa.
42009007	Herod ta hmang a cuopa bangkhuo kha a thyi tiyta, a palung a tawmuo ciemuo, tahematapakieca cawsaa chekha ta tiynawtuv Johan na a hring pakhaa ama ta.
42009008	Chekha tie ta Elijah na a luo ta yite, a hrangpa tie ta hluoning profet pakhakha na a vya hring pakhaa ama ta.
42009009	Herod ta, “Johan ca a luv i pate sa tli yi; cuorasala hinghaahingta a kaw i thyi nguoluo papaa hing ahung tama a cuo aa?” a ta. Cakhutaa Zingsuv kha hmung hrahring riy'a pata a zue.
42009010	Lucuotuv tie ca vya kaa yite ama tuepa bangkhuo kha Zingsuv ama chang. Cakuo khyi yite iema selaw ta Bethsaida luo kha ama si.
42009011	Capa kaw ca zaapuv ta thyi yite ama ziy. Iema kha cuhluo yite Khazing Pena kaw kha chang yite tluona a hupa tie kha a patluo sa yi.
42009012	Ning a tla'a nang tiyta hlyihning tie kha ama'a luo a vaw yite, “Cawsaazaapuv hing pathlie yi la hingpa cahriy lie a awpa khyta luo kha va cakuo yi sala ning riypa hne a rina zaw vaa huv yi se, tahematapakieca hingpa hmang hing ruocakungna hmang tana a cuo,” ama ta.
42009013	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Niema ta ning riypa sa ca pi tie ung,” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Vaa pata hing cawsaa zaw bangkhuo cuota sa kha ma va calyi li kieca, viechuo tluo pangaa hne ngaa sahning ri li pata ma hnyi viepa aw vyi,” ama ta.
42009014	Capa lie a awpa ca capaa thaw pangaa hraw ama ta. Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha, “Cawsaa hing phuvkha lie sawngaa cie ta patu tie ung,” a ta yi.
42009015	Cahaa cata ama tue diy khu taata ama patu.
42009016	Zingsuv ta viechuo tluo pangaa hne ngaa sahning kha la te, vuoruo luo ang te, Khazing a pathuosa khu taata chechi te cawsaazaapuv kha re riypata ziytuv tie kha a pi yi.
42009017	Ama bangkhuo ta ning yite ama riy a bi diy. Ama pangaapa kha ama pahmya ca a zungpepa beke zung hraa hlyihning a ta.
42009018	Luokha ca Zingsuv ama selaw ta thlaa a chuo nguoluo ning, ziytuv tie dyi a thaa lie ama aw ning kha, “Cawsaa ta ahung ina ta yi ma,” tapata a hie hriy yi.
42009019	Iema ta, “Tiynawtuv Johan ne aca ta yi. Cuorasala a hrangpa tie ta Elijah ne ca ta yite, a hrangpa tie ta hluoning profet pakhakha na a vya hring pakhaa, aca ta yi,” ama ta.
42009020	Zingsuv ta, “Niema haw? Ahung tana a cuo ina ta ung cama?” a ta yi. Piter ta, “Nama ca Khazing Messiah tana na cuo,” a ta.
42009021	Zingsuv ta capa kaw ca ahunghmuo chang li riypata khuopuv ta bie a cung yi.
42009022	“Cawsaapa Saacapaa ca khuopuv ta te-ang'a te, uvthyi tie, tluobyilepa tie hne phungbie saya tie ta thaw'a yite ama thie aa. Ningthung na lie kha hringna luo pathu pakhaa pata a cuo aa,” a ta yi.
42009023	Cakhutaa iema bangkhuo kha, “Ahunghmuo cuose naa ziytuv a cuo khingpa ca ama khingna kha thuse pata, a vieluo kha ningting a puv sala na ziy se.
42009024	Tahematapakieca ama hringna aa bangpa a khingpa tie ca ama hringna kha a sung'a yite, cuorasala kama kawlieta a hringna a pahlipa tie ca khuona kha ama hmung aa.
42009025	Cawsaa pakha ta Chuelyi hing a bangkhuo ta cu ra sala a hringna aa sung kieca khaapama a thlahne aa?
42009026	Cawsaa pakha ta kama hne i bie kha a zaakhyi kieca, Cawsaa Saacapaa zaw ta a rungnaana, a Paa rungnaana hne a pathepa avuoming rungnaana hne aa zuv thueta a zaakhyi ra aa.
42009027	Cuorasala biehmisi tana ica chang: hinglie a awpa hrawlie hing Khazing Pena a tlungpa ama hmung hluo li ta a thiy li riypa ama aw,” a ta.
42009028	Hingpa bie a ri khu taata ning cari hraw a ta pata, Zingsuv ta Piter, Johan, hne Jeim kha ku yite thlaa chuo re pata tluo luo a kie khyi yi.
42009029	Thlaa a chuo nguoluo ning kha a hminghmie ca a vya thle te a caw ca ming khepahli nate ta a ruo.
42009030	Sungkhabala ta cawsaa pahning, Moses hne Elijah ta ama kha bie a maa rue nguoluo pata ama hmung.
42009031	Vuoruo rungnaana hneta zaa luo yite Jerusalem lie a thiyna riypa kaw kha amaa rue.
42009032	Piter hne a viesaa zaw ca thuvhunglung khata amaa hmung, cuorasala amaa kya cha ca Zingsuv rungnaana hne ama hne a daahnepa cawsaa pahning kha ama hmung.
42009033	Capa cawsaa pahning tie ta ama cakuose nguoluo ning kha Piter ta, “Abyipa, hinglie awpa hing kiema cuota a pha! Thluodaa suothung sa'a pate, suokha nama cuo, suokha Moses cuo, hne suokha Elijah cuota a cuo aa,” a ta. Ama taca khaapama i ri tapa kha pachang tange vyi.
42009034	Bie a ri nguoluo ning kha amyi kya pya te a ningdiy ta a pakhuo yi; amyi ta a pahlaw nakaw yi ta ziytuv tie ca ama ciy.
42009035	Amyi chung taata ueryi suokha za paring te, “Hingpapaa hing i tlawpa i saacapaa tana a cuo, a bie naathlie ung,” a ta.
42009036	Ueryi a chuo pahne Zingsuv kha ama selaw ta a awpa ama hmung. Ziytuv tie ca a dieta tah aw yite ama hmungpa hmang kha capa chung ca ahunghmuo chang li pata ama za aw.
42009037	A mawluopa tluocung taata ama za cung pata cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama vaa taw.
42009038	Zaapuv chung taata cawsaapapaa pakha ta vya khi te, “Saya, i saacapaa pakha dyi i hnyi tlakuopa hing na mangpa tie.
42009039	Sungkhabala ta thlaapa ta patuv te a khi a u, a pakaa taata abuvcaphawpa a pyana te ta a siy, khuosa ta tue te pya se khing vyi.
42009040	Caa ziytuv tie kha papya riypata i nue raalaa yi ca papya khu vayi,” a ta.
42009041	Zingsuv ta, “Zangna hnyi li, a pali a pahnaa ta a hringpa phang! Kha cuo ma niema'a lie i aw kalie a hu'a te nama nang ica ca kalie yi a hu aa? Na saacapaa ca hing luo hing a vaw khyi tie,” a ta.
42009042	Haatiypapaa ca a vaw nguoluopa khata khuevuo ta alyi lie kha vaapatyi te a siy. Cuorasala Zingsuv ta thlaapa pyalyipa kha chuo te, haatiypapaa kha patluo sa te a paa kha a pi pakhaa.
42009043	Khazing lesyina kha ama hmung tiyta cawsaa bangkhuo ca ama nang ta a uo. Zingsuv ta a tuepa hmangting kawlie zaapuv ca ama kharue haa te ama aw nguoluo ning kha, ziytuv tie kyihuo kha,
42009044	“Ica chang riypa yi hing naathlie tie ung! Cawsaa Saacapaa hing cawsaa kuv luo pipa a cuo aa,” a ta yi.
42009045	Cuorasala ziytuv tie ta khaama a ri khing tapa pachang vayi. A ri khingna kha nukhuopa cuo yite, capa kaw ca ama kha hiehriy riypata a nguo vayi.
42009046	Ziytuv tie chunglie bie a ina suokha aw te; caca iema hrawlie ahungma a lece tapa a cuo.
42009047	Cuorasala ama chunglie ama ruepa kha a pachangtuv Zingsuv ta haatiy pakha kha la te a thaalie padaa te,
42009048	iema kha, “I ming ta hingpa haatiy pakha a cuhluotuv ca kama naa cuhluopa ta a cuo. Kama naa cuhluopa ca naa pathlietuv a cuhluopa ta a cuo. Tahematapakieca niema hrawlie a cawcepa ca a lecepa tana a cuo,” a ta.
42009049	Johan ta, “Abyipa, na ming ta khuevuo a papyapa pakha hmung pate muo kiema phuv a cuo li nakawta ma thlu ta,” a ta.
42009050	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Thlu kha ung, tahematapakieca niema caa du lipa ca niema caa byatuv na a cuo,” a ta.
42009051	Zingsuv lathawna riypa cuo a vya ngie hryly tiyta, Jerusalem luo si riypata a tha.
42009052	A hmie luo kha biephyatuv tie pathlielu yite, a cuota ting pacie riypata Samaria khy khykha luo kha amaa ngie.
42009053	Cuorasala capa khychung ming cata Jerusalem luo a caluo riypa ama pachang nakawta cuhluo vayi.
42009054	Ziytuv Jeim hne Johan ta capa ca ama hmung tiyta, “Abyipa iema a uv riypata vuoruo taata myi za patla sa se pala na khing'a ma?” ama ta.
42009055	Zingsuv ta a pali te a chuo yi.
42009056	Cakhutaa khy hrang luo kha ama caluo.
42009057	Luo lie ama cakuole nguoluo ning kha cawsaa pakha ta Zingsuv kha, “Na sina bangkhuo tana ica ziy aa,” a ta.
42009058	Zingsuv ta, “Cahnie ta khue hnyi yi te, pavaa ta buv ama hnyi, cuorasala Cawsaa Saacapaa ca a rina hmang hmuo hnyi vyi,” a ta.
42009059	A hrangpa pakha kha Zingsuv ta, “Na ziy tie,” a ta. Cuorasala capapaa cata, “Abyipa, i paa va paby taa ang,” a ta.
42009060	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “A thiypa tie ta amaa thiypa ca paby yi se. Nama ca vaa la Khazing Pena kaw kha va phu tie,” a ta.
42009061	A hrangpa pakha ta, “Abyipa, ica ziy aa, cuorasala vaa taa ang sala i ing lie zaa ngaapa tie kha bie vaa chang taa yi ang se,” a ta.
42009062	Zingsuv ta, “Ahunghmuo cuose thetung a patuv tli pata hnang luo a palipuopa ca Khazing Pena hneta a tla vyi,” a ta.
42010001	Cakhutaa Abyipa ta a hrangpa sawsariy kha a tlaw yite a khytlawna riypa khy ting hne hmangting luo kha a pathlielu yi.
42010002	Iema kha, “Sa hrie riypa a hluvsa raalaa pata a hrietuv ca ama cawsa, cacuonakawta sa hrie riypa a hnyituv'a luo kha sa a hrietuv a za pathliena riypata thlaa chuo tie ung.
42010003	Si tie ung! Tuv taata zaw cahnie hraw luo pathliepa haatana ica pathlie yi.
42010004	Tuokaa baw cuose, sahrie cuose, phyipakaw cuose a phya kha ung; ahunghmuo luopuv lie bie a chang kha ung.
42010005	Ing ingkhakha chung luo namaa ngie tiyta, ‘Hing ing chunglie diena aw mangsue,’ ta taa tie ung.
42010006	Diena a khingpa a za aw kieca, nama bie a changnapa diena ca a cunglie aw sala; cahaa cata a cuo li kieca diena ca niema'a luo vya kaa se.
42010007	Capa ing lieca aw ungla, khaapa aca pi zaw yi ta ning ungla dang tie ung; tahematapakieca re a hrietuv ca a hrie muo kha a hmung riypatana a cuo. Ingkha hnang ingkha ta a palaw'a va ungciy.
42010008	Khykhakha luo namaa ngie tiyta ing acaa patlung sa kie yi ca, nama hmielie ama kya pachiepa bangkhuo kha ning ungla,
42010009	capa khy lie a awpa a pasapa kha patluo sa ungla, ‘Khazing Pena na a ngie tli,’ tapata chang tie ung.
42010010	Cuorasala khykhakha luo namaa ngie tiyta ingtlung aca da kie yi ca, luopuv luo kha pya ungla,
42010011	‘Nama phalina paluo sa nata ma phyi lie malie a kaapa nama khy lie buvcing hmuota maca cakhawsue siy yi. Cuorasala Khazing Pena na a ngie tli tapa khaca maw khya ung!”
42010012	Ica chang yi: Bierinapa ning thueta capa khy ca Sodom khy laata a te-ang vie aa! a ta.
42010013	Khorazin khy, thluechiylipa tana na cuo! Bethsaida khy, thluechiylipa tana na cuo! Niema'a lie tuepa kharuehaa hmang hing Tair hne Sidon lie tuepa za cuo sala, pang cawpa a hryi'a yite, ama luv lie buvcuo a phuv'a yite amaa ngiepachiynapa a za syisa'a mangtli!
42010014	Cuorasala bierina ning thue ca niema laa hingta Tair hne Sidon cuota nangduena a aw vie aa.
42010015	Cakhutaa, nama Kapernaum, vuoruo te cyicalangpa tama na cuo aa? Cuo'a vyi, Hell luo thawpa tana na cuo aa, a ta.
42010016	Zingsuv ta ama a ziytuv tie kha, “Ahunghmuo cuose niema bie naa caa thliepa ca kama bie naa naa thliepa ta ama cuo, niema caa thawpa tie ca kama zaw naa thawpa ama cuo, kama naa thawpa bangkhuo ca naa pathlietuv kha a thawpa ama cuo,” a ta.
42010017	Sawsariy tie ca palungtluo ciemuo pata vya kaa yite, “Abyipa nama ming taca khuevuo tie hmuo ma ri malie amaa ngie,” ama ta.
42010018	Zingsuv ta, “Setaa kha vuoruo taata thinghlaa haata a za tlapa i hmung.
42010019	Mang tie ung: Naw hnyina ca pi yi ang te nama carie tie cahrana kha te khuna ica pi nakaw yi ta pariy hne tluociekuo hmuo tlaw ungla ruvnaana ca pi'a vayi.
42010020	Cuorasala khuevuo tie ta nama ri acaa ngie nakaw yi ta nama palung tluo kha se; vuoruo lieta nama ming capepa a cuo nakaw tuv khata nama palung tluo se,” a ta yi.
42010021	Khapa cuo ning kha Zingsuv ca Thlaapa Pathe ta palungtluona hne pabi sa te, “I paa, vuoruo Byi hne alyi Byi, a singpa hne a thepa tie'a taata na nupa hmang kha singna hne thena a hnyi lipa tie'a lie na paluo sa nakawta icaa law. A cuo, I paa, hingpa hing nama ta cuose tapa na khing nakaw na a cuo.
42010022	“I Paa ta hmangting bangkhuo kha ina pi tli. Saacapaa hing ahung tama a cuo tapa kha Paa ri li pata ahunghmuota pachang vayi, Paa hing ahung ta ma a cuo tapa zaw kha Saacapaa hne Saacapaa ta a tlaw yite iema'a lie a phupa tie ri li pata ahungtahmuo pachang vayi.
42010023	Cakhutaa, Zingsuv ca ziytuv tie'a luo kha a pali te iema dyi thyi pata, “Nama hmungpa hmang a hmungpa ming hing khatluv ta thluechiypa tama ama cuo!
42010024	Ica chang yi: profet hne siepahruo tie zaw ta niema nama hmungpa hing ama za hmung khing raalaa pata za hmung khu vayi, ama za thyi khing raalaa pata za thyi khu vayi,” a ta.
42010025	Phungbie saya pakha ta a vaw te Zingsuv kha a dyapasya khing nakawta, “Saya chuozaa hringna hmung riypata khaama i tue aa,” a ta.
42010026	Zingsuv ta, “Caapathepa lie tuokhaatama aa cape? Tuokhaatama na ri?” a ta.
42010027	Cawsaapapaa ta, “Abyipa na Khazing ca na pathiypalung yalya, na hringna yalya, na cahrana yalya, hne na ruena yalya ta due'a cate; na ingpaa zaw kha nama naa duepa haata na due ra aa, a ta,” a ta.
42010028	Zingsuv ta, “Na ripa ca a hmuo, cahaa cata va tue la na hring aa,” a ta.
42010029	Cuorasala ama hne ama kha duo a pacu khing nakawta, Zingsuv kyihuo khata, “Ahung kha ma i ingpaa ca a cuo,” a ta.
42010030	Zingsuv ta, “Cawsaa pakha kha Jerusalem taata Jeriko luo kha a si. Cahaa cata a si ning kha damie tie ta patuv yite, a caw kha hlepa diy yite ama tuv khu taata a thiy'a nang pata ama thuse.
42010031	Capa ning cata tluobyi pakha ca capa luopuv luo ca ziy te cawsaapapaa kha a hmung ca kuo kha luota a cahriy.
42010032	Cahaa ngiethie cata Levipa pakha zaw capa hmang luo ca vya chiy te a hmung ca kuo kha luota a ca hriy ra.
42010033	Cuorasala Samaria ming pakha ca khy a tlaw pata capa luo ca vya chiy te cawsaapapaa kha a hmung ca a ngiechi hringhruo.
42010034	Capapaa luo ca vaa te a hmaa kha chiytiy hne mingsuv tiy a thuv khu taata a catawpa; cakhutaa cawsaapapaa ca a sahring cung luo kha khang te khyche a rina ing luo kha vaa khyi te capa lieca a mangchiy.
42010035	A mawluo ta denarii phiehning kha papya te khyche a rina ing a huotuvpapaa kha pi te, ‘Ama hing a phata tah za mangchiy la ama cuota na pachuo viepa bangkhuo ca hingpa luo i vya kaa pakhaa thueta ica thung diy aa, a ta,” a ta.
42010036	Zingsuv ta, “Hingpa cawsaa pathung lie hing ahung hingma damie tie ta ama patuvpapaa ingpaa ta a cuo tapata na rue?” tapata a hiehriy.
42010037	Phungbie sayapaa ta, “Ama a ngiechituvpapaa kha,” tapata a palie. Zingsuv ta, “Cakuo la capa haa cata va tue tie,” a ta.
42010038	Zingsuv hne a ziytuv tie khy ama tlawle ning kha khy khykha luo chiy yite Martha ama ta nung ta a ing lie aa patlung sa yi.
42010039	Ama ta Mary ama ta nung nuta pakha hnyi te, Abyipa phyi thabaw lie kha a tu te a bie kha naa a thlie.
42010040	Martha ca a re a hluvsa nakawta a palung rie thyi te Zingsuv kha, “Abyipa, i nutanung ta re bangkhuo kama dyi i naa ringpa hing na ngie aa raw thluo ma? Re vaa bya la ta tie,” a ta.
42010041	Zingsuv ta, “Martha, Martha! Nama ca hmang hluvpuv kawlie khata na palung rie a thyi,
42010042	aa hu hmisipa suokha dyina a aw. Mary ta aa hmuopa hmang ca a tlaw tli te ahungtahmuo chuv'a vayi,” a ta.
42011001	Luokha ca Zingsuv kha suvkha lie thlaa a chuo. A pachuo pahne a ziytuv pakha ta, “Abyipa, Johan ta a ziytuv tie thlaa chuo a changpa haayita thlaa chuo malie chang ra tie,” a ta.
42011002	Zingsuv ta, “Hinghaahingtana thlaa nama chuo riypata a cuo aa: Ima Paa, Na ming pathepa ca pa-uvsathyi pata cuo mangsue; na penapa tlung paa tie se.
42011003	Ningting maa hupa sa ca malie pi tie.
42011004	Ma cunglie a suepa tie maa ngiethe pahaayita, ma suena kha malie a ngiethe ra tie. A ruvpa pasupaliyna luo malie papha sa kha,’ nama ta aa,” a ta.
42011005	Cakhutaa iema kha, “Abiephungpa ta niema hrawlie pakhakha ca zuocang ta a viesaa ing luo kha vaa te, ‘I viesaapa, viechuo tluo thung na picaw thi tie.
42011006	I viesaa pakha ata balata hing vya chiy te i pi riy hnyi va ang,’ a ta.
42011007	Ama ta ingchung taata, ‘Hnaa na pahnaw kha, ingchiy khaa tli pate i saata zaw hne maa zie tli. Kya thu pata ca pi khu va tli ang,’ a ta.
42011008	Ica chang yi: kya thu li pata hne viechuo kha pi paluo li pata aw ra mang sala a viesaa a cuo nakaw hne nangzaa li pata a hie byalya nakawta kya thu'a te a khingpa bangkhuo kha a pi aa.
42011009	Cacuonakawta ica chang yi: hie ungla pi pata nama cuo aa; huv ungla nama hmung aa, cakhaw ungla nama cuota ingchiy ca pahaw pata a cuo aa.
42011010	Tahematapakieca a hiepa bangkhuo ca pi pata cuo'a yite, a huvpa bangkhuo ta ama hmung aa, a cakhawpa bangkhuo ca ingchiy kha pahawpa pata ama cuo aa.
42011011	Niema chung taahingta na saata tah ngaa caa hie sala pariy a pipa nama aw'a ma?
42011012	Aatiy acaa hie pata tluociekuopa a pipa nama aw'a ma?
42011013	Hing tluv ta nama pha li thluo pata nama saata zaw kha hmangphapa pi riypa nama pachang kieca, vuoruo lie a awpa nama Paa taca a hiepa tie kha Thlaapa Pathe ca pi li pata aw changchiy'a vayi,” a ta.
42011014	Zingsuv ta bie a ri the lipa khuevuo kha papya te; khuevuo a pya khu taata bie a ri the lipa cawsaapapaa cata bie a ri ca cawsaazaapuv ca ama nang ta a uo,
42011015	Cuorasala cawsaa chekha ta, “Khuevuo tie byicepa Beelzebul ming tana khuevuo hing a papya,” ama ta.
42011016	A hrangpa tie ta ama dyapasya khing nakawta, vuoruo taata a cuopa kharuehaa hmang suokha tue riypata ama hie.
42011017	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta ama ruenapa kha a pachang nakawta iema kha, “Tuokhaapa pena hmuo cuose iema hne iema a che yite amaa du kieca ama ra aa; iema'a na iema a dupa chungkhue ca amaa chepatlaa.
42011018	Setaa zaw a phuv a phuv ta amaa du kieca, tuokhaatama a pena ca a daa khu aa? Niema ta Beelzebul ming tana khuevuo a papya ina ta ungciy.
42011019	Cahaa cata i papya kiehaw, nama khuevuo papyatuv tie kha ahung ming tama ama papya? Cacuonakawta iema khana nama bie a chituv ta a cuo'a yi.
42011020	Cuorasala kama ca Khazing cahrana ta khuevuo kha i papya pata a cuo kieca, Khazing Pena ca niema'a luo a vya pha tli.
42011021	A thaaruvpapaa ta a cehre bangkhuo hneta a ing kha a huo kieca a hnyipa hmang ca a bang taw.
42011022	Cuorasala a thaaruv viepapaa ta a du te a te tiyta, ing a hnyituvpapaa ta aa buchuopa cehre bangkhuo ca lapa diy te a paruvpa chechiy kha malie a re patlaa diy yi.
42011023	Kama naa daakhyi lipa bangkhuo ca naa dutuv tana ama cuo; pahmyapakhaw naa bya lipa ca a cadaapatlaatuv tana a cuo,” a ta.
42011024	Thlaapa pyalyipa pakha ca cawsaa pakha chung taata a pya tiyta a pahyna hmang huv riypata ruocaapa chunglie kha hmangting ta a khie. Suvkha hmuo a hmung khu li tiyta, amaa na ama kha, ‘I pya se ciepa i ing luo khana i kaa pakhaa aa, aa ta.’
42011025	A va kaa ca pathe phiyliy te a chikaky pata a za awpa kha a hmung.
42011026	Cakhutaa va pya te ama laata a chie viepa thlaapa pasariy kha a vya chiy yite capa lieca ama aw. Ca cawsaapapaa a chuona lie a daahmang ca a hruothu lie laata a ruv vie,” a ta.
42011027	Zingsuv ta hingpa bie a ri diy pahne ta cawsaazaapuv chung taata canung pakha kya khi te, “Nama caa phyapa hne ahnungtiy caa pipa nung hing khatluv tama thluechiypa a cuo! a ta.
42011028	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Khazing bie kha thyi yite a ziypa tie na thluechiyviepa ta a cuo yi,” a ta.
42011029	Cawsaa ama vya hluv vie hryly tiyta, Zingsuv ta, “Ata chuo cawsaa hing a pha li hringhruopa tana ama cuo! Pamangsana tuepa riypa a maa hie, cuorasala Jonah pamangsana ta li pata kharuehaa hmang hrangpa khaahmuo pahmung sapa cuo'a vayi.
42011030	Profet Jonah ca Nineveh cawsaa zaw cuota pamangsana a za cuo pahaakhata Cawsaa Saacapaa zaw hing ata chuo cawsaa zaw cuota pamangsana a cuo ra aa.
42011031	Bieripana ning thueta sungluo ruo siepahruonung ca a daa'a te ata chuo cawsaa zaw hing sue a phaw aa, tahematapakieca Solomon singna kha naathlie riypata alyi dena luo taata a vya pha; mang tie ung: Solomon laata a le viepa na hingpa lie hing a aw.
42011032	Bieripana ning thueta Nineveh khy ming zaw kha a daa'a yite ata chuo cawsaa zaw kha sue ama phaw aa, tahematapakieca iema ca Jonah phung ripa kha ama thyi tiyta ama suena amaa ngiepachiy; mang tie ung: Jonah laata a le viepa na hingpa lie hing a aw,” a ta.
42011033	“Ahungtahmuo myi-ing ama vuo tiyta aa nuna hmang lieta chi buo vayi, beke zaw pakhuvsue buo vayi. Cawsaa amaa zaa ngie tiyta a phata tah ama hmung the riypata myivuona tung cunglie khana ama chi.
42011034	Nama ming ca nama pangpa cuota myi-ing tana a cuo. Nama ming a tluo kieca nama pangpa yalya ta khe'a te, nama ming a tluo li kieca nama pangpa ca a zing diy aa.
42011035	Cacuonakawta nama chunglie khena hing zingna a cuo li pakha pachangpasie tie ung.
42011036	Nama pangpa bangkhuo ca a khaapa kha hmuo zingna chunglie aw li pata a khe diy kieca, myi-ing ta aca khepa haa yi khata a khe diy aa,” a ta.
42011037	Bie a ri nguoluo ning kha Zingsuv ca Farasipa pakha ta sa ning a ku; cacuonakawta vaa te sa ning riypata cabya lie kha a tu.
42011038	Zingsuv ca sa a ning hluo ta a kuv aa siy lipa kha Farasipa ta hmung te a kharue a haasa.
42011039	Cacuonakaw Abyipa ta, “Niema Farasi tie ca nama panuo hne nama pakaa kha ale luo dyi pasiy ung cate, cuorasala nama chung luo ca karuo-awna hne phalina ta nama pabi.
42011040	A ngaapa tie! Ale luo a tuetuv Khazing ta a chung luo zaw kha a tue cuo vama?
42011041	Cacuonakawta a chunglie a awpa hmang tie kha a siypasapa tie va pi ungla khaapa bangkhuo kha nama cuota a pathe aa.
42011042	Farasi tie, niema ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo!
