Khazing kha putinan, hruohmie, iesing hne uohnaasiyhnaa phangting kha chehraachekha nama pi raalaa pata a dangna hne Khazing duena ca hnang nama chaw. Hingpa zaw hing tue'a ung cate muo a cunglie ma ri taapa zaw hing hnangchaw li pata nama aw'a ta.
42011043	“Farasi tie niema ca thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Apungna-ing uvthyi thude lie a tu ca khingsa ung cate, chadawtluo lie pa-uvsathyina hneta bie a changpa ca nama tlechuosa.
42011044	Thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Niema ca aa hnangna ama tue lipa thluo, cawsaa zaw ta pachang li pata a cunglie ama cakuo tawpa hne tana namaa lu,” a ta yi.
42011045	Phungbie saya tie chung taa pakha ta, “Saya hinghaahingta na ri tiyta kiema thuo zaw malie na pachi puo ra,” a ta.
42011046	Zingsuv ta, “Phungbie saya tie, niema zaw thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Cawsaa zaw ke cunglie hmang a riypa khang ung cate, cuorasala niema ca phyakhyi riypata nama kuvdaw ta hmuo de khing va ungciy,
42011047	thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Nama mingchingmingvuo tie ta ama za thiepa profet tie cuo khata thluo phasapa nama tuepa.
42011048	Cacuonakawta niema ca nama mingchingmingvuo tie ta ama za tuepa kha a daakhyituv hne a pacusatuv tana nama cuo, iema ta profet tie kha thie yite niema ta ama thluo nama tue.
42011049	Cacuonakaw muo Khazing Singna ta, ‘Kama ta profet tie hne thuophaabiephyatuv tie i pathliepa'a yi, chekha kha thie'a yite a hrangpa kha hrisaa'a yite ama thie aa,’ a ta ta.
42011050	Cacuonakaw ata chuo cawsaa zaw hing Abel ama za nawna taata patha pata bienatluophie hne hmangpathepa a lala lieta ama nawpa
42011051	Zekhariah'a nata chuelyi hruothu baataata profet tie ama za palangpa thiyse bangkhuo muo kha hie pata ama cuo aa. A cuo, ica chang yi: Ata chuo cawsaa zaw'a lie hingna hie pata a cuo aa.
42011052	“Niema Phungbie saya tie, thluechiylipa tana nama cuo! Singnapa ing pahawna taw kha cake ung cate, niema zaw a ngie lipa ung cata a ngie khingpa tie zaw kha nama pakhuo,” a ta yi.
42011053	Ale luo a pya tiyta phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie ta ama kha hue laalaw yite, hmang a hluvpuv kaw kha bie hluvpuv ama hiehriy,
42011054	a ripa bie mamaapa chung taata a suena patuv khu riypata mangkhuo yite ama huo.
42012001	Cawsaa ca a thawthaw ta a vya hmya yite amaa tlawpuole ciemuo ning kha Zingsuv ta a suokhana ta ziytuv tie kha, “Farasi tie thiynung kha a raaring tie ung—a phahruo amaa cuo pakhina kha.
42012002	Buvkhungpa bangkhuo kha pahawpa cuo diy'a te, nupa bangkhuo hing phu pata a cuo aa.
42012003	Cacuonakaw a zingna lie nama ripa ca ningchung a vuona lie pathyi sa diy pata cuo'a te, ingchiy a khaakhungna chunglie a paruv ta nama ripa kha thlungkhuv daw taata u pata a cuo aa.
42012004	Viesaa zaw, ica chang yi, pangpasaa dyi thie khu te a hnang taata capa laata a chie viepa a tue khu lipa kha ciy kha ung.
42012005	Ahungma ciy riypa tapa kha ica chang'a yi: Pangpa a thie khu taata hell luo pathla khunapa cahrana a hnyipa Khazing kha ciy tie ung. A cuo, ica chang yi, ama kha ciy tie ung.
42012006	“Mingbaw sapangaa ca piehning tana ama zaa cuo vama? Cuorasala mingbaw sakhata kha hmuo Khazing ta maw vyi.
42012007	Nama luv cung lie nama suo hmuota a ri diy. Nama thlaa zang kha se; mingbaw hluvpuv laata nama sungnaa vie.
42012008	Ica chang yi: ahunghmuo cuose cawsaa hmielie naa daakhyipa ca Cawsaa Saacapaa zaw ta Khazing avuoming hmielie i daakhyi ra aa.
42012009	Cuorasala cawsaa hmielie naa thawpa ca Cawsaa Saacapaa ta Khazing avuoming hmiekunglie i thaw ra aa.
42012010	Ahunghmuo cuose Cawsaa Saacapaa thuo a pachipa ca a ngiethepa ama cuo aa, cuorasala Thlaapa Pathe thuo a pachipa ca a ngiethepa cuo'a vayi.
42012011	Apungna-ing lie cuose, ruo-uv byi a cuo li kie nawhnyituv tie hmie luo aca chiykhyi tiy yi ta tuokhaa ta a pahrang'a ang tema tuokhaa ta i ri aa tapa kha nama palung rie thyi kha se.
42012012	Tahematapakieca capa cuo lie ta nama ri riypa ca Thlaapa Pathe na caa chang'a yi,” a ta yi.
42012013	Cawsaazaapuv hraw taata pakha ta, “Saya, i paa ru kha ina che riypata i uvta kha na changpa tie,” a ta.
42012014	Zingsuv ta, “Liechung, ahungma niema pahning a lala lie bie chipa riypata naw naa pi?” a ta.
42012015	Cakhutaata iema bangkhuo kha, “Karuo-awna phangting taakhata a cadang tie ung, tahematapakieca cawsaa pakha hringna ca a hnyirungna lie kha aw vyi,” a ta yi.
42012016	Cakhutaata pakhingpuonabie suokha a chang yi: “A hnyirungsapa pakha ca a lu taata kung a vyi laalaw.
42012017	Catiyta a palung chunglie kha; ‘I sa bangkhuo hing i china tlaw va tli. Tuokhaata i tue kie ma a pha aa?’ a ta.
42012018	Cakhutaata, ‘Hinghaahingtana i tue aa: I sa-ing hing phi'a ang tena a le vie ta i sa aa. Capa lieca i sa hne i hmang bangkhuo kha i chi aa,’ a ta.
42012019	Cakhutaa i thlaapa kha, Vya i thlaapa! Kung syipuv acaa de riypa hmang ca na hnyi mangtli. A pahy hyalya la, ning la, dang la a nuosa pata hring tie, i ta aa,’ a ta.
42012020	Cuorasala, Khazing ta, ‘A ngaapa! Ata zuo hrahring hingta na hringna ca a chuo aa; cacuonakaw na cuota naa pacungpa hmang bangkhuo hing ahung huo tama a cuo aa? a ta,’ a ta.
42012021	Cacuonakawta ama cuota chechiy aa pacung raalaa pata Khazing hmielie a hnyirung tlung lipa ca ama haa hing tana ama cuo,” a ta.
42012022	Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha, “Cacuonakaw ica chang yi: nama ning riypa sa kawlie cuose, namaa tue riypa caw kawlie cuose, nama hringna kawlie palung rie thyi pata aw kha ung.
42012023	Hringna ca sa laata biepuv vie te pangpa ca caw laata a biepuv vie.
42012024	Ra-aa khiy rue tie ung: saciy vaa vayi, sa zaw hrie vayi; sa chinapa be hne sa-ing zaw hnyi vayi; cuorasala Khazing ta a caw yi! Niema ca pavaa laata nama sungnaa vie karaa!
42012025	Nama palung rie a thyi nakawta nama hringna siymaluo pakha chuo a pasyi sa the viepa pakha chuo nama aw ma?
42012026	Cahaapaapa chechiy cawta hmuo nama tue khu li kieca khaapanakawma a hrangpa kawlie ca nama palung rie a thyi?
42012027	Ruo paapaapa khiy tuokhaatama ama le tapa kha mang tie ung: re hrie vayi, palaa zaw pahie ra vayi. Cuorasala ica chang yi: Solomon Siepahruopa rungnaana bangkhuo tahmuo hingpa paapaapa suokha puvthena hing a tluv vyi.
42012028	Cuorasala ata ning hring te mawluo myi ta rue riypa aphuvpa hing Khazing ta hing tluv ta a tuepangi kieca, niema changchiy ca khatluv tama aca tuepangi vie'a yi? Nama zangna hing a caw hringhruo de!
42012029	Cacuonakawta ning riypa hne dang riypa kaw kyalya rue pata nama palung rie thyi kha se.
42012030	Tahematapakieca chuelyiming dyi ca muo hingpa hmang ca a ruepari yi ta. Nama Paa ta hingpa hmang zaw hing namaa hu tapa kha a pachang.
42012031	Cacuonakawta ama pena kha huv taa ungla, capa hmang zaw ca pichiy pata nama cuo aa,” a ta.
42012032	Tuvrung cawta zaw, nama thlaa zang kha se, tahematapakieca niema'a luo Pena pi riypa kha nama Paa palungtluona tana a cuo.
42012033	Nama hnyipa kha zaa ungla siypasapa tie kha pi tie ung. A caw the lipa tuokaa baw kha a tue ungla a ruvhangpa ta a paruv khu li na lie hne, alungpa ta a para khu lina vuoruo lie kha a chuo the li riypa sue kha a pacung tie ung.
42012034	Tahematapakieca nama sue awna lie kha nama pathiypalung zaw a aw ra aa.
42012035	“A ting pacie pata aw ungla, nama myi-ing kha vuo pacie tie ung.
42012036	Napuv chiyna pyi taata a vya diy te ingchiy a cakhaw pahne pahaw khu paluo riypata ama byipaapa a huopa tie haakhata a raaring pata aw tie ung.
42012037	Ama byipaapa a vya kaa tiyta a hra te a raaringna a hnyipa sii ca khatluv ta thluechiypa ma a cuo! Biehmisi tana ica chang yi, a tesaw kha a saw'a te, ning riypata patu'a yite, iema kha a ysy'a yi.
42012038	Zuocang ta a vya diy kie cuose, khydyi caw ta a vya diy kie cuose, a ting pacie pata ama aw pata a hmungpa sii tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo.
42012039	Cuorasala hingpa hing pachang tie ung: ing a hnyituvpapaa ta a paruvpa a vawna cuo kha a pachang kieca a ing kha paruv sa'a vyi.
42012040	Niema zaw a raaring ung, tahematapakieca nama mangkhuo linapa cuo lie khana Cawsaa Saacapaa ca a vaw aa,” a ta.
42012041	Piter ta, “Abyipa, hing pakhingpuonabie hing kiema ma malie na ta khing, a cuo li kie cawsaazaapuv cuota ma a cuo?” a ta.
42012042	Abyipa ta, “Ahung kha ma zangtluo aa tlapa hne a singpa tluotlakhuekhuotuv ca a cuo? Zangtluo aa tlapa hne a singpa tluotlakhuekhuotuv ca a byipaapa ta a ingchungkhue mangchiy riypa hne a hrangpa sii tie kha ama'a na a cuota lie ama cuvu sa pi riypata a chipapaa khana a cuo.
42012043	A byipaapa kha ing luo a vya chiy tiyta cahaa cata a za tue nguoluo pata a hmungpa sii ca thluechiypa tana a cuo!
42012044	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: cahaapaapa sii ca a byipaapa ta a chechiy bangkhuo a mangchiytuv tana a chi aa.
42012045	Cuorasala capa sii cata, ‘I byipaapa ca a syisa a ru kalie aa,’ ta sala sii a hrangpa canung zaw capaa zaw kha tuv yite, ning dang te a pariy kieca,
42012046	vya chiy thlu'a valie a ta ning hne a pachang li cuo ning kha a byipaapa ca a vya chiy aa. A byipaapa ta a cekary diy'a te ri a ngie lipa tie hne khata a chi hne aa.
42012047	A byipaapa ta a patue sa khingpa a pachang thluo pata, a tingtuo pata a patue sa khingpa kha a tue lipa sii ca a pasasapa tuvna na a ang aa.
42012048	Cuorasala a byipaapa ta a patue sa khingpa a pachang li pata tuv aa tlapa hmang a tuepa ca dyadyata tah tuvpa tana a cuo aa. A hluvsa pipa ca a hluvsa hiepa cuo'a te, a hluv vie pipa ca a hluv vie ta hiepa a cuo aa.
42012049	“Alyi hing myi ta pahlaa riypa tamuo i vaw ta, a hlaa hunglung tli sala a pha'a pakha!
42012050	Tiy a naw riypa suokha hnyi ang te, capa hmang a tlung hluo li ca khatluv ta ma i palung rie a thyi!
42012051	Alyi luo diena phya riypatana aa vaw tapata ma ina rue ungciy? Cuo vyi, ica chang yi: a chena tlaku na i za phya.
42012052	Ata taahingta papangaa a tapa chungkhue tie ca a che'a yite, pathung ta pahning kha a du'a yite pahning ta pathung kha amaa du aa.
42012053	Iema ca amaa che aa: Paa ta saacapaa kha a du'a te saacapaa ta paa kha a du aa, nung ta sacanung kha a du'a te sacanung ta nung kha a du aa, piynung ta munung kha a du'a te munung ta piynung kha a du aa,” a ta.
42012054	Zingsuv ta cawsaazaapuv kha, “Niema ta ningtla taata amyi a kya thupa kha nama hmung tiyta, sungkha ta, ‘khy na a saa aa,’ ta ung cate a saa sasaw.
42012055	Sungluo taata thliy a kya hruo tiyta, ‘a vya paling aa,’ ta ung cate a paling sasaw
42012056	Phahruocuo tie! Niema ta alyi hne avuo kha mang ung cate khy saa riypa hne khy huo riypa kha nama pachang khu; cacuokie khaapanakawma ata chuo ningkhue aw zya hing nama pachang va?
42012057	Khaapanakawma hmangphapa tue riypata nama pathiypalung lie bie namaa chi khu va?
42012058	Cakhutaata tazaa caa cyipa hne bieripatuv byi hmie luo nama cakuo ning kha luopuv lieta ama hne a dawraw riypa kha a zue tie; cahaa cata na tue li kieca, bieripatuv byi hmie luo kha ca chiykhyi'a yite, ama ta paliy byi kuv luo ca hluo'a te thaw aca pathla'a yi.
42012059	Ica chang yi: duo aca tepa yi a chuopatlienapa piekha te ta na pi diy hluo li thaw taata pya'a vaciy,” a ta.
42013001	Capa cuo lie caci cata cawsaa chekha Zingsuv'a luo a vaw yite, Pilat ta hriykhung a rina a tue nguoluopa Galilee ming kha thie yite ama thiy kha ama hriykhung a rinapa hne a pyanapa kaw kha ama chang.
42013002	Zingsuv ta, “Cahaa cata thie pata a cuopa Galilee ming ca a hrangpa tie laata ama sue vie tapata nama rue ma?
42013003	Sue vie hlyi vayi. Ica chang yi: nama suena namaa ngiepachiy li kieca iema haa khatana nama thiy ra aa.
42013004	Siloam lie ing a suosa pata a vysapa cawsaa hlyicari tie kha Jerusalem lie a awpa cawsaa hrangpa zaw laata ama sue vie tapata nama rue ma?
42013005	Cuo vyi! Ica chang yi: nama suena namaa ngiepachiy li kieca, iema haa khatana nama thiy diy ra aa,” a ta yi.
42013006	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta hingpa pakhingpuonabie hing a chang yi: “Cawsaa pakha ta a diedung chunglie thyikuv kung kung kha a cyi. A pathyi a pathyi li a va mang tiyta khaapahmuo hmung vyi.
42013007	Cacuonakawta diedung a huotuvpapaa kha, ‘kung thung chung bangkhuo a pathyi a pathyi li kha i ve taw pata a thyi thyikha hmuo hmung buo va ang. Hupatyi tie! Khaapanakawma alyi phapa ca a ning pari aa?’ a ta.
42013008	Diedung a huotuvpapaa ta, ‘Abyipa, a ta kung khata hingca pahlung caw tie; a thabaw vya'a ang te aphuvlyi pi taa ang.
42013009	Huokung a pathyi kieca a pha ciemuo aa, a pathyi li kieca pahu sa valuo yi ciy,’ a ta,” a ta.
42013010	Luokha ca Sabbath ning kha Zingsuv ta apungna-ing lie a pacuv yi.
42013011	Capalie ca thlaapa chiepa ta kung hraa hlyicari chung a tuepa nung a aw. A ke a kang te a dangta tah a daa khu vyi.
42013012	Zingsuv ta a hmung tiyta, u te, “Canung nung, na pasanapa taata hya na zang tli,” a ta.
42013013	A kuv kha a cunglie chi te, sungkhabala ta capa nung ca a dangta tah a daa the te Khazing kha a pathuosa.
42013014	Apungna-ing a uvtuvpa ca Sabbath ning ta Zingsuv ta cawsaa a patluo sa nakawta a hi haa te, cawsaazaapuv kha, “Rehriena riypata ningcaruv a aw, capa ningcaruv chunglie ca a vaw ungla a vya patluo sa tie nie ung, Sabbath ning hingca cuo li pata!” a ta yi.
42013015	Cadyiseca Abyipa ta, “Niema phahruocuo tie! Ahunghmuo cuo ungla Sabbath ning ta nama cue hne nama laa kha a khuhriy pathluopa ung cate a ing taata papya ung cate tiy padang sa riypata nama tangle cuo vama?
42013016	Setaa ta kung hraa hlyicari chung a ciypakipa Abraham samingsahlaanung hing Sabbath ning ta hing ciypakina taahingta hya pazangpa cuo'a vama?” a ta.
42013017	Cahaa cata a ri tiyta, a carie tie kha ama nang pazaa yite, cawsaazaapuv ca kharuehaa hmang a tuepa cunglie kha amaa law.
42013018	Cacuonakaw Zingsuv ta, “Khazing Pena hing khaapa hne ma aa lu? Khaapa hne tama i taachung aa?
42013019	Cawsaa pakha ta la te diedung lie a vaapa uotuo ciy hne tana aa lu. Uotuo ca kya le te thingkungpa ta kya cuote, pavaa zaw ta a ce cunglie buv amaa tue,” a ta.
42013020	Zingsuv ta thukhyi pakhaa te, “Khazing Pena hing khaapa hne tama i taachung aa?
42013021	Canung pakha ta la te viedie beke zungthung lie a phuvpa, viedie a pathu sa diypa, thiynung hne tana aa lu,” a ta.
42013022	Zingsuv ca Jerusalem luo a sipuo pata khypuv khyta kha capiepaa yite a pacuv yi.
42013023	Chekha ta, “Abyipa, cawsaa cawta dyi ma khuona a hmung'a yi,” ama ta. Zingsuv ta,
42013024	“A baapa ingchiypakaa taakhata a ngie riypata a zue tie ung; tahematapakieca cawsaa hluvpuv ca a ngie kha amaa zue raalaa pata a ngie khu'a vayi.
42013025	Ing a hnyituvpapaa ca thu'a te ingchiy kha a khaa aa; niema ca ale lie kha a daa pata ingchiy kha cakhaw'a ung cate, ‘Abyipa, ingchiy malie pahaw tie,’ nama ta tiyta, ‘Khaapa taata ma namaa vaw tapa kha ca pachang vayi ang,’ tapata aca palie'a yi.
42013026	Cakhutaa niema ta, ‘Nama hne sa ninghne, tiy danghne puv ma za tapa kha; luopuv lie zaw malie na za pacuv pakha,’ nama ta aa.
42013027	Cuorasala ama ta, ‘Khaapa taata ma namaa vaw tapa kha ca pachang vayi ang. Niema cawsaa pha lipa zaw kama'a taahingta pya ungla cakuo tie ung,’ aca ta'a yi.
42013028	Abraham, Isak, Jakob hne profet tie bangkhuo ca Khazing Pena chunglie ama awpa kha hmung'a ung cate, niema ca ale luo thawpa nama cuo tiyta caa ung cate nama haa nama rie aa!
42013029	Cawsaa ca ningchiy, ningtla, chaluo hne sungluo taata a vaw'a yite, Khazing Pena saduona pyi lie kha sa ama ning aa.
42013030	Hnang a chuopa ca hmaa sa'a yite, hmaa a sapa ca hnang ama chuo aa,” a ta.
42013031	Capa cuo ning cata Zingsuv'a luo kha Farasi tie chekha a vaw yite, “Herod ta aca thie khing nakawta hingpa taahingta pya tie,” ama ta.
42013032	Zingsuv ta, “Vaa ungla capa cahnie ca: ‘Ata ning hne mawluo ca khuevuo kha papya'a ang te a pasapa kha i patluo sa'a yi, a ningthungnapa ning ta i re kha i patlung aa a ta,’ tapata va chang tie ung.
42013033	‘Cacuonakaw ata ning, mawluo hne hezuoning ca i cakuo nguoluo kalie thluo aa; tahematapakieca Jerusalem lie ta li pata a hrang lie ta profet pakha thie riypa ca cuo khu vyi.’
42013034	Vya Jerusalem, Jerusalem! Profet tie kha thie yi cate nama'a luo vya pathliepa tie kha alung ta a vaa sapa khy! Aapuvnung ta aatachiyta zaw kha a ma thlaa rawlie a buvkhungpa haayita yikhazaa hingma na cawsaa zaw hing i buo pazuu khuo i ting, cadyiseca khing vaciy.
42013035	Mang tie, na ing ca thusepa a cuo aa. Cakhutaata, biehmisi tana ica chang yi: ‘Abyipa ming ta a vawpa ca Khazing ta thluechiy pi mangsue,’ tapata na rithena cuo a vya pha hluo li na hmung'a va tli ciy,” a ta.
42014001	Luokha ca Sabbath ning ta Zingsuv ca Farasi uvthyi tie pakha ing luo kha sa ning riypata a vaa; capa lie ca Zingsuv ca a ngieta tah ama mangpathliy.
42014002	A kuv hne a phyi a thlingpa cawsaa pakha ca Zingsuv hmielie kha a aw.
42014003	Zingsuv ta Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie kha, “Ma phungbie ta Sabbath ning a pasapa patluo sa riypa a pa-aw ma pa-aw vama? tapata a hiehriy yi.
42014004	Cuorasala iema ta khaahmuo ri vayi. Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta cawsaapapaa ca ku te, patluo sa te, a cakuo sa.
42014005	Cakhutaata iema kha, “Niema hrawlie ta pakhakha hing a saata ma a cuo li kie a cue ma Sabbath ning ta takhue chung luo tla sala Sabbath ning a cuo nakawta thue paluo li pata nama aw'a ma?” a ta yi.
42014006	Hingpa kawlie hingta khaahmuo palie khu vayi.
42014007	Zingsuv ca khyche zaw ta sa ning kunapa lie a tuna hmang phacepa amaa tlawpa kha a hmung tiyta hing pakhingpuonabie hing a chang yi.
42014008	“Pakhakha ta napuv chiynapa pyi luo aca ku tiy yi ta a tuna phacepa lie kha a tu kha ung. Nama laata uvthyi vie zaw kha ku ra biephung yi sala,
42014009	caa kutuvpapaa yi ta nama'a luo kha tyatya a vaw pata, “Ama hing tlyi thi tie,” aca vya ta kieca nangzaahmiechi pata a ne cepa luo naa tuna a hu aa.
42014010	Cuorasala sa ning aca ku tiy yi ta a ne cepa lie kha vaa tu la caa kutuvpapaa kha a vaw'a te, viesaa, kya kie la a tuna aa suo viepa lie hing a kya tu tie aca ta aa.” Catiyta nama hne cabya lie a tuhnepa kupa cawsaazaapuv hmielie kha hmiephaa na cu aa.
42014011	Tahematapakieca iema hne iema a cyicalangpa bangkhuo ca pachungpa ta cuo'a yite, iema hne iema a panepa bangkhuo ca cyicalangpa ta ama cuo aa.
42014012	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta sa ning a kutuvpapaa kha, “Ningchung sa ning cuose zuoluo sa ning cuose na ku tiy yi ta, na viesaa, na uvnu, na tieriy hne a hnyirungpa na ingpaa kha ku kha yi; tahematapakieca iema ca nama kha ca ku hriy'a yite, cahaa cata na tuepa kha thung pata na cuo aa.
42014013	Cuorasala pyi na tue tiyta a siypasapa, kuvsaw phyisawpa, hne mingcuepa tie kha ku yi la iema ca aca ku hriy khu li nakaw'a yi ta
42014014	thluechiy na hmung aa. Cawsaa a dangpa tie thiyna taata ama thupakhaa ning kha Khazing ta aca thung aa,” a ta.
42014015	Zuo sa ning ama saw rapa pakha ta capa bie ca vya thyi te, Zingsuv kha, “Khazing Pena chung saduona pyi lie a tu rapa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo!” a ta.
42014016	Zingsuv ta ama kha, “Cawsaa pakha ta saduona pyi lepuv tue te cawsaa a hluvpuv a saw yi.
42014017	Saduona cuo a de tiyta a kupa tie'a luo kha a sii tie kha pathlie yite, ‘A vaw paa tie ung, khaapa bangkhuo pachie ciepa tana a cuo tli,’ a pata sa yi.
42014018	Cuorasala ama bangkhuo ta ama cuo the linapa kha ama ri kaluo diy. A pakhanapapaa ta ama kha, ‘Luruo baata suokha calyi ang te i va mang na a hu, naa ngiethe thi tie,’ a ta.
42014019	A hrangpa pakha ta, ‘Cuetungpa tuepangaa calyi ang te ata hing a chiepha mangna ta re pahrie sa pachiy naa se ang i ta ning cuote naa ngiethe thi tie,’ a ta.
42014020	A hrangpa pakha ta napuv i chiy khu patahne cuote a vaw hmuo'a va ang,’ a ta.
42014021	Cacuonakawta changtaapapaa ca a byipaapa'a luo kha kaa te bie bangkhuo kha a chang. A byipaapa ca a hi haasa te a siipaapa kyihuo khata, ‘Khychung luopuvlepa hne luopuvcawpa zaw luo kha a catli pata vaa la a siypasapa, kuvsaw phyisawpa, hne mingcuepa tie kha a vya chiy tie yi,’ a ta.
42014022	A siipaapa cata, ‘Abyipa, na ripa haakhata i tue diy tli, cuorasala a khuo ca a tlaw kalie,’ a ta.
42014023	Cakhutaata a byipaapa ta a siipaapa kha, ‘Luopuvlepa hne luocawta bangkhuo luo kha vaa la i ing a bi hluo li cawsaa kha a vya chiy tie yi.
42014024	Ica chang yi: i za ku ciepa tie pakha tahmuo i zuosa duopa hing a pacuo'a vayi,” a ta.
42014025	Cawsaazaapuv ta Zingsuv ama ziyle nguoluo pata Zingsuv ca a pali te iema kha,
42014026	“Ahunghmuo cuose kama'a luo a vawpa ca a nung hne a paa, a napuv hne a saata zaw, a uvnu hne a sieta zaw, ama hne ama zaw kha aa hue li kieca naa ziytuv cuo khu'a vyi.
42014027	Ahunghmuo cuose vieluotung kha a puv pata kama hnang naa ziy lipa ca kama naa ziytuv cuo khu'a vayi.
42014028	Niema chung taa pakha ta ing a suopuv sa namaa ting kieca i palang nate i tuokaa ta a de'a ma a de'a va ma tapa pachang riypata a tu pata a chuo riypa kha tue taa li pata nama aw'a ma?
42014029	Caacuolikieca inghruo kha na bang khu taata palang li pata aw'a cate, a hmungpa bangkhuo ta aca pahnyisue'a yi.
42014030	‘Hingpapaa hing ing sa ca pathu raalaa te a palang khu va hinghaw,’ a ca ta'a yi, a ta.
42014031	Rieka thawhraa a hnyipa siepahruo pakha ta ama a du riypata rieka thawkiy hne a vya sipa siepahruo kha a du'a nang pata a cuo kieca, a tu taa'a te muo khapa siepahruo kha a du khu na riypa thaazuo a hnyi hne hnyi li kha a rue taa'a ta.
42014032	A du khunapa thaazuo a hnyi li kieca, siepahruo hrangpapaa luohlaa lie a aw kalie ning kha, a rena tue riypata luosituv kha a pathlie riypata a cuo.
42014033	Cahaa cata, “Niema zaw hing nama hnyipa bangkhuo nama thuse li kieca pakhahmuo naa ziytuv cuo khu'a va ungciy,” a ta yi.
42014034	Paciy ca a pha, cuorasala a iena kha a vie kieca tuokhaatama pa-ie sa pakhaa khupa a cuo aa?
42014035	Alyi cuota thlahnena hnyi vyi, aphuvlyi ta zaw hmuo thepa cuo'a vyi; thaw riypa dyi tana a cuo tli. Naa a hnyipa ta thyi tie ung,” a ta yi.
42015001	Luokha ca, ngukhyituv tie hne a suepa tie kha Zingsuv bie naathlie riypata a maa vaw.
42015002	Farasi tie hne Phungbie saya tie kha a cie yite, “Hingpapaa hing a suepa tie kha a khe yite iema hne sa zaw a ning!” ama ta.
42015003	Cacuonakaw Zingsuv ta hingpa pakhingpuonabie hing a chang yi:
42015004	“Niema hrawlie pakha ta tuv zakha hnyi sala sakha a vie pata a cuo kieca tuv sawcaky hne sacaky kha ruochung lie patle siy'a te a viepa sakha kha a hmung hluo li a huv aa, cuo vama?.
42015005	A va hmung tiyta, a letung cunglie vya khangle te a palung a tluo hringhruo.
42015006	Ing luo a vya chiy tiyta a viesaa hne a ingpaa zaw kha ku yite, ‘A viepa i tuv kha hmung ang te naa lawkhyi tie ung,’ a ta yi.
42015007	Ica chang yi: cahaa cata, sue a ngiepachiy a hu lipa aa dangpa saw caky pacaky laata a suena a ngiepachiypa a suepa pakha kawlieta vuoruo lie palungtluona a le vie a aw aa,” a ta.
42015008	“A cuo li kie, canung pakha ta ngu tuokaa phiehraa hnyi sela phiekha a pavie kieca myi-ing kha a vuo'a te, a ing kha phiy'a te, a hmung hluo li a cakiy a capie te ta a phasa pata a huv aa cuo vama?.
42015009	A hmung tiyta, a viesaa hne a ingpaa zaw kha ku'a yite, ‘I paviepa i tuokaa kha hmung pakhaa ang te naa lawkhyi tie ung,’ a ta yi.
42015010	Ica chang yi: cahaa cata, a suena a ngiepachiypa a suepa pakha kawlieta Khazing vuocung ming ama palung a tluo,’ a ta.
42015011	Zingsuv ta a ri kaliepa ca, “Luokha ca saacapaa pahning a hnyipapaa a za aw.
42015012	A syi viepapaa ta a paa kha, ‘I paa, i hmung riypata a cuopa ru ca na pi tie,’ a ta. Cacuonakaw a paa ta ru ca a che yi.
42015013	Cakhutaa ning a ru hluo ta saacapaa a syi viepa ca a hnyipa bangkhuo kha la te khy luohlaa luo kha a tlaw. A duv a khing ta hring te a hnyipa bangkhuo ca a pahli diy.
42015014	A hnyipa bangkhuo a hmuo diy khu taata capa ruo lieca khuopuv ta cakuo tlung te a kuv cahri pata a aw.
42015015	Cacuonakawta capa khy ming pakha'a luo kha re hrie riypata vaa te, ama paa cata va mangchiy riypata a lu luo kha a paphya.
42015016	Va ta a ningpa khukhuhaw kha a riybina te ta a ning khingsa raalaa pata ahungtahmuo pi vayi.
42015017	A palung kya sing te, ‘I paa rehrietuv tie kha ning tie li tamuo ama hnyi ta, kama tlaku ca hinglie hing i maasa'a nang!
42015018	Thu'a ang te na i paa luo kha si'a ang te, ‘I Paa, Khazing cunglie hne nama cunglie ta i sue tli.
42015019	Na saacapaa cuo riypata a tla va tli ang; na rehrietuv pakha haata na chi ra thi tie, i ta aa,’ a ta.
42015020	Cacuonakaw thu te a paa luo kha a si. Luohlaapuv lie a aw kalie pata a paa ta a va hmung ca, a palung tluo hringhruo te, vaa ruo te, cakuv te a pahnuo.
42015021	A saacapaapa ta, ‘I Paa, Khazing cunglie hne nama cunglie ta i sue tli. Na saacapaa cuo riypata a tla va tli ang,’ a ta.
42015022	Cuorasala a paa ta a sii zaw kha u yite, ‘A catli pata a vaw ung! Pang phacepa kha vya cyi ungla pabuv ung. A kuvdaw lie hing kuvpahryi vya pahryi ungla, a phyi lie hing phyipakaw vya pakaw tie ung.
42015023	Cakhutaata, cuetaata a thucepa kha patuv ungla thie tie ung, ning ung sala a nuo ung siy;
42015024	tahematapakieca, i saacapaa hing za thiy te a hring pakhaa; za vie te i hmung pakhaa,’ a ta. Cahaa cata pyi tue ca ama patha.
42015025	A saacapaa uvthyipa kha lu taata vya si te ing a thaa luo a vya chiy tiyta, hlaa sa pu hne luo pu kha a thyi.
42015026	Cacuonakawta a siipaapa pakha kha u te, ‘Khaapa ma a cuo nguoluo?’ ta te a hiehriy.
42015027	Ama ta, ‘Na nuta kha ing luo vya kaa tena, hnaatluosapa hne a bangta tah a vya chiy nakawta, na paa ta cuetaata a thucepa kha a thiepa,’ a ta.
42015028	Saacapaa uvthyipa ca a hi haa te ingchung luo a ngie khing li pata a aw. A paa ta kya pya te a ripasa.
42015029	Cuorasala a paa kha, ‘Mang tie, hing zaw kungnung na re kha sii haata hrie ang te, na ri caa ngie li pata aw buo va ang. Cuorasala i viesaa zaw hne a nuona pyi tue riypata mie taata sakha hmuo na pi buo vaciy!
42015030	Cuorasala siyhrawnung tie'a lieta na hnyipa bangkhuo a pachuo diypa, hingpa na saacapaapa ing luo a vya kaa tiyta cuetaata a thucepa na thiepa!’ tapata a palie.
42015031	A paa ta, ‘I saacapaa, nama ca kama'a lie aw pari cate i hnyipa bangkhuo hing nama huopa tana a cuo.
42015032	Cuorasala na nuta ca za thiy te ata hing a hring pakhaa; za vie te ata hing hmung pakhaa pata a cuo; cacuonakawta pyi tue pata palungtluona hne maa nuo riypa hrahring na a cuo, a ta,’ a ta.
42016001	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha, “A hnyirungpa pakha za aw te tluotlakhuekhuotuv pakha a hnyi. Capa tluotlakhuekhuotuv cana na tuokaa kha a cuo lipa lie a hmuo ta yite ama chang.
42016002	Cacuonakaw ama ca ku te, ‘Na kaw i thyipa hing tuokhaatama a cuo? I chechiy na mangchiynapa cazing kha a tlingsa pata na pi tie, tahematapakieca nama ca i tluotlakhuekhuotuv cuo khu'a va tli ciy,’ a ta.
42016003	Tluotlakhuekhuotuv cata ama hne ama kha, ‘I byipaapa ta i re taata ina papya'a tli. Tuokhaatama i tue aa? Alyi ta i chie khu'a va, malie a hiechaw riypa cata i nang a zaa.
42016004	Tluotlakhuekhuotuv taata ina papya tiyta cawsaa ta ama ing lie ina pa-aw sa khing riypa yita khaapama i tue aa tapa kha i pachang.’
42016005	“Cacuonakawta a byipaapa'a lie lyibuo a aw khyipa tie kha pakha hnang pakha ta ku yite a pakhanapapaa kha, ‘I byipaapa kha khazaa ma naa uo?’ a ta.
42016006	Ama ta, ‘Oliv chiytiy pung zakha,” tapata a palie. Tluotlakhuekhuotuv cata, ‘Na cazing kha va la, a catlisa pata a tu la sawngaa ta pare tie,’ a ta.
42016007	Cakhutaa a hrangpa pakha kha, ‘Nama haw khazaa ma naa uo?’ a ta. ‘Suo tuo zakha ,’ tapata a palie. ‘Tluotlakhuekhuotuv cata, ‘Na cazing kha va la la sawcari ta pare tie,’ a ta.
42016008	A dang lipa tluotlakhuekhuotuv ca singvaasa pata hne zyatesa pata hmang a tue nakawta a byipaapa ta a pathuosa. Tahematapakieca ata chuo cawsaa zaw hing ama hmang tuenapa kawlie ca khena chunglie a awpa tie laata ama singvaa ama zyate vie,” a ta.
42016009	Cacuonakaw ica chang yi: Chuelyi sue hing hmuo ungla viesaa a tue tie ung, tahematapakieca chuelyi sue a chuo tiyta chuozaa ta aa hmangpa ing liena pa-aw sapa nama cuo aa.
42016010	Chechiy cawta lie zangtluo aa tlapa ca chechiy lepa lie zaw zangtluo aa tla ra; chechiy cawta kawlie zangtluo a tla li kieca chechiy lepa kawlie zaw zangtluo a tla'a vyi.
42016011	Chuelyi sue patungpatiena kawlieta zangtluo namaa tla li kieca tuokhaatama hnyirungna tange ca pipa nama cuo khu aa?
42016012	Malie chechiy cunglie hmuo zangtluo namaa tla li kieca tuokhaatama niema huo a cuopa chechiy ca niema kha aca pi khing'a yi.
42016013	“Sii pakha ca a byi pahning re hrie khu'a vyi; pakha kha hue'a te pakha kha a due aa, pakha'a lie kha a ringchuo a chiysa pata aw'a te pakha kha siysaa ri li pata a aw aa. Khazing re hne chuelyi hnyirungna re hrie pakhe khu'a va ungciy,” a ta yi.
42016014	Capa bangkhuo ca tuokaa a khingsapa Farasi tie ta ama thyi tiyta, Zingsuv kha ama pahnyisue.
42016015	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta, “Niema hing malie minghmung lieca a dang hruo namaa cuo, cuorasala Khazing ta nama pathiypalung kha aca pachang yi. Tahematapakieca cawsaa ta muosung ciemuo pata ama ruepa ca Khazing hmiekunglieta duvsamakhie aa chiypa a cuo.
42016016	Moses Phungbie hne profet tie capepa caa zaw ca tiynawtuv Johan chuo te cuo khatana a cuo; capa cuo ning taacata Khazing Pena Thuophaabie ca phu pata cuote, cawsaa ting ta pena chung luo kha amaa ngie chuv patlaw.
42016017	Cuorasala Phungbie chunglie a cawcepa caasuo suokhata hmuo a viepa laata vuoruo hne alyi rapa na a na vie aa,” a ta.
42016018	Ahunghmuo a napuv ma te canung hrangpa hne a hlawpa ca nungvaathingsuena a tuepa tana a cuo; cahaa cata a navaapa hne a chepa canung a hlawpa zaw nungvaathingsuena a tuepa tana a cuo.
42016019	Luokha ca a hnyirungpa cawsaa pakha aw te, cawsie muoruvpa kha a tue te a ningtating ta tuokaa a hluvsa pachuo pata pyi a tue taw.
42016020	Lazaruh ama tapa a siypasapa, a pangpa bangkhuo hmaa ta a buvpapaa ca
42016021	a cabya taata a tlapa sa zungpepa kha a haa'a ang te i riy a bi aa tapa a ruechuona hne a hnyirungpapaa chiypakaa lie kha laa te, uv kha a vaw te a hmaa kha ama vya pali taw.
42016022	“Siypasapapaa ca thiy te avuoming ta Abraham hne aw riypata ama sikhyi. A hnyirungpapaa zaw kha thiy te ama paby.
42016023	Hell chunglie riethyina a ang nguoluo pata cungluo kha a kya mang ca luohlaapuv taata Abaraham hne a thaalie ta Lazaruh kha a kya hmung yi.
42016024	Khuosa ta u te, ‘I paa Abraham! ngie na chi thi tie. Lazaruh kha za pathlie thi la a kuv daw kha tiy luo naw sala i palyi lie hing na za pathlasue se, tahematapakieca hingpa myi chunglie hing i rie na a thyituv tli!’ a ta.
42016025	Cuorasala Abraham ta, ‘I saacapaa, na hring chunglie kha a phana hmung tli cate, cahaa cata Lazaruh ta a pha lipa a cu. Cuorasala ata hing ca ama ca hingpa lie hing a nuosa pata aw te, nama ca ruvnaanapa na ang.
42016026	Cahlyitaw taata maa lalalie hing ryihue a thuvsapa aw te, hingpa taata namaa luo a vya chiy khingpa zaw vya chiy khu lipa yi ta, nama'a taata kiema'a luo a vaw khingpa zaw a vaw khu vayi,’ a ta.
42016027	A hnyirungpapaa ta, ‘I paa, Lazaruh kha i paa ing luo pathlie thi tie.
42016028	Tahematapakieca uvnu papangaa hnyi yi ang te iema chuo, hingpa te-angna luo hing ama vya chiy ra li riypata a raaringna va pi thi yi se, a ta.
42016029	“Abraham ta, ‘Na uvnu zaw ca ama bie naa ama thlie riypa Moses hne profet tie ama hnyi,’ a ta.
42016030	A hnyirungpapaa cata, ‘Cuo vyi, I paa Abraham, thiyna taata pakhakha thupakhaa sala iema'a luo kha a vaa kieca ama suena kha amaa ngiepachiy aa,’ a ta.
42016031	Abraham ta, ‘Moses hne profet tie bie kha amaa ngie li kieca cawsaa pakhakha thiyna taata a thupakhaa zaw ta zang hlyi'a vayi,” a ta.
42017001	Zingsuv ta ama a ziytuv tie kha, “Suena chung luo cawsaa a patla sapa hmang ca a aw aa, cuorasala capa hmang a pacuo sapa ca a ping a suvpa tana a cuo.
42017002	Hingpa haatiyta zaw hrawlie ta pakha hing hmuo a pasue sapa ca a rue lie sacuo rienapa alungtung lesapa ciypuo pata riyliy chung luo thaw pata cuo sala a cuota a pha vie aa.
42017003	A raaring tie ung. “Na uvnu kha a sue kieca pasiypa-ya tie, a ngiepachiy kieca a ngiethe tie.
42017004	Ningkha ta na cunglie yi sariy sue sala a yi kyry ta nama'a luo kha a vaw te, ‘I ngiepachiy ne,’ aca ta kieca a ngiethe tie,” a ta.
42017005	Ziytuv tie ta Abyipa kha, “Ma zangna hing pale sa vie tie,” ama ta.
42017006	Zingsuv ta, “Uotuo hmung tie zangna nama hnyi kieca, hing puvlung kung hing, ‘Na thariy hne yalya ta a kya phie la riyliy lie hue vaa caby tie,’ ta ungla nama ri acaa ngie'a yi.
42017007	“Niema hrawlie hing ahungma le thawna taata, a cuo li kie tuvkhiena taata ata bala a vya chiypa nama sii kha, ‘Luo hing a vaw la cabya lie a vya tu tie,’ a ta'a ungciy?
42017008	‘Zuosa kha vya pachie la, buohryi syipa kha a hryi la, sa i ning chung hne i dang chung kha na mangchiy la, cakhutaa cata ning la dang tie,’ ta'a va ung cama?
42017009	Sii ca na changpa kha a tue nakawta alawna bie na hluo ma?
42017010	Niema zaw cahaacatana nama cuo ra: tue riypata aca changpa yi nama tue diy tiyta, ‘Kiema ca muo a hnyi lipa sii tana ma cuo; ma tue riypata a cuopa ta dyi khana ma tue,’ ta tie ung,’ a ta.
42017011	Zingsuv ca Jerusalem luo a sile pata, Samaria hne Galilee ruo kha a capiepaale.
42017012	Khy khykha luo kha a ngie ca caahminghmaa ta a pasapa cawsaa pahraa ta amaa vya taw.
42017013	Luohlaa puo lie kha a daa yite, “Zingsuv, Abyipa, malie ngiechi thi tie,” ta yite ama khi.
42017014	Zingsuv ta iema kha a hmung tiy yi ta, “Cakuo ungla tluobyi tie kha vaa pamang sa tie ung,” a ta yi. Ama vaale pata ama pathe.
42017015	Iema hrawlie pakha ta a tluopa kha aa hmung tiyta, kaa te Khazing kha khuopuv ta a pathuosa.
42017016	Zingsuv phyi thabaw lie kha a bu te Zingsuv kha alawna bie a hluo. Ama ca Samaria ming ta a cuo.
42017017	Zingsuv ta, “Pahraa patluo sapa cuo vayi ma? A hrangpa pacaky tie haw khaaliema ama aw?
42017018	Hing ruohrangpapaa hing ri li pata pakha hmuo vya kaa pata Khazing pathuosa vade yi?
42017019	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta, “Thu la cakuo tie; na zangnapa na caa patluo sa,” a ta.
42017020	Luokha ca Farasi tie ta Zingsuv kha khatiy thuema Khazing Pena ca a tlung aa tapata ama hiehriy. “Ama ta, “Khazing Pena ca ming ta hmung khupa phang ta za tlung'a vyi.
42017021	Ahungtahmuo, ‘Mang tie, lie hing na a aw! a cuo li kie, ‘lie hue na a aw! ta'a vayi; tahematapakieca, Khazing Pena ca nama chunglie na a aw,” a ta yi.
42017022	Cakhutaata a ziytuv tie kha, “Niema ta cawsaa saacapaapa ningcuo kha ning kha chuona ma hmung khing hringhruo nama ta cuo kha a vya chiy aa; cuorasala hmung'a va ungciy.
42017023	Niema kha, “Mang tie ung, lie hue a aw hue! a cuo li kie, lie hing a aw hing,’ a ca ta'a yi. Vaa khya ung, va pya khya ung.
42017024	Thinghlaa ca avuo kiy kha taata kiy kha te a cakang te a khe diypa haakhata Cawsaa Saacapaa ca capa ningkhue thueta ca a cuo ra aa.
42017025	Cuorasala a suokhana ta khuosa ta te-ang taa'a te ata chuo cawsaa tie hingta ama thaw taa aa.
42017026	Noah chuo ning haakhata Cawsaa Saacapaa chuo ning zaw kha a cuo ra aa.
42017027	Noah kha tiypalaw chung luo a ngie te, tiypa-aa ta cawsaa bangkhuo a para diy nate yi ta, ning yi dang yite, amaa chiy amaa hie nguoluo thluo.
42017028	Cahaa cata, Lot chuo ning zaw a cuo ra. Cawsaa bangkhuo kha ning yi dang yite, zaa yite amaa calyi, ciy cyi yite ing ama sa.
42017029	Cuorasala Lot ta Sodom a pya se ning kha vuoruo taata myi hne ke kha khy saa ta za saa te ama palang ta a thie diy yi.
42017030	Cawsaa Saacapaa a zaa luo thueta ca cahaacatana a cuo ra aa.
42017031	“Capa ning thueta ca ing thlungkhuv lie a awpa ca ing chunglie a awpa chechiy la riypata cung kha se. Cahaa cata lu lie a awpa ta ing luo kaa hrahring kha se.
42017032	Lot napuvnung kha a thyi tie ung!
42017033	A hringnapa kha pabang a khingpa ca a hringnapa kha pahli'a te, a hringnapa a pahlipa ca a hringna kha aa bang aa.
42017034	Ica chang yi: capa zuo ningta ca iehmang hmangkha lie a ziehnepa cawsaa pahning lie kha pakha ca la pata cuo'a te, pakha ca thuse pata ama cuo aa.
42017035	Sung a suv hnepa canung pahning lie kha pakha ca lapa cuo'a te pakha ca thuse pata a cuo aa.
42017036	(“Lu lie re a hrie hnepa cawsaa pahning lie kha pakha kha la pata cuo'a te pakha kha thuse pata a cuo aa,”) a ta.
42017037	Cakhutaata, ama kha “Abyipa, Khaapaliema?” tapata ama hiehriy. Zingsuv ta, “Saa thiypa a awna lie bangkhuo luotaa aa hmyale,” a ta.
42018001	Cakhutaata, Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha palung chuo li pata thlaa chuo pari riypa kha pakhingpuonabie a chang yi.
42018002	Ama ta, “Khy khykha lieta Khazing ciy li pata cawsaa hmie zaw a mang lipa bieripatuv byi pakha a aw.
42018003	Capa khy lie ca nunghlyinung pakha aw te, capa nunghlyinung cata, “Tazaa maa cyipa lie hing naa bya thi la,” a vya ta byalya.
42018004	Cuokha chung ca a pakaa, cuorasala a hnangcaw taca, “Khazing ciy li pata cawsaa hmie zaw i mang li raalaa pata
42018005	hing nunghlyinung hing hnaa ina pahnaw pari, a vaw byalya pata riethyi ina pi li riypata a bie ca i ripa aa,” a ta.
42018006	Abyipa cata, “A pha lipa bieripatuv byi ta a ripa hing naathlie tie ung.
42018007	Cacuokieca Khazing ta aa tlawpa, ama'a luo chung zuo ta a upa tie ca ama bie ripa li pata a aw'a yi ma? Iema a bya riypata a pahaa a pasaa'a ma?
42018008	Ica chang yi: Ama bie kha a catli pata a ripa'a yi. Cuorasala Cawsaa Saacapaa aa vaw tiyta alyi lie hing zangna a hmung'a ma?” a ta.
42018009	Zingsuv ta hingpa pakhingpuonabie hing, iema'a na iema kha a zangpa, iema kha maa dang tapata a rue yite malie a nutaapa tie kha a chang yi.
42018010	“Cawsaa pahning kha thlaa chuo riypata Biena-ing luo ama cakuo, pakha ca Farasipa cuote a hrangpa pakha ca ngukhyituv ta a cuo.
42018011	Farasipapaa ca ama se ta a daa te hinghaahingta thlaa a chuo, “Vya Khazing, kama ca a ruvhangpa, cawsaa a dung a viepa, aparuvsuena a tuepa hne, hingpa ngukhyituv zaw haahingta i cuo li nakawta icaa law.
42018012	Zaakha chunglie ning hning sa uv ang te, i hmungpa tuokaa bangkhuo taata chehraachekha ica pi,” a ta.
42018013	Cuorasala ngukhyituv ca luohlaapuv luo khata a daa te vuoruo luo hmuo mang nguo li pata a cacunghnaa kha a cung te, ‘Khazing, a suepa kama hing ngie na chi thi tie,’ a ta.
42018014	Ica chang yi: “A hrangpapaa kha cuo li pata hingpapaa hingna duopacu cie pata a ing luo a cakuo; Iema hne iema a cyicalangpa bangkhuo ca pachungpa cuo'a yite, iema hne iema a panepa bangkhuo ca cyicalang pata ama cuo aa,” a ta.
42018015	Cawsaa ta ama saata zaw kha a kuv ta hrie naa se yi tapata Zingsuv'a luo amaa vawkhyi. Ziytuv tie ta ama hmung tiyta cahaa cata tue li riypata khuosa ta ama thlu.
42018016	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta ku yite, “Haatiy zaw ca kama'a luo kha a vaw yi se, thlu kha ung, tahematapakieca Khazing Pena ca hinghaapaapa cawsaa zaw cuo hing tana a cuo.
42018017	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Ahunghmuo cuose, Khazing Pena kha haatiyta haahingta a cuhluo lipa ca, capa Pena chung luo ca a ngie khu buohluo'a vayi,” a ta.
42018018	Uvtuv uvthyi pakha ta Zingsuv kha, “A phapa Saya, chuozaa hringna hmung riypata khaapama i tue aa?” a ta.
42018019	Zingsuv ta, “Khaapanakawma cawsaa phapa ina ta ciy? Khazing ri li pata ahunghmuota pha vayi.
42018020	Phungbie kha na pachang: nungvaathingsuena tue kha, lienaw kha, paruv kha, a hmuo lipa daakhyituv cuo kha, na nung hne na paa kha pa-uvsathyi yi,’ tapata a cuo pakha!” a ta.
42018021	Cawsaapapaa ta, “Hingpa phungbie bangkhuo hing ca i cawta baataata i ziy ciepa na a cuo,” a ta.
42018022	Zingsuv ta capa bie ca a thyi tiyta, “Naa bu kaliepa na suokha a aw. Na hnyipa bangkhuo kha zaa la na tuokaa kha siypasapa tie re tie yi, cacuokieca vuoruo lie a hnyirungpa na cuo aa; cakhutaa a vaw la kama kha na ziy tie,” a ta.
42018023	Cuorasala cawsaapapaa ta capa bie ca a thyi tiyta a ngie a chi, tahematapakieca ama ca a hnyirungsa pata a cuo.
42018024	Zingsuv ta ama kha mang te, “A hnyirungpa tie cuota ca Khazing pena chung luo a ngie riypa hing khatluv tama a ruv!
42018025	A hnyirungpa Khazing pena luo a ngie riypa laa taca kala-uv sakha ciphang naakhue chung luo a ngiepa na a na vie,” a ta.
42018026	A bie a thyipa tie ta, “Ahungma khuona ca a hmung khu aa?” ama ta.
42018027	Zingsuv ta, “Cawsaapa cuota a cuo khu lipa hing Khazing cuota ca a cuo khu,” a ta.
42018028	Cakhutaa Piter ta, “Mang tie, Kiema ca ma ing ma lu kha thuse pate nama maca ziy tli,” a ta.
42018029	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: ahunghmuo cuose Khazing Pena kawlieta, ing cuose, a napuv cuose, a uvnu cuose, a nungpaa cuose, a saata zaw cuose a thusepa ca
42018030	ata chuo lie hing ale hluvpuv ta hmung riypa hnyi'a te, a vaw riypa chuo lie chuozaa hringna a hmung aa,” a ta.
42018031	Zingsuv ta ziytuv hlyihning tie kha ku yite, “Naa thlie tie ung! Jerusalem luo vaa'a ung pate capa lieca profet tie ta Cawsaa Saacapaa kaw ama capepa bangkhuo kha a tling aa.
42018032	Ama ca Jentail ming kuv luo pi pata cuo'a te, iema ta ama tue hyalya aa, ama ese aa, ama paciy ta ama pacha aa.
42018033	Tuv'a yite ama thie aa, cuorasala ningthungna lieta a thupakhaa aa,” a ta.
42018034	Cuorasala ziytuv tie ta hingpa kaw hing khaahmuo pachang vayi; a ri khingpa a siyluo kha iema'a taata nu pata a cuo nakawta khaapama a ri tapa kha pachang khu vayi.
42018035	Zingsuv ca Jeriko khy luo a vya chiy'a nang caw ta mingcuepa pakha ca luokie lie kha zaa tu te a za hie nguoluo yi.
42018036	A thaalie cawsaazaapuv ama vya cakuolepa pu kha a thyi tiyta, “Khaapama a cuo?” tapata a hiehriy yi.
42018037	Iema ta, “Nazareth khypa Zingsuv na a vawle,” ama ta.
42018038	Ama ta, “Zingsuv, David Saacapaa! Ngie na chi thi tie,” tapata a u.
42018039	Hmie luo lie a awpa cawsaa tie khata duo riypata ama thlu. Cuorasala, David Saacapaa! Ngie na chi thi tie! ta te khuo vie ta a u hryly.
42018040	Zingsuv ca a daa te mingcuepapaa kha ama'a luo a vawkhyi riypata a chang yi. A thaa luo a vya chiy pahne Zingsuv ta,
42018041	“Khapa na tuepa se tapa ma ina khing ciy?” a ta. Ama ta, “Saya na pahmung sa pakhaa tie,” a ta.
42018042	Zingsuv ta, “Hmung tie, na zangnapa na caa patluo sa,” a ta.
42018043	A ming ca sungkha ta vuo pakhaa te, ama kha ziy te Khazing kha a pathuosa. Cawsaazaapuv ta ama hmung tiyta Khazing kha ama pathuosa.
42019001	Zingsuv ca Jeriko khychung kha cahraw te a sile.
42019002	Capalie ca ngukhyituv a byilepa, a hnyirungsapa Zakie ama tapa kha a aw.
42019003	Zingsuv kha ahungma tapata hmung aa zue, cuorasala ama ca cawsaa dang pachangpa cuote cawsaazaapuv ta ama pakhuo nakawta hmung khu vyi.
42019004	Cacuonakawta cawsaazaapuv hmie luo kha a ruo te Zingsuv hmung riypata saikamor kung kha a kie.
42019005	Zingsuv ca capa hmang luo a vya chiy tiyta kya angchiy te, “Zakie, a catli pata za cung tie, tahematapakieca ata ning hing na ing liena ica tlung aa,” a ta.
42019006	Zakie ca a catli pata za cung te alawna hneta Zingsuv kha a ing lieca a patlung sa.
42019007	A hmungpa bangkhuo ca a cie patlaw yite, “Hingpapaa hing a suepa ing lie tlung riypatana a vaa,” ama ta.
42019008	Zakie ta a daa te Abyipa kha a chang, “Mang tie, Abyipa, I hnyipa khingkhuo hing a siypasapa tie na i pi'a yi; malie kha i dung kie yi ca, lepaliy ta i pipakhaa'a yi,” a ta.
42019009	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta, “Ata ning hingpapaa ing lie hing khuona a tlung mangtli, tahematapakieca hingpapaa zaw hing Abraham saacapaa tana a cuo ra.
42019010	Cawsaa Saacapaa ca a viepa huv riypa hne khuo riypatana aa zuv,” a ta.
42019011	Cawsaa ta a ripa naa ama thlie nguoluo ning kha, Zingsuv ta pazue te pakhingpuonabie a chang yi. Ama ca Jerusalem kha vuotaa pha'a nang tli te Khazing Pena ca a ngiesa tli tapata ama rue.
42019012	Cacuonakaw ama ta, “Luokha ca abyi pakha aw te ruo luohlaapuv luo kha si pata siepahruo a cuo khu taata ing luo vya kaa riypata aa ting.
42019013	A sii pahraa kha ku yite siyytuokaa phiehraa a pi khu taayita, ‘I vya kaa hluo bangkhuo sung za pali tie ung,’ a ta yi.
42019014	Cuorasala a ruo ming khata ama kha hue yite, ‘Hingpapaa hing ta malie a uv riypa khing va puv,’ tapata biephyatuv kha ama pathlie.
42019015	Capapaa ca siepahruo ta a cuo khu taata a vya kaa. Tuokaa a pipa a sii tie kha khazaa ma ama hmung tapa a pachang khing nakawta a ku pahraa yi.
42019016	A pakhanapapaa ca a vaw te, ‘Abyipa ina pipa ciy siyytuokaa phiekha khata amie siyytuokaa phiehraa i hmung,’ a ta.
42019017	Ama ta, ‘A pha, nama ca sii phapa tana na cuo. Hmang cawta kawlie zangtluo aa tlapa na cuo nakawta khypuv khy hraa kha uv tie,’ a ta.
42019018	A pahningnapapaa kha a vaw te, ‘Abyipa, na huopa phiekha khata phiepangaa i hmung,’ a ta.
42019019	Capapaa kyihuo cata, ‘Nama zaw khypuv khy pangaa uv tie,’ a ta.
42019020	Cakhutaata, a hrangpa sii pakhapapaa kha a vaw te, ‘Abyipa, lie hing na na huopa tuokaa phiekha ca a aw; pavya ta cataw ang te na i nu,’ a ta.
42019021	Nama ca cawsaa tateta-iepa na cuo nakawta ica ciy. Na huopa a cuo lipa kha a la cate ciy na cyi lina lie sa na hrie,’ a ta.
42019022	Ama ta, ‘Sii chiepa! Na bie mamaapa tana na bie ica ripa aa. A tateta-iepa i cuopa hne i huopa a cuo lipa kha a la ang te ciy i cyi lina lie sa i hriepa zaw kha ina pachang ciy cuo vama?
42019023	Cata a cuo kie, khaapanakawma i tuokaa hing tuokaa-ing lie chi li pata na aw? Za chi la ca ivya kaa tiyta amie hneta hmung'a va ang ma?’ a ta.
42019024	A thaa lie a daapa tie kha, ‘A siyytuokaa phiekha kha la ungla tuokaa phiehraa a hnyipapaa kha pi tie ung,’ a ta yi.
42019025	(Cuorasala iema ta, ‘Abyipa ama ca phiehraa a hnyi tlipa kha,’ ama ta.)
42019026	Ama ta, ‘Ica chang yi: A hnyipa tie kha a hluv vie ta chachiypa cuo'a yite a hnyi lipa tie kha ama hnyi tlakuopa zaw kha lapa pata ama cuo aa.
42019027	Cakhutaa ama siepahruo cuo riypata naa khing lipa i carie tie kha hingpa luo hing a vawkhyi ungla i hmielie hing thie tie ung,” a ta.
42019028	Zingsuv ca hingpa bie a ri khu taata ama hmie luo ta Jerusalem luo kha a si.
42019029	Oliv tluo lie Bethfeih hne Bethani khy kha a pha tyalya tiyta a ziytuv pahning kha hmie luo pathlie yite,
42019030	“Nama hmie khy luo khiy si ungla nama vaa ngie pata amaa khang buo li liepa laataata ama hrepa kha nama hmung aa. Pathluo ungla hingpa luo hing namaa vya chiy aa.
42019031	Pakhakha ta, ‘khaapanakawma nama pathluo,’ aca ta kie yi ca, ‘Abyipa na a hu,’ nama ta aa.
42019032	Cacuonakawta a pathliepa tie ca si yite a ripa haakhata ama va hmung.
42019033	Laataata ca ama pathluo nguoluo pata, a ziypapaa ta iema kha, “Khaapanakawma nama pathluo?” a ta yi.
42019034	Iema ta, “Abyipa na a hu,” ama ta.
42019035	Cakhutaata Zingsuv'a luo kha a vya chiy yite, ama pang kha a ke lie ama padie khu taata Zingsuv ca ama pakhang sa.
42019036	Laa aa khang lenapa luopuv lie kha cawsaa ta ama pang kha ama phaale.
42019037	Oliv Tluo taata za cungbungnapa luopuv a va pha'a nangcaw khata a ziytuv cawsaa bangkhuo ca ama hmungpa a tuepa kharuehaa hmang kaw khata palungtluona hne khuopuv ta khi yite Khazing kha ama pathuosa:
42019038	“Abyipa ming ta a vawpa siepahruo ca thluechiypa ta cuo mangsue! Vuoruo lie diena aw sala a suocepa vuoruo lie khiy rungnaana aw mangsue,” ama ta.
42019039	Cawsaazaapuv hraw taata Farasi tie chekha ta Zingsuv kha, “Saya, caa ziytuv tie hing padie sa tie yi,” ama ta.
42019040	Zingsuv ta, “Ica chang yi: Iema hing ama die kieca alung hingna a kya khi'a yi,” a ta.
42019041	Khypuv ca vaa ngie hryly te a hmung tiyta caa te,
42019042	“Ata ning diena cuota tuepa hmang hing pachang the la ca! Cuorasala capa hmang ca na ming hmungna taata nupa ama cuo.
42019043	Na carie tie ta rietuvnapa khuetlung ta ca cadung'a yite aca khaakhuona cuo hne a kuo bangkhuo taata aca vya cadena yi cuo ca a vaw aa.
42019044	Khazing ta nama parie riypata a vawna cuo kha naa pachang sa li nakawta nama hne na saata zaw kha alyi hne ca carie puo'a yite, naa lung zaw suokha cunglie suokha hmuo aa pathang pata thuse'a vayi,” a ta.
42019045	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca Biena-ing chung luo kha a ngie te chechiy a zaapa tie kha a cade diy yi.
42019046	Cakhutaata, “Caapathepa chunglie, Khazing ta, ‘I Biena-ing ca thlaachuona ing tana a cuo aa’; Cuorasala niema ta a paruvpa tie a chuona khue ta nama pali,” a ta yi.
42019047	Zingsuv ca ning tating ta Biena-ing lie kha a pacuv yi. Tluobyilepa tie, Phungbie saya tie hne uvthyi tie ta ama thie khu na riypa luo kha ama huv byalya,
42019048	cuorasala cawsaa bangkhuo ta a bie suokha hmuo pahlyi khing lipa yi ta naa ama thlie nakawta thie khuna luopuv hmung vayi.
42020001	Ningkha ca Zingsuv kha Biena-ing chunglie cawsaa kha pacuv yite thuophaabie a ri nguoluo pata, tluobyilepa tie, phungbiesaya tie hne uvthyi tie kha a vaw yite,
42020002	“Malie chang tie, Hingpa hmang zaw hing khaapa nawhnyina tama na tue? Ahungma naw caa pi?” ama ta.
42020003	Zingsuv ta, “Bie suokha ca hiehriy ra'a yi ang te na chang tie ung,
42020004	Johan tiynawna hing vuoruo taata ma aa zuv, cawsaa'a taata ma a hmung?” a ta yi.
42020005	Iema hne iema kha a ruepakhaw yite, “Tuokhaatama ma ri'a ung? ‘Vuoruo taata ne ta'a pate, ‘Cacuokie, khaapanakawma nama zang va?’ malie a ta aa.
42020006	Cawsaapa'a taata ne ta'a pate hingpa lie a awpa cawsaazaapuv hingta alung ta malie ama vaa aa, tahematapakieca Johan ca profet tapata ama zang diypa a cuo hyi,” amaa ta.
42020007	Cacuonakawta, “Khaapa taata ma a hmung tapa pachang va puv,” ama ta.
42020008	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Kama zaw ahung'a taata ma hingpa hmang tue khuna naw i hmung tapa hing ca chang ra'a vayi ang,” a ta yi.
42020009	Zingsuv ta cawsaazaapuv kha hing pakhingpuonabie hing a chang yi: “Luokha ca cawsaa pakha ta mingsuv diedung tue te, rehrietuv tie'a luo kha pahlie yite cuo syipuv chung khy a tlaw.
42020010	Mingsuv thyi lu cuo aa de tiyta, diedung a hluotuv tie'a luo kha a cuvu va la riypata a sii pakha a pathlie. Cuorasala rehrietuv tie ta a siipaapa ca tuv yite a kuv cahri pata ama pakaa sa.
42020011	Cakhutaata a sii hrangpa pakha kha a pathlie; cuorasala rehrietuv tie ta tuv ngiethie yite nangzaahmiechi ta ama tue khu taata a kuv cahri pata ama pakaa sa.
42020012	Cakhutaata a sii pathungnapapaa kha a pathlie ngiethie; rehrietuv tie cata hmaa a phyana te ta tuv yite khungthing luo ama thaw.
42020013	Catiyta mingsuv diedung a hnyituvpapaa cata, ‘Tuokhaatama i tue aa? I duepa i saacapaa hingna i pathlie aa, ama hing ca ama hmiezaa ngiethie aa!’ a ta.
42020014	Cuorasala rehrietuv tie ta ama kha ama hmung pahne, pakha hne pakha kha, ‘Ama hingna a rucutuv ta a cuo. Thie'a ungpuv, cakiedyina a ru bangkhuo hing kiema huopa ta a cuo aa,’ amaa ta.
42020015	Cacuonakawta ama kha diedung khungthing luo kha thaw yite ama thie. Cacuonakawta mingsuv diedung a hnyituvpapaa ta rehrietuv tie kha tuokhaatana a tue thlu'a mang yi nama ta ma?
42020016	Ama ca a vaw'a te capa tie ca thie'a yite diedung kha rehrietuv hrangpa tie a pahlie'a yi,” a ta. Capaca ama thyi tiyta, “Cuo hrue thi kha se!” ama ta.
42020017	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta iema kha mang yite, A cuo kie, Caapathepa chunglie ta, ‘Ing a satuvpa tie ta ama thawpa alung ca, ingkiy lung tana aa li,’ a tapa hing a siyluo khaapatama a cuo?
42020018	Ahunghmuo cuose hingpa alung cunglie a tlapa ca kyipatlaa yite capa alung ta a tlasuepa tie ca ama zapatlaa diy aa.
42020019	Phungbie saya tie hne tluobyilepa tie ta kiema na malie a tapasue tapa kha ama pachang tiyta, Zingsuv kha patuv paluopa ama khing, cuorasala cawsaazaapuv kha ama ciy.
42020020	Cacuonakaw ama kha dya mangpathliy yite a bie mamaapa ta kalaa khu riypa hne naw a hnyituv muokiy byi kuv chung luo kha bie ripa riypata phakhyi khuna riypata cawsaa chekha kha cawsaa phasapa haata dya a pa-aw sa pata, Zingsuv mangpathliy riypa khata ama pathlie.
42020021	Capa cawsaa a mangpathliytuv tie cata Zingsuv kha, “Saya, na ripa hne na pacuvna hing a hmuo tapata ma pachang. Cawsaa pahlyipale lipa cata Khazing khingna biehmisipa kha na pacuv tapa zaw ma pachang.
42020022	Rom siepahruo'a luo ngukhyi pipa hing ma Phungbie ta a thlu ma a pa-aw ma?” ama ta.
42020023	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta ama zyatena kha a pachang nakawta,
42020024	“Ngu tuokaa phiekha na pahmung tie ung. Ahung hmiechang hne ming ma a taa?” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Siepahruopa hmiechang hne ming,” ama ta.
42020025	Zingsuv ta, “Cacuokieca Siepahruo huopa ca Siepahruo kha pi ungla Khazing huopa ca Khazing kha pi tie ung,” a ta yi.
42020026	Cahaa cata cawsaazaapuv hmielie kha patuv amaa nang raalaa pata tuokhaa tahmuo patuv khu vayi; bie a paliepa yi kha ama nang ta uo te a dieta tah ama aw.
42020027	Sadusi tie chekha, thupakhaana aw vyi a tapa tie kha Zingsuv'a luo a vaw yite, bie ama hiehriy.
42020028	“Saya, Moses ta malie a capepa siypa ca: Cawsaa pakha ca saata hnyi li pata a napuv a thiyse kieca, capapaa uvnu pakha ta ama ca a hlaw'a te a uvta cuo khata saata ama sapa aa,” a ta.
42020029	Luokha ca uvnu pasariy aw yite; a pakhanapapaa ca nungchiy te saata sa li pata a thiy.
42020030	Cakhutaata a pahningnapapaa hne
42020031	a pathungnapapaa ta a hlaw yite, cahaa cata ama pasariy yalya ta saata sa li pata ama thiy.
42020032	A hnangcawce ta cawsaanung zaw ca a thiy ra.
42020033	Cacuonakawta thupakhaanapa ning thueta capa canungnung ca ahung napuv tama a cuo aa? Ama pasariy yalya ta amaa zaa hlaw kaluo,” ama ta.
42020034	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Ata chuo capaa hne canung ca amaa chiy amaa hie,
42020035	cuorasala a vaw riypa chuo lie ta hring riypata aa tla tapa tie hne thiyna taata pathu pakhaapa tie ca a chiy a hie'a vayi.
42020036	Iema ca thiy khu'a va tli yi, tahematapakieca avuoming lu'a yite thupakhaana saata ama cuo nakawta Khazing saata tana ama cuo aa.
42020037	A kuo nguoluopa ruohraw kaw a capepa lieta Abyipa kha ‘Abraham Khazing, Isak Khazing, hne Jakob Khazing ta te Moses ta a ripa ca a thiypa tie ca hringna luo pathu pakhaa patana ama cuo tapa kha a paluo sa patana a cuo, a ta.
42020038	Ama ca a hringpa tie Khazing cuote a thiypa tie Khazing cuo vyi, tahematapakieca cawsaa bangkhuo ca amaa lie a hringpa selaw tana ama cuo,” a ta.
42020039	Phungbie saya tie chekha ta, “Saya, na bieripa ca a pha ciemuo!” ama ta.
42020040	Tahematapakieca ama kha bie hiehriy vie nguo va tli yi.
42020041	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Tuokhaatama Messiah ca David saacapaa tana a cuo, ama ta the?
42020042	David hrahring ta Salm caa-uv chunglie, Abyipa ta i Byipaapa kha,
42020043	Na cariepa bangkhuo ca na phyi thabaw lie chaapuo riypata i chi hluo li, I cacuo luo kuo hingta a tu tie,’ a ta.
42020044	David ta, ‘Abyipa,’ a ta kieca tuokhaatama Messiah ca ama saacapaa ta a cuo the aa? a ta.
42020045	Cawsaa bangkhuo thyi pata ziytuv tie kha,
42020046	“Phungbie saya tie kha a raaring tie ung, iema ca buohryipasiypa a hryi pata a khiele khingpa, chadawtluo lie pa-uvsathyina hne bie a changpa a tlechuopa, hne apungna-ing lie hne pyi tuena lieta a tuna phacepa lie a tu khingpa tie tana ama cuo;
42020047	Nunghlyi tie kha ama ing te chuv yite mang a ngiena riypata a pasiypuv ta thlaa ama chuo! A ruv viepa duotena na ama ang aa,” a ta.
42021001	Zingsuv ta a kya mang ca a hnyirungpa tie ta Biena-ing tuokaa thingkaw lie sue ama pathla nguoluo pakha a hmung;
42021002	a siypasanung nunghlyinung ta piesepa pie hning a pathlapa zaw kha a hmung.
42021003	Ama ta, “Ica chang yi: Nunghlyinung hingna a hrangpa bangkhuo laata a hluv vie a pi;
42021004	tahematapakieca a hrangpa tie pathuo ca ama hnyi lebuopa ca muo ama pi ta, cuorasala hingpa nung hing ca a siy a pasasa thluo pata a hringna cuota a hnyipa kha a bangkhuo ta a pi diy,” a ta.
42021005	Chekha ta Biena-ing kaw kha ri yite, alung phasa pata pangi yite a puvthena zya hne Khazing'a luo ama pipa a ahlu kaw zaw kha ama ri. Zingsuv ta,
42021006	“Hingpa bangkhuo hing nama hmung; hingpa alung bangkhuo hing thawpathla diy'a yite suokha cunglie suokha hmuo a aw lina cuo a vaw aa,” a ta.
42021007	Iema ta, “Saya, capaca khatiy thuema a cuo aa? Capaca a vya chiy'a tli tana pata tuokhaapa pamangsana ma a aw aa?” tapata ama hiehriy.
42021008	Zingsuv ta, “Aca dung li riypa yita a raaring tie ung; Cawsaa hluvpuv kha i ming ta a vaw'a yite, ‘Kama hingna ama ta a cuo ang, a cuo na a ngie tli,’ aca ta'a yi.
42021009	Rietuvna hne a duna kaw nama thyi tiyta ciy kha ung; cahaapa hmang ca a vya chiy taa aa, cuorasala a chuona ta vya paziy paluo'a vyi,” a ta.
42021010	Cakhutaata iema kha, “Ruokha hne ruokha amaa du aa; acuzaa suokha hne suokha ama tuv aa.
42021011	Aling khuosa ta a siy'a te, ruo ting lie cakuo ruvnaana a tlung aa; ciy aa chiypa hmang hne pamangsana lesapa kha vuoruo taata a luo aa.
42021012	Cuorasala hingpa hmang bangkhuo a vya chiy hluo ta niema ca ca patuv'a yite aca hrisaa'a yi; apungna-ing luo kha bieripa riypata ca chiykhyi'a yite thaw a ca pathla'a yi; I ming kawlieta siepahruo tie hne uvtuv byi hmie luo aca chiykhyi'a yi.
42021013	Capaca nama cuota tehte khuona cuopha ta a cuo aa.
42021014	Nama hne nama kha a rikuo pacie riypata na palung chunglie kha a ting pacie kha,
42021015	tahematapakieca bie hne singna kha ca pi'a yi ang te nama carie tie ahungtahmuo nama bie kha a du pata ca i khu'a vayi.
42021016	Nama nung nama paa, nama uvnu, nama tieriy hne nama viesaa tie ta calyi'a yite chekha ca aca thie'a yi.
42021017	I ming kawlieta cawsaa bangkhuo ta aca hue'a yi.
42021018	Cuorasala nama luv lie suobuv buvkha hmuo vie'a vyi.
42021019	Naa daapahrang khu kiena hringna na hmung aa” a ta yi.
42021020	Rieka tie ta Jerusalem ama cadungpa kha nama hmung tiyta a ru hluo ta a ra'a tli tapa kha nama pachang aa.
42021021	Catiyta Judea lie a awpa ca tluocung luo kha a ruo yi se, khypuv chunglie a awpa ta pya yi sala khyta lie a awpa tie ca khypuv chung luo kha a ngie kha yi se.
42021022	Tahematapakieca hingpa hing ‘Phuvlana Ning,’ tapa kha cuote Caapathepa ta a ripa bangkhuo a tlingna riypata a cuo.
42021023	Capa cuo ca nu a phyapa canung hne ahnung a pathlie li liepa haaseta a hnyipa tie cuota a ruv hringhruo aa! Tahematapakieca hing alyi cunglie hing ciy aa chiypa ruvnaana za tlung'a te hingpa cawsaa zaw cunglie hing Khazing duotena ca a tlung aa.
42021024	Chekha ca zueziy ta thiy'a yite chekha ca chuelyi ruo ting luo sii ta a dapa ama cuo aa; Jentail ming ta Jerusalem kha iema cuo a chuo hluo li ama phyi ta ama chaapuo aa.
42021025	“Ning hne thlaapa hne aasiy lie khiy pamangsana hmang aa luo aa. Chuelyi cung ruo zaw ca riyliy tiylaw pachipa hne a khipa pu khata ciyna hne lalilahie chiy pata a tue'a yi.
42021026	Chuelyi cunglie a tlung riypa ama rue tiyta cawsaa ca ciy'a yite ama thiychie aa, tahematapakieca vuoruo cahrana ca a cahang aa.
42021027	Cakhutaata cawsaa saacapaa ca rungnaana lesyina'a nata cahrana hneta amyi cung taata a zuvpa kha ama hmung aa.
42021028	Hingpa hmang zaw a vya chiy a vya cuole tiyta, a daa ungla cungluo kha mang tie ung, tahematapakieca niema a thlana ning ca a ngie tli,” a ta.
42021029	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta pakhing-puonabie suokha a chang yi: “Thyikuv kung hne thingkung bangkhuo kha mang tie ung.
42021030	A hnaa a kya pakiypa nama hmung tiyta, cuovuo na a ngie tli tapa kha nama pachang.
42021031	Cahaangiethiecata, hingpa hmang a vya tlungpa nama hmung tiyta Khazing Pena ca a ngie tli tapa kha nama pachang aa.
42021032	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Ata lie a hringpa tie ama thiy diy hluo hingta hing hmang bangkhuo hing a vya tlung aa.
42021033	Avuo hne alyi ca ama ra aa, cuorasala i bie ca ra buo hluo'a vyi,” a ta.
42021034	“A raaring ung! Pariyna te ning dangna kaw hne khysatungbang ruvnaana kaw dyi kha rue kha ung, capa ningkhue cata rue li pata ca vya pha'a yite
42021035	cyihyi pa-uo ta a ca pa-uo'a yi. Tahematapakieca capa ning ca chuelyi cunglie a awpa cawsaa bangkhuo cunglie a vya tlung aa.
42021036	A vya tlung riypa hmang bangkhuo taahingta nama law khu na riypata thaazuo nama hnyi riypa hne Cawsaa Saacapaa hmielie namaa daa khu thena riypata a raaringsa pata aw ungla thlaa chuo pari tie ung,” a ta.
42021037	Zingsuv ca a ning tating ta Biena-ing lie kha pacuv yite zuo a vya chiy tiyta pya te Oliv tluo luo kha aa kya ri taw.
42021038	Biena-ing lie a bie naathlie riypata cawsaa bangkhuo ca mawdiy ta ama thu.
42022001	Lawsena Pyi ama tapa Thiynung phuv lipa Viechuo pyi kha a ngie tli.
42022002	Tluobyilepa tie hne phungbiesaya tie ca cawsaazaapuv kha ama ciy nakawta Zingsuv kha a paruvta tah thie khuna riypa luopuv ama huv nguoluo.
42022003	Cakhutaata ziytuv hlyihning hrawlie ta pakha a cuopa Iskariot ama tapa Judah chung luo kha Setaa aa ngie.
42022004	Cacuonakawta Judah ca tluobyilepa tie hne Biena-ing a huotuv abyi tie'a luo kha vaa te Zingsuv kha iema'a luo a pi khuna riypata bie a vaa rue yi.
42022005	Ama palung tluosa te tuokaa pi riypata ama palung a tling.
42022006	Ama zaw a palung tling te cawsaazaapuv pachang li pata iema kuv chung luo Zingsuv a pi thena riypa yi ta a chaw a rawpa cuo kha a huv.
42022007	Thiynung phuv lipa Viechuo Pyi, Lawsena tuvtaata ta hriykhung a rina cuo kha a vya pha.
42022008	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta Piter hne Johan ca pathlie yite, “Vaa ungla ima ning riypata Lawsena Pyi sa kha va pachie tie ung,” a ta yi.
42022009	Iema ta, “Khaapa lie va pachie riypata ma malie na khing?” ama ta.
42022010	Ama ta, “Naa thlie tie ung, khypuv chung luo nama vaa ngie pahne tiybi ta tiy a vya cabalepapaa kha namaa taw aa. Aa ngienapa ing te khata va paziy ungla,
42022011	capa ing a hnyituvpapaa kha, ‘Ma sayapa na, Kama hne naa ziytuv tie Lawsena zuosa ma ningna riypa khuo ca khaapa hingma a cuo? tapata hiehriy tie ung,’ a ta yi.
42022012	A cung khuo lie thude hne cabya tluotlingsa pata ama chipa a khuo kusapa kha ca pahmung'a yite capalie ca va pachie tie ung,” a ta yi.
42022013	Vaa yite Zingsuv ta a changpa dadang haakhata hmang bangkhuo kha va hmung yite capa lieca Lawsena zuosa ca ama pachie.
42022014	A cuo a vya tling tiyta Zingsuv ca ziytuv tie hne khata cabya lieca aa tu.
42022015	Ama ta, “Hing Lawsena zuosa hing ruvnaana i ang hluo ta niema hne ning pakhaw riypa hing i khing hringhruo.
42022016	Tahematapakieca ica chang yi: Khazing Pena chunglie hingpa hing patling sapa a cuo hluo li ning'a va tli ang,” a ta.
42022017	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ca panuo kha la te, Khazing'a luo alawna bie a hluo khu taata, “Hingpa hing a la ungla a re tie ung.
42022018	Ica chang yi: Ata taahingta Khazing Pena a vya tlung hluo li hingpa mingsuv tiy hing dang'a va tli ang,” a ta.
42022019	Cakhutaata viechuo zaw kha la te, Khazing'a luo alawna bie a chang khu taata, chechi te iema kha pi yite, “Hingpa hing nama cuota i pipa i pangpa tana a cuo, kama a thyi pakhaana riypata za tue mya ung,” a ta yi.
42022020	Cahaa cata zuosa ama ning khu taata panuo zaw kha pi yite, “Hing panuo hing nama cuota i lyipa, i thiyse ta pacusapa Khazing biekuona thaapa tana a cuo,” a ta.
42022021	Cuorasala mang tie ung! Kama naa lyituvpapaa ca hingpa cabya lie hing kama hne maa tuhne hing.
42022022	Tahematapakieca Cawsaa Saacapaa ca rawrue ciepa haatana a ziy aa, cuorasala a lyituvpapaa cuota ca ciy aa chiy hringhruo,” a ta.
42022023	Cakhutaata iema pakha hne pakha kha, hinghaapa hmang hing ahung hingma a tue aa, tapata amaa hiehriy.
42022024	Ziytuv tie hrawlie kha ahungma a lecepa ta rue riypata a cuo, tapata bie a inapa a puv.
42022025	Zingsuv ta, “Chuelyi siepahruo tie taca ama cawsaa zaw kha ama duv ta lesue yite capa naw a hnyituv tie kha ‘Phana a tuetuvpa,” ama za ta taw.
42022026	Cuorasala niema ca cahaa cata cuo'a va ungciy; niema hrawlie a lecepa ca a syicepa haata aw'a te luochiytuv a cuopa ca changtaapa haata a cuo aa.
42022027	Ahungma a le vie? Sa ning riypata a tupa kha ma, sa a pituv kha ma? Cabya lie a tupa kha le vie vama? Cuorasala kama ca niema hrawlie hing sa a pituv haa khatana i aw,” a ta yi.
42022028	Ruvnaanapa i ang chung bangkhuo naa awpuotuv ca niema tana nama cuo;
42022029	I Paa ta a pena ina pipa haata kama zaw ta niema kha ica pi'a yi.
42022030	I Pena chunglie i cabya lie kha ning dang'a ung cate Israel mingphang hlyihning kha bie ripa riypata byithude cunglie namaa tu aa,” a ta yi.
42022031	Zingsuv ta, “Simon, Simon! Naathlie tie! Setaa ta niema bangkhuo kha suo cathlyi haata cathlyi riypata naw a hie tli.
42022032	Cuorasala, na zangna aa lie li riypata thlaa ica chuopa. Kama'a luo naa vya pali pakhaa tiyta na uvnu zaw kha thaazuo pi mya yi,” a ta.
42022033	Piter ta, “Abyipa nama hne thaw tlahne riypa hne thiy pakhaw riypata a ting pacie patana i aw,” a ta.
42022034	Zingsuv ta, “Piter, ica chang: Ata zuo lie hing, ama ca pachang va ang ne tapata yi thung ina thaw hluo li ciy, aa khang'a vyi,” a ta.
42022035	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta ziytuv tie kha, “tuokaabaw, sahrie, hne phyipakaw a cake li pata ica pathlie ning yi kha suokha chuo a tluo a tling lipa a aw ma?” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Khaahmuo aw vyi,” ama ta.
42022036	Zingsuv ta, “Cuorasala, ata hing ca, tuokaabaw a cuo li kie sahrie a hnyipa ca a phya se; zueziy a hnyi lipa ca a buohryicungle kha zaa sala a calyi se.
42022037	Tahematapakieca ica chang yi: Caapathepa ta, ‘Ama ca a suepa tie hrawlie na ripuopa a cuo,’ tapata kama kaw a capepa kha a tling aa. Tahematapakieca kama kaw ama capepa bangkhuo kha a vya tlingle lawmaw aa,” a ta.
42022038	Iema ta, “Mang tie, Abyipa, hinglie hing zueziy suohning a aw,” ama ta. “Ca zaa cata a de aa!” tapata a palie yi.
42022039	Zingsuv ca pya te a tue tawpa haakhata Oliv tluocung luo kha kie te a ziytuv tie ta ama paziy.
42022040	A hmang luo a pha tiyta iema kha, “Pasupaliyna luo nama tla li riypata thlaa chuo tie ung,” a ta yi.
42022041	Cakhutaa alung vaa khang a hlana luo kha vaa te a pakhuv pane te thlaa a chuo.
42022042	“I Paa, na palung a tling pata a cuo kieca hingpa te-angna panuo hing na lapa thi tie. Cuorasala kama khingna haa cuo li pata nama khingna haa cuo mangsue,” a ta.
42022043	Vuoruo taata avuoming pakha zaa luo te thaa a pi.
42022044	Palung riethyisa pata khuo vie ta thlaa chuo te a mathle ca thiydiy haata alyi luo a tla.
42022045	A thlaachuona taata thu te ziytuv tie'a luo kha a kaa tiyta amaa zaa hmung diypa kha a hmung yi, ama ngie a chisa nakawta a cuo.
42022046	Ama ta, “Khaapanakawma namaa hmung? Thu ungla pasupaliyna chung luo nama tla li riypata thlaa chuo tie ung,” a ta yi.
42022047	Zingsuv bie a ri nguoluo kalie pata a ziytuv tie hraw taata pakha a cuopa Judas ta aa vya chiypa cawsaazaapuv kha ama vya chiy. Zingsuv kha pahnuo riypata a vaa ngie.
42022048	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Judas, Cawsaa Saacapaa hing pahnuona tama na lyi,” a ta.
42022049	A thaalie a awpa tie ta hmang a vya cuo riypa kha ama hmung tiyta, “Abyipa, zueziy hingta a ce'a kanaa yi pamaw?” ama ta.
42022050	Iema hraw taa pakha ta tluobyilecepa siipaapa kha a vya ce te a cacuo luo naacakue a sa pathla.
42022051	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta, “Ade se!” ta te a naacakue kha hrie te a patluo sa.
42022052	Cakhutaa ta Zingsuv ta ama patuv riypata a vawpa tluobyilepa tie, biena-ing paliy byi tie hne uvthyi tie kha, “Kama hing damie haata patuv riypata ma zueziy hne tungbung hneta na maa vaw?
42022053	Ningting ta niema hne Biena-ing chunglie i aw ning kha na patuv vade ungciy. Cuorasala ata hing ca khyzingna huvhaa a cahra ning cuote, niema cuo tana a cuo,” a ta yi.
42022054	Zingsuv ca patuv yite Tluobyilecepa ing luo kha ama sikhyi. Cuorasala Piter ta aa hlapuv taakhata a paziy yi.
42022055	Ahmie khingkhuo lie kha myipung thaw yite amaa tupakhawna lie kha Piter ca a tu ra.
42022056	Myi kielie aa tupa kha changtaanung pakha ta hmung te hmiedesuo ta mang te, “Hingpapaa zaw hing Zingsuv'a lie a aw rapa tana a cuo ra,” a ta.
42022057	Cuorasala Piter ta, “Cawsaanung, capapaa ca pachang va ang,” a ta.
42022058	A cawta a awpa ta pakhapa ta hmung te, “Nama zaw hing iema hraw taa pakha tana na cuo,” a ta. Cuorasala Piter ta, “Cawsaapa, cuo va ang,” a ta.
42022059	Siymaluo pakha tluv khu taata a hrangpa pakha ta a cusa pata, “Hingpapaa hing Zingsuv hneta a aw rapa tana a cuo hrahring, tahematapakieca Galilee ming tana a cuo,” a ta.
42022060	Cuorasala Piter ta, “Cawsaapa, khaapama na ri tapa pachang va ang,” a ta. Bie a ri nguoluo kalie pata aa a khang.
42022061	Abyipa ca a pali te Piter kha a mang, Piter ca Abyipa ta, “Ata zuo aa a khang hluo ta yi thung te ina thaw'a ciy,” a tapa kha aa kya thyi.
42022062	Piter ca pya te palung ityalya khata a caa.
42022063	Zingsuv ca a patuvpa tie khata tue hyalya yite ama tuv.
42022064	A ming kha pahruv yite, “Ahungma caa tuv, ri tie,” ama ta.
42022065	Cahaa cata esena bie kha a cunglie a hluvsa ama ri.
42022066	Khy a dyi taata Judah uvthyi tie, tluobyilepa tie, hne Phungbiesaya tie kha a hmya yite Zingsuv ca bieripatuv phuv hmie luo kha ama chiykhyi.
42022067	Iema ta, “Messiah na cuo kie malie chang tie,” ama ta. Ama ta, “Ica chang zaw yi ta na zang'a va ungciy;
42022068	bie ica hiehriy zaw yima na palie'a va ungciy.
42022069	Cuorasala ata taahingta Cawsaa Saacapaa hing Cungnungce Khazing cahrana cacuo luo kuo ta patu sapa a cuo aa,” a ta.
42022070	Ama bangkhuo ta, “A cuo kie, Khazing Saacapaa ta na cuo ma?” ama ta. Ama ta, “I cuopa ca niema na a ri ungciy,” a ta yi.
42022071	Cakhutaa iema ta, “Khaapa pachangkhyituv hrangpa ma a hu'a tli! Ama pakaa taa hrahring ta ma thyi tli,” ama ta.
42023001	Ama phuv yalya khata a thu yite Zingsuv ca Pilat hmie luo ama chiykhyi.
42023002	Ama kha pachie yite: “Hingpapaa hingta ma cawsaa zaw a cuo lipa luo aa chiypa yi kha ma hmungpuo; Siepahruopa'a luo ngukhyi pi'a va ungciy, malie ta te kama hingna ‘Messiah, siepahruo ta a cuo ang,’ a ta” ama ta.
42023003	Cakhutaata Pilat ta, “Judah ming siepahruo ta na cuo ma?” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “Na ripa haata i cuo,” tapata a palie.
42023004	Cakhutaa Pilat ta tluobyilepa tie hne cawsaazaapuv kha, “Hingpapaa hing a suena hmung va ang,” a ta yi.
42023005	Cuorasala khi vie hryly yite, “A pacuvnapa ta Judea pe bangkhuo hnaahnawnapa a chiykhyi. Galilee taata pathu te hingpa hmang te hing a vya chiy tli,” ama ta.
42023006	Capa bie ca Pilat ta a thyi tiyta, “Hingpapaa hing Galilee ming ta a cuo ma?” tapata a hiehriy yi.
42023007	Pilat ta Zingsuv ca Herod ta a uvnapa ruo chung taata na a cuo tapa kha a pachang tiyta Zingsuv ca Herod'a luo kha a paphya: capa cuo ning ca Herod zaw kha Jerusalem lie a aw ningta a cuo.
42023008	Herod ca Zingsuv a hmung tiyta a palung a tluo hringhruo. Zingsuv kaw kha za thyi pari te a hmung khing napa a syisa tli, tahematapakieca a tuepa kharuehaa hmang hmung riypa kha a nguopuo.
42023009	Zingsuv kha bie a hluvsa a hiehriy, cuorasala Zingsuv ta kaakha hmuo palie vyi.
42023010	A thaa lie a tupa tluobyilepa tie hne Phungbie saya tie ta khuopuv ta ama pachie.
42023011	Herod hne a rieka tie ta Zingsuv ca ese yite ama tue hyalya; pang rungnaapa kha pabuv yite Pilat'a luo kha ama paphya pakhaa.
42023012	Capa ning liecata Herod hne Pilat ca viesaa pha ta amaa li; capa hluo ta ca cariepa tana ama za cuo.
42023013	Cakhutaata Pilat ta tluobyilepa tie, uvthyi tie hne cawsaazaapuv kha ku yite,
42023014	“Niema ta hingpapaa hing cawsaazaapuv na a cuo lipa luo aa chiy yi tapata kama'a luo nama vya chiykhyi. Niema hmielie hrahring i hiehriypasie tiyta niema ta nama pachiepa suena suokha hmuo hmung va ang.
42023015	Herod zaw ta hmung ra vyi, cacuonakawta kiema'a luo malie a vya paphya pakhaa. Hingpa cawsaapapaa hingta thiy aa phuvpa hmang suokha hmuo tue vyi.
42023016	Cacuonakawta asung ta pachisa'a yi ang te i pathlie aa,” a ta.
42023017	(Lawsena pyi kyry ta Pilat ta thaw a tlapa pakha a pathliepa pari taw yi.)
42023018	Cawsaazaapuv ca khi yite, “Ama kha thie tie! Barabbas kha malie pathliepa tie!” ama ta.
42023019	(Barabbas ca khy chunglie a duna a papuv sa nakaw hne lie a naw nakawta thaw ama pathlapa tana a cuo.)
42023020	Pilat ta Zingsuv kha a pathlie khing nakawta cawsaazaapuv'a lie kha bie a ri pakhaa.
42023021	Cuorasala khi pakhaa yite, “Vieluo lie thie tie! Vieluo lie thie tie!” ama ta.
42023022	Pilat ta a yi thungnapa ta, “Khaapa suena ma a tue? Thiy aa phuvpa suena a cunglie suokha hmuo hmung va ang! Asung ta pachi sa'a yi ang tena i pathlie aa,” a ta.
42023023	Cuorasala Zingsuv ca vieluo cunglie thie riypata ama khi khu thiyta khi yite ama hiecade pari nakawta, a hnangcaw taca iema ueryi khata a te.
42023024	Cacuonakawta Pilat ta ama hiena haata pi riypata biechina a tue.
42023025	Ama khingpapaa, aduna a tue nakaw hne lie a naw nakawta thaw ama pathlapapaa kha pathliepa yite, Zingsuv kha iema khingna haata ama kuv luo a pi yi.
42023026	Zingsuv ama pyakhyile pa khata, khyta taata khypuv luo a vya chiypa Sairin khy ming Simon kha amaa taw. Patuv yite, vieluo kha papuv sa yite Zingsuv hnang luo kha ama paziy sa.
42023027	Cawsaa hluvpuv ta ziy yite capa hrawlie ca a cacunghnaa a cung te a caakhyi nguoluopa canung chekha zaw ama aw.
42023028	Zingsuv ta iema kha a palichiy yite, “Vya Jerusalem sacanung zaw, kama cuota ca caa kha ung; niema cuo hne nama saata zaw cuo khata caa hriy tie ung.
42023029	Tahematapakieca cawsaa ta, ‘A cingpa canung, nu a phya buo lipa hne haatiy ta aa hnung a pazaw buo lipa ca thluechiypa tana a cuo!’ ama tana cuo kha a vya pha aa.
42023030	Cakhutaata cawsaa ta tluo kha, ‘Na za vy la!’ ta'a yite sing kha, ‘na za buvkhung la!’ ama ta aa.
42023031	Tahematapakieca thing a hring ning hmuo hinghaapa hmang hing tuepa a cuo kieca a rue taa changchiy ca khaapama a lu aa?” a ta.
42023032	A hrangpa, a suepa pahning kha, Zingsuv hne thie hne riypata ama sikhyi ra.
42023033	“Luvruv,” ama tapa hmang ama pha tiyta capa hmang lieca Zingsuv kha vieluo lie khepuo yite a suepa pahning zaw ca a cavyi luota pakha a cacuo luota pakha ama khepuo ra. (
42023034	Zingsuv ta, “I Paa! A ngiethe tie yi, tahematapakieca khaapama ma tue tapa kha a pachang vayi,”) a ta. Cakhutaata a caw kha a re riypata vyisung amaa da.
42023035	A thaa lie a daapa cawsaa tie ta ama mang nguoluo ning kha Judah uvthyi tie ta tue hyalya yite: “Malie ca a khuo yi; Khazing ta aa tlawpa Messiah a cuo kie ama hne ama ca a khuo se,” ama ta
42023036	Rieka tie zaw ta ama tue hyalya: khawchiy yite mingsuv tiy thuepa kha pi yite,
42023037	“Judah ming siepahruo ta na cuo kieca nama hne nama kha a khuo tie,” ama ta.
42023038	A luv cunglie ama taapa caa ca: “Hingpa hing Judah ming Siepahruo tana a cuo,” tapata a cuo.
42023039	Capa lie ama pathlie rapa a suepapaa pakha ta esena cang ta, “Nama ca Messiah cuo va cama? Nama hne nama kha a khuo la kiema zaw hing malie khuo tie nie!” a ta.
42023040	Cuorasala a hrangpa pakha khata ama kha chuo te, “Ama hne aa lupa biechina rawlie na aw nguoluo thluopa hing tama Khazing ciy li pata na aw?
42023041	Kiema cuota biechina ama tuepa hing ca aa hmuopa tana a cuo, tahematapakieca ma hmang tuepa cunglie ang aa tlapa khana ma ang; cuorasala ama hing ca phalina khaahmuo tue vyi,” a ta.
42023042	Cakhutaata Zingsuv kyihuo kha, “Vya Zingsuv, na pena chung luo naa vaw tiyta naa thyi thi mya!” a ta.
42023043	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang: Ata ning kama hne Paradais lie na aw aa,” a ta.
42023044	Ningchung khingkhuo tluv taata zuoluo siymaluo pathung te ruo bangkhuo lie zingna a tlung.
42023045	Ning a zing chung cata Biena-ing pangzu ca tlaa te chehning ta aa che.
42023046	Zingsuv ca khuopuv ta khi te, “I Paa! I thlaapa ca na kuv chunglie na ica pi!” a ta. Capaca a ri khu taata a huv a ci.
42023047	Riebyipapaa ca hmang a cuopa kha a hmung tiyta Khazing kha pathuosa te, “Hingpapaa hing suena a hnyi bangby lipa tana a cuo!” a ta.
42023048	Capa hmang mang riypata a hmyapa cawsaa zaw ta hmang a cuopa kha ama hmung tiyta ama cacunghnaa kha a cung yite amaa diy.
42023049	Pangpa ta Zingsuv a pachangpa bangkhuo hne Galilee ruo taata ama a ziypa canung zaw ca a luopaa khata a daa yite ama suo.
42023050	Cawsaa phasapa hne a dangsapa Josef ama tapapaa ca bierituv phuv chunglie a te rapa a cuo raalaa pata
42023051	ama tingtuopa hne ama hmang tuepa kha a palung tling vyi. Ama ca Judah ming khy Arimathea taata cuote Khazing Pena a zuv riypa kha a huopa a cuo.
42023052	Pilat'a luo kha vaa te Zingsuv riy kha a hie.
42023053	A riy kha vieluo cung taata pachung te, pawruo ta cataw te, ahungtahmuo hmuo buo li liepa alung ama ryipa thluo chunglie a paby.
42023054	Capa cuo ca A chiedaw ning ta cuote Sabbath ning kha aa thu tyalya tli.
42023055	Galilee ruo taata Zingsuv a ziypa canung zaw ca Josef kha ziy yite thluo hne Zingsuv riy tuokhaatama ama chi tapa kha ama va mang.
42023056	Cakhutaata ing luo a diy yite ziyhmyi hne sathu kha pachie pacie pata ama chi. Sabbath ning ca Phungbie haakhata amaa pahy.
42024001	Cuorasala Zaapuv ning mawdiy ta canung zaw ca ziyhmyi ama pachiepa kha a cyi yite thluo luo ama vaa.
42024002	Thluo khaakhuvlung a zaa hnyipa kha ama hmung;
42024003	cacuonakaw amaa ngie; cuorasala Zingsuv riy kha hmung vayi.
42024004	Ama nang dyi a uo pata sungkha ta pang ruopa a buvpa cawsaa pahning amaa thaa lie amaa vya daa.
42024005	Canung tie ca ama ciysa nakawta alyi luo kha amaa bung; cuorasala pahning tie cata, “Khaapanakawma a hringpa kha a thiypa zaw hrawlie nama huv?
42024006	Ama ca hinglie hing aw vyi, a thupakhaa tli. Galilee lie a aw ningta aca changpa yi kha a thyi va ung cama?
42024007	‘Cawsaa Saacapaa ca a suepa tie kuv luo kha pipa cuo'a te, vieluo cunglie ama thie aa, ningthungna lie a thupakhaa aa,’ a tapa kha!” a ta yi.
42024008	Ca tiyta canung zaw ca a bie kha a kya thyi pakhaa yite,
42024009	thluo taacata vya kaa yite, a cuopa hmang bangkhuo ca ziytuv hlyikha hne a hrangpa tie kha ama chang.
42024010	Capa kaw kha ziytuv tie a changpa tie ca Mary Magdalin, Joanna, Jeim nung Mary hne iema hne a aw rapa canung hrangpa tie khata ama cuo.
42024011	Cuorasala capa bie ca ziytuv tie ta bie laliy lipa ta rue yite zang li pata ama aw.
42024012	Cuorasala Piter ca a daa te thluo luo kha aa ruo; a bung te thluo chung luo kha a mang ca a riy catawnapa pawruo dyi a hmung; hmang a cuopa cunglie kha nang uosa cangta ing luo a kaa.
42024013	Capa ning ngiethie cata ziytuv pahning ca Jerusalem taata me sariy hraw a hlapa Emmaus ama tapa khy luo kha si yite
42024014	hmang a cuopa kaw kha amaa ruele.
42024015	Cahaa cata bie amaa ruele nguoluo ning kha Zingsuv ta a vya ngie yite iema hne a si rale.
42024016	Ama hmung raalaa pata pachang vayi.
42024017	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Khaapa kaw ma nama cakuo puo pata namaa ruele?” a ta yi. Iema ca ngiechina hmiephya hneta a maa daa.
42024018	Cakhutaa iema chung taata pakha, Kleopas ama ta papaa khata, “Jerusalem khy luo a vya tlawpa bangkhuo hrawlie nama dyi hingna ata zaw chunglie hmang a cuopa a pachang lipa a cuo ciy?” a ta.
42024019	Ama ta, “Khaapa hmang ma?” tapata a hiehriy. “Nazareth Zingsuv cunglie a tlungpa hmang,” ama ta. “Ama ca Khazing hmielie hne cawsaa bangkhuo hmielie a ripa hne a tuepa hmang bangkhuo lie cahrana a hnyi ama tapa profet ta a cuo.
42024020	Ma tluobyilepa tie hne uvthyi tie ta thie riypata pi yite vieluo cunglie ama thie.
42024021	Cuorasala kiema taca Israel ming malie a thlatuv riypatana a cuo aa tapata maa ruechuopa tana a cuo. Capa hmang a cuo khu taata ata ning hing a ningthungnapa ta a cuo.
42024022	Cadyi cuo vyi, kiema phuv chung taata canung chekha ta kiema kha a ca-ang ta malie ama ca-ang sa; ata maw mawdiy ta thluo luo vaa yite;
42024023	a riy kha ama hmung li tiyta vya kaa yite malie ama changpa ca, ‘Avuoming kha muocuo ta hmung yi pate na, iema cata, ama ca a hring ne, malie ama ta e,’ ama ta.
42024024	Kiema phuv taata chekha ca thluo luo kha vaa yite canung tie ama ripa dala haakhata ama va hmung, cuorasala ama ca hmung vayi,” ama ta.
42024025	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta, “Nama ngaa hringhruo ing, profet tie ta ama ri ciepa zang hing namaa paruvsa hringhruo de!
42024026	Messiah ca hingpa bangkhuo hing a rungnaana luo a ngie hluo ta a ang siy diy a hu cuo vama?” a ta.
42024027	Cakhutaata Moses taata pathu pata profet tie bangkhuo ta Caapathepa chunglie ta ama kaw ama capepa bangkhuo kha a changpasie yi.
42024028	Ama chiyna riypa khy ama pha tyalya caw ta Zingsuv ca a caluole riypa haakhata aa pa-aw sa;
42024029	cuorasala khuosa ta thlu yite, “Kiema'a lie hing a ri ra thluo tie, zuoluo cuo tli te a zing zaw a zing'a nang tli,” ama ta. Cacuonakawta iema'a lie tlung ra riypata a paziy yi.
42024030	Sa dungpakhaw riypata iema'a lie kha a tu te, viechuo kha la te, thlaa a chuo khu taata chechi te a pi yi.
42024031	Ama ming kha kya vuo te ama a cuopa kha ama pachang, cuorasala ama ming hmung lieta a vie.
42024032	Pakha hne pakha kha, “Luopuv lie bie malie aa ruepa hne Caapathepa siyluo malie a chang ning kha ma chunglie myi kuo ta malie kuo tlarya va ma kha?” a maa ta.
42024033	Sungkha ta thu yite Jerusalem luo kha ama kaa pakhaa ca ziytuv hlyikha hne a hrangpa zaw amaa zaa pungpa kha ama va hmung.
42024034	“Abyipa ca a thupakhaa hmisi, Simon'a liena a luo!” tapata ama za ri nguoluo.
42024035	Iema zaw ta luopuv lie hmang a cuopa kaw hne Abyipa ta viechuo chechi te aa pachangsanapa yi kaw kha ama ri ra.
42024036	Capa kaw ca ama ri nguoluo pata sungkha ta iema hrawlie kha Zingsuv ca a vya daa te, “Niema'a lie diena aw mangsue,” a ta yi.
42024037	Athlaa na ma hmung tapata rue yite ama thlaa zang te amaa pahlusa.
42024038	Cuorasala iema kha, “Khaapanakawma nama ciy? Khaapanakawma nama palung a luolue?
