42024039	I kuv hne i phyi hing mang tie ung, kama ta i cuo thluopa hing. Na hrie ungla nama pachang aa, a thlaa ca ruv hne saa a hnyi tlung li, kama ca i hnyipa ina hmungpa ung cahing!” a ta yi.
42024040	Cahaa cata ri te a kuv hne a phyi zaw ca a pahmung yi.
42024041	Ama palung a tluosa thluo pata zang khu tange lipa yi ta ama kharue a haasa ngiethie nakawta; ama ta, “Ning riypa suokha chuo nama hnyi ma?” a ta yi.
42024042	Iema ta ngaa e ciepa pi yite,
42024043	ama hmielie kha la te a ning.
42024044	Cakhutaata iema kha, “Niema'a lie i aw ningta i za ripa kha ama hingta tli hing a cuo: Moses Phungbie chung, profet tie capepa chunglie hne Salm chunglieta kama kaw ama za capepa bangkhuo ca a tling diy riypatana a cuo,” a ta.
42024045	Ama palung kha pavuo sa yite Caapathepa a ripa kha ama kya pachang the.
42024046	Iema'a lie kha, “Ama capepa ca hingpa hing tana a cuo: Messiah ca ruvnaana kha ang'a te ningthungna lie a thupakhaa aa,
42024047	cakhutaa ta ama ming ta sue a ngiepachiyna hne sue a ngiethena kaw kha Jerusalem taata pathu pata mingphang bangkhuo kha chang pata ama cuo aa.
42024048	Niema ca hingpa hmang bangkhuo a pachangkhyituv tana nama cuo.
42024049	Cakhutaata i Paa ta bie a kuo ciepa kha nama cung luo i za pathlie aa. Cacuonakawta cungluo taata cahrana nama cung luo a za tlung hluo li khypuv chunglie hing aw tie ung,” a ta yi.
42024050	Cakhutaata Bethani khy te kha sikhyi yite a kuv kha pazuu te thluechiy a pi yi.
42024051	Thluechiy a pi nguoluopa yite, iema'a taata a che te vuoruo luo a kie.
42024052	Ama kha abie yite palung tluosa pata Jerusalem luo ama kaa.
42024053	Ama cuo bangkhuo ca Biena-ing chunglie kha Khazing pathuosana ta ama hmuo.
43001001	A hruothu ta Bie a za aw; capa Bie ca Khazing hneta aw te, capa Bie ca Khazing ta a cuo.
43001002	A hruothu baataata Bie ca Khazing hneta a za aw.
43001003	Hmangting bangkhuo kha capa Bie thue cata sapa cuote sapa hmang suokhata hinghmuo ama li pata sapa aw vyi.
43001004	Ama chunglie capa hringna aw te ca hringna ca cawsaa bangkhuo cuota khena a cuo.
43001005	Khena ca zingna lie kha khe te zingna ta te vyi.
43001006	Khazing ta a za pathliepa pakha aw te, a ming ca Johan ta a cuo.
43001007	Ama thueta cawsaa bangkhuo ama zang diy riypata khena kaw kha tehte khuo riypata a vawpa pachangkhyituv ta a cuo. A ripa bangkhuo ama zang riypatana a vaw.
43001008	Ama pangphie ca khena cuo vyi; khena kaw ri riypata a vawpa tana a cuo.
43001009	Cawsaa bangkhuo kha a pakhe sapa khena hmisipa ca chuelyi luo kha a vaw nguoluo tli.
43001010	Ama ca chuelyi lie hing aw te ama thueta chuelyi hing sapa a cuo, cuorasala chuelyi ta ama kha za pachang vyi.
43001011	Ama ca a khy a ruo ciepa luo kha aa vaw raalaa pata a cawsaa zaw ta cuhluo vayi.
43001012	Cuorasala ama cuhluo te a ming a zangpa ca Khazing saata cuo khuna kha a pi yi.
43001013	Iema ca chuelyi phung, cawsaa thiy hne saa ta sapa cuo vayi; Khazing ta a sapa tana ama cuo.
43001014	Bie ca cawsaa ta vya cuote kiema hrawlie khy a vya sa; vihnyina hne biehmisipa ta a bipa rungnaana ca hmung pate, a Paa ta pakhata kyalya a hnyipa a Saacapaa a pipa rungnaana tana a cuo. (
43001015	Johan ta ama kaw kha khuopuv ta u te tehte a khuopa ca, “‘Ama ca kama hnang taata a vaw te, cuorasala kama laata a le vie, tahematapakieca ama ca kama hluo ta a za aw tli,’ tapata ica changpa yi kha ama hing tana a cuo,”) a ta.
43001016	Ama tlingna chung taata kiema bangkhuo ca vihnyina suokha hnang suokha ta ima hmung.
43001017	Phungbie ca Moses taata malie pi te; cuorasala vihnyina hne biehmisipa ca Zingsuv Khrih taata na aa vaw.
43001018	Ahungtahmuo Khazing kha hmung buo vayi. Saacapaa pakha dyipa, Paa pathiypalung hne a ngieta tah a awpa khata a paluo sa tli.
43001019	Judah uvthyi tie ta tluobyi tie hne Levi tie kha Jerusalem taata Johan'a luo pathlie yite, “Ahung tama na cuo?” tapata ama pa hiehriy sa.
43001020	Johan ta bie nu li pata, a luohuo hne a siesa pata, “Kama ca Messiah ta cuo va ang,” a ta.
43001021	“Cacuokie ahung tama na cuo? Elijah ta na cuo ma?” ta yite ama hiehriy. Johan ta, “Cuo va ang,” a ta. “Profet ta na cuo ma?” ta yite ama hiehriy. “Cuo va ang,” tapata a palie yi.
43001022	“Cacuokie ahung tama na cuo tapa kha malie chang tie. Malie a pathliepa tie'a luo kha na bie paliena hing ma chiykhyi pakhaa na a hu. Cacuonakaw ahung tana i cuo naa ta ma?” ama ta.
43001023	Johan ta, profet Isaiah a ripa haakhata: “Kama ca, ‘Abyipa ziy riypa luopuv kha, aa dangsa pata sa tie ung: tapata ruochung lie a khipa ue khatana i cuo!’” a ta.
43001024	Farasi tie ta ama pathliepa tie cata,
43001025	“Nama ca Messiah a cuo li kie Elijah a cuo li kie Profet zaw na cuo tlung li kieca khaapanakawma tiy na naw yi?” tapata ama hiehriy.
43001026	Johan ta, “Kama ca tiy ta tiy i naw yi, cuorasala nama hrawlie nama pachang lipa pakha a aw.
43001027	Ama ca kama hnang luo ta aa vaw nguoluo tli; cuorasala kama ca a phyipakaw riy pathluo riypa tahmuo a tla va ang,” tapata a palie yi.
43001028	Hingpa hmang a cuonapa ca Johan ta tiy a naw napa Jordan cavaa huesuo luo kuo lie a awpa Bethani khy lie tana a cuo.
43001029	A mawluopa ta Johan ta Zingsuv ama'a luo a vawle nguoluopa kha hmung te, “Mang tie ung, chuelyi suena a sikhyituv Khazing Tuvtaata khiy!
43001030	‘I hnang taata cawsaa pakha a vaw nguoluo te, cuorasala ama ca kama laata a le vie, tahematapakieca ama ca kama i puv hluo ta a za aw tli,’ tapata a kaw i za ripapaa khatana a cuo.
43001031	Ahung tama a cuo tapa kha kama hrahring za pachang va ang, cuorasala tiy ta tiynawna i pi hnuochuopa hing Israel ming hrawlie ama kha paluosapa a cuona riypatana a cuo,” a ta.
43001032	Johan ta, “Thlaapa ca vuoruo taakhiyta thuvruv haata za cung te a cunglie a zaa cangpa kha i hmung.
43001033	Kama hrahring ta ama kha za pachang va ang, cuorasala tiy ta tiynawna pi riypata naa pathlietuv Khazing ta, ‘Thlaapa a zuv'a te cawsaa pakha cunglie a cangpa kha na hmung tiyta, capapaa ca Thlaapa ta tiynawna a pituv riypapaa tana a cuo tapa kha na pachang aa,’ ina ta.
43001034	Capapaa ca kama pangphie ta hmung tli ang te, ‘Khazing Saacapaa tana a cuo’” tapata tehte a khuo yi.
43001035	A mawluopa ta Johan ca ziytuv tie pahning hneta amaa daahne nguoluo pata
43001036	Zingsuv a vya cakuolepa kha a hmung ca, “Khazing Tuvtaata khiy mang tie ung,” tapata a u.
43001037	Capa bie a ripa ca ziytuv tie pahning ta thyi yite Zingsuv kha ama ziy.
43001038	Zingsuv ta a hnang luo a pali te ama ziypa kha a hmung yi ca, “Khaapama nama huv?” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Rabbi, khaapa liema na aw?” tapata ama palie. (Rabbi tapa ca pacuvtuv saya tana ta a cuo).
43001039	“A vaw ungla vya mang tie ung,” a ta yi. Cacuonakawta vaa yite a awnapa kha ama va hmung, capa ning, a tuo kaliepa cuo kha ama hne ama hmuo pakhaw. Capa cuo ca zuoluo siymaluo papaliy hraw ta a cuo.
43001040	Capa cawsaa pahning lieta Johan bie ripa kha thyi te a ziypa ca Simon Piter a nuta Andru khata a cuo.
43001041	A uvta Simon kha hmung taa te, “Messiah ca ma hmung tli,” a ta. (Messiah tapa ca Sathu pathuvpa tana ta a cuo).
43001042	Cakhutaa Simon ca Zingsuv'a luo kha a vaa khyi. Zingsuv ta ama ca mang te, “Nama ca Johan saacapaa Simon ta na cuo, Sefas tapata kupa na cuo'a tli,” a ta. (Sefas tapa ca Piter tapa hne khata a lu te a siyluo ca ‘lungtung,’ tana ta a cuo).
43001043	A mawluopa ta Zingsuv ca Galilee luo si a ting. Filip kha hmung te, “Na ziy tie,” a ta.
43001044	Filip ca Andru hne Piter ama awnapa Bethsaida khypa ta a cuo.
43001045	Filip ta Nathanael kha hmung te, “Moses ta Phungbie caa-uv chunglie a kaw a capepa hne profet tie zaw ta a kaw ama za capepapaa kha ma hmung tli. Ama ca Josef saacapaa Zingsuv, Nazareth khypa tana a cuo,” a ta.
43001046	Nathanael ta, “Nazareth khy taata hmangphapa suokha chuo a pya the'a maw?” a ta. Filip ta, “A vaw la vya mang tie,” a ta.
43001047	Zingsuv ta ama'a luo Nathanael a vawlepa kha a hmung tiyta, ama hne a patuv pata, “Israel ming hmisipa hing mang tie ung! A chunglie hanghiena khaahmuo aw vyi,” a ta.
43001048	Nathanael ta, “Tuokhaatama ina pachang ciy?” tapata a hiehriy. Zingsuv ta, “Filip ta aca ku hluo ta thyikuv kung rawlie naa tu ningta kha ica hmung tli,” a ta.
43001049	Nathanael ta, “Rabbi, Nama ca Khazing Saacapaa, Israel ming Siepahruo tana na cuo,” tapata a palie.
43001050	Zingsuv ta, “Thyikuv kung rawlie na aw ningta ica hmung tli, ica ta nakaw kha tama ina zang ciy? Ama laa khata a le viepa hmang na hmung viele kalie aa,” a ta.
43001051	Cakhutaata ama kha, “Biehmisipa na ica chang yi: Vuoruo kha a pahaw'a te, Khazing avuoming tie kha Cawsaa Saacapaa cunglie ama za cungpa hne ama kiepa kha nama hmung aa,” a ta yi.
43002001	Ningthungna lie kha Galilee pe Kaanaa khy lie kha a chiyhiena pyi aw te Zingsuv nung kha capa lieca a aw.
43002002	Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie zaw kha a chiyhiena pyi luo ca ama ku ra.
43002003	Ama mingsuv tiy a chuo tiyta a nung ta Zingsuv kha, “Mingsuv tiy hnyi va tli yi,” a ta.
43002004	Zingsuv ta, “Canung nung, nama hne kama khaapama maa se, i cuo pha valie,” a ta.
43002005	Zingsuv nung ta changtaapa tie kha, “Ama ta aca changpa bangkhuo kha tue mya ung,” a ta yi.
43002006	Judah ming ta ama phung haata a pathena riypata capa lieca ruocuo suocaruv chi yite; ruocuo suokha ta tiy gaalaan suokiy taata sawthung te a tlaw.
43002007	Zingsuv ta changtaapa tie kha, “Hingpa ruocuo hing tiy pabi diy tie ung,” a ta yi. A lepalana te ta pabi yite,
43002008	iema kha, “Tiy kha siy ungla saduona pyi mangchiykingkaatuv kha va pi tie ung,” ta yite, ama va pi.
43002009	Mingsuv tiy ta a lipa tiy ca mangchiykingkaatuv cata a pacuo te, hingpa mingsuv tiy hing khaapa taata ma a vaw tapa kha a pachang li nakawta (Tiy a thepa changtaapa tie kha taca ama pachang thluo), napuv a chiytuvpapaa ca ku te,
43002010	“Malie ca mingsuv tiy pahuocepa kha thu taa yite muo aa de pata ama dang khu taata mingsuv tiy cakhawpa kha ama pi ta. Cuorasala nama ca a pahuocepa kha ata te pata na thu kalie,” a ta.
43002011	Zingsuv ta hingpa kharuehaa hmang suokhana hing Galilee pe Kaanaa khy lieta a tue; capalie ca a rungnaana kha paluo sa te, a ziytuv tie ta ama kha ama zang.
43002012	Cakhutaata Zingsuv hne a nung, a nuta zaw, hne ziytuv tie ca Kapernaum khy luo kha zuv yite ning cawta chung ama va aw.
43002013	Lawsena Pyi a ngiesa tli nakawta Zingsuv ca Jerusalem luo kha a vaa.
43002014	Biena-ing chunglie kha cue hne tuv hne valale a zaapa tie hne tuokaa a thlepa tie zaw ama cabya lie amaa tupa kha a hmung yi.
43002015	Cacuonakawta khuhriy kha china riypata a camaa te tuv hne cue hne, iema zaw bangkhuo kha Biena-ing taata a cade diy yi, tuokaa thletuv tie cabya zaw kha palipathi diy te ama tuokaa diyta zaw kha a hipatlaa diy.
43002016	Valale a zaapa tie kha, “Hingpa hmang taahingta nama valale kha pyakhyi diy ung! I paa ing ca chadaw zaana ta hmuo kha tie ung!” tapata naw a pi yi.
43002017	Ziytuv tie ca Caapathepa ta, “Vya Khazing, na ing i uevuopa hing i chunglie na myi haata a ling,” a tapa kha ama nang a kya vuo.
43002018	Cakhutaata Judah ming ta, “Hingpa hmang na tuena kawlie hingta khaapa pamangsana ma malie na pahmung sa aa?” ama ta.
43002019	Zingsuv ta, “Hingpa Biena-ing hing para ungla ning thung chunglie i sa pakhaa aa,” a ta.
43002020	Judah ming ta, “Ning thung chung tama na sa pakhaa aa? Hingpa Biena-ing sana lie hing kung sawliy kung caruv tli hing ama za ru!” ama ta.
43002021	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta biena-ing a tapa ca ama pangpa khatana a cuo.
43002022	Cacuonakaw thiyna taata pathu pakhaapa a cuo khu taata, ziytuv tie ca ama hing muo a ripa khata a cuo ta tapa kha ama nang vuo te Caapathepa hne Zingsuv ripa kha ama zang.
43002023	Zingsuv ca Lawsena Pyi chung Jerusalem lie a aw ning kha cawsaa hluvpuv ta kharuehaa hmang a tuepa zaw kha hmung yite ama zang.
43002024	Cuorasala Zingsuv taca zang diy vayi, tahematapakieca cawsaa bangkhuo kha a pachang diy yi.
43002025	Iema kaw kha cawsaa hrangpa ta changpasie a hu vyi, tahematapakieca ama palung chunglie khaapama a aw tapa kha a pachang diy.
43003001	Judah ming uvthyi pakha, Nikodemu ama tapa za aw te; ama ca Farasipa ta a cuo.
43003002	Zuokha ca Zingsuv'a luo kha vaa te, “Rabbi, nama ca Khazing'a taata a zuvpa pacuvtuv na cuo tapa kha ma pachang. Khazing ta a aw puo li kie yi ca, kharuehaa hmang na tuepa zaw hing ahungtahmuo tue khu'a vayi,” a ta.
43003003	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang: ahunghmuota cung luo taata papuvsapathiypa a cuo li kieca Khazing Pena kha hmung khu'a vyi,” a ta.
43003004	Nikodemu ta, “Tuokhaatama uvthyita pakha ca a puvpathiy khu aa? A nung riy chung luo a ngie pakhaa pata yihning puvpathiypa ca a cuo khu'a ma?” a ta.
43003005	Zingsuv ta, Biehmisi tana ica chang: ahunghmuota tiy hne Thlaapa ta papuvsapathiypa a cuo li kieca Khazing Pena chung luo ca a ngie khu'a vyi.
43003006	Saapa ta sapa ca saapa cuote, Thlaapa ta sapa ca thlaapa ta a cuo.
43003007	‘Cung luo taata papuvsapathiypa nama cuo hrahring na a hu,’ ica ta nakaw yi ta nama kharue haa kha se.
43003008	Thliy ca a khingna luo na a hruo; a pu ca na thyi, cuorasala khaapa taata a vaw tema khaapa luo a si tapa kha pachang vaciy. Thlaapa ta sapa a cuopa ca cahaacatana ama cuo ra,” a ta.
43003009	Nikodemu ta, “Tuokhaatama capa ca a cuo khu aa?” a ta.
43003010	Zingsuv ta, “Nama ca Israel ming pacuvtuv saya na cuo pata ama hing hmuo pachang va cama? a ta.
43003011	Biehmisi tana ica chang: kiema ca ma pachangpa kha tehtekhuo pate ma hmungpa kha ma pathyi sa, cuorasala ahungtahmuo ma tehtekhuopa kha cuhluo khing va ungciy.
43003012	Hingpa alyi hmang kaw ica changpa yi hmuo nama zang li kieca tuokhaatama vuoruo hmang kaw ica chang tiy yi ta nama zang khu the aa?
43003013	Vuoruo taata zaa cungpa Cawsaa Saacapaa ri li pata ahunghmuota vuoruo luo a kiepa aw buo vayi,” a ta.
43003014	Moses ta ruochung lie, atung cunglie daa pariy a taa pahaata, Cawsaa Saacapaa ca taa pata a cuo aa;
43003015	cahaa cata ama a zangpa bangkhuo ca chuozaa hringna ama hmung aa.
43003016	Khazing ta chuelyi hing a due hringhruo nakawta a hnyi tlakuopa a Saacapaa kha a pi, cacuonakaw ta ama a zangpa bangkhuo ca thiy'a vayi, chuozaa hringna ama hnyi aa.
43003017	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta a Saacapaa kha chuelyi luo hing chuelyi bie ri riypata za pathlie vyi, chuelyi khuo riypatana a za pathlie.
43003018	“Ama a zangpa ca suebieripana ang'a vyi, cuorasala a zang lipa ca suebieripana a ang tli, tahematapakieca Khazing ta a hnyi tlakuopa a Saacapaa ming kha a zang li nakawta a cuo.
43003019	Bieripana tapa ca hinghaahingtana a cuo: khena ca chuelyi luo hing a vya chiy tli; cuorasala cawsaa ta khena laata zingna kha ama khing vie, tahematapakieca ama tuepa kha hmangpha lipa ta a cuo nakawta a cuo.
43003020	Hmang pha lipa a tuepa bangkhuo ca khena kha hue yite khena luo a vaw khing vayi, tahematapakieca hmang pha lipa ama tuepa kha aa luo riypa khing vayi.
43003021	Cuorasala aa hmuopa a tuepa ca khena luo kha a vaw te a tuepa ca Khazing khingna haatana a cuo tapa kha khena ta a siesa pata a paluo sa,” a ta.
43003022	Cakhutaacata Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ca Judea pe khyta luo kha si yite iema'a lieca cuokha chung aw te tiynawna zaw a pi yi.
43003023	Johan zaw ta Aenon ama tapa, Salim taata a hla li napa hmang lie kha tiynawna a pi ra yi, tahematapakieca capa hmang lieca tiy a hluvsa a aw. Cawsaa ca ama'a luo kha a vaw yite tiynawna kha a pi yi.
43003024	Hingpa hing Johan thaw a tla hluo ta a cuopa hmang tana a cuo.
43003025	Johan a ziytuv chekha zaw ca Judah ming pakha hneta a pathe sana kawlieta bie amaa i.
43003026	Cacuonakaw Johan'a luo kha a vaw yite, “Rabbi, Jordan cavaa huesuo lie nama hne zaa aw papaa, a kawluo tehte na khuopapaa khata tiynawna pi nguoluo te cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama'a luo ama vaa nguoluo,” ama ta.
43003027	Johan ta, Vuoruo taata pipa a cuo li kieca ahungtahmuo khaapahmuo hnyi khu'a vayi.
43003028	Kama pangphie ta, ‘Kama ca Messiah ta cuo va ang, a hmie luota vya pathlie lupa tana i cuo,’ i tapa kha a thyipa ca niema tana nama cuo.
43003029	Chiyhiepa lesaanung a hnyipa ca a chiyhietuv satliepa tana a cuo. Nungchiytuv satliepa a thaa lie a daa te a ueryi a thyipa a daakhyituv a viesaapa ca khuopuv ta a palung a tluo. Capacana i palungtluona a kyna ta a cuo.
43003030	Ama ca lethaw'a te, kama ca i cungbung aa,” a ta.
43003031	A cung taata a zaa cungpapaa ca a hrangpa bangkhuo laata a le vie. Alyi taata a vawpa ca alyi hmang kaw kha a ri. Vuoruo taata a zuvpa ca hmangting bangkhuo cunglie tana a aw.
43003032	Ama ta a hmungpa hne a thyipa kha tehte a khuo raalaa pata ahungtahmuo a tehte khuopa kha cuhluo vayi.
43003033	A tehte khuopa kha a cuhluopa ca Khazing ca a hmisipa tana a cuo tapa khana a pacu sa.
43003034	Khazing ta a pathliepa ca a Thlaapa kha tluotling pata a pi nakawta Khazing bie kha a ri.
43003035	Paa ta a Saacapaa kha due te hmangting bangkhuo kha a kuv cung luo a pi diy.
43003036	Saacapaa a zangpa bangkhuo ca chuozaa hringna ama hnyi, Saacapaa ri a ngie lipa bangkhuo ca hringna hmung'a vayi, Khazing hihaana na ama ang aa.
43004003	Judea ruo taa khata pya te Galilee ruo luo kha a kaa.
43004004	Cuorasala Samaria ruo kha a cahraw paa.
43004005	Cacuonakawta Jacob ta a saacapaa Josef a pipa luruo hne a ngieta tah a awpa Samaria pe Saikhar khy luo kha a chiy.
43004006	Capa lieca Jacob takhue kha aw te Zingsuv ca a nang a buosa nakawta takhue kie lieca aa tu. Capa cuo ca ningchung hraw ta a cuo.
43004007	Samaria cawsaanung pakha ca tiy the riypata a vaw te Zingsuv ta, “Tiy dang riypa na siy tie,” a ta.
43004008	(A hnang ziytuv tie ca ning riypa calyi riypata khychung luo ama vaa ningta a cuo.)
43004009	Samaria zaanung cata, “Judah ming pakha a cuo pata Samaria canung pakha a cuopa kama'a lie dang riypa tiy inaa hiepa cahing khaapanakawma a ta?” a ta (Judah ming ca Samaria ming hneta hmang a hrawpa ta hmuo khing vayi.)
43004010	Zingsuv ta, “Khazing ta aca pipa lasaw hing khaapama a cuo tapa hne tiy dang riypa caa hiepapaa hing ahungma tapa hing pachang la ca ama pali hing a hie'a cate hringna tiy kha aca pi aa,” a ta.
43004011	Canung nung ta, “Abyipa, tiyphie ta na hnyi va, takhue ta aa thuvsa hyi. Khaapa taata ma capa hringna tiy ca na la aa?
43004012	Hingpa takhue malie a pipa mingpa Jacob laata i le vie tapata ma naa rue? Ama hne a saata zaw hne a sahring zaw bangkhuo ta ama dangpa takhue tana a cuo,” a ta.
43004013	Zingsuv ta, “Hingpa tiy a dangpa bangkhuo ca ama tiy a hrie pakhaa aa,
43004014	cuorasala kama ta i pipa tiy a dangpa ca khatiy tahmuo a tiy hrie pakhaa'a va tli. I pi riypa tiy ca a chunglie kha chuozaa hringna a pipa acaatiy ta aa li aa,” a ta.
43004015	Canung nung ta, “Abyipa, I tiy a hrie li tli riypa hne, hingpa luo zaw hing tiy the riypata i vaw li tli riypata capa tiy ca na pi tie!” a ta.
43004016	Zingsuv ta, “Cakuo la naa vaapa kha va ku la a vaw pakhaa tie,” a ta.
43004017	Canung nung ta, “Navaa hnyi va ang,” tapata a palie. Zingsuv ta, “Navaa hnyi va ang na tapa hing a hmuo.
43004018	Capaa papangaa a hlaw tli yi cate ata lie naa hlawpapaa zaw hing naa vaapa hmisi ta cuo vyi. Na ripa hing aa hmuo,” a ta.
43004019	Canung nung ta, “Abyipa, profet ta na cuopa ica pachang.
43004020	Kiema mingchingmingvuo tie taca hingpa tluo lie hing Khazing kha amaa zaa bie, cuorasala niema taca Khazing ca Jerusalem liena abie riypa a cuo nama ta,” a ta.
43004021	Zingsuv ta, “Canung nung, ica changpa hing zang tie, niema ta Paa ca hingpa tluo lie cuose, Jerusalem lie cuose namaa bie lina riypa cuo ca a vaw nguoluo tli.
43004022	Niema ca nama pachang lipa khana namaa bie, kiema ca ma pachangpa kha maa bie, tahematapakieca khuona ca Judah ming'a taata a vawpa tana a cuo.
43004023	Khazing abie hmisipa tie ta Paa ca thlaapa hne biehmisipa ta amaa biena cuo kha a vaw nguoluo te a vya tlung tli. Cahaa cata a biepa cana Paa ta a khingpa a cuo.
43004024	Khazing ca Thlaapa ta cuote abiepa tie ta Thlaapa hne biehmisipa ta amaa bie riypatana a cuo,” a ta.
43004025	Canung nung ta, “Messiah ca a vaw nguoluo tapa kha i pachang. Ama aa vaw thueta hmangting bangkhuo kha a pathyi diy aa,” a ta.
43004026	Zingsuv ta, “Nama hne bie a ri nguoluopa kama hing ama ca tana i cuo,” a ta.
43004027	Capa cuo lieca Zingsuv a ziytuv tie ca vya chiy yite canung nung hne bie amaa rue nguoluopa kha ama hmung tiyta ama nang a uosa. Cuorasala ahungtahmuo, “Khaama naa hu?” ta lipa yi ta, “Khaapanakawma hingpa nung hing bie na rihne?” ta ra vayi.
43004028	Cakhutaata canungnung ca a tiybi kha thusesiy te, khychung luo kha kaa te cawsaa zaw kyihuo khata,
43004029	“I tue buopa hmang bangkhuo naa chang khu diy papaa hing vya mang tie ung. Ama hing Messiah ta cuo'a vama?” a ta yi.
43004030	Cacuonakaw khychung taa cata pya yite Zingsuv'a luo ca ama vaa.
43004031	Capa cuo ning ca ziytuv tie ta Zingsuv kha, “Rabbi, sa ning tie,” ama ta.
43004032	Cuorasala ama ta, “Niema ta a kaw nama pachang lipa ning riypa sa na i hnyi,” a ta yi.
43004033	Cacuonakawta ziytuv tie ca pakha hne pakha kha, “Pakhakha ta sa a vya pi pata a cuo biephung'a ma?” amaa ta.
43004034	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “I sa ca naa pathlietuv khingna tue hne rehrie ina changpa palang hing tana a cuo,” a ta yi.
43004035	Niema ta, “Ata taata thlapaliy khu pahne sa hrie tiy a ta aa,” nama ta cuo vama? Cuorasala ica chang yi: nama cahriy kha suo ungla; sa ca hming te khatluv tama hrie aa de tapa kha mang tie ung!
43004036	Sa a hriepapaa ca a hrie muo kha pipa cuote chuozaa hringna cuota sa kha a papung nguoluo, cacuonakawta a ciy a cyituv hne sa a hrietuv kha suvkha ta ama palung a tluo pakhaw aa.
43004037	‘Pakha ta ciy cyi te pakha ta sa a hrie,’ tapa bie ca ama lie hingna aa hmuo.
43004038	Nama thlu lipa lu lie sa hrie riypatana ica pathlie yi; malie ta thlu yite niema ta ama thlu cienapa lie kha nama hrie,” a ta yi.
43004039	Canung nung ta, “I za tue buopa bangkhuo tana ina chang diy,” tapata tehte a khuo nakawta Samaria ming a hluvpuv ta ama zang.
43004040	Cacuonakawta Samaria ming ca Zingsuv'a luo amaa vaw tiyta, iema'a lie a pahy riypata paakie yite, ning hning a pahy siy.
43004041	Zingsuv bie ripa kha thyi yite cawsaa a hluv hryly ta ama zang.
43004042	Canung nung kyihuo khata, “Ata hing ca nama na ri nakawta cuo li pata kiema hrahring ta a bie ripa kha thyi pate ma zang; ama ca chuelyi Khuotuv a cuo hrahring tapa kha ma pachang,” ama ta.
43004043	Ning hning khu taata, Zingsuv ca Galilee ruo luo kha a si.
43004044	(Tahema-tapakieca Zingsuv hrahring ta, “Profet ca a puvna ruo lieca pa-uvsathyina hmung vyi,” a ta.)
43004045	Galilee luo a chiy tiyta, Galilee ming ta ama kha ama daw, tahematapakieca Jerusalem Lawsena Pyi luo kha vaa ra yite pyi chunglie ta a tuepa bangkhuo kha ama hmung nakawta a cuo.
43004046	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca tiy kha mingsuv tiy ta a za pacuo sa napa Galilee pe Kaanaa khy luo kha a si pakhaa. Capa lieca cuzaa byi pakha aw te a saacapaapa ca Kapernaum khy lie kha a pasa.
43004047	Zingsuv na Judea ruo taata Galilee luo a vaw tapa kha a thyi tiyta, ama'a luo kha vaa te, Kapernaum khy luo kha vaa pata vuotaa a thiy'a nangpa a saacapaa kha patluo sa riypata paa a kie.
43004048	Zingsuv ta, “Pamangsana kharuehaa hmang nama hmung li kieca zang'a va ungciy,” a ta yi.
43004049	Cuzaa byipa cata, “Abyipa, i saata a thiy hluo hingta a vaw tie,” a ta.
43004050	Zingsuv ta, “Cakuo tie, na saacapaa ca a hring aa,” a ta. Capapaa cata Zingsuv bie kha zang te a cakuo.
43004051	A kaa luo, luopuv lie kha a sii tie ta vya daw yite, “Na saacapaa ca a tluo tli,” ama ta.
43004052	Ama ta, “Khaapa cuo taakhata ma a saacapaa ca a tluo vie? tapata a hiehriy tiy yi ta, iema ta, “Azuochaning ningchung, siymaluo pakha lie khana a ngelingpa a cakaa,” ama ta.
43004053	Capa cuo ca Zingsuv ta, ‘Na saacapaa ca a tluo aa,” a za tapa cuo ta a cuopa kha a paa ca a kya thyi pakhaa. Cacuonakawta ama hne a ingchungkhue tie bangkhuo ta ama zang.
43004054	Hingpa hing Zingsuv ta Judea ruo taata Galilee ruo luo aa vaw khu taata a tuepa kharuehaa hmang a suohningnapa ta a cuo.
43005001	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca Jerusalem lie Judah biena luo pyi suokha aw te a vaa.
43005002	Jerusalem khy, tuv thlake ama tapa kielie Hebru ryi ta Beth-zatha ama tapa tiy-ang suokha aw te a kie lieta thluodaa suopangaa a aw.
43005003	Capa thluodaa chunglie ca, mingcuepa, a phyi cabiepa, a pakyapa tapata a tluo lipa a hluvsa ama laa patlaw.
43005004	(A cuocuo ta Abyipa avuoming kha za cung te tiy kha a za catlu taw. Cahaa cata tiy aa catlu pahne tiy chung luo aa thaw taapa ca ama pasana taata ama tluo. Caacuonakawta a pasapa tie ca tiy a catlu riypa kha ama huo.)
43005005	Capa lieca kung sawthung kung cari a pasa tlipa capaa pakha a aw.
43005006	Zingsuv ta capa lie a zie nguoluopa kha hmung te kha cuo kungnung a pasa tlipa kha a pachang nakawta, “Na tluo khing ma?” a ta.
43005007	A pasapapaa cata, “Abyipa, tiy a vya catlupa hne tiyliy chung luo naa naw riypa hnyi va laa ang te cung naase ang i ta pahne ta a hrangpa pakhakha ta i naa naw chuv lawmaw yi,” a ta.
43005008	Zingsuv ta, “Thu la na pangphaa kha a la la cakuo tie,” a ta.
43005009	Cawsaapapaa ca sungkha ta tluo te a pangphaa kha la te a cakuo. Capa ning ca Sabbath ning ta a cuo.
43005010	Cacuonakawta Judah uvthyi tie ta tluona a hmungpapaa ca, “Ata ning hing Sabbath ning ta cuote na pangphaa naa puvlepa hing ma phung na a thlu,” ama ta.
43005011	Ama ta, “Naa patluo sa papaa na na pangphaa kha a la lah cakuo tie, naa ta,” a ta.
43005012	Iema ta, “Na pangphaa kha a la lah cakuo tie caa tapa ca ahungma?” ama ta.
43005013	Cuorasala tluona a hmungpapaa ta pachang vyi, tahematapakieca capa lieca cawsaazaapuv kha aw yite Zingsuv ca dya a zuvpathla tli.
43005014	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ta khapapaa kha Biena-ing lie hmung te, “Mang tie, patluo sapa na cuo tli hing; na cunglie a ruv viepa a tlung li riypata suena tue vie khatie lie ciy,” a ta.
43005015	Cawsaapapaa ca pya te Judah ming kyihuo khata a patluo sa papaa ca Zingsuv ta a cuopa kha a va chang yi.
43005016	Sabbath ning ta cahaapa hmang a tue nakawta Judah ming ta Zingsuv ca a du hruo ama pathaa.
43005017	Zingsuv ta, “I Paa ca ata te hingta re a hrie nguoluo kalie, cacuonakawta kama zaw i hrie ra,” a ta yi.
43005018	Sabbath ning a parapa dyi cuo li pata Khazing kha i Paa tana a cuo a ta nakawta Khazing hne tana aa pakhing ta yite, Judah uvthyi tie ca ama thie riypa khata luo ama huv hryly.
43005019	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Saacapaa hing ama ta tah khaahmuo tue khu vyi; a paa ta a tuepa a hmungpa dyi khana a tue. Paa ta a tuepa haa khatana Saacapaa ta a tue ra.
43005020	Paa ta Saacapaa ca due te a tuepa bangkhuo kha a pahmung sa. Nama nang a uo sa riypata hingpa laa hing ta tue riypa a le viepa kha a pahmung sa kalie aa.
43005021	Paa ta a thiypa pathu sa te hringna a pipa haata Saacapaa zaw ta a khingpa kha hringna a pi ra yi.
43005022	Paa ta ahung hing hmuo bie ripa vayi, cuorasala Saacapaa kha bie ripa khuna naw a pi.
43005023	Cacuonakawta Paa a pa-uvsathyipa bangkhuo ta Saacapaa kha ama pa-uvsathyi ra aa. Ahunghmuo cuose Saacapaa a pa-uvsathyi lipa ca a pathlietuv Paa a pa-uvsathyi lipa tana a cuo.
43005024	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: i bie thyi te naa pathlietuv a zangpa ca chuozaa hringna a hnyi. Bieripana ang'a vyi; cuorasala thiyna taata hringna luo a caluo tli.
43005025	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Athiypa tie ta Khazing Saacapaa ueryi thyi'a yite, a thyipa bangkhuo ta hringna ama hmungna cuo kha a vaw'a te ata zaw hing a vya tlung nguoluo tli.
43005026	Paa ta ama hrahring chunglie hringna a hnyipa haata Saacapaa zaw hing ama hrahring chunglie hringna hnyi riypata naw a pi.
43005027	Cakhutaa ta ama ca Cawsaa Saacapaa a cuo nakawta bieripana naw kha a pi.
43005028	Hingpa kawlie hing nama nang uo kha se; a thiypa bangkhuo ta a ueryi kha thyi'a yite ama thluo taata ama kya thuna cuo ca a vaw nguoluo tli;
43005029	hmangpha a tuepa tie ca hringna luo thupakhaa'a yite; hmangpha lipa a tuepa tie ca suebie ripana luo ama thupakhaa aa,” a ta.
43005030	Kama se ta khaapahmuo tue khu va ang. I thyipa haa dyi tana bie i ripa yi; cacuonakawta i bieripana ca aa dang, tahematapakieca kama khingna haata tue lipa angta naa pathlietuv khingna haata i tue nakawta a cuo.
43005031	Kama ta kama kaw kha i ri kieca i ripa ca a hmuo'a vyi.
43005032	Cuorasala kama cuopa ta i kaw naa rituv pakha aw te kama kaw a ripa kha a hmuo tapata i pachang.
43005033	Niema ta Johan'a luo kha biephyatuv pathlie ung cate biehmisipa kha a ri.
43005034	Khahaapa pachangkhyituv cawsaa i hu nakawta cuo vyi; khuona nama hmung thena riypata i ripa tana a cuo.
43005035	Johan ca ie te a khepa myi-ing haatana a cuo; cuo pachangta chung kha a khena lie a nuopa nama khing.
43005036	Cuorasala kama ca Johan laata a le viepa tehtekhuo riypa na i hnyi. I Paa ta palang riypata ina pipa re hingta kama cuota tehte khuo te i Paa ta pathliepa i cuopa kha a paluo sa.
43005037	Cakhutaata naa pathlietuv i Paa hrahring ta kama cuopa ta tehte a khuo. A ueryi thyi buo va ungciy, a hmingsuo zaw hmung buo va ungciy,
43005038	cakhutaata a bie ripa zaw nama palung chunglie pari va ungciy, tahematapakieca a pathliepa hing nama zang li nakawta a cuo.
43005039	Niema ta Caapathepa chunglie nama huv, tahematapakieca capa chunglie ca chuozaa hringna kha ma hmung thlu'a mang tapata nama rue. Hingpa Caapathepa hing kama kaw a ripa tana a cuo!
43005040	Cuorasala hringna hmung riypata kama'a luo kha a vaw khing hyi va ungciy.
43005041	“Cawsaapa'a taata rungnaana kha cuhluo va ang.
43005042	Nama chunglie Khazing duena nama hnyi lipa kha ica pachang yi.
43005043	I Paa nawhnyina hneta i zuv raalaa pata na cuhluo va ungciy; cuorasala cawsaa pakhakha ama nawhnyina hneta a vaw kieca nama za cuhluo hyi tlung aa.
43005044	Niema ca pakha hne pakha cung taata rungnaana kha a cuhluo ung cate Khazing'a taata rungnaana kha nama huv li kieca tuokhaatama kama ca ina zang khu'a ungciy?
43005045	Kama hing i Paa hmielie sue malie a phawtuv tana a cuo aa tapata na rue kha ung. A cunglie a nguopuona nama hnyipa Moses hingna sue caa phawtuv riypa yita a cuo.
43005046	Moses hing nama zang kieca kama zaw hing ina zang raa ungciy, tahematapakieca ama ca kama kaw kha muo a cape ta.
43005047	Cuorasala a capepa kha nama zang li kieca i ripa ca tuokhaatama nama zang the aa?” a ta yi.
43006001	Cakhutaacata Zingsuv ca Tiberias riyliy tapata zaw ama u rapa Galilee riyliy huesuo luo kha a vaa.
43006002	A pasapa tie a patluo sapa yi kharuehaa hmang kha ama hmung nakawta cawsaa hluvpuv ta ama kha ama ziy.
43006003	Zingsuv ca tluocung luo kha kie te a ziytuv tie hneta amaa tu.
43006004	Judah ming Lawsena Pyi cuo kha aa ngie tli.
43006005	Zingsuv ca hmiehmie pase te cawsaa hluvpuv ama'a luo amaa vawpa kha a hmung tiyta Filip kyihuo kha, “Hingpa cawsaa bangkhuo ning riypa viechuo hing khaapaliema ma calyi aa?” a ta.
43006006	Hinghaahingta a hiehriypa hing Filip kha a dyapasya khing nakawta a cuo. Khaapama i tue aa tapa kha ama ta ca a pachang thluo.
43006007	Filip ta, “A cawta law ta amaa ky riypata hmuo denarii zahning muo viechuo ta a zu'a vyi,” a ta.
43006008	Ziytuv hrangpa pakha, Simon Piter nuta Andru ta,
43006009	“Hingpa lie hing barli viechuo tluo pangaa hne ngaa sahning a hnyipa haatiypa pakha a aw, cuorasala cawsaa hing zaa ca a zu the riypa cuo vyi,” a ta.
43006010	“Zingsuv ta, “Cawsaa kha patu sa tie ung,” a ta yi. Capa hmang lieca aphuv chaasa te cawsaa bangkhuo ca a tu yite thawpangaa tluv ama ta.
43006011	Zingsuv ta viechuo kha la te, palungtluona bie a hluo khu taata, capa lie a tupa tie kha a re yi. Cahaa cata ngaa zaw kha tue te cawsaa bangkhuo ta riybisa pata ama ning.
43006012	Ama ning khu taata ziytuv tie kha, “Ama ningbuopa kha pakhaw tie ung, a cawta hmuo a vievuv li riypata,” a ta yi.
43006013	Cacuonakaw pakhaw diy yite cawsaa ta ama ningpa barli viechuo tluopangaa taakhata ama ningbuopa beke ta zung hraa hlyihning a bi.
43006014	Cawsaa ta kharuehaa hmang a tuepa kha ama hmung tiyta, “Chuelyi luo a vaw riypa profet tapa ca ama hrahring hingna a cuo,” ama ta.
43006015	Zingsuv ta iema kha a vaw'a yite, na patuv'a yite siepahruo cuo riypata hruohra ta ina hripuo'a yi tapa kha a pachang nakawta ama se ta dya zuvpathla te tluocung luo kha a kie.
43006016	Zuoluo ning aa ngie tiyta ziytuv tie ca riyliy luo kha zuv yite
43006017	sawkawpalaw kha a khang yite, Kapernaum luo vaa riypata riyliy kha ama va te. Khy a zing tli, Cuorasala Zingsuv ca iema'a luo kha a vaw valie.
43006018	Thliy aa hruo nakawta riyliy lieca tiylaw a thu.
43006019	Sawkawpalaw ca me thung me paliy tluv ama va mawpa khata Zingsuv ca riyliy cunglie kha a phyi ta vya cakuo te iema'a luo a vya ngiepa yi kha ama hmung ca ama thlaa a zangsa.
43006020	Zingsuv ta, “Nama thlaa zang kha se, Kama tana i cuo,” a ta yi.
43006021	Sawkawpalaw luo kha Zingsuv ca pakie sa yite amaa tingna hmang kha sungkha ta ama va pha.
43006022	A mawluopa ta riyliy huesuo lie a awpa cawsaazaapuv khata capa lie ca sawkawpalaw suokha dyi aw te, Zingsuv kha capa sawkawpalaw khata ziytuv tie hne si li pata, iema selaw ta ama sipa kha ama hmung.
43006023	Tiberias taata a vya chiypa sawkawpalaw hrangpa tie kha, Abyipa ta palungtluona bie hluo te cawsaazaapuv viechuo ama ningnapa a thaa lie kha amaa vya pahy.
43006024	Cawsaazaapuv ta Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie ama aw lipa kha ama pachang tiyta, Zingsuv huv riypata sawkawpalaw kha a khang yite Kapernaum khy luo kha ama si.
43006025	Cawsaa ta Zingsuv kha riyliy huesuo lie ama va hmung tiyta, “Rabbi, khatiy tiy tama hingpa luo hing naa vaw?” ama ta.
43006026	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: ina huvpa ung cahing kharuehaa hmang i tuepa nama hmung nakawta cuo li pata viechuo nama khing zi nama ning nakawtana a cuo.
43006027	A ra thepa sa cuota re hrie kha ung; cuorasala Cawsaa Saacapaa ta aca pi riypa yi chuozaa ta a hmangpa hringna sa cuota re kha hrie tie ung. Tahematapakieca Paa Khazing ta ama cunglie kha a palung tlingnapa caakhe kha a khe tli.
43006028	Cakhutaata iema ta, “Khazing ta malie aa khing khyipa re hrie riypata khaapama ma tue aa?” ama ta.
43006029	Zingsuv ta, “Khazing khingpa re ca ama ta a pathliepapaa zang khana a cuo,” a ta yi.
43006030	Iema ta, “Hmung'a pate maca zang riypata khaapa pamangsana ma na tue aa? Khaapama na tue aa?
43006031	Caapathepa ta, ‘Vuoruo taata ning riypa viechuo kha a pi yi,’ a tapa haata, ma mingchingmingvuo tie ca ruochung lie mannaa kha ama za ning,” ama ta.
43006032	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Vuoruo taata viechuo caa pipa yi ca Moses ta cuo vyi, vuoruo viechuo hmisipa caa pipa yi ca i Paa tana a cuo.
43006033	Tahematapakieca Khazing pipa viechuo ca vuoruo taata zaa cungpa hing cuote chuelyi kha hringna a pi,” a ta yi.
43006034	Iema ta, “Abyipa, capa viechuo ca malie pi pari tie,” ama ta.
43006035	Zingsuv ta, “Kama ca hringna viechuo tana i cuo. Kama'a luo a vawpa ca ahunghmuota a nang diy buo li'a pata Kama naa zangpa ca ahunghmuota a tiy hrie buo'a va tli.
43006036	Cuorasala ica chang yi, a hmung ca na hmung raalaa ung cate na zang va ungciy.
43006037	I Paa ta ina pipa bangkhuo ca kama'a luo a vaw'a yite kama'a luo a vawpa bangkhuo ca pakaa'a vayi ang,
43006038	tahematapakieca vuoruo taata i za cung tiy hingta kama khingpa tue riypata cuo li pata naa pathlietuvpa khingna tue riypatana a cuo.
43006039	Naa pathlietuvpapaa khingna ca: ina pipa bangkhuo kha pakha hmuo pavie li pata ningchuonapa ning khiy ama palang ta hringna luo pathu riypatana a cuo.
43006040	I Paa khingna hmisi ca Saacapaa kha hmung te a zangpa bangkhuo ta chuozaa hringna ama hmung riypa hingna a cuo. Cacuonakaw, kama ta ningchuonapa ningta khiy hringna luo i pathu pakhaa'a yi,” a ta.
43006041	“Kama hing vuoruo taata zaa cungpa viechuo tana i cuo,” a ta nakawta Judah ming ca a maa cie.
43006042	“Hingpapaa hing Josef saacapaapa Zingsuv kha cuo vama? A nung hne a paa kha ma pachang yi. Khaapanakawma vuoruo taana i za cung a ta the?” ama ta.
43006043	Zingsuv ta, “Namaa cie phuvluvpa ca duo tie ung.
43006044	Naa pathlietuv i Paa na kama'a luo a vya chiy yi ta li pata ca ahunghmuota kama'a luo a vaw khu'a vayi; cahaa cata kama'a luo a vawpa ca ningchuonapa ningta khiy hringna luo i pathu pakhaa yi,” a ta.
43006045	Profet tie ta, Iema ca Khazing na a pacuv'a yi,’ tapata ama cape kha. Ahunghmuota i Paa ueryi kha thyi te ama'a taata a cuvpa bangkhuo ca kama'a luo kha amaa vaw.
43006046	Khazing'a taata zaa cungpa pakha ri li pata ahunghmuota Khazing hmung buo vayi, ama dyina Paa kha a hmung buo.
43006047	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: a zangpa ca chuozaa hringna a hnyi.
43006048	Kama ca hringna viechuo tana i cuo.
43006049	Nama mingchingmingvuo tie ta ruochung lie mannaa kha ama ning raalaa pata ama thiy ngiethie.
43006050	Cuorasala vuoruo taata a zuvpa viechuo a ningpa bangkhuo ca thiy'a vayi.
43006051	Vuoruo taata zaa cungpa hringna viechuo ca kama hing tana i cuo. Hingpa viechuo a ningpa bangkhuo ca chuozaa ta ama hring aa. Chuelyi ming ta hringna ama hmung riypata i pi riypa viechuo ca i saa hingtana a cuo,” a ta yi.
43006052	Judah ming ca iema hne iema kha a i yite, “Tuokhaatama hingpapaa hingta a saa ca ce riypata malie a pi the aa,” ama ta.
43006053	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Cawsaapa Saacapaa a saa kha ce li pata a thiyse zaw nama dang li kieca nama chunglie hringna hnyi'a va ungciy.
43006054	I saa a cepa hne i thiy a dangpa bangkhuo ca chuozaa hringna hnyi'a yite ningchuonapa ningta khiy hringna luo i pathu pakhaa'a yi.
43006055	I saa ca sa hmisipa ta cuote i thiyse ca dang riypa hmisi ta a cuo.
43006056	I saa kha ce te i thiy a dangpa ca kama chunglie hring yite kama zaw iema chunglie i hring ra.
43006057	A hringpa i Paa ta na pathlie te ama thueta kama i hring pahaata i saa a cepa bangkhuo ca kama thueta ama hring aa.
43006058	Vuoruo taata a zuvpa viechuo ca hingpa hing tana a cuo; nama mingchingmingvuo tie ta za ning yite ama thiypa haakhata cuo vyi, cuorasala hingpa viechuo a ningpa ca chuozaa ta ama hring aa,” a ta yi.
43006059	Hingpa bie ca Kapernaum khy apungna-ing lie a pacuv ning yi ta a ripa tana a cuo.
43006060	Ama a ziypa hluvpuv ta capa bie ca ama thyi tiyta, “Hingpa pacuvna ca a ruv ciemuo, ahungma a cuhluo khu aa?” ama ta.
43006061	Cuorasala, hingpa kawlieta a ziytuv tie amaa ciepa kha Zingsuv ta pachang te, iema kha, “Hingpa bie ta nama palung aca para yi ma?
43006062	Cawsaa Saacapaa hing a hluo ta a za awna luo a kaapakhaapa kha hmung biephung ungla tuokhaatama nama aw aa?
43006063	Hringna malie a pipa ca Thlaapa tana a cuo; saapa hing ca khaahmuo thlahne vyi. Niema'a lie i ripa bie hing thlaapa hne hringna bie ta a cuo.
43006064	Cuorasala niema hrawlie chekha taca zang va ungciy,” a ta. Zingsuv ta a hruothu taata ahungma naa zang li riypa tapa hne ahung ma naa lyi riypa tapa kha a pachang pacie diy.
43006065	Zingsuv ta pazue te, “Hingpa nakaw hing muo i Paa ta luo a sapa li kie yi ca ahunghmuota kama'a luo a vaw khu'a vayi ica tapa yi kha a cuo ta,” a ta yi.
43006066	Capa nakaw cata Zingsuv a ziytuv a hluvpuv ca kaa yite ama kha ziy va tli yi.
43006067	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta ziytuv hlyihning tie kha, “Niema haw nama cakuo ra'a ma?” a ta yi.
43006068	Simon Piter ta, “Abyipa, ahung'a luoma ma cakuo aa? Chuozaa hringna a pituv bie a hnyipa ca nama ca tamuo na cuo ta!”
43006069	Nama ca A pathepa Khazing na cuopa kha zang pate ma pachang tli,” a ta.
43006070	Zingsuv ta, “Kama na niema hlyihning tie hing caa tlaw yi ang cuo vama? Cuorasala niema chung taata pakha ca setaa tana nama cuo!” a ta yi.
43006071	Hlyihning chunglie pakha ta a cuo raalaa pata ama a lyituv riypa Simon Iskariot saacapaapa Judas khana a ri khingpa ta a cuo.
43007001	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca Galilee pe chung kha a tlaw. Judah uvthyi tie ta ama kha ama thie khing nakawta Judea pe ca tlaw khing vyi.
43007002	Judah ming Thluodaa Pyi kha aa ngie tli.
43007003	Cacuonakawta a nuta zaw ta Zingsuv ca, “Na hmang tuepa hing caa ziytuv tie ta ama hmung riypata hingpa taahingta pya la Judea pe luo si tie.
43007004	Cawsaa ta na pachang yi se tapa a khingpa taca hmang kha a paruvta tah tue vayi. Hingpa hmang hing na tuepa a cuo kieca chuelyi hing a pahmung sa thluo tie!” ama ta.
43007005	(A uvnu zaw tahmuo ama kha zang vayi.)
43007006	Zingsuv ta, “I cuo tling valie. Niema cuota ca cuo bangkhuo hing nama cuota na a cuo thluo.
43007007	Niema ca chuelyi hingta ca hue khu vayi, cuorasala kama ca ina hue, tahematapakieca a hmang tuepa a pha li nakaw kha i ri pari nakawta a cuo.
43007008	Niema kha pyi luo ca cakuo tie ung. Kama ca cakuo'a va ang, i cuo tling valie,”
43007009	ta yite Galilee lie kha a aw thluo.
43007010	A nuta zaw pyi luo ama cakuo khu taata Zingsuv zaw a cakuo ra; cadyiseca a luohuo ta cuo li pata a paruv ta tah a cakuo ra pata a cuo.
43007011	Pyi chunglie ca Judah uvthyi tie ta huv yite, “Khaapaliema a aw'a e?” tapata ama hiehriy.
43007012	Cawsaazaapuv ta a kaw kha ri yite amaa cie. Chekha ta, “Ama ca cawsaa phapa tana a cuo,” ta yite chekha ta, “Cuo vyi, cawsaa a sikhyichiepa tana a cuo,” ama ta.
43007013	Cuorasala Judah ming kha ama ciy nakawta ahungtahmuo a luohuo ta a kaw ri vayi.
43007014	Capa pyi khingkhuo hraw taakhata Zingsuv ca Biena-ing chung luo kha va kie te pacuv hruo a thu.
43007015	Judah ming ca ama kharue haasa te, “Caa hmuo a caw buo li pata tuokhaama hing tluv nanaa hingta a the khu,” ama ta.
43007016	Zingsuv ta, “I ca pacuvpa yi hing kama'a taata cuo vyi, naa pathlietuv'a taata na a cuo.
43007017	Khazing khingna tue a khingpa bangkhuo taca i pacuvna hing Khazing'a taata ma a cuo kama khingna ta i pacuvpa ma tapa kha ama pachang aa.
43007018	Ama khingna haata dyi bie a ripa ca ama rungnaana dyi a huvpa cuote cuorasala ama a pathliepa huota rungnaana a huvpa ca aa dangpa ta a cuo, a chunglie hanghiena aw vyi.
43007019	Moses ta phungbie ca pi vayi ma? Cuorasala ahungtahmuo ziy va ungciy. Khaapanakawma ina thie khing ungciy?” a ta yi.
43007020	Cawsaazaapuv khata, “Khuevuo na na hnyi! Ahungma thie acaa nang?” ama ta.
43007021	Zingsuv ta, “Kharuehaa hmang suokha tue ang te nama bangkhuo ta nama kharue a haa.
43007022	Moses ta vangdaw te riypata bie ca pi yite (a pathutuv ca Moses cuo li pata mingpa tie zaw khatana ama cuo) Sabbath ning ta cawsaa kha vangdaw nama te.
43007023	Moses phungbie para li riypata cawsaa pakha kha Sabbath ning ta vangdaw nama te kieca khaapanakawma Sabbath ning ta cawsaa kha tluotlingsa pata i patluo sa tiyta i cunglie nama hi a haa?
43007024	Le luo cuona dyi mangpa ta bie chi kha ung, biedangpa tuv kha mang ungla bie chi tie ung,” a ta yi.
43007025	Jerusalem khy ming chekha ta, “Thie amaa nangpapaa ca ama hing cuo vama?” amaa ta.
43007026	Mang tie ung! a luohuo ta bie ri te khaahmuo ta hyi tlung vade yi. Messiah tana a cuo tapa kha uvtuv tie ta ama pachang tli nakawta a cuo'a ma?
43007027	Cuorasala hingpapaa hing khaapa taata ma aa vaw tapa kha ma pachang. Cadyiseca Messiah aa vaw thueta ca ahungtahmuo khaapa taata ma aa vaw tapa kha pachang'a vayi,” ama ta.
43007028	Zingsuv ta Biena-ing chunglie a pacuv nguoluo pata khuopuv ta khi te, “Niema ta kama kha na pachang ung cate khaapa taata ma i vaw tapa zaw kha nama pachang. Kama ri ta a vaw va ang. Cuorasala naa pathlietuv hing zangtluo a tla hrahringpa a cuo. Niema ca pachang va ungciy,
43007029	cuorasala kama ca i pachang, tahematapakieca ama ta na pathlie te ama'a taata a vawpa i cuo,” a ta yi.
43007030	Catiyta iema ta patuv amaa ting, cuorasala ahungtahmuo patuv vayi, tahematapakieca a cuo kha tling valie.
43007031	Cawsaazaapuv chung taata a hluvpuv ta zang yite, “Messiah aa vaw thueta hingpapaa a tuepa laa hing ta kharuehaa hmang a hluv vie a tue'a ma?” ama ta.
43007032	Cawsaazaapuv ta cahaa cata a paruvta tah a kaw ama ri pakha Farasi tie ta ama thyi tiyta, tluobyilepa tie hneta Zingsuv patuv riypata biena-ing a huopa paliy tie kha ama pathlie.
43007033	Zingsuv ta, “Niema'a lie cuo pachangta chung aw'a ang te naa pathlietuvpa'a luo i si aa.
43007034	Ina huv'a ungciy, cuorasala na hmung'a va ungciy, i awna luo zaw kha a vaw khu'a va ungciy,” a ta.
43007035	Judah ming ca pakha hne pakha kha, “Ima hmung khu li riypata khaapa luo ma vaa a ting? A chepatlaapa Grik ming'a luo si pata va pacuv a ting kanaa?
43007036	Na huv'a ung cate na hmung'a va ungciy, i awna luo zaw a vaw khu'a va ungciy,” a tapa a ri khingpa hing khaapatama a cuo aa? amaa ta.
43007037	Pyi chuoningpa hne a biepuvcepa ning ningta kha Zingsuv ca a daa te, khuopuv ta khi te, “A tiy a hriepa ahunghmuo kama'a luo a vaw ungla
43007038	vya dang se. Caapathepa ta a ripa haata, ‘Kama naa zangpa bangkhuo ca a palung chung taata hringna tiy kha cavaa haata a lang aa,’” a ta
43007039	Zingsuv ta hinghaahingta a ri tiyta, ama a zangtuv zaw ta ama hmung riypa Thlaapa kaw kha a ripa a cuo. Capa cuo ning ca Thlaapa kha pipa ta cuo valie yi, tahematapakieca Zingsuv kha rungnaana hne pathupa cuo valie.
43007040	A ripa kha ama thyi tiyta Cawsaazaapuv chung taa chekha ta, “Hingpapaa hing Profet ta a cuo hrahring,” ama ta.
43007041	Chekha ta, “Messiah tana a cuo,” ama ta. Cuorasala chekha ta, “Messiah ca Galilee taata aa vaw riypa cuo vyi!
43007042	Caapathepa ta Messiah ca David ciypathla cuo'a te David awna khy Bethlehem taata na a cuo aa, a ta pakha,” ama ta.
43007043	Cacuonakawta cawsaazaapuv ca Zingsuv kawlie amaa che.
43007044	Chekha ta ama patuv khing, cuorasala ahungtahmuo patuv hmisi vayi.
43007045	Biena-ing a huopa paliy tie ama vya kaa tiyta tluobyilepa tie hne Farasi tie ta, “Khaapanakawma nama patuv va?” ama ta.
43007046	Paliy tie ta, “Ahungtahmuo hingpapaa haahingta bie ri buo vayi,” ama ta.
43007047	Farasi tie ta, “Aca dung ra tli yi ing.
43007048	Ma uvthyi tie hne Farasi tie pakha chuo ta ama zangpa nama pachang ma?
43007049	Cuorasala hingpa cawsaazaapuv, Moses phungbie a pachang lipa tie hing ca Khazing chiesapa tana ama cuo! ama ta.
43007050	Iema hrawlie pakha ta cuote, a hluo ta Zingsuv'a luo a vawbuopa paa, Nikodemu ama ta papaa ta iema kha,
43007051	“Ma phungbie taca, ahunghmuota a tuepa pachang riypata a bie naathliepa taa hluo taca biechina tue vyi cuo vama?” a ta yi.
43007052	Iema ta, “Nama zaw Galilee taata cuo ra kanaa ciy? Caapathepa kha va ri la, Galilee taata profet pakha hmuo pya buo vyi tapa kha na hmung aa,” ama ta. [
43007053	Cakhutaata cawsaa bangkhuo ca ama ing luo kha ama kaa diy.
43008001	Cuorasala Zingsuv ca Oliv Tluo luo kha a kie.
43008002	Mawdiy chiekari ta Biena-ing luo kha a cakuo pakhaa. Cawsaa hluvpuv ta a vya hmyasue yite Zingsuv ca a tu te a pacuv yi.
43008003	Phungbie saya tie hne Farasi tie ta nungvaathingsuena a tue ningta ama patuv nung kha a vawkhyi yite zaapuv hmielie kha ama padaa.
43008004	Zingsuv kyihuo khata, “Saya, hingpa canung hing nungvaathingsuena a tue nguoluo pata patuvpa a cuo.
43008005	Moses ta ca hinghaapa canung hing ca alung ta vaasa riypatana a cuo, tapata Phungbie chunglie malie a chang. Nama haw tuokhaama na rue?” ama ta.
43008006	Hinghaahingta bie ama hiehriypa ca ama kha ama pachie the riypata ama dyapasya patana a cuo. Zingsuv ca a bung te alyi lie kha a kuvdaw ta caa a cape.
43008007	Bie kha ama hiehriy canyi pari nakawta a daa te, “Niema hrawlie suena a tue buo li pata alung ta vaa taa tie ung,” a ta yi.
43008008	A bung te alyi lie caa a cape pakhaa.
43008009	Capa bie ama thyi tiyta a uvthyicepa taata patha te pakha hnang pakha ta dya ama cakuo diy. Zingsuv dyi a tuo te a thaalie ca cawsaanung ca a daa thluo.
43008010	A dangta tah a kya daa te, “Canung nung, iema ca khaapalie ma ama aw? Pakha tahmuo sue ca phaw vayi ma?” a ta.
43008011	Canung nung cata, “Abyipa, ahungtahmuo sue na phaw vayi,” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “A cuo kieca, kama zaw sue ca phaw ra'a va ang. Cakuo la suena va tue pakhaa lieciy,” a ta.]
43008012	Zingsuv ta iema kha chang pakhaa yite “Kama ca chuelyi khena tana i cuo, kama naa ziytuv ahunghmuota zingna chunglie cakuocavaa buo'a vayi, cuorasala ama hringna lie khena kha ama hnyi aa,’ a ta yi.
43008013	Farasi tie ta, “Nama ta nama kaw naa ri nakawta na ripa ca khaahmuo cuo vyi,” ama ta.
43008014	Zingsuv ta, “Kama kaw ca kama ta i ri zaw ta i ripa ca aa hmuopa a cuo, tahematapakieca khaapa taata a vaw ang te ma khaapa luo i vaa aa tapa kha i pachang. Cuorasala niema ca khaapa taata a vaw ang te ma khaapa luo i vaa aa tapa kha pachang va ungciy.
43008015	Niema ca cawsaa phung tana biechina nama tue; kama ca ahung cunglie hmuo biechina tue va ang.
43008016	I tue kie zaw ma, i biechina ca aa hmuo aa, tahematapakieca kama seta cuo va ang; naa pathlietuv i Paa hneta ma tuepa tana a cuo.
43008017	Nama phungbie lieta, ‘pachangkhyituv pahning ama ripa bie ca aa hmuo,’ tapata a cape.
43008018	Kama kaw ca kama ta ri ang te naa pathlietuv i Paa zaw ta i kaw ca a ri ra,” a ta.
43008019	Iema ta, “Na Paa ca khaaliema a aw?” ama ta. Zingsuv ta, “Kama cuose, i Paa cuose malie pachang va ungciy. Kama hing na pachang ung la ca i Paa zaw nama pachang aa,” a ta yi.
43008020	Zingsuv ta hingpa bie a ripa hing Biena-ing chung sue pathlanapa thingkaw ama china khuo lie a pacuv ning yi ta a cuo. Ahungtahmuo patuv vayi, tahematapakieca a cuo a tling lilie nakawta a cuo.
43008021	Zingsuv ta iema ca chang pakhaa yite, “Kama ca i si aa; ina huv'a ungciy, cuorasala nama suena chunglie nama thiy aa. I sina luo kha si ra khu'a va ungciy,” a ta yi.
43008022	Cakhutaata Judah ming ta, “I sina luo ca vya si ra khu'a va ungciy a tapa ca, kama hne kama tana i thie aa a ta khingnapa a cuo'a ma?” ama ta.
43008023	Zingsuv ta, “Niema ca a raw luo ming hingta nama cuo, kama ca cungluo taatana i cuo. Niema ca hingpa chuelyi ming hingtana nama cuo, kama ca hingpa chuelyi taahingta cuo va ang.
43008024	Cacuonakawta nama suena liena nama thiy aa ica tapa yi, ‘Kama hing i ripa Ama khatana i cuo,’ tapa kha nama zang li kieca nama suena chunglie na nama thiy aa,” a ta.
43008025	Iema ta, “Ahung tama na cuo,” ama ta. Zingsuv ta, “A hruothu taata ica chang tli yi kha saw
43008026	Niema kaw hing ri riypa a hluvsa i hnyi, sue phaw riypa zaw a hluvsa i hnyi. Cuorasala naa pathlietuv hing zangtluo aa tlapa cuote ama'a taata i thyipa dyi hingna hing chuelyi lie hing i pathyipa a cuo,” a ta yi.
43008027	Paa kaw a changpa yi kha iema ta pachang the vayi.
43008028	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta, “Cawsaa Saacapaa hing vieluo lie nama pathlie khutaa kyalya ta ‘Kama ca Ama tana i cuo,’ tapa kha ina pachang'a ungciy; cakhutaata kama ri dyi ta khaahmuo i tue lipa hne i paa ta ina changpa dyi i ripa kha nama pachang aa.
43008029	Naa pathlietuv ca kama'a lie aw te na thuse buo vyi, tahematapakieca ama palung tluona dyi khana i tue pari,” a ta.
43008030	Hingpa a ripa bie a thyipa a hluvpuv ta ama kha ama zang.
43008031	Cakhutaa Zingsuv ta ama a zangtuv Judah ming kha, “I pacuvna hing nama ziy kieca niema ca naa ziytuv hmisi nama cuo;
43008032	biehmisipa ca pachang'a ung cate, capa biehmisipa cata hya aca pazang sa'a yi,” a ta.
43008033	Iema ta, “Kiema ca Abraham ciypathla cuo pate ahung sii hmuo cuo buo va puv. ‘Hya aca pazang sa'a yi,’ na tapa hing khaapama na ri khing?” ama ta.
43008034	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Suena a tuepa ahunghmuota suena sii tana a cuo.
43008035	Sii ca chungkhue lie kha cipari ta aw vyi cuorasala saacapaa ca cipari ta a aw.
43008036	Cacuonakaw Saacapaa ta hya aca pazang kie yi ca cawsaa hyazangpa nama cuo hmisi aa.
43008037	Abraham ciypathla nama cuopa ca ica pachang yi. Cuorasala thie inaa nang ungciy, tahematapakieca i bie kha nama chunglie pari va ungciy.
43008038	Kama ta i Paa'a lie i hmungpa kha i phu, niema ca nama paa'a taata nama thyipa kha nama tue riypatana a cuo,” a ta yi.
43008039	Iema ta, “Abraham ca kiema paa tana a cuo,” ama ta. Zingsuv ta, “Abraham saata zaw nama cuo kieca a tuepa haakhata muo nama tue ra'a ta.
43008040	Cuorasala Khazing'a taata i thyipa biehmisipa caa changpa yi kha thie inaa nang ungciy. Abraham taca khahaapaapa hmang kha tue vyi!
43008041	Niema ca nama paa ta a tuepa khana nama tue,” a ta yi. “Iema ta, “Kiema ca riesaa ta cuo va puv; paa pakha hnyi pate Khazing ama hrahring ta a cuo,” ama ta.
43008042	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Khazing ca nama Paa a cuo kieca, kama hing ina due'a ungciy, tahematapakieca kama ca Khazing'a taata a vaw ang te ama lie hing i aw. Kama ri ta a vaw va ang, ama na naa pathlie.
43008043	Khaapanakawma i ripa hing nama pachang the va? I bie kha nama cuhluo li nakawna a cuo.
43008044	Niema ca nama paa, Setaa taata cuo ung cate nama paa khingna tue riypa kha namaa tlaw. A hruothu taata ama ca lie a nawpa cuote biehmisipa kha a daakhyi buo vyi, tahematapakieca a chunglie kha biehmisipa aw vyi. Hang te bie a ri tiyta a puvkhyipa hringzya haakhata a ri, tahematapakieca ama ca a hanghiepa hne hanghiena paa ta a cuo.
43008045	Cuorasala kama ca biehmisipa kha ica chang nakaw yi ta na zang va ungciy.
43008046	Ahung hingma i suena naa hmung khu ungciy? Biehmisipa ica chang kie yi ca, khaapanakawma ina zang va ungciy?
43008047	Khazing'a taata a cuopa tie ca Khazing bie kha naa ama thlie. Khazing bie naa nama thlie khing lipa hing ca Khazing'a taata nama cuo li nakawna a cuo,” a ta yi.
43008048	Judah ming ta, “Nama ca Samaria ming cuo cate khuevuo na caa hryi maca tapa hing maa hmuo cuo vama?” ama ta.
43008049	Zingsuv ta, “Khuevuo hnyi va ang, kama ta i Paa kha i pa-uvsathyi, cuorasala niema ta kama kha i na nutaa ungciy.
43008050	Kama ca kama rungnaana kha a huvpa cuo va ang. Cuorasala naa huvpatuv pakha aw te ama ca bie a rituv ta a cuo.
43008051	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: i bie a ziypa ahunghmuota thiy'a vyi,” a ta yi.
43008052	Judah ming ta, “Ata hing ca khuevuo na caa hryi hrahring tapa kha maca pachang! Abraham ca za thiy te profet tie zaw ama za thiy diy, cuorasala nama ta ca, ‘na bie a ziypa ca khatiy tahmuo thiy'a vayi,’ na ta.
43008053	A thiy tlipa mingpa Abraham laata i le vie naa ta ma? Profet tie zaw ama thiy diy tli. Ahung tama naa ri?” ama ta.
43008054	Zingsuv ta, “Kama hne kama kha rungnaana i pi kieca capa rungnaana ca khaahmuo cuo'a vyi. Kama rungnaana naa pituv ca i Paa cuote nama pachang li raalaa pata ima Khazing nama tapa khatana a cuo.
43008055	Cuorasala kama ca i pachang. Pachang va ang ne i ta kieca, niema haata a hangpa tana i cuo aa.
43008056	Nama mingpa Abraham ca kama ningcuo hmung riypa kha zaa ngietie vyi; hmung hmisi te a palung a tluo hringhruo,’ a ta yi.
43008057	Judah ming cata, “Kung sawngaa hmuo na tling lilie pata tuokhaatama Abraham ca na hmung khu?” ama ta.
43008058	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Abraham hluo ta i aw tli,” a ta yi.
43008059	Alung kha a haa yite vaa amaa nang, cuorasala Zingsuv ca a nu te Biena-ing taakhata dya a zuvpathla.
43009001	Zingsuv ca a cakuole nguoluopa khata a mingcue pata zaa puvpapaa kha a hmung.
43009002	A ziytuv tie ta, “Rabbi, ahung suena kawlie ma mingcue pata a za puv? Ama suena kawlie ma, a nung hne a paa suena kawlie ma?” ama ta.
43009003	Zingsuv ta, “Ama suena kawlie zaw cuo vyi, a nung hne paa suena kawlie zaw cuo vyi. Khazing hmang tue khuna aa luona riypatana mingcue pata a za puvpa hing a cuo.
43009004	Ningchung a cuo chung hingta naa pathlietuv re ca ma hrie a hu; ahungtahmuo re ama hrie khu lina zuo cuo ca a vaw nguoluo tli.
43009005	Chuelyi lie i aw chung hing ca, kama hingna chuelyi khena ta a cuo ang,” a ta yi.
43009006	Cahaa cata a ri khu taata, Zingsuv ta a lyi kha a paciy ta pacha te a cyi kha a tue khu taata cawsaapapaa ming lie kha thuv te,
43009007	“Cakuo la Siloam Tiy-ang lie kha na hmie vaa siy tie,” a ta. (Siloam tana siyluo ca pathlie tana ta a cuo). Cacuonakaw vaa te a hmie ca vaa siy te a ming ca vuo te a vya kaa.
43009008	A ingpaa tie hne sa a hiele tawpa zaa hmung tawpa tie khata, “Hingpapaa hing a tu te sa a hie tawpa kha cuo va ma?” ama ta.
43009009	A che ta, “A cuo,” ama ta, a che ta, “Cuo vyi, ama hne aa lupa pakha tana a cuo,” ama ta. Cacuonakawta ama ta, “Kama na a cuo ang,” a ta yi.
43009010	Cuorasala Iema ta, “Tuokhaatama na hmung pakhaa?” ta yite ama hiehriy.
43009011	Ama ta, “Zingsuv ama tapapaa ta acyi tue te, i ming lie na thuv te, Siloam luo kha vaa la na hmie vaa siy tie, ina ta. Vaa ang te i hmie i siy pahne ta i ming a hmung,” a ta yi.
43009012	Iema ta, “Capapaa ca khaapaliema a aw,” ama ta. Ama ta, “Pachang va ang,” a ta yi.
43009013	Iema ta a ming zaa cuepapaa kha Farasi tie'a luo ama vaa khyi.
43009014	Zingsuv ta acyi tue te a ming a patluo sa ning kha Sabbath ning ta a cuo.
43009015	Cacuonakawta Farasi tie ta cawsaapapaa a ming a hmung pakhaana kaw ca ama hiehriy pakhaa. Ama paa cata, “I ming lie acyi ina thuv, i hmie a siy ang te ata hing i hmung tli,” a ta yi.
43009016	Farasi chekha tie ta, “Hingpapaa hing Khazing'a taata cuo vyi, tahematapakieca Sabbath kha a uv vyi,” ama ta. Cuorasala, a hrangpa tie ta, “Tuokhaatama a suepa ta hinghaapa kharuehaa hmang hing a tue khu aa?” ama ta ra. Cacuonakawta amaa che.
43009017	Cacuonakawta mingcuepapaa kha hiehriy pakhaa yite, “Na ming caa pahmung sa pakhaapapaa ca tuokhaatama na rue?” ama ta. Ama ta, “Profet tana a cuo,” a ta.
43009018	Judah ming ta ama ca a ming za cue te ata hing a hmung khu pakhaa tapa kha zang vayi. Cacuonakawta cawsaapapaa a nung hne a paa kha ku yite,
43009019	“Ama hing nama saacapaapa, a ming cuepa tana a za puv nama tapa ca a cuo ma? Tuokhaatama a hmung khu pakhaa?” ama ta.
43009020	A nung hne a paa ta, “Ama hing ma saacapaa a cuopa ma pachang, a ming cuepa ta a za puvpa zaw ma pachang.
43009021	Cuorasala tuokhaatama ata hing a hmung pakhaa tapa hne, ahungma a patluo sa tapa kha pachang va puv. Ama hing hiehriy tie ung, uvthyi ra tli te ama ta aca palie'a yi,” ama ta.
43009022	A nung hne a paa ta cahaa cata ama tapa ca Judah ming kha ama ciy nakawta a cuo; iema ta ahunghmuota Zingsuv hing Messiah tana a cuo tapata i zang a tapa ca apungna-ing taata papyapa cuose tapata naatlana ama za hnyi pacie tlipa a cuo.
43009023	Cacuonakawta, a nung hne a paa ta, uvthyi ra tli te ama kha hiehriy tie ung,” ama tapa kha a cuo.
43009024	Cacuonakawta a ming zaa cuepapaa ca a yihningnapa ku pakhaa yite, “Khazing kha pathuosa tie! Ama cawsaapapaa hing a suepa a cuopa kha ma pachang,” ama ta.
43009025	Ama ta, “A suepa a cuo hne a cuo li pachang va ang. I pachang tangepa suokha ca: I ming a za cue, ata hing i hmung,” a ta.
43009026	Iema ta, “Tuokhaatama aca tue? Na ming hing tuokhaatama aca patluo sa?” ama ta.
43009027	Ama ta, “Ca chang tli raalaa yi ang te naathlie va ungciy. Khaapanakawma nama thyi khing pakhaa? A ziytuv cuo khing ra kanaa ungciy?” a ta yi.
43009028	Iema ta, esepuo pata “Nama hingna ama a ziytuv ta a cuo ciy, kiema ca Moses a ziytuv tana ma cuo,” ama ta.
43009029	Khazing ta Moses'a lie bie a ripa kha ma pachang; cadyiseca hingpapaa hingca khaapa taatama aa vaw tapa hmuo pachang va puv,” ama ta.
43009030	Cawsaapapaa ta, “Nang-uopa tana a cuo de! Niema ta khaapa taama a vaw tapa nama pachang va, cuorasala ama ta i ming ina patluo sa!
43009031	Khazing ta a suepa bie ca naa thlie vyi tapa kha ma pachang; ama abiepa hne ama khingna a ziypa kha a bie naa a thliepa.
43009032	Mingcue pata a puvpa na pakhakha ta a ming a pahmung sa pakhaa tapa hing chuelyi hruothu baataata thyi buo va puv.
43009033	Hingpapaa hing Khazing'a taata a zuvpa a cuo li kieca khaahmuo tue khu'a vyi,” a ta.
43009034	Iema ta, “Suena chunglie puv cate suena chunglie a lepa ma pacuv malie a ting ciy?” ta yite apungna-ing chung taata ama papya.
43009035	Zingsuv ta ama papyapa kha a thyi khu taata cawsaapapaa kha a taw te, “Cawsaa Saacapaa hing na zang ma?” a ta.
43009036	Cawsaapapaa ta, “Abyipa, ama ca i zang khu riypata ahungma tapa kha na chang tie,” a ta.
43009037	Zingsuv ta, “Ama ca hmung tli cate, nama hne bie a ri nguoluopa hingna a cuo,” a ta.
43009038	Cawsaapapaa ta, “Abyipa! ica zang ta te aa bie.
43009039	Zingsuv ta, “Hing chuelyi luo i zuv pahing mingcuepa tie ta hmung'a yite a hmungpa tie kha mingcue pata amaa li riypata bie ripa riypatana a cuo,” a ta.
43009040	A thaalie a awpa Farasi tie chekha ta a ripa kha thyi yite, “Kiema hing mingcuepa ma cuo ma?” ama ta.
43009041	Zingsuv ta, “Mingcuepa cuo ungla ca suena hnyi'a va ungciy; cuorasala ma hmung thluo ne nama ta nakaw hingtana nama suena ca aa hmang,” a ta yi.
43010001	Zingsuv ta, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Tuv ing chung luo thlake taata a ngie li pata luo hrang taata a ngiepa ca a ruvhangpa hne damie tana a cuo.
43010002	Thlake taata a ngiepa ca tuvkhietuv ta a cuo.
43010003	Thlake a huotuvpa ta thlake kha pahawpa te a tuv ta a ryi ama thyi. A tuv kha ama ming ta ku yite a pyakhyi yi.
43010004	A pyakhyi khu taayita hmie luo sapa yite a tuv khata ama ziy, tahematapakieca a ueryi kha ama pachang.
43010005	Maliepa ca ziy khing'a vayi; amaa ruose aa, tahematapakieca maliepa tie ueryi ca pachang vayi.
43010006	Zingsuv ta hingpa pahmungsana hing a chang yi, cuorasala khaapama a ri khing tapa kha pachang vayi.
43010007	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta changpakhaa yite, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Kama ca tuv-ing thlake tana i cuo.
43010008	Kama hluo ta a vawpa bangkhuo ca a ruvhangpa hne damie tana ama cuo, cacuonakawta tuv ta ama ueryi kha naathlie vayi.
43010009	Kama ca thlake tana i cuo. Kama'a taata a ngiepa bangkhuo ca amaa bang aa; a ngie'a yi, pya'a yite aphuv panuta kha ama hmung aa.
43010010	A ruvhangpa ca paruv repa, thie repa hne para repa dyi tana aa vaw. Kama ca hringna ama hnyi riypa hne lunghruotlungsa pata ama hnyi riypatana i vaw.
43010011	Kama ca tuvkhietuv pha tana i cuo. Tuvkhietuv pha ca a hringna kha a tuv cuota a pi.
43010012	A hluo chawpa, tuvkhietuv a cuo lipa hne tuv hnyituv a cuo lipa ca cahnie aa vawpa a hmung tiyta tuv kha thuse te aa ruo. Cahnie cata tuv kha sie te a chepatlaa diy.
43010013	A hluo chawpapaa ca tuv cunglie kawpacuona a hnyi li nakawta a tuv kha a ruo se. Kama ca tuvkhietuv pha tana i cuo. I Paa ta na pachang te kama ta i pachang pahaata i tuv kha pachang ang te i tuv zaw ta ina pachang yi. Cakhutaata iema cuota thiy a nguopa tana i cuo.
43010016	Hingpa tuv-ing chunglie ta a aw lipa tuv hrangpa i hnyi kalie. A vya chiy ra'a yi ang te, i ryi kha naa ama thlie aa. Tuvkhietuv pakha rawlie tuvrung rungkha ta ama cuo aa.
43010017	I hringna kha la pakhaa the riypata i hringna kha i pi nakawta Paa ta ina due.
43010018	I hringna ca ahungtahmuo na lapa khu vyi. Kama ta kama ri ta i pipa tana a cuo. Pi khuna naw hnyi ang te la pakhaa khuna naw zaw i hnyi. Capa naw ca i Paa taata i hmungpa tana a cuo.
43010019	Capa bie kawlie cata Judah ming hrawlie a chena a aw pakhaa.
43010020	Cawsaa hluvpuv ta, “Khuevuo ta a hryi te a palung a hmuo va tli! Khaapanakawma a bie naa nama thlie,” ama ta.
43010021	A hrangpa tie ta, “Khuevuo a hnyipa bie ta cuo vyi! Tuokhaatama khuevuo ta mingcuepa ca a patluo sa khu aa?” ama ta.
43010022	Jerusalem lie kha Biena-ing pihluona pyi ama tue ningta cuo te, capa cuo ca thlasiy ning ta a cuo.
43010023	Zingsuv ca Biena-ing chung Solomon hmiechue tapa lie a khie nguoluo ning kha
43010024	Judah ming ta a vya hmyasue yite, “Kha cuo ma malie na paluolue pari aa? Messiah ta na cuo kieca a siesa pata malie chang tie?” ama ta.
43010025	Zingsuv ta, “Ica chang tli yi, cuorasala na zang va ungciy. I Paa ri ta i tuepa hmang hing kama kawluo tehte a khuopa ta ama cuo;
43010026	cuorasala i tuv nama cuo li nakawta zang va ungciy.
43010027	I tuv zaw ca i ueryi kha naa ama thlie, kama ta pachang yi ang te iema ta ina ziy yi.
43010028	Chuozaa hringna pi yi ang te, ra buo'a vayi. Ahungtahmuo i kuv chung taata na chuv khu'a vayi.
43010029	Iema kha naa pituv i Paa ca zezaw bangkhuo laata le vie te ama kuv chung taata ahungtahmuo chuv khu'a vayi.
43010030	I Paa hne kama ca pakha tana ma cuo,” a ta.
43010031	Judah ming ta ama vaa riypata alung amaa haa pakhaa.
43010032	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “I Paa'a taata hmangphapa a hluvpuv kha ica pahmung sa yi. Khaapa kawlie hing tama alung ta vaa inaa nang ungciy?” a ta yi.
43010033	Judah ming ta, “Hmangphapa na tuena kawlie alung ta maca vaa nangpa cuo vyi, cuorasala Khazing thuo pachi pata bie na ri nakawtana a cuo, cawsaa cakhawpa na cuo thluo pata Khazing ta naa tue!” ama ta.
43010034	Zingsuv ta, “Nama phungbie chunglie, Khazing ta, ‘Niema ca khazing tie tana nama cuo,’ tapata a cape cuo vama?
43010035	Khazing ta bie a pipa tie kha, ‘khazing tie’ ta yite, Caapathepa kha ma para khu li kieca
43010036	kama ta, “Kama ca Khazing Saacapaa tana i cuo,” i ta nakawta, Paa ta pathe sa te chuelyi luo a za pathliepa ca Khazing chiesapa tana a cuo ima ta khu'a ma?
43010037	I Paa khingpa hmang i tue li kieca na zang kha ung.
43010038	Cuorasala i tue kieca kama ina zang li zaw ung cata, i tuepa chuo hing zang tie ung, cakiedyina i Paa ca kama chunglie aw te kama ca i Paa chunglie i awpa kha pachang'a ung cate nama thyi the aa,” a ta.
43010039	Catiyta Zingsuv ca patuv amaa nang pakhaa, cuorasala dya a zuvpathla se yi.
43010040	Cakhutaata Zingsuv ca Jordan cavaa huesuo, Johan ta tiy a za nawtaanapa hmang luo kha va kaa te capa lieca a aw.
43010041	Cawsaa hluvpuv a vaw yite, “Johan ta kharuehaa hmang khaahmuo tue vyi. Cuorasala hingpapaa kaw a ripa bangkhuo ca a hmuo diy,” ama ta.
43010042	Cawsaa hluvpuv ta capa hmang lie ca ama zang.
43011001	Mary hne a nuta nung Martha ama awnapa Bethani khy lie a awpa Lazaruh ama tapapaa kha a pasa.
43011002	Mary ca Abyipa phyi kha ziyhmyi ta bya te a suo ta a hruv nung kha a cuo; a pasapa Lazaruh ca a caapaapa ta a cuo.
43011003	A sienungnung tie ta Zingsuv'a luo kha biephyatuv pathlie yite, “Abyipa, na duepa na viesaapa na a pasa,” ama ta.
43011004	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta capa bie ca a thyi tiyta, “Hing pasana hing thiyna te cuo'a vyi; Khazing rungnaana a luona riypa hne hingpa thue hingta Khazing Saacapaa zaw rungnaana a hmungna riypata a cuo aa,” a ta.
43011005	Zingsuv ta Martha hne a nutanung hne Lazaruh kha a due yi.
43011006	Lazaruh a pasapa thuo a thyi khu taata a awnapa lie kha ning hning a aw siy kalie.
43011007	Cakhutaata ziytuv tie kha, “Judea luo si pakhaa'a ungpuv,” a ta yi.
43011008	Ziytuv tie ta, “Rabbi, a ru hluo ta lie Judah ming ta alung ta aca za vaa nangpa yi kha tama capa luo ca vaa pakhaa naa ting?” ama ta.
43011009	Zingsuv ta, “Ningkha ta siymaluo hlyihning a aw cuo vama? Ningchung ta a cakuopa ca chuelyi khena kha ama hmung nakawta a pachiy va vyi.
43011010	Cuorasala zuo ta a cakuopa ca khena a aw li nakawta amaa pachiy,” a ta.
43011011	Capa bie ca a ri khu taata iema kha, “Ma viesaapa Lazaruh ca aa hmung tli, cuorasala pathu riypata capa luo ca i vaa aa,” a ta.
43011012	Ziytuv tie ta, “Abyipa, aa hmung kieca a tluo aa,” ama ta.
43011013	Zingsuv ta Lazaruh a thiyna kaw kha a ri raalaa pata, iema taca aa hmung sasawpa kaw khana a ri tapata ama rue.
43011014	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ta siephele khata, “Lazaruh ca a thiy tli,” a ta yi.
43011015	Niema nama zang thena riypata capa lie i za aw lipa kha niema cuota i palung a tluo, thu ungla ama'a luo ca vaa ungpuv,” a ta yi.
43011016	Mingphie ama tapapaa Thomas ta a viesaa ziytuv tie kha, “Ama hne thiyhne riypata vaa ra ungsiy,” a ta yi.
43011017	Zingsuv a va pha ning kha Lazaruh ca thluo chunglie ningpaliy a za aw tli.
43011018	Bethani ca Jerusalem taata me hning hraw dyi a hla te,
43011019	Judah ming hluvpuv ca ama caapaapa ta a thiysepa Martha hne Mary hnaa panguo riypata amaa vaw.
43011020	Martha ca Zingsuv na a vaw tapa a thyi pahne ta pya te a taw, cuorasala Mary ca ing chunglie kha a aw.
43011021	Martha ta Zingsuv kha, “Abyipa, nama na hingpa lie hing a aw ciy tapa kieca i caapaapa hing thiy'a vyi.
43011022	Cuorasala ata hing tahmuo na hiepa bangkhuo ca Khazing ta aca pi aa tapa kha i pachang,” a ta.
43011023	Zingsuv ta, “Na caapaapa ca a thupakhaa aa,” a ta.
43011024	Martha ta, “Ningchuonapa ning lie khiy a thupakhaa aa tapa ca i pachang,” a ta.
43011025	Zingsuv ta, “Kama ca thupakhaana hne hringna ta i cuo. Kama naa zangpa ca a thiy hmuo thiy yi sala ama hring aa;
43011026	cakhutaata hring te kama naa zangpa ca thiy'a va tli yi. Hingpa hing na zang ma?” a ta.
43011027	Ama ta, “A cuo, Abyipa, nama ca chuelyi luo a zuv riypa, Khazing Saacapaa, Messiah na cuopa kha ica zang,” a ta.
43011028	Hingpa bie a ri khu taata Martha ca vaa te a nutanung Mary kha dya a va u. “Saya kha a vaw te nama na a ca padang,” a ta.
43011029	Mary ta a thyi pahne ta thu te ama a taw riypata a catlisa pata a cakuo.
43011030	Zingsuv ca khychung luo kha vya chiy valie, Martha ta a vaa tawnapa hmang lie khana a aw kalie.
43011031	Ama hne ing chunglie aw yite hnaa a panguopa Judah ming ta Mary thu te a catlisa pata a cakuopa kha ama hmung. Thluo luo na a va caa'a nang thlu aa tapata ama rue nakawta ama paziy.
43011032	Mary ca Zingsuv awna luo kha va pha te a hmung pahne ta a phyi thabaw lie kha a pakhuv pane te, “Abyipa nama na hingpa lie hing a aw ciy tapa kieca i caapaapa hing thiy'a vyi!” a ta.
43011033	Zingsuv ta Mary a caapa hneta ama hne a vaw rapa Judah ming ama caapa kha a hmung tiyta khuopuv ta a palung pasa te a ngie a chi.
43011034	“Khaapaliema nama paby?” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Abyipa, a vaw la vya mang tie,” ama ta.
43011035	Zingsuv ca a caa.
43011036	Judah ming ta, “Mang tie ung, khatluv tama Lazaruh kha a due,” ama ta.
43011037	Cuorasala chekha ta, “Mingcuepa hmuo a pahmung sa pakhaa khu cuo vama? Lazaruh hing thiy li riypata tue khu vama?” ama ta.
43011038	Zingsuv ca a palung pha hringhruo li pata thluo luo kha a vaa. Capa thluo ca lungkaraw cuote a pakaa ca lungphie suokha ta ama khaa.
43011039	Zingsuv ta, “Lungphie hing hnyi tie ung,” a ta yi. Athiypapaa sienungnung Martha ta, “Abyipa, a pahnuosa'a tli. A thiyna taata ning paliy a ta tli,” a ta.
43011040	Zingsuv ta, “na zang kieca Khazing rungnaana kha na hmung aa, tapata ica chang tli cuo vama?” a ta.
43011041	Lungphie ca ama hnyi. Zingsuv ca vuopaa kha ang te, “I Paa, i bie naa ina thliepa nakawcata icaa law.
43011042	I bie naa ina thlie pari ciy tapa i pachang, cuorasala hingpa lie a daapa cawsaazaapuv hingta nama pathliepa i cuopa kha ama zang the na riypata i ripa tana a cuo,” a ta.
43011043	Hingpa bie a ri diy khu pahne khuopuv ta khi te, “Lazaruh, kya pya!” a ta.
43011044	Athiypa ca a kuv hne a phyi kha riy catawnapa pang ta a cataw te a hmie zaw a cataw cangta a kya pya. Zingsuv ta, “Pathluopa ungla cakuo se,” a ta.
43011045	Cacuonakawta Mary hneta a vawpa Judah ming a hluvpuv ta Zingsuv hmang tuepa kha hmung yite ama kha ama zang.
43011046	Cuorasala chekha ta Farasi tie'a luo kha vaa yite Zingsuv hmang tuepa kha ama va chang.
43011047	Cacuonakawta Farasi tie hne tluobyilepa tie ca bierituv phuv meting kha ku yite, “Tuokhaatama ma tue aa? Hingpapaa hingta kharuehaa hmang a hluvsa a tue!
43011048	Hinghaahingta ma mangthluo kieca, cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama zang aa, Rom ming kha a vaw'a yite ma hmangpathepa hne ma mingphang hne malie ama para diy aa,” ama ta.
43011049	Iema chung taata pakha, Kaiafas ama tapa, capa kung ningta Tluobyilecepa a hriepapaa ta, “Nama pachangpa aw vyi!
43011050	Mingphang phangkha yalya ta parapa laata mingphang yalya cuota pakha thiypa hing a pha vie tapa pachang va ung cama?” a ta yi.
43011051	Hingpa bie hing ama palung chiy ta a ripa cuo vyi, capa kung ca ama kha Tluobyilecepa a cuo pahaata Zingsuv ca mingphang cuota a thiy aa tapa hne;
43011052	mingphang cuo dyi cuo li pata Khazing saata aa chepatlaapa bangkhuo kha pangkha ta pahmya riypa zaw ta a thiy aa tapata a rilu pata a cuo.
43011053	Capa ning taacata Zingsuv thie riypa kha khue ama khuo.
43011054	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ca Judah ming hrawlie kha a luohuo ta cakuocavaa va tli, khapa taakhata pya te ruochung hne a ngiena lie a awpa Efraim ama tapa khy luo kha vaa te capa lieca a ziytuv tie hne khata ama aw.
43011055	Judah ming Lawsena Pyi kha a ngie tli te cawsaa hluvpuv ca pyi hluo ta a pathesana tue riypata khyta taakhata Jerusalem luo kha ama kie.
43011056	Zingsuv kha huv yite Biena-ing lie amaa daapa khata pakha hne pakha kha, “Tuokhaatama na rue? Pyi luo hing a vaw lipa taca aw'a vyi nuo?” amaa ta.
43011057	Tluobyi lepa tie hne Farasi tie ta Zingsuv awnapa a pachangpa nama aw kieca, ma patuv thena riypata malie nama chang aa, tapata bie ama pi.
43012001	Lawsena Pyi hluo, ning caruv lie kha Zingsuv ca thiyna taata a pathu pakhaapapaa Lazaruh a awnapa, Bethani khy luo kha a vaa.
43012002	Zuosa duonapa tuepa yite Martha ca sa pi aa bya yi; Lazaruh ca Zingsuv hneta cabya lie a tu pakhawpa tie hrawlie kha a aw ra.
43012003	Mary ta paw kha aa riypa, a phang phasapa hne a muo ruvsapa ziyhmyi thyikha kha la te Zingsuv phyi kha bya te a suo ta a hruv. Ziyhmyi rang pa-ue ca ingchung bangkhuo kha aa ze diy.
43012004	Zingsuv ziytuv chung taata pakha a cuopa, ama a lyituv riypapaa, Judas Iskariot khata,
43012005	“Khaapanakawma hingpa ziyhmyi hing denarii zathung ta zaa yi sala siypasa tie kha ama pi va? a ta.
43012006	(Hinghaahingta bie a ripa hing siypasa tie kaw a pacuo nakaw cuo li pata a paruvpa a cuo nakawtana a cuo. Tuokaa baw a cake tuvpa ta cuote tuokaa kha a hmuo paruv taw.)
43012007	Zingsuv ta, “Ama hing sue phaw kha ung! A hnyipa ca i riy paby ning thue huota a chi se.
43012008	Siypasa tie ca niema hrawlie ama aw pari aa, cuorasala kama ca niema'a lie aw pari'a va ang,” a ta.
43012009	Judah ming hluvpuv ta Bethani liena Zingsuv a aw tapa kha ama thyi nakawta capa khy luo ca ama vaa. Zingsuv vuota dyi cuo li pata Zingsuv ta thiyna taata a pathu sa pakhaapa Lazaruh ama hmung khing nakawta a cuo.
43012010	Cacuonakawta Tluobyilepa tie ta Lazaruh zaw kha thiepuo riypata khue ama khuo;
43012011	tahematapakieca capa kawlie cata Judah ming hluvpuv ta iema kha thuse yite Zingsuv kha ama zang.
43012012	A mawluopa taca Lawsena Pyi luo a vawpa cawsaazaapuv ta Jerusalem luona Zingsuv a vaw tapa kha ama thyi.
43012013	Cacuonakawta ama daw riypata canungbachuv hnaa a cyi yite ama pya, “Hosanna! “Abyipa ming ta a vawpa ca Khazing ta thluechiy pi mangsue. Israel Siepahruo ca!” tapata ama khi.
43012014	Zingsuv ca laa taata kha hmung te aa khang; Caapathepa lie a capepa haata:
43012015	Zion sacanung, na thlaa zang kha se. Na siepahruo ca aa vawle nguoluo, Laataata a khang te aa vawle nguoluo!
43012016	Ama a ziytuv tie ta capa cuo ning ca hingpa hmang siyluo hing za pachang khu vayi, cuorasala Zingsuv ca rungnaana hne pathu pakhaapa a cuo tiyta Caapathepa ta a ripa hing ama kaw cuote, ama tuepa hmang zaw kha ama huotana a cuo tapa kha ama palung a vuo pakhaa.
43012017	Zingsuv ta Lazaruh kha thluo chung taata ku pathla te a pathu pakhaapa a hmungpa cawsaa tie khata hmang a cuopa kha ama ri pachaale.
43012018	Cahaapaapa kharuehaa hmang na a tue tapa kha cawsaazaapuv ta ama thyi nakawta ama kha amaa vya taw.
43012019	Farasi tie ta pakha hne pakha kha, “Hmung ung ca ma, khaahmuo tue khu va ungciy! Mang tie ung, chuelyi ming ta ama ama paziy diy tli hing haw! amaa ta.
43012020	Pyi chunglie Khazing abie riypata Jerusalem luo a kiepa tie hrawlie kha Grik ming chekha amaa te.
43012021	Galilee pe Bethsaida khy ming Filip'a luo kha a vaw yite, “Abyipa, Zingsuv na ma hmung khing,” ama ta.
43012022	Filip ta Andru kha va chang te, ama pahning ta Zingsuv'a luo kha ama vaa.
43012023	Zingsuv ta, “Cawsaapa Saacapaa ta rungnaana a hmungna cuo ca a vya chiy tli.
43012024	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: saciy hmung kha ca alyi lie tuv pata a thiy taa li kieca suokha dyi tana a cuo pari aa. A thiy taa khutaa dyina saciy a hluvsa a papung sa.
43012025	A hringna a duepa ca a hringna kha pavie'a te, hing chuelyi lie a hringna a huepa ca chuozaa cuota a hringna kha a hnyi mangtli.
43012026	Ahunghmuo cuose i re a hriepa ca ina ziy a hu te i changtaapa ca i awna lie a aw ra aa. Ahunghmuo cuose i re a hrietuv ca Paa ta pa-uvsathyina a pi aa,” a ta.
43012027	Zingsuv ta, “I palung rie na a thyisa—tuokhaatama i ri aa? ‘I Paa, hing cuo chung taahingta na khuo tie i ta'a ma? Cuovyi, ama kawlie hing camuo hingpa cuo hing i vya pha ta.
43012028	I Paa, na ming ca pa rungnaa sa tie!” a ta. Cakhutaata, vuoruo taata ueryi zaa thyi te, “Rungnaana pi tli ang te, i pi kalie aa,” a ta.
43012029	Capa lie a daapa cawsaazaapuv khata ueryi ca thyi yite, chekha ta, “khalung na a thy,” ta yite chekha ta, “Avuoming na ama kha bie a chang,” ama ta.
43012030	Zingsuv ta, “Hingpa ueryi hing kama cuota a zuv vyi, niema cuota na aa zuv,” a ta.
43012031	Hing chuelyi hing a bie ripa riypa cuo a tling tli; hing chuelyi uvtuv byi zaw hing a cadepa ta ama cuo aa.
43012032	Hing alyi taa hing calangpa i cuo thueta cawsaa bangkhuo hing kama'a luo i zaa da diy'a yi,” a ta.
43012033	Hinghaahingta a ripa hing tuokhaapa thiyna ma i ang aa tapa khana a paluo sa khing.
43012034	Cawsaazaapuv ta, “Kiema phungbie ta ca Messiah ca chuozaa tana a hring aa, a ta. Tuokhaatama Cawsaa Saacapaa ca calangthawpa tana a cuo aa, na ta the?” ama ta.
43012035	Zingsuv ta, “Khena ca niema'a lie cuo pachangta chung a aw kalie aa. Khena nama hnyi chung hing zingna ta aca vya law li riypa yita cakuo tie ung. Zingna chunglie a cakuopa ca khaapalie ma i cakuo tapa kha pachang vyi.
43012036	Khena nama hnyi chung hingta khena saa zaw nama cuo thena riypata khena ca zang tie ung,” a ta. Capa bie a ri khu taata Zingsuv ca iema'a taata pya te aa nu.
43012037	Ama hmungna lieta cazawbangkhuo kharuehaa hmang a tue thluo pata ama kha zang vayi.
43012038	Capaca profet ta: Abyipa, ma bie ripa ca ahungma a zang, Abyipa cahrana ca ahung'a luo ma aa luo? tapata a za ripa kha a tlingna riypatana a cuo.
43012039	Cuorasala zang khu ngiethie vayi, Isaiah ngiethie ta,
43012040	Ama ta ama ming pacue sa yite, ama palung a paping yi. Ama ming ta ama mang li riypa hne, ama palung ta ama pachang li riypa hne, Kama'a luo a vya pali'a yite, i patluo sa pathlyi li riypa yita, Khazing ta a ta,” tapata a za ri.
43012041	Isaiah ta hinghaahingta a ripa ca Zingsuv rungnaana kha za hmung tli te a kaw zaw a za ri tli nakawta a cuo.
43012042	Cakhutaa zaw cata Judah ming uvthyi a hluvpuv zawte ta Zingsuv ca ama zang. Cuorasala Farasi tie ca apungna-ing taata malie papya'a kie yi tapata a luohuo ta zang nguo vayi;
43012043	iema ca cawsaa rungnaana kha Khazing'a taata hmungpa rungnaana laata ama khing vie.
43012044	Zingsuv ta khuopuv ta khi te, “Ahunghmuo cuose kama naa zangpa bangkhuo ca kama dyi ina zangpa cuo li pata kama naa pathlietuv zaw kha a zangpa tana a cuo.
43012045	Kama naa hmungpa ca naa pathlietuv zaw kha a hmungpa a cuo.
43012046	Kama naa zangpa ahunghmuo zingna chunglie ama aw li riypata hing chuelyi luo hing khena ta i vaw tli.
43012047	I bie kha thyi te a ziy lipa kha a bie ripa'a va ang. Kama ca chuelyi bie ripa riypata a vaw va ang, cuorasala khuo riypatana i vaw.
43012048	Kama kha na thaw te i bie kha a cuhluo lipa ca bie a ripatuv riypa pakha a hnyi. Kama i ripa bie hingna ningchuonapa ning thueta a bie a ripatuv ta a cuo aa!
43012049	Tahematapakieca kama ri ta i ripa cuo vyi, cuorasala naa pathlietuv i Paa ama hrahring ta ri riypata ina changpa bie khana i ripa ta a cuo.
43012050	Ama ta ri riypata ina changpa bie ca chuozaa hringna tana a cuo tapa kha i pachang. Cacuonakawta i ripa bie hing Paa ta ina changpa haata i ripa tana a cuo,” a ta yi.
43013001	Lawsena pyi hluo ta, Zingsuv ca hing chuelyi hing sise pata a Paa'a luo si riypa cuo a vya chiy tli tapa kha a pachang. Chuelyi lieta a awpa ama huopa a cuopa tie kha due pari yite a chuona te a due yi.
43013002	Zingsuv kha lyi riypata Setaa ta Simon Iskariot saacapaapa Judas palung chunglie kha ruena a chi mangtli.
43013003	Zingsuv ca i Paa ta hmangting bangkhuo kha i kuv cung luo ina pi diy tli tapa hne, Khazing'a taata a vaw ang te Khazing'a luo na i kaa pakhaa aa tapa kha a pachang nakawta,
43013004	cabya taakhata thu te a buohryipasiypa kha a thlie khu taata pavya ta a se kha aa ri.
43013005	Cakhutaata zalungpakaa lie kha tiy patle te ziytuv tie phyi kha pasiy te a se lie aa ripa pavya khata a hruv yi.
43013006	Simon Piter luo a vya chiy tiyta ama ta, “Abyipa, nama ma i phyi naa pasiy'a ciy? a ta.
43013007	Zingsuv ta, “Khaama i tue tapa kha ata hing ca pachang vaciy, cuorasala a hnang taata ca na pachang aa,” a ta.
43013008	Piter ta, “I phyi ca na pasiy buohluo'a vaciy,” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “Na phyi ica pasiy li kieca kama'a lie aw ra the'a va tli ciy,” a ta.
43013009	Simon Piter ta, “Abyipa, i phyi dyi cuo li pata i kuv hne i luv zaw hing na pasiy puo tie,” a ta.
43013010	Zingsuv ta, “Tiy a siy tlipa ca a pathe diy tli nakawta a phyi ri li pata a hrang luo pasiy a hu vyi. Nama palang ta nama pathe, pakha ri li pata ca,” a ta yi.
43013011	Ama taca ahungma naa lyi aa tapa kha a pachang nakawta, “nama palang taca pathe va ungciy,” a tapa a cuo.
43013012	Ama phyi a pasiy khu taayita, a buohryipasiypa kha a hryi te cabya luo kha vaa tu pakhaa te, “Niema'a lie i tuepa hmang hing a siyluo nama pachang maw?
43013013	Niema ta, ‘Saya,’ hne ‘Abyipa,’ ina tapa ung cahing namaa hmuo, tahematapakieca ina tapa haa ungcata i cuo sasaw.
