43013014	Nama Byipaapa hne Saya ta a cuopa kama ta nama phyi kha ica pasiy kie yi ca niema zaw pakha hne pakha kha nama phyi namaa pasiy riypata a cuo.
43013015	Nama cuota a mangpuo riypa ica tuepa tli yi, nama cuota i tuepa haakhata niema zaw nama tue riypata a cuo.
43013016	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: changtaapa ca a byipaapa laata le vie vyi, biephyatuv zaw a pathlietuv laata le vie vyi.
43013017	Hing hmang hing pachang ung cate nama ziy kieca thluechiypa ta nama cuo.
43013018	Hinghaahingta i ri tiyta nama palang ta ica ta khingpa yi cuo vyi; i tlawpa ca i pachang thluo yi. Cuorasala Caapathepa ta, ‘kama hne sa a ningpakhawpa na naa rawpa a cuo, a tapa ca a tling aa hu,’ a ta.
43013019	Hmang hing a vya cuo sasaw tiyta kama hing ama catana i cuo tapa kha nama zang khu the riypata a cuo hluo ta ica chang pacie yi.
43013020	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Kama ta i pathliepa ahunghmuo a cuhluopa ca kama naa cuhluopa ta cuote; kama kha naa cuhluopa ca naa pathlietuv a cuhluopa ta a cuo,” a ta.
43013021	Capa bie a ri khu taata Zingsuv ca a palung rie thyi te, “Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: niema chung taa pakha ta ina lyi'a ungciy,” tapata a ri pathla.
43013022	Ziytuv tie ca pakha hne pakha kha a mang yite, ahung hingma malie a ta khing a ta yite nang-uosa pata ama aw.
43013023	Ziytuv tie chung taata pakha—Zingsuv ta a duepapaa kha Zingsuv a vaa pha pata aa tu.
43013024	Simon Piter ta a kuv dya a kyipa te, a ripa hing ahungma a ta khing hnuochuopa a cuo tapa kha a pahiehriy sa.
43013025	Cacuonakawta Zingsuv kha a kya hnyichiy vie te, “Abyipa, ahungma? a ta.
43013026	Zingsuv ta, “Viechuo hing tiyhuo pakaa luo naw'a ang te i pipapaa hingna a cuo aa ta te, viechuo kha naw te Simon Iskariot saacapaapa Judas kha a pi.
43013027	Viechuo kha a cuhluo pahne ta a chung luo kha Setaa aa ngie. Zingsuv ta, “Na tue riypa ca a catli pata tue tie,” a ta.
43013028	Khaapanakawma cahaa cata a ri tapa kha cabya cunglie a tupa ahungtahmuo pachang vayi.
43013029	Ziytuv tie chekha ta ca, Judas ca tuokaabaw a patuvpa a cuo nakawta, Zingsuv ta, pyi lie hmuo riypa ma a calyi sa a cuo li kie siypasa tie kha ma suokhakha a papi sa yi,’ tapata ama rue.
43013030	Cacuonakawta Judas ca viechuo a cuhluo pahne ta a pya paluo. Capa cuo ca zuo ta a cuo.
43013031	Ama a pya khu pahne ta Zingsuv ta, “Ata ca Cawsaa Saacapaa hing rungnaana pi pata a cuo tli; Khazing zaw kha Cawsaa Saacapaa thueta rungnaana a hmung tli.
43013032	Khazing ca Saacapaa thueta rungnaana a hmung kieca Khazing ama hrahring ta Cawsaa Saacapaa kha rungnaana a pi paluo aa.
43013033	I saa zaw kama ca niema'a lie a syi aw'a va tli ang. Ina huv'a ungciy; cuorasala, ‘I sina luo ca si ra khu'a va ungciy,’ tapata Judah ming i chang pahaa yi khata niema zaw ica chang yi.
43013034	Phungbie thaapa na ica pi yi: pakha hne pakha a due tie ung. Kama ta ica due pahaa yi hingta pakha hne pakha namaa due riypatana a cuo.
43013035	Pakha hne pakha namaa due kieca khapa thue khata cawsaa bangkhuo ta kama naa ziytuv nama cuopa kha aca pachang'a yi.
43013036	Simon Piter ta, “Abyipa, khaapa luo ma na vaa aa?” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “Ata hing ca i cakuona luo kha na ziy the'a valie ciy; cuorasala a hnang vie taata ina ziy'a ciy,” a ta.
43013037	Piter ta, “Abyipa, khaapanakawma ata hingta ica ziy khu'a va? I hringna hmuo na cuota i pi'a muo” a ta.
43013038	Zingsuv ta, “Kama cuota na hringna na pi'a ma? Biehmisi tana ica chang: aa a khang hluo ta yi thung ina thaw'a ciy,” a ta.
43014001	Pathiypalung rie thyi pata aw kha ung. Khazing kha zang ungla kama zaw na zang tie ung.
43014002	I Paa ing lie awna riypa a khuo a hluvsa a aw. Cahaa cata a cuo li kieca niema awna riypa hmang pare daw riypatana i si e ica ta'a yi ma?
43014003	Si'a ang te nama awna riypa hmang i pare khu taata za kaa pakhaa'a ang te kama awna lie nama aw ra riypata niema kha kama'a luo ica la'a yi.
43014004	I sina hmang luo a chiypa luopuv ca nama pachang, a ta yi.
43014005	Thomas ta, “Abyipa, khaapa luo ma na si tapa kha pachang va puv. Tuokhaatama luopuv ca ma pachang the aa?” a ta.
43014006	Zingsuv ta, “Kama ca luopuv, hne biehmisipa, hne hringna ta i cuo. Kama'a taata ta li pata ahunghmuo i Paa luo chiy the'a vayi.
43014007	Kama kha ina pachang cakie ung ca i Paa zaw nama pachang aa. Ata taahingta ca ama kha pachang ung cate nama hmung mangtli” a ta yi.
43014008	Filip ta, “Abyipa, na Paa ca malie pahmung la ma palung a tlingsa aa,” a ta.
43014009	Zingsuv ta, “Niema'a lie cuo syipuv i aw tli, ata tepa ta na pachang va cama, Filip? Kama naa hmungpa ca i Paa kha a hmung mangtli. Tuokhaatama na Paa kha malie pahmung la na ta?
43014010	Filip, kama ca i Paa chunglie aw ang te i Paa ca kama chunglie a awpa hing pachang va cama? Ica changpa yi bie hing kama palungchiy ta i ripa cuo vyi; i chunglie a awpa i Paa rehriena tana a cuo.
43014011	Kama ca i Paa chunglie aw ang te i Paa ca kama chunglie a awpa kha zang tie ung. I bie nama zang li kie zaw ma i tuepa hmang thue hingta na zang tie ung.
43014012	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Kama naa zangpa ca i tuepa hmang hing tue khu ra'a yite hingpa laa hingta a le viepa hmang hmuo ama tue aa, tahematapakieca i Paa'a luo kha i si nakawta a cuo.
43014013	Paa ta Saacapaa thueta rungnaana a hmung riypata i ming ta nama hiepa bangkhuo kha i tue aa.
43014014	Khaapahmuo i ming ta ina hie ung cakieca i tue aa,” a ta.
43014015	Ina due kie ung caca i phungbie kha nama ziy aa.
43014016	Paa kha hie'a ang te niema'a lie chuozaa ta caa aw khyi riypa yi daakhyituv hrangpa kha aca pi'a yi.
43014017	Ama ca Khazing biehmisipa a luona Thlaapa ta a cuo; Ama ca chuelyi ta a hmung li nakaw hne a pachang li nakawta cuhluo khu vyi. Capa Thlaapa ca niema'a lie a aw nakawta pachang ung cate nama chunglie kha a hring aa.
43014018	Niema dyise ta haaraata haata ca thuse'a vayi ang, niema'a luo i vya kaa pakhaa aa.
43014019	Acawta a awpa ta chuelyi taca na hmung'a va tli, cuorasala niema ca ina hmung'a ungciy; kama i hring nakawta niema zaw nama hring ra aa.
43014020	Capa ning thue cata kama ca i Paa chunglie i awpa kha cuose, kama chunglie niema nama awpa hne niema chunglie kama i awpa kha nama pachang aa.
43014021	I phungbie kha cuhluo te a ziypa ca kama naa duepa ta ama cuo. Kama naa duepa ca i Paa ta a due ra'a yi. Kama zaw ta due ra'a yi ang te iema'a lie kha i phu aa,” a ta.
43014022	Judas Iskariot a cuo lipa Judas ta, “Abyipa, tuokhaatama chuelyi ming cunglie a phu li pata kiema'a lie dyise naa phupa ca a cuo?” a ta.
43014023	Zingsuv ta, “Kama naa duepa ca i bie kha a ziy aa. I Paa ta iema kha due'a yite iema'a luo kha a vaw'a pate iema hne khy ma sa hne aa.
43014024	Kama naa due lipa ca i bie kha ziy'a vyi. Nama thyipa bie hing kama bie ta cuo vyi, kama naa pathlietuv Paa bie tana a cuo.
43014025	Niema'a lie i aw ningta hingpa bangkhuo hing ica chang yi.
43014026	Cuorasala i Paa ta kama ming ta a za pathliepa Byatuv Thlaapa Pathe ta hmangting kha ca pacuv'a yite ica changpa bangkhuo kha aca pathyi sa pakhaa'a yi.
43014027	Diena na ica chipa siy yi; kama diena na ica pi yi. Chuelyi ming aca pipa haayita ca pi vayi ang. Nama palung rie thyi kha se, nama thlaa zaw zang kha se.
43014028	Ica sise'a yi, cuorasala ivya kaa pakhaa aa ica tapa yi kha nama thyi. Kama kha ina due kie ung caca i Paa luo i sipa kha namaa law aa, tahematapakieca i Paa ca kama laata a le vie.
43014029	A vya cuo hmisi thueta nama zang thena riypata a vya cuo hluo ta ica chang pacie yi.
43014030	Niema hneta bie a syi ri the'a va tli ang, tahematapakieca hing chuelyi a uvtuv na a vaw nguoluo tli. Ama ca i cunglie nawhnyina khaahmuo hnyi vyi,
43014031	cuorasala chuelyi ming ta Paa i duepa kha ama pachang na riypata Paa ina changpa haakhata i tue. Thu tie ung, cakuo'a ungpuv,” a ta yi.
43015001	Kama ca mingsuv zuung hmisi ta cuo ang te i paa ca mingsuv diedung hnyituv ta a cuo.
43015002	A pathyi lipa i ce bangkhuo kha pasepathla diy te a thyi a pathyipa ce bangkhuo kha a pathyi hryly riypata a pathe.
43015003	Niema ca kama ica changpa yi bie khata aca pathe sa diy tli yi.
43015004	Kama hne a pazue ungla kama zaw niema kha icaa pazue ra'a yi. Mingsuv ce ca a zuungpuvnung lie aa pazue li kieca amata tah a pathyi khu lipa haata niema zaw kama chunglie nama aw li kieca niemata tah thyi pathyi khu'a va ungciy.
43015005	Kama ca mingsuv zuung cuo ang te niema ca ace tana nama cuo. Ahunghmuo cuose kama chunglie aw te kama zaw ama chunglie i aw kieca thyi a hluvsa a pathyi aa, tahematapakieca kama li pata ca nama tue khupa khaahmuo aw vyi.
43015006	Kama chunglie a aw lipa ca mingsuv ce caapa haakhata ale luo thaw pata nama cuo aa. Cahaapa a ce zaw ca pahmya yite myi luo kha thaw yite a kuo diy.
43015007	Kama chunglie aw ung cate i bie kha nama chunglie a aw kieca nama khingpa bangkhuo kha naa hie ungla tuepa pata nama cuo aa.
43015008	Thyi a hluvsa nama pathyina thue hingta i Paa rungnaana kha paluo sa ung cate kama naa ziytuv nama vya cuonapa a cuo.
43015009	Paa ta ina due pahaata kama ta ica due ra yi; i duena chunglie hing aw tie ung.
43015010	I Paa phungbie kha ziy ang te a duena chunglie i awpa haahingta i phungbie nama ziy pata a cuo kieca i duena chunglie hing nama aw aa.
43015011	I palungtluona kha nama chunglie aw te namaa lawna ca a tling riypata hingpa bie hing ica chang yi.
43015012	I phungbie ca hingpa hing tana a cuo. Kama ta niema ica duepa yi haahingta pakha hne pakha kha a due ra tie ung.
43015013	Ahungtahmuo viesaa cuota a hringna pipa duena laa hingta a le viepa duena hnyi vyi.
43015014	Ica changpa yi hing nama tue kieca i viesaa ta nama cuo.
43015015	Niema ca changtaapa ca ta va tli yi ang, tahematapakieca changtaapa taca a byipaapa ta khaama a tue tapa kha pachang vyi. Cuorasala kama ta ca viesaa ica ta yi, tahematapakieca i Paa'a taata i thyipa bangkhuo kha ica pachang sa diy yi.
43015016	Niema ta naa tlaw va ungciy, cuorasala kama na caa tlaw yi ang. Kama ming ta ama'a luo nama hiepa bangkhuo kha Paa ta aca pi riy'apayita a hmangpa thyi kha va pathyi tie ung tapata ica chang yi.
43015017	Cacuonakaw ta naw ica pipa yi ca hingpa hing ta a cuo: pakha hne pakha a due tie ung.
43015018	Chuelyi ta aca hue kie yi ca, niema aca hue hluo yi ta kama na ina hue taa yi tapa kha pachang tie ung.
43015019	Chuelyi huopa ta cuo ungla ca chuelyi hingta a huopa haata aca duesa'a yi. Cuorasala kama ta chuelyi taahingta caa tlaw yi ang te a huopa nama cuo li tli nakawta chuelyi ta aca hue yi.
43015020	“Changtaapa tie ca ama byipaapa laata le vie buo vayi,” ica tapa yi i bie kha a thyi tie ung. Kama kha ina hrisaathierue kie yi ca niema zaw aca hrisaathierue ra'a yi; kama bie kha ama ziy kieca niema bie zaw kha ama ziy ra aa.
43015021	Cuorasala kama cawsaa nama cuo nakawta hingpa hmang bangkhuo hing nama cunglie ta ama tue aa, tahematapakieca kama naa pathlietuv kha pachang vayi.
43015022	Iema'a luo a zuv li pata hne bie chang li pata aw ang sala ama cunglie suena aw'a vyi, cuorasala ata hing ca sue a ngiethe khupa cuo'a vayi.
43015023	Kama naa huepa ca i Paa zaw kha ama hue ra.
43015024	Ahungtahmuo ama tue buo lipa i tuepa hing iema'a lie tue li pata za aw ang sala ama suena aw'a vyi. Cuorasala ata hing ca i tuepa kha hmung yite kama hne i Paa hneta malie ama hue.
43015025	“Khaapa bie hmuo aw li patana ina hue yi,” tapata ama phungbie chunglie a capepa bie a tlingna riypatana a cuo.
43015026	I Paa'a taata niema'a luo i za pathlie riypa Byatuv, Thlaapa Pathe a vaw'a te kama kaw kha tehte a khuo aa.
43015027	Niema zaw a hruothu taata kama'a lie a awpa nama cuo nakawta kama kaw kha tehte nama khuo ra aa.
43016001	“Namaa lie pathlyi li riypata hing bie hing ica chang yi.
43016002	Apungna-ing taata aca papya'a yi. Niema caa thiepa tie ta ama tuepa hing Khazing re na i hrie tapata ama ruena cuo a vya pha aa.
43016003	I Paa cuose kama cuose malie ama pachang li nakawta hinghaahingta nama cunglie ama tue aa.
43016004	Capa cuo ca a vya pha thueta niema ta khapa kaw kha malie a za chang pacie tli tapata namaa thyi pakhaa riypata hing bie hing ica chang yi. Niema'a lie i za aw thluo nakaw khata hing bie hing a hruothu taata ca za chang vayi ang.
43016005	Cuorasala ata hing ca naa pathlietuvpa'a luo kha i si'a tli; cuorasala ahungtahmuo, “Khaapa luo ma na si aa?” tapata na hiehriy va ungciy.
43016006	Cuorasala ica chang tiy yi ta nama ngie a chi hringhruo.
43016007	Cuohmuocuosala biehmisi tana ica chang yi: i sipa hing niema cuota a pha vie, i si li kieca daakhyituv hing niema'a luo a vaw the'a vyi; cuorasala i si kieca, kama ta niema'a luo kha i za pathlie aa.
43016008	Ama kha aa vaw tiyta, chuelyi ming'a lie kha suena kaw lie, adangna kaw lie hne bieripana kaw lieta ama ruena zya ama paa nakaw kha a siesa pata aa pachang sa'a yi.
43016009	Suena kaw lie ama paa, tahematapakieca kama ina zang li nakaw yi ta a cuo.
43016010	Adangna kaw lie ama paa, tahematapakieca Paa'a luo si'a ang te ina hmung li tli'a nakaw yi ta a cuo.
43016011	Bieripana kaw lie ama paa, tahematapakieca chuelyi uvtuv byi hing bie ripa tlipa ta a cuo nakawta a cuo.
43016012	“Niema ica chang riypa yi a hluvsa i hnyi kalie, cuorasala ata hing taca a cake khu the'a va ungciy.
43016013	Biehmisipa Thlaapa Pathe aa vaw thueta niema kha biehmisipa luo a caa chiy'a yi; ama ri ta khaahmuo ri'a vyi, cuorasala a thyipa bangkhuo kha ri'a te a vaw riypa hmang kaw zaw kha a pathyi sa aa.
43016014	Kama i ripa bie kha la'a te aca pathyi sa'a nakaw yi ta kama kha rungnaana ina pi aa.
43016015	Paa hnyipa bangkhuo ca kama huopa tana ama cuo diy. Canakaw catana kama i ripa bie kha la'a te na niema kha aca pathyi sa'a yi, i tapata a cuo.
43016016	Zingsuv ta “Kha cuo a ta hluo ta kama kha na hmung'a va tli ungciy, cuo pachangta khu taata ina hmung pakhaa'a ungciy,” a ta.
43016017	Cakhutaata ama a ziytuv tie chekha ta pakha hne pakha kha, “Kha cuo a ta hluo ta kama kha na hmung'a va tli ungciy, cuo pachangta khu taata ina hmung pakhaa ungciy, tahematapakieca Paa'a luo na i si aa,” a tapa hing khaapama a ri khingpa a cuo aa amaa ta.
43016018	“Acawta a awpa ta,” a tapa hing khaama a ri khingpa a cuo aa? Khaapa kaw ma a ri tapa kha pachang va puv,’ amaa ta.
43016019	Ama hiehriy khingsa pakha Zingsuv ta pachang te, “Acawta a awpa ta kama kha na hmung'a va tli ungciy, a cawta a aw khu taata ina hmung pakhaa ungciy,” i ta tiyta khaapama i ri khing tapa khana namaa rue cuo vama?
43016020	Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: niema ca caa'a ung cate namaa ngiy aa, cuorasala chuelyi ca aa law aa; niema ca nama ngie chi'a te, cuorasala nama ngiechina ca palungtluona ta aa li aa.
43016021	Canung ca nu a hnyi tyalya tiyta pasana a ang, cuorasala nu a za aw tiyta ca chuelyi luo nuta thaapa pakha a za puv nakawta a law te a te-angna bangkhuo ca a maw pakhaa diy.
43016022	Cacuonakawta ata hing ca nama ngie a chi, cuorasala ca hmung pakhaa'a yi ang te nama palung a tluo hringhruo aa, capa nama palungtluona ca ahungtahmuo ca chuv khu'a vayi.
43016023	Capa ning thueta ca kama kha khaahmuo na hiehriy'a va ungciy. Biehmisi tana ica chang yi: Kama ming ta nama hiepa bangkhuo ca Paa ta aca pi'a yi.
43016024	Ata tepa hingta ca i ming ta khaapahmuo hie va ungciy. Hie ungla nama hmung aa; cahaa cata nama palungtluona kha aa ky aa.
43016025	“Hingpa bangkhuo hing pahmung-sana bie hmuo ang te ica chang yi. Cuorasala i Paa kaw kha pahmungsana bie hmuo li pata siepaalaa khata ica changna cuo yi a vaw aa.
43016026	Capa ning a vya pha tiyta niema ta i ming ta nama hie aa. Niema cuopa tana kama ta Paa'a luo kha ica hiepa'a yi ica tapa yi ta cuo vyi.
43016027	Kama kha na due ung cate Khazing'a taata i vawpa kha nama zang nakawta Paa hrahring ta niema kha aca due yi.
43016028	Kama ca Paa'a taata chuelyi luo hing i vaw; chuelyi taahingta i Paa'a luo i kaa pakhaa aa,” a ta.
43016029	A ziytuv tie ta, “A cuo, ata hingca pahmungsana hmuo li pata a siesa pata malie na chang.
43016030	Nama ca hmangting bangkhuo a pachangpa na cuopa kha pachang pate, ahungtahmuo khaapahmuo hiehriy a hu va tli ciy; capa cata Khazing'a taata a vawpa na cuopa kha malie a pazang sa,” ama ta.
43016031	Zingsuv ta, “Ata ca i na zang ung cama?
43016032	Nama palang ta ca chepatlaa diy'a yite nama ing cyicuo ta a diy'a ung cate kama dyi ta ina thusena ung cuo kha a vaw nguoluo te ata hing a vya chiy tli. Cuorasala i Paa kha kama'a lie a aw nakawta kama dyi hmisi taca cuo va ang.
43016033	Kama chunglie diena nama hmung the riypata hingpa bie hing ica chang yi. Chuelyi lie hing ca hrisaathieruena nama ang aa. Cuorasala nama riepha se; Chuelyi ca i te tli,” a ta.
43017001	Zingsuv ta capa bie a ri khu taata vuoruo luo kha mang te, “I Paa, a cuo ca a vya pha tli; na Saacapaa ta rungnaana aca pi the riypata, na Saacapaa hing rungnaana pi tie.
43017002	Nama ta na pipa cawsaa zaw bangkhuo kha chuozaa hringna pi riypata nawhnyina kha na pi tli.
43017003	Chuozaa hringna tapa ca nama dyi aa hmuopa Khazing na cuopa pachangna hne na pathliepa Zingsuv Khrih pachangna kha a cuo.
43017004	Hrie riypata ina pipa ciy re patlung tli ang te hing chuelyi lie na ming ica pa rungnaa sa mangtli.
43017005	Cacuonakawta, I Paa, chuelyi sa hluo ta namaa lie i za hnyipa rungnaana kha ata na minghmungna lie hing na pi thi tie.
43017006	“Chuelyi taata ku yi cate ina pipa tie cunglie na ming kha i paluo sa tli. Na huopa ta cuo yite nama ta kama kha ina pi ciy; na bie kha ziy yite
43017007	kama ina pipa bangkhuo cakha nama'a taatana a cuo tapa kha ama pachang.
43017008	Ina pipa ciy na bie kha chang yi ang te iema ta ama cuhluo. Nama'a taata a vawpa i cuopa kha pachang hmisi yite nama pathliepa i cuopa zaw kha ama zang.
43017009	Iema cuota thlaa i chuo; chuelyi cuota thlaa chuo va ang, cuorasala na huopa ta a cuopa ina pipa tie cuo khata thlaa i chuo.
43017010	Kama huopa bangkhuo hing nama huopa ta cuo yite iema chung taahingta i rungnaana aa luo.
43017011	Cakhutaata, ata hing kama ca chuelyi lie aw'a va tli ang, nama'a luo i vaw'a tli; cuorasala iema ca chuelyi lie ama aw kalie aa. A pathepa i Paa, nama hne kama ca pangkha ima cuopa haata pangkha ama cuo the ra riypata, ina pipa tie yi cahing na ming cahrana ta mangchiy thi tie yi.
43017012	Iema'a lie i aw ning hing ca, ina pipa tie ca hingna na ming cahrana ta mangchiy yi ang te a phasa pata i chi yi. Kama ta i mangchiy yi, Caapathepa a tlingna riypata, vie riypa hrahring ta lieriyuopuopa paa ri li pata pakha hmuo vie vayi.
43017013	Ata hing kama ca nama'a luo i vaw'a mangtli; chuelyi lie i aw ningta hingpa bie i ripa hing i palungtluona kha ama chunglie tluotlingsa pata ama hnyina riypata a cuo.
43017014	Na bie kha chang yi ang te chuelyi ta iema ca a hue yi, tahematapakieca kama ca chuelyi huopa i cuo lipa haakhata iema zaw chuelyi huopa ama cuo li nakawta a cuo.
43017015	Iema hing chuelyi taata la riypata ica hiepa cuo vyi, cuorasala cawsaa pha lipapaa'a taata naa daakhuole riypa yi tana ica hie.
43017016	Kama hing chuelyi huopa i cuo li pahaata iema zaw chuelyi huopa cuo ra vayi.
43017017	Iema hing biehmisipa ta pathe sa tie yi. Na bie ca biehmisipa ta a cuo.
43017018	Nama ta chuelyi luo ina pathliepa haa cata kama ta chuelyi luo i pathlie ra yi.
43017019	Iema zaw biehmisipa lie pathe sapa ama cuo riypata kama zaw i pathe sa.
43017020	“Iema cuo dyi hingta thlaa i chuopa cuo vyi, cuorasala iema ama ripa bie thueta kama naa zangpa tie cuo zaw ta thlaa i chuo. Ama bangkhuo ta pangkha ama cuo the riypata thlaa i chuo.
43017021	I Paa, chuelyi ming ta kama ca nama pathliepa i cuopa kha ama zang the riypata nama ca kama chunglie aw cate kama ca nama chunglie i awpa haata iema zaw kiema chunglie ama aw riypata thlaa i chuo.
43017022	Kiema pangkha ma cuopa haata iema zaw pangkha ama cuo riypata rungnaana ina pipa cakha i pi yi.
43017023	Chuelyi ta kama ca nama pathliepa cuo ang te kama ina duepa haa cata iema zaw na duepa yi kha ama pachang riypa hne iema zaw pangkha ama cuokaruv riypata kama ca iema chunglie aw ang te nama ca kama chunglie na awpa a cuo.
43017024	“I Paa, ina pipa tie yi cahing ina pipa ciy i rungnaana ama hmungna riypata kama i awna lie aw ra yi sala tapata i khing, tahematapakieca kama kha chuelyi sa hluo taata ina due tli ciy.
43017025	Aa dangpa i Paa, chuelyi taca ca pachang vyi, cuorasala kama taca ca pachang ang te hingpa tie hingta ina pathliepa cakha ama pachang.
43017026	Nama ta ina duenapa ciy duena kha iema chunglie aw'a te kama kha iema chunglie i aw riypata na ming ca iema kha pachang sa tli yi ang te i pachang sa kalie'a yi,” a ta.
43018001	Hinghaahingta thlaa a chuo khu taata Zingsuv ca a ziytuv tie hneta Kidron cavaata huesuo ruo luo kha vaa yite capa lie a awpa diedung chung luo kha a ziytuv tie hneta amaa ngie.
43018002	Capa hmang lieca Zingsuv hne ziytuv tie kha amaa taw lawmaw nakawta ama a lyituv Judas ca khapa hmang kha a pachang.
43018003	Cacuonakawta Judas ca tluobyilepa tie hne Farasi tie ta ama pathliepa rieka phuv cawta hne paliy tie hne khata cehre hne myi-ing hne myisaa kha a vya cyi yite amaa vaw.
43018004	Zingsuv ca a cunglie a tlung riypa kha a pachang nakawta hmie luo kha pya te, “Ahungma nama huv,” tapata a hiehriy yi.
43018005	Iema ta, “Nazareth khypa Zingsuv,” ama ta. Zingsuv ta, “Kama hingna a cuo ang,” tapata a palie yi. Ama a lyituv Judas ca iema hne khata amaa daa pakhaw.
43018006	Zingsuv ta, “Kama hingna a cuo ang,” a ta pahne yi ta ama hnang luo a saw yite alyi lie kha amaa yapatyi diy.
43018007	“Ahungma nama huv?” a ta pakhaa yi. “Nazareth khypa Zingsuv,’ ama ta.
43018008	Zingsuv ta, “Kama hingna ama ta a cuo ang, ica ta yi. Cacuonakawta kama ina huv ung cakieca cawsaa hrangpa tie hing ca cakuo yi se,” a ta yi.
43018009	“Ina pipa tie yi cahing pakha hmuo pavie vayi ang,” a tapa a bie kha a tlingna riypata hinghaahingta a ripa a cuo.
43018010	Simon Piter ta a zueziy kha a phie te tluobyilecepa sii a cacuo luo naacakue kha a sa pathla. Capa sii a ming ca Malkhas ta a cuo.
43018011	Zingsuv ta Piter kha, “Na zueziy kha a bya chung luo pasuo tie. Paa ta ina pipa panuo hing dang li pata ma i aw aa?” a ta.
43018012	Cacuonakawta rieka tie, abyi tie hne Judah paliy tie ta Zingsuv ca patuv yite Annas'a luo kha ama vaakhyi taa.
43018013	Annas ca capa kung ningta tluobyilecepa a hriepa Kaiafas a napuvnung a paa ta a cuo.
43018014	Kaiafas ca cawsaazaapuv cuota cawsaa pakha thiypa a pha vie tapata Judah ming ruena a pituvpa khata a cuo.
43018015	Simon Piter hne a hrangpa ziytuv pakha ta Zingsuv kha ama ziy. Capa ziytuv hrangpapaa ca tluobyilecepa hne khata amaa pachang nakawta Zingsuv hne khata tluobyilecepa ahmie luo ca aa ngie ra.
43018016	Cuorasala Piter ca thlake a thaa lie, ale lie kha a daa. Cacuonakawta tluobyilecepa hne a pachangpa ziytuv hrangpa cata pya te thlake a huo nung kha chang te a chung luo a pangie.
43018017	Canung nung cata, “Nama zaw hing khiypapaa a ziytuv pakha ta cuo va ca maw?” a ta. Ama ta, “Cuo va ang,” a ta.
43018018	A kangsa nakawta sii tie hne paliy tie ca myihyi ta myi kha patiy yite amaa daa luota amaa e. Piter zaw a daa luota a e ra.
43018019	Cakhutaata tluobyilecepa ta Zingsuv ca a ziytuv tie kaw hne a pacuvna kaw kha a hiehriy.
43018020	Zingsuv ta, “Kama ca a luohuo ta muo cawsaazaapuv kha bie i chang yi ta; Judah ming bangkhuo ta amaa vaw napa apungna-ing lie hne biena-ing lie muo i pacuv pari yi ta. A paruv ta suokha hmuo pacuv buo vade ang.
43018021	Khaapanakawma kama ca ina hiehriy ungciy? Khaapama i chang yi tapa a thyipa tie kha hiehriy tienie ung; i ripa kha iema ta ama pachang muo,” a ta yi
43018022	Cahaa cata a ri pahne ta a thaalie a daapa paliy pakha ta Zingsuv kha a hmie lie cabe te, “Tluobyilecepa ma cahaa cata na palie?” a ta.
43018023	Zingsuv ta, “I ripa a hmuo li kieca a hmuo lina kaw kha pasie sa tie. Cuorasala aa hmuopa kha i ri kieca khaapanakawma ina cabe ciy?” a ta.
43018024	Cahaa cata, ama cakhiy yalya cata, Annas ta tluobyilecepa Kaiafas'a luo kha a paphya.
43018025	Piter ca myi a e nguoluo ning kha, “Nama zaw hing ama a ziytuv pakha cuo va cama? ama ta. Ama ta, “Cuo va ang,” tapata a i yi.
43018026	Piter ta a naacakue a sa pathlapa a tieriy ta a cuopa, tluobyilecepa a sii pakha ta, “Nama hing diedung lie kha Zingsuv hne ica hmung cuo vama?” a ta.
43018027	Piter ta a i pakhaa hyi. Capa tahne cata aa a khang.
43018028	Cakhutaata a mawluopa mawdiy ta Zingsuv kha Kaiafas'a taata Pilat ing luo kha ama vaa khyi. Iema ca muokiy byi ing chung luo kha a ngie vayi, tahematapakieca ama phung haata a pathesa pata Lawsena Pyi sa kha ama ning khing nakawta a cuo.
43018029	Cacuonakawta Pilat kha pya te, “Hingpapaa hing khaapa suena ma a hnyi?” a ta yi.
43018030	Iema ta, “Hingpapaa hing a suepa a cuo li kieca na kuv luo maca pi'a ma?” ama ta.
43018031	Pilat ta, “Vaakhyi ungla nama phungbie haata a bie ca va ripa tie ung,” a ta yi. Judah ming ta, “Kiema ca ahunghmuo thie khuna naw hnyi va puv,” ama ta. (
43018032	Zingsuv ta tuokhaapa thiyna tama i thiy aa tapa a ri paciepa bie a tlingna riypata hinghaahingta a cuopa a cuo.)
43018033	Cakhutaata Pilat ca ing chung luo kha a ngie pakhaa te, Zingsuv kha ku te, “Judah ming siepahruo ta na cuo ma?” tapata a hiehriy.
43018034	Zingsuv ta, “Hing bie hing namata tama ina hiehriy ciy, a cuo li kie malie ta i kaw hing aca chang nakaw yi tama a cuo?” a ta.
43018035	Pilat ta, “Kama hing Judah ming ta i cuo ma? Na mingphang tie hne tluobyi lepa tie ta i kuv luo aca vya chipa yi hing. Na tuepa hmang ca khaapama a cuo?” a ta.
43018036	Zingsuv ta, “I penapa ca hing chuelyi lie hingta cuo vyi. I pena ca hing chuelyi lie hingta cuo sala ca Judah ming kuv luo i chiy li riypata naa ziytuv tie hingta a maa du aa. Cuorasala i pena ca hing chuelyi lie hing cuo vyi,” a ta.
43018037	Pilat ta, “Cacuokie siepahruo ta na cuo hmisi ma?” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “Nama ta siepahruo na cuo ina ta ciy. Biehmisipa a daakhyi riypa hingna chuelyi luo i za puv hnuochuopa hingta a cuo. Biehmisipa chunglie a awpa bangkhuo taca i ueryi kha naa ama thlie,” a ta.
43018038	Pilat ta, “Biehmisipa ca khaapa kha ma a cuo?” a ta. Pilat ca Judah ming'a luo kha pya pakhaa te, “Hingpapaa hing a suenapa hmung va ang.
43018039	Cuorasala nama phung a awpa haata Lawsena Pyi cuo lie cawsaa pakha ica pathliepa taw yi. Judah siepahruo hing ca pathliepa yi ang sala nama khing ma?” a ta yi.
43018040	Khuopuv ta khi yite, “Ama paa hing cuo li pata Barabbas malie pathliepa tie,” ama ta. Barabbas ca damie tana a cuo.
43019001	Cakhutaata Pilat ca Zingsuv kha la te a patuv sa yi.
43019002	Rieka tie ta ahling lakhuv kha pakhuv yite, pangsepa kha ama pabuv.
43019003	Vaahnue yite, “Judah siepahruo hing a hringkhue pasiy se,” ta yite a hmie lie kha ama cabe.
43019004	Pilat ca pya pakhaa te, “Mang tie ung, ama ca a suena suokha hmuo hmung va ang tapa kha ica pachang sa khing nakaw yi ta i kya pyakhyi hing,” a ta.
43019005	Zingsuv ca ahling lakhuv a khuv te a pangsepa hne cata a kya pya. Pilat ta, “Mang tie ung, cawsaapapaa hing!” a ta yi.
43019006	Tluobyilepa tie hne paliy tie cata ama ama hmung pahne ta, “Vieluo cunglie thie tie! Vieluo cunglie thie tie!” tapata ama khi. Pilat ta, “A chiy ungla vieluo cunglie ca va thie tie ung; Kama ca a suena hmung va ang,” a ta yi.
43019007	Judah ming ta, “Ama ca Khazing Saacapaa na i cuo a ta nakawta ima hnyipa phungbie haata thiy aa phuvpa tana a cuo,” ama ta.
43019008	Capa bie ca a thyi pahne ta Pilat ca a ciy vie hryly.
43019009	A ing chung luo kha a ngie pakhaa te Zingsuv kha, “Khaapa taata ma na cuo?” tapata a hiehriy. Cuorasala Zingsuv ta kaakha hmuo palie vyi.
43019010	Cacuonakaw Pilat ta, “Na chaw khing va cama? Nama pathlie khuna, a cuo li kie vieluo cunglie thie khuna naw i hnyipa hing pachang va cama? a ta.
43019011	Zingsuv ta, “Cungluo taata pi li pata ca i cunglie khaahmuo naw hnyi khu vaciy; cacuonakawta na kuv cungluo naa vya pachiy satuv hingna a sue vie a ta.
43019012	Capa khutaa ca Pilat ca Zingsuv pathlie khuna riypa luo kha a huv. Cuorasala Judah ming ca khi yite, “Hingpapaa hing na pathlie kieca Sizar viesaa ta cuo'a vaciy. Ahunghmuo cuose siepahruo na i cuo a tapa ca Rom siepahruo cariepa tana a cuo,” ama ta.
43019013	Pilat ta hingpa bie a thyi tiyta, Zingsuv kha ale luo kya pyakhyi te Hebru ryi ta Gabbatha ama tapa, bierinapa thude, Lungphie Phaa lie kha a kya tu.
43019014	Capa cuo ca Lawsena Pyi cuo ta a ting ning, ningchung hraw ta a cuo. Judah ming kyihuo khata, “Nama siepahruo hing mang tie ung!” a ta yi.
43019015	Khi yite, “Thie tie! Thie tie! Vieluo cunglie khepuo tie,” ama ta. Pilat ta, “Nama siepahruo hingma vieluo cunglie i thie aa?” a ta yi. Tluobyilepa tie ta, “Sizar ri li pata siepahruo hnyi va puv,” ama ta.
43019016	Cakhutaata Pilat ta Zingsuv kha vieluo cunglie thie riypata iema kuv luo a pi yi. Cacuonakawta Zingsuv ca ama sikhyi.
43019017	A vieluo kha amata tah a puv te Hebru ryi ta Galgotha ama tapa, Luvruv Hmang tapa luo kha a pha.
43019018	Capa lieca vieluo cunglie ama khepuo, a hrangpa pahning zaw kha khepuo ra yite Zingsuv ca amaa lala lieta a aw.
43019019	Pilat ta caa suokha cape te vieluo cunglie ca a taa. A capepa ca, “Nazareth khypa Zingsuv, Judah Siepahruo,” tapata a cuo.
43019020	Zingsuv vieluo lie ama taana hmang ca khypuv hne a hla li nakaw hne a caa ca Hebru ryi, Latin ryi, hne Grik ryi ta ama cape nakawta Judah ming hluvpuv ta ama ri.
43019021	Cacuonakawta Judah ming tluobyilepa tie ta Pilat kha, “Judah ming siepahruo,’ tapata cape kha, cuorasala ‘Hingpapaa hingna Judah ming siepahruo tana i cuo a ta,’ tapata cape tie,” ama ta.
43019022	Pilat ta, “I cape tlipa ca i cape tlipa na a cuo,” a ta.
43019023	Rieka tie ta Zingsuv kha vieluo cunglie ama thie tiyta a caw kha la yite che paliy ta che yite chekha cie ta amaa la. A buohryi zaw kha la yite a caw aw li pata a luv taata a lie te ama taapa ta a cuo.
43019024	Cacuonakawta, pakha hne pakha kha, “Hingpa hing ca thlaa li pata vyisung ta a da ungsiy,” amaa ta. Caapathepa ta, “Iema ca i caw kha a che yite, I buohryi kha vyisung amaa da,” a tapa a tlingna riypata a cuo.
43019025	Cahaa dala cata rieka ta ama tue. Capa ning cata Zingsuv vieluo a thaa lie a daapa ca a nung, Glopas napuvnung a nung nuta Mary hne Mary Magdalin zaw khata ama cuo.
43019026	Zingsuv ta a nung hne a thaa lie a daapa a duepa a ziytuv kha a hmung tiy yi ta, a nung kha, “Canung, Ama kha na saacapaa ta a cuo kha,” a ta.
43019027	A ziytuvpa zaw kha, “Ama kha na nung ta a cuo kha,” a ta. Capa cuo taacata a ziytuvpa ta Zingsuv nung kha a ing lie a pa-aw sa.
43019028	Capa khutaa cata Zingsuv ta zezaw bangkhuo a tlung tli tapa kha pachang te Caapathepa bie a tlingna riypata, “I tiy na a hrie,” a ta.
43019029	Capa lieca mingsuv tiy thuepa bi suokha aw te mingsuv tiy thuepa chung luo kha pangcaw naw yite hissop aarasung daw lie kha ciypuo yite Zingsuv ca a pakaa luo ama kya tuv.
43019030	Zingsuv ca mingsuv tiy thuepa kha vya saw te, “Aa lang tli,” a ta. A luv kha pangie te a huv a ci.
43019031	Capa ning ca Atingdawning a cuo nakawta ama thiepa tie riy Sabbath ning ta vieluo cunglie a pathliepa kha Judah ming ta khing vayi. Tahematapakieca capa Sabbath ning ca aa pathecepa ning ta a cuo. Cacuonakawta Pilat'a luo kha a ngie yite vieluo cunglie ama thiepa tie ngieluo kha thli pata ama riy la riypata ama hie.
43019032	Rieka tie kha vaa yite Zingsuv hne ama thiehnepa pahning tie ngieluo kha ama thli.
43019033	Cuorasala Zingsuv'a luo ama chiy ca a thiy tlipa kha hmung yite a ngieluo thli vayi.
43019034	Cadyiseca rieka pakha ta a vuo kha asyi ta kya daw te sungkha ta thiy hne tiy kha a kya pya.
43019035	(A ming ta a hmungpapaa hrahring ta tehte a khuopa cuote niema nama zang the na riypata a cuo. A tehte khuopa ca aa hmuopa cuote ama ta biedangpa a ripa kha a pachang.)
43019036	Hing hmang hing Caapathepa lieta, “A ruv suokha hmuo thli'a vayi,” a tapa a tlingna riypata a cuopa a cuo.
43019037	Caapathepa a hrang lie zaw, “Iema ta ama dawpa kha ama mang aa,” a ta.
43019038	Cakhutaacata Judah ming a ciy nakaw yi ta a paruv ta Zingsuv hnang ziytuv a cuopa Arimathea khy ming Josef ta Zingsuv riy la riypata Pilat kha a hie. Pilat ta, ‘na la khu,’ a ta nakawta a riy kha a la.
43019039	Zingsuv a taw riypata zuo ta a vaa buopapaa Nikodemu zaw kha Josef'a luo vaa te mura hne aloes pyapa ziyhmyi paw zakha tluv a riypa kha aa cyi.
43019040	A riy kha la yite Judah ming riy a pabyna phung haata ziyhmyi bya yite pawruo ta ama cataw.
43019041	Zingsuv ama thiena hmang lie kha diedung suokha aw te capa diedung chunglie ca ahunghmuo ama paby buo linapa thluo thaapa suokha a aw.
43019042	Judah ming Atingdawning a cuo nakaw hne a ngie lie thluo a aw nakawta capa lieca Zingsuv kha ama paby.
43020001	Zaakha chunglie a ningkha-napa ning mawdiy a zing kalie pata Mary Magdalin ca thluo luo kha vaa te thluokhaakhuv aa hnyipa kha a hmung.
43020002	Cacuonakawta Piter hne, Zingsuv ta a duepa ziytuv hrangpa'a luo kha a ruo te, “Abyipa kha thluo chung taata la yite khaaliema ama chi tapa kha pachang va puv,” a ta.
43020003	Piter hne a ziytuv hrangpapaa ca a pachie yite thluo luo kha ama vaa.
43020004	Ama pahning ta a ruole yite a ziytuv hrangpa ta Piter kha a law nakawta thluo luo kha a chiy taa.
43020005	A bung te a mang ca riy catawnapa pawruo ca a hmung, cuorasala thluo luo kha a ngie vyi.
43020006	Simon Piter ca a hnang ta thluo luo ca vya chiy te aa ngie ca, a riy catawnapa pawruo hne
43020007	Zingsuv luv ama pahlawnapa pawruo a nanangta tah a za awpa kha a hmung.
43020008	Cakhutaata a vya chiy taapa ziytuv hrangpa zaw kha thluo luo ca a ngie te hmung te a zang.
43020009	Thiyna taata a thupakhaa aa tapata Caapathepa ta a ripa kha a ri khingnapa pachang khu valie yi.
43020010	Cakhutaata ziytuv tie ca ing luo kha ama kaa.
43020011	Mary ca thluo le lie kha a daa te a caa. A caapuo pata thluo chung luo kha a bung te a za mang ca
43020012	caw ruopa a tuepa avuoming pahning kha Zingsuv riy ama chinapa a luv luo kuo ta pakha, a phyichaa luo kuo ta pakha amaa tupa kha a hmung.
43020013	Iema cata, “Canung nung, “Khaapanakawma na caa?” ama ta. Ama ta, “I byipaapa kha la yite khaapaliema ama chi tapa pachang va ang,” a ta.
43020014	Capa bie a ri diy pahne a hnang luo aa pali ca Zingsuv a daapa kha a hmung, cuorasala Zingsuv a cuopa kha pachang vyi.
43020015	Zingsuv ta, “Canung nung, khaapanakawma na caa? Ahungma na huv?” a ta. Diedung a huopapaa ta ri te, “Abyipa, nama ta na la pata a cuo kieca na chinapa kha na chang la, vaa'a ang te i va la aa,” a ta.
43020016	Zingsuv ta, “Mary!” a ta ca a pali hnue te Hebru ryi ta “Rabboni,” a ta. (A siyluo ca saya tana ta a cuo).
43020017	Zingsuv ta, “Na patuv kha, tahematapakieca Paa luo kha kie valie ang. Cuorasala i uvnu zaw'a luo kha vaa la, “I Paa hne nama Paa, i Khazing hne nama Khazing a cuopa'a luo khana i kie aa,’ a ta tapa kha va chang tie yi,” a ta.
43020018	Mary Magdalin ca cakuo te, Abyipa a hmungna kaw hne a changpa bie bangkhuo kha ziytuv tie ca a chang yi.
43020019	Zaakha chunglie a ningkhanapa zuoluo ta ziytuv tie ca Judah ming ama ciy nakawta ingchiy khaa yite amaa pungnapa lie kha Zingsuv ca a vaw te a lie chunglie kha a daa te, “Nama cunglie diena aw mangsue,” a ta yi.
43020020	Cahaa cata a ri khu taata a kuv hne a vuo kha a pahmung yi. Ziytuv tie ca Abyipa kha ama hmung nakawta ama palung a tluosa.
43020021	Zingsuv ta iema kha, “Nama cunglie diena aw mangsue. Paa ta ina pathliepa haata kama zaw ta ica pathlie ra yi,” a ta yi.
43020022	Cahaa cata a ri khu taata, a huv ta hmung yite, “Thlaapa Pathe kha hmung tie ung
43020023	Cawsaa suena kha namaa ngiethe kieca a ngiethe pata cuo'a yite, namaa ngiethe li kieca a ngiethe li pata ama cuo aa,” a ta yi.
43020024	Ziytuv tie hlyihning hrawlie pakha a cuopa Thomas (Mingphie ama tapa) ca Zingsuv aa luo ning kha aw ra vyi
43020025	Cacuonakawta ziytuv hrang tie ta, “Abyipa na ma hmung,” ta yite ama chang. Cuorasala ama ta, “A kuv lie thaakhe ta ama khepuonapa a hmaa i hmung lipa'a nata i kuvdaw ta capa a hmaa hne a vuo kha i hriepuo hluo li ca zang'a va ang,” a ta yi.
43020026	Zaakha khu taata ziytuv tie ca ing chunglie kha aw pakhaa yite, Thomas zaw a aw ra. Ingchiy kha ama khaa diy raalaa pata, Zingsuv ca zaa ngie te, iema hrawlie kha a daa te, “Nama cunglie diena aw mangsue,” a ta yi.
43020027	Cakhutaata Thomas kyihuo khata, “I kuv hing vya mang la na kuvdaw ta vya hrie tie. Na kuv kha pazuo la i vuo hing hrie tie. Zang li pata aw kha tie, zang tie,” a ta.
43020028	Thomas ta, “I byipaapa hne i Khazing!” a ta.
43020029	Zingsuv ta, “Ina hmung nakaw ca tama ina zang ciy? Kama kha hmung li pata naa zangpa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo,” a ta.
43020030	Hingpa caa-uv chunglie cape lipa Zingsuv ta a tuepa kharuehaa hmang a hluvsa a aw kalie.
43020031	Cuorasala hing zaa hing capepa cuote cape hnuochuopa ca, Zingsuv ca Messiah, Khazing Saacapaa a cuopa kha zang ung cate capa zangna thue cata hringna nama hmungna riypatana a cuo.
43021001	Cakhutaacata Zingsuv ca Tiberias Riyliy kielie kha a ziytuv tie'a lie aa luo pakhaa. Aa luo zya ca hinghaahingta a cuo.
43021002	Simon Piter, Mingphie ama tapa Thomas, Galilee pe Kaanaa khy ming Nathanael, Zebedi saacapaa tie hne a hrangpa ziytuv pahning ca suvkha ta ama aw.
43021003	Simon Piter ta, “Ngaa na i va vaa aa,” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Ma ca vya ziy aa,” ta yite sawkawpalaw chung luo kha ama kie, cuorasala capa zuo ca sakha hmuo patuv vayi.
43021004	Khy a vuo patahne, Zingsuv ca ngiekuo lie kha aa tu, cuorasala ziytuv tie ta Zingsuv a cuopa kha pachang vayi.
43021005	Zingsuv ta, “Satlie zaw ngaa sakha hmuo patuv va ung cama?” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Patuv va puv,” ama ta.
43021006	Ama ta, “Sawkawpalaw cacuo luo kuo khata vaa ungla nama pa-uo buo aa,” a ta yi. Ama vaa ca ngaa a hluvsa aa uo nakawta amaa sue hmuo a da khu li pata ama aw.
43021007	Zingsuv ta a duepa ziytuvpa khata Piter kyihuo kha, “Abyipa na a cuo!” a ta. Simon Piter ta Abyipa na a cuo tapa kha a thyi ca, a cahri pata a aw nakawta, caw kha a hryi te tiy chung luo kha a zu.
43021008	Cuorasala ziytuv hrangpa tie ca sawkawpalaw luo kha kie yite ngaa pangkha a uopa asue ca daw zahning hraw dyi aa hlapa ngiekuo luo kha amaa dale.
43021009	Ngiekuo luo ama chiy ca myi cunglie ngaa a zaa epa hne viechuo kha ama hmung.
43021010	Zingsuv ta, “Nama patuvpa ngaa chekha kha vya cyi tie ung,” a ta yi.
43021011	Cacuonakawta Simon Piter ca sawkawpalaw luo kha kie te ngaa lesapa zakha sawngaa sathung a uopa asue kha ngiekuo luo a vya dale. Ngaa a hluvsa raalaa pata asue kha tlaa vyi.
43021012	Zingsuv ta, “A vaw ungla mawsa kha ning tie ung,” a ta yi. Abyipa a cuopa kha ama pachang thluo nakawta ahungtahmuo, “Ahung cama?” tapata hiehriy nguo vayi.
43021013	Zingsuv ca a vaw te, viechuo kha la te a pi yi, cahaa cata ngaa zaw kha a pi yi.
43021014	Hingpa hing thiyna taata a thupakhaa khu taata a ziytuv tie'a lie a yi thungnapa a luonapa tana a cuo.
43021015	Mawsa ama ning khu pahne ta Zingsuv ta Piter kha, “Johan saacapaa Simon, iema laa hingta ina due vie cama?” a ta. Ama ta, “A cuo, Abyipa; Ica duepa ca na pachang,” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “I tuvtaata zaw kha ala pi tie,” a ta.
43021016	A yihningnapa ta, “Johan saacapaa Simon, ina due cama?” a ta pakhaa. Ama ta, “A cuo, Abyipa; ica duepa kha na pachang,” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “I tuv kha khie tie,” a ta.
43021017	A yi thungnapa ta, “Johan saacapaa Simon, ina due cama?” a ta. Yi thung nanaa, “Ina due cama?” a ta nakawta Piter ca a ngie chi te, “Abyipa, nama ca hmangting a pachangtuv tana na cuo; ica duepa kha na pachang,” a ta. Zingsuv ta, “I tuv kha sa pi tie,” a ta.
43021018	Biehmisi tana ica chang: Na kung panu ning hing ca namata tah na tesaw kha a saw cate na khingna luo bangkhuo kha na cakuo. Cuorasala na macuo thue ca na kuv kha pazuu'a cate, pakhakha ta tesaw kha ca pasaw'a te, na khing lina luo kha aca cakuokhyi aa,” a ta.
43021019	(Hinghaahingta a tapa hing tuokhaapa thiyna tama Piter ta Khazing rungnaana kha a paluo sa aa tapa khana a ri khing.) Cakhutaacata, ama kha “Na ziy tie,” a ta.
43021020	Piter ca a pali te Zingsuv ta a duepa ziytuv ta a vya paziylepa yi kha a hmung. Ama ca zuosa ama ning ningta Zingsuv kha vaa pha te, “Abyipa, ahung hingma caa lyi riypata a cuo a tapa khata a cuo.”
43021021	Piter ta ama kha a hmung tiyta Zingsuv kha, “Abyipa, hingpapaa hinghaw tuokhaatama a cuo aa?” a ta.
43021022	Zingsuv ta, “I vaw pakhaana te a hring riypata khing ang sala na cuota khaama a pyinapa a aw? Na ziy tie!” a ta.
43021023	Cacuonakawta hing ziytuvpapaa hing thiy'a va tli tapata iema hrawlie kha bie aa ze. Zingsuv ta thiy'a vyi tapata a ripa cuo vyi, cuorasala, “I vaw pakhaana te a hring riypata khing ang sala na cuota khaama a pyinapa a aw?” a tapatana a cuo.
43021024	Hingpapaa ca a ziytuv cuote hingpa kaw hing tehte a khuotuv hne a capetuv ta a cuo, a tehtekhuopa ca a hmuo tapa zaw kha ma pachang.
43021025	Cuorasala Zingsuv ta a tuepa hmanghrangpa a hluv hringhruo a aw. Capa bangkhuo ca ma cape kieca, capepa caa-uv ca chuelyi hingta a tlaw the'a vyi tapatana i rue.
44001001	Duepa Theofilas, I caa-uv a suokhanapa lie kha Zingsuv ta aa tlawpa lucuotuv tie kha Thlaapa Pathe cahrana ta a pacuv khu taayita,
44001002	re hrie hruo aa thu baataata vuoruo luo a kiena te ta a pacuvnapa hne a rehriena kaw kha i cape.
44001003	A thiy khu taata ning sawliy chung iema'a lie kha yi hluvpuv a luo te a hring pakhaa tapa kha i khu li riypata yi hluvpuv a paluo sa khu taata Khazing pena kaw kha a ri.
44001004	Iema'a lie a aw ning khata iema kha, Jerusalem pya se li pata Paa biekuona kha ama huo riypata bie a pi yi. Ama ta, “Kama'a taata nama thyipa bie ca hinghaahingtana a cuo;
44001005	Johan ca tiy tana tiynawna aca pi yi, cuorasala niema ca ata ning taahingta a ru li pata Thlaapa Pathe ta tiynawpa nama cuo aa,” a ta yi.
44001006	Cacuonakaw Zingsuv hne lucuotuv tie ca amaa hmya pakhaw tiyta, “Abyipa, ata hing Israel ming'a luo pena na pi pakhaa na cuo ta a cuo ma? tapata ama hiehriy.
44001007	Zingsuv ta, “I Paa ta ama ri ta a tuepa ning hne cuo kha niema nama pachang a hu vyi.
44001008	Cuorasala Thlaapa Pathe nama cung luo aa zuv tiyta cahrana hmung'a ung cate, Jerusalem khypuv, Judea, Samaria hne chuelyi dena te ta i pachangkhyituv nama cuo aa,” a ta yi.
44001009	Capa bie a ri khu pahne ama ming hmung pata lathawpa cuote amyi ta vya pakhuo te hmung khu va tli yi.
44001010	Cahaa cata a kielepa kha avuo luo angchiy yite ama mang nguoluo pata caw ruopa a tuepa avuoming pahning amaa thaa lie sungkha ta amaa vya daa.
44001011	Iema ta, “Galilee cawsaa zaw, khaapama namaa daa luota vuoruo luo ca nama mang nguoluo? Niema'a taata vuoruo luo lathawpa Zingsuv ca nama hmungpa dadang haakhata aa vaw pakhaa aa,” a ta yi.
44001012	Cakhutaata lucuotuv tie ca Jerusalem taata kilometer suokha dyi aa hlapa, Oliv tluo taata Jerusalem luo kha ama vya kaa.
44001013	Khypuv chung luo ama vya pha tiyta ama aw tawnapa a cung khuo luo kha amaa ngie. Piter, hne Johan, Jeim hne Andru, Filip hne Thomas, Bartholomew hne Matthai, Alfeas saacapaapa Jeim, Phangcuokhyituv Simon hne Jeim saacapaapa Judas ta ama cuo.
44001014	Ama bangkhuo ta thlaa chuo riypata a taana ata tah a taw yite capa lieca canung tie, Zingsuv nung Mary hne Zingsuv nuta zaw kha ama aw ra.
44001015	Capa ning ca zangtuv tie (ama bangkhuo ta zakha pakiy hraw) hrawlie kha Piter a daa te,
44001016	“Uvta nuta zaw, Zingsuv a patuvpa tie luochiytuv ta a cuopa Judas kaw hne a patuv pata David hmuo pata Thlaapa Pathe ta a za rilupa Caapathepa bie ca a tling riypa a cuo.
44001017	Ama ca hing Khazing re lie hing hrievu pipa a cuo nakawta kiema hrawlie pasuvpuo pata a cuo.
44001018	(Ama ta hmangpha lipa a tuena taata a hmungpa tuokaa khata lu suokha calyi te; capa lu lieca a bungkali pata tla te a riy a ke nakawta a chungriy bangkhuo ta a pya diy.
44001019	Capa kaw ca Jerusalem lie a awpa bangkhuo ta pachang yite iema ryi ta capa lu ca Akeldama ta yite, a siyluo ca, ‘Thiyse Lu,’ tana ta a cuo.)
44001020	‘Salm caa-uv chunglie ta, A ing ca hri sala; a chunglie a aw riypa caking yi se’; Cakhutaa, ‘A re kha cawsaa hrangpa ta a thle se,’ tapata aa cape.
44001021	Cacuonakawta Johan tiynawna taata ima Byipaapa Zingsuv kiema'a taata lapa a cuona te, kiema'a lie a ngie te pya te a aw chung bangkhuo,
44001022	kiema'a lie a aw rapa pakha ca kiema hneta Zingsuv thupakhaana pachangkhyituv a cuo ra hrahring na a hu,” a ta.
44001023	Cacuonakawta, cawsaa pahning Barsabbas ama tapa Josef, Justas zaw ama tapuopa hne Matthias ming kha ama chiykhyi.
44001024	Thlaa chuo yite, “Abyipa, nama ca cawsaa pathiypalung bangkhuo na pachang.
44001025	Judas ta a cu riypa hmang luo a sisepa, hingpa Khazing re hrie riypa hne lucuotuv cuo riypa hing iema pahning lie hingta ahungma naa tlaw tapa kha za paluo sa tie,” ama ta.
44001026	Cakhutaata vyisung amaa da ca Matthias ta a hmung nakawta ama ca lucuotuv hlyikha lie kha pasuvpuo pata a cuo.
44002001	Pentekos ning a vya pha tiyta zangtuv bangkhuo ca suvkha lie ama aw.
44002002	Sungkhabala ta vuoruo taata ueryi suokha ca thliysung pu haata za paring te amaa tunapa ing kha a bi diy.
44002003	Aa chepa palyi ca myipalyi haata iema hrawlie kha zaa luo te myipalyi suokha cyicuo ca iema pakha cyicuo cunglie kha aa cang.
44002004	Iema bangkhuo ca Thlaapa Pathe ta bi yite Thlaapa ta a pipa yi cyicuo haakhata ryi hrangpa kha ama cyi.
44002005	Capa ning ca vuoruotyi ruo ting ta a awpa Judah ming kha Jerusalem lie ama aw ningta a cuo.
44002006	Ca ueryi ca ama thyi tiyta cawsaazaapuv kha a vya hmya yite ama kharue a haa hringhruo, tahematapakieca zangtuv tie ama ripa kha a vawpa tie ta iema ryi cyicuo ta ama thyi nakawta a cuo.
44002007	Ama nang ta uosa te, “Ama bangkhuo hingta Galilee ryi a cyipa cuo vayi ma?
44002008	Cacuokie tuokhaatama kiema pakha cyicuo ta ma puvnapa ryi ta ma thyi the?
44002009	Kiema ca Parthia ruo, Media ruo, Elam ruo, Mesopotamia ruo, Judea ruo, Kappadosia ruo, Pontas ruo, Asia ruo,
44002010	Frizia ruo, Pamfilia ruo, Izipt ruo, Libia ruo chung Sairin khy cahriy lie a awpa ma cuo. Rom taata a vawpa khyche, Judah ming hne Judah biena a hrawpa Jentail ming zaw ta ma cuo.
44002011	Karit parala ruo hne Arabia ruo taata a vawpa zaw ta ma cuo, cuorasala Khazing ta a cahrana ta a tuepa hmang rungnaapa kaw kha ama ri tiyta ma ryi cyicuo ta ma thyi kaluo,” ama ta.
44002012	Ama bangkhuo ta nang-uo chungzing pata, “Hingpa hing a siyluo khaapatama a cuo aa,” amaa ta.
44002013	Cuorasala a hrangpa tie ta, esepuo pata, “Mingsuv tiy na ama pariy,” ama ta.
44002014	Cuorasala Piter ca hlyikha tie hne khata a kya daa te a ryi kha khuosa ta pathlie te, “I phangkha cawsaa Judea ruo ming hne Jerusalem lie a awpa bangkhuo zaw, i ripa hing naathlie ungla pachang tie ung.
44002015	Hingpa tie hing niema nama ruenapa haata pariy vayi, tahematapakieca maw siymaluo pacaky dyi muo a ta baaning ta.
44002016	Hingpa hing ca profet Joel a za ripa kha tana a cuo:
44002017	‘Khazing ta, Ningchuonapa lieca cawsaa bangkhuo kha i Thlaapa bya'a yi ang te, nama sacanung hne saacapaa tie ta bie ama phu aa, nama thutlie tie ta muocuo hmung'a yite, nama macuo tie ta muo ama sa aa.
44002018	Capa ning thue ca i sii canung hne i sii capaa zaw cunglie kha i Thlaapa bya'a ang te, bie ama phu aa.
44002019	Cung luo vuoruo lie khiy pamangsana hmang paluo'a ang te, raw luo alyi lie hing kharuehaa hmang i paluo aa, thiyse hne myi hne myikhuv chaapuv ta ama cuo aa.
44002020	A rungnaapa hne a lesyipa Abyipa ning a vaw hluo ta Ning khiy zing'a te, thlaapa khiy thiyse haata a se aa.
44002021	Cakhutaata Abyipa ming a upa bangkhuo ca khuona ama hmung aa,’ a ta.
44002022	Israel ming, i bie hing naathlie tie ung. Nama pachangpa haata Nazareth khypa Zingsuv ca Khazing ta re a changpa na a cuo tapa kha, Khazing ta ama hmuopa ta a tuepa, a cahrana ta a tuepa hmang rungnaapa zaw, kharuehaa hmang zaw, hne pamangsana tie zaw hingta niema'a lie a paluo sa.
44002023	Khazing ta hmungdawna hne ama khuekhuona haata niema'a luo aca pipa yi Zingsuv ca cawsaa pha lipa tie kuv ta vieluo cunglie nama thie.
44002024	Cuorasala Khazing ta ama kha thiyna taata a pathu pakhaa, tahematapakieca thiyna ta ama kha patuv pari khu'a vyi.
44002025	Cacuonakawta David ta ama hne aa patuv pata, ‘I hmiekunglie Abyipa kha i hmung pari, I cacuo luota inaa daapuo nakawta a cahang'a va ang;
44002026	Cacuonakawta i palung tluo te, i bie ca thaaphana hneta a bi; Cadyi cuo vyi, i pangpasaa ca a nguopuona hnetana a hring aa.
44002027	Tahematapakieca i thlaapa kha athiykhy lie thuse'a vaciy, Na mingpathepa hing thluokhue lie lang riypata ca pase'a vaciy.
44002028	Hringna luopuv kha na pachang sa cate, Ina aw puo nakaw cata i palung a tluo pari aa,’ a ta.
44002029	Uv zaw nu zaw, mingpa David kaw hing a siesa pata ica chang'a yi. Ama ca thiy te ama paby, ata ning tepa ta a thluo zaw kiema'a lie a aw kalie.
44002030	Ama ca profet a za cuopa haata, a saming a sahlaa pakhakha kha ama siepahruo thude lie i patu aa tapata Khazing ta bie a kuopa kha a pachang.
44002031	Ama kha hmungluna hne David ta Messiah thupakhaana kaw a ripa ca, ‘Ama ca athiykhy lie thusepa cuo li'a pata, a pangpasaa ca thluo lie kha lang'a vyi,’ a ta.
44002032	Khazing ta hingpa Zingsuv hing thiyna taata pathu pakhaa te, kiema bangkhuo hing pachangkhyituv ta ma cuo.
44002033	Khazing cacuo luo kuo ta patu sapa cuote, Paa ta bie a kuopa Thlaapa kha a hmung tli. A ta nama hmungpa hne nama thyipa hing kiema cunglie a za byapa ama lasaw tana a cuo.
44002034	David ca vuoruo luo kha kie vyi, cuorasala ama hrahring ta a ripa ca, ‘Abyipa ta i Byipaapa kha,
44002035	“Na carie tie kha na phyipazaa rawlie tlawpuo pata ama cuo hluo li, I cacuo luo kuo ta a tu tie, a ta pakha” a ta.’
44002036	Cacuonakawta, “Israel ming bangkhuo, niema ta vieluo lie nama thiepa Zingsuv hing Khazing ta Abyipa hne Messiah ta a tue tapa hing pachang tie ung,” a ta yi.
44002037	Capa bie ama thyi tiyta ama palung kha cahrie yite Piter hne lucuotuv hrangpa tie kha, “Uvnu zaw, khaapama ma tue aa?” ama ta.
44002038	Piter ta, Nama bangkhuo hingta sue a ngiethepa nama cuo riypata nama suena kha a ngiepachiy ungla Zingsuv Khrih ming ta tiy a naw tie ung; cacuokieca Khazing lasaw Thlaapa Pathe kha nama hmung aa.
44002039	Tahematapakieca biekuona ca Abyipa ma Khazing ta ama'a luo a kupa, niema, nama saata tie, hne luohlaa luo a awpa tie nama bangkhuo cuota na a cuo,” a ta yi.
44002040	Cakhutaata a hluvpuv cawpa yite a pasu yi. “Hing chuo pha lipa lie a tlung riypa duotena chung taahingta hyazang riypata a zue ung,” a ta yi.
44002041	Cacuonakawta a bieripa a cuhluopa tie ca tiy naw yite capa ning cata cawsaa thawthung amaa chachiy.
44002042	Iema ca lucuotuv tie pacuvna hne zangtuv tie a viesaana luo kha a pi karue yite, a viesaana sa ningpakhawna hne thlaachuo pakhawna kha ama hnyi pari.
44002043	Kharuehaa hmang hluvpuv hne pamangsana hluvpuv kha lucuotuv tie ta ama tue nakawta cawsaa bangkhuo kha ama kharue a haasa.
44002044	A zangpa bangkhuo kha aw pakhaw yite chechiy bangkhuo kha amaa hraw;
44002045	ama hnyipa hmang kha zaa yite ama hmungpa tuokaa kha amaa huna cyicuo haakhata amaa re.
44002046	Ning kha hnang ning kha, ama cuo hnyipa hluv vie bangkhuo kha biena-ing lie hmuo yite, ama ing lie kha sa ning a hraw yite pahyana hne palung tluosa pata ama ning.
44002047	Khazing kha pathuosa yite cawsaa bangkhuo hmielie hmiephaa ama hmung. Cahaa cata Abyipa ta khuona a hmungpa tie kha ning kha hnang ning kha ta ama buv luo a chachiy yi.
44003001	Ningkha ca zuoluo siymaluo pathung, thlaa chuo cuo lie kha Piter hne Johan ca thlaa chuo riypata Biena-ing luo ama cakuo.
44003002	A puv baataata a phyi cabiepa pakha kha amaa vya puvle. Biena-ing chung luo a ngiepa tie kha tuokaa a hie khu naaseyi tapata Thlake Puvthe tapa biena-ing thlake lie kha ningting ta ama chi taw.
44003003	Piter hne Johan kha biena-ing luo amaa ngie'a nangpa a hmung tiy yi ta aa hie yi.
44003004	Ama kha taapuo pata mang yite, “Malie mang tie,” ama ta.
44003005	Suokhakha ca ina pi thlu'a yi tapa a nguopuona hneta iema kha ming vy li pata a mang yi.
44003006	Cuorasala Piter ta, “Kama ca ngu cuose, siyy cuose hnyi va ang, cuorasala i hnyipa na ica pi; Nazareth Zingsuv ming ta thu la cakuo tie,” a ta.
44003007	A cacuo luo kuv ta patuv te a padaa ca a phyi hrahning hne a cakhawruv zaw ca sungkha ta a thaa vya ruv te, a daa te luo a cakuo.
44003008	Cakuole, a cathlule te Khazing a pathuosapuo pata iema hne cata biena-ing chung luo kha aa ngie.
44003009	Khazing pathuosa te a cakuopa kha cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama hmung.
44003010	Biena-ing Thlake Puvthe lieta a tu te a hie tawpa kha ama pachang nakawta a cunglie hmang a tlungpa kawlie kha ama kharue haa te ama nang dyi a uo.
44003011	Cawsaapapaa ca Solomon hmiechue tapa lie kha Piter hne Johan'a lieta a awpa kha ama hmung tiyta cawsaazaapuv ca kharuehaasa pata iema'a luo kha ama vaa.
44003012	Piter ta iema kha a hmung tiy yi ta, “I phangkha cawsaa Israel ming, “Khaapanakawtama hingpa hmang kawlie hing nama kharue haa te kiema tlaku kiema cahrana hne phana ta a cakuo sa khupa haata ming vy li pata malie nama mang?
44003013	Abraham, Isak hne Jakob Khazing, ima mingchingmingvuo tie Khazing ta ama rungnaana ca a changtaapa Zingsuv'a lieta a pi tli. Ama ca Pilat kuv luo pi ung cate ama ta pathlie riypata bie a chi raalaa pata Pilat hmielie hrahring kha nama thaw ngiethie.
44003014	Niema ta a pathepa hne aa dangpa kha thaw ung cate lie a nawpa tuv kha aca pathliepa riypa yita namaa hie.
44003015	Cakhutaata hringna luo cawsaa a chiytuvpa ca nama thie. Cuorasala Khazing ta ama kha thiyna taata pathu pakhaa te kiema hing capa kaw ca a pachangkhyituv ta ma cuo.
44003016	Cahaa cata a ming kha a zang nakawta, a ming mamaapa khata nama hmungpa hne nama pachangpa hingpapaa hing cahrana a pi. Capa Zingsuv zangnapa cata ama kha niema hmiekunglie hrahring ta tluopasingna a pi.
44003017	“Uv zaw nu zaw, ata zaw hing, niema hne nama uvtuv tie ta nama tuepa hing nama pachang li nakawtana a cuo tapa i pachang.
44003018	Messiah ca a te a ang aa tapata profet tie'a taata a za rilupa bie kha Khazing ta hingpa haahingta a patling sa.
44003019	Cacuonakawta nama suenapa ca pathesapa nama cuo riypata a ngiepachiy ungla Khazing'a luo kha a pali tie ung.
44003020	Cakhutaata Abyipa ta thaazuo thaa lana cuo kha ca pi'a yite niema cuota a tlaw ciepa Messiah, Zingsuv kha niema'a luo aca pi'a yi.
44003021	Ama ca Khazing ta hluoning baataata a profet tie zaw cung taata a za ripa, hmangting bangkhuo sapathiyna cuo a tlung hluo li vuoruo lieta a aw aa.
44003022	Moses ta, ‘Abyipa nama Khazing ta niema mingphang chung taahingta kama haapa profet pakha kha pathlie'a te, aca changpa bangkhuo yi kha naa nama thlie aa.
44003023	Capa profet bie naa a thlie lipa bangkhuo ca mingphang chung taata thawpa ta ama cuo aa.
44003024	Profet Samuel hne ama hnang taata a vawpa profet zaw bangkhuo ta hingpa ning hne cuo kaw hing ama ri diypa ta a cuo.
44003025	Niema ca profet tie samingsahlaa cuo ung cate, Khazing ta nama mingchingmingvuo zaw a pipa yi biekuona a hraw rapa tana nama cuo.
44003026	Abraham kha, ‘Nama samingsahlaa chung taahingtana chuelyi ming bangkhuo hing thluechiy i pi'a yi,’ a ta. Cacuonakawta niema ahung nama cuo zaw, nama phalina taata vya kaa pata thluechiy pi thepa nama cuo riypata Khazing ca a saacapaapa kha pathu sa pakhaa te niema'a luo hmietaace ta a vya pathlie,” a ta.
44004001	Piter hne Johan ta cawsaa-zaapuv'a lie bie ama ri nguoluo ning kha tluobyi tie hne biena-ing a huopa uvtuv byi hne Sadusi ming kha a vaw yite,
44004002	lucuotuv tie ta Zingsuv a zangpa tie ca thiyna taata ama thupakhaa aa tapata ama za pacuv nakaw hne ama za ukhyi nguoluo nakaw khata a ama hi a haa hringhruo.
44004003	Cacuonakawta iema kha patuv yite, khy a zing tli nakawta a mawluopa te ta thaw-ing lieta ama chi.
44004004	Cuorasala ama ripa bie a thyipa tie ca zang yite ama bangkhuo ta thawpangaa tluv ama ta.
44004005	A mawluopa ta ama uvtuv tie, uvthyi tie, phungbie saya tie hne,
44004006	tluobyilecepa Annas, Kaiafas, Johan, Alekzandar hne tluobyilepa chungkhue cawsaa hrangpa zaw kha Jerusalem lie kha amaa hmya.
44004007	Lucuotuv tie kha a liekhingkhuo lie padaa yite, “Ahung cahrana hne ahung ming tama hing hmang hing nama tue?” tapata ama hiehriy.
44004008	Piter ca Thlaapa ta bi te iema kha, “Uvtuv byi hne uvthyi tie zaw,
44004009	a tluo lipa cawsaa pakha cunglie hmangpha tuena kaw hne tuokhaatama patluo sa pata a cuo tapa kha ata ning hing malie nama hiehriy pata a cuo kieca,
44004010	niema ta vieluo cunglie za thie ung cate Khazing ta thiyna taata a pathu sa pakhaapa Nazareth khypa Zingsuv ming tana hingpapaa hing tluo paalaa khata nama hmiekunglie a daa tapa hing niema bangkhuo hne Israel ming bangkhuo ta pachang tie ung.
44004011	Capa Zingsuv ca Caapathepa ta, ‘niema, ingsatuv tie ta nama thawpa alung ca; a tungpuv cepa ingkiy lung tana aa li,’ a tapa khatana a cuo.
44004012	Khuona ca ama chunglie dyina a aw, tahematapakieca chuelyi cung bangkhuo lie hing malie a khuo khutuv ming hrangpa suokha hmuo aw vyi,” a ta.
44004013	Iema ta Piter hne Johan riephana zya kha ama hmung tiyta hne caa a the lipa cawsaa cakhawpa ama cuona zya kha ama pachang tiyta ama nang ta uo te, iema ca Zingsuv viesaa ama cuopa kha amaa kya thyi pakhaa.
44004014	Ama patluo sa papaa amaa thaa lie a daapa kha ama hmung thluo nakawta khaapahmuo i riypa hnyi vayi.
44004015	Cacuonakawta lucuotuv tie kha ing chung taata papya yite iema selaw ta capa kaw ca amaa rue pakhaw.
44004016	Pakha hne pakha kha, “Hingpa cawsaa zaw hing tuokhaatama ma tue'a ung? Iema ta kharuehaa hmang lepuv ama tuepa kha Jerusalem lie a awpa bangkhuo ta ama pachang diy nakawta i khu'apa cata a cuo hyi va, amaa ta.
44004017	Cuorasala hing hmang kaw hing cawsaa hraw luo a ze hryly li riypata, hing cawsaa zaw hing Zingsuv ming ta ahung'a lie hmuo bie ri'a va tli ungciy tapata khuosa ta thlu'a ungpuv,” amaa ta.
44004018	Cacuonakawta iema kha ku yite Zingsuv ming ta bie ri li tli riypa hne pacuv li tli riypata bie ama pi.
44004019	Cuorasala Piter hne Johan ta, “Khazing hmiekunglieta niema bie a ngiepa ma a pha vie aa, Khazing bie a ngiepa ma a pha vie aa tapa kha niema ta bie chi tie ung;
44004020	tahematapakieca kiema ca ma hmungpa hne ma thyipa kha ri li pata aw khu'a va puv,” tapata ama palie.
44004021	Cawsaa bangkhuo ta hmang a cuopa kawlie kha Khazing ama pathuosa nakawta iema duotena riypa kha a luo hmung khu vayi. Cacuonakawta ama pachiypahuo khu taata iema ca ama pathlie.
44004022	A cunglie tluona kharuehaa hmang tuepa pata a cuopapaa hing kung sawliy hlyi a tapa tana a cuo.
44004023	Ama pathlie khu taata lucuotuv tie ca ama viesaa tie'a luo kha vaa yite tluobyi tie hne uvthyi tie ta ama changpa bie kha ama changpachaa.
44004024	Ama thyipa hneta Khazing'a luo kha khuopuv ta u yite, “Alesyipa Abyipa, alyi hne avuo, riyliy hne a chunglie a awpa bangkhuo a satuvpa,
44004025	na Thlaa Pathe hmuo pata na changtaapa mingpa David'a lie bie za ri cate, ‘Khaapanakawma Jentail ming ca ama hihaa te, cawsaa zaw ta a cuo lipa khue ama rue?
44004026	Abyipa hne Messiah a du pata chuelyi siepahruo tie a daahmang la yite, uvtuv tie hne amaa hmya pakhaw,’ na za ta.
44004027	Cahaa cata hingpa khy chunglie hing Herod hne Pontius Pilat ca Jentail ming'a nata Israel ming hne khata Messiah ta naa tlawpa, a pathepa na saata Zingsuv a du riypa khata,
44004028	nama ta a vya aw riypa na za rue ciepa hne na za thli ciepa bangkhuo kha a tling riypata amaa hmya pakhaw sasaw.
44004029	Cacuonakawta, Abyipa, iema pachiypahuonapa kha za pachang thi la, na changtaapa zaw ta riepha ciemuo pata na bie ama ri khu riypata zaa bya thi tie yi.
44004030	Cawsaa tluona riypata na buo ca pazuu la a pathepa na changtaapa Zingsuv ming ta pahmungsana hne kharuehaa hmang ca pa-aw sa thi tie,” ama ta.
44004031	Thlaa ama chuo khu pahne amaa hmyanapa ing ca a cahang te, Thlaapa Pathe ta bi yite Khazing bie kha riephana hneta ama ri.
44004032	A zangpa bangkhuo ca ama buv yalya ta ama pathiypalung hne ama ruena a lu te ahungtahmuo ama hnyipa kha kama huopa ta lipa yi ta chechiy bangkhuo kha amaa hraw.
44004033	Lucuotuv tie ta Abyipa Zingsuv thupakhaana kha cahrana hne khuopuv ta ri yite iema bangkhuo kha Khazing ta thluechiy a hluvsa ta a pi yi.
44004034	Iema hraw lieta aa huna lie aa phahlapa aw vayi, tahematapakieca ama hnyipa alyi hne ing bangkhuo kha zaa yite, ama hmungpa tuokaa kha
44004035	lucuotuv tie phyi thabaw luo ama vya pahmya. Lucuotuv tie ta pakha cyicuo kha amaa huna haata ama re.
44004036	Cahaa cata lucuotuv tie ta Barnabas (a siyluo ca thaazuo pituv saacapaa) ama tapa, Saipras lie a puvpa Levi ming Josef ca
44004037	a hnyipa a lu kha zaa te, a hmungpa tuokaa kha vya cyi te lucuotuv tie phyi thabaw lie kha a vya chi.
44005001	Cuorasala Ananias ama tapapaa hne a napuvnung Safira ca ama hnyipa hmangkha zaa yite,
44005002	ama hmungpa tuokaa chekha kha a napuvnung palung tlingkhyina hne dya chi te chekha dyi kha lucuotuv tie phyi thabaw luo a vya chiykhyi.
44005003	Piter ta, “Ananias, khaapanakawma Thlaapa dung riypata Setaa hing na palung lie bi te alyi na zaanapa chekha kha dya naa chi?” a ta.
44005004	Na zaa hluo kha nama huopa cuo vama? Cacuokie na zaa khu taata na hmungpa a muo ca nama huopa cuo vama? Khaapanakawma capa hmang ca tue riypa palung na phya? Kiema malie dung vaciy cuorasala Khazing na na dung,” a ta.
44005005	Ananias ca capa bie ca a thyi pahne a liepatyi te a thiy. Capa thuohlaa a thyipa bangkhuo ca ama phuv dyi aa hling.
44005006	Satlie tie a vaw yite a riy kha ama pahlaw khu taata a puvle yite ama va paby.
44005007	Cakhutaata siymaluo pathung tluv a ru pata khaapa hmang ma a cuo tapa pachang li pata a napuvnung ca a zaa ngie.
44005008	Piter ta, “Na chang tie, nama hne na navaapa ta alyi kha hingpa zaa ta dyi hingtama nama zaa?” a ta. Ama ta, “A cuo, ama zaa khatana ma zaa,” a ta.
44005009	Peter ta, Khaapanakawma Abyipa Thlaapa kha dyapasya riypata nama palung a tlingpakhaw? Mang tie, na navaapa vaa pabypa tie kha ingchiypakaa a thaa lie amaa daa kalie khiy, nama zaw acaa puvle ra'a yi,” a ta.
44005010	Sungkha ta Piter phyi thabaw lie kha a lie te a thiy. Satlie tie amaa zaa ngie ca a thiy rapa kha hmung yite pyakhyi yite a navaapa a thaa lie kha ama va paby.
44005011	Khrihsaabuv hne capa thuohlaa a thyipa bangkhuo ca ama phuv dyi aa hling.
44005012	Lucuotuv tie ta cawsaa hrawlie kha pamangsana hne kharuehaa hmang a hluvpuv ama tue. Zangtuv tie ca Solomon hmiechue lie kha palung a lusa pata amaa hmya.
44005013	Ale luo cawsaa ahungtahmuo vaa te nguo vayi, cuorasala cawsaazaapuv taca ama pathuosa.
44005014	Tuokhaata a cuo zaw canung hne capaa hne a hluv vie hryly ta Abyipa kha zang yite ama buv luo ca amaa vya cha hryly.
44005015	Cacuonakawta Piter a vya cakuole pata a mingthlaapa ta sisuele naaseyi tapata a pasapa kha a vya puv yite luopuv chunglie kha amaa phaa cunglie'a nata pangphaa cunglie kha ama pahlaa.
44005016	Jerusalem cahriy khypuv tie taakhata cawsaa hluvpuv ca a vya hmya yite, a pasapa hne thlaapa pyalyipa ta a tuepa tie kha a vaw khyi yite, ama bangkhuo ta patluo sa pata ama cuo.
44005017	Cakhutaata tluobyilecepa hne, ama hne a aw hnepa Sadusi tie bangkhuo ta khuopuv ta ihnyi yite lucuotuv tie kha
44005018	patuv yite zaapuv thaw-ing lie kha ama pathla.
44005019	Cuorasala zuo khata Abyipa avuoming ta thaw ingchiypakaa kha pahaw te,
44005020	“Cakuo ungla, Biena-ing chunglie kha a daa ungla, hing hringna kaw hing va chang tie ung,” a ta yi.
44005021	Khy a dyi pahne Biena-ing chung luo kha a ngie yite, a ripa haakhata cawsaa kha ama pacuv. Tluobyilecepa hne ama hne a aw hnepa tie ama vya chiy tiyta, bierituvphuv tie hne Israel uvthyi bangkhuo kha a hmya pahry yite, lucuotuv tie kha ama hmiekung luo vya chiykhyi riypata bie ama pi.
44005022	Cuorasala thaw-ing paliy tie kha ama vaa tiyta iema kha thaw-ing chunglie ama hmung li nakawta vya kaa yite,
44005023	“Kiema ta thaw-ing a phasa pata a hre te a huotuvpa tie chiypakaa lie amaa daapa kha ma hmung, cuorasala ma pahaw tiyta iema kha pakha hmuo hmung vayi puv,” ama ta.
44005024	Biena-ing uvtuv byipa hne tluobyi tie ca capa bie ca ama thyi tiyta, ama nang ta uosa te khaapama a vya cuo aa tapa kha ama kharue ta a haasa.
44005025	Cakhupatahne cata cawsaa pakha vya chiy te, “Mang tie ung, thaw nama pathlapa cawsaa tie khana biena-ing chunglie a daa yite cawsaa a pacuv ciemuo yi,” a ta.
44005026	Biena-ing uvtuv byipa ca paliy tie hne khata vaa te lucuotuv tie kha amaa vya chiy. Cuorasala hruohra ta nuopuole a dapuole pata ca cuo vyi, tahematapakieca cawsaa ta alung ta malie vaa kie yi tapa kha ama ciy.
44005027	Lucuotuv tie ca vya chiykhyi yite, bierituvphuv hmielie kha padaa yite tluobyilecepa ta bie a hiehriy yi.
44005028	“Hingpapaa ming hingta cawsaa pacuv'a va ungciy tapata a cusa pata bie maca pi mangtli yi. Cuorasala nama pacuvna pata Jerusalem ca pabi ung cate hingpapaa thiyse hing kiema luv cung luo pathla riypata namaa ting hinghaw,” a ta yi.
44005029	Cuorasala Piter hne lucuotuv tie ta, Kiema ca cawsaa ri laata Khazing ri na maa ngie vie aa.
44005030	Thingkungpa cunglie pathlie ung cate nama thiepa Zingsuv ca ma mingchingmingvuo tie Khazing ta a pathu pakhaa mangtli.
44005031	Israel ming kha ama suena taata a ngiepachiy pata sue a ngiethena pi riypata Khazing ta ama ca luochiytuv hne khuotuv ta a cacuo luo kuo ta patu te a cyicalang tli.
44005032	Kiema hne Khazing ta ama a ri a ngiepa tie a pipa yi Thlaapa Pathe kha pachangkhyituv ta ma cuo,” ama ta.
44005033	Capa bie ca ama thyi tiyta ama hi haa laalaw te lucuotuv tie kha thie diy ama khing.
44005034	Cuorasala bierituvphuv lie pakha ta a cuo rapa Gamaliel ama tapa Farasipa, cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama pa-uvsathyipa phungbie sayapa ca bierituvphuv hmielie kha a daa te lucuotuv tie kha ingle luo pyakhyi caw riypata bie a pi yi.
44005035	Ama ta Israel ming kha, “I phangkha Israel ming, iema cunglie tue nama khingpa hmang hing a raaringsa pata ruepathiy tie ung.
44005036	Ma hnangluo ning kha Theudas ama tapapaa za pya te, cawsaa cakhawpa ta cuo va angne aa ta nakawta cawsaa zapaliy tluv ta ama ziy. Cuorasala ama ca thie yite a hnang a ziypa tie ca a chepatlaa yite ama vie diy.
44005037	Ama khutaa cata Galilee pa Judas kha mingluv ri cuo ning kha za pya ra te, cawsaa ta ama za ziy ra raalaa ca ama zaw kha rana luo chiy te a ziypa tie zaw kha amaa zaa chepatlaa diy.
44005038	A taapa hmang kawlie zaw hing niema ta hingpa cawsaa zaw hing khaahmuo ta kha ung, tahematapakieca hingpa hing cawsaa hmang tue pata a cuo kieca ra'a te;
44005039	cuorasala Khazing hmang tue pata a cuo kieca te khu the'a va ungciy, niema tuv na Khazing a dutuv ta a cuo pali'a ungciy,” a ta yi. A bie ca a ngie yite,
44005040	lucuotuv tie kha u yite asung ta ama chi. Cakhutaata Zingsuv ming ta bie ri hrahring li tli riypata chang yite ama pathlie.
44005041	Lucuotuv tie ca bierituvphuv hmie taata ama za pya tiyta Zingsuv thueta nangzaahmiechi ang riypata maa tla tapata a rue yite ama palung a tluosa.
44005042	Cahaa cata Zingsuv ca Messiah tana a cuo tapa kha Biena-ing lie cuose, ing lie cuose, ningting ta ci li pata pacuv yite ama u khyi.
44006001	Capa cuo hrawning ca, ziytuv tie ca hluv vie le lawmaw yite, Grik ryi a cyipa Judah ming ta Hebru ming kha ningting sa ning riypa a rena kawlie tana kiema nunghlyi tie ca hnang malie ama chawpa vie, tapata ama kaw ama ri.
44006002	Cacuonakawta lucuotuv hlyihning tie ta ziytuv bangkhuo kha pakiy yite, “Sapitiypi kawlieta Khazing bie ri kha hnang ma chaw kieca pha the'a vyi.
44006003	Cacuonakawta uvnu zaw, niema hraw taahingta singna hne Thlaapa ta a bipa pasariy kha a tlaw ungla hing re hing iema pi pata cuo sala,
44006004	kiema hing ca thlaachuona hne Khazing bie rina lie tuv kha thaa pahrang vie pata cuose,” ama ta.
44006005	Ama bie ta zaapuv palung kha patluo te, zangna hne Thlaapa Pathe ta a bipa Steven, Filip, Prokhoras, Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas, hne Antiok khy taata Judah biena luo a ngiepa Gentailpa Nikolaus kha amaa tlaw.
44006006	Iema kha lucuotuv tie hmiekunglie padaa yite, ama luv cunglie kha ama kuv khang yite thlaa ama chuopa.
44006007	Khazing bie ca aa ze hryly. Jerusalem khy chunglie kha zangtuv hluv hryly yite tluobyi hluvpuv zaw ta ca zangna ca amaa paw ra.
44006008	Khazing vihnyina hne cahrana ta a bipa Steven ta kharuehaana hne pahmungsana hmanglepa kha cawsaa zaw hrawlie ta a tue.
44006009	Cuorasala sii taata hya a zangpa tie biena-ing lie a pungpa chekha, Sairin, Alexandria, Silisia hne Asia taata a vawpa tie kha a daa yite Steven hneta bie amaa i.
44006010	Cuorasala Steven ca singna hne Thlaapa Pathe ta bie a ri nakawta te khu vayi.
44006011	Cacuonakawta, cawsaa chekha kha, “Moses hne Khazing thuo pachi pata bie a ripa na ma thyi,” ta riypata biesakue ama khe.
44006012	Cahaa cata cawsaazaapuv, uvthyi tie hne phungbie saya tie kha pasu yite Steven kha patuv yite bierituvphuv hmie luo kha ama vya chiykhyi.
44006013	A hmuo lipa pachangkhyituv kha ku yite iema cata, “Hingpapaa hingta a pathepa ma biena-ing hne phungbie kha a du pata bie ri pari te,
44006014	hing Nazareth khypa Zingsuv hingta hingpa Biena-ing hing para patlaa diy'a te Moses ta malie a pipa phungbie bangkhuo hing a thle diy'a ne tapata a ripa kha ma thyi,” tapata ama ri.
44006015	Bierituvphuv chunglie a tupa bangkhuo ta Steven ca taapuo pata mang yite a hmie ca avuoming hmie hneta aa lupa kha ama hmung.
44007001	Tluobyilepa ta Steven ca, “Hinghaahingta ama tapa hing aa hmuopa a cuo ma?” a ta.
44007002	Steven ta: “Uvnu zaw' a nata paa zaw naathlie tie ung! Mingpa Abraham ca Haran lie a aw hluo, Mesopotamia ruo lie a za aw ning kha a lesyipa Khazing ca ama'a lie kha zaa luo te,
44007003	‘Na ruo hne na tie na riy kha thuse la ica pahmung sa riypa ruo luo kha si tie,’ a za ta.
44007004	Cacuonakawta Khaldia ruo kha pya se te Haran khy lie kha a va aw. A paa a thiy khu taata Khazing ta capa taacata ata nama awnapa hingpa ruo luo hing a vya palaw.
44007005	Hingpa ruo lie hing phyipazaa pathlana khang hmuo ama kha ru a pi li raalaa pata, saata pakha hmuo a sa lipa khata nama hne na samingsahlaa cuotana hingpa ruo hing ru ta ica pi aa tapata bie a za kuo.
44007006	Khazing ta, “Na samingsahlaa zaw ca malie ruo lie kha khyche ta ama cuo aa. Kung zapaliy chung bangkhuo sii ta a ziy'a yite riethyi ama ang aa.
44007007	A re ama za hriepa pa mingphang tie kha kama ta ama bie ripa'a yi ang te capa khutaa cata pya'a yite hingpa hmang lie hing i ming ina pathuosa'a yi,” a ta.
44007008	Cakhutaata Khazing ta Abraham kha vangdawtena phung kha a biekuo pahmangsana ta a pi. Cacuonakawta Abraham ta a saacapaa Isak kha a puv khu taata ningcari a ta pata a vangdaw te te, Isak zaw ta a saacapaa Jakob kha cahaa cata a vangdaw te te, Jakob zaw ta mingpa tie pahraahlyihning kha ama vangdaw a te ra yi.
44007009	Ma mingpa tie ta Josef kha ihnyi yite Izipt ruo luo kha ama zaa. Cuorasala Khazing ta aw puo te
44007010	a za angpa ruvnaana chung bangkhuo taata hya a pazang sa. Izipt siepahruo Faro hmielie aa daa tiyta Khazing ta singna hne Faro minghmiepha hmung khuthe riypa kha a za pi. Cacuonakawta Faro ta Izipt ruo bangkhuo uvtuv byi hne a siepahruo ing uvtuv byi ta a tue.
44007011	Izipt ruo hne Kanaan ruo chung bangkhuo lie kha cakuo tlung te ruvnaana khuopuv ta a tlung nakawta ma mingchingmingvuo tie kha sa ning riypa zaa hmung khu vayi.
44007012	Cuorasala Jacob ta Izipt ruo liena sa a aw tapa kha a thyi tiyta ma mingchingmingvuo tie kha a yikhanapa a pathlie yi.
44007013	Yihningnapa a pathliena lie yi kha Josef ta a uvnu zaw kha a pachang sa yite Josef chungkhue kaw kha Faro ta a pachang yi.
44007014	Cakhutaata Josef ta a paa hne a ingchungkhue bangkhuo kha kya padaw sa yite ama bangkhuo ta sawsariy papangaa ama ta.
44007015	Cacuonakawta Jacob ca Izipt luo kha za si te ama hne ma mingchingmingvuo tie ca capa lieca ama thiy.
44007016	Ama riy ca Shekhem luo kha sikhyi yite Abraham ta Hamor mingphang tie'a lie ngu tuokaa ta a calyipa thluo lie kha ama paby.
44007017	Khazing ta Abraham'a lie a tuepa biekuona a tlingna cuo a vya ngie tiyta, Izipt lie ma cawsaa tie ca khuopuv ta ama pungzaa.
44007018	Cakhutaata Josef a pachang lipa siepahruopa ta Izipt ruo ca a vya uv.
44007019	Ma mingchingmingvuo tie kha za dung yite a za hrisaa yi, a puvthaapa haaseta kha thiy naa se yi tapata ingle luo a pathaw sa yi.
44007020	Capa cuo ning kha Moses ca za puv te Khazing hmielie kha a puvthesa. A paa ing chunglie kha thlathung chung mangchiy yite,
44007021	khungthing luo ama thaw ca Faro sacanungnung ta a saata tah a la te a sapa hrahring haata a mangchiy.
44007022	Cacuonakawta Moses ca Izipt singna bangkhuo kha pacaw sa pata cuote a bie lie hne a tuehriepa lie cahrana khuopuv ta a hnyi.
44007023	Kung sawliy a tling tiyta a mingphang Israel ming parie riypa kha a palung chunglie a kya puv.
44007024	Iema hrawlie pakha kha Iziptpapaa ta a za hrisaa pakha a hmung tiyta a phangkha cawsaapa kha a bya te Iziptpapaa kha a thie.
44007025	Khazing ta iema hya pazang riypata ama a hmuopa kha a phangkha cawsaa zaw ta ama pachang thlu'a mang tapata Moses ta a rue raalaa ca pachang vayi.
44007026	A mawluopa ta Israel ming pahning amaa tuvpa kha hmung yite a ripatiy yi. Thukhyi yite, “Liechung zaw niema ca uvnu tamuo nama cuo ta, khaapanakawma na maa tuv,” a ta yi.
44007027	Cuorasala a viesaapa a hrutuvpapaa khata Moses kha vya nuo te, “Ahungma nama hing kiema uvtuv hne ma bie ripa riypata caa chi?
44007028	Azuochaning Iziptpa na thiepa haakhata ma ina thie khing ciy?” a ta.
44007029	Capa bie ca a thyi pahne ta Moses ca a ruo te Midian ruo luo kha mingpe ta a va aw. Capa lieca saacapaa pahning a sa.
44007030	Kung sawliy khu taata Sinai Tluo a thaa, ruochung lie kha ruohraw a kuopa myi chung taata avuoming pakha kha ama'a lie aa luo.
44007031	Moses ca a hmungpa hmang cunglie kha a nang ta uo te mangpasie riypata a vaa ngie ca capa myi chung taacata,
44007032	‘Kama ca na mingchingmingvuo tie Khazing, Abraham, Isak hne Jakob Khazing tana i cuo,’ tapata Abyipa ueryi kha a thyi. Moses ca a cathangsa te a mang hmuo mang nguo vyi.
44007033	Cakhutaata Abyipa ta, ‘Na phyipakaw kha thlie tie, naa daana hmang hing a pathepa hmang tana a cuo,’ a ta.
44007034	Izipt lieta a awpa i cawsaa zaw ama te-angna hne ama riethyina kha hmung tli ang te amaa hrungna ueryi zaw kha i thyi tli. Iema khuo riypatana i za cung. Ata hingta a vaw tie, Izipt luo na ica pathlie aa,’ a ta.
44007035	“Ahungma kiema uvtuv riypa hne bieripa riypata caa chi?’ ta yite ama khing lipa Moses kha iema uvtuv hne hyapazangsatuv riypata ruohraw a kuopa myi hmuo pata Khazing ta iema'a luo a pathlie.
44007036	Iema kha Izipt ruo taata pyakhyi yite Izipt ruo, Riyliy Sepa, hne ruochung lie kha kharuehaa hmang hne pamangsana kha kung sawliy chung a tue.
44007037	Moses ca Israel ming kha, “Khazing ta kama ina pathliepa haahingta niema mingphang chung taahingta profet pakha aca pathliepa'a yi,” zaa ta tuvpa khatana a cuo.
44007038	Ama ca Sinai Tluo lieta bie zaa changpa avuoming hneta ruochung lie Israel ming a hmyana lieta a awpa, ima mingchingmingvuo tie hneta khy a sapa, hne a hringpa Khazing bie kiema'a luo a chiy the riypata zaa cuhluotuv tana a cuo.
44007039	Ma mingchingmingvuo tie ta a ri zaa ngie khing lipa yi ta za thaw yite Izipt ruo luo kaa riypa tlaku kha ama za khing.
44007040	Aaron kyihuo khata, ‘Luo malie a chiy riypa khazing tie kha malie tuepa tie, Izipt ruo taata malie a vya chiytuv Moses cunglie khaama a tlung tapa kha pachang va puv,’ ama ta.
44007041	Capa cuo ning ca cuetaata zuv kha tue yite saa thie yite hriykhung amaa ri; ama kuv ta ama tuepa kha pa-uvsathyina pyi ama tue.
44007042	Cuorasala iema kha Khazing ta a palise yite profet tie caa-uv chunglie ama capepa haakhata avuo aasiy kha a pabie sa yi. Capa caa-uv chunglie ca: Israel ming zaw, ruochung lie ta kung sawliy chung sahring thie ung cate namaa biepa kha kama i cuo ma?
44007043	Cuo va ang; Molok khazing thluodaa kha a phyale ung cate, nama kuv ta nama tuepa nama khazing Refan aasiy zuv kha nama cakele. Cacuonakawta niema ca Babilon vachi luo na ica thaw'a yi,” tapata aa cape.
44007044	Ma mingchingmingvuo tie khata Khazing kiema'a lie a aw tanapa ta ruochung lie kha thluodaa ama za hnyile. Capa thluodaa ca Khazing ta Moses a chaw ningta a pahmung sapa haakhata tue pata a cuo.
44007045	Thluodaa ama hmung khutaa khata, ma mingchingmingvuo tie, hne Joshua ca ama hmielie Khazing ta aa cadepa yi mingphang tie ruo ama lale ning kha capa thluodaa ca amaa sikhyile.
44007046	Capa thluodaa ca David chuo te khata capa lieca a aw. David ca Khazing minghmiepha hmung te Jakob Khazing cuota ing suokha sa riypata Khazing zaa hiepa tana a cuo.
44007047	Cuorasala ing a satuv tange ca Solomon tana a cuo.
44007048	Cadyiseca Cungnungce Khazing ca cawsaa kuv ta tuepa ing lie aw vyi; profet tie ta,
44007049	Vuoruo hing i tuna cuote, chuelyi hing i phyi chaana ta a cuo. Tuokhaapa ing ma ina sapa'a ungciy? Khaalie kha ma i pahyna hmang ca a cuo aa?
44007050	Hing hmang bangkhuo hing i kuv ta i tue ciepa cuo vama? a ta.
44007051	A nangpingpa, pathiypalung hne naathyina lieta vangdaw a te lipa tie! Nama mingchingmingvuo tie ta ama za tue tawpa haatana Thlaapa hing namaa du pari.
44007052	Profet pakha ta chuo nama mingchingmingvuo tie ta ama za hrisaa lipa ama aw ma? Aa dangpapaa a vaw riypa a rilupa tie kha za thie yite, ata niema zaw hing capa a dangpapaa a lyituv hne a thietuv ta nama vya cuo.
44007053	Avuoming ta ama za chawpa Khazing phungbie kha a cuhluopa ca niema ta nama cuo raalaa pata, capa phungbie a ziy lipa ca niema ngiethie ta nama cuo,” a ta.
44007054	Ca bie ca ama thyi tiyta, ama hi haa hringhruo te Steven kha ama haa dyi ama rie sue.
44007055	Cuorasala Steven ca Thlaapa Pathe ta bi te, vuoruo luo kha a mang tiyta Khazing rungnaana hne Khazing cacuo luo kuo ta Zingsuv a daapa kha a hmung.
44007056	Catiyta, “Mang tie ung, vuoruo ingchiypakaa kha a pahaw te Khazing cacuo luo kuo ta Cawsaa Saacapaa a daapa khana i hmung!” a ta.
44007057	Cuorasala ama naa kha a paping yite, khuopuv ta khi yite amaa ruochiy.
44007058	Khyle luo kha a dapahriy yite alung ta ama vaa. Alung ta a vaapa tie cata ama caw kha Saul ama tapa satliepa phyi thabaw lie ama papung.
44007059	Alung ta ama vaa nguoluo ning kha Steven ta, “Abyipa Zingsuv i thlaapa kha na cuhluo thi tie,” tapata thlaa a chuo.
44007060	A pakhuv pane te, “Abyipa ama suena hing a thyipa pari thi kha yi,” tapata khuopuv ta a khi khu taata a thiy. Saul zaw ta Steven ama thiepa kha a palung a tlingkhyi yi.
44008001	Capa cuo ning ca Jerusalem Khrihsaabuv lie kha hrisaathieruena khuopuv ta a tlung. Cacuonakawta lucuotuv tie ri li pata zangtuv bangkhuo ca Judea hne Samaria ruo chunglie kha amaa chepatlaa diy.
44008002	Khazing a ciyzaapa chekha ta Steven kha paby yite khuopuv ta caa yite a muochie ama sa.
44008003	Cuorasala Saul ca Khrihsaabuv kha para aa ting. Ingkha hnang ingkha ta cakuo te zangtuv tie kha canung capaa ta li pata a da yite thaw a pathla yi.
44008004	Zangtuv a chepatlaapa tie kha hmangting ta si yite thuophaabie ama ri.
44008005	Filip ca Samaria khypuv luo kha zuv te Messiah kaw thuophaabie kha a ri.
44008006	A ripa kha thyi yite a tuepa kharuehaa hmang kha ama hmung tiyta ama bangkhuo ta Filip bie kha a phata tah naa ama thlie.
44008007	Thlaapa pyalyipa kha cawsaa hluvpuv chung taata khuopuv ta khi yite ama pya, a pakyapa tie hne a phyi cabiepa tie a hluvpuv zaw ama tluo.
44008008	Cacuonakawta capa khypuv lieca palungtluona ta a bi.
44008009	Capa khypuv chunglie ca Simon ama tapa, pacuo a thepa pakha aw te Samaria ming zaw kha ama kharue a pahaa yi. Cawsaa ciemuopa pakha tana i cuo tapata aa rue.
44008010	Cawsaa bangkhuo, a cawcepa taata a lecepa te ta a bie kha naathlie yite, “Hing cawsaapa hing Khazing cahranapa, Alepa Cahrana tapa khatana a cuo, ama ta.
44008011	A pacuo khata iema kha cuo syipuv ama nang a pa-uo tli nakaw yi ta ama kha ama ziy.
44008012	Cuorasala Khazing pena thuophaabie hne Zingsuv ming Filip ta a u khyipa kha ama zang tiyta canung hne capaa hne tiy amaa naw.
44008013	Ama Simon hrahring zaw kha a zang ra. Tiy aa naw khu taata Filip kha a cakuona bangkhuo ta paziy te pamangsana hne kharuehaa hmanglepuv zaw kha a hmung tiyta a nang dyi a uo.
44008014	Jerusalem lie a awpa lucuotuv tie ta Samaria ming na Khazing bie a cuhluo yi tapa kha ama pachang tiyta Piter hne Johan kha iema'a luo ca ama pathlie.
44008015	Iema'a luo ama chiy tiyta Thlaapa Pathe kha ama cu riypata thlaa ama chuopa.
44008016	(Zingsuv ming ta tiy amaa nawpa dyi cuote Thlaapa Pathe kha ahungtahmuo ta ting valie yi).
44008017	Piter hne Johan ta ama luv cunglie kha ama kuv khang yite Thlaapa Pathe kha ama ting.
44008018	Lucuotuv tie ta ama cunglie ama kuv khang yite na Thlaapa ama ting tapa kha Simon ta a hmung tiyta, iema kha tuokaa pi yite,
