44008019	“Ama cunglie i kuv i khangpa ahunghmuo cuo sala Thlaapa ama ting the riypata hing cahrana hing kama zaw na pi ra tie ung,” a ta.
44008020	Cuorasala Piter ta, “Khazing pipa lasaw kha tuokaa ta calyi naa ting nakawta nama hne na tuokaa hne khata va lidie tie ung.
44008021	Khazing hmiekunglieta na pathiypalung a pha li nakawta ma re lie hing a te ra the vaciy, cuvu zaw hnyi vaciy.
44008022	Hing phalina hing a ngiepachiy la a ngiethena na hmung riypata Abyipa'a luo kha thlaa chuo tie.
44008023	Tahematapakieca nama ca ihnyina hne bi cate suena thaw chunglie a tlapa tana na cuo,” a ta.
44008024	Simon ta, “Na ripa suokha hmuo i cunglie a tlung li riypata thlaa na chuopa tie,” tapata a palie.
44008025	Piter hne Johan ca ama hmungpa hne amaa tawpa kha ama ri khu taata hne Abyipa bie kha ama phu khu taata Jerusalem luo kha kaa yite Samaria khyta hluvpuv lie kha thuophaabie ama kya phupaale.
44008026	Cakhutaata Abyipa avuoming pakha ta Filip kha, “Thu la sungluo kha sibung la Jerusalem taata Gaza luo a sipa luopuv luo kha sibung tie,” a ta. (Capa luopuv ca hmuo li tlipa luopuv tana a cuo).
44008027	Cacuonakaw thu te a si. Luopuv lie kha Ethiopia siepahruonung Kandeis a sue a thiy bangkhuo a kingtuvpa, naw a hnyi ciemuopa, Ethiopia tiydiypa abyi pakha a za aw. Ama ca Khazing abie riypata Jerusalem luo kha a khaw te
44008028	ing luo a kaale ningta a cuo; aruole cunglie kha a tu te profet Isaiah caa-uv kha a ri.
44008029	Thlaapa ta Filip kha, “Huepa aruole a thaa luo hue vaa tie,” a ta.
44008030	Aruole luo kha vaa ruo te profet Isaiah caa-uv a ripa kha a thyi ca, Filip ta, “Na ripa hing a siyluo na pachang ma?” a ta.
44008031	Ama ta, “Pakhakha ta ina pasiepa li pata ca tuokhaatama i pachang the aa?” a ta. Cakhutaacata Filip kha aruole luo kie riypata hry te a thaa lie a patu sa.
44008032	A za ri nguoluopa biepathepa ca: Ama ca thie riypa tuv haata sikhyi yite, A hming a ngutuv hmielie tuvtaata khi li pata a awpa haata, kaakha hmuo bie ri li patana a aw.
44008033	Nangzaana kha ang te a daakuotuv ahunghmuo hnyi vyi. Chuelyi taata a hringna lapa a cuo nakawta, A ciypathla ahunghmuo ri riy aw vayi.
44008034	Ethiopia tiydiypapaa cata Filip kha, “Ca hiehriy thi'a ang, profet ta a ripa hing ahung kaw tama a cuo? Ama kaw ma, pakhakha kaw ma?” a ta.
44008035	Catiyta Filip ta hningpa Caapathepa taahingta pathu pata Zingsuv kaw thuophaabie kha ama ca a chang.
44008036	Cahaa cata ama si bung nguoluo pata tiy awna luo kha ama chiy ca, capa a byipa cata, “Mang tie, tiy a aw hing; tiy a naw riypata khaapama naa pakhuo aa?” a ta.
44008037	(Filip ta, “na pathiy na palung yalya ta na zang kieca tiynawna hmung riypa na cuo,” a ta. Capapaa cata, “I zang, Zingsuv Khrih ca Khazing saacapaa tana a cuo tapa kha i zang,” a ta.)
44008038	Aruole kha padaa sa te, ama pahning ta tiy chung luo ca cung yite Filip ta tiy a naw.
44008039	Tiy chung taata ama kya pya ca Abyipa Thlaapa ta Filip kha la te a vie; Ethiopia byipa khata hmung the va tli, cadyiseca ama ca palung tluo ciemuo pata ing luo kha a si.
44008040	Filip ca Azotus khy lie kha a vya luo te, Sisaria a chiyna te luopuv lie khy bangkhuo khata thuophaabie a phule.
44009001	Capa cuo hrawning ca Saul ta Abyipa ziytuv tie kha thie riypata a pachiypahuo nguoluo yi. Tluobyilecepa'a luo kha vaa te,
44009002	Damaskas khy Judah ming apungna-ing uvtuv tie ta ama ama pachangna riypata caa kha a hie. Aa tingna ca capa khy lie kha Phungluo a ziytuv ama aw pata a cuo kieca canung capaa ta li pata patuv pata Jerusalem luo thaw pathla riypata a chiy riypata a cuo.
44009003	Damaskas khy luo a va chiy'a nangpa khata, sungkha puv ta vuoruo taata khena ta ama hne a cahriy kha a za khe.
44009004	Alyi lie kha a lie te ueryi suokha ta, “Saul, Saul, khaapanakawma ina hrisaathierue ciy?” a ta.
44009005	Saul ta, “Ahung tama na cuo, Abyipa? a ta. Capa ueryi cata, “Na hrisaathieruepa Zingsuv tana i cuo.
44009006	Thu la khypuv chung luo kha vaa ngie tie, na tue riypa kha chang pata na cuo aa,” a ta.
44009007	A khytlawhnepa tie ca a ca-ang ta ama ca-ang, tahematapakieca ueryi dyi kha thyi yite ahunghmuo hmung vayi.
44009008	Saul ca a lyi taakhata kya thu te a ming a padyi raalaa ca khaahmuo hmung the vyi; cacuonakawta a kuv ta ca-yale yite Damaskas khychung luo kha amaa ngiekhyi.
44009009	Ningthung chung a ming hmung li pata, hne ning li dang li pata a aw.
44009010	Damaskas khy chunglie ca Ananias ama tapa ziytuv pakha a aw. Muocuo suokha hmung te Abyipa ta, “Ananias,” a ta. Ama ta, “Abyipa, hinglie hing na i aw,” a ta.
44009011	Abyipa ta, “A pachie la Luo Aa dangpa ama tapa luopuv luo kha vaa la; Judas ing lie kha Tarsas khypa Saul ama tapa kha a aw ma tapata va hiehriy tie yi. Ama ca thlaa a chuo nguoluo ning ta cuo te,
44009012	Ananias ama tapapaa ta a luv cunglie a kuv khang te a ming a hmung pakhaa thena riypata thlaa a chuopa nguoluopa kha muocuo ta a hmung,” a ta.
44009013	Cuorasala Ananias ta, “Abyipa, hingpapaa kaw hing cawsaa hluvpuv'a taata i thyi tli, Jerusalem lie a awpa na cawsaa pathepa zaw cunglie ta hmangpha lipa khazaa ma a tue tapa hne
44009014	hingpa lie zaw hing nama ming caa upa zaw bangkhuo patuv riypata tluobyilecepa'a taata nawhnyina a la patana a cuo,” a ta.
44009015	Cuorasala Abyipa ta, “Cakuo tie, tahematapakieca ama ca Jentail ming hne siepahruo tie'a lie, hne Israel ming hraw luo i ming a phyatuv hne a pachang satuv riypata i tlawpa i cehre tana a cuo.
44009016	Kama hrahring ta hingpapaa hing kama kawlieta khatluv tama a te-ang tapa kha ica pahmung sa aa,” a ta.
44009017	Cacuonakawta Ananias ca ingchung luo kha a ngie te, Saul luv cunglie kha a kuv a khang khu taata, “Uvnu Saul, Hingpa luo naa vawnapa luopuv lie nama'a lie a luopa Abyipa Zingsuv ta na ming a hmung pakhaa riypa hne Thlaapa Pathe ta na bi riypata kama hing ina vya pathlie,” a ta.
44009018	Sungkhabala ta ngaaphuvhling haata a tapa kha Saul ming taata tla te a ming ca a hmung khu pakhaa. Cakhutaata thu te tiynawna a ang.
44009019	Cakhutaata sa ning te thaazuo a hnyi pakhaa. Saul ca Damaskas khy lie a awpa ziytuv tie'a lie kha ning pachangta chung a aw.
44009020	Apungna-ing lie kha, “Zingsuv ca Khazing Saacapaa tana a cuo,” tapa kha a phu.
44009021	A bie ripa a thyipa bangkhuo kha ama nang ta uo te, Hingpapaa hing Jerusalem lie Zingsuv a zangtuv tie a paratuv kha cuo vama? Iema kha patuv pata tluobyi tie'a luo chiykhyi riypata hingpa hmang luo a vawpa kha cuo vama? ama ta.
44009022	Saul ca cahrana hneta bi viele hryly te Zingsuv ca Messiah tana a cuo tapata a ripa khata Damaskas khy lie a awpa Judah ming kha ama palung a pataw a pamuo yi.
44009023	Ning syipuv khu taata Judah ming ta thie riypata ama rawpa kha
44009024	Saul ta a pachang. Ama thie khu riypa khata thlake bangkhuo kha chungzuo ta ama huo,
44009025	cuorasala ama a ziytuv tie ta pasyi lie khung yite zuo ta dya cakuo khyi yite khy dungkhuona piehu khue taata ama pachung.
44009026	Jerusalem luo a chiy tiyta ziytuv tie a taw riypa kha aa zue; cuorasala ziytuv a cuo ra hrahring tli tapa kha ama zang li nakawta ama bangkhuo ta ama kha ama ciy.
44009027	Cuorasala Barnabas ta lucuotuv tie'a luo kha vaakhyi te luopuv lieta Abyipa a hmung na zya, Abyipa ta ama'a lie bie a ripa, Damaskas lieta Khazing bie a phuna kaw kha a chang yi.
44009028	Cacuonakaw Jerusalem lieta iema'a lie kha hyazangsa pata aw te Abyipa ming ta riephasa pata phung a ri.
44009029	Grik ryi a cyipa Judah ming zaw hne khata bie a rue yite a i zaw amaa i, cuorasala iema ta ama kha thie amaa nang.
44009030	Khapa kaw kha zangtuv tie ta ama thyi tiyta ama kha Sisaria luo paphya yite Tarsas luo ama pasi.
44009031	Capa cuo ning ca Judea ruo, Galilee ruo hne Samaria ruo lie a awpa khrihsaabuv tie'a lieca diena aw te a kiethaw ciemuo. Abyipa ciyzaana hne hring yite Thlaapa Pathe hnaanguona chunglie ama aw nakawta mingluv zaw ama hluv hryly.
44009032	Piter ca khyzaa ta a awpa zangtuv tie a tlawlepa yi ta Lidda lie a awpa a mingpathepa tie'a luo kha a chiy.
44009033	Capa lieca a pakya nakawta kung cari chung a ziena lie a laa tlipa Ainias ama tapapaa kha a hmung.
44009034	Piter ta, “Ainias, Zingsuv Khrih na caa patluo sa tli, thu la na pangphaa kha lang tie,” a ta. Ainias ca sungkha ta a thu.
44009035	Lidda lie hne Sharon lie a awpa bangkhuo khata hmung yite Abyipa'a luo amaa vya pali.
44009036	Joppa khy lie kha Tabitha ama ta nung ziytuv pakha aw te Grik ryi taca Dorkas ama ta. Ama ca hmangphapa tue pari te a siypasapa tie a bya paripa tana a cuo.
44009037	Capa cuo ning kha pasa te a thiy. A riy ca pasiy yite cungluo duo lieta ama pasing.
44009038	Lidda khy ca Joppa khy hne khata a ngie te, Joppa lieta Piter a awpa kha ziytuv tie ta ama pachang nakawta cawsaa pahning pathlie yite, “A catli pata kiema'a luo a vaw la,” tapata paa ama va pakie sa.
44009039	Cacuonakaw Piter ca a pachie te iema hne cata a si. A va chiy pahne a cung duo luo kha ama kie khyi. Nunghlyi bangkhuo ta a thaa lie kha a vya daa yite ama caapuo pata a hring chung ta a taapa pa yi buohryicungle hne caw hrangpa zaw kha ama pahmung.
44009040	Piter ta iema kha ale luo papya yite cakhutaacata a pakhuv pane te thlaa a chuo. A riy luo kha a pali te, “Tabitha, thu tie,” a ta. A ming kya padyi te Piter kha a hmung ca aa kya tu.
44009041	Piter ta a kuv kha hluo te a padaa. Cakhutaata a mingpathepa tie hne nunghlyi zaw kha u yite a hring tapa kha a pahmung yi.
44009042	Capa thuohlaa ca Joppa khy kha a ze diy te cawsaa hluvpuv ta Abyipa kha ama zang.
44009043	Piter ca Joppa khy lieta Simon ama tapa savang re a hriepapaa'a lie kha cuo syipuv a aw.
44010001	Sisaria khy lieta Kornelias ama tapapaa pakha za aw te, “Italy Rieka Buv,” ama tapa Rom rieka tie zaa uvtuv riebyi ta a cuo.
44010002	Ama ca a ingchungkhue tie yalya hneta biena luota a pakangpahaasapa hne Khazing a ciyzaapa, siypasa tie kha pahyasa pata pi yite Khazing'a luo thlaa a chuo pari pata a cuo.
44010003	Ningkha, zuoluo caw siymaluo pathung hraw ta muocuo hmung te, capa chunglie ca avuoming pakha a vya ngie te, “Kornelias,” tapata a u pakha siephele khata a hmung.
44010004	Avuoming ca a ciysapuo pata mangpasie te, “Khaapama, Abyipa,” a ta. Avuoming ta, “Na thlaachuona hne siypasa na pipa ca vuoruo luo kha kie te Khazing ta maw vyi.
44010005	Ata hingta Joppa luo kha Piter ama tapa Simon va ku riypata cawsaa pathlie la,
44010006	ama ca riyliy kielie a awpa, savang re a hriepa Simon ing lie khana a tlung,” a ta.
44010007	Ama'a lie bie a ripa avuoming ama cakuo pahneta sii pahning hne, biena luota a pakangpahaasapa ama a mangchiytuv rieka pakha kha u yite,
44010008	hmang a cuopa bangkhuo kha a chang khu taayita joppa luo kha a pathlie yi.
44010009	A mawluopa zuoluo caw, vaa kupa tie khypuv luo ama va pha'a nang caw khata Piter ca ingthlue luo kha thlaa chuo riypata a kie.
44010010	Piter ca a nang diy te sa a ning khing; sa ama tue nguoluopa khata muocuo a hmung.
44010011	Vuoruo a pahaw te pang haata a tapa hmang suokha, a kiy kiy paliy ta alyi luo ama za pathlapa kha a hmung.
44010012	A chunglie ca phyipaliypa saruopa a phangphang, alyi lie aa thiylepa saruopa a phangphang hne pavaa a phangphang ta ama aw.
44010013	Ueryi suokha ta, “Thu tie, Piter, thie yi la ning tie,” a ta.
44010014	Cuorasala Piter ta, “Ning'a va ang Abyipa, a pyalyipa hne a pathe lipa hmang ca khaahmuo ning buo va ang,” a ta.
44010015	Ueryi ta a yihningnapa za chang pakhaa te, “Khazing ta a pathe pata a sapa ca nama ta a pyalyipa ne ta khu vaciy,” a ta.
44010016	Cahaa cata yi thung a cuo khu taata capa hmang ca sungkha ta vuoruo luo ama lathaw pakhaa.
44010017	Piter ca i hmungpa muocuo hing a siyluo khaapatama a cuo aa tapata a kharue a haasa ningta Kornelias ta a pathliepa cawsaa tie kha tlangkhy ama vya chiy. Simon ing kha hiehriy yite thlake a thaa lie amaa daa nguoluo.
44010018	Vya u yite, “Piter ama tapa Simon kha hingpa lie hing a aw maw? ama ta.
44010019	Piter ca muocuo a hmungpa kaw a pacuo nguoluo ning kha, Thlaapa ta, “Simon, cawsaa pathung na caa huv nguoluo yi,
44010020	Thu la cung tie, a paluolue li pata ziy tie yi, kama ta i vya pathliepa tana ama cuo,” a ta.
44010021	Cacuonakaw Piter ca cawsaa tie'a luo kha cung te, “Kama hingna nama huv nguoluopapaa ta a cuo ang; nama'a vaw hnuochuopa khaapatama a cuo?” a ta yi.
44010022	Iema ta, “Riebyipa Kornelias ta malie a pathliepa tana ma cuo. Ama ca a dangsapa hne Khazing a ciyzaapa ta cuote, Judah ming bangkhuo ta ama pa-uvsathyipa ta a cuo. Na bie ripa thyi riypata Khazing avuoming pakha ta a ing luo naa vaw riypata ama kha bie a chang patana a cuo,” ama ta.
44010023	Cacuonakawta Piter ta iema kha ku yite ing aa patlung sa yi. A mawluopa ta a pachie te iema hneta a si; Joppa taata zangtuv chekha zaw ama si ra.
44010024	A hezuoningpa ta Sisaria ama pha. Kornelias ca a tieriy hne a viesaa zaw kha ku yite ama kha ama za mangkhuo nguoluo.
44010025	Peter ing luo a chiy pahne Kornelias ta a hladaw te a phyi thabaw lie vaa bu te aa bie.
44010026	Piter ta ama kha pathu te, “A daa tie, Kama zaw cawsaa tana i cuo ra,” a ta.
44010027	Bie a ripuo pata ing chung luo kha a ngie ca cawsaa hluvpuv amaa tupa kha hmung yite,
44010028	“Judah ming pakha ca Jentail ming a viesaa riypa hne parie riypa hing phungbie ta a thlu tapa ca niema hrahring ta nama pachang; cuorasala ahungkhahmuo a pyalyipa hne a pathe lipa ta i hmung li riypata Khazing ta ina pahmung sa mangtli.
44010029	Cacuonakawta ina vya paku sa tiy ung cata i li pata i vya ziy yi. Khaapanakawma ina vya paku sa ungciy tapa kha ata hing na chang tie ung,” a ta yi.
44010030	Kornelias ta, “Ma hnang luo ata tiy siymaluo pathung hingta, i ing chunglie thlaa i chuo nguoluo pata sungkhapuv ta pang ruopa a buvpa cawsaa pakha i hmielie a vya daa te,
44010031	‘Kornelias, Khazing ta na thlaachuona kha thyi te siypasa na byanapa zaw maw vyi.
44010032	Cacuonakawta Joppa luo kha cawsaa pathlie la Piter ama tapa Simon kha va paku sa tie yi; ama ca riyliy kielie a awpa, savang re a hriepa Simon ing lie khana a aw aa,’ ina ta.
44010033	Cacuonakawta nama ca a catli pata ca vya paku sa yi ang te, nama zaw ngie na chi cate naa vaw. Cacuonakawta ata hing kiema bangkhuo ca Khazing hmielie aw pate, Khazing ta ri riypata aca changpa bangkhuo naathlie riypata ma cuo tli,” tapata a palie.
44010034	Cakhutaata Piter ta thukhyi yite, “Khazing ta cawsaa pahlyipale vyi tapa kha i pachang,
44010035	cuorasala khaapa mingphang ta a cuo zaw ama kha ciyzaa te aa dangpa hmang a tuepa bangkhuo ca Khazing ta a cuhluo yi.
44010036	Cawsaa bangkhuo Abyipa ta a cuopa Zingsuv Khrih'a taata diena ca Khazing ta Israel ming'a luo a pi yi tapa kha nama pachang.
44010037	Johan ta tiynawna kaw a ri khu taata Galilee taata pathu pata Judah pe bangkhuo capa thuohlaa aa zepa kha nama pachang.
44010038	Khazing ta a aw puo nakawta tuokhaatama Nazareth khypa Zingsuv kha Thlaapa Pathe hne cahrana bya te, tuokhaapa hmang phapa kha tue tema setaa tuechiena rawlie a awpa bangkhuo kha a patluo sa yi tapa zaw nama pachang.
44010039	Kiema ca Judah ruo chunglie hne Jerusalem lieta a tuepa bangkhuo kha a hmungtuv hne pachangtuv tana ma cuo. Ama kha vieluo cunglie pathlie yite ama thie.
44010040	Cuorasala Khazing ta ningthung khu taata thiyna chung taa pathu pakhaa te
44010041	cawsaa bangkhuo'a lie cuo li pata Khazing ta pachangkhyituv ta aa tlawpa kiema'a lie kha aa luo. Thiyna taata a thupakhaa khu taata ama hne ma ning ma dang pakhaw.
44010042	Ama ta, cawsaa zaw kha thuophaabie chang riypa hne ama ca Khazing ta a hringpa hne a thiypa tie bie a rituv riypata a chipa kha pachangkhyituv cuo riypata malie a chang.
44010043	Ama a zangpa bangkhuo a ming ta sue a ngiethena hmung riypa kaw kha profet bangkhuo ta ama za ri, a ta kha,” a ta yi.
44010044	Piter ta capa bie a ri nguoluo ning ca bie a thyipa bangkhuo cunglie kha Thlaapa Pathe a za cung.
44010045	Thlaapa Pathe lasaw ca Jentail ming cunglie zaw kha bya pata cuote, iema ta thyiliparyi kha cyi yite Khazing ama pathuosapa kha ama hmung tiyta,
44010046	Piter hneta a vaw rapa vangdaw a tepa zangtuv tie ca ama nang dyi a uo. Cakhutaata Piter ta,
44010047	“Ahungma kiema haata Thlaapa Pathe a hmung rapa hingpa cawsaa zaw hing tiy ta tiynawna ang riypa kha a thlu khu'a yi?” a ta.
44010048	Cacuonakaw ta Zingsuv Khrih ming ta tiynawna pi riypata bie a pi yi. Cakhutaata Piter ca ning syi vie malie aw khyi caw thi la ta yite ama thlu.
44011001	Judah pe lie a awpa lucuotuv tie hne zangtuv tie ta Jentail ming na Khazing bie a cuhluo ra yi tapa kha ama thyi.
44011002	Cacuonakawta Piter kha Jerusalem luo a khaw ca vangdaw a tepa zangtuv tie ta caw-yi yite,
44011003	“Khaapanakawma vangdaw te lipa tie a khe yi cate iema hne sa na ning hne yi?” ama ta.
44011004	Cakhutaata Piter ta ama kaw kha suokha hnang suokha ta chang yite,
44011005	“Joppa lie thlaa i chuo nguoluo ning kha muocuo suokha i hmung. Vuoruo taa khiy ta a kiy kiy paliy a awpa pang kusapa suokha kha i thaa lie ama za pachung.
44011006	A ngieta tah i mang pasie ca, phyipaliypa ruosaa hne ingzue sahring, saahruo, aa thiy ta a thiylepa saruopa, hne pavaa zaw kha i hmung yi.
44011007	Ueryi suokha zaw kha thyi ang te, ‘Piter, thu la, thie yi la ning tie,’ ina ta.
44011008	Cuorasala kama ta, “Abyipa, cuo the'a vyi; a pyalyipa hne a pathe lipa suokha hmuo i pakaa luo a ngie buo vyi,” i ta.
44011009	Cuorasala vuoruo taa ueryi a yihningnapa thyi pakhaa ang te, ‘Khazing ta a pathe a tapa kha nama ta a pya ta'a vaciy,’ ina ta.
44011010	Cahaa cata yi thung a cuo khu taata a bangkhuo ta vuoruo taata amaa zaa da pakhaa.
44011011	Capa cuota liecata Sisaria taata vya pathliepa cawsaa pathung ca ma awnapa ing luo kha ama vya chiy.
44011012	Thlaapa ta iema hne si riypa hne iema hne kiema a lala lie pahlyipalena tue li riypata ina chang. Hingpa uvnu pacaruv tie hne hingta si pakhaa pate Kornelias ing luo ca maa ngie.
44011013	Ama ta a ing chunglie avuoming pakha zaa daa te, ‘Joppa luo kha cawsaa pathlie yi la Piter ama tapa Simon kha va paku sa yi;
44011014	nama hne na chungkhue yalya ta khuona nama hmung riypata ama ta thuophaabie kha aca chang'a yi,’ a tapa kha malie a chang.
44011015	Iema'a lie bie ri hruo i thu pahne a hruothu ningta kiema'a lie a cuopa haakhata iema cunglie kha Thlaapa Pathe a za cung.
44011016	Cakhupahne Abyipa ta, ‘Johan ca tiy ta tiynawna kha a pi, cuorasala niema ca Thlaapa Pathe tana tiynaw pata nama cuo aa,’ a za tapa kha i kya thyi.’
44011017	Zingsuv Khrih ma zang nakawta Khazing ta malie a pipa lasaw kha iema zaw a pi ra kie yi ca Khazing kha pakhuo khu riypata kama ca ahung tama i cuo?” a ta.
44011018	Capa bie ca ama thyi tiyta vielie riypa hnyi li tlipa yi ta, Khazing kha pathuosa yite, “Khazing na Jentail ming zaw hing sue a ngiepachiy pata hring riypa cuophaa a pi ra yi,” ama ta.
44011019	Steven kawlieta hrisaathieruena ang yite a chepatlaapa tie kha Fonisia, Saipras hne Antiok te khata chiy yite Judah ming'a lie dyi kha thuophaabie ama ri.
44011020	Cuorasala iema hraw lieca Saipras ruo ming hne Sairin ming aw ra yite iema cata Antiok luo kha si yite Abyi Zingsuv kaw Thuophaabie ca Grik ryi a cyipa Judah ming 'a lie zaw kha ama phu.
44011021	Abyipa cahrana ca iema'a lie aw te cawsaa hluvpuv ta zang yite Abyipa'a luo kha amaa pali.
44011022	Capa thuohlaa ca Jerusalem Khrihsaabuv ta thyi yite Barnabas kha Antiok luo ca ama pathlie.
44011023	Antiok luo ca chiy te Khazing vihnyina kha a hmung tiyta a palung tluo hringhruo te iema kha ama palang ta Abyipa'a lie kha zangtluo aa tlasa pata ama aw pari riypa hne amaa pipase pari riypata a pasu yi.
44011024	Ama ca cawsaa phapa, Thlaapa Pathe hne zangna ta a bipa cuote cawsaa hluvpuv kha Abyipa'a luo a chiy yi.
44011025	Cakhutaata Barnabas ca Saul kha huv riypata Tarsas luo kha si te,
44011026	a hmung tiyta Antiok luo a vya chiyle. Kung kha chung bangkhuo Khrihsaabuv hne khata a taw yite cawsaa hluvpuv kha ama pacuv. Hingpa Antiok lie hingna ziytuv tie kha, “Khrihsaa,” tapata ama za u taa.
44011027	Khapa cuo ning kha profet chekha ca Jerusalem taata Antiok luo kha ama si.
44011028	Iema hraw taata pakha, a ming Agabas ama tapapaa kha a daa te chuelyi cung bangkhuo ta khuopuv ta cakuo a tlung aa tapa kha Thlaapa cahrana ta a rilu. (Capa cakuo ca Klaudias siepahruo a cuo ning khana a tlung).
44011029	Ziytuv tie khata iema ama ta khuna cyicuo ta Judah ruo lie a awpa zangtuv tie kha a byana pi riypata khue khuo yite,
44011030	byanapa ca Barnabas hne Saul kuv ta khrihsaa uvthyi tie'a luo kha ama paphya.
44012001	Capa cuo hrawning ca Siepahruo Herod ta khrihsaa ming chekha kha a hrisaathierue yi.
44012002	Johan uvnu Jeim kha zueziy ta a pathie sa yi.
44012003	Hingpa hing ta Judah ming palung a patluo sa yi tapa kha a hmung tiyta Piter zaw kha patuv aa nang. Hing hmang hing thiynung phuv lipa viechuo pyi cuo ningta a cuo.
44012004	A patuv khu taata thaw pathla te phuvkha lie rieka papaliy a awpa rieka phuvpaliy kha rie a pave sa yi. Lawsena pyi khu taata cawsaazaapuv hmielie a bie ripa riypata aa tingpa a cuo.
44012005	Cacuonakawta Piter ca thaw chunglie aw te cadyiseca khrihsaabuv ta ama cuota Khazing'a luo kha khuopuv ta thlaa ama chuo.
44012006	Herod ta mawluo zaapuv hmielie bie i ripa aa a ta ningpa zuo ta Piter ca thaabuoliriy suohning ta ciy yite rieka pahning a lala lie kha a zie. Thaw ing chiypakaa zaw kha ama huo.
44012007	Sungkha ta Abyipa avuoming pakha a luo te thaw-ing chunglie ca khena ta a ka. Avuoming ta Piter ca a ke lie kha cabe te, “A catli pata thu!” ta te a pahra. A kuv taata thaabuoliriy ca a pathluo te a tla.
44012008	Avuoming cata, “Na tesaw kha a saw la na phyipakaw kha a pakaw tie,” a ta. Piter ta a changpa haa cata a tue. Cakhutaa avuoming ta, “Na pang kha a buv la na ziy,” a ta.
44012009	Piter ta thaw-ing le luo kha ziyle te cadyiseca avuoming ta a tuepa hing a cuo sasawpa a cuo ma tapa kha a nang vuo vyi; muocuo na i hmung tapata a rue.
44012010	Rie a vepa tie ama huonapa thaw ingchiypakaa suokhanapa hne suohningnapa law yite khychung luo pyanapa thaathlakelepa luo ama chiy. Thaathlake ca ama ta tah a pahaw te ale luo pya yite luopuv lie ama cakuole pata avuoming ta a thuse.
44012011	Piter ca a palung kya vuo te, “Ata hing ca i pasie tli, Abyipa ta a avuoming kha za pathlie te Herod kuv chung taa hne Judah ming bangkhuo amaa mangkhuopa taata ina khuo tli,” a ta.
44012012	A kya pachangpasie pahne ta a ming hrangpa ta Marka ama tapa Johan a nung Mary ing luo kha a vaa.
44012013	Piter ta ingle luo ingchiypakaa kha a cakhaw ca a changtaapa nung Roda ama ta nung ta a kya chaw.
44012014	Piter ueryi tapa kha a pachang nakawta a palung tluotuv te ingchiy pahaw cuo pata ing chung luo kha a ruo te Piter na ingchiypakaa lie a daa thluo e,” tapata a pathyi yi.
44012015	Iema ta, “Ngaa tli kanaa ca maw?” ama ta. Cuorasala a cuo hrahring ne, a ta ngiethie nakawta, “Aa vuoming muo a cuo'a lie,” ama ta.
44012016	Capa chung bangkhuo ca Piter ca ingchiy kha a cakhaw byalya; ingchiy kya pahaw yite ama hmung ca ama nang ta a uo thluo.
44012017	Piter ta a dieta tah aw riypata a kuv pazuu te Khazing ta tuokhaatama thaw-ing taata a papya sa tapa kha a chang khu taayita, “Hingpa kaw hing Jeim hne zangtuv tie kha chang mya ung,” a ta yi. Cakhutaa pya te a hrang luo a cakuo se yi.
44012018	Maw khy a dyi tiyta rieka tie ca Piter khaapama a cuo tapa kawlie kha amaa taw amaa hrie patlaw ciemuo.
44012019	Herod ta pahuv sa yite ama hmung khu li taata thaw-ing rievetuv tie kha bie hiehriyna a tue khu taayita thie riypata bie a pi yi. Cakhutaata ama ca Judea ruo taakhata Sisaria luo si te cuo pachangta chung a aw.
44012020	Herod ca Tair ming hne Sidon ming cunglie kha a hi a haa. Cacuonakaw ta iema ca a phuv ta vya chiy yite siepahruo ing uvtuv byi Blastas kha amaa ku khu taata siepahruo kha a rena tue riypata amaa nue. Tahematapakieca ama ruo lie sa ning riypa kha siepahruopa ruo taata a vawpa a cuo nakawta a cuo.
44012021	Ama thli ciepa ningkhue a vya chiy tiyta Herod ca a siepahruo cawsie kha a tue te siepahruo thude lie a tu te cawsaazaapuv'a lie kha bie a ri.
44012022	Cawsaa zaw cata, “khazing ueryi tana a cuo, cawsaa ueryi ta cuo vyi,” ama ta.
44012023	Herod ca rungnaana kha Khazing a pi li nakawta Abyipa avuoming ta sungkha ta tuv te alungpa ta ce yite a thiy.
44012024	Cuorasala Khazing bie ca lethaw te aa ze hryly.
44012025	Barnabas hne Saul ca ama re ama patlung khu taata, Jerusalem luo kha kaa yite a ming hrang ta Marka ama tapa Johan kha amaa chiyle.
44013001	Antiok khrihsaabuv lie kha profet hne pacuvtuv chekha ama aw. Iema ca, Barnabas, Nikar tapata ama kupa Simeon, Sairin khypa Lusias, Herod bierina zung lie abyi a cuopa Minian hne Saul ta ama cuo.
44013002	Sa ning a uv yite Khazing ama biena lie kha Thlaapa Pathe ta, “Barnabas hne Saul hing i changpa yi re kha ama hrie the riypata na sangpa pathlyi ung,” a ta.
44013003	Cakhutaata sa ning a uvna hne thlaachuona ta ama luv cunglie kha ama kuv khang yite ama pathlie.
44013004	Barnabas hne Saul ca Thlaapa Pathe pathliepa ama cuopa haata Seleusia khy luo kha si yite capa taacata Saipras luo kha tiypalaw ta ama si.
44013005	Salamis luo kha chiy yite Judah ming apungna-ing chunglie kha Khazing bie ama phu. Iema a byatuv riypata Johan kha amaa chiy.
44013006	Parala ruochung bangkhuo kha si yite Pafos khy luo te ama chiy ca pacuo a thepa, Judah profetpakhipa, a ming Bar-Zingsuv ama tapa kha amaa taw.
44013007	Ama ca ruo-uvtuv Sergius Paulus ama tapa, cawsaa sing ciemuopa, Khazing bie a thyi khing nakawta Barnabas hne Saul a kutuvpapaa a viesaa ta a cuo.
44013008	Pacuo a thepa Elimas (Grik ming) ta ruo-uv byipa kha Khazing a zang the li riypata Barnabas hne Paul kha a daakhuo yi.
44013009	Cuorasala Paul ama tapa Saul ca Thlaapa Pathe ta bi te, ama kha taapuo pata mang te,
44013010	“Setaa saacapaa, hmangpha bangkhuo cariepa, hanghiena hne phalina ta a bipa, aa dangpa Abyipa bie kha hanghie pata tue riypa hing taw buo'a va cama?
44013011	Naathlie tie, Abyipa kuv ta nama kha caa du'a te, cuokha chung na ming cue'a te ningkhepa kha hmung khu'a vaciy,” a ta. Sungkha ta myiching hne zingna ta pahlaw te a kuv ta a ca-yale riypa cawsaa kha pathuole te a huv.
44013012	Ruo-uv byipa ta hmang a cuopa kha a hmung tiyta Khazing kha a zang, tahematapakieca Abyipa kaw ama pacuvpa khata a kharue a pahaa sa.
44013013	Cakhutaata Paul hne a viesaa tie ca Pafos taakhata Pamfilia ruo Perga khy luo kha tiypalaw ta ama si. Cadyiseca Johan ca iema kha thuse yite Jerusalem luo a kaa.
44013014	Cuorasala iema ca Perga taakhata Pisidia ruo Antiok luo kha ama pha. Sabbath ning kha apungna-ing luo vaa yite amaa tu.
44013015	Phungbie caa-uv hne profet caa-uv ama ri khu taata apungna-ing uvtuv byipa ta iema kha, “Uvnu zaw pasuna bie nama ri khingpa a aw kieca ri tie ung,” a ta yi.
44013016	Cacuonakawta Paul ca a daa te a kuv a pazuu khu taata bie ri hruo aa thu: Israel ming hne Khazing abiepa Jentail ming zaw i bie hing naathlie tie ung.
44013017	Hingpa Israel ming Khazing hingta ma mingchingmingvuo tie kha a tlaw yite Izipt ruo lie khy ama sa ning kha mingphang lepa ta a tue yi. A cahrapa a kuv ta capa ruo taacata a pyakhyi yi.
44013018	Kung sawliy chung ruochung lie kha a mangsang yi.
44013019	Kanaan ruo chunglie mingphang phang sariy kha a para khu taayita kung zapaliy sawngaa chung capa ruo ca ru ta a pi yi.
44013020	Cakhutaata bieripatuv kha profet Samuel chuo te ta a pi yi.
44013021	Cakhutaata siepahruo kha a hie yite Khazing ta Benjamin mingphang Kish saacapaapa Saul kha pi yite kung sawliy chung siepahruo a cuo.
44013022	Ama kha phie te David kha siepahruo a pacuo sa. Ama kawlieta Khazing ta a ripa ca: ‘Kama palung naa hmungpa Jesse saacapaa David kha i hmung tli; tue se tapata i khingpa bangkhuo kha ama hingna a tue aa,’ a ta.
44013023	Hingpapaa ciypathla chung taahingta Khazing ta bie a za kuo tlipa haa yi khata Israel ming ca khuotuv Zingsuv kha a pi yi.
44013024	Zingsuv aa vaw hluo khata, Johan ta Israel ming'a lie kha sue a ngiepachiyna hne aa patuvpa tiy a nawna kaw kha a u khyilu tli.
44013025	Johan ca a re a tlung'a nang caw khata, “Kama hing ahung tapata ma ina rue ungciy? Kama ca nama huo nguoluopapaa khata cuo va ang; cuorasala ama ca kama hnang luo taata a vaw'a te kama ca a phyipakaw riy pathluo riypata hmuota a tla va ang,’ a ta yi.
44013026	“I uv i nu zaw, Abraham chung-khue ciypathla zaw'a nata, a hrangpa Khazing a ciyzaapa zaw, khuona thuophaa ca kiema'a luo pi pata ma cuo tli.
44013027	Tahematapakieca Jerusalem lie a awpa tie hne ama uvthyi tie ta ama kha za pachang lipa yi ta sabbath ning kyry ta ama ripa profet tie bie zaw kha a siyluo thyi khu the vayi. Cadyiseca ama ama thiena thue khata profet bie kha ama patling sa.
44013028	Thie tluo aa tlapa suena a cunglie ama hmung li thluo pata thie riypata Pilat kha ama hie.
44013029	Ama kaw Caapathepa lie aa capepa bangkhuo ama tue diy khu taata, vieluo cung taakhata pachung yite thluo lie ama paby.
44013030	Cuorasala Khazing ta thiyna taata pathu te,
44013031	ama hneta Galilee taata Jerusalem te khy a tlawhne tawpa tie'a lie kha ning hluvpuv aa luo. Iema ca cawsaa zaw'a lie kha a pachangkhyituv ta ama cuo.
44013032	Khazing ta ma mingchingmingvuo tie'a lieta bie a za kuopa yi thuophaabie khana ma ca vya phya yi.
44013033	Zingsuv kha pathu te kiema a samingsahlaa zaw cunglie hing a patling sa mangtli. Salm hlahningna lieta: Nama ca i saacapaa tana na cuo; Ata ning hing na paa tana i cuo,” tapata a cape.
44013034	Thiyna taata pathu sa tli te, thuvna luo khatiy tahmuo a kaa li tli riypa kaw kha Khazing ta a ripa ca, ‘David'a lieta a pathepa biekuona i za tuepa kha nama ica pi aa,’ a ta.
44013035	Cacuonakawta Salm caa-uv hmang hrang lieta a capepa ca, ‘A pathepa na cawsaapa ca thuvna a taw riypata pahya'a vaciy,’ a ta.
44013036	Tahematapakieca David ca ama chuo chunglie Khazing re kha a za hrie ra. A thiy tiyta a mingching-mingvuo tie'a lie kha paby yite a pangpa ca thluo chunglie kha a thuv.
44013037	Cuorasala Khazing ta thiyna taata a pathupa ca thuvna kha a taw va tli.
44013038	Cacuonakawta, uvnu zaw, Zingsuv thue hing tana sue a ngiethena thuophaapa ca niema'a luo phu pata a cuo, tapa kha pachang tie ung.
44013039	Capa Zingsuv thue catana a zangpa bangkhuo ca Moses phungbie ta hya aca pazang sa khu lipa yi suena taakhata hya nama zang.
44013040	Cacuonakawta profet tie ta ama ripa bie kha nama cunglie a tlung li riypata a raaring tie ung:
44013041	‘Mang tie ung, niema cawsaa pahnyisue a hmuopa tie, Nama kharue haa sala ra tie ung, Tahematapakieca niema chuo lieta i hriepa re hing, malie ta aca chang pachaapa yi tahmuo, nama zang buo hluo li riypatana a cuo,’ tapatana profet tie ta ama ri, a ta.
44013042	Paul hne Barnabas ca ama pyapuole pa khata hmiezaa sabbath ning thueta ama kaw kha ripakhaa riypata ama hry.
44013043	Apungna-ing lie apung ama pachuo taata Judah ming hne Judah biena luo a ngiepa Jentail ming hluvpuv khata Paul hne Barnabas kha ama ziy. Lucuotuv tie ta iema kha bie chang yite Khazing vihnyina chunglie ama aw pari riypata ama pasu.
44013044	Hmiezaa sabbath ningpa ca Abyipa bie naathlie riypata a khypuv yalya chaa ta amaa hmya.
44013045	Cuorasala Judah ming ta cawsaazaapuv amaa hmyapa kha ama hmung tiyta ihnyi yite Paul ta a ripa kha esena cangta khuosa ta ama i.
44013046	Cakhutaata Paul hne Barnabas ca riephasa pata ri yite, “Niema'a lieta Khazing bie ri taa riypa hing a hu hringhruo. Cuorasala niema ta khing lipa ung cata chuozaa hringna hne aa phuv pata namaa rue li nakawta, ata hing ca kiema ca Jentail ming'a luo na maa pali'a tli.
44013047	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta bie malie a pipa ca: ‘Niema ca Jentail ming cuota khena cuo riypatana ica pachi tli yi, Cacuonakawta khuona kha chuelyi dena te ta phya tie ung,’” tapatana a cuo.
44013048	Capa bie ca Jentail ming ta ama thyi tiyta ama palung tluosa te Abyipa bie kha ama pathuosa. Chuozaa hringna hmung riypata lieriyoupoupa a hluvpuv kha zangtuv ta ama vya cuo.
44013049	Khazing bie ca capa ruo bangkhuo cata aa ze.
44013050	Cuorasala Judah ming ta Khazing abiepa hne pa-uvsathyi tluo aa tlapa Jentail canung tie hne khychung uvthyi tie kha pasu yite Paul hne Barnabas kha hrisaa yite ama ruo taata ama papya.
44013051	Cacuonakawta iema cunglie ama palung tling lina paluosana ta ama phyipazaa lie buvcing kha a cakhawsue siy yite Ikonium luo kha ama si.
44013052	Ziytuv tie ca palungtluona hne Thlaapa Pathe ta ama bi.
44014001	Cahaa ngiethie cata Paul hne Barnabas ca Ikonium khy Judah ming apungna-ing luo kha vaa yite ama ri tawpa haakhata khuopuv ta ama ri ca Judah ming hne Grik ming hluvpuv kha zangtuv ta ama vya cuo.
44014002	Cuorasala a zang lipa Judah ming ta Jentail ming kha pasu yite zangtuv tie kha ama padu sa.
44014003	Cacuonakawta lucuotuv tie ca capa lieca cuo syipuv aw yite Abyipa bie kha riephasa pata ama ri. Abyipa ta ama ripa thuophaabie pacusana ta pahmungsana hne kharuehaa hmang tue khuna kha a pi yi.
44014004	Cuorasala capa khypuv lie a awpa tie ca a che yite, Judah ming kuo luo phuvkha, lucuotuv tie kuo luo phuvkha ta ama aw.
44014005	Cakhutaata Jentail ming hne Judah ming ta iema uvtuv tie hne khata lucuotuv tie kha tuechie riypa hne alung ta vaa riypata ama raw.
44014006	Lucuotuv tie ta capa kaw ca ama pachang tiyta Likaonia ruo khypuv ta a cuopa tie Listra khy, Derbe khy hne a cahriy khyta luo kha amaa ruo.
44014007	Capa lieca thuophaabie phu kha ama pazue.
44014008	Aa puvkhyipa ta a phyi a cabie nakawta luo a cakuo buo lipapaa pakha ca Listra khy lie kha aw te,
44014009	Paul ta a ripa bie kha naa a thlie. Paul ta tluo khuna riypa zangna na a hnyi tapa kha a hmung tiyta ama kha taapuo pata mang te,
44014010	ue a suopuv ta, “Na phyi ta a dangta tah a daa tie,” a ta. Cawsaapapaa ca a kya daa te luo a cakuo.
44014011	Paul ta a tuepa kha cawsaazaapuv ta ama hmung tiyta, Likaonian ryi ta khuopuv ta khi yite, “khazing tie na cawsaa hmingsuo ta a zaa cung yi,” ama ta.
44014012	Barnabas kha Zeus khazing tana a cuo ta yite Paul kha bie a rituv a cuo nakaw ta Hermes khazing tana a cuo ama ta.
44014013	Khy khungthing ta lie a biena-ing a awpa Zeus khazing tluobyipa ta cuetungpa hne paapaapa pachiy kha khy hukaa luo vya cyi te cawsaazaapuv hne khata iema kha hriykhungrina ta abie amaa nang.
44014014	Lucuotuv Barnabas hne Paul ta capa kaw ca ama thyi tiyta ama caw kha thlaa yite, cawsaazaapuv hraw luo a ruo yite,
44014015	“Viesaa zaw, khaapa hmang ma tue namaa nang? Kiema zaw niema haata cawsaa cakhawpa tana ma cuo. Thuophaabie kha ca vya phya yi pate hingpa thlahnena a hnyi lipa hmang taahingta alyi hne avuo hne riyliy hne a chunglie a awpa bangkhuo a satuvpa a hringpa Khazing'a luo namaa pali riypata caa changtuv tana ma cuo.
44014016	Hluoning ca Khazing ta mingphang bangkhuo kha ama khingpa luo ziy riypata luo a pa-aw yi.
44014017	Cuorasala a tuepa hmangphapa ta ama a awpa kha a paluo sa pari: avuo taata khy pasaa sa te ama'a na a cuo ta kung a pavyi sa, sa ca pi yite nama palung aca patluo yi,” ta yite khuosa ta ama u.
44014018	Hing tluv bie ama ri patahmuo hriykhungrina ta abie amaa nangpa kha ama thlu khu sungsiyta khiy tana a cuo.
44014019	Cuorasala Antiok taa hne Ikonium taata Judah ming kha a vaw yite cawsaazaapuv kha iema kuo luo a daa riypata ama ripasa khu. Cakhutaata Paul kha alung ta vaa yite a thiy tli tapata ama rue nakawta khyle luo kha amaa dale.
44014020	Cuorasala ziytuv tie ta ama cadung nguoluo ning kha Paul ca kya thu te khychung luo kha a vaa pakhaa. A mawluopa ta Barnabas hneta Derbe luo ama si.
44014021	Paul hne Barnabas ca capa khy lieca thuophaabie kha chang yite ziytuv a hluvsa ama hmung. Cakhutaacata Listra, Ikonium hne Antiok luo kha ama vya kaa.
44014022	Ziytuv tie kha zangna aa hmuopa chunglie a cusa pata ama aw riypata pasu yite, “Khazing pena chung luo a ngie riypata ca ruvnaana a hluvsa ma ang riypatana a cuo,” tapata thaazuo ama pi.
44014023	Khrihsaabuv bangkhuo lie kha khrihsaa uvthyi tie ama chi khu taata ama zangpa Khazing'a luo kha sa uvna hne thlaachuona ta ama pi.
44014024	Cakhutaata Pisidia ruo kha cahrawpaa yite Pamfilia ruo luo ama si.
44014025	Perga lieta thuophaabie ama ri khu taata Attalia luo ama sibung.
44014026	Capa hmang taacata Antiok luo kha tiypalaw ta ama kaa. Antiok khy ca atalawlie ama palangpa ama re hrie riypa hingta Khazing duena chung luo ama za pinapa hmang khatana a cuo.
44014027	Capa khy luo ama chiy pahne ta zangtuv tie kha pahmya yite Khazing ta iema hmuo pata a hriepa bangkhuo hne tuokhaatama Khazing ta Jentail ming cuota zangna chiypakaa a pahawpa ra yi tapa kaw kha ama chang.
44014028	Capa lieca zangtuv tie hne cuo syipuv ama aw pakhaw.
44015001	Judea taata cawsaa chekha ca Antiok luo a zuv yite, “Moses phungbie haata vangdaw namaa te li kieca khuona hmung khu'a va ungciy,” tapata zangtuv uvnu zaw kha ama pacuv.
44015002	Capa pacuvna ca Paul hne Barnabas ta khuopuv ta ama i. Cacuonakawta Paul hne Barnabas, hne zangtuv chekha kha a tlaw yite lucuotuv tie'a nata khrihsaa uvthyi tie hneta capa kaw ca a ruepakhaw riypata Jerusalem luo ama pathlie.
44015003	Amaa tha ning kha khrihsaabuv ta pathlie yite Fonisia hne Samaria ruo kha capiepaa yite ama si. Jentail ming ta Khazing ama vya zangna kaw kha pathyisale yite capa thuohlaa cata zangtuv zaw kha khuopuv ta ama palung a patluo yi.
44015004	Jerusalem luo ama chiy tiyta Khrihsaabuv hne lucuotuv tie, hne khrihsaa uvthyi tie ta alawna hne cuhluo yite iema'a lieca Khazing rehriena kha a tlingsa pata ama pathyi sa.
44015005	Cuorasala Farasi phuv ta a cuopa zangtuv chekha a daa yite, “Iema cuo hing taca vangdaw a te riypa hne Moses phungbie ama ziy riypa ca a hu hrahring,” tapata ama ri.
44015006	Hingpa bie ripakhaw riypata lucuotuv tie hne khrihsaa uvthyi tie ca amaa hmya.
44015007	A syipuv amaa i khu taata Piter kha a daa te, “Uv zaw nu zaw, nama pachangna haata, Jentail ming ta thuophaabie kha thyi yite ama zang khuna riypata, iema'a luo capa thuophaabie chang riypa cata hluo vie taakhata Khazing ta kama hing niema hraw taata i naa tlaw.
44015008	Cawsaa pathiypalung a pachangtuv Khazing ta kiema'a lie a tuepa haakhata iema kha Thlaapa Pathe pi yite tehte a khuo yi.
44015009	Zangna ta ama pathiypalung kha pathe sa te iema hne kiema a lala lie kha pahlyipalena tue vyi.
44015010	Cacuonakawta khaapanakawma ma mingchingmingvuo tie zaw ta cuose, kiema ta cuose, ma phya khu lipa hmangriypa ca ziytuv tie ruetung lie khang ung cate Khazing kha dyapasya nama khing?
44015011	Cuovyi, Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina tana khuona ma hmung aa tapa te ma zangpa haahingta muo iema zaw ama cuo ra'a ta,” a ta.
44015012	Barnabas hne Paul ta, Khazing ta iema hmuo pata Jentail ming'a lie a tuepa pahmungsana hne kharuehaa hmang kaw ama ripa kha naathlie yite a hmyapa bangkhuo ca duokaring khata ama aw.
44015013	Bieri ama patlung khu taata Jeim ta, “I uvnu zaw, naa na thlie tie ung.
44015014	Simon ta, Jentail ming kha Khazing ta khatluv ta kawpacuo yite ma iema hraw taata cawsaa chekha kha ama ming riypata aa tlaw yi tapa kha malie a chang pasie tli.
44015015	Capa bie ca profet tie bie hne khata aa chiyhne. Caapathepa ta:
44015016	Hingpa khu taahingta vya kaa pakhaa ang te, Aa lie ciepa David ing kha i padaa pakhaa aa. A rana taakhata sa pakhaa'a ang te, I padaa pakhaa aa.
44015017	Cacuonakawta mingphang hrangpa bangkhuo ta Abyipa kha huv'a yite, Jentail ming bangkhuo ta i ming kha ina u'a yi.
44015018	Hluoning taata hing hmang hing tue te a pachangtuv, Abyipa na a ri,” a ta.
44015019	Cacuonakawta kama i ruenapa taca, Khazing'a luo a vya maapa Jentail ming hing hmangriy pi kha ungsiy,
44015020	cuorasala caa paphya ung sala, kuvtuezuv ama bienapa saa ca a pyalyi nakawta ce li riypa, aparuvsuena tue li riypa, hne a rue hmi pata ama thiepa saa hne thiy bangkhuo ning li riypata chang hriy ungsiy.
44015021	Tahematapakieca khypuv ting lie kha kung syipuv chung, Moses phungbie kha Sabbath ning kyry ta apungna-ing lie za ri pata a cuo tli.
44015022	Cakhutaata lucuotuv tie, khrihsaa uvthyi tie hne Khrihsaabuv yalya palung tlingna ta iema hraw taata cawsaa a tlaw pata Barnabas'a nata Paul hneta Antiok luo pathlie riypa kha ama palung a tling. Iema hrawlie luochiytuv ta a cuopa Barsabbas ama tapa Judas hne Silas kha a tlaw yite,
44015023	iema hne cata a raw luo caa hing ama paphya: “Kiema lucuotuv tie hne khrihsaa uvthyi tie, nama uvnu tie ta Antiok, Siria hne Silisia lieta a awpa Jentail ming zangtuv uvnu bangkhuo'a luo bie a changna caa maca paphya yi.
44015024	Kiema hraw taata a pyapa cawsaa chekha ta, kiema ta va ri ungla ma ta lipa yi ta nama palung riethyi riypa hne chachiychaba riypa bie ama kya ri tapa kha ma thyi.
44015025	Cacuonakawta, zaapuv palung tling pata cawsaa kha a tlaw pate, Barnabas'a nata Paul hneta niema'a luo pathlie riypata bie ma chi.
44015026	Iema pahning hing Zingsuv Khrih cuota ama hringna pinguona te ta re a hrietuv ma duepa tana ama cuo.
44015027	Judas hne Silas kha niema'a luo pathlie pata cuo yite iema palyipakaa hrahring ta capa bie ca a ca chang'a yi.
44015028	Thlaapa Pathe hne kiema ta a raw luo aa husapa ziy riypa khu taahingta a hrangpa hmang aa riypa nama cunglie khang riypata khing va puv.
44015029	Namaa cadang riypa ca: Kuvtuezuv amaa bienapa saa ce'a va ungciy; saathiy ning'a va ungciy; a rue hmi pata thiepa saa ce'a va ungciy; aparuvsuena tue'a va ungciy. Capa bangkhuo taacata namaa ve khu kieca hmangpha ta a cuo aa. Nama tluo pata,” ama ta.
44015030	Cacuonakawta iema ca pathlie yite Antiok luo ca ama si. Zangtuv bangkhuo kha pahmya yite caa ca ama pi.
44015031	Caa ca ama ri tiyta thaazuo ama pipa cunglie ama palung a tluo laalaw.
44015032	Profet ta a cuopa Judas hne Silas zaw ta zangtuv tie kha khuosa ta pasu yite thaazuo ama pi.
44015033	Cuo syipuv ama aw khu taata zangtuv tie ta a pathlietuv tie'a luo kha diena hneta ama pathlie pakhaa.
44015034	(Cuorasala Silas ca capa lieca a ngaa siy.)
44015035	Cuorasala Paul hne Barnabas ca Antiok lie kha a ngaa yite cawsaa hrangpa hluvpuv hneta Abyipa bie kha pacuv yite ama chang.
44015036	Cakhutaata a ru li pata, Paul ta Barnabas kha, “Kaa sala Abyipa bie ma za phu cienapa khy bangkhuo lieta zangtuv tie kha tlawle pata khaapama ama lu tapa kha mangle yi siy,” a ta.
44015037	Barnabas ta Marka tapa Johan kha iema'a lie a chiylepa a khing.
44015038	Cuorasala Paul ta, Pamfilia lieta za thuse yite iema hne re a hrie hne lipapaa kha a chiyle riypata khing vyi.
44015039	Khuopuv ta a ipuo yite iema zaw amaa che. Barnabas ta Marka kha a la te Saipras luo kha tiypalaw ta ama si.
44015040	Cuorasala Paul ta Silas kha a tlaw te zangtuv tie ta Abyipa vihnyina chung luo ama pi khu taata ama si.
44015041	Siria hne Silisia ruo kha cahraw yite khrihsaabuv kha thaazuo ama pi.
44016001	Paul ca Derbe khy hne Listra khy luo kha a va chiy. Capa lieca Khrihsaa a cuopa, a ming Timote ama tapa kha a aw. A nung ca Judah ming, zangtuv pakha ta cuote, cuorasala a paa ca Grik ming ta a cuo.
44016002	Listra hne Ikonium lie a awpa zangtuv tie ta ama ca a thuophaa ama risapa ta a cuo.
44016003	Paul ta Timote ca aa chiyle khing nakawta a vangdaw a pate sa, tahematapakieca a paa Grik ming a cuopa kha capa lie a awpa Judah ming khata ama pachang.
44016004	Khykha hnang khykha ta ama tlawle pa khata, Jerusalem lie a awpa lucuotuv tie hne khrihsaa uvthyi tie ta ama za chi ciepa phung kha ziy riypata iema kha ama changle.
44016005	Cacuonakawta khrihsaabuv ca zangna lie kya cahra vie hryly yite ning kha hnang ning kha mingluv zaw ama hluv hryly.
44016006	Asia ruo chunglie kha Thlaapa Pathe ta thuophaabie ri riypata a pa-aw li nakawyita Frizia ruo hne Galatia ruo chung kha khy ama tlaw.
44016007	Misia ruoriy ama pha pa khata Bithinia ruo chung luo kha a ngie amaa ting. Cuorasala Zingsuv Thlaapa ta pa-aw vayi.
44016008	Cacuonakawta Troas luo kha ama sibung.
44016009	Zuo ta Paul ca muocuo a hmung: Masidonia cawsaa pakha a daa te ama kha “Masidonia luo a vaw la malie a vya bya tie,” a ta.
44016010	Paul ta muocuo a hmung khu taata Masidonia luo si riypa kha maa pachie paluo, tahematapakieca Khazing na iema'a luo thuophaabie phu riypata malie a ku tapa kha ma pachangpasie.
44016011	Troas taata tiypalaw ta a tha pate Samothrasia luo kha a dangsa pata ma si. A mawluopa ta Neapolis luo ma chiy.
44016012	Ama taacata Rom uvna ruo chung, Masidonia pe chunglie ta khypuv ta a cuopa Filipi khy luo ma chiy. Capa khy lieca ningcuo syipuv ma aw.
44016013	Sabbath ning ca khychung taakhata pya pate cavaa kie luo ma cakuo. Capa lieca thlaachuona hmang a aw thlu'a tapata ma rue. A tu pate capa lie a hmyapa canung zaw hne cata bie ma ri.
44016014	Lidia ama ta nung, Khazing abiepa pakha ca ma bie kha naa a thlie ra. Ama ca Thiatira khy ming ta cuote caw sedungpa a zaanung ta a cuo. Paul ta a ripa bie kha hmisi ta naathlie riypata Abyipa ta a pathiypalung a pahaw nung tana a cuo.
44016015	Ama hne a ingchungkhue tie tiy amaa naw khu taata, Lidia ta, “Abyipa a zang hrahring tapata ina ruepa ung cata a cuo kieca, a vaw ungla i ing luo kha a vya pahy tie ung,” tapata kiema kha paa malie a kie.
44016016	Ningkha ca thlaachuona hmang luo ma vaa pata hmie luo kaw a ri khupa thlaapa a hryipa siicanung nung hneta maa taw. Hmie luo kaw a rilu khunapa khata a ziybyi tie kha tuokaa a hluvsa a hmungpa yi.
44016017	Paul hne kiema malie a vya ziypuole pata, “Hing cawsaa zaw hing Cungnungce Khazing sii, khuona thuophaabie niema'a luo a phutuv tie tana ama cuo,” a ta.
44016018	Ning hluvpuv cahaa cata a ta. Cuorasala Paul ca a hihaasa pata thlaapa kha a pali hnue te, “Hingpa nung chung taahingta pya riypatana bie ica pi,” a ta. A ta khupa tahne ta thlaapa ca a pya.
44016019	Ama a hnyituvpa tie ta ma tuokaa hmungnapa na a ra tli tapa kha ama hmung tiyta Paul hne Silas kha patuv yite chadawtluo luo, nawhnyituv tie hmiekung luo kha amaa dale.
44016020	Bieripatuv byi zaw hmiekung luo kha chiykhyi yite, “Hing cawsaa zaw hing Judah ming ta cuo yite, ma khypuv chunglie hnaahnawnapa a chiykhyituv tana ama cuo,
44016021	kiema Rom ming ta maa paw khu li riypa hne ma ziy khu li riypa, phung kha ri yite a daakhyipa tana ama cuo,” ama ta.
44016022	Cawsaazaapuv ca Paul hne Silas a duna kuo luo khata ama aw diy. Bie ripatuv byi tie khata ama caw thlie pata asung ta tuv riypata naw ama pi.
44016023	Khuopuv ta ama tuv khu taata, thaw pathla yite, thaw-ing byipa kha a phata tah pahuo sa riypata naw ama pi.
44016024	Naw ama pipa haakhata thaw-ing aa thuvcena khuo chunglie kha chi yite ama phyi kha akyi ama de.
44016025	Zuocang hraw khiy taca Paul hne Silas ca thlaachuona hne hlaasana ta Khazing kha pathuosa yite thaw a tlapa tie ta naa ama thlie.
44016026	Sungkhapuv ta aling khuosa ta a siy te thaw-ing ca a thabaw te ta a cahang; thlaluo-aw bangkhuo a pahaw te thaw a tlapa tie thaabuoliriy bangkhuo kha ama kuv taata aa pathluo diy.
44016027	Thaw-ing byipa ca a kya cha te thaw-ing thlaluo-aw bangkhuo aa pahawpa kha a hmung tiyta thaw a tlapa tie na a ruo diy tli yi tapata a rue nakawta a zueziy kha a da te ama hne ama kha a thie a nang.
44016028	Cuorasala Paul kha khuopuv ta khi te, “Nama hne nama kha ruvnaana a pi kha, ma bangkhuo ta ma aw diy tli hing,” a ta.
44016029	Thaw-ing byipa cata, myi vya cyi ungla ta yite, thaw-ing chung luo kha a ruo te, a cathangsapuo pata Paul hne Silas phyi thabaw lie kha a vaa bu.
44016030	Cakhutaata ale luo pyakhyi yite, “I byipaa zaw, khuona hmung riypata khaapama i tue aa? a ta yi.
44016031	Iema ta, “Abyipa Zingsuv kha zang la nama hne na ingchungkhue hneta khuona na hmung aa,” ama ta.
44016032	Abyipa bie ca ama hne a ing chunglie a awpa bangkhuo kha ama chang.
44016033	Capa zuopa cata ama hmaa kha pasiypa yite cakhutaata ama hne a ingchungkhue bangkhuo ta tiy amaa naw paluo.
44016034	Iema kha ing luo a chiy yite sa a pi yi. Ama ta Khazing kha a zang nakawta ama hne a ingchungkhue bangkhuo ta ama palung a tluo hringhruo.
44016035	A mawluopa ta bieripatuv byi tie khata paliy tie kha vya pathlie yite, “Khapa cawsaa tie kha za pathlie yi se,” ama ta.
44016036	Canakaw cata thaw-ing byipa ta Paul kha chang te, “Bieripatuv byi tie na niema kha pathlie riypata bie naa vya taa yi, cacuonakawta kya pya ungla diena hne cakuo tie ung,” a ta yi.
44016037	Cuorasala Paul ta palie te, “Kiema Rom cawsaa a cuopa kha bie ripa li pata zaapuv hmielie asung ta malie tuv yite thaw malie ama pathla. Cakhutaata ata ca a paruv ta pathlie malie amaa nang. Cahaa cata cuo the'a vyi! Iema hrahring a vaw yi sala malie vya papya yi se,” a ta.
44016038	Paliy tie ta capa bie ca bieripatuv byi tie kha va chang yite, Rom ming tana ma cuo e ama tapa kha ama thyi tiyta ama thlaa a zang.
44016039	Cacuonakawta a vaw yite paa ama vya kie. Thaw-ing taakhata papya yite ama khypuv kha pya se riypata ama chang.
44016040	Caacuonakawta thaw-ing taakhata pya yite Lydia ing luo kha ama vaa. Capa lie ca uvnu sieta zaw hneta a taw yite thaazuo ama pi khu taata capa khy taacata ama pya.
44017001	Paul hne Silas ca Amfipolis khy hne Apollonia khy kha vya capiepaa yite Thesalonika khy luo kha ama pha. Capa lieca Judah ming apungna-ing kha a aw.
44017002	Paul ca a tue tawpa haakhata apungna-ing luo vaa te Sabbath ning ningthung chung bangkhuo iema hne khata Caapathepa bie lie'a pakha amaa i.
44017003	Messiah ca ruvnaana a ang riypa hne thiy te a thupakhaa hrahring a hunapa kaw kha ri pasie te a paluo sa. “Kama ta ica chang nguoluopa yi hing capa Messiah, Zingsuv catana a cuo,” a ta yi.
44017004	Chekha ca ama palung sie te Paul hne Silas kha amaa hlaw, cahaa cata Khazing a biepa Grik ming hluvpuv hne canung uvthyi hluvpuv zaw kha amaa vya hlaw ra.
44017005	Cuorasala Judah ming ta ihnyi yite chadawtluo lie a khie cakhawpa zyazaa pha lipa tie kha pahmya yite ama pakhipa-u sa nakawta khy chunglie kha hnaahnawna a puv. Paul hne Silas kha patuv pata zaapuv hmie luo chiykhyi riypata Jason ing kha ama va ching.
44017006	Iema kha ama hmung li taata Jason hne zangtuv chekha kha khychung uvthyi tie'a luo kha a vya dale yite, “Chuelyi a palipathipa hing cawsaa zaw hing hingpa hmang luo hing vya chiy yite,
44017007	Jason ta a ing lie aa patlung sa yi. Siepahruo hrangpa Zingsuv ama tapa na a aw, ta yite Rom siepahruo nawhnyina kha amaa du,” ama ta.
44017008	Capaca ama thyi tiyta khychung uvtuv byi tie hne cawsaa zaw ca ama palung aatawaamuo sa.
44017009	Jason hne a hrangpa tie'a taata biekuona tuokaa ama la khu taata ama pathlie.
44017010	Capa zuopa cata zangtuv tie ta Paul hne Silas kha Berea luo ama pasi sa. Ama chiy tiyta Judah ming apungna-ing luo kha ama cakuo.
44017011	Berea khy lie Judah ming ca Thesalonika khy ming laa khata bie cuhluo ama the vie; cacuonakawta bie kha palung thusa pata naathlie yite a cuo ma cuo vama tapa kha che the riypata ningting ta Caapathepa kha ama mang.
44017012	Iema hraw taata cawsaa hluvpuv kha vya zang yite pa-uvsathyi tluo aa tlapa Grik ming canung capaa a hluvpuv zaw ama vya zang ra.
44017013	Cuorasala Thesalonika lie a awpa Judah ming ta Paul na Berea lie thuophaabie a phu e tapa kha ama thyi tiyta a vaw yite cawsaazaapuv kha hnaahnawna tue riypata ama pasu.
44017014	Zangtuv tie ta sungkha ta Paul kha riyliy kie luo pathlie yite Silas hne Timote ca amaa ngaa siy.
44017015	Paul a pathliepa tie ca Athens te kha va chiy ra yite, a cuo khuna chung ta Silas hne Timote kha naa vya hlaw paluo mang yi sala, tapata Paul ta bie a taa khu taayita ama kaa.
44017016	Paul ca Athen taata Silas hne Timote a huo nguoluo ning yi kha capa khy ca kuvtuezuv ta a bi pakha hmung te a palung rie a thyi khyisa.
44017017	Cacuonakawta apungna-ing lie cuose, chadawtluo lie zaw kha cuose, Judah ming'a nata Khazing a zangpa Grik ming hneta a ningtating ta bie amaa i pari.
44017018	Epikurian pacuvtuv chekha hne Stoik pacuvtuv chekha zaw hne khata amaa i. Chekha ta “Hingpa a pasingsa te a khicakhawpapaa hing khaapama a ri khing?” ama ta. A hrangpa tie ta, “Ruohrang ming khazing kaw na a ri thlu aa?” ama ta. (Cahaa cata ama tapa ca Zingsuv hne a thupakhaanapa kaw kha a ri nakawtana a cuo.)
44017019	Cacuonakawta ama kha Areopagas ama tapa ahmyana hmang luo chiykhyi yite, “Na ri nguoluopa pacuvna thaapa kaw hingna ma pachang khing.
44017020	Kiema cuota biethaapa cuote a ri khingna hingna ma pachang khing,” ama ta.
44017021	Athens khy ming hne capa lie a awpa ruohrang ming ca ama cuo hnyipa bangkhuo kha biethaapa a changna hne naathliena ta ama hmuo diy.
44017022	Cakhutaata Paul ca Areopagas lie a vya hmyapa tie hmiekunglie kha a daa te, “Athens khy ming, biena luota khatluv tama nama pakangpahaa tapa kha ica pachang yi.
44017023	Khychung kha a khie ang te nama bienapa hmang kha i hmung tiyta, capa hraw taacata, “Ma pachang lipa khazing cuota,” tapata caa aa capepa bienatluophie kha i hmung. Kama ta niema'a lie i phupa hing capa nama pachang li pata namaa biepa kaw catana a cuo.
44017024	Chuelyi hne a chunglie a awpa bangkhuo a satuv Khazing, alyi hne vuoruo Byi, cawsaa kuv ta sapa biena-ing chunglie a aw lipa tana a cuo.
44017025	Khazing ca a hringpa bangkhuo kha hringna hne huv hne zezaw bangkhuo kha a pituv cuote, cawsaa ta a cuota tuepa riypa kha aa hupa suokha hmuo aw vyi.
44017026	Cawsaa pakha chung taata mingphang bangkhuo kha sa te alyi lie kha khy a pasa sa yi. Kha cuo ma ama hring aa tapa hne ama awna riypa ruoriy zaw kha a thlipa pacie yi.
44017027	Tahematapakieca iema ta, ama, Khazing kha huv'a yite ama hmung thena riypatana a cuo. Cadyiseca Khazing ca kiema pakha cyicuo hne hingta a hla vyi.
44017028	Ama chunglie ma hring, cakuocavaa pate khy ma sa,’ ama tapa haata hne hlaa a phy thepa tie ta, ‘Kiema zaw hing ama samingsahlaa tana ma cuo,’ ama tapa haa khatana a cuo.
44017029	Cahaa cata kiema ca Khazing samingsahlaa ma cuo nakawta, a hringpa Khazing hing cawsaa kuvzung ta tuepa siyy a cuo li kie, ngu a cuo li kie, alung kuvtuezuv haata ri riypata cuo vyi.
44017030	Khazing ta, cawsaa ta ama za pachang the lina cuo kha a hmung li hruo aa cuo raalaa pata, ata hing ca cawsaa bangkhuo kha ama hring pha lipa bangkhuo taata a ngiepachiy riypata bie a pi yi.
44017031	Tahematapakieca aa tlaw ciepa paa thueta chuelyi hing a dangna ta bie ripa riypata ning a thli pacie tli. Cawsaa bangkhuo ta hingpa hmang hing a cuo tapa ama pachang riypata ama kha thiyna taata a pathu sa.”
44017032	Thiyna taata thupakhaana kaw kha ama thyi tiyta, chekha ta ama pahnyisue; cuorasala chekha ta, “Hingpa kaw nama ripa hing naa na maca thlie pakhaa khing yi,” ama ta.
44017033	Capa lie cata Paul ta a pya se yi.
44017034	Cuorasala chekha ta ama kha vaa hlaw yite zangtuv ama vya cuo. Iema ca Areopagas lie abyi a cuopa Dionisias hne Damaris ama tapa canung pakha hne a hrangpa zaw khata ama cuo.
44018001	Cakhutaata Paul ca Athens khy taakhata pya te Korin luo a si.
44018002	Capa lieca Pontas ruo lie a puvpa, a ming Akuila ama tapa Judah ming pakha kha a napuvnung Prisilla hneta a va hmung yi. Iema ca siepahruo Kalaudias ta Judah ming bangkhuo Rom taata a papya nakaw yi ta Italy taata a vya chiy thaapa ta ama cuo.
44018003	Paul ta vaa taw yite, ama haata pangthluodaa bie pata a riy a cawpa ama cuo ra nakawta iema'a lie kha aw te re ama hrie hne.
44018004	Sabbath ning kyry ta Judah ming hne Grik ming kha ama palung a sie the riypata apungna-ing lie kha bie a rue yite a changpasie yi.
44018005	Silas hne Timote kha Masidonia taata ama vya chiy tiyta, Paul ca a cuo bangkhuo kha Khazing bie phuna ta hmuo diy te, Judah ming kha, Zingsuv ca Messiah tana a cuo tapata tehte a khuo yi.
44018006	Judah ming ta ama kha a du yite ama hue tiyta, a palung tling lina paluosana ta a pang lie buvcing kha cakhawsue siy yite, “Nama thiyse ca niema luv cunglie tla mangsue! Kama ca i pathe. Ata taahingta ca Jentail ming'a luo na i cakuo'a tli,” a ta yi.
44018007	Cakhutaata apungna-ing taakhata pya te Khazing abiepa Titius Justas ama tapapaa ing luo kha a cakuo. Capapaa ing ca apungna-ing a vya paziypa khana a cuo.
44018008	Apungna-ing uvtuv byi a cuopa Krispas ca aa chungkhue yalya ta Abyipa kha ama vya zang; cakhutaata Paul ta a ripa thuophaabie a thyipa Korin ming a hluvpuv zaw kha zang yite tiy amaa naw.
44018009	Zuokha ca Paul ta muocuo hmung te, Abyipa ta, “Ciy kha, duo lie ciy, ri lawmaw tie;
44018010	ca aw puo ang te, nama kha ruvnaana pi riypata ahungtahmuo ta na cunglie a kuv pathlie'a vyi, tahematapakieca hing khypuv chunglie hing i cawsaa na a hluvpuv a aw yi,” a ta.
44018011	Cacuonakawta Paul ca capa lieca kung kha thlacaruv aw te iema kha Khazing bie a pacuv yi.
44018012	Cuorasala Gallio ca Akhaia ruo uvtuv a cuo tiyta, Judah ming ta Paul kha a du yite bierina zung luo ama chiykhyi.
44018013	Iema ta, “Hingpapaa hingna cawsaa kha ma phung haata cuo li pata Khazing abie riypata a changpari yi,” ama ta.
44018014	Paul ta bie a vya ri'a nangpa khata Gallio ta Judah ming kha, “zyazaa phalina kawlie'a nata suena kawlieta a cuo kieca zung luo nama vya chiykhyipa bie hing ca cuhluo'a yi ang te a phata tah i rue a hu aa.
44018015	Cuorasala ata'apa hmang hing ca biesuo kaw, ming kaw'a nata niema phungluo kaw zaw ta a cuo nakawta niemata tah vaa ri tie ung; hingpa hmang kawlie taca bieripatuv cuo khu va ang,” a ta yi.
44018016	Cakhutaata zung chung taacata a papya yi.
44018017	Cadyiseca iema bangkhuo khata apungna-ing uvtuv Sosthenes kha patuv yite zung hmielie kha ama tuv. Cuorasala Gallio ta khapa zaw kha siysaa hetahmuo ripa vayi.
44018018	Paul ca Korin lie cuo syipuv a aw khu taata, zangtuv tie kha bie a changsiy yite Prisilla'a nata Akuila hne khata tiypalaw ta Siria luo a si. Tiypalaw ta ama si hluo khata Kenkhria khy lie kha biekuona a tue nakawta a suo aa ngu.
44018019	Efesa luo ama chiy tiyta iema kha thuse yite apungna-ing luo kha vaa te Judah ming hneta bie amaa rue.
44018020	Iema ta a syi vie aw caw riypata ama thlu tiyta bie nesa pata a bu yi;
44018021	cuorasala aa thu'a nang caw ta, “Khazing khingna a aw kieca niema'a luo i vya kaa pakhaa aa,” a ta yi. Cakhutaacata Efesa taakhata tiypalaw ta a pya.
44018022	Sisaria luo a pha tiyta Jerusalem luo kha khaw te khrihsaabuv kha bie a kya chang yi. Cakhutaata Antiok luo kha a si.
44018023	Capa lieca cuo syipuv a aw khu taata Galatia hne Frizia ruo kha suvkha hnang suvkha ta tlawle yite a ziytuv bangkhuo kha thaazuo a pile yi.
44018024	Capa ning ca Alexandria khy lie a puvpa Judahpa, Apollos ama tapapaa ca Efesa khy luo kha aa vaw. Ama ca bie ri a thepa hne Caapathepa kha a phata tah a pachangpa ta a cuo;
44018025	Abyipa Phungluo kaw kha pathiypalung hmisi ta hne a cuona dadang haata a pacuv yi. Cuorasala Johan tiynawna kaw dyi kha a pachang.
44018026	Apungna-ing lie kha riepha ciemuopa ta ri te; cuorasala Prisilla hne Akuila ta ama thyi tiyta ama kha cakuo khyi yite Khazing Phungluo kaw kha a cuona haata ama chang.
44018027	Apollo ca Akhaia ruo luo si kha aa ting tiyta zangtuv tie ta thaazuo pi yite a phasa pata ama cuhluo riypata ziytuv tie'a luo kha caa ama cape. A va chiy tiyta Khazing vihnyina thueta zangtuv a cuopa tie kha khuopuv ta aa bya yi.
44018028	Tahematapakieca zaapuv hmielie bie a ina lieta Judah ming ama paana kha khuopuv ta paluo sa te, Zingsuv ca Messiah tana a cuo tapa kha Caapathepa chung taata la te a pahmung sa yi.
44019001	Korin lie Apolos a aw ning kha Paul ca capa ruochung kha tlaw te Efesa luo a chiy. Capa lieca zangtuv chekha kha va hmung yite,
44019002	“Zangtuv cuo tli ung cate, Thlaapa Pathe kha nama ting ma?” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Ting va puv, Thlaapa Pathe a aw tapa hmuo thyi buo va puv,” ama ta.
44019003	Cakhutaacata ama ta, “Cacuokie, tuokhaapa tiynawna ma nama ang?” a ta yi. Iema ta, “Johan tiynawna,” ama ta.
44019004	Paul ta, “Johan tiynawna ca sue a ngiepachiynapa tiynawna tana a cuo. Ama hnang taata a vaw riypapaa Zingsuv ama zang riypatana cawsaa kha a chang yi,” a ta.
44019005	Capaca ama thyi tiyta Zingsuv ming ta tiy amaa naw.
44019006	Paul ta ama cunglie a kuv a khang tiyta, iema cung luo kha Thlaapa Pathe za cung te, thyiliparyi kha cyi yite Khazing bie zaw kha ama ri.
44019007	Iema ca ama bangkhuo ta hlyihning hraw ama ta.
44019008	Paul ca apungna-ing luo kha a ngie te Khazing pena kaw kha riephasa pata hne cawsaa ta ama thyi thesa riypata thlathung chung a ri.
44019009	Cuorasala cawsaa chekha ca ama palung a khungsa te, zang khu lipa yi ta Phungluo kha cawsaa hmiekunglie ama rithuochi. Cacuonakaw Paul ta pya se yite, a ziytuv tie kha a chiyle yite Tirannas bierina ing tapa chunglie kha ningting ta a pacuv yi.
44019010	Cahaa cata kung hning chung pazue te Asia ruo chunglie a awpa Judah ming hne Grik ming bangkhuo ca Abyipa bie kha ama thyi diy.
44019011	Khazing ta ning hrang a aw buo lipa kharuehaa hmang kha Paul kuv ta a tue.
44019012	A pavya hne a ruepaze kha hmuota a tluo lipa tie'a luo ama cyile tiyta, tluo yite thlaapa chiepa kha ama chung taata a pya.
44019013	Hmangting ta a khielepa khachie a papyapa tie Judah ming khata thlaapa chiepa a hnyipa tie cunglie kha Abyipa Zingsuv ming kha hmuo yite, “Paul ta a ukhyipa Zingsuv ming tana ica papya,” ama ta
44019014	Judah ming tluobyilepa Skeva saacapaa pasariy tie ta capaca ama tue.
44019015	Cuorasala thlaapa chiepa ta, “Zingsuv i pachang, Paul zaw i pachang; cuorasala niema hing ahung zaw tama nama cuo?” a ta yi.
44019016	Cakhutaata thlaapa chiepa a hnyipapaa cata a vya zuchiy yite tuv yite a te nakaw yi ta ama thiy ama hnie hne ama cahri pata ing taata amaa ruo.
44019017	Capa bie ca Efesa lie a awpa Judah ming hne Grik ming bangkhuo ta ama thyi tiyta, ciysa yite Abyipa Zingsuv ming kha ama pathuosa.
44019018	Zangtuv a vya cuopa a hluvpuv zaw khata ama za tue tawpa kha zaapuv hmielie ama phu.
44019019	Pacuo a thepa tie zaw ta ama caa-uv kha pakhaw yite zaapuv hmielie myi ta ama rue. Capa caa-uv muo ca ama tue tiyta ngu tuokaa thaw sawngaa muo a ta.
44019020	Cahaa cata Abyipa bie ca cahrana hne aa ze hryly.
44019021	Capa hmang bangkhuo a cuo khu taata, Paul ca Masidonia ruo hne Akhaia ruo kha cahrawpaale pata Jerusalem luo tlaw riypa aa ting. “Jerusalem i chiy khu taata Rom zaw i hmung hrahring aa hu,” a ta.
44019022	Cacuonakawta ama a byatuv a cuopa Timote hne Erastas kha Masidonia luo pathlie yite ama ca Asia ruo lie kha cuo syi vie a hmuo.
44019023	Hingpa hrawning hing Phungluo kawlieta hnaahnawna khuopuv ta a aw.
44019024	Ngu a patle thepa Demetrias ama tapapaa ca Artemis khazingnung biena-ing zuvta kha ngu ta patle te capa re lie rehrietuv tie ca ama tuokaa hmungna luopuv a phasa.
44019025	Ama ta a rehrietuv tie hne iema haapa re a hrie rapa tie kha kupakhaw yite, “Uvnu zaw, hing rehriena taahingta hnyirungna ma hmungpa ungca nama pachang.
44019026	Niema zaw hmung ung cate nama pachangpa haata hingpa Paul hingta Efesa lie dyi cuo li pata Asia ruo bangkhuo lie a awpa cawsaa hluvpuv kha, cawsaa ta tuechawpa Khazing ca Khazing ta cuo vyi, tapata chang yite a pa zang sa diy tli yi.
44019027	Cakhutaata ima sungpalina zaw mingchiena aa taw'apa dyi cuo li pata khazingnung Artemis biena-ing zaw hing a ling zue'a te, Asia ruo bangkhuo hne chuelyi puv ta ama biepa a lesyina zaw hing a cungbung aa,” a ta yi.
44019028	Ca bie ca ama thyi tiyta ama hihaa te, “Efesa lie a awpa Artemis ca a lesyice!” tapata khuopuv ta ama u.
44019029	Khy chunglie ca cahaa cata khi-una ta a bi; cawsaa ta Paul khytlawhnepa Masidonia ming Gaius hne Aristarkas kha a vya dale yite pyi mangna ing luo kha ama vya chiykhyi.
44019030	Paul ca ama pangpa ta cawsaazaapuv hmie luo pya riypa kha a khing, cuorasala zangtuv tie ta ama thlu.
44019031	A viesaa ta a cuopa Asia pe uvtuv chekha zaw ta pyi mangnapa ingchung luo hrahring a ngie li riypata bie ama vya taa.
44019032	Capa cuo ning ca, chekha ta a phang hrang, a hrangpa chekha ta a phang hrang khata khi patlaw yite, hluv vie bangkhuo khata khaapanakawma hingpa luo hing maa vya hmya tapa hmuo pachang vayi.
44019033	Judah ming ta Alekzandar kha hmie luo ama vya papya nakawta cawsaazaapuv chekha ta amapaa hingna hingpa hmang a chiykhyituv ta a cuo thlu'a mang ama ta. Alekzandar ta cawsaazaapuv ca a kuv pazuu te a padie sa khu taayita, ama a cuo lina kaw ri aa pachie.
44019034	Cuorasala Judah ming a cuopa kha ama pachang tiyta, “Efesa lie a awpa Artemis ca a lesyice,” ta yite siymaluo pahning chung ama u.
44019035	Cuorasala khy caziypa ta cawsaazaapuv ca padie sa yite, “Efesa khy ming, ahung hingma Efesa khypuv ca a lesyipa Artemis biena-ing hne vuoruo taata zaa tlapa ama hmingsuo kuvtuezuv a awnapa tana a cuo tapa a pachang lipa a aw ungciy?
44019036	Capaca ahungtahmuo i khu'apa a cuo li nakawta a dieta tah nama aw riypa hne khuerue taa li pata hmang nama tue cakhaw riypata cuo vyi.
44019037	Niema ta, ma biena-ing hmang zaw a paruv buo lipa hne ma khazingnung thuopachina bie zaw a ri buo lipa hingpa cawsaa zaw hing hingpa hmang luo nama vya chiykhyi.
44019038	Demetrias hne a rehriehne tie ta, ahung cunglie a cuo zaw ta, bie ama hnyi khing kieca bierina zung pahaw yite bieripatuv tie ama aw thluo. Capa lieca tazaa vaa cyi thluo yi se.
44019039	Capa laa cata nama pachang khing vie kieca khy ming bangkhuo a hmyana lie kha bie chi riypata a cuo.
44019040	Ata ning a puvpa hmang kawlie hingta kiema hing hnaahnawnapa na nama chiykhyi tapata pasuena maa taw khu. Tahematapakieca hingpa hmang a cuona kaw hing a siesa pata ma ri khu riypa suokha hmuo aw vyi, a ta.
44019041	Capa bie a ri khu taacata a hmyapa tie kha a padiy sa diy yi.
44020001	Hnaahnawna a chuo khu taata Paul ta zangtuv tie kha ku yite thaazuo pi yite bie aa chang siy khu taayita Masidonia luo a si.
44020002	Capa ruo chung ca cahraw te zangtuv tie kha thaazuo a hluvsa a pi khu taayita Grik ruo luo kha pha te,
44020003	capa lieca thla thung chung a aw. Siria luo kha tiypalaw ta a si'a nang tli pata Judah ming ta ama raw nakawta Masidonia luo kaa riypata bie aa chi pakhaa.
44020004	Berea khy ming Pirhas saacapaapa Sopater, Thesalonika ming Aristarkas hne Sekanda, Derbe khy ming Gaius, hne Asia ruo taata Timote, Tikhikas hne Trofimas zaw ta ama hne khata ama tlaw ra.
44020005	Iema kha silu yite Troas khy taata malie ama za huo.
44020006	Cuorasala kiema ca Thiynung Phuv lipa Viechuo pyi khu taata Filipi taakhata tiypalaw ta ma si. Ning pangaa khu taata Troas khy lie kha va pha yi pate capa lieca ning sariy ma aw.
44020007	Zaakha chunglie ningtaapa ning, Abyipa zuosa a hraw riypata maa taw pata, Paul ta iema kha bie a rue yite, a mawluopa ca sile aa ting nakawkhata zuocang te ta a bieri kha ama pazue.
44020008	Maa pungnapa a cung duo lieca myi-ing a hluvpuv ama vuo.
44020009	Zutikhas ama tapa satlie pakha ca thlaluo-aw lie kha a tu te Paul ta a syipuv ta bie a ripazue nguoluo ning kha thuvhunglung khata a hmung nakawta duothungna taakhata alyi luo tla te a thiy pata amaa haa.
44020010	Cuorasala Paul ca cung te, a bungchiy te a paw khu taata, “Nama thlaa zang kha se, a hring thluo,” a ta yi.
44020011	Cakhutaata Paul ca a cung duo luo kha kya kie te, viechuo kha chechi te ama ning khu taata, iema hne khata, khydyina te bie a rue yite aa thale.
44020012	Satliepapaa ca a hring pata ing luo cakuo khyi yite ama hnaa a nguosa.
44020013	Kiema ca tiypalaw ta Assos luo kha silu pate Paul kha kupaa riypata maa ting, tahematapakieca ama ca tluo luota si te kupaa riypata malie a chang ciepa ta a cuo.
44020014	Assos lie kha maa taw taata tiypalaw luo ca kie ra te Mitilene luo kha ma si.
44020015	Ama taacata si pate a mawluopa ta Khios a riechuo luo kha ma chiy. A hezuoningpa ta Samos luo kha chiy pate, a khetuningpa ta Miletas luo kha ma chiy.
44020016	Paul ta Asia ruo chunglie cuo pachuo sa li riypata Efesa kha law pata si aa ting. Tahematapakieca, a cuo khu kieca, Pentekos ning kha Jerusalem lie awpa a khing.
44020017	Paul ta Melitas taakhata Efesa Khrihsaa uvthyi tie kha amaa vya taw riypata bie a taalu yi.
44020018	Amaa vya taw tiyta, iema kha, “Asia lie i phyi i pathla baataata ata tepa hingta nama hrawlie tuokhaatama i tu i daa tapa kha ina pachang ungciy.
44020019	Rawcanawna'a nata mingthliy hneta Abyipa re kha hrie ang te, Judah ming ina rawna taayita a vawpa ruvnaana kha i ang law.
44020020	Ingkha hnang ingkha ta cuose, zaapuv ta cuose ica pacuv ning yi hne thuophaabie i ukhyina lie kha nama cuota phana a cuopa ca suokha hmuo i nguo siypa aw vyi.
44020021	Judah ming nama cuozaw, Grik ming nama cuozaw Khazing'a luo kha a ngiepachiy pata Abyipa Zingsuv nama zang riypa kha ica chang yi.
44020022	Ata hing ca Thlaapa luochiyna haata khaapama i taw aa tapa kha pachang li pata Jerusalem luo i sile ningta a cuo.
44020023	I pachangpa ca, Thlaapa Pathe ta na chang te, khy ting taata thawtlana hne hrisaathieruena ta ina huo tapa khata a cuo.
44020024	Cuorasala Abyipa Zingsuv'a taata i hmungpa, Khazing vihnyina kaw thuophaabie phu riypa re hing i patlung pata a cuo kieca i hringna hing ca i cuota khaapatahmuo ri va ang.
44020025	Ata hing ca nama hrawlie ta sibungsithaw ang te Khazing pena thuophaa ica changpa yi niema ahungtahmuo i hmie na hmung pakhaa'a va tli ungciy tapa kha i pachang.
44020026	Cacuonakawta ata ning ta niema'a lie a siesa pata ica changpa yi ca, ahung thiyse kawlie tahmuo cuo sala kama ca i pathe,
44020027	tahematapakieca Khazing ta a tingpa kha nguo siy li pata niema'a lie ica chang diy karuv yi.
44020028	Niema hne niema kha a mangchiy ungla Thlaapa Pathe ta mangchiy riypata aca pipa yi tuvrung zaw kha mangchiy tie ung. Khazing ta saacapaa thiyse ta a calyipa a khrihsaabuv zaw kha mangchiy tie ung.
44020029	I si khu taahingta a hruosapa cahnie zaw kha niema hraw luo a vaw'a yite, tuvrung kha ca pangaa'a vayi tapa i pachang.
44020030	Niema phuv chung lalaapa taata cawsaa chekha ca zangtuv tie ta iema hnang ama ziy the riypata biehmisipa ri li pata ama hang aa.
44020031	Cacuonakawta a raaring ungla, kung thung chung bangkhuo, chung hne zuo hne a pahy li pata mingthliy hneta ica za changpa yi kha maw kha ung.
44020032	Ata hing ca niema kha Khazing'a luo na ica pi yi. Cakhutaata niema kha ca pakiesathaw'a yite a pathe sapa tie hraw lieta ru caa pipa yi a vihnyina thuophaabie luo kha ica pi tli yi.
44020033	Ahung siyy, ahung ngu hne ahung cawsie hmuota hietlie buo vayi ang.
44020034	Kama hne kama cuose, i viesaa zaw cuose i kuvta tah i ringpa yi kha niema hrahring na a pachang ungciy.
44020035	Hinghaahingta temaa pata rehriena taahingta na a ruvnaapa tie maa bya aa tapa kha i tuepa bangkhuo taata ica pahmung sa tli yi. Abyi Zingsuv hrahring ta, “Hmungna luo laata pina luo na thluechiy a aw vie,” a tapa kha maw kha ung.
44020036	Capa bie ca a patlung taata ama pakhuv pane yite thlaa ama chuo.
44020037	Ama caapuopa khata ama kha cakuv yite ama pahnuo.
44020038	Na hmung pakhaa va tli'a ungciy, a ta nakaw yi khata ama ngie a chi vie pacuo pata a cuo. Cakhutaa cata tiypalaw te kha ama va pathlie.
44021001	Iema hne maa che khu taata a dangsa pata si pate Kos luo kha ma chiy; a mawluopa ta Rhodes luo kha chiy pate cakhutaata Patara luo ma chiy.
44021002	Fonisia luo a si'a nangpa tiypalaw kha hmung pate capa palaw cata ma va caluo.
44021003	Saipras aa luo nate chiy pate ma cavyi luo kuo ta ma thuse khu taata Siria luo chiy pate Tair lie kha ma cung, tahematapakieca capa lieca ma tiypalaw kha a hmang a pachung.
44021004	Zangtuv tie kha a taw yi pate capa lieca ning sariy ma aw. Thlaapa ta a changna haayita Paul kha Jerusalem luo si li riypata ama thlu.
44021005	Cuorasala iema'a lie ma awnapa cuo ca chuo te, thuse yi pate maa tha pakhaa. Ama nung ama saa yalya hne khata khy le luo te malie ama vya pathlie. Capa riyliy kie lieca ma pakhuv pane pate, iema hne cata thlaa chuo pakhaw pate
44021006	pakha hne pakha kha, nama tluo pata, maa ta. Cakhutaata tiypalaw cung luo kha kie pate iema ca ama kaa.
44021007	Tair taacata si pate Ptolemai luo kha ma chiy; zangtuv tie kha bie a chang yi pate iema'a lieca ning kha ma aw.
44021008	A mawluopa ca a tha pakhaa pate Sisaria ma chiy. Uvthyi pasariy hrawlie pakha a cuopa, thuophaabie a rituv Filip ing lie kha ma tlung.
44021009	Navaa a hnyi lipa sacanung papaliy hnyi te iema ca profet-biephu ri khuna lasaw a hmungpa ta ama cuo.
44021010	Capa lieca ning hluvpuv ma aw khu taata, Agabas ama tapa profet pakha Judea taata a za chiy.
44021011	Kiema'a luo kha a vaw te, Paul tesaw kha la te a phyi hne a kuv kha aa ciy khu taata, “Thlaapa Pathe na hinghaahingta naa chang, ‘Jerusalem lie a awpa Judah ming ta hingpa tesaw a hnyipapaa hing hinghaahingta ciy'a yite Jentail ming kuv luo ama pi aa,’” a ta.
44021012	Capa bie ca ma thyi tiyta, kiema hne capa lie a awpa cawsaa zaw cata Jerusalem luo si li riypata ma thlu.
44021013	Cakhutaa, Paul ta, “Khaapama nama tue, caa ung cate i pathiy i palung ina pa-ichi ungciy? Ina ciypakang riypa dyi yi hing cuo li pata Zingsuv Khrih cuota Jerusalem lie thiy riypata hmuo muo i ting ta,” a ta yi.
44021014	Tuokhaatahmuo ripasa the a aw li nakawta, “Khazing khingna haa cuo thluo se,” dyi tapa te a dieta tah ma aw.
44021015	Cakhutaacata a pachie pate Jerusalem luo ca ma si.
44021016	Sisaria khy taata a ziytuv chekha kha kiema hneta kya si ra yite, iema cata a hluo baataata a ziytuv zaa cuopa, Saipraspa Mnason ing luo kha malie chiytha yite capa lieca ma aw.
44021017	Jerusalem luo ma chiy tiyta, uvnu zaw ta palung tluosa pata malie ama cuhluo.
44021018	A mawluopa ta Paul hne kiema zaw bangkhuo ca Jeim a taw riypata vaa pate Khrihsaa uvthyi tie bangkhuo kha ama aw ra.
44021019	Iema kha bie maa chang khu taayita, Paul ta ama rehrienapa taata Jentail ming hrawlie Khazing hmangtuepa bangkhuo kha suokha hnang suokha ta a chang yi.
44021020	Ca bie ca ama thyi tiyta Khazing kha ama pathuosa. Cakhutaata ama kha, “Uvnu Paul, Judah ming hrawlie hing zangtuv thaw khazaa aw yite ma phungbie khatluv ta amaa daakhyi tapa hing na pachang.
44021021	Jentail ming hrawlie a awpa Judah ming kha, Moses phungbie kha thuse riypa hne ama saata zaw kha vangdaw te li riypa hne Judah phung kha ziy li riypatana a pacuv yi, tapata iema ta na kaw kha ama thyi tli.
44021022	Cacuonakawta tuokhaata tuepa tama a pha aa? Hingpa luo na vya chiypa hing ama pachang ngiethie hyi aa.
44021023	Cacuonakawta maca changpa hing tue tie. Kiema'a lie hing biekuona a tuepa cawsaa papaliy ama aw.
44021024	Iema hing ziy yi la a pathesana ama tuepa kha va tue ra la ama suo a nguna muo kha va liepa tie yi. Cata a cuo kieca na kaw ama thyipa hing suokha hmuo cuo vyi tapa hne nama hrahring phungbie na ziypa kha ama pachang aa.
44021025	Cuorasala zangtuv a vya cuopa Jentail ming tuv kha ca kiema ta, kuvtuezuv lie hriykhung amaa rinapa sa ning li riypa, thiy ning li riypa, a rue cadiepa ta ama thiepa saa bangkhuo ce li riypa, hne aparuvsuena tue li riypa tapa ma bie chinapa caa kha ma paphya tli yi, ama ta.
44021026	A mawluopa ta Paul ca cawsaa tie kha a chiy yite a pathena a tue. Iema hne cata biena-ing luo kha a ngie te, khatiy tama a pathesana a chuo aa tapa hne pakha cyicuo cuota hriykhung a rina ama tue riypa cuo zaw kha a chang yi.
44021027	A ningsariynapa a chuo'a nangpa khata, biena-ing chunglie Paul a awpa a hmungpa, Asia taata a vawpa Judah ming ta cawsaazaapuv kha ama pasu. Ama kha patuv yite,
44021028	“Israel ming zaw, malie a bya tie ung! Hingpapaa hingna ruo ting ta sile te cawsaa bangkhuo kha ma cawsaa a duna, ma phungbie a duna hne hingpa hmang hrahring hing a du pata a pacuvle yi. Cadyi cuo li pata Grik ming kha biena-ing chung luo a ngiekhyi yite hing hmang pathepa hing a papya a palyi,” ta yite ama khi.
44021029	Tahematapakieca Efesapa Trofimas hne khata khy chunglie za hmung yite, Paul na biena-ing luo a ngiekhyi tapata ama rue nakawtana a cuo.
44021030	Khy chunglie ca hnaahnawna ta a bi. Cawsaa ca a vya ruo yite, Paul kha biena-ing lie patuv yite ale luo amaa dale khu taata biena ing chiypakaa kha ama hre.
44021031	Ama kha thie amaa nang nguoluo pata Jerusalem khychung yalya tana hnaahnawna a aw tapa bie kha Rom rieka uvtuv byi'a luo a chiy.
44021032	Sungkhabala ta riebyi chekha hne rieka tie kha a chiy yite iema'a luo ca amaa ruo. Riebyipa hne rieka tie kha ama hmung taata Paul ama tuvpa ca ama taw.
44021033	Riebyipa ta a vaw te Paul kha a patuv khu taata thaabuoliriy suohning ta cakhiy riypata bie pi yite; ama kha a ahung ta cuote ma khaapama a za tue taw tapa kha dya a hiehriy yi.
44021034	Cawsaazaapuv hraw taata a che ta phangkha ta ama khi, a hrangpa a che ta a phanghrang ta ama khi patlaw nakawta riebyipa ca a cuo tangepa kha pachang khu li pata Paul kha riekate luo a ngiekhyi riypata naw a pi yi.
44021035	Hlyidaw te ama chiykhyipa kha taca cawsaazaapuv kha ama chaa tuv nakawta rieka tie ta a caba ta ama cabale.
44021036	A vya nuosuelepa cawsaazaapuv cata, “Thie tie ung!” tapata ama khi.
44021037	Riekate luo ama vya sikhyi'a nangpa khata, Paul ta riebyipa kha, “Bie suokha ca chang khu the'a ang ma?” a ta. Riebyipa ta, “Grik ryi ma na the?
44021038	Cacuokie, ma hnangluota ningta cehre a cyipa cawsaa thawpaliy ruochung luo sikhyi te rie a thupa Iziptpapaa kha taca cuo vaciy nuo? a ta.
44021039	Paul ta, “Kama ca Silisia ruo Tarsas khy, khypuv ming pathuopa lie a puvpa Judah ming tana i cuo. Paa na ica kie, cawsaazaapuv'a lie hing bie napa ri sa thi tie,” a ta.
44021040	Riebyipa ta bie rina naw a pi pahne, Paul ca hlyidaw cunglie kha a daa te, cawsaazaapuv'a luo kha a kuv pazuu te a padie sa yi. Ama die diy khu taata iema'a lie kha Hebru ryi ta bie a ri.
44022001	“Uvnu zaw'a nata paa zaw, niema hmie lieta i sue linapa bie i ripa hing naa na thliepa tie ung.”
44022002	Hebru ryi ta a ripa kha ama thyi tiyta ama die karing. Cakhutaacata,
44022003	“Kama ca Silisia ruo Tarsas khy lieta a puvpa Judah ming tana i cuo, cuorasala i lenapa ca hingpa khy hingta a cuo. Gamaliel kuv raw lieta mingchingmingvuo tie zaw phungbie kha pacuvpa ta cuo ang te niema zaw bangkhuo haahingta Khazing cuota a pipa tana i cuo.
44022004	Hing Phungluo a ziypa tie hing thiyna te ta za hrisaa yi ang te, canung capaa ta patuv yi ang te thaw-ing luo i za khungpa yi kha
44022005	tluobyilecepa hne bierituvphuv uvthyi tie bangkhuo hing naa pachangtuv ta ama cuo. Iema'a taahingta Damaskas khy lie a awpa uvnu zaw pi riypa caa kha a la ang te, capa lie a awpa tie ca patuv pata, cakhiy pata, Jerusalem luo chiykhyipa yi ta duo te riypa yita i si hning yi.
44022006	“Damaskas luo ca si ang te i pha tyalya caw, ningchung hraw khiy ta avuo taata khena ta sungkha ta ina za ka.
44022007	Alyi lie a lie ang te ueryi suokha i thyipa ca, Saul, Saul, khaapanakawma ina hrisaathierue ciy?’ ina ta.
44022008	Kama ta, “Abyipa, ahung tama na cuo?” i ta. Cakhutaaca ama ta, “Na hrisaathierue nguoluopa Nazareth Zingsuv tana i cuo,” ina ta.
44022009	Kama'a lie a aw rapa tie ta khena dyi kha hmung yite kama'a lie bie zaa ripa ueryi kha thyi vayi.
44022010	Kama ta, “Abyipa, Khaapama i tue aa?” i ta. Abyipa ta, “Thu la Damaskas luo kha si tie; Khazing ta hrie riypata aca pipa bangkhuo ca aca chang'a yi,” ina ta.
44022011	Khena ta ina khetuv nakawta i ming ca hmung the li pata i viesaa zaw khata i kuv ta na ca-yale yite Damaskas luo inaa chiyle yi.
44022012	“Phungbie kha ziy te Khazing'a luo aa pipasesa nakawta capa lie a awpa Judah ming bangkhuo ta ama rithuophaapa Ananias ama tapapaa kha
44022013	a vaw te, i thaa lie kha a daa te, ‘Uvnu Saul, hmung pakhaa tie!’ ina ta. Capatahne cata i ming ca vuo te ama kha i hmung.
44022014	Cakhutaaca ama ta, ‘Ma mingchingmingvuo tie Khazing ta a khingna na pachang riypa hne, aa dangpapaa na hmung riypa hne a ueryi na thyi riypata acaa tlaw tli;
44022015	tahematapakieca hing chuelyi lieta na hmungpa hne na thyipa bangkhuo hing a cuota pachangkhyituv riypatana na cuo aa.
44022016	Cacuonakawta khaapama na haasaa? Thu la tiy a naw tie, ama ming kha u la na suena kha pathe sa tie,’ ina ta.
44022017	“Jerusalem luo i kaa khu taata biena-ing lie thlaa i chuo nguoluo ning kha muocuo hmung ang te,
44022018	Zingsuv ta, ‘Jerusalem taahingta a catli pata pya tie, tahematapakieca kama kaw tehte na khuopa kha cuhluo vayi,’ a ta.
44022019	Kama ta, ‘Abyipa, apungna-ing ting ta vaa ang te nama caa zangpa tie kha tuv yi ang te thaw i pathlapa yi kha iema ta ama pachang.
44022020	Cakhutaata, nama kaw pachangkhyituv Steven thiyse palang yite ama thie ning zaw kha kama hrahring amaa thaa lie a daa ang te, palung tlingsa pata, ama a thiepa tie buohryicungle kha i kingpa yi,’ i ta.
44022021	Cakhutaa, ama ta, ‘Cakuo tie, tahematapakieca Jentail ming hraw luo na ica pathlie aa,’ ina ta,” a ta.
44022022	Paul bie ripa kha ama te hing ca naa ama thlie, cuorasala ama khutaa ca, “Hingpaapa cawsaa hing chuelyi lie aw kha se! Thie tie ung! Hring a tla vyi! ta yite ama khi.
44022023	Ama khi nguoluo ning ca ama pang kha cathlu yite buvcing kha avuo luo ama hi.
44022024	Riebyipa cata khaapanakawma hing tluv ta a du yite ama khi tapa kha pachangna riypata Paul kha riekate luo a chiy ungla, tuv ungla, bie hiehriy tie ung, tapata naw a pi yi.
