44022025	Cuorasala tuv riypata ama cakhiy khupa khiy ta, a thaa lieta a daapa riebyipa kha Paul ta, “Rom ruo ming pakha kha a bie ripa li pata tuv phung a cuo ma?” tapata a hiehriy.
44022026	Riebyicawpa ta a thyi tiyta riebyipa'a luo kha vaa te, “Khaapama na tue'a nang? Amapaa hing Rom ruo ming tana a cuo tli hing,” a ta.
44022027	Riebyipa ta a vaw te Paul kha, “Na chang tie, Rom ruo ming ta na cuo ma?” a ta. Ama ta, “I cuo,” a ta.
44022028	Riebyipa ta, “Rom ruo ming cuona hmung riypa hingta tuokaa a hluvsa i pachuo,” a ta. Paul ta, “Kama ca i zaa puvkhyipa tana Rom ruo ming i cuo,” a ta.
44022029	Bie a hiehriy'a nangpa mekaa ca sungkha ta a saw se diy yite; Rom ruo ming a cuopa Paul a cakhiy tlamu nakawta riebyipa zaw kha a thlaa a zang.
44022030	Riebyipa ca Judah ming ta Paul sue ama phawpa hing khaapanakawma a cuo tapa kha a pachang khing nakawta a mawluopa ta Paul ca pathlie te tluobyi tie hne bierituv tie bangkhuo kha a hmya riypata naw a pi yi. Paul kha a vya chiy te ama hmiekunglie a padaa.
44023001	Paul ta bierituvphuv kha a hmiepachaw pata mang yite, “Uv zaw nu zaw, ata ning tepa hingta ca i hringna lie hing Khazing hmiekunglie i chiephathleduona palung a pathe,” a ta.
44023002	Capa bie a ri khu pahne cata tluobyilecepa Ananias ta Paul a thaalie a daapa tie kha a hmyataw cabe riypata naw a pi yi.
44023003	Paul ta ama kha, “Nama, thungruopa a thuvpa lungruetlepie, Khazing na nama kha caa cabe aa, Phungbie haata kama bie ripa riypata naa tu thluopa hingtama, nama ta phungbie para cate cabe ungla ina ta ciy?” a ta.
44023004	A thaalie a tupa tie ta, “Khazing tluobyilecepa na na ese,” ama ta.
44023005	Cakhutaa, Paul ta, “Uv zaw nu zaw, tluobyilecepa a cuopa kha i pachang li nakawtana a cuo; Caapathepa lieta, “Na mingphang luochiytuv kha a thuo pachi'a va ungciy a ta,” a ta yi.
44023006	Paul ta chekha tie kha Sadusi ta cuo yite chekha Farasi ta ama cuopa kha a pachang tiyta, bierituvphuv tie kha, “Uv zaw nu zaw, Kama ca Farasi tie, Farasi tie saata tana i cuo. Hingpa lieta bie ripa riypata i cuopa hing a thiypa tie ama thupakhaa aa tapa a ruechuona i hnyi nakawta a cuo,” a ta.
44023007	Capa bie ca a ri tiyta, Farasi tie hne Sadusi tie a lala lie kha ruena a che te a hmyapa tie ca phuvhning ta amaa che.
44023008	(Sadusi tie ta, thupakhaanapa, a cuo li kie avuoming, a cuo li kie thlaapa aw vyi ama ta, cuorasala Farasi tie taca a suothung ta ama zang diy.)
44023009	Khuopuv ta a i yite, Farasi phungbie saya tie kha a daa yite, “Hingpapaa hing a suenapa suokha hmuo hmung va puv. Thlaapa a cuo li kie avuoming ta ama chang sasaw pata a cuo khu,” ama ta.
44023010	Khuopuv ta amaa i nakawta Paul kha a chuv'a yite thlaachi diy'a kie yi tapata riebyipa kha a thlaa a zang. Cacuonakawta Paul kha hruohra ta za la pata riekate luo chi riypata rieka tie kha naw a pi yi.
44023011	Capa zuopa cata Abyipa kha a thaalie a daa te, “Khaapahmuo ciy kha! Tahematapakieca Jerusalem lie kama cuota tehte na khuopa haahingta Rom lie zaw kama cuota tehte na khuo kalie aa,” a ta.
44023012	A mawluomawpa ta Judah ming ca a paruvta tah a taw yite khue pha lipa ama khuo. Paul ma thie hluo li sa ning li tiy dang li patana ma aw aa ta yite bie amaa kuo.
44023013	Capa a paruv ta khue pha lipa ama khuona lieca cawsaa sawliy hlyi ama ta.
44023014	Iema ca tluobyilepa tie hne uvthyi tie'a luo kha cakuo yite, “Paul ma thie hluo li sa ning'a va puv tapatana a cusa pata bie maa kuo.
44023015	Cacuonakawta niema hne bierituv phuv tie ta, a kaw hingna a sie vie ta ma hiehriy khing e dya ta ungla Paul kha niema'a luo a za pathlie riypata riebyipa kha hie tie ung. Hingpa luo hing a za chiy hluo ta ma thie aa,” ama ta.
44023016	Cahaa cata thie riypata ama byapa kha Paul a tuvpaapa ta a pachang nakawta riekate luo kha vaa te Paul kha a chang.
44023017	Paul ta riebyipa pakha kha ku te, “Hingpapaa hing riebyilepa'a luo kha vaakhyi tie, bie chang riypa na a hnyi,” a ta
44023018	Cacuonakawta vaakhyi te, “Thaw a tlapapaa Paul khata na ku tena hing satliepapaa hing bie chang riypa a hnyi nakawta nama'a luo vaakhyi la ina ta,” a ta.
44023019	Riebyipa ta a kuv ta ca-yale te ama selaw ta a cakuokhyi khu taata, “Khaapa bie ma ina chang khing ciy? tapata a hiehriy.
44023020	Ama ta, “Judah ming ta Paul kha a kaw na a sie vie ta ma pachang khing dya tapata bierituv phuv hmiekung luo chiykhyi riypata nama'a luo hie riypa kha palung tlingna ama hnyi mangtli.
44023021	Cuorasala ama bie kha zang lie ciy, cawsaa sawliy hlyi na ama thie riypata luopuv lieta a bya yi. Paul ma thie hluo li ta sa ning li tiy dang li patana ma aw aa ta yite bie amaa kuo mangtli. Iema ca a ting pacie diy pata aw yite nama biechina hingna ama huo thluo,” a ta.
44023022	Cacuonakawta riebyipa ta “Hingpa kaw ina changpa cahing ahunghmuo chang khue,” ta te satliepa kha a pathlie.
44023023	Riebyipa cata riebyi pahning kha ku yite, “Ata zuo siymaluo pacaky ta Sisaria luo si riypata rieka zahning, aruo rieka sawsariy, hne asyi rieka zahning kha a pachie pacie pata chi tie yi.
44023024	Paul aa khang riypa aruo zaw kha pachiepa la muokiybyi Feliks'a luo kha abang-asusa pata chiykhyi tie ung,” a ta.
44023025	Riebyipa ta a raw luo haahingta caa a cape:
44023026	“Kalaudias Lisias na Muokiybyipa Feliks'a luo bie a changna caa caa paphya ang.
44023027	Hingpa cawsaapa hing Judah ming ta patuv yite thie amaa nang, cuorasala Rom ruo ming a cuopa kha i pachang tiyta i rieka tie hneta ama kha ma khuo.
44023028	Khaapanakawma ama hing sue ama phaw tapa kha i pachang khing nakawta bierituv phuv luo kha i chiykhyi.
44023029	Iema phungbie hne a patuv pata sue ama phawpa ta cuote thaw pathla riypa hne thiy riypata aa phuvpa suena suokha hmuo hnyi vyi.
44023030	Ama kha raw yite thie amaa nangpa thuo i thyi tiyta, nama'a luo ca za paphya ang te, sue a phawtuvpa tie zaw kha nama hmiekung luo tazaa va cyi ungla i ta yi,” a ta.
44023031	Cacuonakawta, rieka tie ca nawpipa ama cuopa haata, Paul kha va la yite zuo ta Antipatris te ama sikhyi.
44023032	A mawluopa ca aruo rieka tie kha pathlie sa yite, iema ca riekate luo ama vya kaa.
44023033	Sisaria luo chiy yite caa kha muokiy byipa ca ama pi; Paul zaw kha a kuv luo ama pi ra.
44023034	Caa kha ri te, Paul kha khaapa pe ming tama a cuo tapa kha hiehriy te, Silisia pe ming a cuopa kha a pachang ca,
44023035	“Tazaa caa cyipa tie ama vya chiy taatana na bie ica ripa aa,” a ta. Cakhutaata ama kha Herod siepahruo ing lie kha rieka ta huo riypata naw a pi yi.
44024001	Ningpangaa khu taata tluobyilecepa Ananias ca uvthyi chekha'a nata sihni Tertullas hneta muokiybyipa'a luo kha Paul sue ama phawna bie kha ama chang.
44024002	Paul amaa vya ngiekhyipa hneta Tertullas ta hinghaahingta suephawna bie kha a ri: Abyipa, Nama thueta diena chunglie cuo syipuv vya aw pate, na singna thueta hing cawsaa zaw cuo hingta pare riypa a hluvpuv pare pata a cuo.
44024003	Hingpa bangkhuo hing hmangting lie a awpa kiema bangkhuo ta ma palung aa tluokhyi hringhruo.
44024004	Na cuo kha a syituv ca lapa'a kie ang tapata i ri riypa bie hing a pachangna chung ta vya ri'a ang te naa na thliepa thi la tapata icaa nue.
44024005	Hingpapaa hing zaapuv hrawlie hnaahnawna a chiykhyituv, chuelyicung khy ting lie a awpa Judah ming hrawlie hnaahnawna a aw riypata pasutuv hne Nazareth buv ama tapa luochiytuv tana a cuo.
44024006	Biena-ing zaw kha papyapalyi aa chie nakawta ma patuv pata a cuo. (
44024007	Ma phungbie haata bie ripa pa ma khing raalaa pata riebyilepa Lusias ta kiema kuv taakhata hruohra ta malie chuv te ama sue a phawpa tie kha nama hmie luo chiy riypata naw malie a pi.)
44024008	Ama hing bie na hiehriy kieca sue ma phawnapa bangkhuo hing a sie vie ta na pachang aa,” a ta.
44024009	Judah ming zaw ta suephawna lie kha vaa pahlaw yite ama ripa bangkhuo hing aa hmuopa se tana a cuo ama ta.
44024010	Muokiybyipa ta Paul kha bie ri la ta te a kuv a va pazu tiyta, Paul ta: Nama ca hingpa mingphang cunglie hing kung syipuv chung bieripatuv byi na cuo tli tapa kha i pachang nakawta, i sue lina kaw hing palung tluosa pata i ri aa.
44024011	Na pachangna haata, Jerusalem luo Khazing bie riypata i khawnapa hing ning hraa hlyihning laata syi vie valie.
44024012	Iema hingta biena-ing chunglie pakhakha hneta bie maa ipa cuose, apungna-ing chunglie'a nata khy chunglie ta cawsaazaapuv kha pasu pata hnaahnawna i tuepa zaw na hmung vayi.
44024013	Sue ina phawpa zaw yi hingma aa hmuo hrahring tapata na hmielie hing ri khu tange'a vayi.
44024014	Cadyiseca, na hmiekunglieta i cuo thluo tapata i ri khingpa ca, iema ta a sichiepa buvthaapa ama tapa, Phungluo haata ma mingchingmingvuo tie ta amaa zaa biepa Khazing kha abie ang te, profet tie caa-uv lie aa capepa hne phungbie chunglie'apa bangkhuo kha i zang.
44024015	Iema zaw amaa nguopuo pata a cuopa, cawsaa hing a phapa hne a chiepa hne thiyna taata ama thupakhaa aa tapa kha Khazing'a lieta a nguopuona i hnyi.
44024016	Cacuonakawta Khazing hmielie hne cawsaa hmielieta chiephathleduona palung pathesapa ta i hring khuna riypata i zue pari.
44024017	Kung a syi myarya khu taata i mingphang tie abyana phya riypa hne Khazing'a luo hriykhungri riypata Jerusalem luo hing i vya chiy.
44024018	Capa hmang i tue nguoluo ning, phung haata a pathena i tue khutaa khata biena-ing chunglie na hmung yite, capa ning ca cawsaazaapuv zaw aw vayi, hnaahnawna suokha hmuo aw ra vyi.
44024019	Cuorasala Asia ruo taata Judah ming chekha aw yite, kama kha sue ina phaw khing kie yi ca nama hmiekung luo hing a vaw pata sue ina phaw riypa yi a cuo.
44024020	A cuo li kie hingpa lie a awpa tie hingta bierituv phuv hmielie i daa ning hing khaapa suena ma i tue tapa kha ri yi se.
44024021	Ama hmielie i daa ningta hmang suokha tuv ca i ripa a aw, caca a thiypa tie thupakhaana kaw cuote capa kawlie cata ata ning na hmiekunglie i daapa hingta a cuo,” a ta.
44024022	Cuorasala capa Phungluo kaw ca a phata tah a pachangpa Feliks ta a bie ca pachuo te, “Riebyilepa Lisias a za chiy taatana na bie ica ripa aa,” a ta.
44024023	Cakhutaacata riebyipa kyihuo khata thaw a tlapa tie khungcawna ing lie chi riypata naw pi te, cuorasala hyazang vie ta chi riypa hne ama kha aa huna lie ama mangsang the riypata a vya tawpa a viesaa zaw kha pakha hmuo thlu li riypata a chang.
44024024	Ning a cawta a rupa khiy ta, Feliks ca Judah zaanung ta a cuopa a napuvnung Drusilla hneta a vaw yite Paul kha ku te Khrih Zingsuv zangna kaw a ripa kha naa ama thlie.
44024025	Paul ta adangna kaw, pangpa a cadangna kaw, a vaw riypa bierina kaw tapa tie kha a ri tiyta Feliks ca a thlaa zang te, “ata hing ca cakuo caw tie, cuo i hnyi taata ica ku pakhaa aa,” a ta.
44024026	Feliks ca, Paul ta tuokaa ina pi thlu aa tapata a nguopuo nakawta ata'a na ata tah a taw te bie aa rue.
44024027	Kung hning khu taata Feliks ca Porsias Festas ta aa thle. Feliks ta Judah ming palung a patluo khing nakawta, Paul kha thaw-ing lie a thuse siy.
44025001	Capa pe chung luo a pha taata ningthung a tapata Festas ca Sisaria taata Jerusalem luo kha a khaw.
44025002	Ama lieca tluobyilepa tie hne Judah ming luochiytuv tie ta Paul sue ama phawnapa kha ama chang.
44025003	Festas kha paakie yite ngiechina pata Paul kha Jerusalem luo malie palawpa la ama ta. Hmisi ta kieca Paul kha luopuv lie a bawkhuo pata thie riypata khue ama khuo.
44025004	Festas ta, “Paul ca Sisaria thaw-ing chunglie aw thluo te kama zaw a ru hluo ta kaale i ting.
44025005	Cacuonakawta naw a hnyipa tie kha kama hne hingta a zuv ra ungla cawsaapapaa kha a suena a aw kieca sue za phaw tie ung,” a ta yi.
44025006	Iema'a lie ning cari a cuo li kie ning hraa hraw a aw khu taata Sisaria luo kha a si. A mawluopa ta bierina thude lie kha a tu te Paul kha kya pyakhyi riypata naw a pi yi.
44025007	Paul a kya chiy tiyta Jerusalem taata a zuvpa Judah ming ca ama kha cadung yite suephawna bie kha a hluvsa ama ri, cuorasala ama suephawna bie kha a hmuo hrahring tapata ri khu vayi.
44025008	Paul ta a sue lina kaw kha ri te, “Kama ta Judah ming phungbie cuose, biena-ing cuose, siepahruo cuose a du pata suena suokha hmuo tue va ang,” a ta.
44025009	Cuorasala Festas ta Judah ming palung a hmung khing nakawta Paul kha, “Jerusalem luo khaw pata i hmielie bie ripa riypata na khing'a ma?” a ta.
44025010	Paul ta, “Siepahruo bierina thude hmielie na i daa nguoluo; hingpa lie hingna bie ripa riypata i cuo. A phasa pata na pachangpa haata Judah ming cunglie suena i tuepa aw vyi.
44025011	Suena tue ang te thiy aa phuvpa i cuo kieca capa thiyna taacata a ruo riypata a ting'a va ang. Cuorasala sue ina phawpa yi hing aa hmuopa suokha hmuo a aw li kieca a ahungtahmuo kama hing iema kuv luo na pi khu vyi. Siepahruo'a luo na paduo i hu aa,” a ta.
44025012	Festas ca a viesaa bierituvphuv tie hneta bie amaa ruepakhaw khu taata, “Siepahruo'a luo paduo naa hu pahaata siepahruo'a luo na na si aa,” a ta.
44025013	Capa khu taata ning a syi myarya a ru pata, Agrippa Siepahruopa hne Bernis ca Festas bie a chang riypata Sisaria luo ama chiy.
44025014	Ning a syi myarya ama aw khu taata Festas ta siepahruo kha Paul kaw ca a chang. “Hingpa lie hing Feliks ta thaw a pathla siypa cawsaa pakha a aw.
44025015	Jerusalem lie i aw ningta tluobyilepa tie hne Judah uvthyi tie ta a kaw kha na chang yite a bie ripa la sue pacu tie ina ta yi.
44025016	Kama ta, Rom ming phung taca sue phaw a cuopa ca sue a phawpa tie hne a taw pata sue ama phawpa kha a sue lina kaw a pasiena bie a ri hluo ta sue a phawpa tie kuv luo pi riypa cuo vyi.
44025017	Cacuonakawta hingpa luo ama vya chiy pahne a mawluopa ta bierina zung lie kha a tu ang te cawsaapapaa kha kya papya riypata naw i pi yi.
44025018	Sue a phawtuvpa tie kha a vya daa yite sue ama vya phaw tiyta i mangkhuona haata sue phaw vayi.
44025019	Ama biena kawlieta bie amaa inapa hne Zingsuv ama tapa cawsaa pakha thiy te a hring pakhaa tapata Paul ta a ri nakawlie amaa ina kaw kha ama ri.
44025020	Hingpa kaw hing tuokhaatama a sie vie ta i pachang khu aa tapa kha a ruena caw i pachang li nakawta, Paul kha, Jerusalem luo si pata sue aca phawpa yi hing capa lieca ca ripa se angla na khing'a ma i ta.
44025021	Cuorasala Paul ta Siepahruo'a luo duo a hu riypata thaw-ing chunglie chi caw riypa kha a khing nakawta thaw-ing chunglie chi caw riypata naw i pi yi.
44025022	Agrippa ta Festas kha, “Capapaa bie ripa cana kama hrahring ta i thyi khing,” a ta. Festas ta, “Mawluo na thyi aa,” a ta.
44025023	Cacuonakaw a mawluopa ca Agrippa hne Bernis ca a rungnaasa pata zaapuv a pungna khuo luo kha riebyi tie'a nata khychung nungpaa tie hne khata amaa vya ngie. Cakhutaata Festas ta naw pi yite Paul ca amaa vya ngiekhyi.
44025024	Festas ta, “Siepahruo Agrippa hne kiema hne hingpa lie a awpa bangkhuo, hing nama hmungpapaa hing Jerusalem lie cuose, hingpa lie hing cuose, Judah ming bangkhuo ta hring a tla vyi ta yite kama'a lie sue ama phawpapaa ta a cuo.
44025025	Cuorasala hingpapaa hingta thiy aa phuvpa suena suokha hmuo tue vyi. Rom siepahruopa'a luo paduo aa hu nakawta Rom luo paphya riypata bie i chi.
44025026	Cuorasala a kaw hing siepahruopa'a luo cape ciemuo riypa hmung va ang. Cacuonakawta niema zaw bangkhuo hmiekung luo i vya chiykhyi. Siepahruo Agrippa, na hmiekung thathang luo i vya chiykhyi, tahematapakieca ama kha bie ma hiehriy khu taata cape riypa a cawta chuo i hnyi riypata i khing nakawta a cuo.
44025027	Kama cuo zaw ta thaw a tlapa pakha sue ama phawna kha a sie pata cape khu li pata i paphya riypa ca a phapa ta cuo vyi,” a ta.
44026001	Agrippa ta Paul kha, “Na kaw kha nama ta vya ri tie,” a ta. Paul ta a kuv kha vya pazuu te a sue lina kaw kha hinghaahingta a ri:
44026002	Siepahruo Agrippa, ata ning nama hmiekunglieta Judah ming ta sue ina phawpa yi palie hriy pata i sue lina kaw ri the riypa cuo i hmung nakawta i vuo a pha ciemuo tapata i rue.
44026003	Tahematapakieca Judah ming phungluo bangkhuo hne bie amaa ipa bangkhuo a pachang diytuv na cuo nakawta i bie ripa hing palung pasiysa pata naa na thliepa thi tie tapata icaa nue.
44026004	Judah ming bangkhuo hingta i cawta baataata tuokhaatama i hring tapa kha ina pachang diy yi. A hruothu baataata kama ca i cawsaa zaw hrawlie hne Jerusalem lie a awpa i cuopa kha ina pachang yi.
44026005	Ama ri khing pata a cuo kieca, ma biena lieta a pakangpahaacepa Farasi tie ta i cuopa kha ama pachang.
44026006	Ata zaw hing Khazing ta ma mingchingmingvuo tie'a lieta a za pipa biekuona i nguopuona kawlieta bierituv phuv hmielie i daapa a cuo.
44026007	Ca a nguopuona ca Israel ming phanghraahlyihning ta chung hne zuo hne Khazing zaa bie yite ma hmung aa tapata amaa zaa nguopuopa biekuona khatana a cuo. Capa a nguopuona kawlie cana, Abyipa, Judah ming ta sue ina phawpa yi hingta a cuo.
44026008	Khaapanakawma Khazing na a thiypa a pathu pakhaa tapa hing a cuo the li pata nama rue?
44026009	“Nazarethpa Zingsuv kaw hing i du khu thiyta i du aa tapata kama hrahring zaw i za rue buopa a cuo.
44026010	Capacana Jerusalem lie i za tuepa ta a cuo. Tluobyilepa tie'a taata nawpina za la ang te mingpathepa tie kha thaw chunglie i za pathlapa yi dyi cuo li pata iema ama thiena kawlie zaw a palung zaa tlingkhyipapaa ta i cuo.
44026011	Apungna-ing bangkhuo ta iema kha duo za tele yi ang te, Khazing ming ama ri pachie riypa kha i zaa zue. Iema cunglie i hi a za haa hringhruo nakawta iema hrisaathierue riypa khata ruohrang khypuv te ta i sihnuele yi.
44026012	Capa ruena hne cata, tluobyilepa tie nawpina hne pathliena ta Damaskas khy luo kha i si.
44026013	Ningchung hraw ta, Vya siepahruopa, luopuv lie i cakuole nguoluo pata ning laata a khe viepa avuo taata khena kha hmung ang te, kama hne i viesaa zaw cahriy lie kha a za khe.
44026014	Ma bangkhuo ta alyi lie maa lie ning kha, Hebru ryi ta, ‘Saul, Saul, khaapanakawma kama kha ina hrisaathierue ciy? Asung cahrepa phyi ta chipa ca nama cuota muo pasana a cuo ta,’ a tapa kha i thyi.
44026015	Kama ta, ‘Abyipa, ahung tama na cuo?’ i ta. Abyipa ta, ‘Kama ca na hrisaathierue nguoluopa Zingsuv tana i cuo,’ ina ta.
44026016	Cuorasala thu la na phyi ta a daa tie. Nama kha i changtaapa cuo riypa hne ata ning kama kaw na hmungpa hing hne ica pahmung sa kalie riypa kaw kha tehtekhuo riypatana icaa tlaw.
44026017	Nama kha ica pathlienapa na cawsaa zaw hraw taa hne Jentail ming'a taata ica khuo aa.
44026018	Ama ming kha pavuo sa'a yi cate iema ca zingna taata khena luo, Setaa cahrana taata Khazing'a luo kha amaa vya pali aa. Cakhutaa ama suena taata a ngiethena kha hmung'a yite kama zangna chunglie ta pathesapa tie hrawlie kha ama aw ra aa,’ ina ta.
44026019	Cakhutaacata, Siepahruo Agrippa, kama ta capa vuoruo taata muocuo ca pa-uvsathyi li pata aw khu va ang.
44026020	A hmietaace ta Damaskas lie a awpa tie, cakhutaa Jerusalem hne Judea ruochung bangkhuo hne Jentail ming'a luo te khata ama suena kha a ngiepachiy yite Khazing'a luo amaa vya pali riypa hne ama sue a ngiepachiyna kha tuena ta ama paluo sa riypata phung kha i chang yi.
44026021	Capa kawlie catana Judah ming ta biena-ing chunglie kha na patuv yite thie inaa nang yi.
44026022	Ata ning tepa hingta Khazing ta na due te, hinglie hing a daapa ta, a le a caw hmiekunglieta tehte i khuo pata a cuo. I ripa ca a hrangpa cuo li pata, Moses hne profet tie ta ama za ripa kha vya tling'a te,
44026023	Judah ming hne Jentail ming'a lie khuona khena kha pathyi sa riypata Messiah ca ruvnaana kha te-ang'a te thiyna taata pathu pakhaapa a pakhana ta a cuo aa, tapa hing tana a cuo,” a ta.
44026024	Paul ta a sue lina kaw a ri nguoluopa khata, Festas ta vya khisue te, “Paul, na palung a hmuo va tli! A hluv tuv caw cate na naa ngaakhyi tli!” a ta.
44026025	Cuorasala Paul ta, “I palung aa hmuo lipa cuo vyi, Abyipa Festas, cuorasala lungsingpya tana biedangpa ica chang.
44026026	Hmisi ta kieca, siepahruo ta hingpa hmang kaw hing a pachang diy, cacuonakawtana ama'a lie hing hyazangsa pata bie i ri. Tahematapakieca hingpa hmang hing nu pata, a cakiy lie tuepa a cuo li nakawta pachang li pata aw vaciy tapata i zang.
44026027	Siepahruo Agrippa, profet tie na zang yi ma? Na zang tapa kha ica pachang,” a ta.
44026028	Agrippa ta Paul kha, “Hing cuo pachangta chunglie hingma Khrihsaa pacuo sa inaa ting ciy?” a ta.
44026029	Paul ta, “A catli zaw a haa zaw nama dyi hmuo cuo li pata ata ning i bie naa a thliepa bangkhuo hingta kama haata nama cuo riypata thlaa i chuo, i thaabuoliriy hing ri li pata,” tapata a palie.
44026030	Cakhutaata siepahruo ca a daa te, muokiybyipa hne Bernis hne iema hne a tupa tie zaw kha amaa daa ra.
44026031	Ama pyapuole pata, pakha hne pakha kha, “Hingpapaa hingta thawtla aa phuvpa hne thiy aa phuvpa suena a tuepa aw vyi,” amaa ta.
44026032	Agrippa ta Festas kha, “Hingpapaa hing Rom siepahruo'a luo na paduo aa hu va tapa kieca pathlie riypa na a cuo raalaa aa,” a ta.
44027001	Italy luo tiypalaw ta si riypata bie chipa a cuo tiyta, Paul hne a hrangpa thaw a tlapa chekha kha “Siepahruo Rieka” tapa lieta riebyipa Julius kuv raw luo kha ama palaw.
44027002	Asia pe tiypalaw a dingnapa khy zaw capiepaale pata si a nangpa Adramittium khy taata tiypalaw kha maa khang. Masidonia ruo Thesalonika khypa Aristarkas zaw kha kiema'a lieca a si ra.
44027003	A mawluopa ta Sidon khy kha ma pha. Julius ca Paul'a lie kha phasa te a viesaa zaw'a luo cakuo riypa hne a viesaa zaw ta a huna haata vya pihluo riypa hne mangchiy riypa zaw kha a pase.
44027004	Ama taacata si pate kiema kuo luo dyi ta thliy a vya hruo nakawta, Saipras parala ruo thliynena luo kuo khata ma si.
44027005	Riyliy kha Silisia hne Pamfilia a dadaw taakhata te pate Lisia pe Mira khy luo kha ma pha.
44027006	Capa lieca riebyipa cata Alekzandria taata Italy luo a si'a nangpa tiypalaw kha hmung te malie a pakhang sa.
44027007	Ning syipuv chung duvsaa ta malie sikhyi te a ruvsa pata Nidas khy a dadaw te kha ma pha. Thliy kha kiema'a luota a vya hruo nakawta Krit parala thliynena luota si pate Salmon a rie-e luo kha ma chiy.
44027008	Ngiekuo hne a ngieta khata a ruvsa pata si pate Lisia khypuv a thaa lie a awpa Palaw Adingna Hnaanguo ama tapa luo ma chiy.
44027009	Cuo syipuv pachuo tli pate, Athlana Ning kha a law tli nakawta tiypalaw ta sipa zaw kha ciy aa chiysa tli. Cacuonakawta Paul ta ruena pi yite,
44027010	“I byipaa zaw, hingpa taahingta ma luopuv hing ciy a chiy te rakyina lepuv zaw maa taw khu. Hmang hne tiypalaw dyi cuo li pata ma hringna zaw ma pavie khu tapatana i hmung,” a ta yi.
44027011	Cuorasala riebyipa ta Paul ripa laa khata tiypalaw byipa hne a hnyituvpa ripa kha a zang vie.
44027012	Tiypalaw a dingnapa ca thlasiy chung awna ta a pha li nakawta hluv vie bangkhuo taca si pata Funiks ma pha khu kieca ama lieca thlasiy chung aw pata ama khing. Funiks ca Krit parala lie tiypalaw a dingna ta cuote sungluo ningtla luo hne chaluo ningtla luo pachaw pata a awpa tana a cuo.
44027013	Sungluo taata thlasiy thliy-neziyliypa ca a kya hruo te ama tingnapa kha ima pha khu aa tapata ama rue nakawta thaatungkyipa kha a dapuole yite ngiekuo hne a ngieta khata Krit parala luo ca ma si.
44027014	Cuorasala a ru hluo ta Karit luo taata, ‘ningchiy chaluo thliy,’ ama tapa khuosa ta a zaa hruo.
44027015	Ma tiypalaw ca thliy ta za de te hmie luo ma tung khu li nakawta thliy ca maa paphya sa thluo.
44027016	Kauda parala ruo cawta a sungluo kuo thliynena hmang ma chiy taata tiypalaw ta a cakelepa sawkawpalaw ca a ruvsapa khiy ta a phata tah ma pachie hru.
44027017	Tiypalaw cung luo kha khang yite khuhriy ta a cusa pata ama ciypuo. Sirtis viehnang tluo kha suv'a kie tapa ama ciy nakawta a pangzu kha pachung yite tiypalaw ca thliy kha ama paphya.
44027018	Thliy ta khuopuv ta malie a de nguoluo thluo nakawta a mawluopa taca tiypalaw cunglie hmang kha ama thaw.
44027019	A ningthungnapa taca tiypalaw chechiy kha iema kuv ta la yite ama thaw.
44027020	Ning syipuv chung ning cuose, aasiy cuose a luo li pata thliychie ca a hruo nguoluo thluo nakawta, a hnangcaw taca hring riy'apa khiy hmuo a nguopuo khu va tli puv.
44027021	Sa ning li pata a syisa ama aw nakawta, Paul ca iema hrawlie kha a daa te, “Uv zaw nu zaw, i ripa kha na zaa ngie ungla Krit taakhata si li pata ma aw kieca hing rakyina hing a taw'a va puv.
44027022	Cuorasala nama thlaa zang kha se, tiypalaw dyi hing ra'a te niema hrawlie ta ahunghinghmuo nama hringna ca vie'a vyi.
44027023	Tahematapakieca azuohnie khana naa hnyituv'a nata i biepa Khazing avuoming i thaalie zaa daa te,
44027024	‘Paul, ciy kha, Rom siepahruo hmielie naa daa ngiethie aa; na khy tlawhnepa bangkhuo hringna zaw hing aa bang aa, ina ta,’ a ta.
44027025	Cacuonakawta, nama thlaa zang kha se, uv zaw nu zaw, tahematapakieca ina changpa haahingta a cuo hrahring aa tapata Khazing'a lie zangna i hnyi.
44027026	Cuorasala thliy ta parala suokhakha luo malie a pazu aa,” a ta.
44027027	Zuohraa hlyipaliynapa vya chiy te Adria riyliy va te pata thliy ta malie a phyale ning kha tiypalaw rehrietuv tie khata tluo hnena maa ngie tli tapata ama palung a hring.
44027028	Tiy kha ama taa ca luo kiy a ta. A cawta a awpa ta taa pakhaa yite luo hraa hlyipangaa a tapa kha ama hmung.
44027029	Alung suv'a kiepuv tapa kha ama ciy nakawta tiypalaw a hnang luo taakhata thaatungkyipa suopaliy kha pathla yite thlaachuona hne khydyi riypa dyi kha ama huo.
44027030	Cuorasala tiypalaw rehrietuv tie kha a ruo a ting yite, thaatungkyipa na ma pathla tapa haakhata dya a pa-aw sa yite tiypalaw taakhata sawkawpalaw kha dya ama pachung.
44027031	Paul ta riebyipa hne rieka tie kha, “Hing cawsaa zaw hingna tiypalaw chunglie a aw vayi tapa kieca, hring khu'a va ungciy,” a ta yi.
44027032	Cakhutaaca rieka tie ta sawkawpalaw riy kha a cepachung yite tiy ama paphya.
44027033	Khy a dyi hluo ta lie kha Paul ta iema bangkhuo kha sa ning riypata a chang yi. “Sa ning lipa'a nata kharuehaa vuosuo pata nama awnapa hing ata ning taca ning hraa hlyipaliy a ta mangtli.
44027034	Cacuonakawta nama hringna riypata a hu nakawta sa nama ning riypata paa ica kie yi. Tahematapakieca nama luv cung lieta suobuv buvkha hmuo vie'a vyi,” a ta yi.
44027035	Cahaa cata a ri khu taata viechuo kha la te, Khazing kha alawna bie a chang khu taata iema bangkhuo hmiekunglie kha chechi te a ning.
44027036	Ama bangkhuo ta ama thaa kya pha te sa kha ama ning kaluo.
44027037	(Khy a tlawpa ma bangkhuo ta zahning sawsariy pacaruv ma ta.)
44027038	Ama riy bisa pata ama ning diy khu taata tiypalaw kha a hy vie naase tapata a chunglie jungsacuo kha tiy chung luo ama thaw.
44027039	Maw khy a kya dyi ca tiypalaw rehrietuv tie ta ama hmungpa tluo kha pachang khu vayi. Cuorasala riyliy syipahyana lie ngiekuo kha ama va hmung tiyta a cuo khu kieca ama lie kha tiypalaw ca pading sa riypata amaa ting.
44027040	Cacuonakawta thaatungkyipa kha riyliy chunglie ama pathla siy. Cakhutaata tiypalaw mawnapa ama ciypuopa khuhriy kha ama pathluo. Ngiekuo luo a si the riypa khata a pangzu kha zu yite tiypalaw ca thliy ama paphya sa.
44027041	Cuorasala viehnangtluo kha va suv te aa tuo thluo. Tiypalaw a luv luo a daw ca viehnang lie kha a vaa capang. Cuorasala a hnang luo kha tiylaw ta de caa ta a de nakawta kechi te a kyi thluv.
44027042	Rieka tie taca thaw a tlapa bangkhuo kha tiy a zu pata ama zang li riypata thie diy amaa nang.
44027043	Cuorasala riebyipa ta Paul kha a khuo khing nakawta amaa tingna haata patue sa vayi. Tiy a zu thepa bangkhuo ca tiypalaw taata a zupathla pata, tiy a zu pata ngiekuo luo pya riypata naw a pi yi.
44027044	Aa ngaapa tie ca thingphie zaw tiypalaw kyinapa zaw kha patuv kaluo yite ama paziy. Cahaa cata cawsaa bangkhuo ca aa bangta tah ngiekuo luo ma pha diy.
44028001	Ngiekuo luo a bangsa pata ma chiy taata, capa parala ca Malta ama tapa parala ta a cuopa kha ma pachang.
44028002	Capa ruo ming ca kiema cunglie ta ama pha hringhruo. Khy vya saa te a kangsa nakawta myi patiy yite malie cadung sa yite malie ama patu sa.
44028003	Paul ca thingpahri kha pakhaw te myi luo a hmawpa hingta myi a ling nakawta thing chung taata pariy sakha kya pya te Paul kuv kha a kaze.
44028004	Capa ruo ming cata pariy kha Paul kuv lie aa pathlie thluopa ama hmung tiyta, pakha hne pakha kha, “Hingpapaa hing cawsaa a thiepa tana a cuo aa; riyliy chung taata hmuo hyazangna hmung ra sala adangna hmang taca hring riypata pahya vyi,” amaa ta.
44028005	Cadyiseca Paul ta a kuv taakhata myi chung luo thypathla te ama ca khaahmuo ta vyi.
44028006	Khatiy tama a pangpa bangkhuo ta kya thling'a te a liepatyi'a te a thiy aa tapa kha ama mangkhuo. A syipuv mangkhuo yite khaahmuo a ta li taata ama palung thle yite, “Hingpapaa hing khazing pakha tana a cuo,” amaa ta.
44028007	Capa hmang hne a ngie puo napa hmang lie kha capa parala uvtuv byipa Publius luruo kha a aw. Ama ta ing malie a patlung sa te ningthung chung a phasa pata malie a mangchiy.
44028008	Publius paa ca ngeling pata hne thiysechungparuo ta pasa te iehmang cunglie aa zie. Paul ta va parie te, a luv cunglie a kuv khang te, thlaa chuopa te a patluo sa.
44028009	Capa hmang a cuo khutaa cata capa parala lie a awpa a tluo lipa bangkhuo kha a vaw yite a patluo sa yi.
44028010	Lasaw a hluvsa malie pi yite ma si'a nang taata zaw maa hupa bangkhuo kha tiypalaw cunglie malie ama sangpa diy.
44028011	Thla thung khu taata, “Mingphie Uvcanu” ama tapa, capa parala lie thlasiy chung a awpa Alekzandria tiypalaw kha a khang pate ma si.
44028012	Sirakus ama tapa khy kha pha pate capa lieca ningthung ma aw.
44028013	Cakhutaata, sipakhaa pate Rekium ama tapa khy kha ma pha. A mawluopa ta sungluo thliy a kya hruo te a hezuoningpa ta Puteoli khy luo kha ma chiy.
44028014	Capa lieca zangtuv uvnu zaw za aw yite malie ama thlu nakawta zaakha ma aw siy. Cakhutaata Rom luo ma vya si.
44028015	Capa lie a awpa zangtuv tie ta ma kaw kha malie ama thyi tiyta, Appius Chadaw ma tapa hne Banglaa Suothung tapa hmang te kha malie ama vya daw. Paul ta a hmung tiy yi ta Khazing pathuo sa te thaazuo aa la.
44028016	Rom luo ma chiy tiyta, Paul ca ama a huo riypa rieka pakha pi yite amata tah awna naw ama pi.
44028017	Ningthung khu taata Paul ta capa lie a awpa Judah uvthyi tie kha a kupakhaw yi. Amaa vya hmya tiyta, Paul ta, “Uv zaw nu zaw, ma cawsaa hne ma mingchingmingvuo tie phungluo kha i du li raalaa pata Jerusalem lie kha na patuv yite Rom ming kuv luo ina pi tli yi.
44028018	Bie ina hiehriy tiy yi ta i kawlieta thiy aa phuvpa suena ama hmung li nakawta iema ta ina pathlie khing yi.
44028019	Cuorasala Judah ming ta ama khing li nakawta i cawsaa zaw cunglie suena khaahmuo i tue li raalaa pata Rom siepahruo'a luo kha paduo i hie.
44028020	Capa kawlie cata caa taw yi ang te niema hne bie icaa ruepa yi hing a cuo. Hing thaabuoliriy ta ina cakhiypa yi hing Israel ming a nguopuonapa kawlie tana a cuo,” a ta yi.
44028021	Iema ta, “Nama kawlie hingta Judea ruo taata caa hmung va puv, a vaw pata na phalina kaw caa vya ripa pakhahmuo aw vayi.
44028022	Cuorasala tuokhaatama na rue tapa kha nama'a taata ma thyi khing, tahematapakieca hingpa phuv kaw hne a patuvpa hingta hmangting lieta a duna bie ama rilepa ca ma pachang,” ama ta.
44028023	Ama hne a tawna riypa ning kha ama thli khu taata, aa rina luo kha a hluvpuv amaa vaw. Maw taata zuoluo te ta Khazing pena kaw kha tehte khuo te a pasie sa. Zingsuv kaw kha Moses phungbie taa hne profet caa-uv chung taakhata a changpasie yi.
44028024	Chekha ca a ripa kha ama palung vuo te, chekha ta ca zang vayi.
44028025	Cacuonakawta pakha hne pakha kha ama palung a lu khu vyi. Cahaa cata ama pyapuole pa khata Paul ta, “Profet Isaiah taata Thlaapa Pathe ta nama mingchingmingvuo tie'a luo a za ripa hing aa hmuo patana a cuo:
44028026	Hing cawsaa zaw'a luo hing vaa la va chang tie yi, Naa ca thlie thluo'a ung cate, cuorasala pachang buohluo'a va ungciy, Mang raalaa ung cate hmung buohluo'a va ungciy.
44028027	Tahematapakieca hingpa cawsaa zaw palung ca ping te, Ama naa ca thyi khu the vyi, Ama ming zaw ama pasing; Cahaa cata ama za cuo li kieca, ama ming ta hmung'a yite, ama naa zaw khata thyi'a yite, Ama palung kha vuo'a te kama luo amaa vya pali'a nakawta, I patluo sa raalaa yi ing,’ a ta.
44028028	Cacuonakawta ica pachang sa khingpa yi ca, Khazing khuona hing Jentail ming'a luo pasi pata cuo'a te iema ta ama cuhluo aa,” a ta.
44028029	(Paul ta hingpa bie a ri khu taahingta Judah ming ca iema hne iema kha khuopuv ta amaa ipuole pata ama pya.)
44028030	Kung hning chung bangkhuo Paul ca amata tah aa hluopa ing lie kha aw te, ama a vya tawpa bangkhuo kha a cuhluo yi.
44028031	Khazing pena hne Zingsuv kaw kha riepha ciemuopa hne a pakhuopa aw li pata u khyi te a pacuv yi.
45001001	Zingsuv Khrih changtaapa hne lucuotuv, Khazing thuophaabie ri riypata a tlawpa kama Paul ta caa ica paphya yi.
45001002	Caapathepa lieta profet tie hmuo pata bie za kuolupa,
45001003	Saacapaa hneta aa patuvpa Thuophaabie tana a cuo. Thiysaa luota ripa kietaca David ciypathla cuote,
45001004	thlaapa luo hne a pathena luo kuo ta ripa kieca cahrana lepuv ta thiyna taata pathupa a cuonapa khata Khazing Saacapaa a cuona kha a paluo sa.
45001005	Ama thueta a vihnyina hne lucuotuv cuona kha hmung pate, Jentail ming kha zangna chung luo a vya chiy riypata malie a chang.
45001006	Capa Zingsuv huota kupa chunglie ca niema Rom lie a awpa zaw namaa te ra.
45001007	A cawsaa pathepa cuo riypata Khazing ta ku te a duepa Rom lie a awpa bangkhuo: Ima Paa Khazing hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca nama cunglie aw mangsue.
45001008	A suokhana ta, nama zangna ca chuelyi bangkhuo a pathuo nakawta, niema kawlie cata Zingsuv Khrih thueta i Khazing kha i pathuo sa.
45001009	A saacapaa kaw thuophaabie kha pathiypalung hmisi ta i phupa Khazing ca i thlaachuona lie niema kha ci li ta icaa thyipa yi kha naa pachangkhyituv a cuo.
45001010	Khazing ta luo na pahawpa sala a ru hluo ta niema'a luo ica vya tlaw khuna riypa yita thlaa i chuo.
45001011	Tahematapakieca niema hmung kha a ngietie lipa angta niema hne thlaapa lasaw kha a hraw pata thaazuo ica pi khing yi.
45001012	Caca niema hne kama kha ma zangna ta thaazuo a pi kaluo riypa khatana a cuo.
45001013	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, ica pachang sa khingpa yi ca, niema tlaw riypa hing yi hluvpuv i ting tli, cuorasala naa pakhuopa suokhakha a aw pari. Jentail ming hrangpa'a taata ama palung i pathle sapa ama awpa haata niema hraw taa zaw ta a palung a thlepa pa-aw sa riypa ca i khing hringhruo
45001014	Kama hing Grik ming hne Grik ming a cuo lipa tie'a lie cuose, a singpa hne a ngaapa tie'a lie zaw lyibuo i hnyi.
45001015	Capacana niema Rom lie a awpa tie'a lie zaw thuophaabie phu riypa i khing hringhruopa ca a cuo.
45001016	Thuophaabie hing zaakhyi va ang; tahematapakieca a zangpa bangkhuo khuona ama hmung riypata Khazing cahrana tana a cuo, Judah ming cuota cuo taa te Jentail ming cuo zaw ta a cuo ra.
45001017	Caapathepa chunglie ta, “Cawsaa aa dangpa ca zangna thue tana a hring aa,” a tapa haata, ca thuophaabie chunglie ca Khazing'a taata adangna kha a luo te, ca adangna ca a hruothu taata a chuona te zangna thue tana a cuo.
45001018	Khazing hihaana ca vuoruo taata zaa luo te, iema phalina ta biehmisipa a pakhuopa tie ama phalina bangkhuo hne Khazing ama pachang lina kha aa du.
45001019	Tahematapakieca iema ta Khazing ama pachang khuna riypa luo kha Khazing ta iema'a lie a siesa pata a paluo sa thluo.
45001020	Chuelyi hruothu baataata chuozaa ta a hmangpa a cuona hne a cahrana ca, hmung khu a cuo li raalaa pata, a tuepa hmang taata pachang khu pata a cuo. Iema ca a ngiethe pata cuo'a vayi;
45001021	tahematapakieca Khazing kha ama pachang thluo pata ama hne aa phuvpa pa-uvsathyina kha pi lipa yi ta aa law zaw a law vayi. Ama ruena kha vievuv te, ruena a hnyi lipa ama pathiypalung ca a zing ta a zing.
45001022	Ma sing ne ama ta raalaa pata a ngaapa ta ama cuo.
45001023	A thiy khu lipa Khazing rungnaana kha a thiykhupa cawsaa hne pavaa, a cuo li kie phyipaliypa saruopa hne aa thiy ta a thiypa saruopa hne aa lupa kuvtuezuv khata thle yite ama bie.
45001024	Cacuonakawta Khazing ta ama pathiypalung hietliepa hmang pyalyipa kha patue sa thluo yite, iema pakha hne pakha cunglie ama pangpa ling a pazue sapa hmang kha ama tue.
45001025	Tahematapakieca Khazing biehmisipa kha hangna ta thle yite, satuv laata sapa a cuopa kha abie yite a re ama hrie. Satuv khana chuozaa pathuo sa riypata a cuo! Amen.
45001026	Cahaa cata a cuo nakawta Khazing ta iema kha pangpa ling a pazue sapa hmang hietliena luo kha a pathlie yi. Ama canung tie kha tahmuo tue phungpa awhnena kha hmuo lipa yi ta tue phung lipa awhnena kha ama hmuo.
45001027	Cahaa ngiethie cata capaa zaw ta canung hne tue phungpa awhnena kha thuse yite capaa hne capaa tlaku ama aw hne. Capaa hne capaa ta nangzaa aa chiypa hmang kha ama tue nakawta iema hne aa phuvpa duotena kha ama hmung.
45001028	Cahaa cata, iema ta Khazing pachang khingna pathiypalung kha ama hnyi li nakawta, Khazing ta a pyalyipa pathiypalung hnyi riypa khata pathlie thluo yite tue li riypa hmang kha ama tue.
45001029	Iema ca chiena hne phalina phangting, karuo-awna hne i-awna, hietliena, lienawna, aduna, hanghiena, zyana hneta ama bi. Pakha hne pakha amaa caw-yi,
45001030	ama thuo amaa pachi, Khazing kha siysaa ri vayi, malie kha ama ese, ahruo ama tle, amaa pale, chiena tue kha ama rue byalya, nungpaa ri a ngie vayi,
45001031	ama ngaa, zangna hnyi vayi, nangduena hnyi vayi, malie kha ngiechi khing vayi.
45001032	Hinghaahingta a hringpa bangkhuo ca thiy amaa phuv tapa Khazing biechina kha ama pachang thluo raalaa pata, iema ama tue hlyitaw taata kha haapa hmangpha lipa a tuepa tie kha ama palung a tling khyi.
45002001	Cacuonakawta ahung nama cuo zaw ta a sie khu'a va ungciy; tahema tapa kieca malie kha bie nama ripa tiyta, ama tuepa kha nama tue ra thluo nakawta niema mamaapa khana sue namaa phaw pata a cuo.
45002002	Niema ta, hinghaapa hmang a tuepa tie cunglie ta Khazing biechina hing aa hmuopa tana a cuo,” nama ta.
45002003	Ahung tama i cuo tapa kha namaa rue buo ma? Malie kha bie nama ripa tiyta iema tuepa kha nama tue ra thluo nakawta Khazing bieripana taata ima law thlu aa tapata namaa rue ma?
45002004	A cuo li kie a lepa a duena hne a palung pasiyna hne a ngiechina hing siysaa ri li pata aw kanaa ungciy? Khazing duena ca sue a ngiepachiyna luo caa chiytuv na a cuo tapa kha pachang va ung cama?
45002005	Cuorasala nama palung a le tuv nakawta Khazing ta adangna hne bie a chi ning, Khazing hihaana ning thueta nama cunglie a tlung riypa khana namaa pacung chiy tyly pata a cuo.
45002006	Pakha cyicuo kha ama tuena haata a thung'a yi.
45002007	Hmangphapa kha palung pasiysa pata tue yite rungnaana, pa-uvsathyina hne a ra khu lipa chuozaa hringna a huvpa tie ca Khazing ta chuozaa hringna kha a pi'a yi.
45002008	Ama kaw dyi a pacuo te biehmisipa kha thuse pata phalina a tuepa tie cunglie ca Khazing hihaana hne pathiy lingna kha a tlung aa.
45002009	Pha lina a tuepa bangkhuo ca ruvnaana hne te-angna ama hmung aa; Judah ming hmung taa yite Jentail ming ta ama paziy aa.
45002010	Cuorasala phana a tuepa bangkhuo ca rungnaana hne pa-uvsathyina hne diena kha ama hmung aa. Judah ming hmung taa'a yite Jentail ming ta ama paziy aa.
45002011	Khazing ca ahung hmie hmuo mang vyi.
45002012	Phungbie li pata suena a tuepa tie ca phungbie li pata ra'a yite, phungbie raw lieta a suepa tie ta phungbie ta bie ripa pata ama cuo aa.
45002013	Tahematapakieca Khazing hmiekunglie aa dangpa hne Khazing hne a rena a hmungpa tie ca phungbie a thyipa tie khata cuo vayi, phungbie a ziypa tie khatana ama cuo.
45002014	Phungbie a hnyi lipa Jentail ming ta, phungbie hmuo hnyi li pata aw raalaa yi sala, phungbie ta tue ungla a tapa kha palung thusa pata ama tuepa ca iema cuota phungbie na a cuo thluo.
45002015	Phungbie ta tue ungla a tapa kha ama palung chunglie na aa cape tapa kha iema ta ama paluo sa. Ama chiephathleduona khata ama tuepa hing aa hmuo tapata aa daakhyi ning yi aw te, ama ruenapa khata sue a phaw ning yi hne a paduo ning yi a aw.
45002016	Kama i phupa thuophaabie haahingta, Khazing ta Zingsuv thueta cawsaa palungruv ruena kha bie a ripa ning thue ca cahaacatana a cuo aa.
45002017	Cacuonakawta niema hne niema kha Judah ming aa ta ung cate, phungbie lie kha a daa ung cate, Khazing hne namaa pazuena kawlie kha namaa pale.
45002018	Cakhutaata a khingna kha pachang ung cate phungbie ta pacuvpa nama cuo nakawta khaama a phace tapa kha namaa tlaw the.
45002019	Niema hne niema kha mingcue tie luochiytuv, a zingna lie a awpa tie cuota khena,
45002020	a ngaapa tie cawpatuv hne haatiy tie pacuvtuv tana ma cuo tapa kha na maa pachang, tahematapakieca phungbie chunglie hing pachangna hne biehmisipa a tling pata ma hnyi nama ta.
45002021	Cacuokie niema malie a pacuvtuv saya zaw, niema'a na niema cahaw a pacuv'a nang va ung cama? Paruv kha ungla tapata ri ung cate ma niema ta nama paruv?
45002022	Nungvaathingsuena tue kha ungla ta ung cate ma niema ta nungvaathingsuena nama tue? Kuvtuezuv ca duvsa ung cate ma biena-ing chechiy ca nama paruv?
45002023	Phungbie lie a palepa tie, phungbie para ung cate ma Khazing ming nama pachie?
45002024	Caapathepa lieta, “Niema Judah ming kawlie hingtana Jentail ming hrawlie Khazing thuo a chi,” a ta.
45002025	Phungbie nama ziy kie muo nama vangdaw a tena ca muo a hnyi'a ta; phungbie nama para kie vangdaw a te lipa hne tana namaa lu aa.
45002026	Cacuonakawta, vangdaw a te lipapaa ta phungbie kha a ziy kieca vangdaw a tepapaa haata rue pata cuo'a vama?
45002027	Saapa lie vangdaw aa te li thluo pata phungbie a ziypapaa ta phungbie caa-uv hnyi te vangdaw aa te raalaa pata phungbie a parapapaa kha sue aca phaw aa.
45002028	Cacuonakawta le luo cuonapa taa dyi ta Judah ming a cuopa ca Judah ming hmisipa ta cuo li pata le luo saapa ta vangdaw a tena ca vangdaw a tena hmisi ta cuo vyi.
45002029	A chung luo taata Judah ming a cuopa kha Judah ming hmisi pata cuote, vangdaw a tena hmisipa ca pathiypalung hne aa sepa hmang tana a cuo, thlaapa hmang ta cuote caabie ta cuo vyi. Cahaapa cawsaa ca a hrang taata cuo li pata Khazing'a taata pathuosana na a hmung aa.
45003001	Cacuokie Judah ming amaa suo viena ca khaapa hing maw? A cuo li kie vangdaw a tena muo ca khaapa hing tama a cuo?
45003002	Amaa suo viena a phangphang tana a aw. A suokhana ta Khazing bie kha cake sa pata ama cuo.
45003003	A che kha zang a tla lipa ama cuo kie haw, tuokhaatama a cuo aa? Iema zangtluo amaa tla lina khata Khazing zangtluo atlana kha a para'a ma?
45003004	Cuo changchiy vyi. Cawsaa bangkhuo hing a hangpa ma cuo zaw ta, Khazing ca zangtluo a tla pari aa. Caapathepa ta, Na ripa bie ta aa dangpa na cuopa kha paluo sa'a te, na bie aca ripa thue yi ta na te aa,” a tapa haakhata a cuo aa.
45003005	Cuorasala kiema maa dang lina ta Khazing a dangna kha a sie vie ta a paluo sa kie, khaama ri riy a aw'a tli? Khazing ta duo malie a te tiyta a paa ma ta'a ma? (Saapa bie na i ri).
45003006	Cuo changchiy vyi. Cacuokie Khazing ta chuelyi hing tuokhaatama bie a ripa khu aa?
45003007	Cuorasala i hangthena hingta Khazing adangna kha paluo sa hryly te a ming rungnaana a cuo kieca, khaapanakawma kama ca a suepa haata bie ripa pa i cuo kalie riypa a aw?
45003008	Khaapanakawma, cawsaa chekha ta malie pachie yite, iema na a ri yi tapata ama rilepa bie haakhata, “Phana aa vaw riypata hmang pha lipa hrie'a ungpuv,” ma ta va ung? Aa phuvsa pata suephawpa ama cuo aa.
45003009	Cacuokie tuokhaata? Kiema hing ma pha vie ung maw? Cuo changchiy vyi; ma ri ciepa haakhata Judah ming hne Krik ming hne suena cahranapa rawlie ta a awpa tana ma cuo.
45003010	Caapathepa ta, Aa dangpa pakha hmuo aw vayi, pakhata hmuo aw vayi;
45003011	Pachangna a hnyipa pakha hmuo aw lipa yi ta, Khazing a huvpa pakha hmuo aw vayi.
45003012	Ama bangkhuo ta sichie diy yite, hmuosa a phapa pakha hmuo aw vayi. Kawpacuona a hnyipa pakha hmuo aw lipa yi ta, pakhata hmuo aw vayi.
45003013	Ama rawkariy ca aa pahawpa thluokhue hne a lu te, ama palyi kha dungna ta ama hmuo. Ama palyi rawlie pariy ca-ie aw te,
45003014	Ama hmya ca biechiepa hne chiesana ta a bi.
45003015	Thiyse palang riypata ama phyi catli te,
45003016	rana hne cuopasana kha ama luopuv lie a bi.
45003017	Diena luopuv kha pachang lipa yi ta,
45003018	Ama ming lieta Khazing ciyzaana aw vyi,” a tapa haa khatana a cuo.
45003019	Ata hing ca phungbie ta tuokhaata a ri zaw ta, phungbie rawlie a awpa tie huota a ripa kha pachang pate, caca, cawsaa bangkhuo ca duo yi sala, chuelyi bangkhuo hing Khazing hmielie zangtluo aa tla riy'apa tana a cuo.
45003020	Phungbie ta a ripa ama tuena thueta ahunghmuo Khazing hmiekunglie duopacupa aw vayi, tahematapakieca phungbie ca ama suena tlaku khana a paluo sa.
45003021	Cuorasala ata hing ca phungbie thueta cuo li pata luopuv hrang taata Khazing adangna ca a luo te phungbie hne profet tie zaw ta amaa daakhyi.
45003022	Zingsuv zangna thueta hmungpa ca Khazing adangna cuote zangtuv bangkhuo cuota a cuo. Tahematapakieca pahlyipalena khaahmuo aw vyi,
45003023	ma bangkhuo ta a suepa cuo pate Khazing rungnaana hneta maa hla diy.
45003024	Cuorasala kiema ca Khrih Zingsuv'a taata a vawpa khuona taata, a vihnyina thueta a selawpa ta duopacupa ta ma cuo.
45003025	Zingsuv Khrih ca Khazing ta a thiy ta a ngiethena satuv riypata a chipa cuote capa a ngiethena ca Zingsuv Khrih zangna thueta hmung riypatana a cuo. Khazing ta hingpa hmang a tuepa hing ama adangna kha paluo sa riypatana a cuo, tahematapakieca hluo ningta ama tuepa suena kha palung pasiysa pata a ngiethe yite,
45003026	ata hing ca ama kha aa dangpa a cuona hne Zingsuv a zangtuv tie duopacu sa ama cuona kha paluo sa riypata a cuo.
45003027	Cacuokieca, hruotle riypa khaama a aw? Khaahmuo aw vyi. Phungbie ma ziy nakawta a cuo ma? Cuo vyi. Zangna thue tana a cuo.
45003028	Tahematapakieca cawsaapa hing phungbie ta a ripa re hrie nakawta cuo li pata zangna thueta duopacupa a cuopa kha ma ri tli.
45003029	A cuo li kie Khazing ca Judah ming Khazing dyi ta ma a cuo? Jentail ming Khazing zaw ta cuo ra vama? A cuo, Jentail ming Khazing zaw ta a cuo ra.
45003030	Khazing ca pakha ta a cuo nakawta; vangdaw a tepa tie kha zangna ta duopacu sa'a yite, vangdaw a te lipa tie zaw kha zangna ta duo a pacu sa'a yi.
45003031	Cacuokie zangna thueta phungbie ca ma thaw tana ta a cuo ma? Cuo changchiy vyi. Phungbie khana ma pa cu sa vie.
45004001	Cacuokieca thiysaa luo hne a patuv pata malie a pathlatuv Abraham hing thiysaa luo hne aa patuv pata khaapa thlahnena ma a hmung?
45004002	Tahematapakieca, Abraham hing hriena thue tana duopacupa a cuo tapata a cuo kieca, hruotle khyi riypa chekha a hnyi aa. Cuorasala Khazing hmiekunglieca hruotle khyi riypa hnyi vyi.
45004003	Caapathepa ta khaapa a ta ma? “Abraham ta Khazing kha zang te, capa a zangna thue cata Khazing ta ama kha aa dangpa ta a cuhluo,” a ta.
45004004	Re a hriepa pakha ca a ninghlue kha lawmuo tapa pata cuo vyi. A hrie muo tana a cuo.
45004005	Cuorasala tuena ta cuo li pata cawsaa pha lipa tie zaw amaa dang a tatuv Khazing a zangpa ca, a zangna kha adangna ta a cuhluopa.
45004006	Cacuonakawta tuena a te li pata Khazing ta aa dangpa ta a cuhluopapaa thluechiypa a cuona zya David ta a ripa ca:
45004007	Khazing ta a pha lina a ngiethe te, a suena a buvkhungpapaa ca thluechiypa tana a cuo.
45004008	Khazing ta a suenapa sue ta a ripa lipapaa ca thluechiypa tana a cuo,” a ta.
45004009	David ta a ripa thluechiy ca vangdaw tepa tie cuo dyi tama a cuo, vangdaw te lipa tie cuo zaw ta a cuo ra ma? Ma ripa ca, “Abraham zangna ca Khazing ta adangna ta a cuhluopa,” tapata a cuo.
45004010	Tuokhaatama cuhluopa pata a cuo? Vangdaw aa te hluo tama aa te khu taata? Vangdaw aa te khutaa cuo vyi, aa te hluo tana a cuo.
45004011	Abraham ta vangdaw tepa cuona paluosanapa, a dangpa cuona ca vangdaw aa te hluo baataa khata zangna ta a cuhluo mangtli. Caca ama kha vangdaw a te li pata a zangpa tie paa ta pacuo sa riypa hne iema zaw bangkhuo kha a dangna pi riypata a cuo.
45004012	Cahaa cata ama ca vangdaw a tepa tie paa ta zaw a cuo ngiethie, iema ca vangdaw amaa tepa dyi cuo li pata mingpa Abraham vangdaw aa te hluo ta a zangna hringzya haakhata ama hring ra nakawta a cuo.
45004013	Tahematapakieca chuelyi na na cu aa tapa biekuo ca Abraham hne a samingsahlaa tie ta phungbie ziyna taata ama hmungpa cuo vyi, cuorasala zangna ta hmungpa a dangna thue tana a cuo.
45004014	Phungbie a ziypa tie na rucutuv a cuo'a yi tapa a cuo kieca zangna ca khaapahmuo ta cuo li'a pata biekuona zaw a hrihripa tana a cuo aa.
45004015	Tahematapakieca phungbie ta ca Khazing hihaana kha chiykhyi te, cuorasala phungbie aw lina lieca phungbie na ama para tapa zaw aw vyi.
45004016	Cacuonakawta biekuona ca zangna lieta hruo a bangpa cuote, a vihnyina thueta Abraham samingsahlaa tie'a lieta biekuopa tana a cuo. Phungbie a ziypa tie'a lie dyi cuo li pata Abraham zangna haata a zangpa tie cuo zaw ta a cuo.
45004017	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, “Kama na nama ca mingphang hluvpuv paa ta caa tue ang,” a tapa haata, ama ca kiema bangkhuo paa tana a cuo. Ama ca a thiypa tie kha hringna pi yite a aw lipa zaw a pa-aw satuv, ama hrahring ta a zangpa Khazing hmie lieta ma paa tana a cuo.
45004018	“Na samingsahlaa ca ama hluv hringhruo aa,” tapata ri ciepa haata a ruechuona khaahmuo a aw lipa chung taa khata, “mingphang hluvpuv paa tana i cuo aa,” tapa kha a zang.
45004019	Ama ca kung zakha a ta tli. Cuorasala a thiy ciepa haata a ta tlipa a pangpa kha a rue tiyta cuose, Sarah a cingna kaw kha a rue tiyta cuose, a zangna cung vie vyi.
45004020	Khazing biekuona kawlie kha zang lina ta ama kha cahang khu vyi. Cuorasala Khazing kha pathuosa te zangna lie kha lethaw te a cahra.
45004021	Khazing ta biekuo a pi ciepa ca a patlung hrahring aa tapa kha a zang karuv.
45004022	Cacuonakawta a zangna kha adangna ta a cuhluopa.
45004023	“Aa dangpa tana a cuhluo,” tapa hingpa bie hing ama huo selaw ta capepa cuo vyi,
45004024	kiema zaw bangkhuo cuota capepa a cuo ra. Ma byipaapa Zingsuv thiyna taata a pathu tuvpa a zangpa kiema zaw cuota a cuo ra aa.
45004025	Ama ca ma sue nakawta thiyna luo pachiy sapa cuote Khazing hne maa rena riypata pathu pakhaapa a cuo.
45005001	Cacuonakawta, kiema ca zangna thueta duopacupa ma cuo nakawta Zingsuv Khrih thueta Khazing hne maa re mangtli.
45005002	Ama thue cata Khazing vihnyina chung luo kha a ngie pate ma aw. Khazing rungnaana maa hraw aa tapata maa nguopuo nakawta ma thaa a pha.
45005003	Cadyi ca cuo vyi, te-angna maa taw zaw ta ma palung a tluo ngiethie, tahematapakieca te-angna ca chaw khuna kha chiykhyi te,
45005004	chaw khuna ta zyazaaphana chiykhyi te, zyazaaphana ta anguopuona kha a chiykhyi.
45005005	Cakhutaata a ruechuona ta ma palung chuo li pata malie a chi. Tahematapakieca kiema'a luo malie a pipa Khazing duena ca Thlaapa Pathe'a taata ma pathiypalung chung luo kha a bya ta malie a za bya.
45005006	Khaahmuo a tue khu lipa ma cuo thluo ning, a cuo aa deta ning kha Khrih ca cawsaa a suepa cuo khata a thiy.
45005007	Cawsaa phapa cuota ca a thiy nguopa ama aw ri aa, cuorasala cawsaa aa dangpa cuota thiy ca a ruvpa hmang tana a cuo.
45005008	Cuorasala Khazing ta khatluv tama malie a due tapa kha hinghaahingta a paluo sa; a suepa ma cuo nguoluo thluo pata Khrih ca kiema cuota a thiy.
45005009	A thiyse thueta kiema ca duopacupa ma cuo kieca, Khazing hihaana taata malie khuo li pata ca aw changchiy vyi.
45005010	A cariepa ma cuo nguoluo ningta a Saacapaa thiyna thueta Khazing hne pare sapa ma cuo kieca, capa pare sa ciepa ta a cuopa ca a hringna ta malie a khuo hryly aa.
45005011	Cadyi ca cuo vyi, Khazing hneta a rena malie a pahmung satuv ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih thueta Khazing'a lie kha maa law.
45005012	Cacuonakawta, cawsaa pakha thueta suena ca chuelyi luo vya tlung te, ca suena taacata thiyna a vya tlung. Cakhutaa thiyna ca cawsaa bangkhuo cung luo a tlung, tahematapakieca ama bangkhuo ta ama sue nakawta a cuo.
45005013	Suena ca phungbie hluo ta hing chuelyi lie hing a aw lu tli, cuorasala suena ca phungbie a aw lina lieca suena ta ripa cuo vyi.
45005014	Tuokhaata a cuo zaw, thiyna ta Adam chuo taata Moses chuo te kha uv diy yite, Adam a suepa haata a sue lipa zaw cunglie kha hmuota a uv diy yi. Adam ca a vaw riypapaa hmaathla paluosana tana a cuo.
45005015	Cuorasala a selawpa ta pipa lasaw ca suena hne a lu vyi. Tahematapakieca pakha suena thueta cawsaa hluvpuv kha ama thiy pata a cuo kieca, Zingsuv Khrih ama pakha vihnyina thueta malie a pipa Khazing vihnyina hne a selawpa ta pipa lasaw ca cawsaa hluvpuv cuota khatluv tama a le vie aa?
45005016	A selawpa ta pipa Khazing lasaw hne cawsaa pakha suena ca a lu vyi. Suena suokha a vya paziypa bierina ca, “Na sue,” tapa hingta a cuo. Cuorasala suena hluvpuv a vya paziypa a selawpa ta pipa lasaw ca, maa phuv maa siy lipa “Sue vaciy,” tapa biechina tana a cuo.
45005017	Cawsaa pakha suena thueta thiyna ta cawsaa kha a uv pata a cuo kieca, Zingsuv Khrih pakha thueta tluo a tlingpa Khazing vihnyina hne a selawpa ta pipa a dangna lasaw a cupa tie cunglie hringna ta khatluv tama a uv vie'a yi?
45005018	Cawsaa pakha suena ta cawsaa bangkhuo kha suephawpa a pacuo sa pahaayita cawsaa pakha adangna ta cawsaa bangkhuo cuota duopacuna hne hringna ta a cuo.
45005019	Cawsaa pakha ri a ngie lina thueta cawsaa hluvpuv kha a suepa ta a pacuo sa pahaayita, cawsaa pakha ri-angiena ta cawsaa hluvpuv kha aa dangpa ta a pacuo sa'a yi.
45005020	Phungbie kha aa vaw ca suena kha aa cha tyly, cuorasala suena a chana hmang lie kha Khazing vihnyina ca aa cha hryly ra.
45005021	Cacuonakawta, suena ta thiyna taata malie a uvpa haata, Khazing vihnyina ta a dangna taata malie uv ra te, Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih thueta chuozaa hringna luo kha malie aa chiy.
45006001	A cuo kie tuokhaatama ma ta aa? Khazing vi ca a cha hryly se tapata suena ca ma tue hryly'a maw?
45006002	Tue changchiy'a va puv. Suena lie ma thiy tli pata tuokhaatama a chunglie ca ma aw pari the aa?
45006003	Khrih Zingsuv chunglie tiy a nawpa kiema bangkhuo ca a thiyna chunglie zaw tiy maa naw tapa kha pachang va ung ca maw?
45006004	Cacuonakawta tiy maa naw ning khata ama hne paby pakhawpa cuo pate a thiyna lieta ma thiy ra tli; cahaa cata Khrih ca Paa rungnaana ta a pathu pakhaa pahaata kiema zaw hringna thaapa ta ma hring ra aa.
45006005	A thiyna lie ama hne ma thiypakhaw kieca hringna luo pathu pakhaa a cuona lie kha kiema zaw pathu pakhaa pakhawpa ma cuo ra aa.
45006006	Ma pangpa suena kha para riypata ma cawsaa hlungpa kha ama hneta vieluo lie khepuo pata a cuo tli tapa kha ma pachang. Caca suena sii ta ma cuo li tlina riypatana a cuo.
45006007	Tahematapakieca a thiypa ca suena taata hya a zangpa tana a cuo.
45006008	Cuorasala Khrih hneta ma thiyhne kieca ama hneta ma hring hne aa tapa kha ma zang.
45006009	Thiyna taata pathu pakhaa pata a cuopa Khrih ca thiypakhaa li tli pata thiyna ta uv'a va tli tapa kha ma pachang.
45006010	Suena lieca yikha ta ade pata thiy te, a ta a hringna hing ca Khazing chunglie tana a hring.
45006011	Cacuonakawta niema zaw ta, suena lieca thiy pate Khazing chunglie ca Khrih Zingsuv thueta ma hring tapata na maa rue riypatana a cuo.
45006012	Cacuonakawta saapa khingna kha nama ziy li riypata a thiy thepa nama pangpa ca suena ta uv kha tie se.
45006013	Nama pangpa a khaapa khahmuo a pha lipa suena tuena riypata pi kha ung. Cuorasala thiyna taata hringna luo pathu pakhaapa haata nama pangpa a khaapa kha hmuo Khazing'a luo kha aa dangpa hmang tuena riypata pi tie ung.
45006014	Tahematapakieca niema ca suena rawlie hring li pata vihnyina rawlie nama hring nakawta suena ta ca uv kha yi se.
45006015	Cacuokie tuokhaata? Suena rawlie aw li pata vihnyina lie ma aw nakawta suena ca ma tue'a ma? Tue changchiy'a va puv!
45006016	Niema ca pakhakha'a luo kha ri a ngiepa sii haata namaa pi kieca, suena ta a chiykhyipa thiyna lie a cuo zaw, ri-angiena ta a chiykhyipa adangna lie a cuo zaw namaa pipapaa sii cata nama cuopa kha pachang va ung cama?
45006017	Cuorasala Khazing ca a law pata cuo mangsue. Tahematapakieca niema ca suena sii nama za cuo raalaa pata ata hing ca pacuvna nama hmungpa chung taata biehmisipa kha pathiypalung hmisi ta nama ziy mangtli.
45006018	Suena taata hya pazangpa cuo ung cate, adangna sii ta nama cuo tli.
45006019	Nama thyi khu the li nakawta chuelyi bie ri ta i ri pata a cuo. Ahluo taca nama pangpa kha a pathe lipa hmang tuena luo hne a le vie hrylypa zyachiena luo namaa zaa pi. Cuorasala ata hing ca nama pangpa kha pathena luo caa chiykhyi riypa yi aa dangpa hmang tuena ta a pi tie ung.
45006020	Suena sii ta nama cuo ning kha adangna hne a patuv pata hya a zangpa nama cuo.
45006021	Cacuokie atalie nama nang a zaakhyipa hing ta li pata khaapa thlahnena ma nama hmung? Capa hmang zaw a chuona ca thiyna tana a cuo.
45006022	Cuorasala ata hing suena taata hya pazangpa cuo ung cate Khazing sii ta nama cuo mangtli. Thlahnena nama hmungpa ca pathesana cuote a chuona ca chuozaa hringna ta a cuo.
45006023	Tahematapakieca suena muo ca thiyna cuote, cuorasala Khazing lasaw ca ma Byipaapa Khrih Zingsuv chunglie chuozaa hringna tana a cuo.
45007001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, phungbie a pachangpa tie'a lieta phungbie taca cawsaa pakha kha a hring chung dyina a ciypakang khu tapata i ripa kha pachang va ung cama?
45007002	Cahaa cata navaa a hnyipa canung ca a navaapa a hring chung dyi phungbie ta ciypakang khu te, a navaapa a thiy kieca a navaapa kawlieta phungbie taata hya a zang tapa kha ma pachang.
45007003	Cacuonakawta a navaapa a hring thluo pata capaa hrang hne a awhne kieca nungvaathingsuena a tuepa ta a cuo. Cuorasala a navaapa a thiy kieca capa phungbie taacata hya a zangpa cuote, navaa hrang a hnyi zaw ta nungvaathingsuena a tuepa cuo vyi.
45007004	Cahaa cata, uv zaw nu zaw, niema ca Zingsuv pangpa thueta phungbie lie a thiypa ta cuo ung cate, Khazing cuota thyi nama pathyi riypata thiyna taata caa pathu pakhaapapaa huopa tana nama cuo.
45007005	Thiysaa ta ma aw ning ca suekhingna kha phungbie thueta kya thu te thiyna cuota thyi pathyi riypata ma pangpa lie kha re a hrie.
45007006	Cuorasala ata hing ca suena taata pachepa cuopa te, phungbie sii cuona taata a thiypa ma cuo. Cacuonakaw kiema ca phunghlungpa, caa ta capepa phungbie rawlie sii cuo li'apa pata Thlaapa ta hringna thaapa chunglie khana ma hring hriy aa.
45007007	Cacuokie tuokhaama ma ta aa? Phungbie ca a sue ma? Sue changchiy vyi. Cuorasala phungbie a aw li kieca, suena kha pachang'a va ang. Phungbie ta, “Malie hmang kha hie va tlie kha,” a ta li kieca hietliena kha khaapama tapa pachang'a va ang.
45007008	Cuorasala suena ta nawbie kha hmuo pata i chunglie kha hietliena phangting a papya sa. Phungbie a aw li kieca suena ca a thiy.
45007009	Ahluo ta ca kama hing phungbie li pata za hring ang te cuorasala nawbie aa vaw ca suena ca kya thu te i thiy.
45007010	Hringna bie malie a kuopa nawbie ca i cuota thiyna ta a cuo.
45007011	Tahematapakieca suena ta nawbie kha a patuv pata kama kha na dung te ina thie.
45007012	Cacuonakawta phungbie ca a pathe, nawbie zaw a pathe, a dang te a pha.
45007013	Cacuokie a phapa ma i cuota thiyna a vya chiykhyi? Cuo changchiy vyi. Thiyna a vya chiykhyituv ca suena tana a cuo. Suena ca suena a cuopa kha a luo khuna riypata phana kha hmuo te i cunglie thiyna kha a patlung sa. Cacuonakawta nawbie thue khata suena a sue zya kha aa luo hryly.
45007014	Phungbie ca thlaapa hmang ta a cuopa kha ma pachang; cuorasala kama ca saapa cuo ang te suena chung luo sii cuo riypata zaapa tana i cuo.
45007015	I tuepa hing khaapama tapa pachang va ang. Tahematapakieca i khingpa kha tue lipa angta i huepa hmang tuv kha i tue.
45007016	I khing lipa kha i tue pakieca, phungbie a pha tapata i palung a tling tanapa tana a cuo.
45007017	Cuorasala khapa hmang a tuepa kha kama ta cuo va ang, i chunglie a awpa suena tana a cuo.
45007018	Tahematapakieca i saapa lie, i chunglie ta hmang phapa suokha hmuo aw vyi tapa kha i pachang. Hmang phapa khingna kha i hnyi, cuorasala tue khu va ang.
45007019	Tahematapakieca kama i khingpa hmangphapa kha tue khu va ang, cuorasala i khing lipa pha lina khana i tue.
45007020	I khing lipa kha i tue pata a cuo kieca, capa hmang a tuepa ca kama cuo va ang, cuorasala i chunglie a awpa suena khatana a cuo.
45007021	Cacuonakaw hmang awtuv zya i hmungpa ca, hmang phapa i tue khing tiyta hmang pha lipa kha kama'a lieta a aw.
45007022	Tahematapakieca i hringna ta Khazing phungbie kha a khing,
45007023	cuorasala i chunglie phungbie hrangpa a za aw rapa kha pachang ang te, capa phungbie ca i palung ta a pha a tapa phungbie a dutuv khata a cuo. Ca phung cata i chunglie a awpa suena sii khata ina tue.
45007024	Cawsaa palung riethyipa tana i cuo! Hingpa saapa thiyna taahingta ahungma naa khuo aa?
45007025	Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih thueta naa khuotuv Khazing ca pathuosa pata cuo mangsue! Cacuonakawta, i pathiypalung ta ca Khazing phungbie kha ziy ang te, cuorasala i saapa ta ca suena phungbie kha i ziy.
45008001	Cacuonakawta Khrih Zingsuv chunglie a hringpa tie cuota ca suephawna aw va tli.
45008002	Tahematapakieca Khrih Zingsuv chunglie ta a awpa Thlaapa hringna phungbie ta suena hne thiyna phungbie chung taata hya aca pazang yi.
45008003	Saapa thaa a ne nakawta phungbie ta a tue khu lipa kha Khazing ta a tue: ama saacapaa kha a suepa cawsaa thiysaa cuona haata suena te riypata za pathlie te suena kha saapa cuonapa lieta sue a phaw.
45008004	Caca saapa khingna haata cuo li pata Thlaapa khingna haata a ziypa tie hringna lieta aa dangpa tue riypa tapa phungbie a tling thena riypatana a cuo.
45008005	Tahematapakieca saapa khingna haata a awpa tie ca ama pathiypalung kha saapa hmang lie chi yite, cuorasala Thlaapa khingna haata a hringpa tie ca ama pathiypalung kha Thlaapa hmang lie ama chi.
45008006	Saapa khingna chunglie pathiypalung chipa ca thiyna cuote, cuorasala Thlaapa khingna chunglie pathiypalung chipa ca hringna hne diena tana a cuo.
45008007	Canakaw cata saapa khingna lie sangpa pathiypalung ca Khazing hne a carie te; Khazing phungbie kha ziy vyi _ a ziy heta ziy khu vyi.
45008008	Saapa khingna chunglie a awpa ta ca Khazing palung kha patluo khu vyi.
45008009	Cuorasala niema ca saapa khingna lie aw va ungciy; Khazing Thlaapa kha nama chunglie khy a sa nakawta Thlaapa khingna chunglie na nama aw. Khrih Thlaapa a hnyi lipa ahunghmuo ama huopa ta cuo vayi.
45008010	Cuorasala Khrih kha niema chunglie a aw kieca, nama pangpa ca suena nakawta thiy ra sala Thlaapa ca a dangna thueta a hring aa.
45008011	Zingsuv thiyna taata a pathu pakhaapa, ama Thlaapa kha niema'a lie khy a sa kieca, thiyna taata Zingsuv a pathu pakhaapapaa khata a thiy thepa nama pangpa kha niema'a lie khy a sapa Thlaapa thueta hringna aca pi'a yi.
45008012	Cacuonakawta, uvnu hne sieta zaw, kiema ca saapa khingna haata hring riypata, saapa lieta lyibuo a hnyipa cuo va puv.
45008013	Tahematapakieca, thiysaa khingna haata nama aw pata a cuo kieca nama thiy aa; cuorasala pangpa ta a tuepa suena kha Thlaapa ta nama thie kieca nama hring aa.
45008014	Tahematapakieca Thlaapa ta aa chiypa bangkhuo ca Khazing saata ta ama cuo.
45008015	Niema ca ciyna luo caa pathla pakhaapa yi, sii cuona thlaapa kha a tingpa ta cuo va ungciy, cuorasala saata ta caa pacuo sapa yi, thlaapa khana nama ting. “Abba! I Paa! nama tapa hing
45008016	Khazing saata ta ma cuonapa kha na capa Thlaapa ca hne kiema thlaapa ta tehte ama khuo pata a cuo.
45008017	A saata ta ma cuo kieca, rucutuv zaw ma cuo, Khazing rucutuv cuo pate Khrih hneta ru a cu hnepa ta ma cuo. Cata a cuo kieca ama hne rungnaana a hrawpa ma cuo riypata ama hneta ruvnaana a angpa ma cuo riypatana a cuo.
45008018	Ata cuo lieta ma angpa ruvnaana hing ca hmie luo ma cuota phupa ta a cuo riypa rungnaana hneta ca pakhingpuo tluo aa tlapa cuo vyi.
45008019	Khazing saata zaw paluopa ama cuona cuo kha sapa hmang ta a ngietie hringhruo vayi.
45008020	Tahematapakieca sapa hmang bangkhuo hing iema khingna ta cuo li pata Khazing ta cuose a tapa haata vievuv diy riypata khuekhuo ciepa ta a cuo.
45008021	A ruechuona a awpa ca sapa hmang bangkhuo hing thuvna siicuona taata palaw sa pata cuo'a te Khazing saata zaw rungnaana kha ama hmung ra aa.
45008022	Ata cuo te hingta ca sapa hmang bangkhuo hing nupazi pasapa haata amaa hrung amaa ie nguoluo tapa kha ma pa chang.
45008023	Sapa hmang zawdyi cuo li pata Thlaapa thyipaa taapa ta a cuopa kiema zaw hrahring hmuo ma pangpa malie a khuo riypa hne saata ta malie a tue riypa ma huopuo nguoluo pata maa hrung maa ie ra.
45008024	Tahematapakieca a ruechuona thueta khuopa tana ma cuo. Ma hmungpuopa a nguopuona ca a nguopuona cuo vyi. Hmung thluopa ca ahungma a nguopuo aa?
45008025	Cuorasala ma hmung lipa kha maa nguopuo kieca, palung pasiyna hneta capaca ma huo pata a cuo.
45008026	Cahaa cata Thlaapa ta ma thaadyana lie kha malie aa bya. Tuokhaatama thlaa ma chuo riypata a cuo tapa hmuo ma pachang li ning kha capa Thlaapa cata ahrungna hne pakaa ta ri khu lipa bie ta paa malie a kiepa.
45008027	Cawsaa pathiypalung a mangpasiepa Khazing ca Thlaapa palungphya kha a pachang; tahematapakieca Thlaapa ta Khazing khingna haakhata mingpathepa tie cuota paa a kiepa nakaw yi tana a cuo.
45008028	Khazing a duepa tie hne Khazing ta a tingna haata a kupa tie cuota ca hmangting zawdya hingta a phana luota a tuepale yi tapa kha ma pachang.
45008029	Khazing ta a pachanglupa tie ca a Saacapaa hminghmie lu riypata aa tlaw pathlyi yi, capa a Saacapaa ca uvnu a hluvpuv hrawlie a uvthyice cuo riypata a cuo.
45008030	A tlaw pathlyipa tie kha ama ta a ku yi, a kupa tie kha duo pacu sa yite, duo a pacu sapa tie kha rungnaana a pi yi.
45008031	Cakhutaata capa zaw kaw lieca tuokhaama ma ta aa? Khazing kha kiema'a luo malie aa cuo kieca ahungma malie a du khu aa?
45008032	A Saacapaa hmuo a khe li pata ma bangkhuo cuota malie a pi pakieca a Saacapaa hne cata a hrangpa hmang bangkhuo kha malie pi li pata a aw'a ma?
45008033	Khazing ta a tlawpa kha ahungma sue a phaw khu aa? Duo a pacutuvpa ca Khazing tana a cuo.
45008034	Ahungma sue a phaw aa? Khrih Zingsuv, thiy te a thupakhaapa, Khazing cacuo luo kuo ta a tupa na kiema cuota paa malie a kiepa pata a cuo.
45008035	Ahungma Khrih duena taata malie a pache khu aa? Ruvnaana ma, ngiechina ma, a cuo li kie hrisaathieruena ma, a cuo li kie cakuona ma, abuv-ase riy hnyi li pata awna ma, a cuo li kie ciy aa chiypa hmang ma, a cuo li kie zueziy ma tapa tie hingta malie a che khu'a ma?
45008036	Caapathepa lie a capepa ca, Nama kawlieta ningaw ta thiepa ta ma cuo; Thie riypata chipa tuv haatana ma cuo, tapata a cuo.
45008037	Malie che khu'a vyi, hing hmang bangkhuo lieta kiema ca malie a duetuv ama thueta tetuv tie laata tetuv vie tana ma cuo.
45008038	Tahematapakieca thiyna cuose, hringna cuose, avuoming cuose, luochiytuv tie ta cuo yi se, atalie a cuopa hmang ta cuose, a vya chiy riypa hmang ta cuose, cahrana cuose,
45008039	aa suopa ta cuose, aa thuvpa ta cuose, sapa hmang suokhakha ta cuose, ma Byipaapa Khrih Zingsuv chunglie Khazing duena taata malie che khu'a vyi tapa kha i pachang.
45009001	Zingsuv ming ta a hmisipa na i ri. Hang va ang tapa ca i chiephathleduona ta Thlaapa Pathe thueta a pacu sa.
45009002	I pathiypalung chunglie ngiechina lepuv hne pasana i hnyi.
45009003	Tahematapakieca i cawsaa, saapa lieta i phangkha ta a cuopa tie cuota a cuo kieca, kama hing chiesa pata Khrih'a taata chepa cuo riypa kha hmuota i khing.
45009004	Iema ca Israel ming ta cuo yite, saata ta pacuosapa, rungnaana a pipa, biekuona a pipa, phungbie a pipa, biena a pahnyi sapa, hne biekuona a hmungpa tie ta ama cuo.
45009005	Hluoning mingpa tie'a taata pathlapa cuo yite, iema'a taacata Messiah ca thiy hne saa ta pathlapa a cuo. Ama ca Khazing cuote, hmangting bangkhuo cunglie a awpa a cuo nakawta chuozaa pathuo sa pata cuo mangsue. Amen.
45009006	Cata a cuo tiyta Khazing bie kha tling vyi tanata cuo vyi. Tahematapakieca Israel ming bangkhuo kha Israel ta cuo hmisi lipa yi ta,
45009007	Abraham saata zaw bangkhuo kha ama bangkhuo ta Abraham ciypathla ta cuo diy vayi. Cuorasala, “Isak chung taata a puvpa tie hingna na samingsahlaa ta ripa a cuo'a yi,” a ta.
45009008	A ri khingpa ca, cawsaa thiysaa cakhawpa ta sapa ca Khazing saata ta cuo vayi, cuorasala biekuona ta a puvpa saata zaw khana ciy hne hruo ta ripa a cuo yi.
45009009	Tahematapakieca biekuona ta hinghaahingta a ri, “Capa cuo ning ca Kama kha za kaa'a ang te Sarah ta saacapaa kha a hnyi aa,” a ta.
45009010	Cadyi ca cuo vyi; Rebekka ta a navaapa pakha dyipa ma mingpa Isak taata nu a phya ning yi kha capa hne cata aa lusapa hmang a cunglie a tlung.
45009011	Ama za puv hluo, a chie a pha khaahmuo ama tue the hluo baataa khata, Khazing ta a tingpa atlawna ca
45009012	tuehriena thueta cuo li pata kupa cuona thueta aa pazue na riypata, Rebekka kha, “A uvthyipa hing a syipa rehrietuv tana a cuo aa,” tapata changpa a cuo.
45009013	Caapathepa lie aa capepa ca, “Jakob kha due ang te, Esau ca i hue,” a ta.
45009014	Cacuokie tuokhaama ma ta aa? Khazing ca a dang vyi ma ta'a ma? Ta khu changchiy'a va puv.
45009015	Tahematapakieca, Moses kyihuo khata, “Nang i due khingpa tie kha nangdue'a yi ang te, Kaw i pacuo khingpa tie kha kaw i pacuo'a yi,” a ta.
45009016	Cacuonakawta hmangting bang-khuo hing cawsaa khingna hne temaana taata cuo li pata nang malie a duetuv Khazing thue tana a cuo.
45009017	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta Faro kha, “I ming kha chuelyi bangkhuo ta u khyipa a cuo riypata i cahrana kha na cunglie paluo riypa atingna hneta icaa tlawpa tana a cuo,” a ta.
45009018	Cacuonakawta nang a due khingpa tie kha nang due yite, ama palung a cahra sa khingpa tie kha ama palung a cahra sa yi.
45009019	Cakhutaa, niema ta, “Cacuokie, khaapanakawma Khazing ta sue malie a phaw the? A khingna ca ahungma a du khu?” nama ta aa.
45009020	Cuorasala nama Khazing bie a i tuv cawsaapa hing ahung tama na cuo? Sapa hne vypa a cuopa ta satuv hne vytuv kha, “Khaapanakawma hinghaahingta ina tue ciy? a ta the'a ma?
45009021	Bi vytuv ca acyi kha a khingta tue khuna naw hnyi vama? Acyi hlungkha chung taata bi suokha kha a sungnaa vie ta hmuo riypa hne a hrangpa bi suokha kha hmuo cakhaw riypata sana naw a hnyi cuo vama?
45009022	A hihaana kha paluo khing te a cahrana a paluo sa khingpa Khazing ta para riypata sapa hne hihaana a ang riypa tie kha palung pasiysa pata a ang law kie yi ca, a nangduena a hmung riypa tie, Judah ming dyi cuo li pata Jentail ming kiema zaw yalya chung taata a rungnaana cuota tingpaciena hne a kupa tie ta a hnyirungna hne a rungnaana ama pachang riypata ca ang hryly li pata a aw'a ma?
45009025	Hosea chunglie ta a za ri sasawpa ca, “I cawsaa ta a cuo lipa tie kha ‘I cawsaa,’ ta'a yi ang te, I due li nung kha ‘I duesa nung,’ i ta aa,” a ta.
45009026	“‘I cawsaa ta cuo va ungciy,’ i ta napa hmang lie caci kha, A hringpa Khazing saata tapata kupa ama cuo aa,” a ta.
45009027	Israel ming kaw hne a patuv pata Isaiah ta, “Israel ca mingluv ta riyliy viehnang zaa ta hluv ra mang yi sala, a cawta dyina khuo pata a cuo'a yi.
45009028	Tahematapakieca Abyipa ta chuelyi lie a biechina kha a catlisa pata hne a siesa pata a patling sa aa.
45009029	Isaiah ta a za ri paciepa ca, “Alesyipa Abyipa ta kiema kha malie nguo buo li pata aw sala, Sodom haahingta cuo'a tli pate, Gomorrah haa hing tana tuepa ma cuo aa,” a ta.
45009030	Cacuokie, tuokhaatama ma ta aa? Jentail ming adangna a huv lipa tie khata adangna hmung yite, caca zangna thueta ama hmungpa a dangna tana a cuo.
45009031	Cuorasala, Israel ming, phungbie kha a patuv pata adangna a huvpa tie ta ca phungbie kha patling khu vayi.
45009032	Khaapanakawma ama patling khu va? Tahematapakieca zangna ta huv lipa yi ta tuehriena ta ama huv nakawtana a cuo. A pachiyna alung lie kha a pachiy yite amaa lie.
45009033	Caapathepa ta, Mang tie ung, Cawsaa zaw a pachiy pata a liena riypa alung kha, amaa liena riypata Kama ta Zion lie i chi, A zangpa bangkhuo ca nangzaana a taw'a vayi,” a ta.
45010001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, i palung khingpa hne Khazing'a luo thlaa i chuopa ca iema hing khuo pata ama cuo riypa hingta a cuo.
45010002	Tehte i khuo khupa ca, Khazing ca ama khingsa raalaa, cuorasala ama khingna zya ca a hmuo lipa khingna tana a cuo.
45010003	Tahematapakieca, Khazing'a taata a zuvpa adangna kha pachang li pata iema khingna luopuv kha huv yite Khazing adangna luo kha a pipase khing vayi.
45010004	Khrih ca phungbie a chuona ta cuote caca a zangpa bangkhuo ta adangna ama hmungna riypatana a cuo.
45010005	Moses ta phungbie taata a zuvpa adangna hne a patuv pata a capepa ca, “Hingpa hmang zaw hing a tuepa ca hingpa hmang hingta na khuona a hmung aa,” a ta.
45010006	Cuorasala Khazing'a taata a zuvpa adangna ta ca, “Ahungma vuoruo luo a kie aa tapata na palung chunglie kha a ta kha,” a ta (a ri khingna ca Khrih kha za cungkhyi riypata tanapa na a cuo).
45010007	A cuo li kie, “Ahungma a thiy khy luo a cung aa,” tapata zaw a ta kha ung (A ri khingna ca Khrih kha thiyna taata kya pyakhyi riypata tanapa na a cuo).
45010008	Cuorasala tuokhaatama ama ri? “Khazing bie ca naa thaa liena a aw, na hmya lie hne na pathiypalung chunglie na a aw,” tapata a cuo. (A ri khingpa ca kiema ta ma phupa Khazing zangna bie tanapa na a cuo).
45010009	Na pakaa ta Zingsuv ca Abyipa tana a cuo tapata phu cate, na pathiypalung chunglie Khazing na thiyna taata a pathu sa tapata na zang kieca khuo pata na cuo aa.
45010010	Tahematapakieca pathiypalung ta a zangpa ca duopacupa ta cuote, a pakaa ta a phupa ca khuo pata a cuo.
45010011	Caapathepa ta, “Ama a zangpa bangkhuo ca nangzaana ang'a vyi,” a ta.
45010012	Tahematapakieca Judah ming hne Krik ming a lala lieta pahlyipalena aw vyi; Abyipa pakha hing ma bangkhuo Byipa ta cuote a kupa bangkhuo cuota a pahyasa patana a cuo.
45010013	Tahematapakieca, “Abyipa ming a kupa bangkhuo ca khuo pata ama cuo aa,” a ta.
45010014	Cuorasala, ama zang li kieca tuokhaatama a ming ca ama padang the aa? Bie ca ama thyi buo li kie tuokhaatama ama zang the aa? Cakhutaa, bie ca phu pata a cuo li kieca tuokhaatama ama thyi the aa?
45010015	Lucuotuv tie kha pathliepa ama cuo li kie tuokhaatama bie ca phu pata a cuo the aa? Caapathepa ta, “Thuophaabie a phyatuv tie phyi ca khatluv tama a puvthe?” a ta.
45010016	Cuorasala ama bangkhuo ta thuophaabie ca cuhluo vayi; tahematapakieca Isaiah ta, “Abyipa ahungma ma thuophaabie phupa ca a zang,” a ta.
45010017	Cacuonakawta zangna ca thyina taata a vaw te, thyina ca Khrih bie thue tana a vaw.
45010018	Cuorasala ica hiehriy, bie ca thyi vayi ma? A thyi ca ama thyi thluo; tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, Ama ueryi ca chuelyi bangkhuo ta a pathuo, ama bie ca chuelyi kiy te ta a pha.
45010019	Hiehriyna suokha i tue khing kalie, Israel ming ta pachang va yima? Moses ta palie taa te, “Niema kha mingphang tling a cuo lipa tie cunglie hietliena ica pahnyi sa'a yi; Niema ca a ngaapa mingphang tie'a lie kha nama hi ica pahaa sa'a yi,” a ta.
45010020	Cakhutaa Isaiah ta riepha ciemuo pata, “Kama kha naa huv lipa tie ta ina hmung yi; Naa padang lipa tie kha i pahmung sa yi,” a ta.
45010021	Cuorasala, Israel kaw lieca, “Ri a ngie lipa tie hne bie i a hmuopa tie kha ningaw ta i buo pazuupa yi ang te i hluo yi,” a ta.
45011001	Cacuokie, Khazing ta a cawsaa zaw ca a thaw yi ma? Thaw changchiy vayi! Kama hrahring hing Israel ming, Abraham saming, Benjamin phang ta i cuo.
45011002	Khazing ta hluo ning taata a za pachang ciepa a cawsaa zaw kha thaw vayi. Caapathepa chunglie Elijah ta Israel ming kawlie kha Khazing'a luo tuokhaatama a ri tapa kha pachang va ung cama?
45011003	Elijah ta, “Abyipa, na profet tie kha thie yite, na bienatluophie kha ama phi diy; kama dyi hingna a ngaa ang, kama hing hmuo thie inaa nang kalie yi,” a ta.
45011004	Cuorasala Khazing'a taata tuokhaatama a palie? “Kama cuota Baal hmielie a pakhuv a pane lipa thaw sariy i pangaa kalie yi,” a ta.
45011005	Cahaa cata ata cuo lie zaw hing Khazing ta vihnyina ta aa tlawpa amaa ngaa kalie.
45011006	Cuorasala capa aa tlawpa yi ca tuehriena thueta cuo li pata vihnyina thue tana a cuo. Caacuolikieca vihnyina ca vihnyina ta cuo'a vyi.
45011007	Cakhutaa, tuokhaama ma ta aa? Israel ming ta ama huvpa kha hmung vayi. A tlawpa tie ta capaca hmung yite, cuorasala aa ngaapa tie ca ama palung kha a pakhung sa yi.
45011008	Caapathepa lie a capepa ca, Khazing ta iema kha ama palung pakhung sa yite, ata ning tepa hingta ama ming hmung li'a pata, ama naa zaw thyi'a vyi,” a ta.
45011009	Cakhutaata David ta ri te, “Ama cabya ca sariy hne cyihyi ta a li sala, ama cuota a pachiyna alung hne phuv aa lana ta a li se.
45011010	Ama hmung the li riypata ama ming ca pacuepa cuo sala, ama ke ca chuozaa ta a kang se,” a ta.
45011011	Cacuokie, iema ca amaa pachiy kie amaa lie'a ma? Cuo changchiy'a vyi. Cuorasala, iema amaa pachiyna thueta Khuona ca Judah ming hietlie riypata Jentail ming'a luo kha aa vaw.
45011012	Iema a pachiyna ta chuelyi lie thluechiyna a hluvpuv chiykhyi te, iema a sungna ta Jentail ming cuota thluechiyna hluvpuv a chiykhyi kieca, a tlingta tah iema amaa te rapa ca khatluv tama aa ky hryly aa!
45011013	Ata hing ca niema Jentail ming khana ica ta yi. Jentail ming'a luo lucuotuv i cuo chung bangkhuo ca i re ca i palesakhyi pari aa.
45011014	I mingphang zaw kha ama hie patlie sa pata a cawta chuo khuo khu the'a yi angma i tanapa tana cuo.
45011015	Tahematapakieca, iema kha thawpa ama cuona pata Khazing hne chuelyi a rena ta a cuo kieca, iema kha cuhluo pata ama cuona ca khaapama a lu aa? A thiypa tie cuota hringna na a cuo aa.
45011016	Viechuo tluo taata tluokha kha Khazing pacuo pate a pathe pata a cuo kieca tluo hrangpa zaw bangkhuo kha pathe te, a thariy kha a pathe pata a cuo kieca a ce zaw kha ama pathe ra.
45011017	Cuorasala cyipa Oliv kung a nge chekha kha te pata, niema ruo Oliv kung a nge kha iema hmang lieca patue pata, cyipa Oliv kung thariy taata a la kha namaa hraw thluo pata a cuo kieca,
45011018	tepa nge tie kha ahruo tlesue kha ung. Ahruo nama tle kieca, niema ta a thariy kha ring lipa ung cata a thariy ta niema aca ringpa yi kha a thyi tie ung.
45011019	Nama ta, “Kama kha patue riypatana a nge kha te pata ama cuo,” na ta aa.
45011020	Capaca aa hmuopa a cuo. Iema ca ama zang li nakawta tepa ama cuo, cuorasala niema ca zangna thue dyi tana nama aw. Cacuonakawta ahruo tle kha ung, ciyna pathiypalung tuv kha hnyi tie ung.
45011021	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta a nge hmisipa kha ngie a buo li pata a aw kieca, niema zaw kha ngie caa buo ra'a vayi.
45011022	Cakhutaata, Khazing duena hne ciy aa chiyna kha a thyi tie ung. A liepa tie cuota ciy a chiysa te cuorasala Khazing ta niema cunglie a hnyipa duena ta a duena chunglie kha aca pa-aw sa pazue'a yi. Caacuolikieca niema zaw kha tepachung pata nama cuo ra aa.
45011023	Cakhutaata, Israel ming kha hmuo ama zang lina kha ama sise kieca patue pakhaa pata ama cuo aa, tahematapakieca Khazing ca iema kha patue pakhaa riypata cahrana a hnyi.
45011024	Tahematapakieca niema kha ruo Oliv kung taata ca te yite, a phung a cuo li raalaa pata cyipa Oliv kung luo patue pata nama cuo kieca, khatluv tama ace hmisipa a cuopa kha a kung puvnung luo patue pakhaa ca a na vie aa.
45011025	Cacuonakawta, uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema nama cuona laata a sing vie pata a rue kha ung. Hingpa bieparuv hingna ica pachang sa khing yi: Israel ming chekha cunglie ta palung a khungna tlung'a te, caca Jentail ming zangna chung luo a vaw riypa zaa amaa vawna cuote khiy tana a cuo aa.
45011026	Cakhutaata Israel ming bangkhuo ca khuo pata ama cuo aa. Caapathepa ta, Zion taata khuona a vaw'a te, Jakob'a taata pha lina bangkhuo kha a cade diy aa.
45011027	Ama suena kha i lapa thue yi ta, Hingpa biekuona hing iema hneta i tue aa,” a ta.
45011028	Thuophaabie ta ripa kieca iema ca Khazing cariepa ta cuo yite, caca niema cuota na a cuo. Cuorasala a tlawna ta ripa ta a cuo kieca iema ca ama mingchingmingvuo tie thueta Khazing ta a duepa ta ama cuo.
45011029	Tahematapakieca Khazing lasaw hne kuna ca a thle buo vyi.
45011030	A hluo taca niema ca Khazing ri a zaa ngie li pata nama cuo, cuorasala atalie hing Judah ming kha ri amaa ngie li nakawta niema ca Khazing ngiechina kha nama hmung.
45011031	Cacuonakawta niema nama hmungpa nangduena thue khata iema zaw nangduena ama hmung ra riypata iema ca Khazing ri kha a ngie li pata a pa-aw sa yi.
45011032	Tahematapakieca cawsaa bangkhuo cunglie nangduena a hnyi the riypata Khazing ta ama bangkhuo khata ri a ngie lina thaw chunglie a chi diy yi.
45011033	Khazing hing a hnyirung hring-hruo de! A singna hne a pachangna hing aa thuv hringhruo de! A biechina hing ahung ta a khingna capya khu'a te ma, a hmang tuepa hing ahung ta a pachang khu aa!
45011034	“Tahematapakieca ahungma Khazing pathiypalung a pachang? Ahungma ruena a pi khu?”
45011035	“Ama'a taa lasaw hmung pakhaa riypata, Ahungma ama kha lasaw a pi buo?”
