45011036	Tahematapakieca hmangting bang-khuo hing ama'a taata hne ama thueta hne ama huopa tana ama cuo diy. A cunglieta rungnaana chuozaa ta aw mangsue. Amen.
45012001	Cacuonakawta, uvnu hne sieta zaw, Khazing ngiechina thueta nama pangpa kha a pathepa hne cuhluo tluo aa tlapa a hringpa hriykhung a rina haata Khazing'a luo kha a pi tie ung. Capaca Khazing'a luo nama pi riypa biena hmisipa tana a cuo.
45012002	Hing chuelyi phung hing ziyle kha ung cuorasala palung thaapa phya ungla a thle tie ung. Cacuokiena Khazing khingna hing khaama a cuo, khaapama Khazing hmielie a phapa hne, cuhluo tluo a tla te a tlingpa ta a cuo tapa kha nama hmung dawlu khu aa.
45012003	Ina pipa vihnyina thueta niema pakha cyicuo kha ica chang yi. Namaa rue riypa laata a suo vie ta a rue kha ung, cuorasala Khazing ta aca pipa yi zangna cyicuo haakhata nama cuona kha a pachang tie ung.
45012004	Pangpa suokha chunglie hing saapa chebuo a hluvpuv aw te capa saapa chebuo rehriena ca a lu kaluo vayi.
45012005	Cacuonakawta kiema ca a hluvpuv ma cuo raalaa pata Khrih chunglie ca pangkha ta ma cuo. Pakha cyicuo ta ca pangkha chunglie chebuo ta ma cuo ung.
45012006	Kiema malie a pipa vihnyina haakhata aa nanangpa lasaw hnyi pate, capaca profet-biephu ri ta a cuo kieca zangna ma hnyipa zaa kha hmuo ung sala ri ung siy;
45012007	Khazing rehrie a cuo kieca hrie ung sala, pacuvtuv re a cuo kieca pacuv ung siy;
45012008	malie thaazuo pi kha a cuo kieca malie kha thaazuo pi ung sala, malie pipachaa riypata a cuo kieca pahyasa pa ta pi ung siy; luochiytuv re ta a cuo kieca temaana hne hrie ung sala, malie ngie va chi riypata a cuo kieca palung tluosa pata ngie va chi ungsiy.
45012009	Duena ma tapa hing pathiypalung hmisi ta duena cuose. Hmang pha lipa kha va hue la, hmangphapa kha a patuv tie.
45012010	Pakha hne pakha kha viesaa duena ta a pasungpanaa ungla a due tie ung. Pakha hne pakha kha a pa-uvsathyi tie ung.
45012011	Nama thaa thuv kha se; palung thusa pata Khazing re kha hrie tie ung.
45012012	A nguopuona lie kha nama palung tluo se. Ruvnaana nama ang tiyta nama palung pasiy sala, thlaa chuo pari tie ung.
45012013	Mingpathepa tie amaa huna kha pihluo ungla khychehluobaa due a thepa cuo tie ung.
45012014	Caa hrisaathieruepa tie kha thluechiy pi tie ung; chiesa li pata thluechiy pi tie ung.
45012015	A palung a tluopa tie kha palung tluokhyi ungla, a caapa tie kha caakhyi tie ung.
45012016	Pakha hne pakha palung a lusa pata aw ungla; nama palung le kha se. Cuorasala aa phahlapa tie hne khata a khe the ungla, nama cuona laa khata a pasing sa vie kha ung.
45012017	Pakha hne pakha kha pha lina ta vieriy a thung kha ung, cuorasala cawsaa bangkhuo hmielie a phapa kha tue a zue tie ung.
45012018	A cuo khu pata a cuo kieca cawsaa bangkhuo hne khata aa re a dieta tah aw tie ung.
45012019	I duepa zaw, niema ta tah phuv la kha ung, Khazing hihaana tuv ta a hrie the riypa khata chi thluo tie ung. Caapathepa chunglie aa capepa ca, “Abyipa ta, phuvlana ca kama huopa tana a cuo, Kama na a thung'a yi ang, a ta,” a ta.
45012020	“Cacuonakawta, na carie tie kha ama nang a diy kieca sa pi yi la; ama tiy a hrie kieca tiy pi tie yi. Cahaa cata na tue kieca a luv cunglie kha myihyi sekhalapa na chi patana a cuo aa,” a ta.
45012021	Pha lina kha a pate sa kha ung, cuorasala pha lina kha phana ta te tie ung.
45013001	Uvtuv byi kha ama ri vaa ngie tie ung; tahematapakieca Khazing'a taa ta li pata uvtuv byi aw the vyi. Ata lie uvtuv byi tie zaw hing Khazing ta a pipa tana ama cuo.
45013002	Cacuonakawta uvtuv byi a dupa ca Khazing ta re a pipa tie a du pata cuo yite, bierina na amaa taw aa.
45013003	Tahematapakieca uvtuv byi tie ca hmangpha a tuepa tie ta ciy riypa cuo li pata pha lina a tuepa tie dyi ta ciy riypatana a cuo. Uvtuv byi tie ciy li pata na aw khing ma? Cacuokieca hmangphapa kha tue la aca pathuo sa aa;
45013004	tahematapakieca uvtuv byi ca nama phana cuota Khazing changtaapa a cuopa tana ama cuo. Cuorasala hmangpha lipa na tue kieca, na ciy yi a hu aa, tahematapakieca uvtuv byi ca a cakhawpa ta zueziy kha a cyi vyi! Pha lina a tuetuvpa tie cunglie Khazing hihaana a patlung satuv Khazing changtaapa tana ama cuo.
45013005	Cacuonakawta Khazing hihaana nakaw dyi ta cuo li pata nama chiephathleduona nakaw khata ama ri kha a ngie tie ung.
45013006	Ngukhyi nama pipa zaw hing, uvtuv byi tie ca ama cuo bangkhuo uvna luota aa hmuopa Khazing changtaapa ama cuo nakawtana a cuo.
45013007	Ama hmung riypa a cuopa bangkhuo kha pi tie ung _ pangpa ngukhyi a hmung riypa kha pangpa ngukhyi pi ungla, nama hnyipa hmang ngukhyi a hmung riypa kha nama hnyipa hmang ngukhyi pi tie ung. Hmiezaa tluo a cuopa ca hmiezaa ungla, pa-uvsathyi tluo aa tlapa ca pa-uvsathyi tie ung.
45013008	Pakha hne pakha a due riypa ri li pata ahung cunglie hmuo lyibuo hnyi kha ung; tahematapakieca cawsaa hrangpa a duepa ca phungbie a patling sa patana a cuo.
45013009	“Nungvaathingsuena tue kha; lie va naw kha; va paruv kha; malie hmang kha hie va tlie kha; tapa nawbie hne nawbie hrangpa zaw bangkhuo ca, “Na ingpaa kha nama pangpa naa due pahaata va due,” tapa bie lie hingna amaa vya sawhmya diy.
45013010	Duena ta ingpaa cunglie pha lina tue buo vyi; cacuonakawta duena ca phungbie tlingna tana a cuo.
45013011	Capa khutaa cata, khaapa cuota ma a cuo tapa hne ata cuo hing ca maa hmungna taata maa kya chana cuo tana a cuo tapa kha nama pachang. Tahematapakieca khuona ca zangtuv ma vya cuo baaning ning laa khata malie aa vya ngie vie mangtli.
45013012	Zuo cuo ca khung tli te ningchung a vya ngie tli. Cacuonakawta zingna hmang tuena kha thuse ung sala khena cehre kha a la ungsiy.
45013013	Ningchung a cuopa haata pa-uvsathyi tluo aa tla pata aw ung sala, paringpasu pata hne sahmyisahmaa pariy pata aw kha ungsiy, aparuvsuena tue kha ungsiy, mang a ngie li pata aw kha ungsiy, ahru-achie li pata hne i a hnyi li pata aw ungsiy.
45013014	Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih kha a hryi hriy ungla, saapa khingna palung patluo riypa kha huv kha ungsiy.
45014001	Zangna luota a thaa a cawpa kha cuhluo tie ung, cuorasala ama khueruena kha nama i khing nakawta cuo kha se.
45014002	Cawsaa chekha ta ning phangting kha ning riypatana a cuo tapata ama zang ning kha zangna luo a thaa a cawpa tie ta uohnaasiyhnaa dyi kha ama ning.
45014003	A phangtling a ningpa tie ta a ning lipa tie kha ese kha yi se. A ning lipa tie zaw ta a ningpa tie kha syi ra kha yi se. Tahematapakieca Khazing ta iema kha a cuhluo ra yi.
45014004	Malie changtaapa bie ripa riypata nama ca ahung tama na cuo? Iema sue a ngiethe ama cuo riypa hne sue duotepa ama cuo riypa ca ama byipaapa biechina cungliena a aw. Cakhutaa sue a ngiethepa zaw ama cuo aa, tahematapakieca Abyipa ca sue a ngiethe khutuv tana a cuo.
45014005	Cawsaa chekha ta ning ning kha kha ning hrangpa laata a pha vie tapata ama rue ning kha a hrangpa tie ta ning bangkhuo hing a lu pata ama rue. Ama bangkhuo ta ama palung lie'apa kha a siesa pata zang yi se.
45014006	Ning ning kha kha a sungnaa vie ta a ruepa ca Abyipa pa-uvsathyina ta pasungpanaa se. A phangtling ta a ningpa tie kha Abyipa pa-uvsathyina ta ama ningpa tana a cuo, tahematapakieca Khazing khana alawna bie ama hluo. A ning lipa tie zaw Abyipa pa-uvsathyina ta ama ning lipa cuote, Khazing na alawna bie ama hluo ra.
45014007	Ahunghmuo kiema cuo dyi ta hring va puv, ahunghmuo kiema cuo dyi ta thiy va puv.
45014008	Ma hringpa ta a cuo kie Abyipa cuota hring pate, ma thiy kie Abyipa cuotana ma thiy. Cacuonakawta ma thiy a cuo zaw ma hring a cuo zaw Abyipa huopa tana ma cuo.
45014009	Hingpa kawlie hing tana Khrih ca a thiypa hne a hringpa tie Abyi cuo riypata, thiy te a hring pakhaa napa ta a cuo.
45014010	Cacuokie khaapanakawma nama uvnu hne nama sieta tie ca nama syi pachaa? A cuo li kie, khaapanakawma nama uvnu hne nama sieta kha nama ese pachaa? Ma bangkhuo hingta Khazing hmielie bie ripa riypata a daa riypatana ma cuo ung.
45014011	Caapathepa lieta, “Kama Abyipa i hring pahaata, cawsaa bangkhuo ta i hmielie kha ama pakhuv pane'a yite, palyi bangkhuo ta Khazing kha ama pathuo sa aa,” a ta.
45014012	Cakhutaata, kiema bangkhuo ca Khazing hmielie ma kaw maa ri kaluo aa.
45014013	Cacuonakawta pakha hne pakha kha a syi kha tli ungsiy, cuorasala na uvnu luopuv lieta a pakhuo riypa hne a pachiyna riypa kha chi li riypata bie a chi pacie tie.
45014014	Abyipa Zingsuv chunglie ta ina pachang sapa ca, khaapa hmang hing hmuo ama ta tah a pathe lipa aw vyi tapa hingta a cuo, cuorasala pathe vyi tapata a ruepa cuota ca pathe vyi.
45014015	Nama na ningpa nakawta na uvnu hne na sieta zaw ama palung a pasa kieca, nama ca duena chunglie a hringpa cuo vaciy. Na ningpa nakawta Khrih ta a thiykuopa pakha rana cuo kha se.
45014016	Cacuonakawta nama ta a pha na tapa kha a chie pata ri riypata pacuo sa kha.
45014017	Tahematapakieca Khazing pena ca ning hne dang ta cuo vyi. Cuorasala Thlaapa Pathe lieta a dangna, diena hne palungtluona tana a cuo.
45014018	Cahaa cata Khrih re a hriepa ca Khazing hmielie cuhluo tluo aa tlapa hne cawsaa pathuosa pata a cuo.
45014019	Cacuonakaw pakha hne pakha malie a sathaw riypa hne diena a chiykhyipa hmang kha hrie a zue ungsiy.
45014020	Ningbaa kawlieta Khazing re kha para kha ungsiy. Hmang bangkhuo hing hmisi ta kieca a pathe, cuorasala na ningpa nakawta cawsaa hrangpa kha amaa lie kieca hmangphapa cuo vyi.
45014021	Na uvnu hne na sieta zaw a liena a cuo kieca saa ce a cuo zaw, mingsuv sahmaa dang a cuo zaw, hmang hrangpa a cuo zaw tue riypa cuo vyi.
45014022	Na zangna kha Khazing hmie lieta a cusa pata chi thluo tie. Iema ta a cuo hmisi ama tapa kawlieta iema hne iema sue a phaw lipa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo.
45014023	Cuorasala palung luolue pata a awpa tie ca ama ning kieca sue phaw pata ama cuo aa, tahematapakieca zangna ta ama tue li nakawta a cuo. Zangna taata a vaw lipa hmang tuena bangkhuo ca suena tana a cuo.
45015001	Zangna lie a cahrapa kiema ta zangna a cawpa tie thaazuo dyana kha ma dyichaw a hu. Kiema palungtluona kha ma huv riypa cuo vyi.
45015002	Kiema pakha cyicuo hingta ma ingpaa tie amaa sathaw riypa hne ama phana cuota ama palung ma patluo riypa yita a cuo.
45015003	Caapathepa lie, “Nama caa ripachiepa zaw bie pha lipa ca kama cungliena a tla,” tapata a cape pahaata,” Khrih ca ama palungtluona kha tue vyi.
45015004	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta malie a pipa palung pasiyna hne palung cahrana thueta a nguopuona ma hnyi the riypata, hluo ningta ama za capepa bangkhuo ca kiema pacuvna riypatana a cuo. Niema ta palung a lusa pata ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih a Paa hne Khazing kha nama pathuosa pakhaw the riypata, palung pasiyna hne palung cahrana Khazing ta Khrih Zingsuv kha a mangpuo pata pakha hne pakha palung a lusa pata nama aw the riypata caa bya thi yi se.
45015007	Khrih ta aca cuhluo pahaayita, Khazing ta rungnaana a hmung riypata pakha hne pakha kha a cuhluo tie ung.
45015008	Ica chang khingpa yi ca, Khrih ca Khazing biehmisipa cuo khata vangdaw tepa tie changtaapa ta a za cuo. Caca mingpa tie'a luo a za pipa yi biekuona pacu sa riypa hne
45015009	Jentail ming ta Khazing kha cawsaa cunglie duena a hnyina kawta ama pathuosa na riypatana a cuo. Caapathepa ta, “Cacuonakaw, kama ta nama kha Jentail ming hrawlie caa law'a ang te, na ming kha hlaa ta ica pathuosa aa”;
45015010	Cakhutaa ri pakhaa te, “Jentail ming zaw Khazing cawsaa zaw hne khata a law pakhaw tie ung”;
45015011	Cakhutaa, Niema Jentail ming bangkhuo, Khazing ca pathuosa tie ungla, Cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama ca pathuosa yi se”;
45015012	Isaiah ta ripakhaa te, “Jesse ciypathla pakha a vaw'a te, Jentail ming uvtuv ta a cuo aa; Iema Jentail ming ta ama cunglie kha a ruechuona ama hnyi aa,” a ta.
45015013	Thlaapa Pathe cahrana chunglie ta a ruechuona nama hnyi na riypata, anguopuona Khazing ta zangna chunglie palungtluona hne diena ta ca pabi yi se.
45015014	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema ca cawsaa phasapa cuo ung cate, pachangna hne nama bi thluo nakawta pakha hne pakha namaa cawpa thesa aa tapata kama hrahring ta ica zang yi.
45015015	A cuo raalaa pata hing caa i vya capepa chekha lie hing niema pathyi sa pakhaa riypata riepha ciemuo pata i vya cape. Tahematapakieca Khazing ta ina pipa vihnyina thueta,
45015016	Khazing thuophaabie hne aa patuv pata tluobyi rehriena lie kha Jentail ming'a luo Khrih Zingsuv rehrietuv i cuo riypatana a cuo. Caca, Jentail ming kha Khazing hmielie cuhluo aa tlapa hriykhungrina haata ama cuo riypa hne Thlaapa Pathe ta a pathe sapa ama cuona riy'a pata a cuo.
45015017	Cakhutaata, Khrih Zingsuv hne maa patuvna thueta, Khazing re i hriepa kawlie hing a pale riypa i hnyi.
45015018	Tahematapakieca, Jentail ming'a taata pa-uvsathyina hmung riypata Khrih ta kama na hmuo te a patlungpa re kaw hing ri li pata aw khu'a va ang. Hingpa a tuepa hing bie ta cuose, tuena ta cuose,
45015019	pahmungsana hne kharuehaa hmang cahrana ta cuose, Khazing Thlaapa cahrana ta cuose, a tuepa tana a cuo. Cacuonakawta Jerusalem taata patha pata Illyrikum te ta Khrih thuophaabie ca tluotlingsa pata i phu riypatana a cuo.
45015020	Cahaa cata i saduvthie ta a cuo paripa ca Khrih ama pachang buo lina lie thuophaabie phu kha a cuo, tahematapakieca malie ta a hruo ama pathu ciena lieta i sa chiy li riypa khata a cuo.
45015021	Caapathepa ta, Ama kaw chang buo lipa tie khata hmung'a yite, ama kaw a thyi buo lipa tie ta ama pachang aa,” a ta.
45015022	Niema'a luo ica vya tlaw riypa yita yi hluvpuv naa pakhuopa ca ama hing tana a cuo.
45015023	Cuorasala, ata hing ca hingpa ruo lie hing kama cuota rehriena riypa hmang a aw li tli nakawta hne kung syipuv taakhata niema'a luo vya tlaw riypa kha i khingpa a cuo nakawta,
45015024	Spain luo i vya tlawpuo pata caa vya tawpaa yi ang sala, niema hne cuokha chung aa nuosa pata maa khe khutaa ungta, capa luo si riypa kha naa bya ungla tapa i khing.
45015025	Cadyiseca, ata hing ca Jerusalem lie mingpathepa tie cuota rehrie riypata i si.
45015026	Tahematapakieca Masidonia ruo hne Akhaia ruo lie a awpa tie ta Jerusalem lie a awpa mingpathepa tie hraw taata siypasa tie'a luo palung thusa pata ama pipa hmang na a aw.
45015027	Capa hmang ama tuepa ca ama palung aa tluokhyi sa, hmisi ta ripa kieca ama tue riypa hrahring ta a cuo; tahematapakieca, Jentail ming ta Judah ming thlaapa luo thluechiy kha amaa hraw kieca, Judah ming zaw ta chuelyi chechiy luo thluechiy kha Jentail ming'a taata amaa hraw ra riypata a cuo.
45015028	Cacuonakawta hingpa re hing patlung'a ang te, i ri khingpa ca, iema cuota ama khyipa tuokaa bangkhuo a tlingsa pata iema kuv cung luo i pi khu taayita, Spain luo i tlawpuo pata ica vya tlawpaale'a yi.
45015029	Ica vya tlaw tiy yi ta, Khrih thluechiy kha a tlingsa pata ica vya phya'a yi tapa kha i pachang.
45015030	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih hne Thlaapa duena ta icaa nuepa yi ca, Kama cuo hingta Khazing'a luo kha thlaa na chuokhyi ung.
45015031	Judea ruo lie a awpa zanglituv tie kuv taata hya i zang khuna riypa hne Jerusalem lie i rehrie riypa hing mingpathepa tie cuota cuhluo tluo a cuo riypata thlaa chuo tie ung.
45015032	Cahaa cata, Khazing khingna a cuo pata a cuo kieca palungtluona hne niema'a luo vya chiy pata niema hrawlie thaazuo thaapa i lana ta a cuo aa.
45015033	Diena Khazing ca niema bangkhuo'a lie aw mangsue. Amen.
45016001	Kenkhria khrihsaabuv lie khrihsaa uvthyi a cuopa ma sietanung Fibi hing niema'a luo ica vya pachang sa yi.
45016002	Mingpathepa tie hrawlie ta a cuo riypa hmang a cuopa haata, ama kha Abyipa ming ta cuhluo ungla, niema'a taata abyana a caa hiepa yi bangkhuo kha pi tie ung. Tahematapakieca ama ca cawsaa hluvpuv hne kama cuo hrahring ta byatuv pha tana a cuo.
45016003	Khrih Zingsuv chunglie i re hrie hne a cuopa Prisilla hne Akuila kha nama kuv ica patuv yi.
45016004	Iema ca kama hringna cuota ama luv a pi nguopa tana ama cuo. Iema'a lie i palung a tluopa dyi cuo vyi, Jentail khrihsaa bangkhuo zaw ama palung a tluo hringhruo.
45016005	Ama ing lie a pungpa khrihsaa tie zaw nama kuv ica patuv yi. Asia ruo taata Khrih a zang taapa ta a cuopa, i viesaa phapa Epenetas zaw na kuv ica patuv.
45016006	Niema hrawlie rehrie te amaa hringhruopa Mary kha na kuv ica patuv.
45016007	Andronikas hne Junias kha nama kuv ica patuv yi. Iema ca kama phangbuo, kama hne thaw a tla hnepa tana ama cuo. Iema ca lucuotuv tie ta ama za pachangsa pata cuo yite kama hluo ta Khrihsaa ama za cuo tli.
45016008	Khrih chunglie i duepa Ampliatas kha na kuv ica patuv.
45016009	I duepa Stakhis hne Khrih re i hrie hnepa Urbanas kha nama kuv ica patuv yi.
45016010	Khrih zangna lie tlechuo aa chiysapa Apelles kha na kuv ica patuv. Aristobulus ingchungkhue tie kha nama kuv ica patuv yi.
45016011	I phangbuo a cuopa Herodion kha na kuv ica patuv. Narsissas chungkhue tie zaw kha Abyipa ming ta nama kuv ica patuv yi.
45016012	Abyipa rehrietuv Trifana hne Trifosa kha nama kuv ica patuv yi. Abyipa re lie te a maasapa, i duepa Persis kha na kuv ica patuv.
45016013	Abyipa ta aa tlawpa Rufas hne a nung, i nung ta a cuo rapa kha nama kuv ica patuv yi.
45016014	Asinkhritas, Flegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas hne uvnu hne sieta zaw iema hne a awpa tie bangkhuo kha nama kuv ica patuv yi.
45016015	Filologas, Julia, Nereus hne a sietanung, Olimpas hne iema hneta a awpa tie bangkhuo nama kuv ica patuv yi.
45016016	Pakha hne pakha kha a pathepa a pahnuona ta nama kuv a patuv ung. Khrih huo a cuopa khrihsaabuv na nama kuv caa patuv yi.
45016017	Uv nu hne sieta zaw, a chena hne a duna a chiykhyipa tie kha a raaring ungla, nama cuhluo ciepa pacuvna a du pata a rilepa tie kha cahriy tie ung.
45016018	Tahematapakieca, cahaapa cawsaa zaw kha ca Abyipa Khrih rehrietuv cuo lipa yi ta iema riyvaw cuo dyi ta a hriepa tana ama cuo. Ama bie pahniepa hne malie ama pata thenapa khata cawsaa zaaruo tie kha ama dung.
45016019	Thuophaabie hne aa patuv pata zangtluo namaa tlana kha cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama pachang nakawta hingpa kawlie hingta i palung aca tluokhyi hringhruo yi. Hmangphapa kawlie kha singvaa ungla, hmangpha lipa suena ta acaa kaa li riypa yi ta icaa khingkhyi yi.
45016020	Diena Khazing ta Setaa kha nama phyipazaa rawlie chi'a te a carie patang aa. Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina ca niema'a lie aw mangsue.
45016021	I rehriehne Timote ta nama kuv aca patuv yi. Cahaa cata, i phangbuo a cuopa Lusias, Jason hne Sosipater zaw ta nama kuv aca patuv yi.
45016022	Kama Tertias, hingpa caapaphya a capetuvpa zaw hingta Abyipa ming ta nama kuv ica patuv yi.
45016023	I ingtlungpa hne khrihsaabuv a pungna ing hnyituv, Gaius zaw ta nama kuv aca patuv yi. Khypuv suekingtuv Erastas hne ma uvnupa Kuartas zaw ta nama kuv aca patuv yi.
45016024	(Ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina ca niema bangkhuo'a lie aw mangsue. Amen.)
45016025	Kama i ripa hne i phupa Zingsuv Khrih thuophaabie hne cuo syipuv chung za nupa, cuorasala ata hing phu pata a cuopa bieparuv haakhata niema thaazuo caa pi khupa ca Khazing tana a cuo.
45016026	Cakhutaata chuozaa a hringpa Khazing bie pina haata, zang yite a bie ama ziy the riypata, profet tie capepa caa thueta, ama ca Jentail ming bangkhuo kha pachang sa pata a cuo tli.
45016027	Pakha dyipa, a singpa Khazing ca Zingsuv Khrih thueta chuozaa ta a ming rungnaa pata aw mangsue! Amen.
46001001	Khazing khingna thueta Khrih Zingsuv lucuotuv cuo riypata kupa kama Paul hne ma uvnupa Sosthenes ta,
46001002	Khazing mingpathepa cuo riypata kupa hne Khrih Zingsuv chunglie ta pathesapa Korin khy lie a awpa Khazing Khrihsaabuv tie hne, iema hne kiema Byipaapa ta a cuopa Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih a zangpa, hmangting lieta a awpa tie'a luo kha caa maca paphya yi.
46001003	Ma Paa Khazing hne ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca nama cunglie aw mangsue.
46001004	Khrih Zingsuv thueta aca pipa yi vihnyina kawlie kha Khazing i pathuosa pari.
46001005	Tahematapakieca niema ca ama thueta hmangting bangkhuo kha pipa cuo ung cate, bierina hne pachangna phangting zaw kha pipa nama cuo nakawta,
46001006	Khrih kaw tehte ma khuopa kha niema hrawlie a cusa pata a aw tli tana ta a cuo.
46001007	Cacuonakawta, ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih aa luona riypa nama huona lie hing nama hmung lipa thlaapa luo lasaw suokha hmuo aw vyi.
46001008	Ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih ning thueta suephawpa nama cuo li riypata ama ta ningchuona ning te ta thaazuo aca pi'a yi.
46001009	Khazing ca zangtluo aa tla; ama thueta niema ca a saacapaapa, ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih hne a viesaana hnyi riypata kupa nama cuo.
46001010	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema bangkhuo palung a lusa sala, nama hrawlie a chena aw li pata, palung lungkha phya ungla aa lupa atingna hnyi pata nama aw riypata Zingsuv Khrih ming ta paa ica kie yi.
46001011	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, Khalawi chungkhue ta niema hrawlie ahru-a-ina a awpa kha ina chang yi.
46001012	I ri khingpa ca niema cyicuo ta, “Kama ca Paul phuv tana i cuo,” “Kama ca Apollos phuv tana i cuo,” Kama ca Piter phuv tana i cuo,” Kama ca Khrih a ziytuv tana i cuo,” nama ta.
46001013	Khrih hing chetuv a cuo ma? Paul hingma nama cuota vieluo lie khepuopa a cuo? A cuo li kie Paul ming tama tiy namaa naw?
46001014	Krispas hne Gaius ri li pata pakha hmuo tiy ica naw li nakaw yi ta Khazing i law.
46001015	Tahematapakieca ahungtahmuo i ming tana tiy maa naw a ta riypa aw va ungciy.
46001016	(Stefanas hne a ingchungkhue zaw kha tiy i za naw ra yi; cakhutaata tiy i nawpa ama aw kalie ma tapa pachang va ang.)
46001017	Tahematapakieca Khrih ta tiynaw riypata na pathlie vyi. Thuophaabie phu riypata pathliepa cuo ang te, caca cawsaa bie rithena ta cuo'a vyi, tahematapakieca Khrih vieluo hing cahrana hnyi li pata a aw sue lina riypatana a cuo.
46001018	Vieluo lie Khrih thiyna kaw hing rana luo a chiy nguoluopa tie cuota ca ngaana bie cuote, cuorasala khuo nguoluopa kiema cuota ca Khazing cahrana tana a cuo.
46001019	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, “Mingsing tie singna kha para'a ang te, A thepa tie thena kha i pavie aa,” a ta.
46001020	Khaapaliema a singpa ca a aw? Phungbie saya ca khaapaliema a aw? Ata chuo bie i a thepa tie ca khaapaliema ama aw? Khazing ta chuelyi singna kha ngaana ta a pacuo sa tli cuo vama?
46001021	Tahematapakieca Khazing singna chunglie hing chuelyi hingta singna ta Khazing a pachang khu li nakawta, ma phupa ngaana bie ama tapa thuophaabie hingta a zangpa tie khuo riypa kha Khazing khingna tana a cuo.
46001022	Tahematapakieca Judah ming ta pahmungsana kha hie yite Grik ming ta singna kha ama tlechuo,
46001023	cuorasala kiema ca Khrih vieluo lie a thiyna kaw kha phu pate, capaca Judah ming cuota aliena cuote Jentail ming cuota ngaana bie ta a cuo.
46001024	Cuorasala Khazing kupa Judah ming hne Grik ming cuota ca Khrih ca Khazing cahrana hne Khazing singna tana a cuo.
46001025	Tahematapakieca Khazing ngaana ca cawsaa singna laata sing vie te, Khazing thaadyana ca cawsaa cahrana laata a thaa a ruv vie ngiethie.
46001026	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, Khazing ta aca kuna yi kha rue syalya tie ung. Niema hrawlie hing chuelyi taana luota a singsapa, hmang a tue khupa hne phanghruo luota aa suopa hluvsa va ungciy.
46001027	Cuorasala Khazing ta chuelyi lie a singpa tie nang pazaa riypata aa ngaapa tie kha a tlaw yite, a cahrapa tie nang pazaa riypata a thaa dyapa tie kha a tlaw yi.
46001028	Khazing ta chuelyi lie esenutaapa tie hne siysaa ri lipa tie kha a tlaw yite, a biepuvpa hmang tie kha khaapatahmuo ama cuo li riypata a biepuv lipa hmang kha aa tlaw.
46001029	Cacuonakawta Khazing hmielie ca ahungtahmuo a palepatie khu'a vyi.
46001030	Khazing ca Khrih Zingsuv thueta nama hringna hruo ta a cuo. Zingsuv ca kiema cuota Khazing taata a zuvpa singna, adangna, pathesana hne khuona ta a cuo.
46001031	Cacuonakawta, Caapathepa lie a capepa haata, “A pale khingpa ca Abyipa'a lie kha a pale se.”
46002001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema'a luo Khazing bieparuv phu riypata i vaw ning kha bie a thuvsapa hne singna kha hmuo va ang.
46002002	Tahematapakieca niema'a lie i aw ning kha Zingsuv Khrih hne vieluo lie ama thiena kaw ri li pata khaapahmuo pachang a hu vyi tapata i za rue.
46002003	Niema'a luo kha thaadyasa pata hne ciypuopa hne a cathangpuo pata i vaw.
46002004	I ripa hne i phupa bie kha cawsaa singna bie puvthepa cuo li pata Thlaapa hne a cahrana paluosana ta a cuo.
46002005	Cacuonakawta nama zangna ca cawsaa singna cunglie bangpa cuo li pata Khazing cahrana cunglie bangpa tana a cuo.
46002006	Cuorasala ruena a ky tlipa tie cunglie ca singna bie kha ma ri. A cuo raalaa pata ca singna ca a rale nguoluopa ata chuo singna hne ata chuo uvtuv tie singna zaw ta cuo vyi.
46002007	Cuorasala kiema ma ripa singna ca Khazing ta kiema rungnaana cuota chuelyi puv hluo taata a za rawrue paciepa, a paruv ta a za nupa, Khazing singna tana a cuo.
46002008	Ata chuo uvtuv tie pakha tahmuo pachang vayi; pachang yi sala rungnaana Byi kha vieluo lie thie'a vayi.
46002009	Cuorasala Caapathepa ta, “Ming ta a za hmung buo lipa, naa ta a za thyi buo lipa hne, Cawsaa palung lie a puv buo lipa hmang kha, Khazing ta ama a duetuv zaw cuota a tingtuo pacie,” a ta.
46002010	Hing hmang zaw hing Khazing ta Thlaapa ta kiema'a lie a paluo sa. Tahematapakieca Thlaapa ca hmangting bangkhuo hne Khazing tuepa aa thuvpa hmang bangkhuo khahmuo huv te a pathiypahle diy.
46002011	Cawsaa pakha a ruena hne a pacuona kha ama chunglie a awpa a thlaapa ri li pata ahungma a pachang khu? Cahaa ngiethie cata Khazing Thlaapa ri li pata ca Khazing ruena hne pacuona kha ahungtahmuo pachang khu vayi.
46002012	Kiema ma tingpa thlaapa hing chuelyi thlaapa ta cuo vyi, Khazing'a taata a zuvpa Thlaapa tana a cuo. Khazing ta malie a pipa lasaw kha ma pachang thena riypata Khazing Thlaapa kha ma ting tli.
46002013	Cacuonakawta thlaapa cawsaa a cuopa tie kha thlaapa bie ma pacuv tiy yi ta, khapa hmang bangkhuo kha cawsaa singna ta pacuv li payi pata thlaapa singna ta ma pacuv yi.
46002014	Thlaapa cawsaa a cuo lipa tie ca Khazing Thlaapa lasaw kha ting vayi, capa hmang ca iema cuota ngaana cuote, iema ta khapa hmang kha pachang khu vayi, tahematapakieca capa hmang ca thlaapa luotaa dyi ta hmung khupa tana a cuo.
46002015	Thlaapa cawsaa zaw taca hmangting kha hmung khura yite, ahungtahmuo sue phaw khu vayi. Caapathepa ta,
46002016	“Ahungma Khazing pathiypalung kha pachang te, a chang pachaa khu? a ta. Cuorasala kiema ca Khrih pathiy-palung a hnyituv tana ma cuo.
46003001	Cacuonakawta, uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema'a lie hing thlaapa cawsaa tie'a lie i ripa haata ri khu va ang; cuorasala saapa khingna ta a hringpa tie hne Khrih chunglie a haatiy kaliepa tie'a lie ripa haata dyina i ri khu.
46003002	Sacuopa ta cuo li pata ahnungtiy tana ica caw yi, tahematapakieca niema ca sacuopa a ning khu riypata cuo va ungciy. Ata zaw hing cuo valie ungciy,
46003003	tahematapakieca thiysaa tana nama hring nguoluo kalie. Nama hraw lieta hietliena hne ahru-a-ina a aw chung bangkhuo ca thiysaa khingna hne chuelyi cawsaa khingna haatana nama hring cuo vama?
46003004	Tahematapakieca pakha ta, “Kama ca Paul a ziytuv tana i cuo,” ta ung cate a hrangpa pakha ta, “Kama ca Apollos a ziytuv tana i cuo,” nama ta kieca saapa cawsaa cakhawpa cuo va ung cama?
46003005	Cacuokie Apollos ca khaapatama a cuo? Paul ca khaapatama a cuo? Iema ca niema nama zang thena riypata Khazing ta cyicuo ta re a pipa rehrietuv tana ama cuo.
46003006	Kama ta a ciy i tuv. Apollos ta tiy a bya, cuo ra sala a palesathawtuv ca Khazing tana a cuo.
46003007	Cacuonakawta a ciy a tuvpa hne tiy a byapa ca a biepuv ta cuo vayi cuorasala a pale satuv Khazing dyina a biepuv.
46003008	A ciy a tuvpa hne tiy a byapa ca aa lupa cuo yite ama cyicuo ta ama hriena muo kha a hmung riypatana ama cuo.
46003009	Tahematapakieca kiema ca Khazing changtaapa, re a hrie pakhawpa cuo pate, niema hing Khazing lu, Khazing ing ta nama cuo.
46003010	Khazing ta ina pipa vihnyina thueta ing sa a thesapa haata inghruo kha bang tli ang te, a hrangpa pakha ta a cunglie kha a vya sa. A sapa pakha cyicuo ta tuokhaatama i sa aa tapa kha a raaring yi se.
46003011	Ahungtahmuo inghruo bang ciepa Zingsuv Khrih ri li pata inghruo hrangpa bang khu vyi.
46003012	Inghruo bang ciepa lie kha pakhakha ta siyy, ngu, alung muosungpa, thing, ngiediy, sacuo kung tapa tie kha hmuo pata a sa kieca,
46003013	a satuv cyicuo ama rehriepa khaapama a lu tapa kha paluo sa pata a cuo aa. Tahematapakieca Bierinapa ning thueta pakha cyicuo ta ama hriepa re kha khaapama a lu tapa kha myi ta paluo sa pata a cuo aa.
46003014	Inghruo bang ciepa lie ama sapa kha aa hmang kieca a satuv ca lawmuo a hmung aa.
46003015	A rehriepa ca myi ta a kuo kieca a sung'a te, ama ca khuo pata a cuo aa, cadyiseca myi chung taata hya a zangpa haatana a cuo aa.
46003016	Niema ca Khazing biena-ing cuo ung cate, Khazing Thlaapa nama chunglie a awpa kha pachang va ung cama?
46003017	Pakhakha ta Khazing biena-ing kha a para kieca, Khazing ta ama cawsaa kha a para aa, tahematapakieca Khazing biena-ing ca pathe te, niema ca capa biena-ing catana nama cuo.
46003018	Niema hne niema kha a dung kha ung. Niema chunglie ta chuelyi taana ta i sing aa tapa nama aw pata a cuo kieca, a singpa nama cuo riypata a ngaapa nama cuo na a hu.
46003019	Tahematapakieca hing chuelyi singna hing ca Khazing cuota ngaana tana a cuo. Caapathepa ta, “Khazing ta mingsing tie kha ama zyana mamaapa ta a pa-uo yi,
46003020	cakhutaata, Abyipa ta mingsing tie ruena ca muo hnyi lipa a cuopa kha a pachang,” a ta.
46003021	Cacuonakawta ahungtahmuo caw-saa luochiytuv tie kawlie a pale kha se. Tahematapakieca hmangting hing niema huopa tana a cuo.
46003022	Paul cuose, Apollos cuose, Piter cuose, hing chuelyi cuose, thiyna hne hringna cuose, ata cuo cuose, hmie luo cuo cuose, hmangting bangkhuo hing niema huopa tana a cuo.
46003023	Cakhutaa, niema hing Khrih huopa cuo ung cate, Khrih hing Khazing huopa ta a cuo.
46004001	Kiema kha Khrih changtaapa hne Khazing bieparuv mang-chiykingkaatuv ta malie rue tie ung.
46004002	Cadyi cuo li pata mangchiyking-kaatuv ca zangtluo aa tlapa ama cuo a hu.
46004003	Cuorasala niema ta cuose, khaapa chuelyi bierina zung ta cuose i bie ina chipa zaw ung cata kama cuota ca hmang taata tana a cuo. Kama hne kama zaw i kaw hing bie a chi khu va ang.
46004004	Kama hne kama kha i pasuenapa aw vyi, cadyiseca i suena aw hrahring vyi ca a ta va ang. I bie naa ripatuv ca Abyipa tana a cuo.
46004005	Cacuonakawta a ningkhue a tling hluo, Abyipa aa vaw hluo ta ahunghmuo bie va ripa kha ung. Abyipa ca atalie ta zingna chunglie aa nu nguoluopa hmang hing khena luo chiykhyi'a te, pathiypalung ta aa tingpa zaw kha a paluo sa diy aa. Cakhutaata cawsaa bangkhuo ca iema hne aa phuvpa pathuosana kha Khazing'a taata ama hmung aa.
46004006	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema phana riypata hingpa bangkhuo hing kama hne Apollos kha pakhingpuona ta hmuo ang te ica chang tli yi. Cahaa cata niema ta Caapathepa lie cape ciepa lawpakhung pata nama tue li riypata kiema'a taata namaa cuv riypa hne ahung nama cuo zaw cawsaa pakha hmie mang pata pakha kha nama hue li riypatana a cuo.
46004007	Ahungma niema hing malie laata caapa nanang vie yi? Khazing'a taata nama cuhluo lipa khaapama a aw? Nama cuhluo pata a cuo kieca lasaw ta a cuhluo li pahaata khaapama namaa palekhyi riypa a aw?
46004008	Niema ca nama khingpa bangkhuo nama hnyi! Nama hnyirung ciemuo tli! Kiema li pata siepahruo nama cuo tli. Kiema hne siepahruo cuo hne riypata siepahruo cuo sasaw ungla ca a pha'a pakha!
46004009	Khazing ta kiema lucuotuv tie hing thiy riypata bie ripa paciepa tie haata cawsaa bangkhuo hnang luo ta malie a chipa tana ma cuo tapatana i rue. Tahematapakieca kiema ca chuelyi hne avuoming hne cawsaa zaw mangbaalaa riypata phusaapa tana ma cuo.
46004010	Kiema ca Khrih cuota a ngaapa cuo pate, niema ca Khrih chunglie a singpa tana nama cuo. Kiema ca ma thaa a dya, cuorasala niema ca nama thaa a ruv. Niema ca pa-uvsathyipa nama cuo, cuorasala kiema ca nutaapa ta ma cuo.
46004011	Ata cuote hingta kiema ca nangdiy tiyhrie pata ma aw, ma cawsie ca pangbie thlapa a cuo, malie tuv malie de yite ing li lu li pata ma aw,
46004012	ma kuv ta tah rehrie pate ma riy maa caw. Sie malie ama pi tiyta thluechiy ma pi yi; malie ama hrisaathierue tiyta ma ang law;
46004013	ma thuo malie ama pachi tiyta duena ta ma palie yi. Ata tepa hingta kiema ca chuelyi ta thawpa hne hnehnawvaabuv haata ma cuo.
46004014	Hing caa hing niema nangzaana riypata i capepa cuo vyi, cuorasala i duepa saa zaw nama cuo pahaata niema kha ica pasiypa-ya khing nakaw yi ta a cuo.
46004015	Tahematapakieca Khrih chunglie nama hringna lie hing luochiytuv ri tie li nama hnyi zaw ta paa a hluvpuv hnyi va ungciy. Kama ca thuophaabie thueta Khrih Zingsuv chunglie nama hringna lie hing nama paa tana i cuo.
46004016	Cacuonakawta kama inaa mangpuo riypa ung cata ica pasu yi.
46004017	Capanakaw cana khy ting lie a awpa khrihsaabuv bangkhuo lie i pacuvpa haayita Khrih Zingsuv chunglie i hringzya kha niema pachang sa pakhaa riypata Abyipa chunglie i duepa hne zangtluo aa tlapa i saacapaa Timote kha niema'a luo i vya pathlie.
46004018	Niema'a luo a vaw li tli riy'apa haata na rue ung cate, chekha ca ahruo tle ung cate namaa pale.
46004019	Cuorasala Khazing khingna a cuo kieca niema'a luo ica vya tlaw patang'a yi. A hruotlepa hne a palepa tie ama bie dyi kha cuo li pata ama hmang tue khuna kha i mang'a lie.
46004020	Tahematapakieca Khazing pena ca bie lie cuo li pata cahrana liena a aw.
46004021	Khaapama nama khing vie? Niema'a luo kha sungpe hne tama i vaw aa, a cuo li kie duena hne pathiypalung nena tama i vaw aa?
46005001	Lawki ming hrawlie hmuo a aw lipa canungcapaa kaw luota suena na niema hrawlie a aw tapa kha ina chang yi. Cawsaa pakha na a paa napuvnung hne a aw hne yi tapata a cuo.
46005002	Cata a cuo thluopa cata niema ca namaa pale kalie. Hmisi ta kieca nama ngie a chisa riypata cuo vama? Capa hmang a tuetuvpa ca niema hraw taata nama papya riypata cuo vama?
46005003	Pangpa ta niema'a lie i aw li raalaa pata, thlaapa ta niema'a lie i aw.
46005004	Niema'a lie a awpa haata cahaapa hmang a tuetuvpa cunglie ca Abyipa Zingsuv ming ta biechina i tue tli. Namaa pung tiyta ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih cahrana hneta i thlaapa ta niema'a lie a aw ra.
46005005	Capa cawsaa ca a pangpa para riypata Setaa'a luo kha pi tie ung, cakiedyina Abyipa Zingsuv khuona ning thueta a thlaapa kha khuona a hmung aa.
46005006	Namaa palepatiepa hing pha vyi. Thiynung a cawta tah viedie naw ciepa bangkhuo a pathu sa tapa kha pachang va ung cama?
46005007	Thiynung hlungpa kha thaw tie ung, cakiedyina niema ca thiynung phuv lipa a thaapa viedie nawpa haata nama cuo aa. Tahematapakieca lawsena pyi tuvtaata Khrih ca vieluo lie thiepa a cuo tli.
46005008	Cacuonakawta, lawsena pyi ca thiynung hlungpa ta a cuopa a pha lipa pathiypalung hne pha lina ta cuo li pata thiynung phuv lipa viechuo ta a cuopa pathena hne biehmisipa khata tue ungsiy.
46005009	I caa paphyapa chunglie ta i capepa ca canungcapaa kawlie zyazaa pha lipa tie hneta a khe kha ungla tana ta cuo vyi.
46005010	Hing chuelyi lie canungcapaa kawlie zyazaa pha lipa tie, a karuo awpa tie hne a ruvhangpa tie, kuvtuezuv abiepa tie zaw i ta khingna ta cuo vyi, cahaa cata a cuo kieca hing chuelyi taahingta nama pya muo a hu'a ta.
46005011	Cuorasala, niema'a luo i vya capepa ca Khrihsaa ming phya tlung pata canung capaa kawlie zyazaa pha lipa tie, a karuo awpa, kuvtuezuv abiepa, cawsaa thuo a pachipa, sahmaa a pariypa hne a ruvhangpa tie hneta a khe kha ungla tapa na a cuo. Cahaapa cawsaa hneta ca sa ning riypa tahmuo a tuhne kha ung.
46005012	Hmisi ta ripa kieca, kama ta ale luo'apa tie bie i ripa riypa yita a cuo ma? Khrihsaabuv chunglie a awpa tie hingna ama bie nama ripa aa cuo vama?
46005013	Khazing ta Khrihsaabuv le lie a awpa tie kha bie a ripa'a yi. Cawsaa pha lipa kha niema hraw taata papya tie ung.
46006001	Niema hrawlie pakhakha ta nama uvnu cunglie palung tling lina nama hnyi pata a cuo kieca mingpathepa tie'a luo cakuo cuopa ta, tuokhaatama a dang lipa chuelyi bierina zung luo a cakuo nguo?
46006002	Mingpathepa tie na chuelyi bie a ri'a yi tapa hing pachang va ung cama? Chuelyi hing niema na a bie a ripa'a ungciy tapata a cuo kieca hing bie saalipa hing ripa khu va ung cama?
46006003	Avuoming bie na ma ripa aa tapa hing pachang va ung cama? Hing chuelyi ma hringna lie maa tawpa bie changchiy hing ca ma ri riypa na a cuo.
46006004	Cahaapa bie nama hnyi tiyta khaapanakawma Khrihsaabuv ta siysaa ri lipa tie hmie luo nama chiykhyi?
46006005	Nama nang zaa naase tapatana i ri. Niema zangtuv pakha hne pakha a lala lie bie chi riypata nama hrawlie mingsingpa pakha hmuo aw vyi tapa ca a cuo khu'a ma?
46006006	Zangtuv hne zangtuv tazaa a cyi ung cate ma zanglituv'a luo ca namaa chiykhyi?
46006007	Pakha hne pakha tazaa namaa cyipa hing niema cuota asungna tana a cuo pacie tli. Khaapanakawma nama ang hriy thluo va? Khaapanakawma namaa padung sa thluo va?
46006008	Cuorasala niema tlaku ta nama uvnu cunglie kha hmangsue va tue ung cate nama dung.
46006009	Hmangpha lipa a tuepa tie ca Khazing pena cu'a vayi tapa kha pachang va ung cama? A dung kha ung; aparuvsuena a tuepa tie, kuvtuezuv abiepa tie, nungvaathingsuena a tuepa tie, capaa hne capaa, canung hne canung suena a tuepa tie,
46006010	a paruvpa tie, a karuo a awpa tie, sahmaa a pariypa tie, cawsaa thuo a pachipa tie hne a ruvhangpa tie ca Khazing pena cu'a vayi.
46006011	Niema chekha ca cahaapaapa catana nama za cuo. Cuorasala Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih ming hne ima Khazing Thlaapa chunglie ta pasiypa, pathe sapa hne duopacupa ta nama cuo tli.
46006012	“I cuota hmangting hing tue anaa vyi,” cuorasala i cuota thlahnena naa pipa cuo vyi. “I cuota hmangting hing tue anaa vyi,” cuorasala khaapa hmang tahmuo sii ta naa ziy kha se.
46006013	“Sa ca pavaw cuota cuote, pavaw ca sa cuota a cuo,” cuorasala Khazing ta a suohning hingta a para aa. Ma pangpa hing aparuvsuena tuena cuota hmuo riypa cuo vyi, cuorasala ma pangpa ca Abyipa cuota cuote, Abyipa zaw ma pangpa cuota a cuo.
46006014	Khazing ta Abyipa kha thiyna taata pathu pakhaa te kiema zaw hing a cahrana ta malie a pathu pakhaa aa.
46006015	Nama pangpa hing Khrih pangpa chebuo a cuopa kha pachang va ung cama? Cacuonakaw Khrih pangpa chebuo kha la pata siyhrawnung pangpa chebuo ta i tue'a ma? Tue buo hluo'a va ang!
46006016	Siyhrawnung a awhnepa ca ama hne pangkha ama cuopa kha pachang va ung cama? Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, “Iema pahning ca pangkha ama cuo aa,” a ta.
46006017	Cuorasala Abyipa hne a pazuepa ca ama hne thlaapa lieta suokha ama cuo aa.
46006018	Aparuvsuena kha cahriy tie ung. Cawsaa pakha ta a tuepa suena bangkhuo ca pangpa le luota cuote, aparuvsuena a tuepa taca ama pangpa cunglie hrahring khana suena a tue.
46006019	Nama pangpa hing Khazing'a taata hmung ung cate nama chunglie a awpa Thlaapa Pathe biena-ing a cuopa pachang va ung cama? Niema ca niema huopa cuo va ungciy;
46006020	muo pipa ta calyipa tana nama cuo. Cacuonakawta nama pangpa kha Khazing rungnaana ta hmuo tie ung.
46007001	Niema nama capepa caa hne aa patuvpa haakhata, capaa hing napuv chiy li pata aw sala a pha.
46007002	Cuorasala aparuvsuena tue riypata pasupaliyna a hluv tuv nakawta capaa ta napuv hnyi sala canung zaw navaa hnyi se.
46007003	Navaapa ta a napuvnung cunglie kha navaapa a cuona kha patling sa sala napuvnung zaw ta a navaapa cunglie ta napuvnung a cuona kha patling sa se.
46007004	Tahematapakieca napuvnung ta ama pangpa kha uv li pata, navaapa ta a uv. Cahaa cata navaapa zaw ta ama pangpa kha uv li pata napuvnung ta a uv.
46007005	Thlaa chuo riypata cuo cuokha kha thli pakhaw ung cate nama pahning palung tling pata na maa uv ta li pata ca pakha khingna kha pakha ta nama patling sa riypa kha a thlu kha ung. Nama thli pakhawpa cuo a chuo taata aw pakhaw pakhaa tie ung. Cacuolikieca namaa ang khu li nakawta Setaa ta aca pasupaliy sue'a yi.
46007006	Hingpa i ripa hing a pa-aw tana ica pa-aw yi, nawbie ica pipa yi cuo vyi.
46007007	Cawsaa bangkhuo kama haahingta aw khu diy ungla i khingsa. Cuorasala Khazing ta malie a pipa lasaw ma hmungpa ca a nanang diy.
46007008	Napuv navaa a hnyi li liepa cuo hne nunghlyi tie cuota ca kama haahingta iema seta aw yi sala na a pha i ta.
46007009	Cuorasala amaa ang khu li kieca a chiyhie thluo yi se. Thiysaa khingna ta myi kuo ta kuopa laa taca a chiyhie pata a pha vie.
46007010	A chiyhie ciepa tie cuota hingpa bie, kama bie cuo li pata Abyipa nawbie hing ica chang yi, napuv ta navaa kha a che kha se,
46007011	(cuorasala aa che kieca navaa hnyi li pata aw se, a cuo li kie a navaapa hne a hlaw pakhaa se), navaapa zaw ta a napuvnung kha a che kha se.
46007012	A hrangpa tie cuota, Abyipa'a taata cuo li pata kama ta ica tapa yi ca, zangtuv pakhakha ta zanglituv napuv hnyi sala capa nung cata ama hne aw hne riypata a palung a tling thluo kieca ama kha a che kha se.
46007013	Canung pakhakha ta zanglituv navaa hnyi sala capa paa cata ama hne aw hne riypata a palung a tling thluo kieca ama kha a che kha se.
46007014	Tahematapakieca zanglituv navaapa ca a napuvnung thueta Khazing cuhluo tluo aa tlapa vya cuote, zanglituv napuvnung zaw a navaapa thueta Khazing cuhluo tluo aa tlapa a vya cuo. Cacuolikieca, nama saata zaw kha pathe'a vayi, cuorasala ata hing ca Khazing cuhluo tluo aa tlapa ama cuo.
46007015	Cuorasala zanglituv khata a chepa a khing kieca; a che thluo ung; cahaapaapa hmang kawlie ca zangtuv canung a cuo zaw capaa a cuo zaw nawbie ta ca ciypaki vayi. Tahematapakieca Khazing na a dieta tah aw riypata malie a u.
46007016	Napuvnung, na navaapa kha i khuo khu aa tapata tuokhaatama na pachang? Navaapa, na napuvnung kha i khuo khu aa tapata tuokhaatama na pachang?
46007017	Cawsaa bangkhuo Khazing ta cuose tapata a ca china haa yi hne aca una haa dyi khata aw tie ung. Caca Khrihsaabuv bangkhuo ta i pacuvpa yi ta a cuo.
46007018	Cawsaa pakha ca vangdaw a te ciepa ta a ca u kie yi ca, vangdaw namaa tenapa hmaadaa kha para riypata a ting kha se. Cawsaa pakha ca vangdaw a te li pata a ca u kie yi ca vangdaw a te riypata a zue kha se.
46007019	Vangdaw a te hne a te li kha a biepuv ta cuo vyi, cuorasala Khazing nawbie ziy khana a biepuv.
46007020	Cawsaa bangkhuo ta aca ku ning yi nama cuona haakhata aw pathla tie ung.
46007021	A ca ku ning kha sii ta na za cuo ma? Na za cuo zaw ta pyi vyi. Cuorasala hyazangna cuo na hmung kieca hyazang riypata a zue tie.
46007022	Tahematapakieca sii cuoning ta Khazing ta a upa tie ca Khazing'a lie a hyazangpa tana ama cuo. Cahaa cata hyazangpa a cuo ningta kupa tie ca Khrih sii ta ama cuo.
46007023	Niema hing muo pi pata calyipa tana nama cuo; cawsaa sii ta a li kha ung.
46007024	Cacuonakaw, uvnu hne sieta zaw, tuokhaapa a daahmang lie nama aw pata aca ku zaw yi ta, aca kuna haa yi khata Khazing'a lie kha a hmang tie ung.
46007025	A chiyhie li liepa tie hne aa patuv pata Khazing nawpina hnyi va ang, cuorasala zangtluo aa tlapa Khazing ngiechina thueta kama ta i ruenapa ica chang yi.
46007026	Ata maa tawpa palung riethyina hing ruepa kieca cawsaa pakha hing a ta aa daahmang haahingta a aw pathla pata na a pha tapatana i rue.
46007027	Napuv a hnyipa na cuo kieca na napuv hne a che riypata vaa ting kha. A chiyhie li liepa na cuo kieca napuv hnyi riypata vaa ting kha.
46007028	Namaa chiyhie kiema suena nama tue pata cuo vyi, lesaa ta navaa a hnyi kiema suena a tue pata cuo vyi. Cuorasala a chiyhiepa tie ca chuelyi palung riethyina kha amaa taw aa. Niema kha capa taacata ica palaw sa khing yi.
46007029	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, i ri khingpa ca, thli ciepa cuo hing a vya pachangsale tli nakawta, ata taa hing taca napuv a hnyipa ta a hnyi lipa haakhata aw sala,
46007030	a ngiechi te a caapa tie ca a caa lipa haata aw yi se. A palung a tluopa tie ta a palung a tluo lipa haata aw yi sala, hmang a calyipa tie ta hmang a hnyi lipa haata aw yi se.
46007031	Hing chuelyi chechiy hne re a hriepa tie ta chuelyi chechiy hne re a hrie lipa haata aw tie ung. Tahematapakieca hing chuelyi chiycuona hmingsuo ca a chuole nguoluo tli.
46007032	Nama palung rie thyi kha se tapa na icaa khing khyi yi. Napuv a hnyi li papaa ca Abyipa kha tuokhaatama a palung i patluo khu aa tapata Abyipa kawlie dyi kha a palung rie a thyi.
46007033	Cuorasala napuv a hnyi papaa ca tuokhaatama a napuv kha a palung i patluo khu aa tapata chuelyi kawlieta a palung rie thyi te,
46007034	a ruena kha aa che. Navaa a hnyi lipa canung, a cuo li kie lesaapathenung ca tuokhaatama pangpa hne thlaapa lie i pathe khu aa tapata Abyipa kaw kha ama palung rie thyi te, cuorasala navaa a hnyipa canung ca tuokhaatama a navaapa kha a palung i patluo khu aa tapata chuelyi kawlie kha a palung rie a thyi.
46007035	Hinghaahingta i ripa hing niema phana cuota cuote tue li riypa tapata nama cunglie i khang khing nakawta cuo vyi. Hmangphapa kha hrie'a ung cate nama pathiypalung hmisi ta Abyipa'a luo namaa pi riypa khatana a cuo.
46007036	Pakhakha ta aa pahaa ciepa lesaanung cunglie kha mang a ngie pata aw va ang tapata a rue te, a khingna zaw kha cahra te aa hlaw khing kieca, a khingna haakhata a hlaw se. Suena ta cuo vyi.
46007037	Cuorasala ahung a cuo zaw, a palung kha a cusa pata sang te, ahungtahmuo hripuo li pata a khingna kha ama hne ama a uv khu te, capa nung ca a pahaapa lesaa a cuo yalya khata aw riypata a palung lie bie aa chi kieca hmangpha a hriepa tana a cuo aa.
46007038	Cacuonakawta a pahaapa lesaanung kha a chiyhiepa ca hmangphapa kha tue te, a chiyhie lipa ta hmang pha viepa kha a tue.
46007039	Napuv ca a navaapa a hring chung bangkhuo ca a hya zang vyi. A navaapa a thiy kieca a khingpa kha aa hlaw khu, cadyiseca Khazing a zangpa dyina a hlaw aa.
46007040	Kama ta bie i chipa ca, a cuona ta yalya khata aw pathla sala aa nuo vie aa i ta; kama zaw ma Khazing Thlaapa Pathe kha i hnyi ra tapata i rue.
46008001	Kuvtuezuv'a luo hriykhung a rina sa hne aa patuv pata, ma bangkhuo ta “pachangna ma hnyi diy kaluo,” tapa kha ma pachang. Pachangna hingta cawsaa kha ahruo patle sa te duena ta ca cawsaa kha a sathaw.
46008002	Cawsaa pakhakha ta i pachang tapata aa rue kieca a pachang riypa zaa ta pachang valie.
46008003	Cuorasala Khazing kha a duepa ca Khazing ta a pachang.
46008004	Kuvtuezuv'a luo hriykhung a rinapa sa ningna kawlieta ma ri kieca, “kuvtuezuv ca a hringpa a cuo li pakha,” pachang pate, Khazing pakha ri li pata khazing hrangpa aw vyi tapa kha ma pachang.
46008005	Vuoruo lie cuose alyi lie cuose khazing ama tapa zaw ama aw ri aa. Cahaa cata khazing a hluvpuv hne byi a hluvpuv ama aw zaw ta
46008006	kiema cuota ca Paa, Khazing pakha dyi na a aw. Hmangting bangkhuo hing ama'a taata tuepa cuote, kiema zaw hing ama cuota a hringpa tana ma cuo. Cakhutaata Abyi pakha, Zingsuv Khrih kha aw te hmangting bangkhuo hing ama'a taata cuote, kiema zaw hing ama cuota a hringpa tana ma cuo.
46008007	Cadyiseca cawsaa bangkhuo ta capa pachangna ca hnyi vayi. Cawsaa chekha ca kuvtuezuv biena hne khata a zisa tli yite ata ning tepa hingta kuvtuezuv lie hriykhung amaa rinapa sa kha ama ning tiyta ca sa ca kuvtuezuv huopa khatana a cuo tapata ama zang. Ama ruena a caw nakawta capa sa ca malie a papyapalyi tapata ama rue.
46008008	Sa hingta kiema kha Khazing minghmiepha malie pahmung sa'a vyi. Ma ning li zaw ta maa sung vie riypa aw vyi, ma ning kie zaw ma maa mie vie riypa aw vyi.
46008009	Cuorasala nama hyazangna kha a thaadyapa tie a pachiyna ta pacuo sa kha ung.
46008010	Nangvuona a hnyipa niema zaw kuvtuezuv bienatluophie lie a tu ung cate sa nama ningpa kha pachangna thaa a dyapa tie ta ca hmung biephung yi sala kuvtuezuv lie hriykhung a rina sa kha ning riypata a thaa patlung sapa cuo'a vama?
46008011	Cahaa cata Zingsuv ta a thiykuopa, a thaa a dyapa na uvnu ca nama nangvuona nakawta a ra aa.
46008012	Cahaa cata nama uvnu cunglie kha sue ung cate, a thaadyapa ama chiephathleduona kha hmaa nama paphya nakawta Khrih'a lie nama sue.
46008013	Cacuonakawta, i ningpa sa hingna i uvnu a liena ta a cuo tapata a cuo kieca, i uvnu a lie li riypata khatiy tahmuo saa ce'a va tli ang.
46009001	Kama hing hya a zangpa pakha cuo naa ang? Kama hing lucuotuv pakha cuo naa ang? Ima Byipaapa Zingsuv zaa hmungpa cuo naa ang?
46009002	Malie cuota lucuotuv i cuo li zaw, niema cuo chuo taca i cuo, tahematapakieca niema ca Zingsuv chunglie lucuotuv i cuonapa a pacu satuv caakhe tana nama cuo.
46009003	Kama naa hiehriypasietuv tie i palienapa yi ca ama hing tana a cuo.
46009004	Ma re kawlie hing sa hne tiy hmung a tla va pama?
46009005	Lucuotuv hrangpa tie, Abyipa nuta zaw hne Piter haahingta ma khy tlawna luo hing zangtuv napuv zaw a paziysalena naw hnyi ra va pama?
46009006	A cuo li kie Barnabas hne kama kyalya hingma ma hringna cuota rehrie li pata a aw the li riypata a cuo puv?
46009007	Ahungma ama tuokaa hmuo pata rieka re a hrie buo? Ahungma a thyi thyikha hmuo ce li pata mingsuv a cyi buo? Ahungma a tuv chung taa a pyapa a hnungtiy dang li pata tuv a khie buo?
46009008	Hingpa hing cawsaa hmungna kuo luo taata i ripa a cuo ma? Phungbie zaw ta hinghaahingtana a ri cuo vama?
46009009	Moses phungbie chunglie ta, “Suo a ciy nguoluopa cuetungpa kha a hmya hy kha ung,” a ta. Khazing ta a ri khingpa hing cuetungpa cuo tama a cuo?
46009010	Kiema cuo hingta a ripa cuo'a vama? Kiema cuota aa capepa tana a cuo. Tahematapakieca le a thawpa ta a nguopuona hne thaw te, sacuo a ciypa zaw thyipaa kha hmung ra riypa a nguopuona hne tana aa ciy.
46009011	Niema'a lie thlaapa saciy kha tuv pate niema'a taata chuelyi chechiy kha ma hmung kieca a hluv tuv nama ta ma?
46009012	Cawsaa hrangpa tie ta niema'a taata hinghaahingta hmung riypa amaa nguopuo kieca kiema changchiy ca a hluv vie ta a nguopuo riypa cuo va pama? Cuorasala, cahaa cata hmung riypa hing a zue buo va puv, Khrih thuophaabie luo a khuotuv ma cuo li riypata hmangting kha a ang tuv ta ma ang.
46009013	Biena-ing lie re a hriepa tie ca ning riypa kha biena-ing taata hmung yite, bienatluophie lie hriykhung rina a tuepa tie zaw ta hriykhung rina taata cuvu ama hnyi tapa kha pachang va ung cama?
46009014	Cahaa cata thuophaabie a ripa tie zaw thuophaabie rina taata ama riy amaa caw riypatana a cuo tapata Abyipa bie pi pata a cuo.
46009015	Cuorasala hing hmung riypa hing i hmuopa aw vyi. Hingpa caa zaw hing cahaapa byana hmung riypata i capepa cuo vyi. Tahematapakieca hing a hruo i tlekhyipa i daahmang hing pakhakha ta khaapahmuo a cuo li pata a tuepa laa taca a thiy hmuo i thiy khing vie.
46009016	Thuophaabie na i ri tapa a cuo kieca a hruo i tlena riypa aw vyi. Tahematapakieca i ri hrahring riypatana a cuo. Thuophaabie hingna i ri va tapa kieca chiesapa tana i cuo aa.
46009017	Kama ri tana thuophaabie hing i ri tapa a cuo kieca lawmuo hmung riypa i hnyi aa; cuorasala kama ri ta a cuo li kieca hrie riypata naw pipa tana i cuo.
46009018	Khaapa hingma i lawmuo ca a cuo? Hingpa hing tana a cuo: muo pi li pata thuophaabie rithena hmung ang te, i hmung riypa muo la li pata thuophaabie i ripa hingna a cuo.
46009019	Cacuonakawta kama ca ahung sii hmuo i cuo li pata, cawsaa hluv vie hmung khu riypata kama hne kama kha cawsaa bangkhuo sii ta i tue.
46009020	Judah ming i la thena riypata Judah ming'a luo kha Judah ming haata i tue; Moses phungbie rawlie i hring li raalaa pata Moses phungbie rawlie a awpa tie kha i la khuna riypata phungbie rawlie a awpa tie'a luo kha phungbie rawlie a awpa pakha haata i tue.
46009021	Phungbie le luo a awpa tie i la khu na riypata phungbie le luo a awpa tie'a luo kha phungbie le lie a awpa pakha haata i tue.
46009022	Thaazuo a dyapa tie i la the riypata thaazuo a dyapa tie'a luo kha thaazuo a dyapa haata i tue. A cuo khuna chung ta chekha zawchuo khuo khu riypata cawsaa bangkhuo luo kha cuona ting ta i hrawle.
46009023	Hing bangkhuo hing thuophaabie kawlieta i tuepa cuote a thluechiy i hraw ra khing nakawtana a cuo.
46009024	A ruo azuena lie kha a ruopa bangkhuo amaa zue raalaa pata pakha dyina lawmuo a hmung tapa kha pachang va ung cama? Cacuonakawta lawmuo hmung riypata a ruo tie ung.
46009025	Azuena lie a zue ra khingpa ca amaa cuv ning kha hmangting lieta iema hne iema khuopuv ta amaa uv. Cahaa cata ama tuepa ca a ra thepa paapaapa lakhuv hmung riypatana a cuo. Cuorasala kiema ca a ra the lipa paapaapa lakhuv hmung riypata a cuo.
46009026	Cacuonakawta cuokaa hnyi li pata a ruo cakhaw va ang. Cawsaa pakha ta thliy a phaw cakhawpa haakhata phaw va ang.
46009027	Cuorasala malie dyi kha chang pata kama tlaku thawpa i cuo sue li riypata i pangpa kha khuo ta i hri.
46010001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, ma mingchingmingvuo tie bang-khuo ca amyi rawlie za aw yite riyliy ama za tepa kha nama maw li riypata ica khing yi.
46010002	Moses hnang ziytuv cuo riypata amyi chunglie hne riyliy chunglie kha tiy amaa zaa naw.
46010003	Ama bangkhuo ta thlaapa sa kha za ning pakhaw yite,
46010004	thlaapa tiy kha ama za dang pakhaw. Iema a ziylepa yi thlaapa Alung taakhata tiy ca dang yite capa Alung ca Khrih ta a cuo.
46010005	Cata a cuo raalaa pata cawsaa hluv vie cunglie Khazing palung a tluo li nakawta ama riy kha ruochung lie ze patlaa siy pata ama cuo.
46010006	Hingpa bangkhuo hing iema ama tuepa chiena kha ma tue khing ra li riypata kiema cuota a mangpuo riy tana a cuo.
46010007	Caapathepa ta, “Cawsaa zaw ca ning riypa hne dang riypa khata a tu yite thu yite ama luo,” a tapa haakhata iema chekha haata kuvtuezuv abiepa cuo kha ung.
46010008	Kiema ca iema hrawlie cawsaa chekha ta ama za tuepa haakhata a paruv suena tue'a va puv, cahaa cata ama za tue nakawta ning kha chunglie thawkiy thawthung ama za thiy.
46010009	Iema chekha ta ama za tuepa haakhata kiema ca Khrih kha ima dyapasya riypata cuo vyi, cahaa cata ama za tuena kawta pariy ta a za dawsa yi.
46010010	Iema chekha amaa zaa ciephuvluvpa haakhata maa ciephuvluv riypata cuo vyi, iema ca Paratuv avuoming ta ama za para diy tli.
46010011	Iema'a lie a tlungpa hingpa hmang hing a raaringna riypata kiema chuotliepa saa zaw cuota capepa tana a cuo.
46010012	Cacuonakawta a cusa pata na i daa a tapa ca aa lie li riypata a raaring se.
46010013	Namaa tawpa pasupaliyna hing cawsaa cunglie a tlung buo lipa cuo vyi. Khazing ca zangtluo aa tlapa tana a cuo, niema nama ang khu lipa pasupaliyna kha capa ang sa'a vayi. Cuorasala namaa tawpa kha nama ang khuna riypata, capa pasupaliyna hne cata pyapathlana luopuv kha a ca sapa puo'a yi.
46010014	Cacuonakawta, i duepa zaw, kuvtuezuv abiena ca cahriy tie ung.
46010015	Ruena a hnyipa tie bie changpa haatana ica chang yi; i ripa hing niema ta tah thleduo tie ung.
46010016	Abyipa zuosa lie ma hmuo pakhawpa palungtluona panuo cuota thlaa ma chuo tiyta Khrih thiyse na maa hraw ung cuo vama? Viechuo chechi pate maa hrawpa zaw ung hing Khrih pangpa na maa hraw ung cuo vama?
46010017	Viechuo tluokha a cuo nakawta, kiema a hluvpuv hing pangkha tana ma cuo, tahematapakieca viechuo tluokha maa hraw nakawtana a cuo.
46010018	Israel ming kha pacuo syalya pachiy tie ung; hriykhung a rina saa a cepa bangkhuo ca bienatluophie re lie kha phuvkha tana ama cuo cuo vama?
46010019	I ri khingpa ca khaapama a cuo? Kuvtuezuv ama pipa sa a cuo li kie kuvtuezuv hing a biepuv i ta khingna a cuo ma?
46010020	Cuo vyi, i ri khingpa ca lawki ming hriykhung a rinapa ca khuevuo'a luo ama pipa cuote Khazing'a luo ama pipa cuo vyi. Niema ca khuevuo hne namaa viesaa riypata ca khing vayi ang.
46010021	Abyipa panuo hne khuevuo panuo kha dang pakhe khu'a va ungciy. Abyipa cabya hne khuevuo cabya zaw dung pakhaw khu va ungciy.
46010022	Abyipa ca a hietlie se tapa ma ima khing? Ama laata a cahra vie pata a ri kanaa ungpuv?
46010023	Khaapa bangkhuo tue khu pata a cuo, cuorasala hmangting hingta thlahnena malie pi vyi. Khaapa bangkhuo hing tue khu pata a cuo, cuorasala hmangting hingta malie sathaw vyi.
46010024	Ahungtahmuo kiema phana cuo dyi huv riypa cuo vyi, cuorasala malie cuo phana khana ma huv vie riypata a cuo.
46010025	Saa zaana lie ama zaapa bangkhuo kha na chiephathleduona ta bie hiehriy tievya li pata va ning thluo.
46010026	Tahematapakieca chuelyi hne a chunglie a awpa bangkhuo hing Abyipa huopa tana a cuo.
46010027	Zanglituv pakha ta sa ning aca ku kieca na chiephathleduona lie bie hiehriyna suokha hmuo tue li pata na hmiekunglie ama pachiepa bangkhuo kha ning tie.
46010028	Cuorasala cawsaa pakhakha ta, “Hing sa hing hriykhung rina lie ama pipa sa tana a cuo,” aca ta kieca caa changtuvpa kaw pacuona hne chiephathleduona kawlieta ning li pata aw tie.
46010029	Chiephathleduona i ta tiyta niema cuo li pata caa changtuvpa chiephathleduona khana i ri khing pata a cuo. Khaapanakawma cawsaa pakha chiephathleduona ta kama hyazangna kha ina pakhuo aa?
46010030	Sa kha thlaa a chuo ang te i ning kieca, capa sa cuota thlaa i chuo nakaw cata khaapanakawma ina caw-yi'a yi?
46010031	Cacuonakawta, na ning kie cuose, na dang kie cuose, khaapa na tue kie zaw ma, na tuepa bangkhuo kha Khazing rungnaana cuota tue tie.
46010032	Judah ming cunglie cuose, Krik ming cunglie cuose, Khazing Khrihsaabuv cunglie cuose, a patawpamuona tue kha.
46010033	Kama hing naa mangpuo tie ung. Hmangting i tuena lie hing cawsaa bangkhuo palung patluo riypa a zue ang te, kama phana kha huv lipa angta, cawsaa hluvpuv phana hmung riypa kha i huv. Caca cawsaa hluvpuv khuona ama hmung thena riypatana a cuo.
46011001	Kama ta Khrih kha i mangpuo pahaata kama kha naa mangpuo ra tie ung.
46011002	Hmangting kawlie kama kha naa thyi ung cate ica pacuv pachaapa yi phungluo kha nama ziy nakawta ica pathuo sa yi.
46011003	Cuorasala nama pachang riypata i khingpa yi ca, Khrih ca cawsaa bangkhuo luv ta cuote, navaapa ca napuvnung luv ta a cuo, cakhutaa Khazing ca Khrih luv ta a cuo.
46011004	Capaa pakha thlaa a chuo tiyta hne biephu a ri tiyta a luv kha aa khuv kieca a luv ling a pazuepa tana a cuo,
46011005	cuorasala canung pakha ta a luv kha a khuv li pata thlaa chuo te biephu a ri kieca a luv ling a pazue pata a cuo, a luv a pamyipa canung pakha hne tana aa lu.
46011006	Cacuonakawta canung ta a luv kha aa khuv li kieca a suo kha a ngu lalue se; cuorasala canung pakha cuota suo a ngupa hne luv a pamyipa kha lingzuena ta a cuo kieca a luv kha a khuv se.
46011007	Capaa ca a luv kha a khuv riypata cuo vyi, tahematapakieca ama ca Khazing hmingsuo a phyapa hne a rungnaana a paluo sapa tana a cuo; cuorasala canung ca capaa rungnaana a paluo satuv dyi tana a cuo.
46011008	Hmisi ta ri pata a cuo kieca, capaa ca canung'a taata sapa cuo li pata, canung tuv kha capaa'a taata sapa ta a cuo.
46011009	Capaa ca canung cuota sapa cuo li pata, canung tuv kha capaa cuota sapa ta a cuo.
46011010	Capanakaw hne avuoming hmiemang pata canung pakha ca luvkhuv kha a khuv se.
46011011	Tuokhaata a cuo zaw, Abyipa chunglie ima hringna lie hingta ca capaa aw li pata canung ta ama seta a daa khu aw li pata, capaa zaw canung aw li pata ama seta a daa khu vyi.
46011012	Tahematapakieca canung ca capaa chung taata sapa a cuo pahaata capaa zaw canung chung taata a puvpa ta a cuo. Cuorasala hmangting bangkhuo hing Khazing'a taata a vawpa tana a cuo.
46011013	Niema ta tah bie a chi tie ung: canung ta a luv a khu li pata Khazing'a luo thlaa chuo riypa a pha'a ma?
46011014	Chuelyi hmang awtuv zya hingta capaa ta a suo a pasyi kieca a ling kha a pazue te,
46011015	canung ca a suo a syi kieca a rungnaana tana a cuo tapata cuo vama? Tahematapakieca a suo ca a luv a khuvna riypata pi pata na a cuo.
46011016	Cuorasala cawsaa pakhakha ta hingpa hing a i khing kieca kiema'a lie cuose, Khazing Khrihsaabuv'a lie cuose, cahaapaapa phungluo ca aw vyi, tapata i ri khing.
46011017	Cadyiseca, a raw luo pacuvna kawlie hingta ca ca pathuo sa khu vayi ang, tahematapakieca namaa pungnapa hingta phana laata chiena a chiykhyi vie.
46011018	Tahematapakieca a suokhana ca Khrihsaabuv lie namaa pung tiyta phuvkha hne phuvkha palung a lu lina nama hnyi tapa kha thyi ang te, a hmuo buo thluo thlu aa tapata i zang.
46011019	Hmisi ta ripa kieca, a phuv ta a chena ca a aw a hu thluo ra, cakiedyina niema hrawlie ahungma a hmisipa a cuo tapa kha aa luo aa.
46011020	Niema namaa pung pakhaw tiyta nama ningpa ca Abyipa zuosa ta cuo vyi.
46011021	Ning tiy a vya ta tiyta, nama huopa cyicuo kha a la ung cate nama ning; pakha ca a nang diy te pakha ca nama pariy.
46011022	Ningna dangna riypata ing hnyi va ung cama? A cuo li kie, Khazing Khrihsaabuv kha nutaa pata khaahmuo a hnyi lipa tie nang pazaa riypa ma nama khing? Khaapa bie ma ica chang'a yi? Ica pathuo sa'a yi ma? Hingpa kawlie hingta ca ca pathuo sa'a vayi ang!
46011023	Tahematapakieca ica pi pachaapa yi hing Abyipa'a taata i hmungpa tana a cuo. Abyipa Zingsuv ca ama lyi zuopa lie kha viechuo tluokha kha la te,
46011024	palungtluona bie a hluo khu taata, chechi te, “Hingpa hing i pangpa tana a cuo, niema cuota a cuo. Kama a thyina riypata tue tie ung,” a ta yi.
46011025	Cahaa ngiethie cata, zuosa ama ning khu taata, panuo zaw kha la te, Hing panuo hing i thiyse ta pacu sapa biekuona thaapa tana a cuo. Hing panuo nama dang kyry hingta kama a thyi pakhaana riypata tue mya ung,” a ta.
46011026	Tahematapakieca hing viechuo ning ung cate hing panuo nama dang kyry ta Abyipa thiyna khana ama a vaw pakhaa nate ta nama phu pata a cuo.
46011027	Cacuonakawta a hmuo tluopa a cuo li pata Abyipa viechuo kha ning te panuo kha a dangpa ca Abyipa pangpa hne thiyse lieta a suepa tana ama cuo.
46011028	Nama hne nama kha a hiehriypasie taa la, cakhutaa dyi cata viechuo kha ce la panuo kha dang tie.
46011029	Tahematapakieca Abyipa pangpa kaw kha pachangpasie li pata viechuo kha ce te panuo a dangpa ca iema cunglie suena patlung riypata a ning a dangpa tana ama cuo.
46011030	Capa kaw liecana niema a hluvpuv ca nama thaa dya te nama pasa, chekha ca nama thiy.
46011031	Kiema hne kiema kha maa hiehriypasie kieca bie ripa pata cuo'a va puv.
46011032	Cuorasala, Abyipa ta kiema kha bie malie a ripa kieca chuelyi ming hneta sue phaw hnepa ma cuo li riypata malie a pasiypa-yapa tana a cuo.
46011033	Cacuonakawta, i uvnu hne i sieta zaw, Abyipa zuosa hmuo riypata namaa pung tiyta, pakha hne pakha kha a huo mya ung.
46011034	Nama nang a diy kie ing lie kha ning tie ung. Cahaa cata a cuo kieca, namaa pung thueta sue aca phaw riy yi aw'a vyi. Hmang hrangpa hne aa patuv pata ca i vya chiy thue na ica pacuv pakhaa'a yi.
46012001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, thlaapa lasaw hne aa patuvpa hingta, ca pachang sa lipa yi ta aw khing va ang.
46012002	Lawki ming nama za cuo ning kha a huv a sung lipa kuvtuezuv kha abie riypata ca za sawle yite, luo nama za paapa kha nama pachang.
46012003	Cacuonakawta nama pachang riypata i khingpa ca Khazing Thlaapa thueta bie a ripa ta ca, “Zingsuv ca chie sapa cuose,” ta buo'a vayi. Thlaapa Pathe thueta ta li pata ca, “Zingsuv ca Abyipa tana a cuo,” ta khu'a vayi.
46012004	Lasaw phangphang a aw raalaa pata, Thlaapa pakha'a taatana a cuo diy.
46012005	Re a phangphang a aw raalaa pata, Abyipa pakha huona ma hrie diy.
46012006	Rehriena a phangphang a aw raalaa pata, khapa bangkhuo a pahrie a patue sapa yi ca Khazing pakha tana a cuo.
46012007	Zaapuv phana riypata pakha cyicuo kha Thlaapa paluohuo sa khunapa kha malie a pi.
46012008	Thlaapa cata pakha kha singna bie ri khu riypa pi te, capa Thlaapa ngiethie cata pakha kha pachangna bie ri khu riypata a pi.
46012009	A hrangpa pakha kha Thlaapa cata zangna pi te, capa Thlaapa ngiethie cata pakha kha patluo sana lasaw a pi.
46012010	A hrangpa pakha kha kharuehaa hmang tue khuna pi te, a hrangpa pakha kha profet-biephu rithena a pi. A hrangpa pakha kha Thlaapa thleduo thena pi te, a hrangpa pakha kha ryi phanghrangpa tie cyi thena a pi, a hrangpa pakha kha ryi palie thenapa a pi.
46012011	Hingpa bangkhuo a tuetuv hing aa lupa Thlaapa pakha ta cuote, a khingna haakhata cawsaa kha lasaw phang nanang kaluo ta a pi yi.
46012012	Pangpa ca suokha cuote chebuo a hluvsa a hnyi pahaata hne chebuo bangkhuo ca ama hluvsa raalaa pata pangpa suokha ta ama cuopa haata, Zingsuv chunglie zaw cahaa cata a cuo.
46012013	Cahaa cata kiema bangkhuo zaw hing Judah ming ma cuo zaw, Jentail ming ma cuo zaw, sii ma cuo zaw, hya a zangpa ma cuo zaw, ma bangkhuo hingta pangpa suokha chunglie kha Thlaapa pakha ta tiynawna malie pi te, ma bangkhuo hingta dang riypa, Thlaapa pakha kha pipa tana ma cuo.
46012014	Pangpa suokha lie hing chebuo suokha dyi aw li pata chebuo a hluvpuv ama aw.
46012015	Phyi ta, kama ca kuv i cuo li nakawta pangpa ta cuo va ang ta sala, capa cata chebuo cuo li tli pata pa-aw sa'a vyi.
46012016	Cahaa cata naa ta, “Ming i cuo li nakawta pangpa ta cuo va ang ta sala, capa cata chebuo cuo li tli pata pa-aw sa'a vyi.
46012017	Ma pangpa bangkhuo hing ming ta cuo sala, tuokhaatama a thyi the aa? Ma pangpa bangkhuo hing naa ta cuo sala, tuokhaatama rang a thyi the aa?
46012018	Cuorasala a ta a cuona haa yalya hingta, Khazing ta, ama khingna haata, chebuo tie kha iema'a na ama awna riypa hmang lie kha a chi yi.
46012019	Chebuo suokha ta cuo diy yi sala, pangpa ca khaalie ma a aw aa?
46012020	Ata a cuona haahingta, chebuo hluvpuv aw yite, pangpa suokha ta a cuo.
46012021	Ming ta kuv kha, “Nama kha caa hu va ang,” ta khu vyi; luv zaw ta phyi kha, “Nama ca caa hu va ang,” ta khu ra'a vyi.
46012022	Hmisi ta ripa kieca, a thaa a ne viepa haata a tapa chebuo tie hing ama aw li pata a cuo the lipa tana ama cuo.
46012023	Hmiezaa tluo a tla uo vyi tapata ma ruepa tie kha khuo vie ta mangchiy pate, a puvthe uo lipa chebuo tie kha a puvthe vie ta ma pangi yi ta.
46012024	A puvthe viepa chebuo tie ca cahaa cata tue a hu vayi. Cuorasala Khazing ta hmiezaa tluo aa tla uo lipa tie kha hmiezaana a le vie ta pi yite pangpa kha a sa.
46012025	Caca pangpa chunglie palung a lu lina a aw li riypa hne chebuo tie kha amaa mangchiy the kaluo riypata a tue.
46012026	Chebuo suokha ta pasana a ang kieca pasakhyi kaluo yite, chebuo suokha hmiezaana a hmung kieca amaa lawkhyi kaluo.
46012027	Niema ca Khrih pangpa cuo ung cate, pakha cyicuo hing capa pangpa chebuo cata nama cuo.
46012028	Khazing ta Khrihsaabuv lie re a pi tiy yi ta, a suokhana ta lucuotuv tie, a suohningna ta profet tie, a suothungna ta pacuvtuv tie, cakhutaa kharuehaa hmang a tuetuvpa tie, cakhutaata patluo sa khuna pipa tie, a paziy pata malie a bya khuna pipa tie, cakhutaata malie luochiy thena pipa tie, hne ryi a phangphang ta a cyi khupa tie tapata a pi yi.
46012029	Ama bangkhuo ta lucuotuv ama cuo ma? Ama bangkhuo ta profet ama cuo ma? Ama bangkhuo ta pacuvtuv ama cuo ma? Ama bangkhuo ta kharuehaa hmang ama tue ma?
46012030	Ama bangkhuo ta patluo sa khuna ama hnyi ma? Ama bangkhuo ta ryi hrangpa ama cyi ma? Ama bangkhuo ta ryi hrangpa kha ama palie the ma?
46012031	Cuorasala aa suo viepa lasaw hmung riypa kha a zue tie ung. Kama zaw ta a phacepa luo kha ica pahmung sa'a yi.
46013001	Kama hingta cawsaa ryi a phangphang hne avuoming ryi khahmuo the ra ang sala, duena i hnyi li kieca i ryi ca malie naa a ruepa daakhang pu hne chaaraa pu khana a lu.
46013002	Profet biephu ri khuna hnyi ang te, bie a thuvpa bangkhuo i pachang diy khutaa pachangna phangting hnyi pata, tluo a hnyi khupa zangna bangkhuo i hnyi zaw ta duena i hnyi li kieca, khaapatahmuo cuo va ang.
46013003	I hnyipa bangkhuo kha malie pi diy yi ang te i pangpa kha myi ta rue riypata i pi zaw ta, duena i hnyi li kieca khaapatahmuo cuo va ang.
46013004	Duena ca a palung pasiy te kawpacuo a the. Duena ca malie hietlie vyi, a pale a patie vyi. Duena ca a hruotle li pata
46013005	a palung chiehruv vyi. Duena ca ama phana dyi kha huv vyi. A hi haa li pata vieriy thung khingna palung hnyi vyi.
46013006	Duena ca a pha lipa hmang lie a palung tluo vyi, cuorasala biehmisipa lie kha aa law.
46013007	Duena ca hmangting kha ang khu te, hmangting kha a zang. Hmangting kha a nguopuo te hmangting lie te a maa khu.
46013008	Duena ca chuo buo vyi. Cuorasala profet biephu zaw ca a chuo aa. Ryi phangting rithena zaw die'a te, pachangna zaw a chuo aa.
46013009	Tahematapakieca a chebuo dyi pachang pate, bie kha a che dyi ma phu.
46013010	Cuorasala a tlingpa a vya chiy tiyta a chebuo hing ca a chuo aa.
46013011	Haatiy i cuo ning kha haatiy haata bie i ri, haatiy haata rue ang te, haatiy haata i ruepacuo. Uvthyita i vya cuo tiyta ca haatiy cuona kha i pachuo sa.
46013012	Tahematapakieca ata hing ca thlaluo lie a sie pawliy li pata maa hmungpa haata cuo pate, capa thueta ca a hmiepachaw pata ma hmung aa. Ata hing ca a chebuo dyi pachang ang te, capa thueta ca kama kha ina pachangpasie pahaata a bangkhuo ta i pachang aa.
46013013	Ata hing a hmang paripa hmang suothung aw te; zangna, anguopuona hne duena ta ama cuo, capa suothung chunglie ta a lecepa ca duena tana a cuo.
46014001	Duena luo kha ziy ungla thlaapa lasaw hmung kha a zue tie ung. A hlyi vie ta profet-biephu rithena kha a zue tie ung.
46014002	Tahematapakieca thyiliparyi a cyipa ca cawsaa'a lie kha a cyipa cuo li pata Khazing'a lie a cyipa tana a cuo. Tahematapakieca thlaapa chunglie bie aa thuvpa kha ama ri nakawta ahungtahmuo thyi vayi.
46014003	Cuorasala biephu a ripa tie ca cawsaa hrangpa tie amaa sathawna riypa, thaazuo pina hne hnaa panguona ta ama ri pata a cuo.
46014004	Thyiliparyi a cyipa tie ca iema hne iema kha a sathaw yite profet-biephu a ripa tie ca Khrihsaabuv kha ama sathaw.
46014005	Niema bangkhuo thyiliparyi nama cyi riypa icaa khingkhyi raalaa pa yi ta, biephu rithena kha icaa khingkhyi vie yi. Biephu a ripa ca thyiliparyi a cyipa laata aa suo vie. Khrihsaabuv aa sathaw khu riypata pakhakha ta a ri khingna kha a palie ta li pata ca khaahmuo thlahne vyi.
46014006	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema'a luo kha thyiliparyi cyi pata a vaw ang sala niema kha Khazing biephu cuose, pachangna cuose, profet-biephu cuose, pacuvna cuose ica hnyi li kie yi ca khaapama a thlahne aa?
46014007	Hringna a hnyi lipa, tungpa chechiy ta a cuopa, ramang hne tingtuo zaw ama paring cakhawpa hne tana aa lu aa. A ue kha a siesa pata a pya li kieca khaapa ue ma ama tung tapa kha pachang khu a aw'a ma?
46014008	Hmyakaa a tungtuv ta rietuvna hmyakaa ue pachiy pata a siesa pata a tung li kieca ahungma rie tuv riypata a pachie pacie pata a aw aa?
46014009	Cahaa cata thyiliparyi nama cyipa ca a ri khingna thyi thepa a cuo li kieca khaapana ama ri tapa kha ahungma a pachang aa? Thliy chunglie bie ri cakhawpa tana a cuo aa.
46014010	Chuelyi cunglie hing ryi a phangphang ta aw te siyluo a hnyi lipa ryi suokha hmuo aw vyi.
46014011	Ryi phangkha kha a ri khingna i pachang li kieca a cyituvpa cuo khata kama ca ruohrang ming cuo ang te, a cyituvpa zaw kha kama cuota ruohrang ming tana a cuo ra.
46014012	Cacuonakawta thlaapa lasaw kha nama hmung khing hringhruo kieca, khrihsaabuv a sathaw riypa lasaw kha hmung a zue tie ung.
46014013	Cacuonakawta, thyiliparyi a cyipa pakha ca a ri khingna palie khu riypa kha thlaa a chuo se.
46014014	Tahematapakieca thyiliparyi ta thlaa i chuo kieca, i thlaapa ta thlaa ca a chuo raalaa pata i pathiypalung lieta thlahnena aw vyi.
46014015	Cacuokie khaapama i tue aa? Thlaapa ta thlaa chuo'a ang te, i pathiypalung ta zaw thlaa i chuo ra aa; thlaapa ta pathuosana hlaa sa'a ang te, pathiypalung ta zaw i sa ra aa.
46014016	Cacuolikie thlaapa ta thlaa na chuopa kha khaapama na ri tapa a pachang lipa ale cawsaapapaa ta na thlaachuopa kha tuokhaatama “Amen” a ta the aa?
46014017	Nama ca Khazing kha a phasa pata na pathuo sa raalaa'a pata cawsaa hrangpa cuota ca a sathawna aw vyi.
46014018	Niema laata thyiliparyi i cyi the vie nakawta Khazing kha i law.
46014019	Cuorasala, apungna chunglie malie changna riypa taca thyiliparyi biesuo thawhraa i cyipa laata thyipa ryi biesuo suopangaa khana i cyi hriy aa.
46014020	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, nama khueruena hing haatiy khueruena haata cuo kha se, uvthyita haata khuerue ungla, pha lina kawlie tuv dyi kha haatiy haata cuo tie ung.
46014021	Phungbie caa-uv chunglie, Abyipa ta, “Ryi hrangpa a cyipa tie hne ruohrang ming pakaa taata hing cawsaa zaw'a luo hing bie i ri aa; Cakhutaacata hmuota naa na thlie ngiethie'a vayi,” a ta.
46014022	Cakhutaata, thyiliparyi ca zangtuv tie cuota cuo li pata zanglituv tie cuota pamangsana ta a cuopa haata profet-biephu rithena hing zanglituv tie cuota cuo li pata zangtuv tie cuota pamangsana ta a cuo ra.
46014023	Cacuonakawta, khrihsaabuv lie zangtuv tie bangkhuo a pung ungla, nama bangkhuo ta thyiliparyi nama cyina lie kha zanglituv tie amaa zaa ngie kie, ama ngaa diy tli muo ca ta'a vayi ma?
46014024	Cuorasala nama bangkhuo ta profet-biephu kha nama ri kieca, zanglituv a cuo li kie ale cawsaa pakhakha a zaa ngie tiyta, nama bie ta a pathiypalung ruv kha capya'a te a suena a pachang aa.
46014025	A pathiypalung ruv chunglie'a pakha a kya luo'a te, a pakhuv pane'a te Khazing kha abie te, “Nama hrawlie Khazing a aw hmisi,” a ta aa.
46014026	Cacuokie, uvnu zaw, khaapama ma tue aa? Khazing abie riypata namaa pung tiyta, niema pakha cyicuo ta, hlaa sa a khingpa, a pacuv khingpa, Khazing biephu a ri khingpa, thyiliparyi a cyi khingpa, a ri khingna a palie khingpa tapata nama aw aa. Hingpa bangkhuo hing Khrihsaabuv a sathawna ta tue tie ung.
46014027	Thyiliparyi a cyi khingpa nama aw kieca pahning a cuo li kie a hluvce ta pathung ta ri yi sala, aa paziy pata ri yi se; cakhutaata pakha ta a ri khingna kha palie se.
46014028	A palie riypa ama aw li kieca, a dieta tah aw yi sala, iema hne Khazing'a lie kha ri yi se.
46014029	Profet pahning a cuo li kie pathung ta bie kha ri yi sala, a hrangpa tie ta ama ripa kha ruepacuo yi se.
46014030	A thaa lie a tu rapa pakhakha'a lieta, Khazing biephu aa luo kieca, a ri taapa ca die se.
46014031	Tahematapakieca, nama bangkhuo ta namaa cuv the riypa hne thaazuo namaa la thena riypata profet-biephu kha pakha hnang pakha ta nama ri khu.
46014032	Profet tie pathiypalung phya ta ca profet tie ri kha a ngie aa.
46014033	Tahematapakieca Khazing ca adang-apuo li pata hmang a tuepa cuo li pata diena Khazing tana a cuo. (Mingpathepa tie Khrihsaabuv bangkhuo lie ama tuepa haakhata,
46014034	canung ca apungna lie kha a dieta tah aw yi se. Tahematapakieca iema ca bie rina naw hnyi vayi. Phungbie ta a ripa haakhata, aa ne vie ta aw yi se.
46014035	Ama pachang khingpa suokhakha a aw kieca ama navaapa kha ing lie hiehriy yi se. Khrihsaabuv lie bie ripa ca canung cuota nangzaa aa chiypa tana a cuo.
46014036	Khazing bie ca niema'a taata a hruo a thu kanaa? A cuo li kie capa bie ca niema'a luo dyi hing chiy kanaa?)
46014037	Niema hrawlie ta profet tana i cuo aa tapa tie, a cuo li kie thlaapa cahrana na i hmung aa tapa tie ta, ata niema'a luo i vya capepa caa hing Abyipa bie pipa tana a cuo tapa kha pachang yi se.
46014038	Hingpa hing khaapatahmuo a ri lipa ca khaapatahmuo ripa cuo'a vyi.
46014039	Cacuonakawta, viesaa zaw, profet-biephu ri kha khing ungla, thyiliparyi cyi kha thlu kha ung;
46014040	cuorasala hmangting bangkhuo kha aa chawrawsa pata hne adang-apuosa pata tue tie ung.
46015001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, ica za changpa yi thuophaabie kha namaa thyi pakhaa pata i khing. Ca thuophaabie ca cuhluo ung cate, nama zangna a cusa pata nama bangnapa ta a cuo.
46015002	Niema ta hingpa ica changpa yi thuophaabie hing a cusa pata namaa patuv kieca khuopa ta cuo'a ung cate, a cusa pata namaa patuv li kieca nama zangna kha khaahmuo li patana a cuo aa.
46015003	Tahematapakieca i za hmungpa, a biepuvce tapata niema ica changpachaapa yi ca: Caapathepa chunglie ama za capepa haata Khrih ca ma sue nakawta thiy te;
46015004	paby yite, Caapathepa lie aa capepa haata ningthung napa lie pathu pakhaa pata a cuo.
46015005	Piter'a lie kha a luo te, cakhutaata lucuotuv hlyihning cunglie kha aa luo.
46015006	Cakhutaata a ziytuv zapangaa hlyi cunglie kha yikha ta a luo te, chekha ca ama thiy tli raalaa pata hluv vie ca ama hring kalie.
46015007	Cakhutaata Jeim'a lie kha a luo te, lucuotuv bangkhuo'a lie kha aa luo.
46015008	A hnangcawce ta aning-acuo cuo li pata a puvpa haata a cuopa kama'a lie zaw kha aa luo.
46015009	Tahematapakieca kama ca lucuotuv tie hrawlie a cawcepa tana i cuo. Khazing khrihsaabuv kha i za hrisaathierue nakawta lucuotuv tapata ku riypa tahmuo a tla va ang.
46015010	Cuorasala Khazing vihnyina thueta kama ca ata i cuona haahingta cuo ang te, vi ina hnyina ca a cakhawpa ta cuo vyi. Lucuotuv hrangpa bangkhuo laata khuo vie ta rehrie ang te, cuorasala capaca kama ta i hriepa cuo li pata kama chunglie a awpa Khazing vihnyina ta a hriepa tana a cuo.
46015011	Kama cuo angse, iema cuo yi se, ma bangkhuo ta thuophaabie kha phu pate niema zaw nama zang.
46015012	Khrih ca thiyna taata na a thupakhaa tapata phupa a cuo kieca, khaapanakawma niema chekha ta thiyna taata thupakhaana aw vyi tapata nama ri the?
46015013	Thiyna taata thupakhaana na a aw va tapata a cuo kieca, Khrih hing pathu pakhaa pata cuo'a vyi.
46015014	Khrih hing pathu pakhaa pata a cuo li kieca, ma thuophaabie phupa hing a cakhawpa ta cuo'a te, nama zangna zaw a cakhawpa a cuo aa.
46015015	Kiema zawte kha Khazing kaw a richiepa ta malie ama hmung aa, tahematapakieca, Khazing na Khrih kha thiyna taata a pathu tapata Khazing kaw kha tehte ma khuo. Athiypa tie thupakhaa vayi tapata a cuo kieca, Khazing ta Khrih kha thiyna taata a pathu pakhaa li nakawtana a cuo aa.
46015016	Tahematapakieca a thiypa tie pathu pakhaa pata a cuo li kieca, Khrih zaw pathu pakhaa pata cuo'a vyi.
46015017	Khrih kha pathu pakhaa pata a cuo li kieca, nama zangna ca khaahmuo cuo li'a pata nama suena chunglie a aw kaliepa tana nama cuo aa.
46015018	Cakhutaata Khrih zang pata, a thiypa tie zaw ama lidie diy aa.
46015019	Khrih chunglie maa nguopuona hing chuelyi ma hring chung cuota dyi hingta a cuo kieca, cawsaa bangkhuo hrawlie ngiechi aa chiycepa tana ma cuo aa.
46015020	Cuorasala Khrih ca thupakhaa hmisi saw te, a thiypa tie hraw taata thyipaa taapa ta a cuo.
46015021	Thiyna ca cawsaa pakha taata a tlung pahaata, thiyna taata thupakhaana zaw cawsaa pakha thue tana a tlung ra.
46015022	Tahematapakieca Adam thueta cawsaa bangkhuo ama thiy pahaata, Khrih thueta cawsaa bangkhuo kha pahring pata ama cuo aa.
46015023	Cuorasala iema'a na ama cuo cyicuo ta pathu pakhaa pata ama cuo aa: thyipaa taapa ca Khrih ta cuo'a te, cakhutaata aa vaw ningta a cawsaa a cuopa tie ta ama cuo aa.
46015024	Cakhutaata cuo chuona kha vya tlung'a te, Khrih ta uvtuv bangkhuo, nawhnyina bangkhuo hne cahrana bangkhuo kha a para diy khu taata, pena ca a Paa Khazing'a luo kha a pi aa.
46015025	A carie bangkhuo kha a phyipazaa rawlie a chaapuo nate yi ta a uv'a yi.
46015026	A hnangcawce ta para riypa a cariepa ca thiyna ta a cuo.
46015027	Tahematapakieca, “Ama ta hmangting bangkhuo kha a phyipazaa rawlie a chi,” a ta. Cuorasala, “hmangting bangkhuo kha a phyipazaa rawlie a chi,” a ta tiyta hmangting kha Khrih phyipazaa rawlie a chituv Abyipa ca ripuo pata cuo vyi tapa kha a sie.
46015028	Hmangting bangkhuo kha ama uvna rawlie chi diy pata a cuo tiyta, saacapaa hrahring hing hmangting bangkhuo ama phyipazaa rawlie a pachi sa diypa Khazing uvna rawlie kha aw'a te, Khazing ca hmangting bangkhuo cunglie uvtuv ta a cuo aa.
46015029	Cacuolikieca, a thiypa tie cuopa ta tiy a nawpa tie kha tuokhaata? Athiypa tie kha pathu pakhaa pata ama cuo li kie, khaapanakawma cawsaa ta iema cuopa ta tiy amaa naw aa?
46015030	Cakhutaa, khaapanakawma kiema hrahring hing ruvnaana chunglie ma aw pari?
46015031	Ningting tana i thiy! Uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema icaa pale sakhyipa yi hing, a cuo hmisipa, ima Khrih Zingsuv chunglie ta icaa pale sakhyipa yi tana a cuo.
46015032	Efesa khy lie saahruo tie hne i zaa tuv pakha cawsaapa a nguopuo cakhawna hneta cuo sala, khaama ina thlahne aa? A thiypa tie pathu pakhaapa ama cuo li kieca, “Ning thluo dang thluo'a ungpuv, tahematapakieca, kiema ca mawluo a thiy riy'apa tana ma cuo.”
46015033	Cawsaa ta ca dung kha yi se: Viesaa pha lipa na zyazaa pha a para.”
46015034	Lungsingpyapa ta aw ungla pathiy-palung pha hnyi tie ung. Suena tue kha tie ung, tahematapakieca cawsaa chekha ca Khazing kha pachang vayi. Nama nang zaa naase ta ang te na hinghaahingta ica ta yi.
46015035	Chekha ta, “A thiypa tie hing tuokhaatama ama thupakhaa aa? Tuokhaapa pangpa ma ama hnyi aa?” nama ta aa.
46015036	A ngaapa zaw! Na tuvpa saciy kha a thiy li pata a kya pu the ma?
46015037	Na tuvpa ca a kya le riypa a kung kha cuo li pata a ciy suokha, jungsacuo a cuo li kie a saciy suokhakha ta a cuo aa.
46015038	Cuorasala Khazing ta ama khingna haata saciy ca a khingpa pangpa kha a pi. Saciy cyicuo khata iema'a na pangpa cyicuo ama hnyi.
46015039	Hringna a hnyipa bangkhuo ta ama hnyipa ngesaa hing a lu vayi, cawsaa ngesaa a phanghrang, saruo ngesaa a phanghrang, pavaa ngesaa a phanghrang, ngaa ngesaa a phanghrang tana ama cuo.
46015040	Vuoruo pangpa aw te alyi pangpa a aw ra, cuorasala vuoruo pangpa rungnaana a phanghrang, alyi pangpa rungnaana a phanghrang tana a aw.
