46015041	Ning rungnaana a phanghrang, thlaapa rungnaana a phanghrang, aasiy zaw rungnaana a phanghrang tana a aw; hmisi ta ripa kieca aasiy zaw hmuo suokha hne suokha ama rungnaana aa nanang kalie.
46015042	A thiypa tie thupakhaana zaw cahaacatana a cuo. Saapa pangpa ca ma paby ningta a thuv thepa cuote, pathu pakhaapa a cuo tiyta ca a thuv the lipa tana a cuo.
46015043	Pabypa a cuo ning ca a hming chiepa hne a thaadyapa cuote, pathu pakhaapa a cuo thue ca a puvthepa hne a cahrapa ta a cuo aa.
46015044	Paby ning ca chuelyi pangpa cuote, pathu pakhaa thue ca thlaapa pangpa tana a cuo aa.
46015045	Caapathepa ta, “Cawsaa taapa Adam ca a hringpa cawsaa ta a cuo,” a ta. A hnangcawpa Adam ca hringna a pipa thlaapa tana a cuo.
46015046	Cuorasala a aw taapa ca thlaapa kha cuo li pata, saapa pangpa khatana a cuo, cakhutaa catana thlaapa ca aa vaw.
46015047	Cawsaa taapa Adam ca alyi taata cuote, alyi diypa taata sapa tana a cuo; cuorasala Adam pahningnapa ca vuoruo taata a zuvpa tana a cuo.
46015048	Alyi huopa a cuopa tie ca alyi ta sapa haakhata cuo yite, vuoruo huopa a cuopa tie ca vuoruo taata a zuvpa haakhata ama cuo.
46015049	Alyi ta sapa hmingsuo kha ma phya pahaata vuoruo taata a zuvpa hmingsuo zaw kha ma phya riypata a cuo.
46015050	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, i ripa ca hinghaahingta a cuo: thiy hne saa ta ca Khazing pena kha cu khu'a vyi, a ra khupa ta a ra khu lipa ru kha cu khu'a vyi. Naa thlie tie ung, aa thuvpa bieparuv na ica chang'a yi! Kiema bangkhuo hing thiy diy'a va puv, cuorasala a hnangcawcepa hmyakaa ama tung thueta kiema bangkhuo hing sungkhata lie, ming vy hluota lieta maa thle aa. Hmyakaa kha tung'a yite, a thiypa tie kha a ra the lipa luo pathu pakhaa pata ama cuo aa, cakhutaa kiema kha maa thle aa.
46015053	Tahematapakieca hingpa a ra thepa pangpa hingta a ra the lipa kha a hryi'a te, hingpa a thiy thepa pangpa hingta a thiy the lipa kha aa hryi aa.
46015054	Hingpa a ra thepa pangpa ta a ra the lipa kha a hryi'a te, hingpa a thiy thepa pangpa ta a thiy the lipa pangpa kha a hryi tiyta Caapathepa lie cape siypa kha a tling aa: “Thiyna ca tena chunglie pahlipadiepa a cuo tli.”
46015055	Vya thiyna, na tena ca khaapalie ma a aw? Vya thiyna, na ca-ie ca khaapalie ma a aw?
46015056	Thiyna ca-ie ca suena cuote, suena cahrana ca phungbie ta a cuo.
46015057	Cuorasala, ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih thueta tena malie a pituv Khazing ca pathuo sa pata aw mangsue.
46015058	Cacuonakawta, i duepa zaw, a cu pata a daa tie ung. Khaapatahmuo ca hnyi khu kha yi se. Abyipa re kha a phace pata hrie pari tie ung, tahematapakieca Abyipa re nama hriepa bangkhuo ca a hripa ta cuo vyi tapa kha nama pachang.
46016001	Mingpathepa tie cuota suepina hne aa patuv pata, Galatia khrihsaabuv tie i changpa yi kha za tue ra tie ung.
46016002	Kama i vya chiy thueta sue khyichaw aa hu li riypata a zaa tating ningkhana lie kha nama cyicuo ta nama hmungpa tuokaa chung taata chebuo ungla pacung pacie tie ung.
46016003	Kama i vya chiy thueta, palung tling pata namaa tlawpa tie kha Jerusalem luo nama lasaw paphya riypata caa hneta ma pathlie'a yi.
46016004	Kama si riypata aa hu kie zaw ma, kama kha ina ziy'a yi.
46016005	Masidonia ruochung cahrawpaa pata vya si i ting nakawta cahaa cata i tlawpaale khu taata niema'a luo kha i vya chiy aa.
46016006	Khaapa luo i tlaw zaw, ina patlaw sa riypa ung cata, niema'a lie kha thlasiy a chuona te khiy hmuo i aw the aa.
46016007	Za capiepaale pata niema hne a hmungpa ca i palung tling the'a vyi. Khazing khingna ta a cuo kieca, niema'a lie cuokha chung ca aw na i ting.
46016008	Cuorasala Pentekos te khiy ca Efesa liena aw i ting.
46016009	Tahematapakieca a hma a sisa riypa re kha i cuota a pahaw te, kama naa dutuv a hluvsa zaw ama aw.
46016010	Timote kha niema'a luo a vya chiy kieca, a phata ta za mangsang mya ung, tahematapakieca kama haata Abyipa re a hriepa tana a cuo.
46016011	Ahungtahmuo ese kha yi se. Kama hne uvnu zaw ta ma mangkhuo nguoluo nakawta, kama'a luo a vya chiy the riypata a bya tie ung.
46016012	Ma uvnupa Apollo hne aa patuv pata i ri kieca, viesaa hrang tie zaw hne khata niema'a luo vya tlaw riypata khuosa ta i chang raalaa pata, vya tlaw khing valie. A cuo aa raw thue tana a vya tlaw aa.
46016013	Palung singsa pata aw tie ung. Nama zangna lie kha a cusa pata a daa tie ung. Nama rie pha sala cahra tie ung.
46016014	Nama tuepa bangkhuo kha duena hneta tue tie ung.
46016015	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, Stefanas chungkhue ca Akhaia pe lie Khrihsaa a cuo taapa ta cuo yite, Khazing mingpathepa tie cuota aa pisapa ta ama cuopa kha nama pachang.
46016016	Cahaapa cawsaa tie hne iema hne re a hrie hnepa bangkhuo tie ri kha a ngie ung tapata paa ica kie yi.
46016017	Stefanas hne Fortunatus hne Akhaiku ama vya chiy nakawta i palung a tluo, nama aw lipa hmuo malie a pamaw sa;
46016018	kama palung ina patluopa haayita niema palung zaw aca patluo ra yi. Cahaapa cawsaa tie ca pasungpanaa riypatana ama cuo.
46016019	Asia ruo lie a awpa khrihsaabuv tie na nama ku caa patuv yi. Akuila hne Prisilla hne ama ing lie a pungpa khrihsaabuv na thaa phasa pata nama kuv caa patuv yi.
46016020	Hingpa lie a awpa uvnu hne sieta zaw bangkhuo na nama kuv caa patuv yi. A pathepa a pahnuona ta pakha hne pakha bie a chang tie ung.
46016021	Kama Paul ta hing bie a changna caa hing i kuv ta i cape.
46016022	Ahunghmuo cuose, Abyipa a due lipa ca a cunglie chiesana tlung se. Maranatha: Ima Byipaapa, a vaw buo tie.
46016023	Abyipa Zingsuv vihnyina ca niema'a lie aw mangsue.
46016024	Khrih Zingsuv thueta ica duenapa yi ca nama bangkhuo cunglie aw mangsue.
47001001	Khazing khingna ta Khrih Zingsuv lucuotuv a cuopa kama Paul hne i nuta Timote ta, Korin khy lie a awpa, Khazing khrihsaabuv hne Akhaia pe khy ting ta a awpa mingpathepa tie'a luo caa maca paphya yi.
47001002	Ma Paa Khazing hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca nama cunglie aw mangsue.
47001003	Ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih a Paa hne a Khazing, ngie malie a chituv ma Paa, hnaanguona Khazing ca pathuosa pata cuo mangsue.
47001004	Riethyi vuosuona bangkhuo lie hnaa malie a panguotuv cuote, cahaa cata kiema zaw ta ama'a taata ma hmungpa hnaapanguona kha hmuo pata riethyi vuosuona a ang rapa tie kha hnaa ma panguo ra yi.
47001005	Tahematapakieca Khrih te-angna bangkhuo lie a hraw rapa ma cuopa haata Khrih thueta hnaapanguona zaw a hmungpa ta ma cuo.
47001006	Kiema na riethyi vuosuona a hmung puv tapa kieca niema hnaanguona hne khuona cuo tana a cuo. Kiema na hnaapanguopa ta a cuo puv tapa a cuo kieca niema zaw hnaapanguopa cuo ung cate, kiema ima hmungpa te-angna kha palung pasiyna hne nama ang khu na riypata thaazuo nama hmungna ta a cuo.
47001007	Niema cuota maa nguopuona ca a cahang buo'a vyi; tahematapakieca kiema te-angna namaa hraw pahaata hnaapanguopa ma cuona zaw namaa hraw ra aa tapa kha ma pachang.
47001008	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, Asia ruo chunglie riethyi vuosuona ma angpa kha pachang li pata nama aw riypa khing va puv; tahematapakieca khuopuv ta, ma ang khu li na te ta malie pavy yite hring riypa hmuo zaa nguopuo khu va puv.
47001009	Thiy riypata bie ripa pa tana ma cuo tli tapatana maa zaa rue. Cuorasala hinghaahingta a cuopa ca kiema hne kiema kha a ring li pata a thiypa a pathu pakhaatuv Khazing maa ring the riypa khatana a cuo.
47001010	Kiema kha ciy aa chiypa thiyna chung taata malie a khuopa ama ta malie a khuo canyi aa. Thlaachuona ta malie namaa bya pahaata, malie a khuo canyi aa tapata ama'a lie kha maa nguopuo.
47001011	Cacuonakawta cawsaa hluvpuv thlaachuona thueta, kiema ma hmungpa thluechiyna kawlie hingta, cawsaa hluvpuv ta kiema cuopa ta alawna bie ama ri aa.
47001012	Kiema maa palesakhyipa, ma chiephathleduona ta tehte a khuopa ca: hing chuelyi lie ma hringzya hne niema hne maa pazuena lie hing chuelyi singna ta cuo li pata Khazing vihnyina hne pathiypalung hmisi tana a cuo tapa kha a cuo.
47001013	Tahematapakieca niema nama ri khupa hne nama pachang khupa ri li pata a hrangpa suokha hmuo niema'a luo ma vya capepa aw vyi.
47001014	Niema ta a chebuo nama pachang tlipa haahingta a chuona te ta nama pachang aa tapa kha icaa nguopuo yi; cahaa cata Abyipa Zingsuv ning a vya chiy tiyta kiema ca niema a palesakhyipa cuo'a pate niema zaw kiema a palesakhyipa nama cuo aa.
47001015	Hingpa hing a siesa pata i pachang nakawta, palungtluona lehning nama hmung riypata niema'a luo ica vya tlaw taa khing yi.
47001016	Masidonia luo i tlawpuo pata ca vya tlawpaa khing yi ang te, Masidonia taata niema'a luo vya kaa pakhaa pata, Judea luo ina pathlie riypa ung cata i khing.
47001017	Hinghaahingta i tue khing tiyta a tuebung a tuethawpa i lu ma? Cuokha chunglie ta, “A cuo, a cuo” ama ta khu taata, “Cuo vyi, cuo vyi,” a ta pakhaapa chuelyi cawsaa cakhawpa tie haata i tuepa a cuo ma?
47001018	Khazing ca zangtluo aa tlapa a cuopa haata, niema'a lie ima ripa bie ca, “A Cuo hne Cuo Vyi,” tapata a cuo riypa cuo vyi.
47001019	Tahematapakieca, Silvanus hne Timote hne kama ta niema'a lie ima phupa Khazing Saacapaa Zingsuv Khrih ca, “A cuo hne Cuo vyi,” a pahlawpa ta cuo vyi. Cuorasala ama'a lieca, “A cuo,” tapatana a cuo pari.
47001020	Tahematapakieca ama ca Khazing biekuona bangkhuo lie kha, “A cuo,” tana a cuo. Canakaw ca muo Khazing pathuosa riypata Zingsuv thueta, “Amen,” ma ta pata a cuo ta.
47001021	Cuorasala kiema hne niema hne Khrih chunglie malie pa-aw sa te sathu malie a pathuvpa ca Khazing tana a cuo.
47001022	Kiema cuota malie a chipa paciepa bangkhuo suokha hnang suokha ta ima hmung thena riypata ma cunglie kha caa malie khe te, ma pathiypalung lie Thlaapa malie a pi.
47001023	Naa pachangkhyituv ca Khazing ta a cuo: Korin luo i vaw pakhaa lipa ca niema nama thaa duo naase ica ta nakaw yi ta a cuo.
47001024	Nama zangna cunglie kha uv caa ting vayi ang; cadyiseca nama palung aa nuona riypata niema hne re a hrie pakhawpa tana ma cuo vie hriy, tahematapakieca niema ca zangna lie a cusa pata namaa daa.
47002001	Cacuonakawta, niema palung pasa sa pakhaa riypa laa taca ica vya tlaw li riypa yita i palung lie bie i chi.
47002002	Tahematapakieca nama palung ca pasa sa sue yi ang sala, ama lie kha niema ri li pata i palung naa patluo riypa ahungma a aw aa?
47002003	I vaw thueta i palung naa patluo riy'apa tie ta i palung ina pasa sa li riypa ung cata hing caa hing i vya cape pata a cuo; tahematapakieca kama palungtluona ca niema bangkhuo palungtluona ta a cuo ra tapa kha a phasa pata i zang.
47002004	Kama ta pathiypalung riethyisapa'a nata mingthliy yi hluvpuv lang pata caa cape ang te ica vya paphyapa yi hing niema palung pasa sa riypata cuo li pata, khatluv tama ica due yi tapa nama pachang na riypatana a cuo.
47002005	Cawsaa pakha khata ngiechina a patlung sa kieca kama dyi cuo li pata niema bangkhuo zaw kha nama palung aca pasa sa yi. Hing bie hing khuotuv ta ri khing va ang.
47002006	Niema hluv vie bangkhuo ta duo nama tepa kha a cuota aa de tli.
47002007	Cacuonakawta a ang khu li nate ta a ngie a chi li riypata ama kha a ngiethe ungla a hnaa panguo tie ung.
47002008	Nama due hmisipa kha paluo sa tie ung tapata paa ica kie yi.
47002009	Niema ta hmangting bangkhuo lie ri-angiena nama hnyi ma hnyi va ung cama tapa kha pachang riypata hing caa hing i vya cape pata a cuo.
47002010	Niema ta namaa ngiethepa bangkhuo kha i ngiethe ra aa. Kama ta suokhakha kha i ngiethe pata a cuo kieca niema cuota Khrih hmiekunglie i ngiethepa tana a cuo.
47002011	Hinghaahingta ma tuenapa ca setaa ta a raw malie a patlung li riypatana a cuo, tahematapakieca setaa ruena hne tingna ca ma pachang diypa tana a cuo.
47002012	Khrih thuophaabie phu riypata Troas luo i vaw ning kha Abyipa thueta i cuo ta luopuv aa pahaw tapa kha i pachang.
47002013	Cuorasala i uvnupa Titas i hmung li nakawta i palung rie a thyi. Cacuonakawta iema kha bie a changsiy yi ang te Masidonia ruo luo kha i caluo.
47002014	Cuorasala Khazing ca a law ungsiy. Khrih thueta kiema kha tena luo malie a chiy te, kiema kha hmuo pata Khrih thuophaa ca hmangting luo kha ama ma pachangna thueta rangpa-uepa haata aa ze tli.
47002015	Tahematapakieca kiema ca Khazing cuota khuo nguoluopa tie hne a viele nguoluopa tie hrawlie Khrih rangpa-uepa tana ma cuo.
47002016	A vie nguoluopa tie cuota ca thiyna rangpahnuopa cuo pate khuo nguoluopa tie cuota ca hringna rangpa-uepa tana ma cuo. Hingpa hmang kawlie hingta ahungma a tlingpa a aw aa?
47002017	Cacuonakawta kiema ca Khazing bie kha a muo nasa pata a zaapa tie haakhata cuo va puv; Khazing pathliepa ma cuona haata, Khrih thueta a bie kha a hmiekunglie pathiypalung hmisi ta a ripa tana ma cuo.
47003001	Hinghaahingta ma ta tiyta kiema hne kiema a pathuosa pakhaa kanaa puv? Cawsaa chekha haata niema'a luo, a cuo li kie niema'a taata pachangkhyina caa a hu kanaa puv?
47003002	Niema khana cawsaa bangkhuo ri riypata ma palung chunglie capepa caa ta a cuo ungciy.
47003003	Niema ta kiema thueta Khrih capepa caa nama cuopa kha nama paluo sa. Capa caa ca caatiy ta alung cunglie capepa cuo li pata a hringpa Khazing Thlaapa ta cawsaa pathiypalung cunglie capepa tana a cuo.
47003004	Caca Zingsuv thueta Khazing'a lie ma hnyipa anguona tana a cuo.
47003005	Hmang suokhakha hing kiema'a taata na a cuo ta khuna hnyi va puv, kiema tuehrie khuna ca Khazing'a taata na a cuo.
47003006	Ama na kiema kha biekuo thaa rehrietuv cuo riypata tuehrie khuna malie a pi. Ca biekuo thaa ca caa ta capepa phungbie cuo li pata thlaapa tuv khata a cuo. Caa ta capepa phungbie ta ca cawsaa kha thie te, cuorasala Thlaapa ta ca cawsaa kha hringna a pi.
47003007	Thiyna a chiykhyipa rehriena, sata ta khe yite alung cunglie capepa caa ca rungnaana hne vya bi te, a zuebung luo a cuo raalaa pata, Moses hmie ca a rungnaa tuv nakawta Israel ming ta a hmiepachaw pata ama mang khu li kieca,
47003008	Thlaapa rehriena ca khatluv tama a rungnaa vie aa?
47003009	Cawsaa suephawna re hmuo a rungnaa kieca cawsaa duopacuna re ca khatluv tama a rungnaa vie aa!
47003010	Hmisi ta ripa kieca, a hluo ningta zaa rungnaasapa ca ama laata a rungnaa viepa nakaw khata a rungnaana a vie tli.
47003011	Tahematapakieca cuokhata dyi a awpa hmuo rungnaana a hnyi kieca, chuozaa ta aa hmangpa changchiy ca khatluv ta ma rungnaana a hnyi vie aa!
47003012	Hinghaapa a ruechuona ma hnyi nakawta ma rie a phasa.
47003013	Zuebungle te a rungnaana a viepa a hmie kha Israel ming ta na hmung kha yi se tapata pangluv a khuvpa Moses haakhata cuo va puv.
47003014	Cuorasala ama pathiypalung ca a ping hringhruo. Hmisi ta ripa kieca, ata ning tepa hingta, biekuo hlung ama ri kyry ta ama hmie kha capa pangluvkhuv cata amaa khuv kalie. Tahematapakieca capa pangluvkhuv ca Khrih thue kyalyadyi tana hle khupa a cuo.
47003015	A cuo, ata ning tepa hingta Moses phungbie kha ama ri tiyta ama pathiypalung kha pangluvkhuv ta a pakhuv kalie yi.
47003016	Cuorasala cawsaa pakha kha Abyipa'a luo aa thle tiyta a pangluvkhuv ca a hle te thawpa a cuo.
47003017	Abyipa ca Thlaapa ta cuote, Abyipa Thlaapa a awna lieca hyazangna a aw.
47003018	Kiema bangkhuo ca ma hmie pangluvkhuv kha hlepa tlipa ma cuo nakawta Abyipa rungnaana ca thlaluo lie maa hmungpa haata ma paluo sa. Tahematapakieca capa rungnaana ca Thlaapa ta a cuopa Abyipa'a taata a vawpa a cuo nakawta ma hringna kha ama ma lu riypa hne rungnaa hryly riypata malie a thlele nguoluo.
47004001	Khazing ta, hingpa re hing a nangduena thueta malie a pahrie sapa a cuo nakawta ma palung chuo buo vyi.
47004002	A paruv ta tuepa nangzaa aa chiypa hmang bangkhuo kha thaw diy pate; zyate pata hmang tue kha khing lipa pata, Khazing bie zaw kha a cuo li pata ri va puv. Cuorasala biehmisipa kha a siesa pata paluo sa pate, cawsaa ta ama chiephathleduona lie pathuo sa tluo aa tla pata malie ama hmungthena riypata Khazing hmielie kha ma hring.
47004003	Ma phupa thuophaabie hing aa buvkhung kie zaw ma, a vie nguoluopa tie cuotana aa buvkhung aa.
47004004	Iema kawlie hingta ca, hing chuelyi khazing ta a zang lipa tie pathiypalung kha pazing te, Khazing hmingsuo ta a cuopa Khrih rungnaana thuophaabie khena kha ama hmung khu li riypata a tue yi.
47004005	Tahematapakieca kiema kaw kha ma phupa cuo li pata Zingsuv Khrih ca Abyipa a cuona kaw hne kiema zaw Zingsuv kawlieta niema sii ma cuona kaw kha ma phupa ta a cuo.
47004006	“Khena ca zingna chunglie kha khe se,” a tapa Khazing ta Zingsuv Khrih hmielie Khazing rungnaana ta a cuopa pachangna kha ma pathiypalung chunglie malie a pakhepa.
47004007	Cuorasala hingpa kharuehaa aa chiypa cahrana hing kiema'a taata cuo li pata Khazing huopa a cuona zya kha a siena riypata a alyibi hne aa lupa kiema ta capa thlaapa rusue ca ma chaw.
47004008	A kuo bangkhuo taata malie ama carie puo raalaa pata kepatlaa va puv; palung luolue pata ma aw, cuorasala ma palung chuo buo vyi;
47004009	malie ama hrisaathierue, cuorasala thawpa ta cuo va puv; malie ama chipatyi, cuorasala rakyi va puv;
47004010	ma pangpa lieta Zingsuv hringna kha aa luo the riypata Zingsuv thiyna kha ma pangpa ta ma phyale pari.
47004011	A thiykhupa ma pangpa lie hing Zingsuv hringna aa luo khu riypata Zingsuv cuota thiy tyalya'a nang pata khy ma sa.
47004012	Cacuonakawta kiema chunglie ca thiyna ta re hrie te niema chunglie ca hringna ta re a hrie.
47004013	Caapathepa chunglie, “I zang nakawta i ri,” a tapa haata, kiema zaw capa zangna thlaapa ca ma hnyi nakawta zang pate ma ri.
47004014	Tahematapakieca Abyipa Zingsuv a pathu pakhaapapaa khata kiema zaw hing Zingsuv hne khata malie pathu'a te, niema hne a hmiekung luo kha malie aa chiy aa tapa kha ma pachang.
47004015	A cuo, hingpa bangkhuo hing niema cuota cuote, Khazing vihnyina ca cawsaa hluv vie'a luo kha a pha hryly pahaata, Khazing rungnaana cunglie alawna hne pathuosana ca a le hryly aa.
47004016	Cacuonakawta ma palung chuo buo vyi. Ma saapa cuona ca ning kha hnang ning kha ta zuebung viele ra sala, ma thlaapa cuona ca ning kha hnang ning kha ta a thaa viele.
47004017	Cuokhata dyi ma angpa ruvnaana hingta pakhingpuo sa a pha lipa chuozaa rungnaana kha malie a parepa.
47004018	Tahematapakieca, kiema ta maa mangpuopa ca hmung khupa cuo li pata, hmung khu lipa tana a cuo; hmung khupa ca cuo pachangta cuo dyi cuote, cuorasala hmung khu lipa ca chuozaa cuota a cuo.
47005001	Kiema ma awna hingpa alyi thluodaa hing parapa a cuo tiyta, cawsaa kuv ta sa lipa, Khazing ta malie a pipa chuozaa ta vuoruo lie aa hmangpa ing ma hnyi tapa kha ma pachang.
47005002	Hingpa alyi thluodaa lie hingca a hrung byalya pate vuoruo ma ing khiy malie za pabuv sala tapa kha ma vuosa taw.
47005003	Capa ing ta pabuvpa ma cuo tiyta pangpa li pata aw'a va puv.
47005004	Hingpa chuelyi thluodaa lie ma aw ning hing ca, ma hmang a riypa rawlie maa hrung maa ie. Cahaa cata maa hrungpa ca hingpa ma chuelyi thluodaa hing ma thaw khing nakaw cuo li pata vuoruo ma ing khiy ta pabuvpa cuo sala a thiy thepa ma pangpa hing hringna ta vya buvkhung se tapa ma khing nakawta a cuo.
47005005	Hingpa hmang cuo hingta kiema kha malie a tingtuotuv ca Khazing ta cuote, Thlaapa kha bietena ta malie a pi.
47005006	Cacuonakawta palung cahrana hnyi pari pate, hing pangpa ta ma aw chung bangkhuo hingca Abyipa hneta maa hla tapa kha ma pachang.
47005007	Tahematapakieca kiema ca zangna ta hring pate hmungna ta hring va puv.
47005008	Palung cahrasa pata aw pate hing ma chuelyi pangpa hing sise pata Abyipa ing lie aw riypa kha maa tlawpa a cuo.
47005009	Cacuonakawta hingpa ma ing lie hing ma aw a cuo zaw, khiypa ma ing lie khiy ma aw a cuo zaw, a palung ma patluo riypa khana maa tingpa ta a cuo.
47005010	Ma bangkhuo hingta Khrih bierina thude hmie luo chiy'a pate, pangpasaa ta ma tuepa, haakhata a chie cuose, a pha cuose ma hmung aa.
47005011	Khazing ciypa hing khaapama a cuo tapa kha ma pachang nakawta malie kha sawle maa zue byalya. Khazing ta a phasa pata malie pachang te, niema zaw kiema kha nama chiephathleduona lie a phasa pata malie nama pachang tapata i nguopuo.
47005012	Niema'a lie kha kiema hne kiema maa pathuosa pakhaapa cuo li pata, niema tuv ta malie namaa palesakhyi the riypata cuophaa maca pipa yi tana a cuo. Cakiedyina pathiypalung chung kha mang li pata le luo cuona dyi kha mang te a palepa tie bie kha nama palie the aa.
47005013	Ma ngaa kieca, Khazing cuota cuote, ma sing kieca niema cuota a cuo.
47005014	Tahematapakieca cawsaa bangkhuo cuota cawsaa pakha thiy nakawta cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama thiy ra tapa kha ma pachang khu taata ca Khrih duena khana malie a uv tli.
47005015	Cawsaa bangkhuo cuota a thiy hnuochuonapa ca, cawsaa hingta ama hring chung hing iema cuo dyi ta hring lipa yi ta, iema cuota thiyna ang te a thupakhaapa cuota ama hringna riypa khatana a cuo.
47005016	Cacuonakawta, ata taahingta ca, ahunghmuota cawsaa kuo taa dyi ta mang va tli yi puv; Zingsuv kha cawsaa kuo taa dyi ta ma za mang taw zaw ta, ata hing ca cahaa cata mang va tli puv.
47005017	Ahunghmuota Khrih chunglie a aw kieca cawsaa thaapa tana a cuo: a hringna hlungpa ca chuo tli te, hringna thaapa kha aa pathu tli!
47005018	Hingpa bangkhuo hing Khazing'a taata na a cuo. Khrih thueta ama hne malie pare sa te, capa a rena re hrie riypa kha kiema ca malie a pi.
47005019	Khrih thueta Khazing ta chuelyi ming bangkhuo kha ama hne pare sa tli yite, ama suena kha ripa li tlipa yi ta, capa a rena thuophaabie ca ri riypa re kha kiema ca malie a pi.
47005020	Cacuonakawta kiema ca Khrih cuota luosituv cuo pate, kiema hmuo pata Khazing ta niema kha paa aca kie yi. Khazing hneta a re thi ungla tapata kiema ta Khrih cuopa ta paa maca kie yi.
47005021	Khazing cawsaa aa dangpa ma cuo riypata suena a hnyi lipa ama kha kiema cuota a suepa ta a pacuo sa.
47006001	Khazing hne re a hrie hnepa ma cuopa haata, a vihnyina nama tingpa kha a cakhawpa ta nama pacuo sa li riypata maacaa nue yi.
47006002	Khazing ta a ripa ca: Cuhluo the riypa cuo ning kha naa ca thlie yi ang te, Khuona ningcuo lie kha icaa bya yi,” a ta. Naathlie tie ung, ata hing na cuhluo riypata araw-apuna cuo ta a cuo; naathlie tie ung, ata hing na khuona cuo ta a cuo!
47006003	Ma rehriena lie suephawpa ma cuo li riypata ahunghmuo ama luopuv lie pakhuotuv chi va puv.
47006004	Khazing changtaapa ma cuopa kha a luo bangkhuo taata aa luo riypata te-angna, ruvnaana, vuochina,
47006005	tuvdena, thawpathlana, zaapuv ta tuechiena, rehruo hriena, mingkuvhruvna, hne nangdiytiyhriena zaw kha palung pasiysa pata ma ang.
47006006	Palung pathena, pachangna, palungpasiyna, kawpacuona, thlaapa lie pathena, duena hmisi,
47006007	biehmisipa rina hne Khazing cahrana kha hmuo pata Khazing rehrietuv ma cuopa kha ma paluo sa. Adangna cehre kha ma cavyi ma cacuo ta maa hrie.
47006008	Malie pathuosa puo yite, malie ama ese puo, ma kawchie malie ri yite ma thuophaa malie ama ri. A hanghiepa ta malie ri yite, cuorasala biehmisipa ma ri puo.
47006009	Pachang lipa haata malie ama mang, cuorasala cawsaa bangkhuo pachang pata ma cuo. Athiypa haata malie hmung yite, cuorasala, malie mang tie ung, ma hring thluo hing. Duo malie ama te, cuorasala malie thie vayi.
47006010	Ma ngie a chi the raalaa pata ma palung a tluo pari. Ma siy a pasa raalaa pata cawsaa hluvpuv ma pa dawphaa sa yi. Khaahmuo ma hnyi li raalaa pata, hmangting bangkhuo a hnyituv ta ma cuo.
47006011	Korin khy lie a awpa duepa viesaa zaw, a siesa patana maca chang yi; ma pathiypalung ingchiy hing a kusa tana maca pahawpa tli yi hing.
47006012	Maca duena yi hing chebuo va tli pa hing, niema dyina a chebuo ungciy.
47006013	Kuo kha luota ripa kieca, saata zaw chang tana ica chang tli yi hing. Nama pathiypalung kha a kusa ta malie pahawpa ra tie ung.
47006014	Zanglituv tie hneta a khe kha ung. Tuokhaatama a dangna hne pha lina ca ama aw hne the aa? Khena hne zingna zaw tuokhaatama ama aw hne the aa?
47006015	Tuoakhaatama Khrih hne Setaa ca ama aw hne the aa? Zangtuv hne zanglituv ca khaapama amaa hraw hne the aa?
47006016	Tuokhaatama Khazing Biena-ing hne kuvtuezuv tie ca ama aw hne the aa? Tahematapakieca kiema ca a hringpa Khazing biena-ing tana ma cuo; Khazing ta, Kama kha iema hrawlie aw'a ang te, iema hrawlie i khie aa, Kama ca ama Khazing ta cuo'a ang te, iema ca i cawsaa ta ama cuo aa.
47006017	Cacuonakawta, Abyipa ta, iema hraw taa khata pya ungla, iema'a taakhata a nanang ta aw tie ung, a ta. A pathe lipa khaahmuo taw kha ungla, cakieca ica cuhluo'a yi.
47006018	Kama ca nama paa ta cuo'a ang te, niema ca kama saacapaa hne sacanung zaw ta nama cuo aa, tapata Alesyicepa Abyipa ta, a ta.
47007001	I duepa zaw, kiema ca hingpa biekuona zawdya hing ma hnyi nakawta ima pangpa hne ima thlaapa malie a papya a palyipa bangkhuo taata a pathe ung sala, Khazing ciyzaana hne a pathe pata aw ungsiy.
47007002	Nama palung chunglie malie pari tie ung. Ahung cunglie hmuo suena tue va puv, ahunghmuo para va puv, ahunghmuo ese nutaa va puv.
47007003	Niema ica pasue khing nakaw yi ta i ripa cuo vyi, i ri ciepa haata niema ca thiy kie thiykha hring kie hringkha tapata ma palung chunglie a awpa tana nama cuo.
47007004	Ica ri thuophaa pari yi, icaa palesakhyi yi, i hnaa ina panguo sa ungciy, riethyivuosuona ma ang ning zaw i law hryly.
47007005	Masidonia luo ma vya chiy khutaa khata hmuo a pahyna cuo hnyi va puv. A kuo ting taata riethyina ma ang. Le luo taata malie a du yite chung luo ta ciyna ma hnyi.
47007006	Cuorasala palung a rapa tie zaw hnaanguona a ripa Khazing ta Titas a vya chiyna thueta ma palung hnaa malie a panguo.
47007007	A vya chiypa dyi cuo li pata, a hnaanguona nama rina kaw, malie nama vuona kaw, nama ngiechina kaw, kama ina hmung khingnapa kaw zaw ungciy malie a chang tiyta i palung a tluo vie hryly.
47007008	Tahematapakieca i caapaphya ta nama ngie aca pachi sa zaw yi ta i capepa kha a ngiepachiy va ang. I caa na nama ngie caa pachi yi tapa kha i pachang tiyta, i ngiepachiy raalaa pata cuokha ta dyi tana a cuo.
47007009	Ata hing ca i palung a tluo; nama ngie a chi nakawta cuo li pata nama ngiechina ta a ngiepachiyna luo aa caa chiy nakaw yi ta a cuo. Nama ngiechina ca Khazing khingna haata a cuo nakawta kiema kawlie namaa sungpa aw vyi.
47007010	Tahematapakieca Khazing khingna haata a ngiechina khata khuona luo a chiykhyipa palung a thlena papya sa te, a ngiepachiy riypa aw vyi. Cuorasala chuelyi ngiechina taca thiyna na a chiykhyi.
47007011	Tahematapakieca Khazing khingna haata ngiechina khata khatluv tama nama palung aca pathu yi, ama sue li na zya kha khatluv tama nama paluo khing, hmangpha lipa nama hmung tiyta, khatluv tama nama palung a pasa, nama thlaa a zang, khatluv tama ina vuo ungciy, khatluv tama a pha lipa a tuetuv kha duo nama te khing, tapa kha rue tie ung. Hingpa kawlie hingta sue va puv tapa kha niema hrahring zaw ta namaa pasie.
47007012	Cacuonakawta, niema'a luo caa i vya cape tiyta, pha lina a tuetuv kawlie zaw cuo li pata, pha lina tuena a angtuv kawlie zaw cuo vyi, cuorasala khatluv tama malie namaa khingkhyi tapa kha Khazing hmielie aa luo riypatana a cuo.
47007013	Capacana ma hnaanguona ta a cuo. Kiema hnaanguopa dyi cuo vyi, Titas palungtluona cunglie ta maa lawvie hyi. Tahematapakieca niema bangkhuo thueta a palung a diesa laalaw.
47007014	Titas hmielie kha icaa palesakhyi yi, icaa palesakhyipa haayita niema zaw i hmie na pachi va ungciy. Maca changpa bangkhuo yi hing a hmisipa a cuopa haata, Titas hmielie maacaa palesakhyipa zaw yi hing a hmisipa a cuo tapa kha aa luo.
47007015	Nama bangkhuo ta pa-uvsathyi ung cate ciyna hne a cathangpuo pata nama cuhluopa kha a rue syalya pakhaa tiyta a pathiypalung hing niema'a luo dyina a aw.
47007016	I pathiypalung bangkhuo ta caa buchuo yi ang te i palung a tluo hringhruo.
47008001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, Masidonia khrihsaabuv tie'a lie pipa Khazing vihnyina kaw kha maca pachang sa khing yi.
47008002	Iema ca riethyi vuosuo laalaw pata ama aw raalaa pata ama palung tluotuvna hne khuopuv ta ama siypasana khata pahyasa pata pina luo aa chiy yi.
47008003	Tahematapakieca, iema ca ama cuo khu thiy tana palung thusa pata ama pi tapa kha i ri nguo, ama cuo khuna khungthing te tana ama pi.
47008004	Hing mingpathepa tie cuota rehriena lie hing amaa bya ra riypata kiema kha khuopuv ta paa malie ama kie.
47008005	Hingpa hing kiema ta ma za mangkhuona te dyi yi cuo li pata; iema'a na iema kha Abyipa'a luo a pi yite, Abyipa khingna haata kiema'a luo zaw kha malie amaa pi.
47008006	Cacuonakawta, hing re zaa pathutuv Titas kha hing duena re hing niema hrawlie kha a patlung pathla riypata ma chang.
47008007	Niema ca, zangna, bierina, pachangna, palungthuna, kiema malie nama duena kawlie hne hmangting kawlieta a phace pata nama tue tli pahaata, hingpa duena re kawlie zaw hing a phace pata nama patlung riypata maacaa khingkhyi yi.
47008008	Hingpa hing naw ica pipa yi ta cuo vyi, cuorasala nama duena hing a hmisipa a cuona zya kha i pachang khing nakawta malie tie palungthuna kha i vya paluo sapa tana a cuo.
47008009	Tahematapakieca, nama Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih pahyana zya kha nama pachang, a hnyirungsa raalaa pata, niema cuota siypasapa ta aa li, capaca ama siypasana thueta niema kha a hnyirungpa nama cuona riypatana a cuo.
47008010	Capa kawlie cata ruena ica pi khingpa yi ca, huokung ningta nama za pathapa, a hrie zaw nama za hrie khingsapa re kha nama cuota a phapa tana a cuo,
47008011	ata hingta patlung tie ung. Nama hrie khingsapa haakhata niemata tah nama palang kiena a puvthe aa.
47008012	Pikhingna pathiypalung nama hnyi kieca nama hnyi lipa hmang kha mang li pata nama hnyipa hmang kha mang pata cupa pata nama cuo aa.
47008013	Malie a bya riypata niema cunglie hmangriy khang riypa kha i ri khingpa cuo vyi, cuorasala nama phuvhning ta namaa khing namaa nguo the riypata,
47008014	atalie nama hnyirungsa ning hing aa hubupa tie kha a bya ungla, niema zaw a hubu pata nama aw ningta iema ta a caa bya'a yi.
47008015	Caapathepa ta, A hluvsa a pacungpa ta a hluv tuv hnyi li pata, a cawta a pacungpa ta a phahla hlyi vyi, a ta.
47008016	Kama ta niema a bya khingna pathiypalung i hnyipa haata Titas zaw a pahnyi sa ratuv Khazing ca a law ungsiy.
47008017	Tahematapakieca kiema ta paa ma kie pakha malie a cuhluopa dyi cuo li pata, niema kha a caa bya khing tuv nakaw yi ta ama palungthu ta tah niema'a luo kha aa vaw aa.
47008018	Thuophaabie a phuna kawlieta Khrihsaabuv lie a ming pathuopa ma uvnupa kha ama hneta niema'a luo ma vya pathlie.
47008019	Cadyi cuo li pata, Khazing rungnaana hne kiema maacaa khingkhyina yi kha paluo sa riypata kiema ma hrie nguoluopa duena re kawlie zaw hing kiema hne tlawhne riypata khrihsaabuv ta re ama pipa tana a cuo.
47008020	Hingpa pahyasa pata pipa lasaw kaw rehriena lie hing suephawna maa taw li riypata maa cadang sa.
47008021	Khazing hmiekunglie dyi cuo li pata cawsaa hmiekunglie zaw a phapa hmang tue kha maa tingpa a cuo.
47008022	Cakhutaata, iema hne hingta ma uvnupa pakha vya pathlie pate, ama ca cuo hluvpuv ma hiehriypasie ciepa cuote a bya khingna pathiypalung a hnyipa a cuopa kha ma hmung, ata changchiy hingca niema kha aca zang tuv nakaw yi ta acaa bya khing hryly yi.
47008023	Titas hing niema a byana kawlieta i viesaa hne i rehriehne cuote, ma uvnu zaw hing ca khrihsaabuv biephyatuv tie, Khrih rungnaana zaw ta ama cuo.
47008024	Cacuonakawta kiema ta maacaa palesakhyina kaw yi hne nama duena kha khrihsaabuv hmiekunglie kha aa luohuosa pata paluo sa tie ung.
47009001	Mingpathepa tie cuota rehrie riypa kawlie niema'a luo caa cape a hu tapata rue va ang.
47009002	Tahematapakieca, cawsaa a bya nama khingna zya kha i pachang tli nakawta niema kaw kha Masidonia tie'a lieta ica vaa palesakhyi tli yi. Akhaia tie ca ahuo kung ning taakhata a bya riypata a ting pacie pata ama aw tli a ta yi. Capa niema palungthuna cata cawsaa hluvpuv palung a pathu sa yi.
47009003	Cuorasala capa kawlie cata maacaa palesakhyina yi kha a hripa a cuo li riypata, a ting pacie pata nama aw riypata, uvnu zaw kha i vya pathlie yi.
47009004	Cata cuo li pata, Masidonia tie ta kama kha na vya ziy yi sala a ting pacie pata nama aw lipa kha aca hmung kie yi ca, hingpa kawlie hing niema dyi cuo li pata kiema zaw kha ma nang a zaasa aa.
47009005	Cacuonakawta uvnu zaw kha niema'a luo vya pathlielupa yi ta, pi riypata bie namaa kuo ciepa lasaw kha pahmyalu aa hu tapata i rue. Cahaa cata i vya chiy tiyta ting cie pata za aw'a te, hripuo pata pipa cuo li pata palung thusa pata nama pipa lasaw a cuopa kha aa luo aa.
47009006	Saciy a cawta dyi a vaapa ca thyipaa a cawta dyi pahriy'a te, a hluvpuv ta a vaapa ca a hluvpuv a pahriy aa tapa kha maw kha ung.
47009007	Ahung nama cuo zaw, nama palung lie namaa thli na zaa khata pi tie ung, ngie a buopuo pata pi kha se, pi lisa pha vyi tapata pi kha se, tahematapakieca palungtluosa pata a pipa tie khana Khazing ta a due yi.
47009008	Khazing ca namaa huna laata a hlyi ta thluechiy phangting caa pi khutuv yi cuote, hmangting kha aa de pata hnyi'a ung cate, hmangpha tuena phangting lie kha a bya khutuv nama cuo aa.
47009009	Caapathepa ta, “Pahyasa pata siypasa tie kha pi yite, Aa dangna ca chuozaa ta aa hmang,” a ta.
47009010	Saciy a vaatuv kha vaa riypa saciy hne ning riypa sa a pituv ta nama vaa riypa saciy kha a hluvsa ta ca pi'a yite, namaa dangnapa thyipaa kha a hluvsa aca pahriy sa'a yi.
47009011	Pahyasa pata a hluvsa nama pi khu riypata Khazing ta aaky-aacasa pata aca pahring sa'a yi. Kiema'a taata ama hmungpa nama lasaw nakawta iema ta Khazing ama pathuo sa aa.
47009012	Tahematapakieca, hing re nama hriepa hingta mingpathepa tie amaa huna dyi kha aa byapa yi ta cuo li pata Khazing'a luo palungtluona bie rina zaw kha a hluvpuv a pa-aw sa.
47009013	Hingpa re nama hriena lieta, Khrih thuophaabie nama cuhluopa kha ri-angiena hneta nama hringkhyinapa hne mingpathepa tie hne cawsaa hrangpa tie cuota pahyasa pata nama pinapa khata Khazing kha a parungnaa sa.
47009014	Khazing vihnyina a hlyi ta nama cunglie a tlung nakawta aca vuosa puo pa yi ta nama cuota thlaa ama chuo.
47009015	Ri diy khu a aw lipa a lasaw thue khata Khazing ca a law pata cuo mangsue.
47010001	Nama hmiekunglie i aw ningta a pane ang te luohlaa luo i aw tiyta riephasa pata bie a ri thepa kama Paul ta Khrih nangnena hne duena ta paa ica kie yi.
47010002	Niema hne i aw ning hing chuelyi phung tana ma aw tapata a ruepa tie kha a nguona hne riephasa pata a du a hu li riypata paa ica kie yi.
47010003	Cawsaapa haata ma aw hmisi, cuorasala ma cawsaa cuona ta rie a du va puv.
47010004	Tahematapakieca kiema ma rie a duna cehre ca cawsaapa cehre ta cuo vyi, a cusapa carie adaakhuona piehu zaw a para khupa Khazing cehre khata na ama cuo.
47010005	Khazing pachangna kha a pakhuopa bie a ina hne a palena kha para pate, Khrih ri a ngie riypata cawsaa ruena bangkhuo kha sii ta ma tue yi.
47010006	Nama ri-angiena tluo a tling khu taata ri a ngie lipa bangkhuo kha duote riypata a ting pacie pata ma aw.
47010007	Niema ca hmang kha a cungphang dyi ta na nama mang. Khrih huopa tana ma cuo namaa ta nguo kieca, niema haakhata kiema zaw Khrih huopa ma cuo rapa kha a thyi tie ung.
47010008	Abyipa ta niema kha para riypata cuo li pata sathaw riypata malie a pipa nawhnyina kha i palesakhyi tuv kiezaw ma a zaakhyi va ang.
47010009	I caapaphya ta caa pachiypa yi i lu riypa hing khing va ang.
47010010	Tahematapakieca, iema ta, “A caa ca kacu te a cahra, cuorasala a pangpa ta a aw puo kieca khaapapuv ta cuo tlung vyi, a bie zaw naathlie tluo'apa aw vyi,’ ama ta.
47010011	Cahaapa cawsaa zaw cata, ma aw li pata caa lie ma ripa hing, ma aw thue zaw ta ma tue aa tapa hing pachang yi se.
47010012	Iema hne iema a pathuosa patie hne khata ca a pakhing pata a ripuo nguo'a vayi puv. Cuorasala iema hne iema kha malie hneta amaa pakhing tiyta ama ngaanapa khana ama paluo sa.
47010013	Cadyiseca, kiema hing a hlyikhung ta a pale'a va puv, Khazing ta malie a pipa re, luriy chunglie khana ri'a pate ma aw aa. Capa chunglie ca niema'a lie ma hriepa re zaw hing a te ra.
47010014	Niema'a luo ma vya chiy ning kha ma ruoriy law pata ma vya chiypa cuo vyi; kiema ca Khrih thuophaabie hneta niema'a luo a vya chiy taapa tana ma cuo.
47010015	Kiema ca a luriy law pata malie hrie ciepa re lieta a palepa cuo va puv; cuorasala kiema maa ruechuopa ca, nama zangna kha le viele'a te, niema hrawlie ma rehriena ruo zaw kha a ku viele riypa khana a cuo.
47010016	Cahaa cata niema nama awna ruo kha law pata, malie tie hrie ciepa re lie kha a pale li pata, thuophaabie kha ma ri khu aa.
47010017	“A palepa ca Abyipa'a lie dyi kha a pale se.”
47010018	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta a khingpa ca ama hne ama a pathuosapa cuo li pata Abyipa ta a pathuosapa khana a cuo.
47011001	I ngaapuo hriehruv kiezaw a ang zya ina the riypa ung cata i khing. Na ang law tie ung!
47011002	Khazing ta hie aca tlie pahaayita kama zaw hie ica tlie ra yi. Tahematapakieca lesaapathenung kha pakha dyipa a navaapa'a luo pipa haata niema kha Khrih'a luo pi riypata bie i kuo.
47011003	Cuorasala pariy ta, a zyatena ta Evi kha a dungpa haata, nama pathiypalung kha a dangsa pata hne a pathesa pata Khrih'a luo namaa pina taata dungpa nama cuo sue riypa kha i ciysa.
47011004	Cawsaa pakhakha ta kiema ma phupa cuo li pata Zingsuv hrangpa kha a phu kie cuose, a cuo li kie, niema ta nama cuhluo ciepa thlaapa kha cuo li pata thlaapa hrangpa kha a paw ung cate, niema nama cuhluo ciepa kha cuo li pata thuophaabie hrangpa zaw kha namaa paw paluo lawmaw.
47011005	Hingpa lucuotuv a suocepa nama tapa tie laa hingta i ne vie tapata a rue va ang.
47011006	Bieri luota i the li zaw pachangna luo taca a ne va ang; hmangting kaw kha a luo phangting ta a siesa pata ma paluo sa tli.
47011007	Niema kha cyicalang riypata kama kha a pane ang te, Khazing thuophaabie kha a selawpa ta ica changpa yi ca i sue maw?
47011008	Niema cuota re hrie riypata iema'a taata abyana i lapa ca Khrihsaabuv hrangpa taata i chuvpa yi tana a cuo.
47011009	Niema'a lie i aw ning, i husa ning kha ahunghmuo nama hmang ca pariy vayi ang, Masidonia taata a vawpa i viesaa tie na i hupa kha naa pi yi. Cacuonakawta a cuo khu chung ta nama hmang ica pariy li riypa yi kha i za cahriy pahaata hmie luo zaw i cahriy aa.
47011010	Khrih biehmisipa kha i chunglie a aw pahaata, i palenapa hing Akhaia pe lieca ahungtahmuo padie khu'a vayi.
47011011	Khaapanakawma? Ica due li nakaw yi ma? Ica duepa yi ca Khazing na a pachang.
47011012	Kiema hne hingta amaa khing amaa nguo tapata cawsaa ta ama rue riypa a khingpa tie ama khingna kha a du riypata i hriepa hing i hrie pazue kalie aa.
47011013	Tahematapakieca cahaapa hruotle tie ca lucuotuv pakhipa, malie a dungthepa rehrietuv cuo yite, Khrih lucuotuv pakhipa tie tana ama cuo.
47011014	Kharuehaa riypa cuo vyi. Setaa hmuota khena avuoming aa cuo pakhi.
47011015	Cacuonakawta a rehrietuv tie ta adangna rehrietuv tie haata amaa cuo pakhi kieca kharuehaa riypa hmang cuo vyi. A chuona lieca ama tuepa hne aa phuvpa khana ama pahriy aa.
47011016	I ri canyi, ahungtahmuo a ngaapa ta na rue kha yi se; ina rue kiezaw ungcama, a cawta i pale the ra riypata na rue thluo tie ung.
47011017	Ata riephasa pata i palepa hing Abyipa nawhnyina ta i palepa cuo vyi, cuorasala a ngaapa haatana i pale pata a cuo.
47011018	Ama cawsaa cuona ta a palepa ama hluvsa nakawta i pale ra aa.
47011019	Tahematapakieca, nama singsa nakawta a ngaapa tie kha nama chaw khusa.
47011020	Niema ca sii ta caa ziypa tie, caa dung caa viepa tie, caa mangbungpa tie, nama be caa tungpa tie zaw kha namaa ngiethe khusa.
47011021	Cahaapa tuena kawlie ma phahlasapa ca nangzaa na a chiy puv! Cuorasala, pakhakha ta hmang suokhakha kawlie aa pale kieca, a ngaapa haata ri thluo'a ang, kama zaw capa kawlie ca i pale ra aa.
47011022	Iema ca Hebru ming ta ama cuo ma? Kama zaw i cuo ra. Israel ming ta ama cuo ma? Kama zaw i cuo ra. Abraham ciypathla ta ama cuo ma? Kama zaw i cuo ra.
47011023	Iema ca Khrih rehrietuv ta ama cuo ma? A ngaapa haata mang ri'a ang, Khrih rehrietuv pha vie tana i cuo. Khuo vie ta re i hrie, thaw a hluv vie i tla, ri tie li na tuv yite, vuotaasiy thiy'a nangna yi hluvpuv i taw.
47011024	Yisawliy tlingna yikha dyi a bupa sungpe ta china kha Judah ming kuv taata yipangaa i ang.
47011025	Asung ta yi thung ina tuv yi. Alung ta luokha ina vaa yi. Tiypalaw ta luothung na rakhyi te zuo kha hne ning kha chung riyliy tiy ta ina phya.
47011026	Khytlawna lieta, cavaa tiy ciy aa chiypa, damie kuv lie ciy aa chiypa, i cawsaa zaw'a taata ruvnaana, Jentail ming'a taata ruvnaana, khypuv chunglie ciy aa chiypa, ruochung lie ciy aa chiypa, riyliy chunglie ciy aa chiypa, hne uvnu hne sieta pakhipa tie'a taata ruvnaana zaw kha i ang.
47011027	Riethyisa pata rehrie ang te ruvnaana chunglie i hring. Zuokhydyi mingsaa pasing li pata i aw. Nangdiy tiyhrie pata hne sa ning li pata i aw. A kangsapa chunglie abuv-ase riy hnyi li pata i aw.
47011028	A hrangpa ca ri li pata khrihsaabuv kaw i pacuonapa hingta ningting ta a vy ta ina vy.
47011029	Pakhakha thaazuo a caw kie, i thaazuo caw li pata i aw'a ma? Pakhakha suena chunglie aa lie kie, i se hie li pata i aw'a ma?
47011030	I pale kieca, i thaadyana a paluo sapa hmang kawlie khana i pale aa.
47011031	Khazing hne Abyipa Zingsuv Paa ta i hang lipa kha a pachang, ama ca chuozaa pathuosa pata cuo mangsue.
47011032	Damaskas lie i aw ning kha siepahruo Aretas kuv rawlie a awpa muokiybyipa khata kama patuv riypata khypuv kha a cadung sa yi.
47011033	Cuorasala khypuv dungkhuona piehu thlaluo-aw taakhata pasyi ta na pachung yite ama kuv chung taata i law.
47012001	A thlahnenapa khaahmuo a aw li zaw ta i pale a hu, cuorasala Abyipa’ taata muocuo hne biephu kaw tana a cuo aa.
47012002	Ma hnang luo kung hraa hlyipaliy ning kha Khrihsaapapaa pakha ca avuo duothungna te ta ama lathawpa kha i pachang. A pangpa tama a cuo cuo vama tapa ca pachang va ang, Khazing na a pachang.
47012003	Capa a pangpa tama a cuo, cuo vama pachang va ang, Khazing na a pachang i tapapaa ca
47012004	Paradais luo calang yite cawsaapa ri riypa hne cawsaapa chang riypata pahya lipa bie kha a thyi.
47012005	Capapaa cuo cata i pale aa, cuorasala i thaadyana kawlie ta li pata ca kama kaw ca a pale'a va ang.
47012006	I pale khing pata a cuo kiezawma a ngaapa ta ca cuo'a va ang, tahematapakieca a hmisipa dyi kha i ri'a nakawta a cuo. Cuorasala pakhakha ta ina hmungnapa hne kama'a taata a thyipa laata a suo vie ta ina hmung li riypata a pale'a va ang.
47012007	Cacuonakawta a hlyi vie ta i hmungpa biephu nakawta i pale tuv li riypata Setaa pathliepa haata re a hriepa a ahling suokha kha i pangpa chunglie hing ina pi.
47012008	Hing hmang hingta ina thuse riypata Abyipa'a lie kha yi thung te paa i kie.
47012009	Cuorasala, Abyipa ta, “I vihnyina hing na cuota aa desa, cahrana ca thaadyana liena a tling,” ina ta. Cacuonakawta, Khrih cahrana ca kama'a lie a aw riypata i thaadyana lie kha khuo vie ta i palung tluo te i pale.
47012010	Cacuonakawta, thaadyana, esena, ruvnaana, hrisaathieruena, hne vuochina zaw kha palungtlingsa pata Khrih cuota i ang; tahematapakieca i thaadya ning khana i cahra ningta a cuo.
47012011	I ngaa ciemuo! Niema na naa pangaa ungciy. Hmisi ta kieca niema na naa pathuosa riypata a cuo ungciy. Tahematapakieca kama hing khaahmuo i cuo li raalaa pata lucuotuv a suocepa tie laa hingta a ne vie changchiy va ang.
47012012	Lucuotuv hmisi cuona ca palungpasiyna, pamangsana hne kharuehaa hmang tuena ta niema hrawlie paluo sa pata a cuo tli.
47012013	Hmangriy ta icaa tue lipa yi ri li pata Khrihsaabuv hrangpa tie laata khaapalie khama a chie vie ta ica tue yi? Hingpa i paana hing ca naa ngiethe tie ung!
47012014	A yithungna niema'a luo a vaw riypata a ting cie pata i aw tli. Nama cuota hmangriy cuo'a va ang, tahematapakieca nama hnyipa sue cuo li pata niema na icaa hu yi. Saata zaw ta nungpaa cuota sue pacung riypa cuo li pata, nungpaa tuv ta saata zaw cuota sue pacung riypata a cuo.
47012015	Niema cuota i hnyipa kha palung tluoce pata a hmuopa ca kama cuo ang te, i pangpa zaw niema cuota hmuopa i cuo aa. Niema kha ica due vie thluopa yi tama kama kha na due uo li pata nama aw aa?
47012016	Nama cuota hmangriy cuo va ang tapata rue'a ungpuv. Cadyiseca niema ta a zyatepa, cawsaa a dungpa ina ta ungciy.
47012017	Niema'a luo i vya pathliepa pakhakha'a taakhata a thungna i huvpa aw kanaa?
47012018	Titas kha niema'a luo tlaw riypata chang ang te, zangtuv uvnu pakha kha ama hne i vya pathlie. Titas zaw niema'a taata athungna a lapa aw vyi cuo vama? Kiema ca aa lupa pathiypalung tana aa lupa re kha ma hrie pakhaw cuo vama?
47012019	Nama hmiekungliena kiema hne kiema a paduona bie ama ri tapata malie rue pari kanaa ungciy? Zingsuv ming tana Khazing hmiekunglie bie ma ri. Duepa zaw, ma tuepa bangkhuo hing niema sathawna riypatana a cuo.
47012020	Niema'a luo i vya chiy tiyta, hinghaahingta cuo yi sala ica tapa haayita nama cuo li sue riypa hne kama zaw hinghaahingta cuose nama tapa haata i cuo li sue riypa kha i thlaa a zang. A hru a ina, hietliena, hihaana, kiema kaw dyi a pacuona, kawchie rina, caw-yina, hruotlena, a luopuv li pata hringna tapa tie nama hrawlie a aw sue riypa zaw i thlaa a zang.
47012021	Niema'a luo i vya chiy pakhaa tiyta, Khazing ta nama hmiekunglie nangzaa pata ina pa-aw sa sue aa tapa kha i thlaa a zang. Cawsaa hluvpuv ta hringpyalyipa hne aparuvsuena ama za tuepa kha a ngiepachiy li pata ama awna kawlieta ngiechisa pata i caa riypa kha i thlaa a zang.
47013001	Atalie hne hingta ca niema'a luo ica vya tlawpa yi hing a yi thungna ta a cuo. “Sue a phawna suokhakha ca pachangkhyituv pahning a cuo li kie pathung a aw kiena pacu sa pata a cuo aa.”
47013002	Niema'a luo a yihningnapa i vaw ning kha suena zaa tuepa tie hne a hrangpa tie kyihuo khata, i vya chiy pakhaa pata a cuo kieca ca diy'a va tli yi ang hing i ta pahaa yi khata, ata luohlaa luo i aw ning hingta a raaringna i pi yi.
47013003	Khrih na kama'a taata bie a ri tapa kha a cuo hmisi ma tapata nama pachang khing. Khrih hing niema'a lie re a hrie tiyta a thaa dya vyi, a cahra.
47013004	Tahematapakieca ama ca thaadyasa pata vieluo cunglie ama thie, cuorasala ata hing ca Khazing cahrana hneta a hring. Kiema zaw ama haata ma thaa a dya, cuorasala niema'a lie re ma hrie tiyta Khazing cahrana thueta ama hne ma hring aa.
47013005	Niema hne niema kha zangna chunglie ma aw ma tapata a mangpasie tie ung. A pacie pachiy tie ung. Zingsuv Khrih nama chunglie a awpa kha a pasie va ung cama? Namaa pasie li kieca namaa mangpasiena lie tling va ungciy!
47013006	Ma tlingpa kha nama hmung aa tapata i nguopuo.
47013007	Tuesuena nama hnyi li riypata Khazing'a luo thlaa maca chuopa yi. Kiema ca a mangpasiena lie ma tling tana ta cuo li pata, a tling lipa ma lu zaw ta niema ca aa hmuopa kha nama tue riypata a cuo.
47013008	Tahematapakieca biehmisipa ca maa daakhyi ta li pata ca a du taca a du khu va puv.
47013009	Kiema ma thaa a dya zaw ta niema nama cahra kieca ma palung a tluo. Cacuonakawta cawsaa tluotlingpa nama cuo khu riypata kiema zaw thlaa ma chuo.
47013010	Cacuonakawta luohlaa taata hingpa caa hing i vya cape pata a cuo, tahematapakieca niema parana cuo li pata sathawna riypata Abyipa ina pipa nawhnyina hing niema'a luo i vaw thueta khuosa ta i hmuo sue lina riypatana a cuo.
47013011	A hnangcawce ta, uvnu hne sieta zaw, nama tluopa ta za aw mya ung! Nama hringzya zaa pare ungla paa ica kiepa yi hing naathlie tie ung. Nama palung a lu sala diena hne aw tie ung. Cata a cuo kieca duena hne diena Khazing ca niema'a lie a aw aa.
47013012	Pakha hne pakha kha a pathepa a pahnuona ta bie a chang tie ung. Mingpathepa tie bangkhuo na bie a caa chang yi.
47013013	Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina, Khazing duena, hne Thlaapa Pathe a viesaana ca nama bangkhuo cunglie aw mangsue.
48001001	Cawsaa ta ina chang nakaw yi hne cawsaa nawhnyina ta cuo li pata, Zingsuv Khrih hne ama kha thiyna taata a pathu pakhaapa ma Paa Khazing ta changpa lucuotuv kama Paul hne
48001002	kama hne a awpa Khazing chungkhue uvnu zaw ta Galati khrihsaabuv tie kha caa maca paphya yi.
48001003	Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih hne ma Paa Khazing'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca nama cunglie aw mangsue.
48001004	Ata chuo, chuochiepa chung taahingta kiema kha hya pazang sa riypata, ma Paa Khazing khingna haata, Khrih ca ma suena cuo khata aa pi.
48001005	Rungnaana ca ama'a lie chuozaa ta aw mangsue. Amen.
48001006	Khrih vihnyina chung luo caa kupa yi kha a catlisa pata thuse ung cate thuophaabie hrangpa luo namaa palipa ca i nang na ina pa uo ungciy.
48001007	Thuophaabie hrangpa a aw nakawta i ripa cuo li pata, nama palung caa paluoluetuv hne Khrih thuophaabie kha thle a nangpa chekha ama aw nakawta ica tapa yi ta a cuo.
48001008	Cuorasala, kiema ma cuozaw, vuoruo taata a zuvpa avuoming ama cuo zaw tahmuo, kiema ma phupa thuophaabie hne aa lu lipa thuophaabie kha niema'a lie ama phu kieca, chiesa pata cuo mangyisue!
48001009	Ma ri ciepa haakhata, ata hing i ripakhaa, nama cuhluo ciepa thuophaabie hne aa lu lipa thuophaabie a phutuv pakhakha a aw kieca, chiesa pata cuo mangsue!
48001010	Kama hing cawsaa hmiephaa hmung riypa ma i zue, Khazing hmiephaa ma? A cuo li kie cawsaa palung patluo riypa a zue kanaa ang? Ata tepa hingtana cawsaa palung patluo kha i zue tapa kieca, Khrih sii ca cuo khu'a va ang.
48001011	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, kama i phupa thuophaabie hing cawsaa'a taata cuo vyi tapa kha ica pachang sa khing yi.
48001012	Tahematapakieca, hingpa thuophaabie hing cawsaa'a taata i hmungpa cuo li pata cawsaa ta ina changpa yi zaw cuo vyi. Cuorasala Zingsuv Khrih ta a phupa bie thueta i hmungpa tana a cuo.
48001013	Judah phung chunglie i za hringzya kha ina pachangpasie ungciy. Khazing khrihsaabuv kha khuopuv ta za hrisaathierue ang te para riypata i zaa zue.
48001014	I phangbuo khuvhyi hrawlie ta Judah phung luo zaa pi vie ang te, ma mingchingmingvuo tie phungluo kha karuo awsa pata i zaa daakhyi.
48001015	Cuorasala i puv hluo baataata naa tlaw te a vihnyina ta naa upa Khazing ta,
48001016	a Saacapaa thuophaapa kha Jentail ming'a luo i phu riypata, a Saacapaa kha kama'a luo palung tluosa pata a za paluo sa tiyta, ahunghmuo ruena ca hie vayi ang.
48001017	Kama hluo ta lucuotuv zaa cuo tlipa tie a taw riypa zaw ta Jerusalem luo khaw va ang. Cuorasala Arabia ruo luo kha a catli pata si ang te, cakhutaa cata Damaskas luo i za kaa.
48001018	Kung thung khu taata Piter parie riypata Jerusalem luo khaw ang te ama'a lie ning hraa hlyipangaa i aw.
48001019	Abyipa nuta Jeim ri li pata lucuotuv hrangpa ahunghmuo a taw vayi ang.
48001020	Hinghaahingta i vya capepa hing Khazing hmielie hang va ang.
48001021	Cakhutaacata, Siria hne Silisia pe luo kha si ang te,
48001022	capa tepa cata Judea pe lie a awpa khrihsaabuv tie ta na pachang valie yi.
48001023	“Kiema malie zaa hrisaathierue tuvpa khana para a zaa zuepa zangna kaw kha a phu nguoluo,” tapa dyi kha za thyi yite,
48001024	kama kawlie kha Khazing ama pathuosa.
48002001	Kung hraa hlyipaliy khu taata Jerusalem luo kha Barnabas hneta khaw pakhaa pate, Titas kha i chiyle.
48002002	Biephu a aw nakawta i khaw pata a cuo. I hrie nguoluopa hne i za hriepa zaw bangkhuo kha a cakhawpa cuovyi tapa ama pasie na riypa ta, Jentail ming hrawlie i za phupa thuophaabie kaw kha ama uvthyi zaw hne pangpa ta maa tawna lie i chang yi.
48002003	Kama hne a awpa Titas khahmuo Krik ming a cuo raalaa pata vangdaw a te riypata hripuo va ang.
48002004	Zangtuv pakhipa chekha ca Khrih Zingsuv zangna thueta ma hnyipa hyazangna kawlie kha sii ta malie amaa ziy pakhaa khing nakawta kiema chung luo kha a paruv ta dya amaa vya ngie.
48002005	Thuophaabie hmisipa kha niema'a lie aa hmang riypata, iema kha sungkhata hmuo a pate sa vayi puv.
48002006	Cawsaa ta pachangpa uvthyi tie khata ruena suokha hmuo na pi vayi. Iema hingta i cuota a nanangna ina pipa yi aw vyi; Khazing ca hmiemang pata pahlyipalena tue vyi.
48002007	Cahaa cata ruena pi changchiy ca, Piter ca Khazing ta vangdaw a tepa tie'a luo thuophaabie phu riypata hrievu a pipa haakhata kama kha vangdaw a te lipa tie'a luo thuophaabie phu riypata hrievu ina pipa kha a hmungtuv ta ama cuo.
48002008	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta Piter kha vangdaw a tepa tie'a luo thuophaabie phu riypata lucuotuv ta a tuepa haata kama zaw kha vangdaw a te lipa tie'a luo lucuotuv ta ina tue ra.
48002009	Luochiytuv a tungpuv vie ta ripa Jeim hne Piter hne Johan ta Khazing ta ina pipa vihnyina kha ama hmung tiyta rehriehne tana ma cuo tanapa paluosana ta Barnabas hne kama kha ma kuv malie amaa buo. Kiema kha Jentail ming'a luo si riypa hne iema kha vangdaw a tepa tie'a luo si riypata ma palung a tling.
48002010	Iema ta malie ama patue sa khingpa suokha ca cawsaa siypasapa tie kha a thyi riypa cuote, capaca kama ta temaa pata i hrie khing paripa re ta a cuo.
48002011	Cuorasala Antiok luo Piter a vya chiy tiyta, a paana kawlie kha hmiedesuo ta sue i phaw.
48002012	Tahematapakieca Jeim ta a vya pathliepa cawsaa zaw ama vya chiyna te khata ca Jentail ming hneta sa a ning pakhaw taw. Cuorasala iema ama vya chiy khu taata ca vangdaw a tepa phuv kha a ciy nakaw yi ta hnang luo dya a saw te amata tah a aw.
48002013	Judah ming hrangpa tie zaw ta ama kha dya a hlaw yite, iema phahruocuona kawlie khata Barnabas zawte kha luo ama pasi sa chie ra.
48002014	Cuorasala thuophaabie hmisipa haata ama ziy lipa kha i hmung tiyta cawsaa bangkhuo hmielie, Piter kha, “Judah ming na cuo thluo pata Judah ming haata aw li pata Jentail ming haata na aw kieca, tuokhaatama Jentail ming ca Judah ming haata aw riypata na hripuo khu'a yi?” i ta.
48002015	Kiema ca ma thukina hrahring ta Judah ming cuo pate Jentail ming, a suepa tie ta cuo va puv.
48002016	Cuorasala cawsaa hing phungbie ziyna thueta cuo li pata Khrih Zingsuv zangna thue tana duopacupa ma cuo tapa kha ma pachang. Kiema ca phungbie ziyna thueta cuo li pata, Khrih zangna thueta duopacupa cuo riypatana Zingsuv Khrih kha ma zang. Tahematapakieca ahunghmuota phungbie ziyna thueta duopacupa cuo the'a vayi.
48002017	Cuorasala kiema ca Khrih thueta duopacupa cuo riypa maa zue nguoluo pata a suepa ma cuopa kha malie ama hmung kieca, Khrih ca suena a papungpazaa sa pata a cuo'a ma? Cuo changchiy vyi!
48002018	I za phi ciepa hmang kha i sa pakhaa kieca, kama ca phungbie a parapa i cuopa khana i paluo sa.
48002019	Tahematapakieca Khazing'a lie hring riypata phungbie thueta phungbie lieca i thiy tli. Zingsuv hne vieluo lie taa hnepa ta cuo ang te,
48002020	ata a hringpa hing kama ta cuo va ang, i chunglie a hringpa Khrih tana a cuo. Ata saapa ta i hringpa zaw hing na due te i cuota a pipa Khazing Saacapaa i zangna thue tana a cuo.
48002021	Khazing vihnyina i para pata cuo vyi; phungbie thue tana duopacuna aa vaw tapata a cuo kieca, Zingsuv ca a cakhaw pata a thiypa tana a cuo aa.
48003001	Galati ming a ngaapa tie! Ahungma caa pamya yi? Zingsuv Khrih vieluo cunglie a thiynapa ca nama ming lie a siesa pata paluo sapa a cuo tli!
48003002	Niema'a taata i pachang khingpa suokha dyipa ca: Thlaapa hing phungbie ziyna thueta ma nama hmung a cuo li kie nama thyipa nama zang nakawta ma nama hmung?
48003003	Nama ngaa hringhruo de? Thlaapa ta patha ung cate ma saapa ta nama pachuo sa'a nang?
48003004	Hing hmang hingna a cakhawpa ta a cuo hmisi tapata a cuo kieca namaa tawpa hmang bangkhuo kha a cakhawpa tama a cuo aa?
48003005	Thlaapa ca pi yite kharuehaa hmang zaw nama hrawlie a tuepa Khazing hing phungbie nama ziyna thueta ma a tue a cuo li kie nama thyipa nama zangna thueta ma a tue?
48003006	Abraham ca Khazing kha zang te, ca a zangna ca a dangna ta cuhluopa pata a cuo.
48003007	Cacuonakawta a zangpa ca Abaraham samingsahlaa ta ama cuopa kha pachang tie ung.
48003008	Khazing ta Jentail ming kha zangna thueta adangna luo a papha sa'a yi tapa kha Caapathepa ta a hmunglu nakawta Abraham kha, “Jentail ming bangkhuo ca nama thue tana thluechiy ama hmung aa,” a ta.
48003009	Cacuonakawta, a zangpa bangkhuo ca zangna paa Abraham hneta thluechiy pipa ama cuo.
48003010	Tahematapakieca phungbie ziyna a buchuopa bangkhuo ca chiesana rawliena ama aw. Caapathepa ta, “Phungbie caa-uv chunglie a capepa bangkhuo kha a ziy lipa bangkhuo ca chiesapa tana ama cuo,” a ta.
48003011	Cacuonakawta ahunghmuota Khazing hmielie phungbie thueta duopacupa aw vayi; tahematapakieca, Caapathepa ta, “Zangna thueta adangna a hmungpa ca a hring aa,” a ta.
48003012	Cuorasala phungbie ca zangna cunglie kha a pahnie vyi. Cadyi cuo li pata, “Phungbie kha a ziypa ca capa phungbie ziyna catana a hring aa,” a ta.
48003013	Khrih ca kiema cuota chiesana ang te, kiema kha phungbie chiesana taata malie a khuo. Caapathepa ta, “Thingkung cunglie pathliepa bangkhuo ca chiesapa tana ama cuo,” a ta.
48003014	Hingpa hmang ta a tingpa ca, Abraham thluechiy ca Khrih Zingsuv thueta Jentail ming'a luo a tlung riypa hne kiema ta zangna thueta Thlaapa ta biekuopa kha ma hmungna riy'apa tana a cuo.
48003015	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, ningting maa tawpa taata pakhingpuona suokha ca pi'a yi ang. Cawsaa ta palung tlingsa pata tue yite ming ama thuv tlipa biekuona ca chachiy khu zaw aw li pata para khu zaw aw vyi.
48003016	Cahaa cata Khazing ta Abraham hne a samingsahlaa cunglie biekuona a tue. A hluvsapa tie'a luo ripa haata, “Na samingsahlaa zaw,” ta li pata, “Na samingsahlaa,” tapa dyi ta a cuo. Capaca cawsaa pakha, Khrih dyi khata a cuo.
48003017	I ri khingpa ca, kung zapaliy sawthung khu taata a vawpa phungbie ta a hluo baataata Khazing hne za tue ciepa biekuona kha para vyi, biekuona kha a cakhawpa ta pacuo sa vyi.
48003018	Tahematapakieca, rucuna ca phungbie taatana aa vaw tapata a cuo kieca, caca biekuona taata a vawpa cuo vyi; cuorasala Khazing taca Abraham kha biekuona tana rucuna kha a pi.
48003019	Cacuokie, phungbie aa tingna ca khaapatama a cuo? Biekuona ta a ri khingpa samingsahlaa aa vawhluo ta tuepa suena nakawta phungbie ca chachiy pata a cuo. Avuoming ta ca phungbie ca luosituv pakha'a taata pi pachaa pata a cuo.
48003020	Luosituv ca phuvkha laata a hluv vie na lie khana re a hrie pata a cuo; cuorasala Khazing ca pakha dyi ta a cuo.
48003021	Cacuokie phungbie hne Khazing biekuona ca aa capie ma? Cuo changchiy vyi! Tahematapakieca, cawsaa hing hringna a pikhutuv phungbie kha za pipa cuo yi sala, cawsaa hingta phungbie thueta Khazing duopacuna kha ama hmung diy aa.
48003022	Cuorasala Caapathepa ta, hmangting bangkhuo hing suena rawliena a aw ta te, caca a zangtuv tie kha Zingsuv Khrih zangna thue dyi ta biekuopa kha pipa ama cuo riypata a cuo.
48003023	Zangna a vaw hluo ta, kiema kha phungbie ta thaw malie pathla te, zangna aa luona cuo te khata malie a hrekhung.
48003024	Cacuonakawta kiema ca zangna ta duopacupa ma cuona riypata, phungbie ca Khrih aa zuvna te khata kiema malie a mangchiytuv ta a cuo.
48003025	Cuorasala zangna ca a vaw tli te, kiema ca mangchiytuv phungbie a hu va tli puv.
48003026	Tahematapakieca kiema bangkhuo ca Khrih Zingsuv zangna thueta Khazing saata ta ma cuo.
48003027	Khrih ming ta tiy a a nawpa bangkhuo ca Khrih kha namaa hryi tli.
48003028	Judah ming hne Krik ming, sii hne hya a zangpa, capaa hne canung, tapata pananangna aw va tli; nama bangkhuo ta Khrih Zingsuv chunglie pangkha tana nama cuo.
48003029	Cacuonakaw ta Khrih huopa nama cuo kieca, niema ca Abraham samingsahlaa cuo ung cate, biekuona haata rucutuv nama cuo.
48004001	I ri khingpa ca hinghaahingtana a cuo: rucutuv riypa kha kung tlingpa a cuo hluo taca hmangting bangkhuo kha a hnyituv cuorasala sii hne aahlyi-aalena aw vyi.
48004002	A paa ta a tingpa pa cuo a tling hluo li bangkhuo ca mangchiytuv kuv cunglie khana a aw.
48004003	Cacuonakawta, kiema zaw kung tling lipa ma cuo chung ca chuelyi hmang a uvtuv thlaapa sii tana ma cuo.
48004004	Cuorasala cuo a vya tling tiyta ca Khazing ta a Saacapaa a za pathlie. Canung chung taata phungbie rawlie a puv.
48004005	Phungbie rawlie a awpa tie a thla riypa hne kiema kha Khazing saata ta ma cuo thena riypata a cuo.
48004006	A saata ma cuo nakawta, Khazing ta Thlaapa kha ma pathiypalung chung luo za pathlie te, capa Thlaapa cata, “Abba! I Paa!” tapata a u.
48004007	Cacuonakawta niema ca sii ta cuo va tli ungciy, cuorasala saata tana nama cuo. Khazing saata nama cuo tli nakawta rucutuv zaw nama cuo.
48004008	Hluoning, Khazing nama za pachang hluo ca, Khazing a cuo lipa tie sii ta nama za cuo.
48004009	Cadyiseca, ata hing ca Khazing kha pachang tli ung cate, Khazing zaw ta aca pachang tli yi. Tuokhaatama a thaazuo dyapa, thlahnena a hnyi lipa thlaapa tie'a luo ca namaa pali aa? Tuokhaatama iema sii ca nama cuo pakhaa khing?
48004010	Niema ta ning pa-ipa, thla pa-ipa, khycuo pa-ipa hne kung pa-ipa hnyi ung cate nama uv.
48004011	Nama cuota i hriepa re hing paviepavuv lie ungciy tapa na i thlaa a zangsa.
48004012	Viesaa zaw, kama haahingta cuo ra ung tapata paa ica kie yi, tahematapakieca kama zaw niema haatana i cuo tli. Kama'a lie nama paanapa aw vyi.
48004013	A yikhanapa niema'a lie thuophaabie i za phupa ca pangpasaa lie i tluo li nakawtana a cuo tapa kha nama pachang.
48004014	I tluo lipa ca niema cuota hmangriy a cuo raalaa pata, na za ese lipa ung cata na za mangbung va ungciy, cuorasala Khazing avuoming haata hne Khrih Zingsuv haata ina za cuhluo ungciy.
48004015	Nama za hnyipa palungtluona kha tuokhaatama aa tue tli? Cuo the sala nama ming hmuo cakhyi pata ina pi khing ungciy tapa kha kama pangpa ta i ri nguo.
48004016	Biehmisipa ica chang nakaw yi ta nama carie ta a li kanaa ang?
48004017	Cawsaa chekha ta a caa khingkhyi laalaw yi, cuorasala amaa tingpa ca pha vyi. Niema kha kiema'a taata che pata iema'a luo kuo dyi a daa riypata aca khing yi.
48004018	Cahaa cata a khingkhyina ca a tingna phapa hne a cuo kieca niema'a lie i aw ning dyi cuo li pata cipari ta a pha.
48004019	I duepa i saata zaw, Khrih kha nama chunglie a aw hluo li chung bangkhuo ca nu pazipa haa khatana pasana ca i ang pari aa.
48004020	Ata hing niema'a lie aw ang sala i ryikaa zaw hing thle khu angse tapa i khing sa; nama cuota na i palung rie a thyi hringhruo.
48004021	Phungbie rawlie a aw khingpa tie zaw, na chang tie ung, phungbie ca ziy'a va ung cama?
48004022	Caapathepa ta, Abraham ca saacapaa pahning hnyi te, pakha ca siizaanung hneta a hnyipa cuote pakha ca hyazang pata a aw nung hneta a hnyipa a cuo.
48004023	Siizaanung saacapaa ca saapa ta sapa cuote hyazang pata a aw nung saata ca biekuona thueta sapa a cuo.
48004024	Hingpa hing pakhingpuona ta a cuo: Hingpa canung pahning hing biekuona suohning ta ama cuo. Biekuona suokha ca Sinai Tluo taata pipa cuote, a saa zaw ca sii cuo riypata a sa yi. Caca Hagar ta a cuo.
48004025	Hagar ca Arabia ruo lie a awpa Sinai Tluo tanata cuote atalie ta a saa zaw hneta sii a cuo nguoluopa Jerusalem hing a ri khingnapa tana a cuo.
48004026	Cuorasala canung hrangpanung ca cungluo a awpa Jerusalem kha a ri khingpa ta cuote; ama ca hya a zangpa kiema ma nung tana a cuo.
48004027	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, “Nama a cing nung, saa a sa buo li nung, a law tie, Nupazi pasana a ang buo li nung, hlaa sa la u tie; Tahematapakieca thawpa nung ta a sapa saata zaw khana a vaapa hne a aw nung saata zaw laata a hluv vie'a yi,” a ta.
48004028	Uvnu zaw, niema ca biekuopa saata, Isak haatana nama cuo.
48004029	Cuorasala saapa ta sapa saata ta Thlaapa ta sapa saata kha a hrisaathieruepa haata ata zaw hing a cuo.
48004030	Cuorasala Caapathepa ta tuokhaatama a ri? “Siizaanung hne a saacapaa kha a cade tie ung; siizaanung saata taca hyazang pata a aw nung saata hneta ru cu hnepakhaw khu'a vyi,” a ta.
48004031	Cacuonakawta, uvnu zaw, kiema ca siizaanung saata ta cuo va puv, hyazang pata a aw nung saata tana ma cuo.
48005001	Khrih ta hya malie a pazang sa nakawta hya a zangpa tana ma cuo. Cacuonakawta, a cu pata a daa ungla sii taca a li pakhaa kha ung.
48005002	Naathlie tie ung! Kama Paul na caa chang yi ang. Vangdaw kha namaa te kieca Khrih ca nama cuota thlahnena khaahmuo hnyi'a vyi.
48005003	Ica chang pakhaa yi, vangdaw a tepa taca phungbie kha a bangkhuo ta a ziy riypa a cuo.
48005004	Phungbie ta duopacuna hmung a khingpa ca niema hne niema kha Khrih'a taata a chepa tana nama cuo; Khazing vihnyina khungthing luo a awpa tana nama cuo.
48005005	Tahematapakieca, kiema ca Thlaapa thue tana zangna ta adangna kha ma hmung aa tapata a nguopuo pate a ngietie li pata ma huo.
48005006	Tahematapakieca, Khrih Zingsuv chunglie a hringpa tie cuota ca vangdawtena cuose, vangdawtelina cuose khaapahmuo thlahne vyi; a thlahnepa suokha ca duena ta re a hriepa zangna suokha kyalya khana a thlahne.
48005007	Nama si zya a za phasa thluo. Biehmisipa ziy kha ahungma caa thlu yi?
48005008	Cahaapa dungna ca caa kutuvpa yi Khazing'a taata ca cuo vyi.
48005009	Thiynung a cawta tah viedie nawkha bangkhuo kha a pathu sa.
48005010	Ruena hrang hnyi'a va ungciy tapata ica zang yi. Cuorasala ahung a cuo zaw nama palung caa paluolue sapa yi hing ca a suena muo a hmung aa.
48005011	Cuorasala, uvnu zaw, vangdaw te hing a hu thluo tapata i ri kalie kieca, khaapanakawma hrisaathieruena ca i ang pari thluo? Hinghaahingtana i za ri tapata a cuo kieca vieluo kaw i ripa hing cawsaa aliena ta cuo'a vyi.
48005012	Caa patawpahriepa tie hing ama tiy a lu lalue yi sala a pha'apa kha!
48005013	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema ca hya a zangpa cuo riypatana kupa nama cuo. Capa nama hyazangna ca saapa khingtlingna cuo dyi ta hmuo kha ung. Cuorasala pakha hne pakha kha duena ta a mangsang tie ung.
48005014	Tahematapakieca phungbie bangkhuo ca, “Nama naa duepa haata na ingpaa kha due ra tie,” tapa phungbie suokha lie hingna a tling diy.
48005015	Cadyiseca, niema pakha hne pakha kha namaa hru namaa i kieca pakha hne pakha namaa parapakyi diy sue aa tapa kha a cadang tie ung.
48005016	Thlaapa ta hring ungla saapa khingna kha a lunghruo patlung kha ung.
48005017	Tahematapakieca saapa khingna ca Thlaapa khingna ta a du te, Thlaapa khingna zaw kha saapa khingna ta aa du. Iema hing amaa carie nakawta na khingpa kha tue khu vaciy.
48005018	Cuorasala Thlaapa ta acaa chiy kieca phungbie ta ca uv va tli.
48005019	Saapa khingna a tuepa tie ca amaa luotaalaa thluo: aparuvsuena, a pyalyipa zyazaa, zyazaa pha lipa,
48005020	kuvtuezuv biena, ca-iena, huena, ahru-a-ina, karuo-awna, hihaana, a-i-achuena, a chena,
48005021	hietliena, sahmyisahmaa pariyna, pariy cangta khi-una, hne cahaapa hmang zaw cata ama cuo. A raaringna ica za pi tlipa haayita, ica pi pakhaa yi: hinghaapa hmang a tuepa tie ca Khazing pena cu'a vayi.
48005022	Cuorasala, Thlaapa thyipaa tie ca, duena, palungtluona, diena, palungpasiyna, malie ngiechina, pahyana, zangtluo atlana,
48005023	nangnena hne kiema hne kiema a uv khuna zaw ta ama cuo. Hingpa hmang zaw hing a dupa phungbie aw vyi.
48005024	Cakhutaata Khrih Zingsuv huopa ta a cuopa taca a saapa hne saapa khingna bangkhuo kha vieluo lieta a thie tli.
48005025	Thlaapa ta ma hring kieca, Thlaapa ta luo malie a chiy se.
48005026	Ahruo tle kha ungsiy, pakha hne pakha azue-atie kha ungsiy, pakha hne pakha hie a tliena hnyi kha ungsiy.
48006001	Uvnu zaw, cawsaa pakha ta suena a tuepa kha nama hmung kieca niema Thlaapa a tingpa tie ta ama kha nangnena hneta luodangpa luo a chiy tie ung. Pasupaliyna luo nama chiy li riypa zaw a raaring tie ung.
48006002	Pakha hne pakha hmangriy a phyakhyi ungla cahaa cata Khrih phungbie kha patling sa tie ung.
48006003	Khaahmuo cuo tlung li pata cawsaa ciemuopa ta a ruepa tie ca iema hne iema a dungpa tana ama cuo.
48006004	Cawsaa bangkhuo iema'a na ama tuehriepa kha a mangpasie yi se. Malie tuehriepa hne pakhingpuo a hu li pata niemata tah nama palung a tluo aa.
48006005	Tahematapakieca cawsaa bangkhuo ta kiema hmang cyicuo kha phya riypatana a cuo.
48006006	Khazing bie pacuv pata a cuopa tie ca hmangpha ama cupa bangkhuo kha pacuvtuv hneta amaa hraw riypatana a cuo.
48006007	Ahungtahmuo ca dung kha yi se; Khazing ca dung khu riypa cuo vyi, na vaapa haa khatana na pahriy aa.
48006008	Na saapa cuona pata na vaa kieca, saapa taata rana kha pahriy'a cate, cuorasala, Thlaapa ta na vaa kieca, Thlaapa taata a vawpa chuozaa hringna kha na pahriy aa.
48006009	Hmangpha tue riypa kha thaachi li pata aw ungsiy. Taw li ta maa zue kieca a cuo aa de tiyta thyipaa kha ma pahriy aa.
48006010	Cakhutaata, cuophaa ma hnyi tiy mekaa ta cawsaa bangkhuo cuota hmangpha tue kha a zue ung sala, a hlyi vie ta zangna luota ma chungkhuekha tie cuota a zue ungsiy.
48006011	I kuv hrahring ta caasuo pang-katupa ta i capepa caa hing mang tie ung.
48006012	Saapa lie mingphana a hmung khingpa tie ta niema kha vangdaw a te riypata aca pasu yi. Capaca Khrih vieluotaana kawlieta hrisaathieruena ama ang li riypata ama tuepa tana a cuo.
48006013	Vangdaw a tepa tie tahmuo phungbie kha ziy vayi, cuorasala niema kha vangdaw aca pate sa khingpa yi ca nama saapa phung ziyna kawlieta amaa pale khing nakawtana a cuo.
48006014	Kama ca ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih vieluo kaw ri li pata khaapa kawlie hmuota a pale'a va ang, Khrih vieluo thue hingta chuelyi ca i cuota vieluo lie khepuopa cuo tli te, kama zaw chuelyi cuota vieluo lie khepuopa i cuo tli.
48006015	Tahematapakieca vangdaw tepa hne te lipa hing a biepuvpa ta cuo vyi, sathaapa cuona hingna a biepuvpa ta a cuo.
48006016	Hingpa phung a ziypa tie cunglie hne Khazing cawsaa zaw cunglie diena hne nangduena aw mangsue.
48006017	Ata taahingta pathu pata ahungtahmuo riethyi na pi kha tli se; tahematapakieca Zingsuv hmaa hne hmaadaa kha i pangpa cunglie caakhepuopa ta a cuo.
48006018	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina ca nama palung chunglie aw mangsue. Amen.
49001001	Khazing khingna ta Khrih Zingsuv lucuotuv a cuopa kama Paul ta, Khrih Zingsuv thueta zangtluo aa tlapa Efesa lie a awpa mingpathepa tie kha caa ica paphya yi.
49001002	Ima Paa Khazing'a taata hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca niema'a lie aw mangsue.
49001003	Ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih a Paa hne Khazing ca pathuosa pata cuo mangsue. Ama ca vuoruo lie thlaapa thluechiy ting kha Khrih thueta kiema malie a pipa tana a cuo.
49001004	A hmiekunglie a pathepa hne syi riy a aw lipa ma cuo riypata chuelyi sa hluo baataata Khrih chunglie kha duena ta malie aa tlaw.
49001005	Ama ta kiema ca Zingsuv Khrih thueta a saata ta cuhluo riypata khingna hne palung tlingsa pata ama lieriyuopuopa tama ma cuo.
49001006	A duesapa Saacapaa thueta malie a pipa a rungnaapa a vihnyina nakawta Khazing ca pathuosa ungsiy.
49001007	Khrih thiyse thueta khuona hne sue a ngiethena kha
49001008	Khazing ta pahyasa pata malie a pipa a vihnyina thueta ma hmung.
49001009	Ama ta a singna hne aa thuvpa a pachangna ta a ting ciepa kha hrie te Khrih thueta a patling sa khingpa a bieparuv ca kiema'a lie a paluo sa.
49001010	A cuo a tling tiyta Khazing ta vuoruo lie a awpa hmang bangkhuo hne alyi lie a awpa hmang bangkhuo kha Khrih'a lie suvkha ta pahmya diy aa ting.
49001011	Ama khingna haata hmangting bangkhuo kha a patlungpa Abyipa a tingna haata kiema kha Khrih thueta rucutuv ta malie a tue.
49001012	Cacuonakawta, Khrih cunglie a ruechuona a hnyi taapa kiema ca a rungnaana pathuo sa riypata hring ungsiy.
49001013	Niema zaw, khuona thuophaabie, biehmisipa kha thyi ung cate ama nama zang tiyta biekuo ciepa Thlaapa Pathe ta caa khepa ta nama cuo tli.
49001014	Thlaapa Pathe ca ama rungnaana ma pathuosa the riypata Khazing cawsaa a cuopa zaw ta ma cupa ru cuota aamahkhan tana a cuo.
49001015	Abyipa Zingsuv nama zangna hne mingpathepa tie cunglie nama hnyipa duena kha i thyi tli.
49001016	Canakaw cata i thlaachuona lie niema kha caa thyi pari yi ang te palungtluona bie kha i hluo pari.
49001017	Ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih a Khazing, rungnaana Paa ta niema kha ama nama pachang na riypata singna thlaapa hne biephu a ca pi riy'apa yi ta thlaa ica chuopa yi.
49001018	Cahaa cata nama pachangna pathiypalung a pahaw sala, Abyipa ta a tuepa a lepa a rungnaana kha pachang pata, Abyipa ta aca u hnuochuonapa yi a nguopuona hne mingpathepa tie ta ama hmung riypa ru hing khatluv tama a rungnaa tapa kha pachang'a ung cate,
49001019	kiema ama a zangtuv zaw cuota a cahrana hing khatluv tama a le tapa zaw kha nama pachang riypata thlaa i chuo.
49001020	Khazing ta Zingsuv kha pathu te vuoruo lie ama cacuo luo kuo ta a patu khu taata capa rehrie khuna cahrana ca a pi.
49001021	Khrih ca uvtuv bangkhuo hne nawhnyina bangkhuo hne cahrana bangkhuo hne abyi bangkhuo cunglie kha chi te, ata chuo lie dyi cuo li pata hmie luo chuo lie zaw ku pata a cuo riypa ming zawdya cunglie ming sungcepa kha a pi.
49001022	Khazing ta hmangting bangkhuo Khrih phyipazaa rawlie chi te, hmangting bangkhuo cunglie Abyi tana a cuo ta te Khrihsaabuv luv ta a chi.
49001023	Khrihsaabuv ca Khrih pangpa ta cuote, hmangting bangkhuo a patling sana ama tlingna tana a cuo.
49002001	Niema ca nama pha li nakaw hne nama sue nakawta thlaapa luota thiyna chunglie nama za aw.
49002002	Chuelyi phungluo pha lipa kha cuose, alyi hne avuo a lala thliy chunglie cahrana a hnyipa uvtuv kha cuose, ri a ngie lipa tie hrawlie re a hrie nguoluopa thlaapa kha cuose nama za ziy.
49002003	Kiema bangkhuo zaw hing iema hrawlie kha saapa khingna ziypa ta za aw pate, iema zaw bangkhuo haakhata Khazing hihaana a ang riypatana ma za cuo.
49002004	Cuorasala, nangduena ta a bipa Khazing ta, a lesapa kiema malie a duenapa khata
49002005	ma pha lina kawlieta a thiy tlipa kiema kha Khrih hneta malie a pahring sa pakhaa. Khazing vihnyina thueta khuopa tana nama cuo.
49002006	Khrih Zingsuv hneta malie pathu pakhaa te ama hne vuoruo lie byi cuo hne riypata malie a patu hne.
49002007	Cahaa cata Khrih Zingsuv thueta kiema malie a duena hne a vihnyina ca khatluv tama a le tapa kha a vaw riypa chuo lie zaw pahmung sa a khing.
49002008	Tahematapakieca niema ca vihnyina thueta zangna ta khuopa tana nama cuo. Niema nama tuena thueta cuo vyi; Khazing lasaw tana a cuo.
49002009	Hriena thueta a cuo li nakawta ahunghmuo a pale kha se.
49002010	Tahematapakieca kiema ca Khrih Zingsuv thueta re phapa hrie riypata sapa tana ma cuo. Cahaapa hringzya hnyi riypa cata Khazing ta a pare paciepa tana ma cuo.
49002011	Niema ca a hluo taca saapa cuona ta Jentail ming za cuo ung cate, saapa lie cawsaapa kuv ta vangdaw a tepa tie ta vangdaw a te lipa aca za tapa yi kha maw kha ung.
49002012	Capa ning ca Khrih hne a patuvna za hnyi lipa ung cata, khyche za cuo ung cate, Israel mingphang chunglie zaa te ra va ungciy. Khazing pipa biekuona hne zaa hla ung cate hing chuelyi lie hing a nguopuona hnyi li pata hne Khazing hnyi li pata nama za aw.
49002013	Cuorasala hluo ningta luohlaapuv luo zaa aw tawpa niema ca Khrih thiyse thueta a ngieta luo kupa nama cuo tli.
49002014	Tahematapakieca ama ca kiema ma diena ta cuote, Judah ming hne Jentail ming kha ama pangpa hrahring ta pangkha ta a pacuo sa yi. Iema a chetuv yi lungruetlepie, amaa lala lie a awpa huena kha a pacing.
49002015	Ama ta phungbie kha a nawbie hne a phungluo bangkhuo hne khata para te, mingphang phanghning kha ama thueta mingphang thaapa phangkha ta sa yite diena a tue.
49002016	Vieluo cunglie a thiyna thue khata amaa cariena kha pachuo sa te, ama phuvhning khata Khazing'a luo pangkha cuo riypata a vya chiy yite a pare yi.
49002017	Cacuonakawta, ama ca a vaw te niema luohlaa luo a awpa tie hne luongie lie a awpa tie'a lie kha diena thuophaa ca a u khyi.
49002018	Cacuonakaw, Khrih thueta ima phuvhning hingta Thlaapa pakha chunglie a taw pate Paa hmiekung luo ma chiy.
49002019	Cahaa cata niema ca khyche hne ruohrang ming cuo va tli ungciy, mingpathepa tie hne khata ruokha cawsaa cuo tli ung cate Khazing chungkhue cawsaa zaw tana nama cuo.
49002020	Lucuotuv tie hne profet tie bang ciepa inghruo lie sapatuepa cuo ung cate ingkiy tung ca Khrih Zingsuv ama hrahring khatana a cuo.
49002021	Ingkha bangpa khata Khrih chunglie ca a patue diy te, Abyipa thueta a pathepa biena-ing ta a li te a lethaw.
49002022	Ama hne namaa pazuena thueta niema zaw hing Khazing awna ing cuo riypata thlaapa ta sapakhawpa nama cuo.
49003001	Cata a cuo nakawtana kama Paul ca niema Jentail ming cuota Khrih Zingsuv ming ta thaw a tlapa i cuo.
49003002	Khazing ta niema cuota hingpa re hrie riypa hing a vihnyina thueta ina pipa tana a cuo tapa kha nama pachang diy thluo tli aa.
49003003	Khazing ta tuokhaatama biephu hmuo pata a bieparuv kha ina pachang sa tapa a cunglie a cawta i cape mangtli.
49003004	Capa i capepa ca nama ri kieca Khrih bieparuv i pachangna kaw kha nama pachang aa.
49003005	Ahluo ta ca hing bieparuv hing cawsaa kha za pachang sa vayi. Cuorasala ata hing ca a pathepa ama lucuotuv tie hne profet tie'a lie kha Thlaapa ta a phu mangtli.
49003006	Capa bieparuv ca: Thuophaabie thueta Jentail ming ca Judah ming hneta ru a cu hnepa, pangkha chunglie chebuo, hne Khrih Zingsuv thueta tuepa biekuona thluechiy a hmung ra riypatana ama cuo.
49003007	Thuophaabie rehrietuv i cuopa ca Khazing vihnyina lasaw cuote, Khazing ta a cahrana ta a hriepa re lie hing vihnyina ta ina pipa tana a cuo.
49003008	Kama ca mingpathepa tie hrawlie a cawcepa laata a caw viepa i cuo raalaa pata Khrih hnyirungna a chuo khu lipa thuophaabie ca Jentail ming'a luo ri riypata vihnyina ta ina pi.
49003009	Hmangting a satuv Khazing chunglie chuo hluvpuv za nupa bieparuv kha cawsaa bangkhuo pahmung sa riypata a cuo.
49003010	Cata a tuepa ca vuoruo lie a awpa uvtuv tie hne nawhnyituv tie ta Khazing singna phangting zawdya kha Khrihsaabuv thueta ama vya pachangna riypata a cuo.
49003011	Capaca, chuozaa ta a zaa tingpa haakhata Khazing ta ima Byipaapa Khrih Zingsuv thueta a patlingsapa tana a cuo.
49003012	Ama thue hne ama ma zangna thueta Khazing'a luo kha riephasapa hne a nguosa pata a ngie khuna ma hnyi.
49003013	Cacuonakawta niema cuota i angpa ruvnaana nakaw hingta nama palung chuo kha se tapata thlaa i chuo; niema cuota phana selaw tana a cuo.
49003014	Hingpa kawlie hingta ma Paa hmielie pakhuv pane pata thlaa i chuo.
49003015	Ama ca vuoruo hne alyi lie a awpa ingchungkhue bangkhuo ta ama ming ama lanapa hruo tana a cuo.
49003016	Abyipa ca rungnaa lesyina hne a bipa haata, nama chung luo cawsaa cuona kha a Thlaapa ta thaazuo aca pi riypa yita thlaa i chuo.
49003017	Niema ca duena chunglie ta a hruo thlapa hne bangpa nama cuopa haata nama zangna thueta Khrih ca nama pathiypalung lie aw mangsue.
49003018	Mingpathepa tie hne khata Khrih duena a ku zya hne a syi zya, aa suo zya hne aa thuv zya pachang khunapa nama hnyi riypata thlaa i chuo.
49003019	Cakhutaata pachangna laata a tling viepa Khrih duena kha pachang'a ung cate Khazing tluotlingna hneta nama bi riypata thlaa i chuo.
49003020	Ma chunglie a cahrana ta re a hrietuv taca maa hie thepa hne ma rue thepa laata hmuo ale ta hmang a tue khu.
49003021	Khazing ca khrihsaabuv chunglie, Khrih Zingsuv thueta chuozaa taa chuozaa te a ming rungnaa pata aw mangsue. Amen.
49004001	Cacuonakawta, Abyipa rehriena kawlie thaw a tlapa kama ta, Khazing ta aca una yi hne aa phuvpa hringzya kha hnyi tie ung tapata paa ica kie yi.
49004002	Rawcanawna hne palungnena hne palungsyina ta pakha hne pakha kha duena chunglie ta a ngiethe tie ung.
49004003	Diena chunglie sawpakhawpa thlaapa chunglie pangkha cuona kha nama pahmang khuna riypata nama cuo khuna chung ta a zue tie ung.
49004004	Niema ca aca ku tiy yi ta a ruechuona suokha chung luo kha kupa nama cuopa haata, pangpa suokha dyi aw te Thlaapa suokha dyina a aw.
49004005	Abyi pakha, zangna suokha, tiynawna suokha dyina a aw.
49004006	Khazing pakha dyi aw te cawsaa bangkhuo Paa, hmangting bangkhuo cunglie Byi, hmangting bangkhuo chunglie rehrie te hmangting bangkhuo chunglie a awpa tana a cuo.
49004007	Cuorasala kiema pakha cyicuo hing Khrih ta malie a pipa lasaw zi haakhata vihnyina pipa tana ma cuo.
49004008	Cacuonakawta, Caapathepa ta, “Abyipa ca a suona luo kha a kie tiyta patuvpa sii a hluvsa kha kiekhyi yite; A cawsaa kha lasaw a pi yi,” a ta.
49004009	(“A suo luo kie te,” a ta tiyta, a ri khingpa khaapatama a cuo? Abyipa ca aa nepa alyi luo na a za cung tanapa ta cuo vama?
49004010	A raw luo zaa cungpa khana hmangting bangkhuo patling sa diy riypata avuo laata a suo viena luo kha a kie.)
49004011	Abyipa ta malie a pipa lasaw ca: chekha kha lucuotuv, chekha kha profet, chekha kha thuophaabie phutuv, chekha kha pastor hne chekha kha saya ta cuote,
49004012	mingpathepa tie ta Khazing re kha hrie the'a yite Khrih pangpa kha ama sathaw na riypata a cuo.
49004013	Caca zangna hne Khazing Saacapaa pachangna lie kha suvkha ta a tawpakhaw diy pata Khrih a cuona zaa khata a puvtlingpa ma cuo na riypata a cuo.
49004014	Kiema ca a zyatepa tie dungna hne pacuvna, tiylaw hne thliychie haata a tapa chunglie duvkhing ta pazu bungthawpa, haatiyta haata cuo kha ungsiy.
49004015	Cuorasala, biehmisipa kha duena ta ri ung sala, ma luv ta a cuopa Khrih chunglie kha a kuoting ta lethaw ungsiy.
