49004016	Luv a cuopa Khrih rawlie ca pangpa chebuo bangkhuo ca thariytha-uo hne cakhiycabuo bangkhuo khata aa rawsa pata pazue diy yite pangkha ta ama cuo. Pangpa chebuo bangkhuo ta iema hrie riypa re kha a phasa pata ama hrie tiyta pangpa suokha yalya khata duena chunglie a lethaw.
49004017	Abyipa ming ta a cusa pata bie ica cung yi: Zanglituv tie ama awpa haata nama aw riypa cuo va tli. Iema ruenapa ca a hripa tana a cuo.
49004018	Ama pathiypalung kha a zing. Ama pachang li nakaw hne ama palung a cuo tuv nakawta Khazing pipa hringna taakhata amaa hla.
49004019	Nangzaa pachang li pata hne a cadangna hne a angna hnyi nguocuo li pata, mang a ngie lipa suena phangting kha ama tue.
49004020	Khrih phungluo namaa cuvpa ca cahaa cata cuo vyi.
49004021	Zingsuv chunglie a awpa biehmisipa haakhata, pacuvpa cuo ung cate a kaw kha nama thyi hmisi mangtli.
49004022	Hietliena ta dung te a parapa nama hringna hlungpa kha thuse riypata pacuvpa tana nama cuo.
49004023	Nama pathiypalung hne nama ruena lie kha sathaapa nama cuo riypatana a cuo.
49004024	A hmisipa a dangna hne pathena lie Khazing hmingsuo a lu pata sapa hringna thaa kha a hryi tie ung.
49004025	Cacuonakawta, hanghiena bie ri kha tie ung. Ma ingpaa tie kha biehmisipa chang kaluo ungsiy. Tahematapakieca chungkhue cawsaa tana ma cuo ung.
49004026	Na hi hmuo haa ra sala sue tuena te ta cuo kha se. Na hihaa cangta ning patla sa kha.
49004027	Setaa kha cuo pi kha.
49004028	A paruvthepa ta paruv kha tie se. Riethyivuosuopa tie zaw a bya khu riypata ama kuv hrahring ta a dangna hne re hrie yi sala viehlue hriy yi se.
49004029	Nama pakaa taata biechiepa pya kha se. Cuorasala a thyipa tie kha thlahnena a pi riypa hne amaa huna lie a sathawpa a cuo riypata biephapa dyi kha ri tie ung.
49004030	Khuona ning thue cuota nama caakhena ta a cuopa Khazing Thlaapa Pathe kha a ngie pachi kha ung.
49004031	Huena, hihaana, bie a ina, bie a pachiena hne pathiypalung pha lipa bangkhuo kha thaw diy tie ung.
49004032	Zingsuv thueta Khazing ta acaa ngiethe pahaa yi khata nangnena hnyi ungla pakha hne pakha kha a due ungla a ngiethe tie ung.
49005001	Cacuonakawta, Khazing ta a duepa saata zaw nama cuo pahaata, ama haata hring riypa kha a zue tie ung.
49005002	Khrih ta malie a due nakawta rangpa-uepa hriykhung a rina ta Khazing'a luo aa pipa haata duena chunglie hring tie ung.
49005003	Niema ca Khazing mingpathepa nama cuopa haata, nama hrawlie kha aparuvsuena kaw, a pathe lipa hmangting kaw, karuo-awna kaw tapa zaw ca a ri hmuo ri kha ung,
49005004	Bie pyalyipa, biechiepa hne chiephu bie zaw ca nama ri riypa hehmuo cuo vyi; capa zaw ri cuopa cata Khazing kha pathuosa tie ung.
49005005	Aparuvsuena a tuepa, mang a ngie li pata a hringpa hne a karuo-awpa tie (karuo-awna ca kuvtuezuv biepa hne tana aa lu) ca Khrih hne Khazing pena lie ru cu riypa khaahmuo hnyi'a vayi tapa kha nama pachang.
49005006	Ahungtahmuo siyluo a hnyi lipa bie ta ca dung kha yi se. Hingpa zaw kawlie hingtana Khazing hihaana ca ri a ngie lipa tie cunglie a tlung.
49005007	Cacuonakawta iema kha a khe kha ung.
49005008	Ahluo taca zingna za cuo ung cate, cuorasala ata hing ca Abyipa thueta khena tana nama cuo. Khena saa haakhata hring tie ung.
49005009	Tahematapakieca, khena thyipaa ca phana, adangna hne a hmisipa lie tana hmung pata a cuo.
49005010	Abyipa palung a patluopa hmang kha tue a zue tie ung.
49005011	Hmangpha a chiykhyi lipa zingna hmang tuena lie kha aw ra kha ung, a phu tuv khata phu hriy tie ung.
49005012	Tahematapakieca cahaapaapa cawsaa zaw ta a paruvta ta ama tuepa hmang ca a ri ta ri riypa khiy tahmuo nangzaa na a chiy.
49005013	Cuorasala khena ta a paluosapa bangkhuo ca hmung khupa ta vya cuo yite,
49005014	hmung khupa ta a vya cuopa bangkhuo ca khena ta ama cuo. Cacuonakawta, Caapathepa ta, “Aa hmung nguoluopa, kya thu tie! Thiyna taata kya thu la, Cakhutaata, Khrih ca na cunglie a khe aa,” a ta.
49005015	A ngaapa haata cuo li pata a singpa haata tuokhaatama ma hring aa tapa kha a raaring pata aw tie ung.
49005016	Ma ningkhue hing cuochieningchiepa a cuo nakawta nama hnyipa cuo kha a phace pata hmuo a zue tie ung.
49005017	Cacuonakaw a ngaapa cuo kha ung, cuorasala Abyipa khingna hing khaapama a cuo tapa kha pachang a zue tie ung.
49005018	Sahmaa pariy kha ung, tahematapakieca anuopaluena tana a cuo. Cuorasala Thlaapa ta bi tie ung.
49005019	Saam hlaa, khrihsaa hlaa hne pathuosana hlaa kha niema hrawlie nama sapa haata, Abyipa kha hlaa ue puvthepa ta nama pathiypalung hmisi ta pathuosa tie ung.
49005020	Hmangting kawlieta Paa Khazing kha ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih ming ta cipari pathuosa tie ung.
49005021	Khrih nama pa-uvsathyina ta pakha hne pakha kha nama ri a ngie tie ung.
49005022	Napuvnung zaw Abyipa ri namaa ngiepa haata nama navaapa ri kha a ngie tie ung.
49005023	Khrih ca khrihsaabuv luv a cuopa haata, navaapa ca napuvnung luv tana a cuo. Khrih ca khrihsaabuv khuotuv cuote khrihsaabuv ca a pangpa ta a cuo.
49005024	Khrihsaabuv ta Khrih ri kha a ngiepa haata napuvnung zaw ta hmangting kawlie kha navaapa ri a ngie riypatana a cuo.
49005025	Navaapa zaw, Khrih ta khrihsaa-buv kha due te a hringna a pipa haata nama napuvnung kha due tie ung.
49005026	Hinghaahingta a tuepa ca khrihsaabuv hing Abyipa bie ta tiy chunglie pasiy pata a pathe sapa tana a cuo.
49005027	Cahaa cata khrihsaabuv ca apya-alyipa aw li, ahlaw-akaapa aw li, athli-abiyna aw li, a pathepa hne risie riy aw li pata rungnaana chunglie a kuv luo pi riypa a khing nakawta a cuo.
49005028	Cahaa cata navaapa ta ama pangpa aa duepa haata napuvnung kha a due riypatana a cuo.
49005029	Ahungtahmuo ama pangpa kha a hue buo vyi, cuorasala Khrih ta khrihsaabuv cunglie a tuepa haata a phasa pata a mangsang riypatana a cuo.
49005030	Tahematapakieca, kiema ca a pangpa chebuo tana ma cuo.
49005031	Cacuonakawta capaa ta a nung hne a paa kha thuse'a yite, a napuvnung hne khata a hlaw'a te, iema pahning ca pangkha ta ama cuo aa.
49005032	Hingpa hing a lesapa bieparuv cuote, kama ta Khrih hne khrihsaabuv khana a ri khing ica ta yi.
49005033	Cadyiseca, niema pakha cyicuo ta niema pangpa namaa duepa haakhata nama napuvnung kha due ungla, napuvnung zaw ta navaapa kha pa-uvsathyi tie ung.
49006001	Saata zaw Abyipa ming ta nama nung hne nama paa ri kha a ngie tie ung. Tahematapakieca hmang phapa tana a cuo.
49006002	“Na nung hne na paa kha pa-uvsathyi tie yi,” tapa ca nawbie taapa ta cuote,
49006003	biekuopuopa ca, “Na cuota pha'a te chuelyi lie na hring a pasiy aa,” tapata a cuo.
49006004	Paa zaw, nama saata zaw kha ama hihaa riypata tue kha ung, cuorasala Abyipa pasiypa-yana hne zyazaa haata palethaw sa tie ung.
49006005	Sii zaw, Khrih ri kha namaa ngie pahaata nama ziy tie kha ciyzaana hne pathiypalung hmisi ta ama ri a ngie tie ung.
49006006	Iema palung patluo riypata, aca hmungna lie dyi yi cuo li pata, Khrih sii nama cuona haakhata nama pathiypalung hmisi ta Khazing khingna kha tue tie ung.
49006007	Re nama hrie tiyta cawsaa huona ma hrie tapata rue li pata Abyipa huotana ma hrie tapata rue ungla thaathusa pata hrie tie ung.
49006008	Sii ta ma cuo zaw, hyazangpa ma cuo zaw, ma tuepa phana hne aa lupa lawmuo na ma hmung aa tapa kha pachang tie ung.
49006009	Niema ziy tie zaw cahaa cata nama sii tie cunglie kha tue ra tie ung. Pachiypahuo kha ung, tahematapakieca, niema hne nama sii tie zaw vuoruo lie aa lupa Ziy pakha dyi nama hnyi pakha nama pachang, ama'a lieca pahlyipalena aw vyi.
49006010	A hnangcawce ta, Abyipa thueta hne a cahrana thaazuo thueta a cahra sa tie ung.
49006011	Setaa dungna kha namaa du khuna riypata Khazing rieduna cehre kha a tlingpa ta a hryi tie ung.
49006012	Tahematapakieca maa dupa carie hing cawsaapa cuo li pata, uvtuv tie, nawhnyituv tie, a zingpa chuelyi cahrana hne avuo lie a awpa thlaapa chiepa cahrana zaw ta ama cuo.
49006013	Cacuonakawta, ning pha lipa aa vaw tiyta namaa daapahrang khu riypa hne a tlungna te ta a cusa pata namaa daapahrang khuna riypata Khazing cehre kha a tlingpa ta a hryi tie ung.
49006014	Cacuonakawta, a daa ungla biehmisipa kha tesaw haata nama se lie a saw ungla, a dangna kha cacunghnaapakaw haata a hryi tie ung.
49006015	Nama phyipakaw cuota diena thuophaabie ri khingna thaathuna kha a pakaw tie ung.
49006016	Capa bangkhuo hne cata, zangna kha phya haata a cyi ungla, capa cata a pha lipapaa ta a vya kapa myi haata a iepa cuoti zaw kha nama pache khu aa.
49006017	Khuona kha thaalakhuv haata a khuv ungla Thlaapa zueziy ta a cuopa Khazing bie kha a cyi tie ung.
49006018	Thlaachuona hne ahiena kha Thlaapa luochiyna hneta cipari tue tie ung. A chuona te khata apahlu-apadasa pata aw ungla mingpathepa tie cuo khata palung pasiysa pata thlaa chuo tie ung.
49006019	Kama zaw bie i ri tiyta, thuophaabie pipa i cuo riypa hne thuophaabie bieparuv kha riephasa pata a pachang sa khutuv i cuo riypata thlaa na chuopa tie ung.
49006020	Capa repa catana luosituv ca cuo ang te thaw chunglie i aw. I ri riypata a cuopa haata riephasa pata i ri khuna riypata thlaa na chuopa tie ung.
49006021	Taikhikas ta niema kha aca chang diy'a nakaw yi ta tuokhaata aw ang te ma, khaapa hmang i tue nguoluo tapa kha nama pachang aa. Ama ca ma duepa hne Abyipa re lieta zangtluo aa tlapa ma uvnu tana a cuo.
49006022	Tuokhaatama ma aw tapa kha pachang sa riypa hne niema thaazuo pi riypa tingna cangta ivya pathliepa tana a cuo.
49006023	Paa Khazing hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih'a taata diena, zangna hne duena ca zangtuv nama bangkhuo cunglie aw mangsue.
49006024	Ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih kha a lang buo lipa duena ta a duepa nama bangkhuo cunglie Khazing vihnyina aw mangsue.
50001001	Khrih changtaapa ta a cuopa Paul hne Timote ta, Filipi khy lie a awpa Khrih Zingsuv chunglie mingpathepa tie bangkhuo hne, pastor tie hne khrihsaa uvthyi tie'a luo kha caa maca paphya yi.
50001002	Ma Paa Khazing hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca niema'a lie aw mangsue.
50001003	Icaa thyi kyry yi ta i Khazing'a luo kha alawna bie hluo ang te,
50001004	nama cuota thlaa i chuo kyry ta alawna hne i chuo taw.
50001005	Tahematapakieca thuophaabie i ri baataata ata ning tepa hingta inaa bya ungciy.
50001006	Nama hrawlie hingpa rephapa hrie a pathupa hingta, Zingsuv Khrih a vawna ning te ta, a patlung nate a hrie aa tapa kha i pachangpasie.
50001007	Niema bangkhuo kaw hinghaahingta i ruepa hing i cuota a pha, tahematapakieca nama palung lie na pari ung cate, i thawtlana lie hne thuophaabie a cusa pata i daakhyina kawlie nama bangkhuo ta Khazing vihnyina kha kama hne namaa hraw.
50001008	Tahematapakieca Khrih Zingsuv duena lieta niema kha khatluv tama ica vuo yi tapa kha naa pachang khyituv ca Khazing tana a cuo.
50001009	Namaa duena ca pachangna hne bie thleduo thena hneta bi pata a lethawna riypata thlaa i chuo.
50001010	Cahaa cata khaapa hingma a phace tapa kha a tlaw the'a ung cate Khrih a vawna ning te ta a pathepa hne syi riy a aw lipa nama cuo aa.
50001011	Khazing rungnaana hne pathuosana cuota Zingsuv Khrih'a taata a vawpa a dangna thyipaa hne khata bi tie ung.
50001012	Uvnu zaw i cunglie a tlungpa hmang hingta thuophaabie aa zena riy'a pata byatuv ama cuo zya kha ica pachang sa khing yi.
50001013	I thawtlapa hing Khrih cuota na a cuo tapa kha siepahruo ing a huopa bangkhuo hne cawsaa mekaa ta ama pachang.
50001014	I thawtlana hingta uvnu hne sieta hluv vie bangkhuo kha Abyipa ama nguona pacu sa vie yite, riepha viena hne ciyna aw li pata thuophaabie kha a pari sa nguo yi.
50001015	Chekha ta Khrih kaw kha hietliena hne azue-atiena pathiypalung hneta ama ri, cuorasala chekha ta ca a khingkhyina hneta ama ri.
50001016	Capa tie cata Khrih kaw kha duena hneta ama phu, tahematapakieca thuophaabie a daakhyi riypata hingpa hmang lie chipa i cuopa kha ama pachang nakawta a cuo.
50001017	Chekha taca Khrih kaw kha palung pathena hne cuo li pata iema phana cuo dyi ta ri yite, thaw i tlana lie hing ruvnaana ta tlungchiy hryly se tapa kha ama khing.
50001018	Khaapama a pyi aa? Aa hmuo lipa atingna hne a cuo zaw, aa hmuopa atingna hne a cuo zaw, tuokhahaata a cuo zaw Khrih kaw kha ama phu thluo kieca i palung a tluo.
50001019	A cuo, i palung a tluo pari thluo aa, tahematapakieca nama thlaa chuona thue hne Zingsuv Khrih Thlaapa a byana thueta capaca thaw taata hya i zangna riypatana a cuo aa tapa kha i pachang.
50001020	Tuokhaatahmuo cuo sala, nangzaa pata cuo'a va ang. Riephasa pata i ripa thue hingta, i thiy a cuozaw i hring a cuozaw, Khrih ca i pangpa lie za cyicalangpa a cuopa haakhata ata zaw hing cyicalangpa cuo sala tapa hing i khingpa hne i nguopuocepa a cuo.
50001021	Kama cuota ca hringna hing Khrih ta cuote thiyna zaw hing aa thung viena ta a cuo.
50001022	Saapa ta i hring kalie kieca, repha a hluv vie i hrie khuna ta a cuo aa; khaapa hingma i tlaw aa tapa pachang khu va ang.
50001023	I palung na kuo hning ta a vaa: Khing na i tlaw aa tapa kieca, thiypa ta Khrih hneta awpa a cuo, tahematapakieca caca a pha vie karaa pata a cuo.
50001024	Cuorasala saapa ta aw kalie riypa hing niema cuota aa hu viepa ta a cuo hyi.
50001025	Capaca a siesa pata i pachang nakawta, nama kiethaw riypa hne zangna lie nama palung a tluo the riypata niema bangkhuo hne hingta i hring kalie aa.
50001026	Cahaa cata niema'a luo i vya chiy pakhaa na thueta Khrih Zingsuv chunglie namaa lawna ca a le hryly aa.
50001027	Tuokhaa a cuo zaw, Khrih thuophaabie hne aa phuvpa hringna kha hnyi tie ung. Niema'a luo a vaw pata icaa taw khu kie yi a cuozaw, icaa taw khu li kie yi a cuozaw, palung a lusa pata a daapakhaw ung cate, thuophaabie zangna kawlie a daapakhaw pata rie a du pakhawpa kha i thyi khingpa ta a cuo.
50001028	Tuokhaatahmuo caa dutuv tie ta ca pachiy ca pahuo khu'a vayi. Capa cata iema cuota rana cuote niema cuota ca khuona a cuopa kha a paluo sa aa. Hingpa hing Khazing tuepa tana a cuo.
50001029	Tahematapakieca Khrih nama zangna lie dyi cuo li pata a cuota ruvnaana ang riypa zaw kha duena hneta cuophaa pipa nama cuo.
50001030	Abyipa cuota rie i dupa kha na za hmung ung cate ata tepa hingta i du pakha nama thyi. Niema zaw capa rie cana namaa du nguoluo ra.
50002001	Cakhutaata, Khrih chunglie nama hringna khata thaazuo ca pi yite, duena'a taata hnaanguona, Thlaapa chunglie a viesaana, kawpacuona hne ngie a china zaw kha niema'a lie a aw kieca:
50002002	ruena aa lupa hnyi ungla, aa due zaw a due kaluo ungla, palung a lusa pata i lawna kha napa ky tie ung.
50002003	Kiema kaw dyi a pacuona hne a mangkhangna ta khaapahmuo tue kha ung, cuorasala malie kha kama laata ama pha vie tapa rue ungla, rawcanawna hne aw tie ung.
50002004	Malie khingna kha hmung the a zue ungla niema khingna dyi kha rue kha ung.
50002005	Nama palung phya ca Khrih Zingsuv ta a za hnyipa palung phya kha cuose.
50002006	Ama ca Khazing cuona kha a hnyi raalaa pata, Khazing hne a pakhing riypa kha hruohra ta a chuv vyi.
50002007	Cuorasala a cuona kha thuse te, sii cuona kha a la pata, cawsaa hmingsuo haata a puv. Cawsaa cuona kha a la te,
50002008	rawcanawna hne a hring. Thiyna te ta ri a ngie te, vieluo cunglie kha a thiy.
50002009	Cacuonakaw Khazing ta a suopuv ta cyicalang te, ming zawdya hrawlie ta, aa cungnungcepa ming kha a pi.
50002010	Cacuonakawta vuoruo, chuelyi hne chuelyi rawlie a awpa bangkhuo ta, Zingsuv ming ta ama pakhuv pane'a yite,
50002011	Paa Khazing rungnaana cuota, Zingsuv ca Byi tana a cuo tapata, cawsaa zawdya ta ama pathuo sa aa.
50002012	Cacuonakawta, i duepa zaw, i ri inaa ngie paripa haa ung cata, i aw ning dyi cuo li pata, i aw li ning zaw, nama khuona cuo khata ciyna hne thlaazangna ta khuo vie ta hrie tie ung.
50002013	Tahematapakieca, Khazing ca ama palung a patlingpa re kha nama hrie khing riypa hne nama hrie khu riypata cahrana caa pipa yi tana a cuo.
50002014	Hmang bangkhuo kha a ciepuopa hne a hrupuo a ipuo pata hrie kha ung.
50002015	Cahaacatana niema ca a zyatepa hne a pha lipa chuo chung taahingta syi riy a aw lipa hne suena a hnyi lipa Khazing saata cuo'a ung cate chuelyi lie hing aasiy haata nama khe aa.
50002016	A cusa pata hringna bie namaa patuvna thue khata i hriepa bangkhuo kha a cakhawpa ta cuovyi tapa kha Khrih aa vaw tiyta i palesakhyi khu aa.
50002017	Cadyi cuo li pata zangna ta nama pipa, hriykhung namaa rinapa cunglie kha i thiyse hing bya pata a cuo zaw ma, niema bangkhuo hneta i palung a tluo hne aa.
50002018	Cahaa cata niema bangkhuo zaw kama hne nama palung tluo'a te namaa nuo riypa a cuo.
50002019	Niema thuohlaa thyi pata i thaa a pha the riypata a ru hluo ta niema'a luo Timote vya pathlie riypa kha Abyipa Zingsuv ming ta i nguopuo.
50002020	Ama haata niema phana cuota kawpacuona caa hnyi hmisi riy'apa yi ahunghmuo kama'a lie aw vayi.
50002021	A hrangpa bangkhuo ca Zingsuv Khrih khingna huv li pata iema khingna dyina ama huv.
50002022	Cuorasala Timote ca paa hne saa haata thuophaabie phuna re kha kama hne a hrie hnepa a cuopa ca pachang aa tlapa a cuo.
50002023	Cacuonakawta i kaw hing tuokhaatama a cuo tapa aa cie pahne ta niema'a luo vya pathlie'a ang te,
50002024	kama zaw ica vya tlaw patang'a yi tapata Abyipa ming ta i zang.
50002025	I huna lie a bya riypata nama vya pathliepa, i rehriehnepa hne i rieka piy ta a cuopa, Khazing rehrietuv i nuta Epafroditas hing niema'a luo i vya pathlie a hu tapata i rue.
50002026	Tahematapakieca niema bangkhuo kha aca vuosa yi, cakhutaata a pasana kaw kha nama thyi nakawta a palung pha the vyi.
50002027	A thiy'a nang nate ta a pasa hmisi. Cuorasala Khazing ta nangdue te, ama dyi cuo li pata kama hrahring zaw kha ngiechina suokha hnang suokha i taw li riypata nang ina due.
50002028	Cacuonakawta nama hmung pakhaa tiyta nama palung a nuo'a te, kama zaw i palung riethyina aa hy vie riypata ama kha i vya pathlie mala khingsa.
50002029	Ama kha alawna hne cuhluo tie ung. Ama haapa cawsaa kha pa-uvsathyi tie ung.
50002030	Tahematapakieca, Khrih re kawlie kha vuotaa a za thiy'a nang. Niema ta i cuota nama hrie khu li riypa re khana thiy zaw hring zaw tapata a hrie.
50003001	A chuona taca, uvnu hne sieta zaw, Abyipa'a lie kha a law tie ung. I cape ciepa niema'a luo vya cape pakhaa riypa hing a ngiering va ang. Niema cuota namaa bangsuna ta zaw a cuo.
50003002	Uv tie kha a raaring tie ung, a pha lipa hmang a tuetuv tie kha a raaring tie ung, vangdaw a te riypa kaw a ri byalyapa tie kha a raaring tie ung.
50003003	Tahematapakieca, Thlaapa ta Khazing a biepa tie, Khrih Zingsuv kha a palesakhyipa tie hne saapa a buchuo lipa tie kiema hingna vangdaw a tepa ta a cuo puv.
50003004	Cuorasala, kama zaw hing saapa hmang a buchuona kaw ripa kieca, a buchuo riy a hnyipapaa tana i cuo. Pakhakha ta saapa hmang a buchuo riypa a hnyi kieca, kama na a hluv vie a hnyi ang.
50003005	Ning cari a tapata vangdaw tepa, Israel cawsaa, Benjamin mingphang, Hebru nungpaa ta sapa Hebru a thliepa; phungbie luota ripa kie Farasi;
50003006	Judah phung i daakhyi tuv nakawta khrihsaabuv hrisaathieruetuv; phungbie thueta adangna luo kiezawma syi riy a aw lipapaa ta i cuo.
50003007	Cuorasala i cuota athungna ta i za ruepa hingpa hmang bangkhuo hing ata hing ca Khrih thueta asungna tana i rue diy tli.
50003008	Cadyi ca cuo vyi, hmangting zawdya laata a sungnaa viepa i Byipaapa Khrih Zingsuv i pachangnapa thue hingta hmangting bangkhuo kha a sungkaruepa tana i rue. Ama nakawta hmangting zawdya kha i thaw diy, Khrih i cu thena riypata ca khapa zaw khaca hnehnaw haatana i rue.
50003009	Phungbie taata a vawpa kama adangna kha cuo li pata, Khrih zangna thueta a vawpa adangna, Khazing'a taata a zuvpa zangna lie hruo a bangpa a dangna khana Ama hneta maa pazue thena riypata a cuo.
50003010	Ama thiyna lie thiy ra pata, a thupakhaanapa cahrana hne a te-angna a hraw pata Khrih pachang kha i khing.
50003011	Cahaa cata kiedyina thiyna taata pathu pakhaapa i cuo aa.
50003012	Hingpa hmang hing i hmung tli tana cuo li pata, i tingna luo na i pha tli tana zaw cuo vyi. Cuorasala Khrih Zingsuv ta a huopa ta ina tue tli nakawta capa hmang ca i huopa a cuo khu riypata i ruo nguoluo.
50003013	I duepa zaw, capa hmang ca i huopa ta a cuo tli tapata rue va ang; cuorasala i tuepa hmang suokha ca: hnang luota a awpa hmang kha maw ang te hmie luota a awpa hmang kha pha i zue.
50003014	Cacuonakawta, Khrih Zingsuv thueta vuoruo taata Khazing kuna lawmuo kha hmung riypata kawtung luo kha i ruo.
50003015	Kiema, ruena a ky tlipa tie taca cahaapa palungphya kha hnyi ungsiy. Ruena phanghrang ta a hnyipa nama aw kieca Khazing ta capa zaw ca niema'a lie a paluo sa aa.
50003016	Ata ning te ta ima ziypa phungluo hing ziy thluo ungsiy.
50003017	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, kama hringzya hing naa mangpuo tie ung. Kiema hrawlie nama hmungpa mangpuo tluo aa tlapa tie haata a hringpa tie kha a mangpuo tie ung.
50003018	Tahematapakieca, yi hluvpuv ica chang tli pahaayita ata zaw hing mingthliy hneta ica chang pakhaa yi; cawsaa hluvpuv ca Khrih vieluo kha a cariepa tana ama hring.
50003019	Iema chuona ca rana ta cuote, ama khazing ca ama riy ama vaw khata a cuo; ama rungnaana ca ama nangzaana khata cuote, ama pathiypalung ca chuelyi hmang lie dyi khana ama chi.
50003020	Cuorasala kiema ca vuoruo ming cuo pate maa khuotuv Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih vuoruo taata a zuv riypa kha a ngietie va puv.
50003021	Hmangting zawdya kha ama uvna raw luo a vya chi khupa a cahrana ta a thaanepa ma pangpa kha a rungnaapa ama pangpa haakhata malie a thle aa.
50004001	Cacuonakawta, i duesapa hne i vuosapa, i palungtluona hne i byilakhuv ta a cuopa uvnu hne sieta zaw, cahaa cata Abyipa chunglie kha a cusa pata a daa mya ung, i duepa zaw.
50004002	Euodia hne Sintikhe, icaa nue yi, Abyipa chunglie nama palung a palu tie ung.
50004003	Zangtluo aa tlapa i rehriehne, hingpa canung tie hing zaa bya thi yi la tapata paa ica kie. Tahematapakieca, iema ca Klement hne, hringna caa-uv chunglie ming capepa a hrangpa i rehriehne tie hne khata thuophaabie phuna re kha kama hne a hrie hnepa tana ama cuo.
50004004	Abyipa chunglie kha nama palung tluo pari se; i ri canyi aa, nama palung tluo se.
50004005	Nama nangnena kha cawsaa bangkhuo ta pachang yi se. Abyipa ca a vaw patang aa.
50004006	Khaapa kawlie hmuo nama palung rie thyi kha se. Cuorasala, hmangting kawlie kha thlaachuona, ryiphaacyina hne palungtluona hluona ta nama khingpa kha Khazing ca pachang sa tie ung.
50004007	Cacuonakawta cawsaa pachangna ta a pha khu lipa Khazing diena ta nama pathiypalung hne nama ruena kha Khrih Zingsuv chunglie aa bangta tah a chi aa.
50004008	A hnangcawce ta, i duepa zaw, aa hmuopa, pathuosa tluo aa tlapa, aa dangpa, a pathepa, palungtluo aa chiypa, khing aa chiypa, a phacepa hne pathuosa aa phuvpa suokhakha a aw kieca, capa kaw ca nama palung lie pari ung.
50004009	Kama'a taata namaa cuvpa, nama cuhluopa, nama thyipa hne nama hmungpa tie kha tue a zue tie ung. Diena Khazing ca niema'a lie aw mangsue.
50004010	Kaw ina pacuonapa ung cakha cuo syipuv khu taata nama paluo sa pakhaa nakawta Abyipa'a lie khuopuv ta i law. Hmisi ta kieca i cuo ina ruesa ungciy, cuorasala paluosana cuo za hnyi va ungciy.
50004011	I hubunapa kha i paluo sa khing pata cuo vyi; tahematapakieca i hnyi thathiypa lie palung tling pata aw kha i the tli.
50004012	Phahlavuosuo pata awpa hing khaapama a lu tapa pachang ang te, a hlyikhung ta hnyipa hing khaapama a lu tapa i pachang. I riy a bi ning cuose, i nang a diy ning cuose, a hluvpuv i hnyi ning cuose, i phahla ning cuose cuona a phangphang lie kha hringzya i the tli.
50004013	Thaa naa patlungtuv Khrih thueta hmangting bangkhuo kha i tue khu.
50004014	Tuokhaa a cuozaw, i palung riethyi ningta inaa bya nakaw ung cata icaa law yi.
50004015	Niema Filipi khyming ta nama pachang thluo kha, thuophaabie i za ri thaa ning, Masidonia ruo luo i si ning kha niema ri li pata khaapa khrihsaabuv tahmuo pihluona hne cuhluona re lieta kama hne a zaa hrawpa aw vayi.
50004016	Tahematapakieca, Thesalonika khy lie i aw ning kha a bya i huna lieta yikha laata a hluv vie inaa bya ungciy.
50004017	Nama lasaw hmung i khingpa dyi cuo vyi, nama cazing lie amie a pahlaw chiy vie se tapa khana i khing.
50004018	I hupa laata a hluv vie tana ina pi ungciy. Ata lie Epafroditas taata ina vya paphyapa ungciy nama lasaw, rang pa-uepa, cuhluo aa tlapa hriykhung a rina hne Khazing palung a patluopa cunglie hing i palung a tling hringhruo.
50004019	Cakhutaata, i Khazing ta Khrih Zingsuv chunglie hne a rungnaana chunglie a hnyirungna ta nama phahlana lie kha nama palung ca patling yi se.
50004020	Ima Paa Khazing ca chuozaa ta pathuosa pata cuo mangsue. Amen.
50004021	Khrih Zingsuv chunglie ming-pathepa bangkhuo kha nama kuv ica patuv yi. Kama hne a awpa i viesaa tie zaw ta nama kuv aca patuv yi.
50004022	Mingpathepa tie bangkhuo, a hlyi ta siepahruo ingchungkhue tie ta nama kuv aca patuv yi.
50004023	Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina ca nama cunglie aw mangsue.
51001001	Khazing khingna thueta Khrih Zingsuv lucuotuv ta a cuopa kama Paul hne ma uvnupa Timote ta
51001002	Kolose khy lie a awpa, mingpathepa tie hne Khrih chunglie uvnu hne sieta zaw'a luo kha caa maca paphya yi. Ma paa Khazing'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca nama cunglie aw mangsue.
51001003	Niema cuota thlaa ma chuo mekaa ta ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih a Paa Khazing ming kha ma pathuo sa.
51001004	Tahematapakieca Khrih Zingsuv nama zangna hne mingpathepa tie bangkhuo nama duena kaw kha ma thyi tli.
51001005	Caca nama cuota vuoruo lie chi ciepa a nguopuona, biehmisipa, thuophaabie chunglie nama za thyi ciepa thue khatana a cuo.
51001006	Capa thuophaabie ca chuelyi khyzaa lie kha a thyi pathyi te a lethaw pahaata niema'a lie zaw kha Khazing vihnyina hmisipa nama pachang ning taakhata thyi a pathyi ra tli.
51001007	Caca ma duepa, ma rehriehne changtaapa ta a cuopa Epafras taata nama thyi pata a cuo. Ama ca niema cuota zangtluo aa tlapa Khrih rehrietuv tana a cuo.
51001008	Ama ta Thlaapa ta aca pipa yi duena nama hnyina kaw kha malie a chang.
51001009	Cacuonakawta, hingpa kaw ma thyining taata a pathu pata niema ca thlaapa hne a patuvpa singna hne pachangna hnyi pata Khazing khingna pachangna hne nama bi riypata ci li ta thlaa maca chuopa pari yi.
51001010	Cahaa cata niema ca hmangpha tuena lie kha thyipaa pha hnyi'a ung cate, Khazing pachangna lie kha nama lethaw pahaata, Khazing palung kha patluo'a ung cate, Abyipa hne aa phuvpa hringna kha nama hnyi aa.
51001011	Hmangting bangkhuo kha palungpasiyna hne nama ang khu riypata a rungnaapa ama thaazuo ta ca cahra sa yi se. Hmangting bangkhuo kha palungpasiyna hneta a ang khupa nama cuo riypata ca pacung ca pare ku yi se.
51001012	Khena chunglie mingpathepa tie ru caa pahraw sa ratuv yi ma Paa ca alawna hne pathuosa tie ung.
51001013	Zingna cahrana chung taakhata malie thue te a duepa a Saacapaa pena chung luo kha malie aa ngiekhyi.
51001014	Ama thueta a thlapa cuo pate sue a ngiethe pata ma cuo.
51001015	Khrih ca hmung khu lipa Khazing hminghmie ta cuote sapa hmang bangkhuo hrawlie sa-uvthyi ta a cuo.
51001016	Tahematapakieca vuoruo hne alyi lie a awpa hmang bangkhuo hing ama thueta sapa cuote, hmung khupa hne hmung khu lipa hmang bangkhuo, siepahruo uvna thude, uvpa ruo hne uvtuv tie, cahrana bangkhuo hne hmangting bangkhuo hing ama thueta hne ama huota sapa tana ama cuo.
51001017	Ama ca hmangting bangkhuo hluo ta za aw tli te, hmangting bangkhuo ca ama chunglie amaa sawpakhaw diy.
51001018	Ama ca a pangpa ta a cuopa Khrihsaabuv a luv ta cuote; a hruothuna, a thiypa tie chung taata pathu pakhaapa sa-uvthyi ta a cuo. Cahaa cata a cuopa ca hmangting bangkhuo hrawlie pakhana a cuo parina riypata a cuo.
51001019	Tahematapakieca ama chunglie Khazing cuona a tlingpa bangkhuo a aw riypa kha palung tluo pata cuote,
51001020	vieluo lie thiyse thueta a tuepa diena hne ama thueta, Khazing ta, alyi lie a cuo li kie vuoruo lie a awpa hmangting bangkhuo hne a rena tue riypa kha a palung a tluo.
51001021	Niema ca a hluo taca Khazing hne zaa hlapa, huena pathiypalung zaa hnyipa hne hmang pha lipa zaa tuepa tana nama cuo.
51001022	Cuorasala, ata hing ca Khrih a saapa pangpa thiyna ta niema kha caa re yite, a pathepa, syi riy a aw lipa hne suena hnyi li pata Khazing hmie luo chiykhyi a caa ting yi.
51001023	Namaa daana hmang ciepa, nama zangna lie kha a cusa pata a daa tie ung. Nama thyi ciepa thuophaabie thueta namaa nguopuopa biekuona taakhata a palaw kha ung. Caca avuo rawlie sapa bangkhuo'a luo phupa thuophaabie ta cuote, kama Paul hing capa thuophaabie sii catana i cuo.
51001024	Niema cuota i te-angna kawlie hingta i palung a tluo. Tahema-tapakieca i saapa te-angna hingta Khrih ta a pangpa ta a cuopa khrihsaabuv cuota a te-angna kha i patling sa ra pata a cuo.
51001025	Khazing bie kha tluotlingsa pata nama pachang na riypata, kama ca, Khazing ta niema cuo khata khrihsaabuv changtaapa ta ina tue tli.
51001026	Capa bie ca chuo bangkhuo lieta za nupa bieparuv cuote, cuorasala ata hing ca a mingpathepa tie'a luo kha phupa ta a cuo.
51001027	Ca mingpathepa tie ca, nupa bieparuv rungnaana hne hnyirungna ca Jentail ming hrawlie khatluv tama a le tapa kha pachang sa riypata Khazing ta a tlawpa tana ama cuo. Ca bieparuv ca a rungnaapa namaa nguopuona ta a cuopa, nama chunglie a awpa Khrih khatana a cuo.
51001028	Cawsaa bangkhuo kha Khrih chunglie a tlingpa hringna hneta Khazing hmie luo ma chiykhyi khuna riypata Khrih kaw ca phu pate singna ma hnyipa bangkhuo hmuo pata cawsaa bangkhuo kha a raaringna pi yi pate ma pacuv yi.
51001029	Hingpa hmang a cuo khuna riypa hingta ama ta ina pipa i chunglie a awpa cahrana hmuo pata khuopuv ta a zue ang te i hrie.
51002001	Niema cuota cuose, Laodisia lie a awpa tie cuota cuose, i pangpa ta naa hmung lipa bangkhuo cuota khatluv tama i zue law tapa kha ica pachang sa khing yi.
51002002	Kama i tingpa ca iema ta Khazing bieparuv Zingsuv kha ama pachang khu the riypa hne pachangna hmisi taata a pyapa hnaanguona kha hnyi yi sala pathiypalung cahra sapa hne duena lieta pangkha a cuopa ama cuo riypa khatana a cuo.
51002003	Khrih ca Khazing singna hne pachangna a sungnaapa suethiy a nunapa tana a cuo.
51002004	Ahungtahmuo niema kha biephapa a lu raalaa pata a hmuo lipa bie a ina ta ca dung kha yi se.
51002005	I pangpa ta niema'a lie i aw li raalaa pata thlaapa ta niema'a lie i aw. Palung cahrasa pata hne Khrih zangna chunglie a cusa pata namaa daapa kha hmung ang te i palung a tluo.
51002006	Cacuonakawta Abyipa Khrih Zingsuv kha nama za cuhluo pahaata ama chunglie kha hring patlung tie ung.
51002007	Ama chunglie kha zangna ta hruo bang pata a sathaw tie ung. Aca za pacuv tlipa haa yi khata alawna bie kha hluo pari tie ung.
51002008	Khrih'a taata cuo li pata, cawsaapa phungluo hne hing chuelyi phung taata a cuopa muo a hnyi lipa ruena hmuo pata a ahungtahmuo sii ta ca tue kha yi se.
51002009	Tahematapakieca, Khazing cuona bangkhuo ca saapa hminghmie ta Khrih chunglie aw te,
51002010	niema zaw uvtuv bangkhuo hne nawhnyina bangkhuo luv ta a cuopa Khrih'a lie kha hringna tluotling nama hnyi.
51002011	Ama chunglie ngiethie ca thlaapa ta vangdaw a te ung cate saapa ta vangdawtena kha nama thaw.
51002012	Niema ca Khrih chunglie kha tiynawna ta pabypa nama cuo. Cahaa cata Khrih kha thiyna taata a pathu pakhaapa Khazing cahrana ta, zangna thueta Khrih hne pathu pakhaapa nama cuo aa.
51002013	Cakhutaa, niema ca nama suena hne saapa ta vangdaw namaa te lina chunglie kha a thiypa nama za cuo. Cuorasala Khazing ta nama suena bangkhuo kha caa ngiethe yite ama hne aca pahring yi.
51002014	Ma suenapa cazing ca a duotena phung bangkhuo hne khata vieluo cunglie khepuo te a hruv diy.
51002015	Ama ta uvtuv tie hne nawhnyina zaw kha vieluotaana ta te yite cawsaazaapuv a mangpuo riypata a tue yi.
51002016	Cacuonakawta sa hne tiy kawlie cuose, biena luo pyi, thlathaa pyi hne sabbath kawlie cuose, ahungtahmuo niema kha sue ca phaw kha yi se.
51002017	Hingpa zaw hingca a vaw riypa hmang a mingthlaapa ta cuote, a hmisipa ca Khrih tana a cuo.
51002018	Kiema hne kiema a hmuo li pata a panena kaw hne avuoming abiena kaw khuopuv ta a daakhyi te a ripa, muocuo a hmung nakawta cawsaa hrang laata i suo vie tapata a rue te saapa ruena ta a palepa tie khata sue ca phaw kha yi se.
51002019	Iema ca luv ta a cuopa Khrih hne khata a pazue vayi. Luv ta a cuopa Khrih'a taakhata pangpa ca sa kha hmung te, cakhiycabuo hne thariytha-uo zaw khata ama cakhiy. Cahaa cata Khazing khingna haakhata ama lethaw.
51002020	Niema ca Khrih hneta hing chuelyi phung taahingta nama thiy tli kieca khaapanakawma hing chuelyi ming haata nama hring?
51002021	Khaapanakawma hrie kha, a pacie kha, de kha tapa phung ca nama ziy?
51002022	Hingpa phung bangkhuo hing ca cawsaa ta changpa hne pacuvpa dyi ta cuote a ziypa tie hne tana ama thiy hne aa.
51002023	Hingpa phung hing zangna luota a sakapa cuo azuena, a panena hne, khuopuv ta pangpa ahri-asaana cuota singna phung a lu raalaa pata saapa khingna te khu tangena riypata ca a thlahnena aw vyi.
51003001	Cacuonakawta, Khrih hne pathu pakhaapa nama cuo kieca, Khazing cacuo luota a tupa Khrih a awnapa cungluo hmang kha huv tie ung.
51003002	Nama pathiypalung kha cungluo hmang lie chi ungla, chuelyi hmang lie chi kha ung.
51003003	Tahematapakieca niema ca thiy tli ung cate nama hringna ca Khrih hneta Khazing chunglie nupa tana nama cuo.
51003004	Nama hringna ta a cuopa Khrih kha aa luo thueta niema zaw ama hneta rungnaana hne namaa luo ra aa.
51003005	Cacuonakawta nama chunglie a awpa chuelyi hmang: aparuvsuena, a pyalyipa hringna, khingna cahratuvna, a pha lipa khingna, hne karuo-awna (karuo-awna ca kuvtuezuv abiena phangkha tana a cuo) bangkhuo kha thie tie ung.
51003006	Capa zaw nakawcata Khazing hihaana ca ri a ngie lipa tie cunglie a tlung aa.
51003007	Hingpa zaw hing iema hrawlie nama za aw ningta niema zaw nama za ziypa hringzya tana a cuo.
51003008	Cuorasala ata hing ca hihaana, pathiy chiena tapa tie kha thaw ungla, malie kaw rina, malie thuopachina tapa tie kha nama pakaa taata pya kha se.
51003009	Pakha hne pakha kha a dung kha ung. Nama cuona hlung ca a zyazaa hne khata thlie siy tli ung cate,
51003010	hringna thaa kha namaa hryi tli. Capa hringna thaapa ca a satuv hminghmie a lu riypata pachangna chunglie kha sapathiypa ta a cuo.
51003011	Ca sapathiyna chunglie ca, Krik ming hne Judah ming tapa cuose, vangdaw tepa hne vangdaw te lipa tapa cuose, a ngaapa, saruopa haata a ngaapa phang, sii hne hyazangpa, tapa aw vyi. Cuorasala hmangting zawdya kha Khrih ta cuote hmangting zawdya chunglie kha a aw.
51003012	Khazing ta caa tlaw yite, a pathesapa hne a duepa nama cuona haata, kawpacuona, ngiechina, rawcanawna, palungnena, hne palungpasiyna kha hnyi tie ung.
51003013	Pakha hne pakha kha a chaw law ungla, pakhakha ta a hrangpa pakha cunglie kha palung tling lina a hnyi kiezawma a ngiethe tie ung. Abyipa ta niema acaa ngiethepa haa yi khata niema zaw pakha hne pakha kha a ngiethe tie ung.
51003014	Ca bangkhuo khutaa cata duena kha chachiy tie ung. Duena ca hmangting zawdya kha achaw-arawsa pata hne tluotlingsa pata a sawpakhawpa tana a cuo.
51003015	Nama pathiypalung kha Khrih diena ta ca uv yi se. Hmisi ta ripa kieca capa luo cana pangkha cuo riypa ta kupa nama cuo. Nama palung tluo se.
51003016	Khrih bie ca nama chunglie kha aw sala, singna ta pakha hne pakha kha a pacuv ungla a pasiy-apaya ung. Sam hlaa, Khrihsaa hlaa hne pathuosana hlaa kha palungtluona hne Khazing'a luo sa tie ung.
51003017	Khaapa bie nama ri zaw, khaapa hmang nama tue zaw, Abyipa Zingsuv ming ta ri ungla tue tie ung. Paa Khazing ca ama thue khata pathuosa tie ung.
51003018	Napuvnung zaw, nama navaapa ri kha a ngie ung; khrihsaa nama cuopa haata Abyipa'a lie nama tue riypatana a cuo.
51003019	Navaapa zaw, nama napuvnung kha due ungla bie-ahruopa ta chaw kha ung.
51003020	Haatiy zaw hmangting zawdya lie kha nama nung hne paa ri a ngie tie ung, tahematapakieca caca Abyipa'a lieta cuhluo aa tlapa nama hrievu tana a cuo.
51003021	Paa zaw, nama saata kha ama hi pahaa kha ung, ama palung na a ra pathlyi aa.
51003022	Sii zaw, hmangting zawdya lieta nama chuelyi ziy tie ri kha a ngie tie ung, aca hmungna lie yi ama palung patluo riypa dyi cuo li pata, pathiypalung hmisi hne Khazing ciyzaana cangta cuose.
51003023	Khaapa re a cuo zaw, palunghmisi ta hrie ungla, nama ziy huo haakhata cuo li pata Abyipa huo haakhata hrie tie ung.
51003024	Abyipa'a taata nama cu riypa ru khana nama lawmuo ta a cuo aa tapa kha nama pachang. Abyipa Zingsuv re a hriepa tana nama cuo.
51003025	Tahematapakieca hmangpha lipa a tuepa ca a tuepa hmangpha lipa cuota duotena kha a ang aa. Abyipa'a lieca pahlyipalena aw vyi.
51004001	Ziy zaw, nama sii tie kha aa dangpa hne a phapa ta mangsang tie ung, tahematapakieca niema zaw vuoruo lie ziy nama hnyi rapa kha nama pachang.
51004002	Thlaa chuo kha temaa ungla, pathiypalung a hy syalya khata palungtluona bie hluona cangta pazue pari ung.
51004003	Khazing ta thaw i tla hnuochuopa a bie cuota cuose, ma phu riypa Khrih bieparuv cuota cuose, ingchiy malie a pahawpa riypa hne
51004004	i phu riypa zaa ta a siesa pata i phu khuna riypata kiema cuo zaw kha thlaa chuo tie ung.
51004005	Zangtuv a cuo lipa hrawlie kha singvaasa pata atu-adaa ungla cuopha nama hnyipa kha muo hnyisa pata hmuo tie ung.
51004006	Nama bie ca naathlie a nuopa hne a thlung-iepa cuo sala cawsaa bangkhuo kha tuokhaata i chaw kiema a pha aa tapa kha a zue tie ung.
51004007	Taikhikas ta i kaw bangkhuo kha aca chang'a yi. Ama ca Khrih chunglie i duepa uvnu, zangtluo aa tlapa Khazing rehrietuv, hne i rehriehnepa ta a cuo.
51004008	Tuokhaatama ma aw tapa kha nama pachang na riypa hne niema thaazuo pi riypa hrahring khatana ivya pathlie pata a cuo.
51004009	Ama ca zangtluo aa tlapa hne i duepa uvnu, niema chunglie pakha ta a cuopa Onesimas hne tana aa vaw aa. Hinglie ta achiy-acuopa hmang bangkhuo kha aca chang'a yi.
51004010	Thaw i tlahnepa Aristarkas ta nama kuv aca patuv yi; Barnabas tuvpaapa Marka zaw ta nama kuv aca patuv yi. Ama kaw kha ica chang tli yi. Niema'a luo a vaw kieca za cuhluo mang ung.
51004011	Justas ama tapapaa Zingsuv zaw ta nama kuv aca patuv yi. Iema dyi hing Khazing pena cuota i rehriehne zaw hrawlie vangdaw a tepa tie cuo yite, i hnaa naa panguotuv ta ama cuo.
51004012	Niema chung taata pakha ta a cuopa Epafras, Khrih Zingsuv sii a cuopa ta nama kuv aca patuv yi. Niema kha ruena a kysa pata Khazing khingna bangkhuo kha a tlingsa pata nama pachang riypata nama cuota thlaa a chuo pari.
51004013	Ama ta niema cuota hne Laodisia lie a awpa tie cuota hne Heirapolis lie a awpa tie cuota khuopuv ta re a hriepa kha kama ta tehte i khuo khu.
51004014	Ma duepa siybyi Luka hne Demas ta nama kuv aca patuv yi.
51004015	Laodisia lie a awpa uvnu hne sieta zaw cuose, Nimfa hne a ing lie a pungpa khrihsaabuv tie cuose bie ivya changpa yi kha na changpa pachaa tie ung.
51004016	Hing caa hing niema'a lie nama ri khu taata, Laodisia khrihsaabuv lie zaw kha ri ungla, Laodisia taata aca vya paphyapa yi caa zaw kha ri tie ung.
51004017	Cakhutaaca, Arkhipas kha, “Abyipa ming ta naa lapa re kha palang mang la,” tapata za chang tie ung.
51004018	Kama, Paul ta hing bie-achangna caa hing kama kuv ta i cape pata a cuo. I thaabuoliriy hing maw kha ung. Khazing vihnyina nama cunglie aw mangsue.
52001001	Paul, Silas hne Timote ta, ma Paa Khazing hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih huopa ta a cuopa, Thesalonika khy lie a awpa khrihsaabuv tie'a luo kha caa maca paphya yi. Vihnyina hne diena ca nama cunglie aw mangsue.
52001002	Niema bangkhuo kawlieta Khazing kha ci li ta pathuosa pate thlaa maca chuopa pari yi.
52001003	Zangna ta nama hriepa re, duena ta nama hriepa re hne ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih'a lie a cusa pata namaa nguopuona zaw kha maa thyi pari.
52001004	Tahematapakieca, Khazing ta duepa uvnu hne sieta zaw, ama ta acaa tlawpa yi kha ma pachang.
52001005	Tahematapakieca, niema'a luo thuophaabie ma vya chiykhyipa hing bie dyi ta cuo li pata cahrana hne Thlaapa Pathe hne biehmisipa a cuopa kha pachangpasiena hneta a cuo. Niema cuota nama hrawlie ma aw ning kha tuokhaapaapa cawsaa tama macuo tapa ca malie nama pachang.
52001006	Kiema hne Abyipa kha malie a mangpuo ung cate hrisaathieruena chunglie a cuo raalaa pata thuophaabie kha Thlaapa Pathe ta aca pipa yi alawna hneta nama cuhluo.
52001007	Cacuonakawta niema ca Masidonia hne Akhaia lie a awpa zangtuv tie cuota a mangpuo tluo a tlapa ta nama cuo.
52001008	Tahematapakieca, niema'a taata a vya hrawpa Abyipa bie ca Masidonia ruo hne Akhaia ruo luo dyi kha cuo li pata ruo ting khata a ze te, Khazing nama zangnapa ca ama pachang nakawta capa kaw ca kiema ri hmuo a hu va tli.
52001009	Tahematapakieca ama pe lie a awpa tie khata niema hrawlie ma aw ningta tuokhaatama malie nama cuhluo tapa kaw hne kuvtuezuv abiena taata Khazing'a luo namaa vya palina kaw hne a hringpa hne a hmisipa Khazing re nama hriena kaw cuose,
52001010	thiyna taata pathu pakhaapa hne a vaw riypa Khazing hihaana taata malie a khuotuv a Saacapaa Zingsuv vuoruo taata aa zuv riypa zaw nama huona kaw kha malie ama chang.
52002001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema'a luo maa vawpa ca a cakhawpa ta cuovyi tapa kha nama pachang.
52002002	Cuorasala, Filipi lie kha ruvnaana hne nangzaana ma ang raalaa pata, nama pachangna haata, aduna lepuv a awna cangta Khazing'a taata thaazuo kha hmung pate, niema kha Khazing thuophaabie maca chang yi.
52002003	Tahematapakieca maca changpa lie yi hing a dang lipa, a cuo li kie, atingna pha lipa hne dungna aw vyi.
52002004	Cuorasala Khazing ta thuophaabie ri riypa hingta aa phuvpa ta malie a chipa haata cawsaa palung patluo riypa kha cuo li pata ma pathiypalung malie a hmungpa Khazing palung patluo riypa khata ma ri.
52002005	Nama pachangpa haata hne Khazing ca malie a daakhyituv a cuopa haata, niema'a luo kha patapalena bie hne a vaw buo li pa pata, karuo-awna hne a tue pakhi pata zaw a vaw buo va puv.
52002006	Khrih lucuotuv ma cuopa haata caa hiekhutuv ma cuo raalaa pata, niema'a taata cuose, a hrangpa tie'a taata cuose, cawsaa pathuosa riypa kha ma huvpa cuovyi.
52002007	Cuorasala nung ta a saata kha a nesa pata a mangchiypa haata niema hrawlie kha a nesa pata ma aw.
52002008	Cahaa cata niema kha maca duetuv hringhruo nakaw yi ta Khazing thuophaabie dyi kha cuo li pata ma hringna khahmuo maca pi khing yi. Ma due hringhruopa tana nama cuo tli.
52002009	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, riethyi-thaabuosa pata re ma hriepa kha malie nama pachang. Khazing thuophaabie niema'a lie ma phu tiyta, nama cuota hmangriy ma cuo li riypata chung hne zuo ta li pata re ma hrie.
52002010	Zangtuv a cuopa niema cunglie ta ma tuepa ca a pathepa, aa hmuopa hne syi riy a aw lipa a cuopa kha niema ca tehte cuo ung cate, Khazing zaw a cuo ra.
52002011	Nama pachangna haata, Paa ta a saa zaw a hmungpa haayitana maca hmung yi.
52002012	Niema kha a pena hne a rungnaana luo caa kupa yi Khazing hne aa phuv pata nama hring riypata thaazuo ca pi yi pate maca pasu yi, paa maca kie yi.
52002013	Kiema'a taata nama thyipa Khazing bie kha nama cuhluo tiyta, cawsaapa bie haata nama cuhluopa cuo li pata, niema zangtuv tie chunglie re a hriepa, Khazing bie kha a cuona haata nama cuhluo nakawta kiema zaw Khazing'a luo ci li ta alawna ma hluo.
52002014	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, Judea ruo chunglie a awpa Khazing khrihsaabuv hne Khrih Zingsuv cawsaa zaw ta Judah ming'a taata ama ang tawpa khana niema zaw nama cawsaa tie'a taata nama ang ra pata a cuo.
52002015	Judah ming ca Abyipa Zingsuv hne profet tie kha thie yite kiema zaw malie a cadepa tie tana ama cuo. Khazing ngie kha pachi yite cawsaa bangkhuo kha amaa du.
52002016	Khuona ama hmung riypata Jentail ming thuophaabie chang riypa kha hmuo malie amaa daakhuo. Cahaa cata iema ca ama suena kha ama chachiy tyly. Cuorasala a chuona lieca Khazing hihaana ca iema cungluo kha a tlung.
52002017	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, pathiypalung ta cuo li pata saapa lie cuokhata maa che chung ta lie hinghmuo ca vuo hringhruo yi pate nama hmie maca hmung khingsa yi.
52002018	Niema'a luo vya tlaw pakhaa riypa kha khing pate, kama Paul zaw hing niema vya tlaw riypa kha yi hluvpuv i zue raalaa pata Setaa ta luo malie a khaakhuo.
52002019	Ma Byipaapa Zingsuv a vaw thueta khaapa hingma a hmiekunglie maa nguopuona, ma palungtluona, hne maa palesakhyipa byilakhuv ta a cuo aa? Niema ta cuo'a va ung cama?
52002020	A cuo, niema hingna ma rungnaana hne ma palungtluona ta a cuo ungciy.
52003001	A chuona lieca ma aw khu li tli nakawta kiema dyi Athens khy lie kha a ngaa pata,
52003002	ma uvnu hne Khrih thuophaabie phuna kawlie Khazing re ma hrie hnepa Timote kha nama zangna lie a cusa pata namaa daa khuna riypa hne niema thaazuo pi riypata cuose,
52003003	hing hrisaathieruena nakaw hingta pakha hmuo namaa cahang li riypata niema'a luo ma vya pathlie. Hmisi ta ripa kieca hingpa hmang ang riypa hingta a tlawpa ma cuo pakha niema hrahring ta nama pachang.
52003004	Niema'a lie ma aw ning kha hrisaathieruena ang riypa hing maca chang pacie yi cuote, ata hing nama pachangna haata a vya tlung hmisi.
52003005	Capa kawlie cata i aw khu li tli nakawta nama zangna hing khaama a lu tapa pachang riypa hne pasupaliytuv hingta ca pasu ca paliy'a yite ma re hrie ciepa kha a hripa ta cuo'a kie tapata Timote kha i vya pathlie pata a cuo.
52003006	Cuorasala Timote ca a ru hluota lie kha niema'a taata vya chiy te nama zangna hne duena kaw thuophaa kha malie a vya phya. Kiema ta maca vuosa pahaayita duena hne malie namaa thyi paripa kha malie a chang.
52003007	Cacuonakawta, uvnu hne sieta zaw, ma ngiechi ning hne hrisaathieruena ma ang ning kha nama zangna kaw ma thyipa khata thaazuo malie a pi.
52003008	Abyipa'a lie a cusa pata namaa daapa kaw ma thyipa ca, ma cuota, ma hringna huv tana a cuo.
52003009	Niema nakawta Khazing hmielie maa law. Capa bangkhuo kawlie cata ma hnyipa palungtluona kawlie hing Khazing kha tuokhaatama maa law aa?
52003010	Niema hne hmie a hmung pata, zangna lie nama bupa kha a bya khu riypata chung zuo ta li pata pathiypalung hmisi ta thlaa ma chuo.
52003011	Ma Paa Khazing ama hrahring hne ma Byipaapa Zingsuv ta niema'a luo maa vawna riypa kha luo malie a chiy thi se.
52003012	Kiema ta niema maca duena yi a lepa haahingta, niema pakha hne pakha namaa duena hne cawsaa bangkhuo nama duena kha Abyipa ta pale sa ra mangsue.
52003013	Ima Byipaapa Zingsuv ca a mingpathepa tie hne a vaw thueta, nama pathiypalung thaa kha ca patlung yi sala, ima Paa Khazing hmielie syi riy nama aw li riypata ca pathe sa yi se.
52004001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, a chuona lie ta i ri khingpa ca tuokhaata aw'a pate ma Khazing palung ma patluo aa tapa kha namaa cuv ciepa a cuo pahaata namaa zuevie hryly riypata, Abyipa Zingsuv ming ta maca pasu yi.
52004002	Tahematapakieca Zingsuv ming ta tuokhaatama maca pacuv yi tapa kha nama pachang.
52004003	Tahematapakieca, Khazing khingna ca niema pathe sa riypa kha a cuo nakawta aparuvsuena kha cahriy tie ung.
52004004	A pathepa hne pa-uvsathyi aa tlapa luopuv chunglie ta nama pangpa kha tuokhaatama ma uv aa tapa ca nama pachang.
52004005	Khazing a pachang lipa Jentail ming haata saapa khingna lie kha hring kha ung.
52004006	Pathiypalung hmisi ta a raaringna maca za pilupa haayita hne maca za changpa haayita, Khazing ca vieriy a thungpa a cuo nakawta, hingpa kawlie hing ahungtahmuo a uvnu hne a sieta kha dungvie kha se.
52004007	Tahematapakieca Khazing ca a pyalyipa luo cuo li pata pathena luo na malie a ku.
52004008	Cacuonakawta hingpa pacuvna a thawpa ca cawsaa nawhnyina kha a thawpa cuo li pata niema'a luo Thlaapa Pathe caa pipa yi Khazing kha a thawpa tana a cuo.
52004009	Nama uvnu hne sieta zaw duena kawlieta ahungtahmuo niema'a luo caa cape a hu vyi, tahematapakieca niema pakha hne pakha a due riypata Khazing pacuv ciepa tana nama cuo.
52004010	Cahaa cata Masidonia lie a awpa uvnu hne sieta zaw kha nama due hmisi. Cuorasala, duepa zaw, cahaa cata tue riypa kha a zue hryly ungla tapata maca pasu yi.
52004011	Maca pasupa haa yi khata a dieta tah khysa kha a ting ungla, niema nama reta kha hrie ungla, niema kuvta khata nama riy a caw tie ung.
52004012	Cahaa cata zanglituv tie pa-uvsathyina hne mangthawna kha hmung'a ung cate ahunghmuo a buchuo a hu li pata nama aw aa.
52004013	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, anguopuona a hnyi lipa tie ngiechipa haata nama ngie a chi li riypata a thiypa tie kaw hne a patuv pakha pachang sa li pata ca aw khing vayipuv.
52004014	Zingsuv ca thiy te a thupakhaa tapa ma zang; cacuonakawta Zingsuv zang te a thiypa ca ama hneta Khazing ta a pathu pakhaa yi tapata ma zang.
52004015	Canakaw catana, Abyipa bie ta maca tapa yi ca, Abyipa aa vawna te ta a hring kaliepa kiema ta a thiypa tie kha hmiechue khu'a vayipuv tapata a cuo.
52004016	Tahematapakieca Abyipa ama hrahring kha nawpina ueryi, avuoming uvtuv ueryi hne Khazing hmyakaa ueryi zaw hne khata vuoruo taata za cung'a te, Zingsuv zangna cangta a thiypa tie kha hmietaace ta ama thupakhaa aa.
52004017	Cakhutaacata avuo lieta Abyipa a taw riypata kiema a hring kaliepa tie kha iema zaw hne cata amyi cungluo khiy calang pata cuo'a pate Abyipa hne chuozaa ta ma aw aa.
52004018	Cacuonakawta hingpa bie hingta pakha hne pakha kha thaazuo a pi tie ung.
52005001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, a ning'a na a cuo hne a patuv pata niema'a luo caa cape a hu vyi.
52005002	Tahematapakieca Abyipa ca zuo ta a paruvpa aa vawpa haatana aa vaw aa tapa kha a phasa pata nama pachang.
52005003	Cawsaa ta, “hmangting bangkhuo a dieta hne abang-asu patana a aw,” ama ta ning kha nu-aphyapa canung ta nu aa zi pahaata ama cunglie rana sungkha ta vya tlung'a te, ahunghmuo law'a vayi.
52005004	Cuorasala duepa zaw niema ca zingna chunglie nama aw li nakawta capa ningkhue cata a paruvpa a vawpa haata nama nang capa uo'a vayi.
52005005	Tahematapakieca niema ca khena saa hne ningchung saa ta cuo ung cate kiema zaw zingna, zuo saa ta cuo va puv.
52005006	Cacuonakawta kiema ca malie zaw amaa hmungpa haakhata a hmung li pata, a hra ung sala palungsingta tah aw ungsiy.
52005007	Tahematapakieca a hmungpa ca zuo ta a hmung te, a pariypa zaw zuo tana a pariy.
52005008	Cuorasala kiema ca ningchung saa ta ma cuo nakawta palung singta tah aw ung sala, zangna hne duena kha cacunghnaapakaw haakhata a hryi ung sala, khuona anguopuona ca thaalakhuv haakhata a khuv ungsiy.
52005009	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta kiema kha a hihaana ang riypata malie a tingpa cuo li pata, ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih thueta khuona cu riypata lieriyuopuopa tana ma cuo.
52005010	Kiema ca maa hra zaw maa hmung zaw ama hne aw pakhaw riypata malie a thiykuopa tana ma cuo.
52005011	Cacuonakawta ata nama tue nguoluopa haahingta pakha hne pakha kha thaazuo a pi ungla a sathaw tie ung.
52005012	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, paa maca kie yi: niema hrawlie rehrietuv tie hne Abyipa'a lie niema luochiytuv tie hne caa pasiypa-yatuv tie kha pa-uvsathyi tie ung.
52005013	Ama hriepa re thue khata hmiezaana a suocepa pi ungla due tie ung. Nama hrawlie diena aw mangsue.
52005014	Duepa zaw, a thaathuvpa tie kha pasiypa-ya ungla, a palungcawpa tie kha thaazuo pi tie ung. A thaadyapa tie kha thaazuo pi ungla ama bangkhuo cunglie kha nama palung pasiy se tapata paa maca kie yi.
52005015	Pakha hmuo a chiepa ta vieriy namaa thung li riypa hne pakha hne pakha cunglie hne nama bangkhuo cunglie hmangphapa nama hrie khu pari riypa kha a zue tie ung.
52005016	Nama palung tluo pari se,
52005017	ci li ta thlaa chuo ungla,
52005018	khaapa hmang namaa taw zaw alawna bie hluo tie ung; tahematapakieca Khazing ta Khrih Zingsuv chunglie hinghaahingta nama aw riypata acaa khingkhyipa yi tana a cuo.
52005019	Thlaapa kha pache kha ung.
52005020	Profet tie bie kha siysaa ri li pata aw kha ung.
52005021	Cuorasala hmangting kha dyapasya ungla, a phapa kha a patuv ungla
52005022	a pha lipa bangkhuo kha cahriy tie ung.
52005023	Diena Khazing ama hrahring ta ca pathesa karuv yi sala, ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih aa vaw thueta, nama thlaapa, nama pathiypalung hne nama pangpa kha syi riy a aw lipa hne tluotlingsa pata ca sang yi se.
52005024	Niema caa kupapaa yi ca zangtluo aa tlapa a cuo nakawta capaca a tue aa.
52005025	Duepa zaw, thlaa malie chuopa tie ung.
52005026	Uvnu hne sieta zaw bangkhuo kha a pathepa a pahnuona ta bie a chang tie ung.
52005027	Hingpa caa hing iema bangkhuo hmielie ri riypata Abyipa ming ta naw ica pi yi.
52005028	Ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina ca niema'a lie aw mangsue.
53001001	Paul, Silas hne Timote ta, ma Paa Khazing hne ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih chunglie a awpa Thesalonika khrihsaabuv kha caa maca paphya yi.
53001002	Ma Paa Khazing hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih ta vihnyina hne diena kha ca pi mangyisue.
53001003	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, kiema ca niema kawlie hing Khazing kha maa law pari riypatana a cuo. Tahematapakieca nama zangna kha lethaw te cawsaa bangkhuo ta pakha hne pakha namaa duena zaw a lethaw nguoluo nakawta cahaa cata Khazing maa lawpa ca aa hmuopa tana a cuo.
53001004	Cacuonakawta hrisaathieruena chunglie nama angpa riethyina cangta zangna chunglie a cusa pata namaa daa nakawta Khazing khrihsaabuv tie hrawlie kha kiema hrahring ta maacaa palesakhyi yi.
53001005	Hingpa hing na aa dangpa Khazing biechina paluosana ta a cuo. Niema zaw Khazing pena cuota riethyina a ang rapa nama cuo nakawta capa Khazing pena hne aphuv-asiypa pacuo sa riypata tingpa nama cuo.
53001006	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta niema riethyi caa pipa tie kha riethyina pi ra'a yite,
53001007	riethyina a angpa niema kha a pahyna ca pi'a yite kiema zaw malie a pi ra aa. Abyipa Zingsuv kha a lesyipa aa vuoming hne myipalyi chunglie amaa zaa luo tiyta,
53001008	Khazing a pachang lipa hne ma Byipaapa Zingsuv thuophaabie a ziy lipa tie kha vieriy thung'a yite riethyi a pi'a yi.
53001009	Iema ca chuozaa ranapa duotena kha ama ang aa. Abyipa hmiekung taakhata a cade'a yite, a rungnaapa a cahrana kha hmung'a vayi.
53001010	Abyipa ca a mingpathepa tie ta parungnaa sa riypata hne zangtuv tie bangkhuo pathuo sa riypata aa vaw thueta capa ning lie ca niema zaw a pathuosapa tie hrawlie ca nama aw ra aa, tahematapakieca niema ca maca changpa yi thuophaabie nama zang nakawta a cuo.
53001011	Cacuonakawta, Khazing ta aca una yi hne aa phuvpa ta ca chi yi sala, nama biechina hne zangna ta nama hriepa re bangkhuo lie kha a cahrana ta tluotlingna aca pi riypa yita thla maca chuopa pari yi.
53001012	Cahaa cata, ima Byipaapa Zingsuv ming ca niema hrawlie kha rungnaana hmung'a te, ma Khazing hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina thueta niema zaw ama'a taata rungnaana kha nama hmung ra aa.
53002001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih aa vawna riypa kaw hne pahmya pakhawpa ma cuo riypa kawlieta maacaa nue khingpa yi ca,
53002002	pathiypalung ta cuose, bie ta cuose, caa ta cuose, kiema'a taata aa vawpa haata Abyipa ning ca a vya chiy tli, ama tapa kawlieta pathiypalung a cahang pata namaa pahlu li riypa hing a cuo.
53002003	Ahungtahmuo ca dung kha yi se; tahematapakieca capa ning ca biena luo aduna a vaw taa lipa'a nata para riypata lieriyuopuopa cawsaa pha lipapaa a vya luo hluo ta ca vya tlung'a vyi.
53002004	Cawsaa ta khazing tapata ama ruepa bangkhuo hne ama biepa bangkhuo kha a du'a te, capa zaw cungluo cata aa chi aa. Cahaa cata a thude kha Khazing biena-ing chunglie patu'a te, ama hne ama kha Khazing tana i cuo a ta aa.
53002005	Niema'a lie i aw ningta ica za changpa yi kha a thyi va ung cama?
53002006	A cuo a de thueta aa luo riypata a daakhuotuv a awpa kha nama pachang.
53002007	Tahematapakieca cawsaa pha lipapaa a paruv ta re a hrie nguoluo tli, cuorasala a daakhuopa kha phe pata a cuo hluo li khaahmuo hrie the'a valie.
53002008	Cakhutaacata cawsaa pha lipapaa ca a vya luo'a te, Abyipa Zingsuv ta a pakaa taata a pyapa a huv ta ama kha thie'a te, aa vawna huvhaa ta ama kha a para aa.
53002009	Cawsaa pha lipapaa ca Setaa hmangtuena taakhata a vya luo'a te, cahrana phangting, kharuehaa hmang phangting hne,
53002010	rana luo a chiy riypa tie cuota a pha lipa dungna phangting hmuo pata a vaw aa. Tahematapakieca khuona ama hmung na riypata biehmisipa kha khing li pata ama thaw.
53002011	Cacuonakawta a cuo lipa kha ama zangna riypata Khazing ta a ruvsapa dungna kha a pathliesue yi.
53002012	Cahaa cata biehmisipa zang li pata a dang lipa hmang lie a palung a tluopa bangkhuo ca suephawpa ta ama cuo aa.
53002013	Khazing ta a duepa uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema nakawhingta Khazing ca alawna bie ma hluo pari aa. Tahematapakieca Thlaapa ta pathesana thueta hne biehmisipa zangna thueta Khazing ta caa tlaw yite khuona cuota thyipaa taapa ta aca tue yi.
53002014	Hing a tingna hne hingta, ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih rungnaana nama hmung na riypata kiema ma phupa thuophaabie ta aca ku yi.
53002015	Cakhutaata, uvnu hne sieta zaw, a cusa pata a daa ungla bie ta cuose, caa ta cuose, maca changpa yi ziyphung kha a patuv tie ung.
53002016	Kiema kha malie due te, a vihnyina thueta hnaanguona hne a nguopuona malie a pipa ma Paa Khazing hne ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih ama hrahring ta,
53002017	nama palung hnaa ca panguo yi sala re phapa hne bie phapa bangkhuo lie kha thaazuo ca pi yi se.
53003001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, a chuona ta ica taa khingpa yi ca, Abyipa bie niema'a lie aa zepa haakhata a catli pata a ze te, rungnaana a hmung riypata thlaa malie chuopa tie ung.
53003002	Cawsaa bangkhuo ta zangna ama hnyi li nakawta cawsaa pha lipa tie hne cawsaasuepa tie kuv taata khuopa ma cuo riypata thlaa malie chuopa tie ung.
53003003	Cuorasala Abyipa ca zangtluo aa tlapa a cuo nakawta a pha lipapaa kuv chung taata aca khuo'a yi.
53003004	Kiema ta maca changpa yi kha tue nguoluo ung cate hmie luo zaw nama tue aa tapata Abyipa'a lie a ruechuona ma hnyi.
53003005	Khazing duena hne Khrih te-ang khuna kha nama hnyi riypata Abyipa ta luo caa chiy yi se.
53003006	Duepa zaw, re a hrie khing lipa tie hne kiema maca changpa yi phungluo haata a aw khing lipa tie kha cahriy ung tapata ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih ming ta naw maca pi yi.
53003007	Tahematapakieca niema hrahring ta kiema a mangpuo pata nama aw riypa kha nama pachang; niema'a lie ma aw ning kha ma thaa thuv vyi.
53003008	A muo pi li pata ahung sa hmuo ning va puv. Cuorasala ahung cuo tahmuo hmangriy ma cuo li riypata chungzuo ta re ma hrie.
53003009	Caca niema'a taata abyana pi riypata a hie khuna ma hnyi li nakaw cuo vyi, malie namaa mangpuo thena riypata ma tuepa tana a cuo.
53003010	Niema'a lie ma aw ning kha tahmuo, “re a hrie khing lipa ca sa ning kha se,” tapata naw maca pi tli yi.
53003011	Tahematapakieca niema chekha ca nama thaathuv te re khaahmuo hrie li pata malie kawlie bie dyi a rangpa nama aw tapata ma thyi.
53003012	Cahaapaapa cawsaa tie kha, ama riy a cawna re kha a diesa pata hrie yi se, tapata naw pi yi pate ma pasu yi.
53003013	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, aa hmuopa hmang tue kha nama palung chuo kha se.
53003014	Hingpa caa lie ma ripa hing a ziy khing lipa ca a nang a zaa the riypata a viesaa kha ung.
53003015	Cariepa haata hmung li pata, zangtuv haakhata a raaringna pi tie ung.
53003016	Diena Byi ama hrahring ta a luo bangkhuo taata cipari ta diena ca pi mangyisue. Niema bangkhuo'a lieta Abyipa aw mangsue.
53003017	Kama Paul ta hingpa bie-achangna caa hing i kuv ta i cape. I caa bang-khuo lieta ming i thuv; hinghing i caa cape zya ta a cuo.
53003018	Ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina ca niema bangkhuo'a lie aw mangsue.
54001001	Maa Khuotuv Khazing maa ruechuopa Khrih Zingsuv thueta Khrih Zingsuv lucuotuv a cuopa Paul ta,
54001002	Zangna lie i saata tah a cuopa Timote kha caa ica paphya. Paa Khazing hne Khrih Zingsuv'a taata vihnyina, nangduena hne diena ca na cunglie aw mangsue.
54001003	Masidonia luo i tlaw ningta ica changpa haakhata Efesa khy lie kha zaa ngaa la aa dang lipa pacuvna a pacuvtuv tie kha pacuv li tli riypata za thlu karue yi tapa ica khing.
54001004	Zangna ta pachang khu a cuopa Khazing khuekhuona kaw kha pacuv cuopa ta, a-i-achuena dyi a chiykhyipa phungpa cakhawpa hne a chuo the lipa thukina cazing kaw rina lie zaw amaa pituv li riypa kha thlu tie yi
54001005	Hinghaapa bietaana ta aa tingpa ca pathiypalung pathepa, achie-apha thleduona hne zangna singsaapa taata a pyapa duena tana a cuo.
54001006	Cawsaa chekha ca hingpa taahingta luopie yite siyluo a hnyi lipa a-i-achue cakhawna luo kha ama chiy.
54001007	Khaama ma ri tapa kha pachang li pata hne amaa daakhyipa kha khaama tapa pachang li pata phungbie saya cuo kha ama khing.
54001008	A cuona haata hmuopa kieca phungbie hing a pha tapa ca ma pachang.
54001009	Kiema ta ma pachangpa ca phungbie hing aa dangpa tie cuota sapa cuo li pata phungbie a ziy lipa tie hne a patluopa tie, Khazing abie lipa tie hne a suepa tie, a pathe lipa tie hne Khazing siysaa ri li pata biena a hnyi lipa tie, a nung hne a paa a thiepa tie, cawsaa a thiepa tie,
54001010	aparuvsuena a tuepa tie, canungcapaa phung li pata aw hne a hmuopa tie, sii ta sung a palipa tie, a hangpa tie, a hmuo lipa lie tehte a cuopa tie, aa hmuopa pacuvna hne a carie pata a awpa tie cuota tuepa tana a cuo.
54001011	Capaca kama phu riypata ina pipa thluechiy Khazing thuophaabie a rungnaapa haa khatana a cuo.
54001012	Kama thaazuo naa pituv Khrih Zingsuv ma Byipaapa kha i law, tahematapakieca zangtluo aa tlapa ta na rue te a re hrie riypata ina hmuo.
54001013	Ahluo ta ca Khazing thuo a pachituv, hrisaathieruetuv, hne hnaapahnawtuv ta i za cuo. Cuorasala, Khazing nangduena kha i hmung, tahematapakieca pachang lipa hne zang li pata i za tuepa a cuo nakawtana a cuo.
54001014	Abyipa vihnyina ca Khrih Zingsuv chunglie zangna hne duena zaw hne khata i cuota a le ta a lepathla.
54001015	Khrih Zingsuv ca a suepa khuo riypatana chuelyi luo aa zuv tapa ca aa hmuopa hne cuhluo aa tlapa tana a cuo. Capa a suepa zaw hrawlie ca kama hing a suecepa tana i cuo.
54001016	Cuorasala capa kawlie cata Abyipa ta nang ina due pata a cuo. Zingsuv Khrih ta a suecepa i cuona cangta chuozaa hringna hmung riypata ama a vya zang riypa tie a mangpuo riypata na tue te, a cuo khuna chung ta i cunglie kha a palung a pasiy.
54001017	Chuozaa Siepahruo, a thiy the lipa, hmung khu a cuo lipa, ama dyi Khazing a cuopa ca chuozaa ta pa-uvsathyipa hne rungnaana pipa ta cuo mangsue. Amen.
54001018	I saacapaa, Timote, nama kawlieta profet tie ama za ri ciepa haata, capa bie ca ziy pata a phace pata naa du khu riypata ica chang.
54001019	Zangna hne a chie a pha thleduona kha a patuv pari tie. Cawsaa chekha ca chiephathleduona siysaa ama ri li nakawta ama zangna kha a ra tli.
54001020	Iema hrawlie ca Hymenaias hne Alekzandar kha amaa te ra. Khazing thuo pachi li riypa amaa cuv the riypata iema kha Setaa kuv chung luo i pi tli yi.
54002001	Cakhutaata, a hmietaace ta ica chang khingpa yi ca, cawsaa bangkhuo cuota Khazing'a luo kha ngiechi ahiena, thlaachuona, thlaa a chuopana, hne palungtluobie hluona kha hnyi tie ung.
54002002	Hnaanguo pata hne a dieta tah ma aw the riypa hne Khazing ciyzaana hne zyazaaphana ta ma aw the riypata siepahruo hne relepa a hriepa tie cuota thlaa chuo tie ung.
54002003	Caca Khuotuv Khazing hmielieta aa hmuopa hne cuhluo khu riypata a cuo.
54002004	Abyipa ca cawsaa bangkhuo khuopa cuo riypa hne biehmisipa ama pachang riypa kha a khing.
54002005	Tahematapakieca, Khazing pakha dyi aw te; Khazing hne cawsaa a lala lieta arena a tuetuv pakha dyi a aw. Ama ca cawsaa ta a cuopa Khrih Zingsuv cuote,
54002006	cawsaa bangkhuo khuo riypata a luv a pipa tana a cuo. Ningcuo aa de tiyta paluosapa pamangsana ta a cuo.
54002007	Capa repa catana kama hing tluo-utuv hne lucuotuv, Jentail ming hrawlie zangna hne biehmisipa pacuvtuv ta tuepa i cuo. Biehmisipa na ica chang yi, hang va ang.
54002008	Cacuonakawta, capaa bangkhuo ca hmangting lie kha hihaa lipa hne a hru a i li pata nama kuv pathepa kha pazuu ungla thlaa nama chuo riypata i khing.
54002009	Cahaa cata, canung zaw kha ade-akhaw pata hne mang a ngie pata caw a tue yi se. Ama suo kha tuepaluena te ta a cataw pata siyy, lungvaa hne caw muoruvtuvpa kha a tue kha yi se.
54002010	Cuorasala Khazing a ciyzaapa canung zyazaa ta a cuopa hmangpha tuena tuv kha a hryi yi se.
54002011	Canung ca rawcanawna hne a dieta tah a cuv se.
54002012	Ahung canung hmuo pacuvtuv cuo riypa hne capaa cunglie naw hnyi riypata khing va ang; a dieta tah aw thluo se.
54002013	Tahematapakieca Adam kha sataapa cuote cakhutaata Evi kha sa pata a cuo.
54002014	Adam ca dung khupa za cuo li pata, Evi tuv kha dung khupa za cuote suena a tuetuv a za cuo.
54002015	Cuorasala canung ca zangna, duena, pathena hneta mang a ngiesa pata a aw kieca saata sana thue hingta khuopa a cuo aa.
54003001	Ahung a cuo zaw Khrihsaabuv luochiytuv cuo kha a khing kieca rephapa na a khing, tapa bie ca aa hmuopa bie tana a cuo.
54003002	Khrihsaabuv luochiytuv ca syi riy a aw lipa, napuv pakha dyi a hnyipa, a cadang a thepa, singvaasa pata a awpa, pa-uvsathyi tluo a tlapa, khyche a duepa, pacuv a thepa cuo'a te;
54003003	sahmaa a pariy thepa cuo'a vyi, a hruo thepa cuo li pata a palung a nepa a cuo aa. Malie hne a hru thepa cuo li pata tuokaa a khing tuvpa cuo'a vyi.
54003004	A ingchungkhue a phata tah a uv khupa cuo'a te a saata zaw ca malie ri a ngiepa hne cawsaa pa-uvsathyi a thepa ama cuo aa.
54003005	Ama ingchungkhue hmuo a uv the li kie Khazing khrihsaabuv ca tuokhaatama a mangchiy khu aa?
54003006	Khrihsaa a cuo thaapa cuo'a vyi. Cacuolikieca ahruo tle'a te aa pale sue kieca Setaa suephawna luo khana a tla sue aa.
54003007	Cadyi cuo li pata, ama ca khrihsaabuv le luo a awpa tie ta ama pa-uvsathyipa a cuo aa. Cacuolikieca a thuo chi'a te Setaa cyihyi lie a uo sue aa.
54003008	Cahaa cata khrihsaa uvthyi zaw ca a zyazaa phapa ama cuo aa. Bie a khing lipa, sahmaa a pariy lipa hne tuokaa luota a karuo a aw lipa a cuo aa.
54003009	A pathepa chiephathleduona ta zangna bieparuv kha a patuv paluopa a cuo aa.
54003010	Dyapasya taapa cuo'a yite syi riy a aw lipa ama cuo kieca khrihsaa uvthyi kha hrie yi se.
54003011	Ama napuvnung zaw kha a zyazaa phapa cuo'a yite, cawsaa kawchie a ripa cuo'a vayi. Cuorasala a cadang thepa hne hmangting lie zangtluo aa tlapa a cuo aa.
54003012	Khrihsaa uvthyi ca napuv pakha dyi hnyi'a te, ama saata hne ama ingchungkhue kha a uv khupa ama cuo aa.
54003013	A phata tah re a hriepa khrihsaa uvthyi ca hmiephaa hmung yite Khrih Zingsuv ama zangna kaw kha riephasa pata ama ri nguo.
54003014	A ru hluo ta niema'a luo i vya tlaw khu thlu aa tapata i nguopuo, cuorasala hingpa caa niema'a luo i vya capepa ca,
54003015	i vya haa sue kieca, Khazing chungkhue lie hing tuokhaatama ma aw aa tapa kha nama pachang riypatana a cuo. A hringpa Khazing khrihsaabuv ca biehmisipa a tungpuv hne a hruo tana a cuo.
54003016	Ma biena bieparuv hing khatluv tama a le tapa kha ahungtahmuo zang li pata aw vayi. Ama ca saapa ta a luo te, Thlaapa lie duopacupa a cuo. Avuoming ta hmung yite, Jentail ming hrawlie phupa a cuo. Alyicung bangkhuo lie zang yite, rungnaana luo lathawpa a cuo.
54004001	Hmie luo thue ca cawsaa chekha ca zangna kha thuse'a yite, dung a thepa thlaapa hne khuevuo tie pacuvna kha ama ziy aa, tapata Thlaapa ta a siesa pata a ri.
54004002	Hingpa pacuvna ca thaa lingpa ta ama pakuo nakawta a chiephathleduona a thiypa, a hanghiepa phahruo a cuo pakhipa tie'a taata a vawpa tana a cuo.
54004003	Iema cata achiyhiena kha thlu yite ning li riypa ama tapa sa chekha zaw a aw. Capa sa ca zangtuv tie hne biehmisipa a pachangpa tie ta palungtluona hne cuhluo riypa, Khazing ta a tuepa sa tana a cuo.
54004004	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta a sapa bangkhuo ca pha te khaapa hinghmuo thaw riy aw vyi, palungtluo bierina hne cuhluo riypatana a cuo.
54004005	Tahematapakieca Khazing bie hne thlaachuona khata a pathe sapa tana a cuo.
54004006	Uvnu hne sieta zaw kha hingpa pacuvna hing na chang kie yi ca na za ziy ciepa aa hmuopa pacuvna hne zangna bie lieta a lethawpa a phapa Khrih Zingsuv changtaapa ta na cuo aa.
54004007	Khazing hne biena a pa-uvsathyi lipa phungpa cakhawpa hne nungpuv tie phungpa kha cahriy tie. Khazing ciyzaa riypa kha a zue tie.
54004008	Tahematapakieca saapa temaana khata thlahnena a hnyi ra pahaata Khazing ciyzaana ca a luo ting ta thlahnena a hnyi. Ata ma hringna hne a vaw riypa ma hringna cuota biekuona a hnyi.
54004009	Capa bie ca aa hmuopa hne cuhluo aa phuvpa tana a cuo.
54004010	Hingpa repa hingtana riethyisa pata te ma maa lawpa ta a cuo. Tahematapakieca maa nguopuonapa kha a hringpa Khazing'a lie kha ma bang. Ama ca cawsaa bangkhuo a khuotuv hne a hlyi ta zangtuv tie a khuotuv ta a cuo.
54004011	Hingpa hing na naa daakhyi riypa hne na pacuv riypata a cuo.
54004012	Mingnu na cuo nakawta ahungtahmuo ca mangbung kha yi se, cuorasala na bierikuovy hne na awtuvzyazaa lie cuose, duedingna, zangna hne pathena lie kha zangtuv tie cuota a mangpuo riypata aw tie.
54004013	Kama i vya chiy nate ta zaapuv hmielie Caapathepa rina, pasuna hne pacuvna kha za tue pari tie.
54004014	Uvthyi tie ta na cunglie ama kuv ama khang ningta profet-biephu ta aca pipa thlaapa lasaw kha siysaa ri li pata aw lie ciy.
54004015	Cawsaa bangkhuo ta na lethawpa kha ama hmung the riypata khapa hmang zaw kha hrie la iema cuo khata a pi tie.
54004016	Nama pangpa cuose, na pacuvna lie cuose a raaring tie. Hing hmang hing ci li pata tue tie, cahaa cata na tue kieca nama kha a khuo khu'a cate na bie naathlietuv tie zaw kha na khuo khu'a yi.
54005001	Uvthyi vie kha chuo kha yi, na paa haakhata rue la paakie la chang tie. A syi vie tie kha na nuta haata rue tie yi.
54005002	Canung uvthyi vie kha na nung haata rue yi la, canung a syi vie tie kha pathiypalung pathesa pata na sieta haata rue tie yi.
54005003	Nunghlyi a cuo hmisipa tie kha pa-uvsathyi tie yi.
54005004	Nunghlyi ta saata a cuo li kie samingta a hnyi kieca iema chungkhue cuota ama hrie riypata a cuopa biena luo kuo ta hrie riypa phung kha a cuv taa yi sala ama nungpaa tie kha mangsang hriy yi se; tahematapakieca caca Khazing hmielie palungtluona tana a cuo.
54005005	Ama se ta a awpa nunghlyi hmisipa ca a nguopuona kha Khazing'a lie chi te, chungzuo ci li pata thlaa a chuo.
54005006	Cuorasala saapa anuona cuota a hringpa nunghlyi ca a hringpa ta athiypa tana a cuo.
54005007	Iema ca syisaapa ama cuo li riypata hing nawbie hing pi tie yi.
54005008	Ahunghmuo cuose a tieriy, a hlyi vie ta a chungkhue kha mangchiy li pata a aw kieca zangna a thawpa hne zanglituv tie laata a chie viepa tana a cuo.
54005009	Kung sawcaruv a hlyipa hne yikha dyi navaa zaa hnyi buopa kha nunghlyi cazing lie pangie tie.
54005010	Repha hriena lie ming a hnyipa, a saata zaw a phasa pata a mangchiypa, khyche a duepa, mingpathepa tie phyi a pasiypa, ruvnaana a tawpa tie a byapa, hne hmangpha tuena lie a cuo hne a thaazuo a pipa a cuo aa.
54005011	A kungnupa nunghlyi tie kha ca cazing lie pangie kha yi; tahematapakieca saapa khingna ta Khrih hne che'a yite navaa ama hnyi khing aa.
54005012	Cahaa cata bie amaa kuo taapa kha ama para nakawta suephawpa ama cuo aa.
54005013	Cadyi cuo li pata, ingkha hnang ingkha a khie yite thaathuvna ta ama cuo kha ama pachuo. Ama thaathuvpa dyi cuo li pata malie kaw ri yite, bierangle yite ri li'apa ting ta ama ri.
54005014	Cacuonakawta a kungnupa nunghlyi ca navaa hnyi pakhaa thluo yi sala, saa sa yi sala amaa chungkhue kha mangchiy yi se tapa i khing. Cata a cuo kieca ma carie tie ta malie rithuochi khu'a vayi.
54005015	Tahematapakieca nunghlyi chekha ca Setaa ziy riypata amaa pali tli.
54005016	Zangtuv canung ta nunghlyi hmisipa tieriy a hnyi kieca, ama ta mangchiy sala khrihsaabuv hmangriy cuo kha se. Cakiedyina khrihsaabuv ta a buchuo riy a hnyi hmisi lipa nunghlyi tie kha aa bya khu'a yi.
54005017	Khrihsaabuv kha a phasa pata mangsang te a hlyi ta phungri hne pacuv kha te a maapa Khrihsaa uvthyi ca hrie muo lehning ta hmung aa phuvpa tana a cuo.
54005018	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, “Suo a ciy nguoluopa cuetungpa kha a hmya hy kha,” ta te, “Rehrietuv ca hrie muo kha hmung aa tla,” a ta.
54005019	A cawce ta a daakhyituv pahning pathung chuo ama aw li kieca khrihsaa uvthyi kha sue ama phaw tiyta naathlie kha.
54005020	Suena a tuepa tie kha zaapuv hmielie pasiypa-ya yi la a hrangpa zaw kha ama ciy aa.
54005021	Hingpa pacuvna hing akuo ta a daana hne thleduona hnyi li pata na ziy riypata Khazing hmielie hne Khrih Zingsuv hmielie hne a tlawpa avuoming hmielieta a raaringna ica pi.
54005022	Khazing rehrietuv cuo riypata ahung cunglie hmuo a catli pata na kuv va khang kha.
54005023	Na riy a pasa thesa nakaw khata tiy dyi dang li tli pata mingsuv tiy kha a cawta tah za dang tie.
54005024	Cawsaa chekha suena ca a siesa pata a luo te ama suena ca iema hluo ta bieripana luo a chiy taa ning kha, a hrangpa tie suena ca a hnang ta aa luo.
54005025	Cahaa cata repha hriena zaw a luo te, a luo li kie zaw ma nu pari khu aw vyi.
54006001	Sii a cuopa bangkhuo ta ama ziy tie kha ciyzaa riypatana ama cuo tapata rue yi se. Cakiedyina Khazing ming hne pacuvna kha ripachie li pata ama aw aa.
54006002	Zangtuv a cuopa ziy a hnyipa tie ta khrihsaa uvnu na ama cuo ra thluo tapata nama ziy kha pa-uvsathyi li pata aw kha ung. Nama re hriepa thlahnena a hmungpa tie ca nama duepa hne zangtuv ama cuo nakawta ama re kha khuo vie ta hrie tie ung. Hingpa ica changpa hing pacuv yi la ziy riypata pasu tie yi.
54006003	Ahung a cuo zaw, a phanghrang ta pacuv yite ima Byipaapa Khrih Zingsuv bie aa hmuopa hne ma biena phung haata pacuvna kha a cuhluo lipa ca,
54006004	a hruotlepa, khaahmuo a pachang lipa, a hnaatluo lipa ruena hnyi pata, biesuo kawlie zaw a-i-achue khingpa tana ama cuo. Capa cata hietliena, palung a lu lina, kawchie a rina hne a ruvphuvna,
54006005	biena hing hnyirungna luopuv suokha ta rue yite pathiypalung phya a pha lipa tie hne biehmisipa a hringkhyi lipa tie zaw hneta ci li pata bie a ina kha a chiykhyi.
54006006	A hnyi thathiypa cunglie a palung a tlingpa cuota ca biena hing hnyirungna ta a cuo hmisi.
54006007	Tahematapakieca chuelyi luo hing khaahmuo zaa puv khyi va puv, cahaa cata khaahmuo a phyale khu'a va puv.
54006008	Cacuonakawta ning riypa sa hne abuv-ase riypa cawsie ma hnyi kieca ma palung a tling riypatana a cuo.
54006009	Cuorasala hnyirung a khingpa ca pasupaliyna luo kha tla yite rakyina luo a chiykhyi khupa yi ngaana hne ciy aa chiypa ama khingna khata cyihyi pa-uo ta a pa-uo yi.
54006010	Tuokaa khingtuvna hing pha lina phangting pyana a hruo tana a cuo. Cawsaa chekha ca hnyirung ama khingtuvna lie kha zangna taata luo pie yite ngiechi kharuehaa vuosuo pata ama aw.
54006011	Cuorasala nama ca Khazing cawsaa na cuo nakawta hingpa zaw hing cahriy la, adangna, Khazing ciyzaana, zangna, duena, ang khuna hne palungnena zaw kha hnyi tie.
54006012	Zangna cuota aduna lie hing a phace pata temaa la chuozaa hringna kha hmung a zue tie. Capa repa cata kupa cuo ung cate cawsaa hluvpuv hmiekunglieta tehte nama khuopa khata a cuo.
54006013	Hmangting bangkhuo hringna a pituv Khazing hne Pontius Pilat hmiekunglie a phata tah tehte a khuopa Khrih Zingsuv hmiekunglie ica changpa ca,
54006014	ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih aa luona te ta hing nawbie hing syisaa riy aw li pata ziy tie.
54006015	Capa ning ca thluechiypa ta a cuopa pakha dyipa Khazing, siepahruo tie Siepahruo, hne byi bangkhuo Byi a cuopa Khazing ta a ningcuo aa rawce ningta a vya patlung sa aa.
54006016	Ama dyi hingna a thiy the lipa, cadi nguo a cuo lipa, khena chunglie a awpa hne ahungtahmuo ama hmung buo lipa hne ama hmung khu li pata a cuo. A cunglie ta pa-uvsathyina hne chuozaa pena naw aw mangsue. Amen.
54006017	Hing chuelyi lie a hnyirungpa tie kha amaa palepatie li riypata hne aa hmang lipa hnyirungna cunglie anguopuona khuotuv ta ama hnyi li riypata chang tie yi. Cuorasala ma hring a nuona riypata hmangting kha pahyasa pata malie a pipa Khazing cunglie kha anguopuona hnyi hriy yi se.
54006018	Phana tue hne hmangpha tuena lie hnyirung pata pahyana hne malie a pipachaa thepa ama cuo riypata chang tie yi.
54006019	Cahaa cata iema ca hmie luo ama hruo cuna riypata sue a pacungpa cuo'a yite hringna hmisi ta a cuopa hringna kha ama hmung aa.
54006020	Timote, chaw riypata aca pipa hmang ca a phata tah chaw tie. A pyalyipa hne siyluo a hnyi lipa bie a inapa, cawsaa chekha ta a hmuo li pata, “singna,” ama tapa kha cahriy tie.
54006021	Cawsaa chekha ta capa singna ca ma hnyi tapata amaa rue raalaa ca zangna kha ama hla. Niema'a lie vihnyina aw mangsue.
55001001	Khrih Zingsuv chunglie a awpa, hringna hne a patuvpa biekuona haata Khazing khingna chunglie Khrih Zingsuv lucuotuv ta a cuopa kama Paul ta,
55001002	I duepa i saacapaa Timote, caa ica paphya. Paa Khazing hne ma Byipaapa Khrih Zingsuv'a taata vihnyina, nangduena hne diena ca na cunglie aw mangsue.
55001003	Ma mingchingmingvuo tie ta amaa zaa biepa haata palung pathesa pata i biepa Khazing ca, chungzuo ta i thlaachuona lie icaa thyi kyry ta i law pari.
55001004	Na mingthliy tlapa kha a thyi pari ang te alawna hne i bi riypata nama kha ica hmung khingsa.
55001005	Nama'a lie a awpa a pakhipa ta a cuo lipa na zangna kha i thyi. Capa zangna ca na mingnung Lois hne na nung Zunis ta za hnyi taa yite nama zaw hing na hnyi ra tapata i zang.
55001006	Cacuonakawta na cunglie i kuv i khangna thueta na chunglie a awpa Khazing lasaw kha na pahring pari riypata ica pasu.
55001007	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta riechiena thlaapa kha malie a pipa cuo li pata cahrana, duena hne kiema pangpa a uv khuna thlaapa khana malie a pi.
55001008	Cakhutaata, Abyipa kaw tehte khuopa kha na nang zaa kha se. Ama cuota thaw a tlapa kama zaw hing na zaakhyi ra kha. Cuorasala Abyipa cahrana lie kha a daa la thuophaabie cuota ruvnaana ang kha kama hing naa hraw tie.
55001009	Malie khuo te a pathepa kuna ta malie a kupa Khazing ta kiema hriena thueta cuo li pata ama atingna hne vihnyina thue tana a cuo. Hingpa a vihnyina hing cuo hruothu hluo taata Khrih Zingsuv thueta pipa ma cuo tli.
55001010	Cuorasala capa vihnyina ca Khuotuv Khrih Zingsuv aa luona thueta phupa a cuo tli. Ama ta thiyna kha para te hringna hne thiy khu li tlina kha thuophaabie thueta khena luo a vya chiykhyi.
55001011	Capa thuophaabie pathyi sa riypa catana kama hing lucuotuv hne pacuvtuv hne saya re pipa i cuo.
55001012	Cacuonakawtana hingpa ruvnaana hing i ang pata a cuo. Cuorasala i nang zaa vyi, tahematapakieca ahungma i zang tapa kha pachang ang te, ama i cake sapa hmang kha capa ning te cata a cake khu aa tapata a siesa pata i zang.
55001013	Kama'a taata na thyipa a tluotlingpa pacuvna kha Khrih Zingsuv chunglie a awpa zangna hne duena ta a patuv tie.
55001014	Kiema chunglie a awpa Thlaapa Pathe abyana khata nama'a lie aca pipa rusungpa kha a phata tah mangsang tie.
55001015	Asia ruo lie a awpa bangkhuo ta inaa ruosepa yi kha na pachang, capa zaw hrawlie ca Figelas hne Hermogenes zaw ama aw ra.
55001016	Onesiforas chungkhue tie kha Abyipa ta nangdue thi yi se, tahematapakieca yi hluvpuv thaazuo thaa na pi te thaw i tlapa hing na zaakhyi vyi.
55001017	Rom luo a vya chiy pahne ta palung hmisi ta na huv te inaa taw.
55001018	Abyipa ta a hnangcawcepa ning lie khiy a nangduena pahmung sa mangsue! Efesa lie kha i cuota khatluv tama re a hrie tapa kha a phasa pata nama pachang.
55002001	I saacapaa, nama ca Khrih Zingsuv'a lieta a awpa vihnyina chunglie kha a cahrasa pata aw tie.
55002002	Tehte hluvpuv hmielie kama'a taata na thyipa kha malie a pacuv pachaa khu riy'apa, zangtluo aa tlapa tie kha pi tie yi.
55002003	Khrih Zingsuv rieka pha pakha haakhata ruvnaana kha ang ra tie.
55002004	Rieka lie re a hrie nguoluopa ta ca a byipaapa palung patling riypa kha aa tingpa a cuo nakawta khychung re hrangpa lie kha a kalaa ra vyi.
55002005	Cakhutaata cang-iena azuena lie zaw kha ziyphung haata a zue lipa ca ahunghmuo tena lakhuv hmung vayi.
55002006	Re hrie te a maapa, lu a thlupa ca thyipaa kha a hmung taa riypatana a cuo.
55002007	Ica changpa yi hing rue ungla Abyipa ta hmangting lie kha pachangna aca pi'a yi.
55002008	I phupa thuophaabie ta a cuopa, thiyna taata a thupakhaapa David saming Zingsuv Khrih kha maw khya.
55002009	Capa kawlie cana a suepa haata thaabuoliriy ta cakhiyna te ta ruvnaana i ang. Cuorasala Khazing bie ca thaabuoliriy ta hre khupa cuo vyi.
55002010	Cacuonakawta a tlawpa tie ta Khrih Zingsuv'a lie a awpa khuona kha chuozaa rungnaana hneta ama cu the riypata hmangting kha i ang law.
55002011	A raw luo'apa bie hing aa hmuopa bie ta a cuo. Ama hneta ma thiy kieca, ama hneta ma hring pakhaw aa;
55002012	Ma ang khu kieca, ama hneta ma uv pakhaw aa; Ama kha ma thaw kieca, ama zaw ta malie a thaw ra aa;
55002013	Kiema kha zangtluo maa tla li zaw ma, ama ca zangtluo a tla pari, tahematapakieca ama hne ama kha a thaw khu vyi.
55002014	Khaahmuo thlahnena hnyi li pata a thyituv tie dyi a parapa bie a ina kha cahriy riypata iema kha Khazing hmielie a raaringna pi yi la chang canyi lawmaw tie yi.
