55002015	A hmisipa bie kha a phata tah pasie sa khu te a zaakhyi riy a hnyi lipa hne ama ta a pha a tapa rehrietuv pakha a daahmang taata nama hne nama kha a phace pata Khazing'a luo a pi tie.
55002016	A pyalyipa hne siyluo a hnyi lipa bie a ina kha cahriy tie, tahematapakieca cawsaa khana Khazing siysaa ri lina luo a chiy hryly'a yi.
55002017	Iema pacuvna ca a cakule hrylypa hmaa hne tana aa lu. Iema hrawlie ca Hymenaias hne Felitas ama aw ra.
55002018	Iema ca biehmisipa taata pie yite a thiypa tie thupakhaana ca a tlung tli tapata cawsaa chekha tie zangna kha ama patawpamuo.
55002019	Cuorasala Khazing ta a cupa hruo kha padaa te, capa hruo lieca, “Abyipa ta ama huopa tie kha a pachang yi,” tapa hne, “Abyipa ming a upa bangkhuo ca pha lina taakhata amaa yi se,” tapata caa aa khe.
55002020	Inglesapa suokha chunglie kha siyy hne ngu ta dyi cuo li pata thing hne acyi ta ama tuepa biphie a phangphang ta aw te, chekha ca cuo sungnaapa ningta hmuopa cuo yite chekha ca a cakhawpa ningta hmuopa ama cuo.
55002021	I ripa haakhata iema hne iema a pathe sapa tie bangkhuo ca ingziypa cuota pathesapa hne cuo sungnaapa ning lieta hmuopa hmangpha ta cuo'a yite, rephapa bangkhuo lie hmuo thepa ama cuo aa.
55002022	Mingnu cuoning saapa khingna kha cahriy la, pathiypalung pathesa pata Abyipa a upa tie hne khata adangna, zangna, duena, hne diena kha hmung a zue tie.
55002023	Ngaana hne pachang laliy li pata bie a ina kha cahriy tie. Ahruna dyina a chiykhyi tapa kha na pachang.
55002024	Abyipa changtaapa ca malie hne a hru thepa cuo'a vyi. Cuorasala cawsaa bangkhuo cunglie duedingna a hnyipa, pacuvtuv pha, a palung pasiypa hne,
55002025	a dutuv tie kha palungnena hne a pasiy a payapa a cuo aa. Khazing ta a ngiepachiyna hne biehmisipa pachangna kha pi'a yite,
55002026	Setaa ta ama khingna tue riypata a hrenapa yi cyihyi taakhata ama vya law ngiethie aa.
55003001	Ning hnangcaw luo thueta ca ruvnaana cuo a hluvpuv a tlung aa tapa kha pachang tie.
55003002	Tahematapakieca, cawsaa ca iema cuo dyi a ruepa, tuokaa a khingpa, ahruo a tlepa, a palung a lepa, malie a esepa, a nungpaa a ciyzaa lipa, duena a pachang the lipa, a pathe lipa,
55003003	cawsaa palung a phya lipa, malie a ngiethe khu lipa, malie thuochi a ripa, a cadang li pata tuokaa a hmuo cakhawpa, a hruopa, hmangpha a huepa,
55003004	malie a lyipa, rue taa li pata re a hriepa, a mingchiepa, Khazing khing li pata anuona a khingpa,
55003005	a cungphang ta Khazing khing pakhi yite a cahrana a paw lipa ama cuo aa. Iema kha cahriy tie yi.
55003006	Tahematapakieca iema chung taata chekha ca ama ingchung luo kha a ngie hnue yite, ama khingna ziy pata suena hne a hringpa, a ruena a cawpa canung tie kha ama sawle khu.
55003007	Hingpa canung tie hing amaa cuv byalya raalaa pata biehmisipa pachangna te pha khu the vayi.
55003008	Jannes hne Jambres ta Moses kha amaa du pahaata ruena a pha lipa hne a pakhipa zangna a hnyipa cawsaa zaw khata biehmisipa kha amaa du ra.
55003009	Cuorasala iema ca asyi ru'a vayi. A cunglie ma ripa cawsaa pahning tie haakhata ama ngaanapa ca cawsaa bangkhuo hmielie phu pata a cuo aa.
55003010	Ata hing nama ca i pacuvna, i zyazaa, i tingnapa, i zangna, i palung pasiyna, i duena, zangna lie i cuna zaw kha na hmung mangtli.
55003011	Antiok, Ikonium hne Listra lie i angpa hrisaathieruena hne ruvnaana zaw kha na hmung mangtli. Tuokhaapa hrisaathieruena ma i ang! Cuorasala Khazing ta khapa bangkhuo taakhata ina khuo.
55003012	Hmisi ta kieca, Khrih Zingsuv chunglie Khazing ciyzaana hring a hnyi khingpa bangkhuo ca hrisaathieruena ama ang aa.
55003013	Cuorasala cawsaa pha lipa hne a hanghiepa tie ca ama pha lina kha ruv vie hryly'a te, cawsaa kha dung'a yite cawsaa ta ama dung aa.
55003014	Cadyiseca, nama ca naa zaa cuvpa hne a cupa na zangna lie kha a cusa pata a daa pazue tie. Ahung'a taata ma naa cuv aa tapa kha pachang cate,
55003015	Khrih Zingsuv na zangna thueta nama kha khuona hmung riypata luo caa pahmung sa khupa Caapathepa kha na cawta baataata tuokhaatama na za pachang tapa kha na pachang.
55003016	Caapathepa hing a bangkhuo ta Khazing ta huv a sungsuepa cuote, pacuvna, aa hmuo lipa pacuvnapa ina, aa hmuo lipa hmang parena, a dangta tah hringna riypata cawpana tah a thlahnepa tana a cuo.
55003017	Cahaa cata Khazing rehrietuv ca a tluotlingpa cuo'a te hmangpha ting hrie riypata cehre phangtling a hnyipa a cuo aa.
55004001	Khazing hmielie hne, a hringpa hne a thiypa bangkhuo bie a ripa riypa Khrih Zingsuv ming hne aa vawna riypa hne a pena kawlieta khuopuv ta ica pasu.
55004002	Thuophaabie kha phu tie; cuo aa raw zaw aa raw li zaw ci li pata phu tie; ama palung sie riypata chang yi, chuo yi, thaazuo pi yi la palung pasiysa pata pacuv tie yi.
55004003	Tahematapakieca cawsaa ta aa hmuopa pacuvna kha ziy li pata iema khingna haata a pacuvtuv kha ama huvna cuo hne,
55004004	biehmisipa naathlie khing li pata a palise'a yite phungpahlaapa naa ama thliena cuo kha a vya pha aa.
55004005	Nama dyi ca, singvaasa pata aw la, ruvnaana kha ang law la, thuophaabie phuna re kha hrie tie. Na resungnaapa kha a phasa pata hrie pazue tie.
55004006	Kama ca, bienatluophie lie ama lyipa hriykhungrina tiy haata i hringna pina cuo a vya tlung tli. Hing chuelyi hringna i sisena cuo a pha tli.
55004007	Rietuvna kha a phasa pata i patlung tli. A ruo azuena lie kha a chuona te i ruo tli. Zangna kha a cusa pata i patuv tli.
55004008	Ata taahing taca a dangna lakhuv kha chipa pata cuo ang te, capaca aa dangpa bieripatuv byi, Abyipa ta ningchuoningpa thueta ina pi aa. Kama dyi cuo li pata ama aa vawna riypa a ngietie li pata a huopa bangkhuo zaw kha a pi ra'a yi.
55004009	Kama'a luo a catlisa pata a vaw riypa kha a zue tie.
55004010	Tahematapakieca Demas ca hing chuelyi hing a tlechuo vie nakawta Thesalonika luo ina sise tli. Krese ca Galati luo na sise te Titas ca Dalmatia luo ina sise.
55004011	Luka dyina kama'a lie a aw. Marka kha a vya chiyle tie, i resungnaapa hriena lie a thlahnesapa tana a cuo.
55004012	Taikhikas kha Efesa luo i paphya.
55004013	Naa vaw thueta Troas khy Karpas'a lie i chi siypa buohryipasiypa kha na vya phya tie. Caa-uv hne a hlyi ta savang caa-uv kha vya maw lie ciy.
55004014	Thiyhring a patlepa Alexander kha ruvnaana lepuv naa pi; Abyipa ta a tuena haata a thung aa.
55004015	Nama zaw a raaring tie, tahematapakieca ma ripa bie kha khuopuv ta a dupa tana a cuo.
55004016	A yikhanapa bie ina ripa ning yi ca ahungtahmuo naa daakhyi vayi; inaa ruose diy yi. Khazing ta suena ta ripa hrue kha yi se.
55004017	Cuorasala thuophaabie kha tluotlingsa pata i phu khu riypa hne Jentail ming bangkhuo ta ama thyi khu riypata Abyipa ta na aw khyi te thaazuo ina pi. Cahaa cata kama ca chingde pakaa taata khuopa i cuo.
55004018	Abyipa ta pha lina bangkhuo chung taa khata na khuo'a te, a vuoruo pena chung luo ca inaa ngiekhyi aa. A cunglie rungnaana chuozaa ta aw mangsue.
55004019	Prisilla hne Akuila hne Onesiforas chungkhue tie kha ama kuv i patuv yi.
55004020	Erastas ca Korin khy lie a ngaa te; Trofimas ca a pasa cangta Miletas lie i thuse.
55004021	Thlasiypaa hluo ta naa vaw khu riypata a zue tie. Zubulas, Pudens, Linas, Klaudia hne, uvnu hne sieta zaw bangkhuo na nama kuv caa patuv yi.
55004022	Abyipa ca na thlaapa hneta aw thi se. Vihnyina ca niema bangkhuo cunglie aw mangsue.
56001001	Khazing changtaapa hne Zingsuv Khrih lucuotuv ta a cuopa kama Paul ta caa ica paphya. Kama ca Khazing a tlawpa tie ta zangna hne biehmisipa ama pachangna lie Khazing ciyzaana hne ama lethaw hryly riypata pathliepa tana i cuo.
56001002	A hang buo lipa Khazing ta capa chuozaa hringna anguopuona ca cuo hruothu hluo taata biekuo ciepa cuote,
56001003	a cuo aa de ningta a phupa a cuo. Capa thuophaabie phu riypa cata Khuotuv Khazing biepina haata zang pata re pipa i cuo.
56001004	Zangna suokha a hrawna chunglie i saata hmisi ta a cuopa Titas'a luo hingpa caa hing ica paphya. Paa Khazing hne Khuotuv Khrih Zingsuv'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca na cunglie aw mangsue.
56001005	Krit lie ica chi siy napa ca ica changpa haakhata, hrie riypata a ngaa kaliepa re kha a phata tah na hrie riypa hne khy ting ta Khrihsaa uvthyi chi riypa khatana a cuo.
56001006	Khrihsaabuv luochiytuv pakha ca, syisaa riy a hnyi lipa, napuv pakha dyi a hnyipa, a saata zaw zangtuv cuo'a yite anuopaana luota thuochi a phyapa hne ri a ngie lipa cuo'a vayi.
56001007	Khrihsaabuv hruetuv ca Khazing re lie mangchiykingkaatuv a cuo pahaata, syisaa riy a aw lipa a cuo aa. Ama ca a hruotlepa, a pathiy pachangpa, sahmaa a pariy thepa, a hruopa hne a karuo awpa cuo'a vyi.
56001008	Cuorasala, ama ca khyche a duepa, phana a khingpa, a singvaapa, aa dangpa, Khazing'a luo te a maapa, ama hne ama a uv khupa a cuo aa.
56001009	Ama ca pacuvna aa hmuopa kha a cusa pata a patuv'a te, aa hmuopa phungluo kha a pacuv khupa hne aa hmuo lipa pacuvna kha a i khutuv ta a cuo aa.
56001010	Tahematapakieca a du a hmuopa cawsaa hluvpuv, thlahnena a hnyi lipa bie a ripa hne a hanghiepa hluvpuv aw yite, a hlyi ta vangdaw a tepa tie chung taata ama cuo.
56001011	A dieta tah aw yi se, tahematapakieca, aa hmuo li pata tuokaa hmungkhingna vuota pacuv riypata a pha lipa kha pacuv yite chungkhue bangkhuo ngie ama pachi.
56001012	Iema chunglie pakha ta a cuopa ama profet pakha ta, “Krit ming ca a hang paripa, saruopa haata cawsaa pha lipa, a thaathiypa hne ning a rangpa tana ama cuo,” a ta.
56001013	Capa tehtekhuona ca aa hmuopa tana a cuo. A hmuopa zangna ama hnyi the riypata capa kawlie ca khuosa ta chuo tie yi.
56001014	Judah ming phungpa hne biehmisipa a dupa tie nawbie kha siysaa ri li pata aw tie ung.
56001015	A pathepa tie cuota hmangting hing pathe te, a rapa hne a zang lipa tie cuota ca a pathepa aw vyi. Ama pathiypalung hne ama chiephathleduona khana a ra tli.
56001016	Iema ca Khazing kha ma pachang ama ta raalaa pata, ama tuesana khata ama kha ama thaw. Iema ca duv aa chiypa, ri a ngie lipa, hne tuokhaapa hmangphapa hne tahmuo aa tla lipa tana ama cuo.
56002001	Cuorasala nama ca, aa hmuopa ziyphung hne aa tlapa pacuvna kha pacuv tie.
56002002	Capaa uvthyi vie tie kha a ruepacuo thepa, a hmuochuopa, a ruedaw thepa, zangna aa hmuopa a hnyipa, duena a hnyipa hne ang khuna a hnyipa ama cuo riypata chang tie yi.
56002003	Cahaa cata canung uvthyi vie tie zaw kha hringcuozyazaa lie pa-uvsathyi aa tlapa, malie thuo a pachipa hne dang li pata a aw khu lipa ama cuo li riypata chang tie yi. Khaapa hingma a pha tapa kha amaa cuv riypata chang tie yi.
56002004	Iema ta canung kungnu vie tie kha navaapa a duepa, saata zaw a duepa,
56002005	iema hne iema a uv khupa, hringzya pathepa a hnyipa, ingchungkhue a uv khupa, malie kaw a pacuopa, a navaapa a ciyzaapa, ama cuo riypata chang yi se. Cakiedyina Khazing bie hing a thuochi li pata a aw aa.
56002006	Cahaa cata capaa kungnu vie tie zaw kha iema hne iema amaa uv khu riypata pasu tie yi.
56002007	Nama hrahring kha rephapa lie a mangpuo a tla riypata aw la, na pacuvna lie zaw yi kha a hmuochuosa pata pacuv tie yi.
56002008	Syi khu li riypa biephapa kha hmuo la, kiema malie a dutuv tie kha ma thuochi ri riypa khaahmuo ama hnyi li nakawta ama nang a zaa aa.
56002009	Sii tie kha ama ziy zaw a ciyzaapa hne ama palung a patluopa ama cuo riypa hne bie ama palie li riypata chang tie yi.
56002010	Acawta tah nuparuvpa tue li pata zangtluo aa tlapa ama cuona kha paluo sa yi se. Cakiedyina Khuotuv Khazing pacuvna kha hmangting lieta a papuvthe sapa ama cuo aa.
56002011	Tahematapakieca Khazing vihnyina ca cawsaa bangkhuo khuona cuota aa luo tli.
56002012	Ca vihnyina cata kiema kha Khazing siysaa ri lina hne chuelyi khingna kha thaw pata hingpa ma chuo chunglie hing kiema hne kiema a uv khupa, aa dangpa, hne Khazing a ciyzaapa ma cuo riypata malie a pacuv.
56002013	Cahaa cata kiema ca thluechiypa anguopuona hne a lesyipa Khazing hne Khuotuv, Zingsuv Khrih rungnaana aa luo riypa kha ma huo nguoluo.
56002014	A pha lipa bangkhuo taata kiema kha a thla riypa hne ama cuo hrahring ta a pathepa cuo riypa hne hmangpha a tue khingpa ama cawsaa zaw cuo riypata kiema cuota a hringna a pipa ca Zingsuv catana a cuo.
56002015	Hingpa kaw hing pathyisa tie; nawhnyina hneta pasu yi la pacu sa tie. Ahungtahmuo ca mangbung kha yi se.
56003001	Iema kha uvtuv tie hne nawhnyi-tuv tie ri a ngie riypata chang pakhaa tie yi. Cawsaa pa-uvsathyi riypa, hmangphapa bangkhuo tue riypa,
56003002	pakha hmuota biechiepa ta chaw li riypa, ahru-a-ina kha cahriy riypa, nangne riypa, hne cawsaa bangkhuo hmielie a pane pata aw riypa kha chang tie yi.
56003003	Tahematapakieca, a hluo taca kiema hrahring zaw hing za ngaasa pate ri a ngie li pata luo ma za paa. Saapa khingna phangting hne anuona lie kha sii za cuo pate ma cuo kha pha lina hne hietliena, duv aa chiypa hne manghnue aa chiypa, pakha hne pakha ahuena lie kha ma cuo ma pachuo sa.
56003004	Cuorasala kiema Khuotuv Khazing phana hne duena aa luo tiyta,
56003005	kiema kha malie a khuo. Ca malie a khuopa ca kiema ma tuepa hmangphapa nakaw cuo li pata a nangduena thueta hne tiy ta puvpathiyna hne a Thlaapa Pathe ta sapathiyna thueta a cuo.
56003006	Maa Khuotuv Zingsuv Khrih thueta Thlaapa ca kiema cunglie kha a hluvpuv ta byapa ma cuo.
56003007	Cahaa cata kiema ca chuozaa hringna anguopuona thueta a rucutuv cuo riypata a vihnyina ta duopacupa ma cuo.
56003008	Capa bie ca aa hmuopa bie tana a cuo. Khazing a zang tlipa tie taca hmangpha tuena lieta iema hne iema amaa pi riypa kha namaa daakhyi riypata icaa khingkhyi yi. Hingpa hmang hing cawsaa bangkhuo cuota a phacepa hne a thlahnepa ta a cuo.
56003009	Cuorasala ngaana bie a ina, thukina cazing kaw a ina, ruena a lulina, hne phungbie kaw a ina zaw kha cahriy tie, thlahnena hne muo a hnyi lipa tana a cuo.
56003010	Buv a chena a tuepa kha a raaringna yikha yihning na pi khu taata acaa ngie li kieca a khe kha tie ung.
56003011	Cahaapa cawsaa kha ca apali-apahnaa ta a cangpa hne a suepa ta cuote a suena ta suebie a ripa aa tapa kha na pachang.
56003012	Nama'a luo Artemas a cuo li kie Atikhikas i vya pathlie pahne i awnapa Nicopolis luo a vaw a zue la i khing, tahematapakieca thlasiy chung ca ama lie hing aw riypatana i ting.
56003013	Sihni Zenas hne Apollos ama khytlawna lie kha amaa hupa tluo a tling riypata na cuo khu chung ta zaa bya yi.
56003014	Cawsaa kha a cakhawpa ama cuo li riypa hne a huna lie a khue a pahruvpa ama cuo the riypata repha hriena lie aa pipa ama cuo riypata a cuv yi se.
56003015	Kama'a lie a awpa bangkhuo na nama kuv caa patuv yi. Zangna lie malie a duepa tie kha ama kuv na patuvpa mya yi. Nama bangkhuo cunglie vihnyina aw mangsue.
57001001	Khrih Zingsuv kawlieta thaw a tlapa kama Paul hne ma uvnupa Timote ta,
57001002	ma viesaa hne ma rehriehne ta a cuopa Filemon, ma sieta Apfia, ma rieka viesaa Arkhipas hne na ing lie a pungpa khrihsaabuv kha caa maca paphya yi.
57001003	Ma Paa Khazing hne ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca nama cunglie aw mangsue.
57001004	I thlaachuona lie caa thyi pari ang te Khazing kha i pathuo sa.
57001005	Tahematapakieca mingpathepa tie na duena hne Abyipa Zingsuv na zangna kha i thyi.
57001006	Zingsuv Khrih cuota ma hrie riypa a phapa bangkhuo na pachangpasie thueta na zangna kaw thuophaabie na phupa kha a hma a si riypata thlaa ica chuopa.
57001007	I nuta, na duena ta i palung khuopuv ta na patluo sa te thaazuo ina pi. Tahematapakieca mingpathepa tie nama ta mingpathepa tie palung kha na patluo sa.
57001008	Canakaw cata, na hrie riypa re kha hrie riypata riephasa pata Khrih ming ta naw ica pi nguo raalaa pata,
57001009	kama Paul ta uvthyi vie cuona taa hne Khrih Zingsuv cuota thaw a tlapa cuona taata duena hne paa ica kie.
57001010	Thaw i tla nguoluo chung ta i saata ta a vya cuopa Onesimas cuota paa ica kie.
57001011	Ahluo taca na cuota khaahmuo thlahne vyi, cuorasala ata hing ca nama hne kama ma cuota a thlahnepa a cuo tli.
57001012	Ama kha, i pathiy i palung hneta nama'a luo ica paphya pakhaa.
57001013	Thuophaabie kawlie thaw i tlana lie hing kama kha mangsang riypata, nama cuopa ta na aw puo sala tapata i khing.
57001014	Cuorasala nama palung tling li pata khaahmuo tue khing va ang, tahematapakieca na hmangpha tuena hing hripuo nakaw cuo li pata nama palung thu ta a cuopa i khing.
57001015	Nama hne kaakha aa chepa hing ama kha chuozaa ta na hnyi khu na riypatana a cuo thlu aa.
57001016	Na cuota sii pakha haata cuo li pata sii laata a suo viepa duepa uvnu pakha ta a cuo tli. A hlyi ta kama cuota zaw cuote, nama cuota changchiy ca thiysaa lie hne Abyipa chunglie ta na duepa uvnu a cuo.
57001017	Cacuonakawta kama kha na rehriehne ta ina rue cakieca, kama ina cuhluo'apa haa cata ama kha cuhluo tie.
57001018	Ama ta na cunglie suena suokhakha a tue kie cuose, suokhakha acaa uo kie cuose, kama cazing lie kha khung tie.
57001019	Kama Paul ta i kuv ta i cape: Ica thung hrahring aa. Nama pangpa hrahring hing hmuo kama'a lie inaa uopa cakha khaahmuo ri'a va tli ang.
57001020	A cuo, i nuta, Abyipa ming ta ica hiepa hing na pi tie! Khrih chunglie i palung na patluo tie.
57001021	I ripa laa hing tahmuo a pha vie ta na tue aa tapa kha pachangna cangta hne na ri-angiena kha zangna cang ta nama'a luo caa i vya capepa a cuo.
57001022	I vya ri khing kaliepa ca, i tlungna riypata ingkhuo khuokha kha na za chipa pacie tie, tahematapakieca nama thlaachuona thueta niema'a luo ivya chiy pakhaa thlu aa tapata i nguopuo.
57001023	Khrih Zingsuv'a lie i thawtlahnepa Epafras ta na kuv aca patuv.
57001024	I rehriehne a cuopa Marka, Aristarkas, Demas, hne Luka zaw ta na kuv aca patuv yi.
57001025	Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina ca niema'a lie aw mangsue.
58001001	Hluo ningta ca Khazing ta ma mingchingmingvuo tie'a lie kha profet tie hmuo pata yi hluvpuv hne a luo hluvpuv ta bie a za ri.
58001002	Cuorasala ata chuotliepa chuo lie hingca a Saacapaa taata kiema'a lie kha bie a ri. Khazing ta ama kha hmangting bangkhuo rucutuv riypata tue te chuelyi zaw hing ama thueta sapa a cuo.
58001003	Saacapaa ca Khazing rungnaana a paluo satuv hne Khazing ama hrahring a lupa ta sapa a cuo. A cahrapa a bie ta hmangting bangkhuo kha a pacu sa. Sue pathesana kha tue te, Cungnungce Khazing cacuo luota aa tu.
58001004	Ama a pipa ming ca avuoming ming laata a suo vie pahaata ama ca avuoming laata a le vie karaapa ta a cuo.
58001005	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta tuokhaapa avuoming kha hmuo, “Nama ca i Saacapaa ta na cuo; ata ning hing na Paa ta i cuo tli,” ta vayi. A cuo li kie, “Kama ca a Paa ta cuo'a ang te, ama ca i Saacapaa ta a cuo aa,” ta buo ra vyi.
58001006	Cakhutaa, Khazing ta sa-uvthyi kha chuelyi luo a zaa chiy ningta a ripa ca, “Khazing avuoming bangkhuo ta ama hing abie ung,” a ta.
58001007	Avuoming kawlie taca, Avuoming kha thliy ta tue yite, a changtaapa tie kha myihlaa ta a tue yi,” a ta.
58001008	Cuorasala Saacapaa kawlie taca, “Vya Khazing, naa Byithude ca chuozaa ta a hmang mangsue, adangna hne uvpa pena ca nama pena tana a cuo.
58001009	Nama ca adangna kha tlechuo cate pha lina kha na hue; cacuonakawta Khazing, nama Khazing ta palungtluona sathu ca pathuv te, na viesaa zaw laata aca cyicalang vie.
58001010	Cakhutaata, “Khazing, a hruothu taata nama ta chuelyi hing sa cate, vuoruo zaw hing nama kuvzung tana a cuo;
58001011	Iema bangkhuo hing ra'a yite, cuorasala nama ca naa hmang aa; iema bangkhuo ca pang haata caw diy'a yite,
58001012	buohryi haata na kadiy thluv'a yi, Iema ca caw haata thlepa ama cuo aa. Cuorasala nama ca na hmanghmangpa ta cuo pari'a cate, na kungkhue zaw khatiy tahmuo chuo buo'a vyi,” a ta.
58001013	Cuorasala tuokhaapa avuoming khahmuo, “Na carie zaw kha na phyipazaa rawlie i chi hluo li yi, I cacuo luo khata a tu tie,” a ta buo yi ma?
58001014	Avuoming bangkhuo hing khuona ru a cu riypa tie mangchiy riypata pathliepa Abyipa re a hrietuv thlaapa cuo vayi ma?
58002001	Cacuonakawta luopie ziy pata ma vie li riypata ma thyipa biehmisipa kha a phata tah rue ungsiy.
58002002	Tahematapakieca, avuoming ta ama pathyisapa thuohlaa hing aa hmuopa cuo sala, suena bangkhuo hne ri a ngie lina bangkhuo cuota duotena ang riypa a cuo kieca,
58002003	kiema ta hing tluv ta a lesyipa khuona hing siysaa ri li pata ma aw kieca sue duotena taata tuokhaatama ma law khu aa? Hing khuona thuophaa hing Khazing ama hrahring ta phu taa te, cakhutaata a thyipa tie ta aa hmuopa a cuopa kha kiema'a lie ama phu pachaa.
58002004	Khazing ta ama kaw tehte ama khuopa kha aa hmuo tapata pahmungsana zaw, kharuehaa hmang zaw, Thlaapa Pathe lasaw zaw kha a khingna haata a re chiy yi.
58002005	Khazing ta kiema ima ri nguoluopa, a vaw riypa chuelyi hing avuoming kuv raw luo pi vayi.
58002006	Cuorasala cawsaa pakha ta Caapathepa suvkha lie, “Cawsaa hing khaapata cuote ma se na hie pari? A thiy thepa hing khaapata cuote ma kaw na pacuo?
58002007	Iema kha cuokhata chung avuoming laata a cawta aa ne vie ta na tue yi; rungnaana hne pa-uvsathyina byilakhuv pakhuv yi cate,
58002008	hmangting bangkhuo kha ama phyipazaa rawlie na chi,” a ta. Hmangting bangkhuo kha iema kuv raw luo na a chi diy ma ta tiyta, Khazing ta iema uvna le luota a chipa suokha hmuo aw vyi. Cuorasala ata hing ca hmangting bangkhuo iema kuv rawlie a awpa kha hmung valie puv.
58002009	Cadyiseca, Khazing vihnyina thueta cawsaa bangkhuo cuota thiyna ang riypata cuokhata chung avuoming laata a ne vie ta chipa Zingsuv ca thiyna ruvnaana a angna thue khata rungnaana hne pa-uvsathyina byilakhuv ca pakhuv pata a cuo.
58002010	Hmangting bangkhuo a tuetuv hne a pa-aw satuv Khazing ta cawsaa hluvpuv kha rungnaana pahmung sa riypata ama zangna hruothuna byi a cuopa kha te-angna taata a tling pata a tuepa ca aa tlapa hmang hrahring tana a cuo.
58002011	Duo a pacu satuv hne duopacu sapa tie paa ca pakha tana a cuo. Cacuonakawna iema kha, uvnu hne sieta zaw tapata ku riypata Zingsuv a nang a zaa li pakha a cuo.
58002012	Caapathepa ta, “Na ming ca i uvnu hne sieta zaw'a luo ukhyi'a ang te, cawsaazaapuv hrawlie kha ica pathuo sa aa,” a ta.
58002013	Cakhutaata, “Nama na ica zang aa,” a ta. Cakhutaata, Khazing ta ina pipa i saata zaw hrawlie, hinglie hingna i aw,” a ta pakhaa.
58002014	Saata zaw ta thiy hne saa cuona suokha kha amaa hraw nakawta Zingsuv zaw capa thiy hne saa cuona ca aa hraw ra. Cahaa cata aa tuepa ca thiyna a angna thue khata thiyna uvtuv Setaa kha para pata,
58002015	thiyna ciyna pata ama hringzung ta sii ta aa ziypa tie kha lawna pi riypata a cuo.
58002016	Avuoming a bya riypata a zuvpa cuo li pata Abraham ciypathla zaw a bya riypatana aa zuv tapa ca a siesa.
58002017	Cacuonakawta hmangting lie kha a uvnu hne sieta zaw haakhata a cuo a hu te, cata a cuona ca cawsaa ta sue a ngiethena ama cu riypata Khazing re a hriena lie kha nangduena hne zangtluo aa tlapa tluobyilecepa a cuona riypatana a cuo.
58002018	Tahematapakieca ama hrahring ta ruvnaana hne pasupaliyna kha a ang tli nakawta pasupaliyna a angpa tie kha a bya khutuv ta a cuo.
58003001	Cacuonakawta, vuoruo taata u hne pakhawpa uvnu hne sieta zaw, lucuotuv hne tluobyilepa ta a cuo tapata ma zangpa Zingsuv kaw kha rue tie ung.
58003002	Moses ca Khazing ing chunglie zang tluo a tla pahaakhata Zingsuv zaw ta ama a tlawtuv Khazing cunglie zangtluo a tla ra.
58003003	Ing laata ing satuv kha pa-uvsathyina a hmung vie pahaata Zingsuv ca Moses laata pa-uvsathyina a hmung vie.
58003004	Tahematapakieca ing bangkhuo ca cawsaa pakhakha ta sapa a cuo pahaata hmangting bangkhuo satuv ca Khazing ta a cuo.
58003005	Moses ca changtaapa a cuo pahaata Khazing ing chunglie zangtluo a tla pata a aw aa. Khazing ta hmie luo thue a ri riypa kha a pachangtuv tana a cuo.
58003006	Cadyiseca, Khrih ca Saacapaa a cuo pahaata Khazing ing lie kha zangtluo aa tlapa a cuo. Kiema zaw hing ma zangna hne maa palesakhyipa anguopuona kha a cusa pata maa patuv kieca a ing ta ma cuo.
58003007	Cacuonakawta, Thlaapa Pathe ta a ripa haata, “Ata ning hing niema ta Abyipa ueryi kha nama thyi kieca,
58003008	nama mingchingmingvuo tie ta ruochung lie kama inaa zaa du ning haa yi khata, nama palung le kha se.
58003009	Kung sawliy chung i re hriepa ama hmung thluo pata, khapa hmang lie kha inaa zaa du yi.
58003010	Cacuonakawta iema cunglie kha i hi haa te, ama palung si zya ca chie pari te, i luopuv kha pachang vayi, i ta.
58003011	I hihaa te chie i sapa yi ca, ‘kama adingna luo kha a ngie khu'a vayi,’” i ta.
58003012	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, a hringpa Khazing a ruosena te ta zang lina pathiypalung chiepa kha niema pakha hmuo nama hnyi li riypata a raaring tie ung.
58003013	Cuorasala hangthenapa suena ta nama palung aca pale sa li riypa yita, ata ning ma tapa a aw chung bangkhuo a ning tating ta pakha hne pakha kha a pasu tie ung.
58003014	Tahematapakieca a hruothu baataata ma za hnyipa hnaanguona kha a chuona te ta a cusa pata maa patuv kie kyalya na, Khrih hne a hraw ra pata ma cuo aa.
58003015	Caapathepa ta, “Ata ning hing a ueryi na thyi kieca, amaa zaa du ning haakhata nama palung le kha se,” a ta.
58003016	Ahungma a ueryi thyi te a dutuv ca a cuo? Moses luochiyna raw lieta Izipt ruo a vya pya sepa tie kha cuo vayi ma?
58003017	Ahung cunglie ma kung sawliy chung a hi a haa? Suena ama tue nakawta ruochung lie a thiypa tie cunglie kha cuo vama?
58003018	Ri namaa ngie li kieca adingna luo kha a ngie khu'a va ungciy tapata ahungkhama chie i sa yi?
58003019	Cacuonakawta, ama zang li nakawta adingna luo amaa ngie khu li pakha ma hmung.
58004001	Cacuonakawta, adingna luo a ngiena riypa biekuo aa pahaw kalie ningta, niema pakha hmuo a ngie li pata nama aw li riypata a raaring ungsiy.
58004002	Tahematapakieca thuophaabie ca iema'a luo a chiy pahaata kiema'a luo zaw a chiy ra. Cuorasala ama thyipa bie kha zangna ta amaa paw li nakawta ama cuota thlahne vayi.
58004003	A zangpa kiema ca Khazing ta a ripa haata adingna luo kha maa ngie. Khazing ta, “I hi haa te chie i sapa haayita, I dingna luo kha a ngie'a vayi,” a ta. Chuelyi a sa baataata a re ca a patlung tli raalaa pata hinghaahingta a ri.
58004004	Tahematapakieca suvkha lieta ningsariynapa kaw hne a patuv pata a raw luo haahingta a ri, “Khazing ca ningsariynapa lie kha a re taata aa ding,” a ta.
58004005	Calie ngiethie cata, “I dingna luo a ngie'a vayi,” ata pakhaa.
58004006	Cacuonakawta a ngie riypa chekha a ngaa kalie yite, thuophaabie zaa thyi taapa tie ca ri amaa ngie li nakawta a ngie khu vayi.
58004007	Khazing ta ning ning kha kha, “ata ning,” tapata thli te Caapathepa lie a ri ciepa haata cuo syipuv khutaa khata David'a lie a ripa ca, “Ata ning hing, a ueryi nama thyi kieca, Nama palung le kha se,” a ta.
58004008	Joshua ta adingna hing za pi yi sala, Khazing ta ning hrangpa kaw hing ri'a vyi.
58004009	Cahaa cata a cuo nakawta sabbath adingna ca Khazing cawsaa zaw cuota a aw kalie.
58004010	Tahematapakieca Khazing ca a re taata aa ding pahaata, Khazing adingna luo a ngiepa tie zaw ama re taata amaa ding ra aa.
58004011	Cahaapa iema ri a ngie lina haakhata kiema pakha hmuo Khazing adingna luo a ngie li pata ma aw li riypata a cuo khu chung ta a zue ungsiy.
58004012	Khazing bie ca hring te a cahra. Kuo hning ta a cahrepa zueziy laata a cahre vie. Pathiypalung hne thlaapa kha cuose, ruv cakhiy hne ruv lathliy kha cuose dawpahaw khu te; pathiypalung ta aa tingpa hne a ruena zaw kha a pachang diy.
58004013	Sapa hmang khaapahmuo a hmiekunglie a nu khu vyi. Cuorasala ama hmielie ca a luotaalaa diy te ama'a lie kha ma kaw cyicuo ca maa ri kaluo aa.
58004014	Cacuonakawta kiema ca vuoruo luo a chiy tlipa a lesyipa tluobyilecepa, Zingsuv, Khazing Saacapaapa kha ma hnyi nakawta ma zangna kha a cusa pata patuv'a ungpuv.
58004015	Tahematapakieca ma tluobyilecepa ca ma thaadyana lie kha kaw malie a pacuo lipa hne ngie malie a chi lipa cuo vyi, cuorasala kiema haata akuo ting taata pasupaliyna a taw rapa cuote, suena ca hnyi vyi.
58004016	Cacuonakawta a hu cuo ningta nangduena hne vihnyina kha ma hmung the riypata a vihnyina byithude luo ca riephasa pata va pangie ungsiy.
58005001	Cawsaa zaw hraw taata a tlawpa tluobyilecepa bangkhuo ca cawsaa bangkhuo cuota Khazing kha lasaw a pi riypa hne suena a ngiethena hriykhung a ri riypata re pipa ama cuo.
58005002	Ama zaw a thaadyapa a cuo ra nakawta ruena a cawpa hne luo a piepa tie cunglie kha kawpacuona a hnyi.
58005003	Cahaa cata a cuo nakawta ama cuo hne cawsaa zaw cuo khata hriykhungrina kha a tue aa hu.
58005004	Hing pa-uvsathyina a hmungpa re hing ahungtahmuo ama hne ama a pi khu vyi. Cuorasala Aaron a ku pahaakhata Khazing ta a ku kiedyi hrie khupa a cuo.
58005005	Cacuonakawta Khrih zaw ama hne ama kha tluobyilecepa cuo riypata a cyicalang vyi. Cuorasala ama kha, “Nama ca i Saacapaa cuo cate, Ata ning hing na Paa ta i cuo,” ta te,
58005006	a hrangpa suvkha lie zaw, “Nama ca Melkhizedek cuona haata, chuozaa tluobyi tana na cuo,” a tatuvpa na tluobyilecepa luo a cyicalang.
58005007	Zingsuv ca saapa ta a aw ningta thiyna taata a khuo khutuv Khazing'a luo kha khuosa ta khi te mingthliy hneta thlaachuona ta paa a kie. Pa-uvsathyi aa tlapa aa pina thueta thyipa pata a cuo.
58005008	Khazing Saacapaa a cuo raalaa pata a te-angna khata ri-angiena aa cuv.
58005009	Tluo a tlingpa ta tuepa a cuo tiyta ama ri a ngiepa bangkhuo cuota chuozaa khuona hruopuv ta a vya cuo.
58005010	Khazing ta Melkhizedek tluobyi cuona phung haata tluobyilecepa ta a pacuo sa.
58005011	Hingpa kawlie hingta ri riypa a hluvsa ma hnyi, cuorasala bie nama thyi the li nakawta niema'a lie pasie sa hing a ruv ciemuo.
58005012	Ata hing ca pacuvtuv cuo hmuo namaa de tli raalaa pata Khazing bie kha a hruothu taata pacuv pakhaa namaa hu. Sacuopa cuo li pata ahnungtiy pi namaa hu.
58005013	Ahnungtiy a dangpa ca haaseta ta cuo yite, adangna bie kha thyi khu the valie yi.
58005014	Cuorasala sacuopa ca uvthyita cuota cuote, iema ca amaa tawpa hmang khata a chiepa hne a phapa thleduo the riypata a pacuv tlipa tie tana ama cuo.
58006001	Cacuonakawta Khrih kaw a hruothuna pacuvna luo kha kaa li tli pata sang siy tli ung sala a tluotlingpa pacuvna luo kha tungle ungsiy. Athiypa re taata a ngiepachiyna kaw, Khazing zangna kaw,
58006002	tiynawna kaw, kuvkhangna kaw, a thiypa tie thupakhaana kaw, hne chuozaa suebieripana kaw zaw kha ca a pacuv pakhaa a hu va tli.
58006003	Khazing ta malie a khingkhyi kieca hmie luo cana ma tung'a ung.
58006004	Tahematapakieca Khazing khena chunglie zaa aw buo tlipa tie, vuoruo lasaw kha a pacuo buo tli yite Thlaapa Pathe a ting buo tlipa tie,
58006005	Khazing bie a pha zya kha a pacuo tlipa tie, a vaw riypa chuo a cahrana kha a pacuo tlipa tie,
58006006	ama cuo raalaa pata a lie pakhaapa tie ca sue a ngiepachiyna luo kaakhyi pakhaa khu pata cuo vayi. Tahematapakieca Khazing Saacapaa kha vieluo lie khepuo pakhaa yite cawsaa hmielie nangzaa hmiechi ta a tue pakhaapa tana ama cuo.
58006007	Zaa saa canyi lawmawpa khytiy kha saw te lu a thlupapaa cuota thyipaa pha a papyapa alyi ca Khazing thluechiy a hmungpa alyi tana a cuo.
58006008	Cuorasala capa alyi cata ahling kung hne lubi dyi a papu sa kieca a thlahnena aw li'a pata a chuona taca chiesa pata myi ta rue riypatana a cuo aa.
58006009	Duepa zaw, hinghaahingta ma ri raalaa pata niema kawlie taca khuona a hnyipa hmang pha viepa na nama hmung aa ta pate ma hnaa a nguo.
58006010	Tahematapakieca Khazing ca a dang lipa cuo vyi; ama hmiemangna cangta duena ta nama hriepa re hne mingpathepa tie nama mangchiynapa, a ta te pata zaw nama tue nguoluopa hing maw'a vyi.
58006011	Niema bangkhuo hingta namaa ruechuopa a tlingna te ta khahaapaapa palungthuna kha a chuona te ta hnyi patlung ung tapa maca khing yi.
58006012	Cakiedyina niema ca nama thaa thuv li pata zangna hne palungpasiyna ta Khazing biekuopa a hmungpa tie haakhata nama hring khu aa.
58006013	Khazing ta Abraham'a lie biekuona a za tue ning kha ama ming laata a le viepa ming hmuo riy a aw li nakawta ama ming kha hmuo te,
58006014	“Thluechiy ca pi'a ang te samingsahlaa a hluvsa ica pahnyi sa aa,” a ta.
58006015	Abraham ca palung pasiysa pata a huo nakawta bie aa kuopa ca a hmung.
58006016	Cawsaa ta ama laata a le viepa ming ta chie aa sa kieca capa chiesana cata a-i-achuena bangkhuo kha a pachuo sa.
58006017	Cahaa cata Khazing ta atingna ca a thle khu'a vyi tapa kha a biekuona rucutuv tie'a lie a siesa pata a pachang sa khing tiy yi ta chiesana ta bie a kuo yi.
58006018	Cacuonakawta thle khu a aw lipa hmang suohning, Khazing zaw ta a cuo lina kaw paluo sa riypata a cuo khu lipa hmang thueta, ama'a lie a canawpa kiema ca ma hmiekunglieta ama chipa a ruechuona kha va patuv riypata khuopuv ta thaazuo malie a pi.
58006019	Ma hringna cuota a hmisipa hne tiypalaw thaatungkyipa haata a tapa a ruechuona ca hnyi pate, capa maa ruechuona ca biena-ing pangzu hnang luo hmangpathepa te khata a vaa ngie.
58006020	Kiema cuota zakuo a ruo lupa Zingsuv ca capa luo ca a ngie te Melkhizedek tluobyi phung haata chuozaa tluobyilecepa ta aa li.
58007001	Melkhizedek ca Salem siepahruo cuote, Asuocepa Khazing tluobyi ta a cuo. Ama ca siepahruo tie a du yite a te diyna taata a vya kaapa Abraham kha va daw te thluechiy a pi.
58007002	Ama'a luo ca Abraham ta “hmangting bangkhuo taakhata chehraachekha” kha a pi. A ming siyluo a suokhana ca, “adangna siepahruo,” tapata cuote, cakhutaata ama ca Salem siepahruo zaw ta a cuo nakawta a ming siyluo ca, “diena siepahruo,” tapa zaw ta a cuo.
58007003	Nung li paa li, thukina aw li pata, a hringna hruothuna hne a chuona zaw aw vyi. Cuorasala ama ca Khazing Saacapaa haakhata cuote, chuozaa ta a hmangpa tluobyi ta a cuo.
58007004	Ma mingpa Abraham tahmuo ta carie kuv taata a lapa hruosue chehraachekha a pipapaa hing khatluv tama a lesyi tapa kha rue tie ung.
58007005	Levi ciypathla chung taata tluobyi re a hriepa tie ca Abraham ciypathla, ama uvnu ta a cuopa cawsaa zaw'a taata chehraachekha pakhaw riypa kha nawbie ta a pa-aw yi.
58007006	Cuorasala, Levi ciypathla ta a cuo lipapaa ta Abraham'a taata chehraachekha kha pakhaw te, biekuona a hmungpapaa kha thluechiy a pi.
58007007	A le viepa na a caw viepa thluechiy a pi tapa ca i khu riypa cuo vyi.
58007008	Suvkha lieca, a thiy thepa cawsaa na chehraachekha a hmung ta te, a hrangpa suvkha lieca a hring tapata tehte ama khuopa na chehraachekha a hmung, a ta.
58007009	Chehraachekha a hmungpa Levi na Abraham taakhata chehraachekha a pi ta khu pata a cuo.
58007010	Tahematapakieca Melkhizedek ta Abraham a taw ning kha Levi ca a mingpa pangpa chunglie khana a aw kalie.
58007011	Cawsaa ca Levi ming tluobyi cuona taata phungbie kha hmung yite tluotlingna ama za hmung pata a cuo kieca, Aaron phang tluobyi cuona cuo li pata Melkhizedek tluobyi cuona haapa tluobyi cuona ca khaapanakawma a hu kalie?
58007012	Cacuonakawta tluobyi cuona a thle kieca, phungbie zaw a thle a hu ra.
58007013	Hinghaahingta a kaw ama ripapaa hing mingphang hrangpa ta cuote, hingpa phang chung taahingta pakha hmuo bienatluophie lie tluobyi a hriepa aw buo vayi.
58007014	Tahematapakieca ma Byipaapa ca Judah phang chung taata a cuopa kha a siesa pata pachangpa cuote, Moses ta hingpa phang hne a patuv pata tluobyi kaw ri vyi.
58007015	Melkhizedek hneta aa lupa tluobyi phanghrangpa a pya tiyta capa ca a sie vie hryly.
58007016	Ama ca a phungpa haata saapa ciypathla cuona taata tluobyi a cuopa cuo li pata para khu a cuo lipa hringna cahrana taata tluobyi a cuopa tana a cuo.
58007017	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, “Nama ca Melkhizedek haapa, chuozaa tluobyi tana na cuo,” a ta.
58007018	Cacuonakawta nawbie taapa ca a thaa dya te a tling li nakawta para pata a cuo.
58007019	(Tahematapakieca phungbie ca tluotling vyi); cuorasala ata hing ca a ruechuona pha viepa kha a vaw te capa thue cata Khazing kha maa ngie ung.
58007020	Capa ca chiesana ta pacu sa pata a cuo; tahematapakieca a hrangpa tie ca chiesana aw li pata na tluobyi ama vya cuo.
58007021	Cuorasala ama ca chiesana tana tluobyi a vya cuo, tahematapakieca Khazing ta, “Abyipa ta chiesana hne bie a kuo, a palung kha thle buo'a vyi, Nama ca chuozaa tluobyi tana na cuo,” a ta.
58007022	Capa cata Zingsuv ca a pha viepa biekuona pacusatuv ta a tue.
58007023	Cakhutaa a hluo tluobyi tie ca thiyna ta za pha yite ama re kha ama hrie patlung khu li nakawta a mingluv ta ama hluvsa;
58007024	cuorasala ama ca chuozaa ta a hring nakawta a tluobyi cuona kha aa hmang.
58007025	Cacuonakawta, ama thueta Khazing a pangiepa bangkhuo kha a khuo khu pari yi, tahematapakieca chuozaa ta a hring nakawta Khazing kha paa a kiepa khu pari yi.
58007026	Cacuonakawta cahaapa tluobyilecepa ma hnyipa ca a phasapa tana a cuo. Ama ca a pathepa, risie riy a aw lipa, pyalyina a hnyi lipa, a suepa tie'a taata pachepa hne vuoruo luo cyicalangpa tana a cuo.
58007027	Ama ca a hrangpa tluobyilecepa tie haakhata a suokhana ta ama suena cuota cuose, cawsaa zaw suena cuota cuose ning kha hnang ning kha ta hriykhungrina tue a hu vyi. Ama hne ama hriykhungrina ta aa pina lie kha chuozaa cuo a zu pata yikha ta hriykhungrina a tue tli pata a cuo.
58007028	Phungbie ta thaadyana a hnyipa tie kha tluobyilecepa ta a tue yi. Cuorasala phungbie khu taata a vawpa, chiesana hne tuepa biekuona ta ca chuozaa ta tluotlingna a hnyipa Saacapaa kha tluobyilecepa ta a tue tli.
58008001	Ata ma ri nguoluopa ta a ri khingcepa ca hingpa hing tana a cuo: Vuoruo Khazing thude cacuo luo kuo ta a tupa tluobyilecepa ma hnyi, tapa hingta a cuo.
58008002	Ama ca cawsaa ta sapa cuo li pata Abyipa ta a sapa hmangpathepa hne a hmisipa thluodaa lie kha tluobyilecepa ta a cuo.
58008003	Tluobyilecepa ca Khazing'a luo pipa lasaw hne hriykhungrinapa sahring kha Khazing'a luo pi riypa a cuo nakawta, capa tluobyi cuo zaw cata hriykhungrina ta pi riypa suokhakha a hnyi a hu.
58008004	Abyipa hing chuelyi lie a awpa cuo sala tluobyi cuo khu'a vyi, tahematapakieca phungbie haata hriykhungrina lasaw a pituv tluobyi na a aw yi.
58008005	Iema ta hmangpathepa lie ama tuepa abiena ca vuoruo lie a awpa abiena a mingthlaapa paluosana tana a cuo. Tahematapakieca Moses ta pangthluodaa sa aa nang ning kha Khazing ta, “Tluocung lie ica pahmung sapa haa khatana na sa'a tli kha,” tapata a raaringna a pipa haa khatana a cuo.
58008006	Cuorasala Zingsuv ca a pha vie karaapa tluobyi re kha pipa tana a cuo. Ama ca a pha viepa biekuona hneta a patuvpa, Khazing hne cawsaa a lala lie a pha viepa biekuona luosituv tana a cuo.
58008007	Tahematapakieca a suokhanapa biekuona khana tling lina zaa hnyi va tapa kieca biekuona hrangpa a huna riypa khaahmuo aw vyi.
58008008	Khazing ta iema tling lina kha hmung yite a ripa ca: “Abyipa ta, Israel ming'a nata Judah ming hneta, biekuona thaapa i tuena riypa ningkhue ca a vya tlung tli.
58008009	Ama mingchingmingvuo tie kha Izipt ruo chung taata pyakhyi riypata, ama kuv ta patuv yi ang te i sikhyi ning yi ta, i tuepa biekuona haakhata cuo'a vyi. I biekuona kha ama ziy li nakawta, kama zaw iema cunglie kawpacuona hnyi va ang.
58008010	Cakhutaacata, Abyipa ta, Israel ming hne i tue riypa biekuona ca hinghaahingtana a cuo. I phungbie kha ama pachangna chunglie chi'a ang te, ama pathiypalung cunglie i cape aa. Kama kha ama Khazing cuo'a ang te, Iema kha i cawsaa ta ama cuo aa.
58008011	Pakha hne pakha kha a pacuv a hu li pata, ‘Khazing kha pachang tie,’ ama ta zaw a hu'a vyi. Tahematapakieca a cawcepa taata a lecepa te, ama bangkhuo ta ina pachang'a yi.
58008012	Tahematapakieca ama pha lina kha a ngiethe'a yi ang te, ama suena kha a thyipa'a va tli yi ang.
58008013	Khazing ta biekuo thaapa ta te a rinapa hingta biekuo taapa ca a hlungpa ta aa li. A hlungpa ca a ru hluo ta a viele aa.
58009001	Biekuo taapa khata biena lie ziy riypa phung hne chuelyi lie hmangpathepa zaw a hnyi.
58009002	Tahematapakieca bienathluodaa kha sa yite, a chuekhana kha hmangpathepa ama ta. Capa khuo chunglie ca myivuona tung, cabya, hne Khazing ama pipa viechuo zaw kha a aw.
58009003	A suohningna pangzu hnang lie kha Hmang Pathecepa tapa khuo a aw.
58009004	Capa chunglie ca rangpa-uepa ruenapa siyy bienatluophie hne a kuo bangkhuo siyy ta ama pakhuv diypa biekuona thingkaw zaw kha a aw. Capa thingkaw chunglie ca mannaa viechuo chinapa siyy bi, a daw a pakiypa Aaron khuecahryi hne biekuona capenapa lungphie zaw ama aw.
58009005	Capa cunglie ca rungnaana hne a bipa cherubim tie ta ama mathlaa ama pazuu khuopa nangduena thude kha a aw. Ata hing ca capa zaw kaw hing tluotling pata ri khu'a va puv.
58009006	Cahaa cata ama pachiepazu diy khu taata tluobyi tie ca a chuekhana hmangpathepa chung luo kha ningting ta a ngie yite, ama re kha ama hrie.
58009007	Cuorasala chuehningna chung luo ca tluobyilecepa dyi kha kung kha ta yikha a ngie te, thiyse kha a cyi te ama cuo hne cawsaa ta lunghaaraa cuo li pata ama tuepa suena cuo khata hriykhungrina a tue.
58009008	Capa cata bienathluodaa a chuekhanapa a aw chung bangkhuo ca hmangpathecepa luo a ngienapa luo ca a pahaw valie tapata Thlaapa ta malie a pachang sa.
58009009	Hingpa hing ata chuo cuona pahmungsana ta cuote, Khazing'a luo pipa lasaw hne hriykhungrina zaw hingta Khazing abietuv tie pathiypalung kha patling sa khu tange vyi.
58009010	Hingpa hmang zaw hingca sa hne tiy dang riypa hne tiynawna phangphang hneta aa patuvpa, Khazing ta hmangting a parena cuote dyita hmuo riypa, saapa hne aa patuvpa ziyphung ta a cuo.
58009011	Cuorasala Khrih ca a vaw tlipa hmangphapa hneta a patuvpa tluobyilecepa cuona hne aa vaw tiyta, cawsaa kuv ta tue lipa, sapa chuelyi taata a cuo lipa, a le viepa hne tluo a tlingpa bienathluodaa taakhata
58009012	Hmangpathecepa luo kha luokha ta chuozaa cuota a ngie te, mie thiy hne cuetaata thiy ta cuo li pata, ama pangpa thiy caci kha a cyi te chuozaa athlana kha malie a tuepa.
58009013	Tahematapakieca, a pathe lipa tie cunglie hipa mie thiy, cuetungpa thiy hne cuelaanung ruenapa buvcuo ta iema kha a pathe sa kie yi ca,
58009014	chuozaa Thlaapa thueta, risie riy aw li pata ama hne ama kha Khazing'a luo a pipa Khrih thiyse changchiy taca ima chiephathleduona kha thiyna hne a patuvpa re taata a hringpa Khazing biena luo malie pathe sa li pata a aw'a ma?
58009015	Cacuonakawta Khrih ca ama a upa zaw ta biekuopa chuozaa ru kha ama cu na riypata biekuothaapa lie arena luosituv tana a cuo. Tahematapakieca biekuo taapa lieta cawsaa ta ama za tuepa suena taata iema a thla riypa khata thiyna a ang.
58009016	Ru a huvna kaw ripa kieca ru a huvna caa a cape siypa hing a thiy hmisi tli tapa kha pacu sa taana a hu.
58009017	Tahematapakieca ru a huvtuv a hring chung bangkhuo ca ru a huvna caa ca hmuo khu aw valie, a thiy khutaa kyalya dyina hmuo khu a aw.
58009018	Cacuonakaw camuo biekuotaapa khahmuo thiyse ta pacu sa pata a cuo ta.
58009019	Tahematapakieca phungbie lie a awpa haata, Moses ta nawbie bangkhuo kha cawsaa bangkhuo'a luo a za pathyi sa ning yi kha, tiy hneta pyapa cuetaata thiy hne mie thiy kha la te, hissop thingdaw hne tuvhmingpangsepa kha hmuo pata nawbie caataw hne cawsaa zaw kha hi yite,
58009020	“Hingpa hing Khazing ta niema bie aca kuopa yi biekuona thiyse tana a cuo,” a ta yi.
58009021	Cahaa cata bienathluodaa hne abiena lie hmuopa bi bangkhuo kha thiyse ta a hi.
58009022	Hmisi ta ripa kieca, phungbie rawlie ca hmangting bangkhuo hing thiyse ta pathe sa te, thiyse lang li pata ca sue a ngiethena aw vyi.
58009023	Cakhutaa, vuoruo hmang hmingsuo a cakepa hmang zaw kha cahaapa phung cata pathe sa a hu. Cuorasala vuoruo hmang hmisipa tie taca hingpa laa hingta a pha viepa hriykhungrina kha amaa hu.
58009024	Tahematapakieca, Zingsuv ca a hmisipa hmingsuo a cakepa, cawsaa kuv ta tuepa hmangpathepa luo kha a ngie vyi, cuorasala kiema zaw cuota Khazing hmiekunglie a luo riypata vuoruo luo hrahring kha a ngie.
58009025	Tluobyilecepa ta Hmang Pathepa chung luo kha ama thiy ta a cuo lipa thiy kha a cyi pata kung tating ta a ngie pahaata Khrih ca ama pangpa a pi pata hriykhungrina tue pari a hu vyi.
58009026	Cahaa cata a cuo li kieca chuelyi hruothu baataata ruvnaana a ang pakhaa pari na a hu aa. Cuorasala, sue pathena riypata ama pangpa kha hriykhungrina ta a pi te, cuo chuona lie kha yikha ta chuozaa cuo aa de pata a zaa luo.
58009027	Cawsaa hing yikha dyi thiy'a te bierina a ang riypata a cuo aa.
58009028	Cahaa cata cawsaa hluvpuv suena phya riypata ama pangpa kha hriykhungrina ta yikha dyi a pipa Zingsuv ca, a yihningna a luo'a te, ca aa luona lieca suena kaw ri riypa cuo li tli pata a ngietie li pata ama a mangkhuopa tie khuo riypata a cuo aa.
58010001	Phungbie ca a vaw riypa hmangphapa a mingthlaapa dyi ta cuote, a hmisipa hmingsuo a cuo li nakawta kung tating, a pazue pata tuepa, aa lupa hriykhungrina khata ama'a luo a vaapa tie kha tluotlingna pi khu vayi.
58010002	Cata cuo li pata luokha dyi hriykhung amaa ripa khata za pathe yi sala, suena na ma hnyi tapa kha rue'a va tli laa yite, hriykhungrina kha tue'a va tli yi cuo vama?
58010003	Cuorasala hingpa hriykhung a rina hingca ama suena kha kung tating ta a pathyi sa pakhaapa tana a cuo.
58010004	Tahematapakieca cuetungpa thiy hne mie thiy zaw taca suena kha pathe sa khu vyi.
58010005	Cacuonakawta Khrih chuelyi luo aa zuv ningta a ripa ca: “Hriykhungrina hne pipa zaw kha khing vaciy, cuorasala kama cuota pangpasaa kha ina tingtuopa tli ciy;
58010006	Myi ta rue pata pipa hne sue pathena cuota pipa cunglie kha, na palung tluo vyi.
58010007	Cakhutaa, Caapathepa chunglie i kaw aa capepa haata, Vya Khazing, kama ca na khingna tue riypata i vaw tli.
58010008	Ama ta, “Nama ca hriykhungrina hne pipa hne myi ta rue pata pipa hne sue pathena cuota ca khing lipa cata na palung tling vyi,” a ta tiyta phungbie lie a ripa haata pipa kaw khana a ri pata a cuo.
58010009	Cakhutaacata, “Kama ca na khingna tue riypata i vaw tli,” a ta kalie. Khazing ta suohningnapa kha pacu sa riypata suokhana kha a para.
58010010	Zingsuv Khrih ta Khazing khingna haata luokha ta chuozaa cuo a de riypata a pangpa ta hriykhungrina a tuepa thueta kiema bangkhuo ca pathesapa ma cuo.
58010011	Tluobyi tie ca ningting ta ama re kha hrie yite suena a pathe sa khu lipa hriykhungrina kha ama tue pakhaa byalya.
58010012	Cuorasala Khrih ca suena cuota yikha ta chuozaa cuo a depa hriykhungrina a tue khu taata, Khazing cacuo luo khata a tu te,
58010013	a carie tie kha a phyichaana ta tuepa ama cuo hluo li a huo.
58010014	Tahematapakieca luokha hriykhungrina ta suena taata a pathepa tie ca chuozaa ta tluotlingna a pi yi.
58010015	Thlaapa Pathe ta kiema'a lie tehte a khuopa ca,
58010016	“Abyipa ta, capa ningkhue khu taata, iema hne i tue riypa biekuona ca, hingpa hing tana a cuo, a ta. I phungbie kha ama palung chunglie chi'a ang te, ama pachangna chunglie ta i cape aa,” a ta.
58010017	A ri kaliepa ca, “Ama suena hne ama pha lina kha a thyipa'a va tli yi ang,” a ta.
58010018	Sue a ngiethena a awna hmang lieca sue pathena cuota hriykhungrina a hu va tli.
58010019	Cacuonakawta, viesaa zaw, Zingsuv thiyse thueta hmangpathepa luo a ngie riypa kha a cusa pata zangna ma hnyi.
58010020	Capa a thiyse ca Abyipa ta a pangpa ta a cuopa pangzu kha thlaa pata kiema cuota a pahawpa hringna luopuv thaapa tana a cuo.
58010021	Cakhutaata vuoruo lie Khazing ing uvtuv tluobyilepa ma hnyi.
58010022	Pathiypalung hmisi hne zangnguona ta Khazing kha a ngie'a ungpuv. Ruena pha lipa taata pathe sapa pathiypalung hne tiypathepa ta pasiypa pangpa ta ama kha a ngie ungsiy.
58010023	Bie malie a kuotuv Khazing ca zangtluo aa tlapa a cuo nakawta maa ruechuopa ca a cusa pata a patuv ungsiy.
58010024	Cakhutaata a due riypa hne hmangpha tue riypa kha pakha hne pakha tuokhaatama maa pasu aa tapa kha rue ungsiy.
58010025	Chekha ta nama tue tawpa haata, hmangkha ta namaa pung pakhawpa kha pathli kha ung. Nama pachangna haata, Abyipa Ning kha a ngie hryly nakawta pakha hne pakha kha thaazuo a pi tie ung.
58010026	Tahematapakieca biehmisipa kha ma pachang thluo tli pata ngie a rawsa pata ma sue pari thluo kieca suepathena riypata hriykhungrina aw the'a va tli.
58010027	Cuorasala bieripana hne a dutuv tie a kuo diy riypa hihaana myi dyi khana ciyna hne huo riypa a cuo'a tli.
58010028	Moses phungbie a patluopa bangkhuo ca pachangkhyituv pahning a cuo li kie pathung ta tehte ama khuo kieca nangduena aw li pata thiepa ama cuo.
58010029	Cacuokie, Khazing Saacapaa kha ciyzaana aw li pata a thawpa, iema suena taata a pathesapa biekuona thiyse kha siysaa a ri lipa hne vihnyina Thlaapa kha a esepa ca khatluv ta a ruv viepa duotena na ama ang aa tapata ma nama rue?
58010030	“Phuvlana ca kama huopa tana a cuo, kama na a thung'a yi ang” a tapa hne, Abyipa na a cawsaa zaw kha bie a ripa'a yi,” a tatuv kha ma pachang.
58010031	A hringpa Khazing kuv chung luo tla riypa ca ciy aa chiysa.
58010032	Cuorasala Khazing khena luo nama chiy khu taata te-angna chunglie a ruvsa pata nama za awna cuo, a hluo ta nama ningcuo kha rue pakhaa tie ung.
58010033	Luokhakha ca zaapuv hmielie kha esena hne hrisaathieruena za ang ung cate, cuokhakha ca khuopuv ta hrisaathieruepa tie kha nama te-ang khyi.
58010034	Tahematapakieca thaw chunglie a awpa tie kha kawpacuona hnyi ung cate, ama laa hingta a pha viepa hne a cu viepa nama hnyi tapa kha nama pachang nakawta, nama hnyipa chechiy aca chuv diy zaw yi ta palungtluosa pata nama pi.
58010035	Cacuonakawta nama zangnguona kha thuse kha ung; lawmuo lepuv na aca phya'a yi.
58010036	Khazing khingna kha tue pata a biekuona nama cu the riypata palung pasiysa pata aw tie ung.
58010037	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, “A ru hluo ta lieta, a vaw riypapaa ca aa vaw aa; ru'a vyi.
58010038	Cuorasala i cawsaa aa dangpapaa ca zangna hneta hring'a te, hnang luo a palipa bangkhuo cunglie ca, i palung tluo'a vyi,” a ta.
58010039	Cuorasala kiema ca hnang luo a palipa tie hne a viepa tie chunglie cuo li pata zangna hnyi te khuona a cupa tie tana ma cuo.
58011001	Zangna ma tapa ca maa ruechuopa kha ma hmung hrahring aa tapata zangna hne, hmisi ta a awpa hne a cuopa hmang, ma ming ta ma hmung lipa hmang a aw, tapata zangnapa khatana a cuo.
58011002	Cahaapa zangna ama za hnyi nakawtana ma mingchingmingvuo tie zaw ta Khazing palung kha ama za hmung.
58011003	Chuelyi hing Khazing bie tana sapa a cuo tapa kha zangna ta ma pachang. Cacuonakawta hmung khupa hmang hing hmung khu lipa hmang taata tuepa a cuopa kha aa luo.
58011004	Abel ta Kain laata cuhluo tluo a tla viepa hriykhungrina a pipa ca zangna thue tana a cuo. Capa zangna thue cata cawsaa aa dangpa ta cuhluopa cuote, Khazing hrahring ta a lasaw kha a cuhluo. Ama ca a thiy tli, cuorasala a zangna cata ata tepa hingta bie a ri kalie.
58011005	Enok ca zangna thueta thiyna a taw li pata lathawpa a cuo; Khazing ta a la nakawta ahungtahmuo hmung khu va tli yi. Tahematapakieca ama ca lapa a cuo hluo ta Khazing palung a hmungpa a cuo.
58011006	Zangna li pata ca Khazing palung patluo khupa cuo vyi. Ama'a luo a pangiepa bangkhuo ta, Khazing a aw tapa hne ama a huvpa kha lawmuo a pi yi, tapa kha ama zang riypata a cuo.
58011007	Noah ca Khazing ta hmung li liepa kaw a raaringna a pipa kha zang te a ingchungkhue khuo riypata tiypalaw a sa. Capa a zangna cata chuelyi kha sue phaw te ama ca zangna taata a vawpa adangna rucutuv ta aa li.
58011008	Abraham ca ru ta a cu riypa ruo luo kha kupa a cuo tiyta, khaapa luo ma i si aa tapa pachang li pata ri a ngie te zangna ta a si.
58011009	Khazing ta bie a kuopa ruo lie kha ruohrang ming haata cuokha chung zangna ta khy a sa. Biekuona suokha kha ru a cu pakhawpa Isak hne Jakob hne khata thluodaa chunglie kha khy ama sa.
58011010	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta patungpatie te a hruo a bangpa khypuv khana a nguopuona hne a huo.
58011011	Abraham ca macuosa tli te, Sarah zaw saa a sa khu lipa a cuo raalaa pata, zangna thueta paa cuo khuna cahrana kha a hmung. Tahematapakieca biekuona a pituv kha zangtluo a tla tapata a zang nakawtana a cuo.
58011012	Athiypa haata a cuo tli raalaa pata, capa cawsaa pakha chung taacata, a samingsahlaa zaw ca puv yite, avuo lie aasiy zaa hne riyliy kielie ri tie lipa viehnang zaa ama ta.
58011013	Hingpa cawsaa bangkhuo hing Khazing ta bie a kuopa yi kha hmung li pata zangna chunglie ama thiy. Cuorasala luohlaa taata suo yite bie amaa chang paluo. Chuelyi lie hing khychepa hne ruohrang ming tana ma cuo ama ta.
58011014	Tahematapakieca hinghaahingta a ripa cawsaa zaw hingta iema huo a cuopa ruo na ama huv tapa kha ama paluo sa.
58011015	Iema ca ama thuse tlipa ruo khana ngie amaa buo pakhaa tapa cuo sala, kaa pakhaa riypa cuophaa ama za hnyi ri aa.
58011016	Cuorasala iema ta ama vuopa ruo ca ruo pha viepa, vuoruo tana a cuo. Cacuonakawta Khazing ca iema Khazing tapata ama u pakha a nang zaa vyi. Tahematapakieca khypuv kha iema cuota a parepa mangtli yi.
58011017	Abraham ta dyapasyana a ang ningta a saacapaapa Isak hriykhungrina ta a pipa ca zangna thue tana a cuo. Biekuona zaa hmungpapaa ca a saacapaa pakha dyipa kha hriykhungrina ta pi riypa a ting pacie diy tli.
58011018	“Samingsahlaa na hnyi riypa ca Isak ciypathla taahing tana ama cuo aa,” tapata biekuopa tana a za cuo.
58011019	Khazing ca a thiypa zaw kha a pathu pakhaa khu tapata a zang. A ripa haata Isak ca thiyna taatana a vya thupakhaa ta riypatana a cuo hmisi.
58011020	Isak ta Jakob hne Esau kha hmie luo cuota thluechiy a pipa yi ca zangna thue tana a cuo.
58011021	Jakob ta a thiy'a nang cawta Josef saacapaa zaw thluechiy a pipa yi ca zangna thue tana a cuo; a khuecahryi daw kha a padu te Khazing kha abie.
58011022	Josef ta, a thiy'a nang cawta Israel ming Izipt ruo taata ama law riypa a ripa hne a thiy tiyta a riy kha tuokhaatama nama za tue aa tapata a ri siypa ca zangna thue tana a cuo.
58011023	A za puv khu taata thlathung a tana te ta a nungpaa zaw ta Moses ama nupa kha zangna thue tana a cuo. Tahematapakieca haatiy thyikhing aa chiysapa kha ama hmung tiyta siepahruo bie khahmuo ciy khu vayi.
58011024	Moses ca a kya lethaw tiyta Faro sacanungnung saacapaa tapata kupa a khing lipa kha zangna thue tana a cuo.
58011025	Suena chunglie cuo pachangta chung anuona laata Khazing cawsaa zaw hneta ruvnaana ang kha a tlaw viepa ca zangna thue tana a cuo.
58011026	Izipt ruo hnyirungna laata Khrih cuota nutaana angpa ca a sungnaa vie karaa tapata a rue. Tahematapakieca lawmuo a hmung riypa khana a pachang lu.
58011027	Siepahruo hihaana khahmuo ciy li pata Izipt ruo taata pya te, palung pasiysa pata a ang lawpa ca zangna thue tana a cuo. Tahematapakieca hmung khu lipa Khazing khana a hmung lu.
58011028	Sa-uvthyi zaw a thiepa ta Israel ming sa-uvthyi zaw kha a thie li riypa yita Lawsena pyi tue te ingchiypakaa tung lie thiy a pathuv sapa yi kha zangna thue tana a cuo.
58011029	Israel ming ta Riyliy Sepa kha alyi huvpa haata ama tepa ca zangna thue tana a cuo; cuorasala Izipt ming ta te amaa zue tiyta tiy lie ama puo diy.
58011030	Ning sariy ama cahlung khu taata Jeriko khypuv dungkhuo a cingpa ca zangna thue tana a cuo.
58011031	Rie vaa mangpathliypa Israel ming kha dya a nu nakaw yi ta Khazing ri a ngie lipa tie hneta siyhrawnung Rahab a thiy ra lipa kha zangna thue tana a cuo.
58011032	I ri vie kalie'a ma? Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jefthah, David, Samuel hne profet tie zaw kaw ri riypa kha a cuo ta naa zu'a vyi.
58011033	Zangna ta pena hluvpuv kha ama te, a dangsa pata ruo ama uv, Khazing ta bie a kuopa yi kha ama hmung, chingde pakaa kha ama paping,
58011034	aa hlaa nguoluopa myi kha ama pache, zueziy taata ama law, thaadyana taata thaazuo ama hmung, rietuvna lie kha cahra yite ruohrang rieka tie kha ama te.
58011035	Canung zaw ta ama cawsaa a thiypa tie kha pathu pakhaapa ama cuopa ta ama hmung. Chekha ta a pha viepa hringna luo thupakhaa riypata lawna kha hmung khing lipa yi ta tuechiena ama ang.
58011036	Chekha ta pahnyisuena hne tuvna kha ang yite, thaabuoliriy ta ciypakina hne thawtlana zaw kha ama ang.
58011037	Chekha ca alung ta vaasa yite, chekha ca hluo ta ama tepachung. Chekha ca zueziy ta thie yite, chekha ca tuv vang zaw mie vang zaw kha pahryi yite siypasa pata ama aw, riethyi vuosuo pata aw yite hrisaathieruena ama ang.
58011038	Chuelyi hing iema hneta a phuv vyi. Iema ca ruocaa lie hne tluo lie kha a khiele yite, lungkaraw hne alyikhue lie kha ama aw.
58011039	Iema bangkhuo hing ama zangna kawlieta pathuosapa ama cuo raalaa pata Khazing biekuopa hmang kha hmung vayi.
58011040	Khazing ta kiema cuota a pha viepa hmang kha malie a tingpa nakawta kiema hne lipa taca tluotlingna hmung'a vayi.
58012001	Cacuonakawta hing tluv ta a hluvpa pachangkhyituv tie ta amyi haata malie ama cadung nakawta hmangriypa bangkhuo hne malie a bepuopa suena hing thawsiy pata ma hmiekunglieta a awpa a ruo azuena lie hing temaana hne a ruo ungsiy.
58012002	Ma zangna hruo a pathutuv hne a patling satuv Zingsuv kha ci li pata mang ungsiy. Hmie luo ta a cu riypa palungtluona kha aa ruechuopa a cuo nakawta vieluo cunglie thiyna nangzaana kha siysaa ri li pata ang te, ata hing ca Khazing thude cacuo luo kuo ta a tu.
58012003	Nama palung riethyi te nama palung a ra li riypata ama hrahring a suepa tie ta hue yite amaa duna kha khatluv tama a ang tapa kha rue tie ung.
58012004	Sue namaa duna lie kha nama thiyse langna te tange taca a du valie ungciy.
58012005	Khazing ta i saa zaw tapata aca pasupa yi kha maw kanaa ungciy? I saa, Khazing pasiypa-yana kha siysaa ri li pata aw lie ciy, Duo aca te tiyta na palung chuo kha se.
58012006	Tahematapakieca Abyipa ca a duepa tie kha pasiypa-ya taw yite, a cuhluopa a saa zaw bangkhuo kha duo a te taw yi.
58012007	Pasiypa-yana cuota namaa tawpa ruvnaana kha ang law tie ung. Khazing na a saata zaw haata caa rue yi. A paa ta a pasiypa-ya lipa saata ama aw buo ma?
58012008	Saata bangkhuo ta amaa tawpa pasiypa-yana kha namaa taw li kieca saata hmisi cuo li pata riesaa ta nama cuo nakawtana a cuo aa.
58012009	Cadyi cuo li pata, malie a pasiypa-ya riypa saapa luo nungpaa kha hnyi yi pate ma pa-uvsathyi yi. Hringna ma hmung na riypata thlaapa luo ma Paa ri changchiy ca a ngie tyly riypa cuo'a vama?
58012010	Tahematapakieca ma paa tie taca a phace ama tapa haata cuo pachangta chung malie pasiypa-ya yite, cuorasala Khazing taca kiema phana riypa hne ama pathena maa hraw the riypatana kiema kha malie a pasiypa-ya.
58012011	Pasiypa-yana ca ma ang ningta ca palungtluo a chiy li pata ngiechi aa chiypa tana ma rue. Cuorasala cahaa cata pasiypa-yapa tie ca a hnang taata adangnapa diena thyipaa khana ama hmung aa.
58012012	Cacuonakawta a thaarisa tlipa nama buo kha pazuu ungla aa cathangpa nama pakhuv kha cahra sa tie ung,
58012013	nama cakuona luopuv kha padang tie ung. Cakiedyina a cabiepa tie kha sawkhaw pathla li pata ama tluo aa.
58012014	Cawsaa bangkhuo hneta a re riypa kha a zue ungla a pathepa hringna kha hnyi a zue tie ung. Hring pathepa hnyi li pata ca ahungtahmuo Khazing kha hmung'a vayi.
58012015	Khazing vihnyina kha ahungtahmuo cu li pata nama aw li riypata a raaring tie ung. A khapa thingkung kha kya pu te ruvnaana a patlung sa nakawta cawsaa hluvpuv kha a papyapalyipa haayita cuo kha ung.
58012016	Ahunghmuota aparuvsuena tue li riypa hne Khazing siysaa ri li pata sa luokha ning ta sa-uvthyi cuona a zaapa Esau haata cuo li riypata a raaring tie ung.
58012017	A hnang taata thluechiy kha a cu khing tiyta bu pata cuote, mingthliy hneta thluechiy kha a huv raalaa pata a ngiepachiyna cuo hnyi va tli.
58012018	Niema ca hrie khu a cuopa tluo, myi a hlaa nguoluopa, khyzingna, thliychierichie,
58012019	hmyakaa ue paringna hne ueryi paringsapa zaw awna luo kha namaa vaw pata cuo vyi. Capa ueryi a thyipa tie cata ama thyi vie li riypata amaa nue.
58012020	(Tahematapakieca, “Saruopa hmuota hing tluo hing a de khu kieca alung ta vaasapa cuose,” tapata pipa bie kha ang khu vayi.
58012021	Ama hmungpa ca ciy aa chiytuv nakawta Moses ta, “Ciy tuv ang te na i cathang,” a ta.)
58012022	Cuorasala niema ca Zion tluo hne a hringpa Khazing khypuv, vuoruo Jerusalem, ri tie a aw lipa avuoming amaa hmyana hmang luo khana namaa vaw.
58012023	Cahaa cata vuoruo lie ming khungpa sa-uvthyi zaw ahmyana, cawsaa bangkhuo bieripatuv Khazing awna, aa dangpa zaw tluotlingna a pituv thlaapa zaw awna,
58012024	biekuothaapa hne arena a satuv Zingsuv awna, hne Abel thiyse laata bie pha viepa a ripa hipa thiy awna hmang luo khana namaa vaw.
58012025	Niema bie caa changtuvpa bie kha i li riypata a raaring tie ung. Tahematapakieca chuelyi lieta iema kha a raaringna a pituv bie amaa ngie li pata hmuo duotena taata ama law li kieca, vuoruo taata a raaringna malie a pituv bie kha maa ngie li kie changchiy ca khatluv ta ma duotena taata law li pata ma aw aa.
58012026	Khapa cuo ning kha a ueryi ta chuelyi kha a cahang; cuorasala atalie bie malie a kuopa ca, “Chuelyi dyi cuo li pata vuoruo zaw kha yikha i cahang kalie aa,” a ta.
58012027	Hingpa, “Chuelyi hing yikha i cahang vie kalie aa,” tapa hingta cahang khu lipa hmang zaw aa hmang riypata cahang khu a cuopa, sapa hmang tie kha hnyi pata ama cuo aa tapa na a paluo sa.
58012028	Cacuonakawta, a cahang khu lipa pena kha ma hmung nakawta a law ungsiy. Khazing kha alawna hneta cuhluo tluo a tla pata pa-uvsathyina hne ciyzaana ta abie ungsiy.
58012029	Tahematapakieca ma Khazing ca a kuo khupa myi tana a cuo.
58013001	Uvcanu haata pakha hne pakha kha a due pari tie ung.
58013002	Khyche kha ing a patlung sa ungla due tie ung. Tahematapakieca chekha ca cahaa cata ama tuepa tana ama pachang li pata avuoming kha amaa patlung sa.
58013003	Thaw a tlapa tie kha maw kha ung. Iema hne thaw a tlapakhawpa haakhata a rue tie ung. Tuechiena a angpa tie kha maw kha ung. Niema zaw tuechiena a ang rapa haakhata a rue tie ung.
58013004	Achiyhiena kha cawsaa bangkhuo ta pa-uvsathyi yi se. Nung hne vaa ca zangtluo a tla pata aw kaluo yi se; tahematapakieca a paruv suena a tuepa hne nungvaathingsuena a tuepa ca Khazing na ama bie a ripa'a yi.
58013005	Tuokaa khing tuv kha ung; nama hnyi thathiypa lie hing nama palung tluo se. Tahematapakieca Abyipa na, “Ca thuse buo li'apa yi angta ca thaw buo'a vayi ang,” a ta.
58013006	Cacuonakawta riephasa pata, “Abyipa ca naa byatuv tana a cuo; Khaahmuo ciy'a va ang. Ahungma tuokhaa naa ta khu aa?” ta nguo tie ung.
58013007	Khazing bie cazaa changpa yi nama luochiytuv taapa tie kha a thyi pari tie ung. Ama hringzya taata a kya pyapa phana kha rue pathiy ungla, ama zangna kha a mangpuo tie ung.
58013008	Zingsuv Khrih ca azuochaning hne ata ning hne chuozaa ta a nanang buo vyi.
58013009	Pacuvna thaahluopa a phangphang ta luo capa pie sa kha yi se; tahematapakieca a ziytuv tie cuota thlahnena a hnyi lipa sa kaw phungluo ziyna ta ma pathiypalung thaa kha patlung li pata vihnyina tuv ta ma pathiypalung thaa kha patlung ungsiy.
58013010	Bienathluodaa lie re a hrietuv tie ta ningna naw ama hnyi lipa bienatluophie suokha ma hnyi ung.
58013011	Tahematapakieca sue hriykhungrina cuota tluobyilecepa ta hmangpathepa luo a thiy a ngiekhyipa hriykhungrina sahring a pangpa ca bienathluodaa khungthing luo khatana myi ta ama rue.
58013012	Cacuonakawtana Zingsuv zaw kha a thiyse ta cawsaa zaw pathe khu riypata khypuv khungthing luota ruvnaana a ang pata a cuo.
58013013	Cacuonakawta kiema zaw ama'a luo, bienathluodaa khungthing luo kha pya ung sala ama a angpa nangzaana kha ang ra ungsiy.
58013014	Tahematapakieca hing chuelyi lie hing a hmangpa khypuv hnyi va puv, cuorasala a vaw riypa khypuv khana maa mangkhuo.
58013015	Cakhutaata ama thueta Khazing ca pathuo sa pari ungsiy, capaca ma pakaa ta Abyipa ming ma pathuosapa khatana a cuo.
58013016	Hmangpha tue hne na hnyipa malie a hraw riypa kha siysaa ri li pata aw kha. Tahematapakieca khahaapa hriykhungrina khana Khazing palung a patluopa ta a cuo.
58013017	Nama luochiytuv tie ri kha a ngie ungla aca changpa haayita ziy tie ung. Tahematapakieca niema kha ca mangchiy yite ama rehriena kha Abyipa'a luo ama chang aa. Ama re kha palung tluosa pata ama hrie the riypata ama ri kha a ngie tie ung. Ama ngiechipuo pata hrie yi sala niema cuota pha the'a vyi.
58013018	Thlaa malie chuopa tie ung; hmangting kha pa-uvsathyi tluo a tla pata ma hrie khing nakawta ma chiephathleduona ca a pathe.
58013019	Niema'a luo a catli pata ina vya pachiy sa khu riypata khuo vie ta thlaa nama chuo riypata khuopuv ta icaa hu yi.
58013020	Chuozaa biekuona thiyse thueta a lesyipa tuvkhietuv ta a cuopa Abyipa Zingsuv kha thiyna taata a pathu pakhaapa diena Khazing ta
58013021	Zingsuv Khrih thueta a khingna hne kiema hrawlie ama palung a patluo riypa hmang a hrie khu riypata hmang phapa bangkhuo ta tluo ca patling yi se. Rungnaana ca ama'a lie chuozaa ta aw mangsue.
58013022	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, a pachangta tah i vya capepa ica pasunapa yi i bie hing palung pasiysa pata nama ziy riypata paa ica kie yi.
58013023	Ma uvnupa Timote kha thaw chung taata a pya tli tapa ica pachang sa khing yi. A vya chiy hmuo kieca niema hne maa taw thue hing ivya chiyle aa.
58013024	Luo caa chiytuv tie hne mingpathepa tie kha bie naa changpa mya ung. Italy ruo lie a awpa ma uvnu zaw ta bie acaa chang yi.
58013025	Vihnyina ca nama bangkhuo cunglie aw mangsue.
59001001	Khazing hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih changtaapa ta a cuopa Jeim ta chuelyi khy ting ta aa chepatlaapa Khazing cawsaa zaw bie icaa chang yi.
59001002	Kama uvnu hne sieta zaw, ruvnaana phangting hne namaa taw tiyta nama palung tluo se,
59001003	tahematapakieca nama zangna lie dyapasya ruvnaana namaa tawpa khata ang khuna aca pahnyi sa yi tapa kha nama pachang.
59001004	Nama bupa aw li pata ruena aa kypa hne tluo a tlingpa nama cuo riypata nama ang khuna kha paky tie ung.
59001005	Niema hrawlie pakhakha ta singna namaa hu kieca cawsaa bangkhuo kha palung tling lina hnyi li pata hne pahyasa pata a pipa Khazing kha a hie se.
59001006	Cuorasala palung luolue li pata zangna ta a hie se, tahematapakieca palung luoluena a hnyipa ca thliychie ta a pazupa riyliy tiylaw hne tana aa lu, tahematapakieca a palung luolue te palung lunghning a phyapa hne hmangting lie a palung a hmang lipa ca Abyipa'a taata suokhakha hmung riypa kha a nguopuo kha se.
59001009	Zangtuv a phahlapa ca calang-thawpa a cuo tiyta a palung tluo sala,
59001010	zangtuv a hnyirungpa ca pachungpa a cuo tiyta a palung tluo se, tahematapakieca a hnyirungpa ca lu chunglie paapaapa haata a lang aa.
59001011	Ning ca kya chiy te a paling tiyta lu kha a e, paapaapa ca a uv te, zung te a puvthena kha a ra. A hnyirungpa tie ca cahaa cata cuo'a yite, ama re lie amaa taw amaa muo yalya khata a uv'a yite ama lang aa.
59001012	Pasupaliyna a ang khupa ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo. Cahaa cata pasupaliyna kha a ang khupa ca ama a duepa zaw'a lie Abyipa ta bie a kuopa yi hringna byilakhuv ama hmung aa.
59001013	Pasupaliyna na ang tiyta, “Khazing na naa pasupaliy,” ta khah; tahematapakieca Khazing ca pha lina ta pasupaliy khu li pata ama zaw ta pakha hmuo pasupaliy vayi.
59001014	Cuorasala cawsaa pakha ca a saapa khingna khata pasupaliy khu te a dung a vie khu.
59001015	Capa a khingna ca nu haata phya te suena kha a pachuo, suena ca ale khing a tlung tiyta thiyna a pachuo.
59001016	Duepa zaw dung khupa ta cuo kha ung.
59001017	Pahyasa pata pipa bangkhuo hne lasaw tluotlingpa ca cung luo taatana ama cuo. Khena Paa taata zaa cungpa ta cuote, ama'a lieca ningdiy haata a hnyilena hne a thlena aw vyi.
59001018	A sapa hrawlie thyipaa taapa cuo riypata a tingnapa a tling khuna riypata biehmisipa lie kha malie a sa.
59001019	I duepa zaw hingpa hing a thyi pari tie ung: ahung nama cuo zaw naathliena lie kha catli ungla, bierina lie hne hihaana lie kha haa tie ung.
59001020	Tahematapakieca nama hihaana hingta Khazing a dangna kha paluo sa khu vyi.
59001021	Cacuonakawta a pyalyipa hne a pha lipa zyazaa bangkhuo ca thaw ungla nama hringna caa khuo khupa yi nama chunglie tuv ciepa a bie kha a panena hne cuhluo tie ung.
59001022	Khazing bie kha a tue ta a tuetuv cuo tie ung, a thyi dyi thyi pata niema hne niema a dungpa cuo kha ung.
59001023	Tahematapakieca Khazing bie kha a thyi dyi thyi te a tue lipa ca iema hne iema kha thlaluo lie a mangpa haatana ama cuo.
59001024	Iema hne iema kha a mang yite ama cakuo khu taata khaapama ma lu tapa kha a maw paluopa hne tana amaa lu.
59001025	Cuorasala hyazangna phungbie, tluo a tlingpa phungbie lie kha a mang yite a ziy paripa tie ca a thyi dyi thyi te a maw paluopa cuo li pata tue te a ziypa ama cuo nakawta ama tuena cunglie kha thluechiy pipa tana ama cuo aa.
59001026	Pakhakha ta biena luo a zuepa tana i cuo ta sala a palyi kha aa ve khu li kieca a pathiypalung kha a dungpa cuote a bienapa ca muo hnyi vyi.
59001027	Paa Khazing hmie lieta pathe te pyalyina a hnyi lipa biena tapa ca: ruvnaana a tawpa haaraa hne nunghlyi zaw kha a mangchiypa hne ama hne ama kha chuelyi pyalyina ta aa kaa li riypata a vena khana a cuo.
59002001	I uvnu hne sieta zaw, ima rungnaana Byi Zingsuv Khrih a zangpa nama cuo pahaata hmiemang parung kha ung.
59002002	Biephungpa ta cawsaa pakha kha siyy kuvpahryi hne cawphasapa a tue pata namaa pungna luo kha a vaw te, siypasapa pakha kha caw a cawkarawpa hneta a vaw ra tiyta,
59002003	cawphapa a hryipa kyihuo khata, “Hingpa lie hing a tu tie,” ta ung cate a siypasapa kyihuo khata, “Lie hue vaa daa tie,” a cuo li kie, “i phyi thabaw dakhang lie hing a tu tie,” nama ta kieca,
59002004	niema hrawlie kha pahlyipalena nama tuepa cuote, ruena pha lipa hne tana biechina nama tue cuo vama?
59002005	I duepa uvnu hne sieta zaw, naathlie tie ung. Khazing ta hingpa chuelyi lieta siypasapa tie hing zangna lie a hnyirungpa cuo riypa hne ama a duepa zaw bie a kuopa yi pena ru cu riypata a tlaw yi cuo vama?
59002006	Cuorasala niema ca siypasapa tie kha nama ese. A hnyirungpa tie khana caa tlawpuo yi cuo vama? Bierina zung luo caa dalepa yi kha iema na a cuo yi cuo vama?
59002007	Niema aca paphyapa yi ming phacepa kha a thuo a pachipa ca iema na a cuo yi cuo vama?
59002008	“Nama naa duepa haakhata na ingpaa kha due tie,” tapa Caapathepa lie phungbie sungnaapa hing nama patling sa kieca hmangpha a tuepa ta nama cuo.
59002009	Cuorasala pahlyipalena na tue kieca suena a tuepa cuo cate, phungbie ta a suepa tapata bie aca chipa.
59002010	Tahematapakieca ahung a cuo zaw phungbie bangkhuo a ziy pata suokha a ziy li kieca phungbie bangkhuo a ziy lipa tana aa li.
59002011	Tahematapakieca, “Nungvaathingsuena tue kha ung,” a tapa khana, “Lie va naw kha,” a ta ra. Nungvaathingsuena na tue li raalaa pata lie na naw kieca phungbie a ziy lipa tana na cuo.
59002012	Cacuonakawta hyazangna phungbie ta bie a ripa riypa tie haata ri ungla tue tie ung.
59002013	Tahematapakieca nangduena a hnyi lipa kha nangduena aw li pata bie chipa pata a cuo aa; nangduena na biechina ca a te.
59002014	I uvnu hne sieta zaw, pakhakha ta zangna na i hnyi ta sala tuena ta a paluo sa li kie khaapama a thlahne aa? Capa a zangna cata ama kha a khuo khu'a ma?
59002015	Na uvnu a cuo li kie na sieta kha caw a tue riy hnyi li pata hne ningting ning riypa sa zaw hnyi li pata aw sala,
59002016	niema hrawlie pakhakha ta, “Diena hneta cakuo tie ung; a lungsa pata aw ungla riybisa pata ning tie ung,” nama ta pata amaa hupa kha nama pi tlung li kieca khaapama a thlahne aa?
59002017	Tuena a hnyi lipa zangna ca a thiypa tana a cuo.
59002018	Cuorasala chekha ta, “Nama ta zangna hnyi cate kama ta tuena i hnyi,” ama ta aa. Tuena a te lipa na zangna ca na pahmung la, kama ta i zangna kha i tuena ta ica pahmung aa.
59002019	Khazing ca pakha tana a cuo tapa kha na zang; a phasa. Khuevuo tahmuo zang te aa cathang.
59002020	Ruena a hnyi lipa zaw, tuena a hnyi lipa zangna ca a thlahnenapa aw vyi tapa kha ica pahmung sa'a yi ma?
59002021	Ma mingpa Abraham ca a saacapaapa Isak kha hriykhungrina ta bienatluophie lie a pi tiy tana a tuena thueta duopacupa a cuo cuo vama?
59002022	Zangna ca a tuena hneta rehrie te tuena ta zangna kha tluo a patling sa tapa kha nama pachang.
59002023	Cakhutaa Caapathepa ta, “Abraham ta Khazing kha zang te ca a zangna thue cata aa dangpa ta cuhluopa a cuo,” a tapa kha a tling. Cacuonakawta ama ca Khazing viesaapa tapata a cuo.
59002024	Cawsaa pakha ca a zangna dyi ta cuo li pata a tuena thueta duopacupa a cuo tapa kha nama pachang.
59002025	Cahaa cata, siyhrawnung Rahab zaw kha biephyatuv tie kha ing a patlung sa yite luo hrang taata dya a pathlienapa yi tuena thue khatana duopacupa a cuo cuo vama?
59002026	Tahematapakieca pangpa ca thlaapa li pata ca a thiy pahaata, zangna zaw tuena li pata ca a thiy ra.
59003001	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, niema a hluvpuv kha pacuvtuv nama cuo riypa cuo vyi, tahematapakieca kiema pacuvtuv tie hing malie laata a hlyi vie ta bie ripa patana ma cuo aa tapa kha nama pachang.
59003002	Tahematapakieca ma bangkhuo hingta paana a hluvpuv ma tue. Bierina lie paana a hnyi lipa ca cawsaa tlingpa ta cuote, a pangpa a uv khupa tana a cuo.
59003003	Aruo ca ma ri malie a ngie se tapata a pakaa lie hmyakhe ma tuv kieca a pangpa yalya ta ma khingna luo ma pasi sa khu.
59003004	Tiypalaw khiy rue tie ung: a lesapa cuote a cahrasapa thliy ta a pasi sa, cuorasala a cawkariyta tah a cuopa a palawmaana ta uv te a mawtuv ta a khingna luo kha a pasi sa.
59003005	Cahaa cata palyi hing a cawta tah a cuo, cuorasala khuopuv ta aa pale taw. A cawkariypa myihliy ta ruo a kupuv a pakuo sa khu pakha nama pachang.
59003006	Palyi ca myi haatana a cuo. Ma palyi ca ma pangpa chebuo zaw hrawlie a awpa pha lina aa hmyana hmang ta cuote, ma pangpa bangkhuo kha a papyalyi sa. Ma hringna kha myi luo hmaw te, ama hne ama zaw kha hell taata a thupa myi luo aa hmaw.
59003007	Cawsaa hingta saruopa hne pavaa phangting, a valepa hne aa thiylepa saruo phangting hne tiy chunglie a awpa saruopa phangting hing hri te a pasing khu,
59003008	cuorasala palyi a hri khupa ahunghmuo aw vayi. Palyi ca thiyna ca-ie hneta a bipa, hri khu lipa, a tle paripa pha lina tana a cuo.
59003009	Ma palyi hingta Abyipa hne Paa Khazing kha pathuosa pate, capa palyi ngiethie cata Khazing hmingsuo a lu pata sapa cawsaa kha chie ma sa.
59003010	Thluechiy bie hne chiesana kha pakaa suokha taacata a pya. I uvnu hne sieta zaw, cahaa cata a cuo riypata cuo vyi.
59003011	Tiyhnaa suokha taata tiy thlungpa hne tiykhapa ama pya hne the'a ma?
59003012	I uvnu hne sieta zaw, thyikuv kung ta Oliv thyi a pathyi the ma? Mingsuv kung ta thyikuv thyi a pathyi the ma? Tiy-iepa zaw ta tiythlungpa papya khu vyi.
59003013	Nama hrawlie ta ahung hingma a singpa hne a pachangpa ta a cuo ungciy? Hringzya phapa, singna taata a pyapa nangnena ta nama hriepa re khata paluo sa tie ung.
59003014	Cuorasala nama palung chunglie ta hietliena hne niema kaw dyi a pacuona a aw kieca biehmisipa kha a du pata suena hne a palena kha tue kha ung.
59003015	Cahaapa singna ca cungluo taata a zuvpa cuo vyi, cuorasala chuelyi singna, thlaapa hmang a cuo lipa hne a pha li patana a cuo.
59003016	Tahematapakieca hietliena hne kiema kaw dyi a pacuona a awna hmang lie ca a re lina hne pha lina phangting zaw a aw aa.
59003017	Cuorasala cungluo taata a zuvpa singna ca a suokhana ta a pathe, cakhutaata diena hne a bi, a nang a ne, a viesaa a the, nangduena hne thyipaa pha ta bi te, pahlyipalena hne a cuo pakhina hnyi vyi.
59003018	Diena a tuetuv tie ta diena chunglie ama tuvpa saciy taata ama pahriypa ca a dangna tana a cuo.
59004001	Niema hrawlie namaa hru namaa inapa hing khaapa taata ma aa vaw? Nama chunglie rie a du nguoluopa nama saapa khingna taata na aa vaw cuo vama?
59004002	Suokhakha khing ung cate nama hnyi khu li nakawta cawsaa nama thie. Suokhakha kha khing ung cate nama hmung khu li nakawta namaa hru namaa i. Nama hie li nakawtana nama hmung va.
59004003	Nama hie raalaa pa zaw ta hmung va ungciy, tahematapakieca saapa a nuona lie hmuo riypata aa hmuo li pata nama hie.
59004004	Zangtluo a tla lipa cawsaa zaw! Chuelyi hne a viesaapa hing Khazing hne a cariena tana a cuo tapa pachang va ung cama? Cacuonakawta chuelyi hne a viesaa a khingpa bangkhuo Khazing carie tana amaa li.
59004005	Caapathepa ta, “Khazing ta ma chunglie a chipa thlaapa kha a duesa nakawta aa hrakuo,” a tapa hing ata cakhawpa ta rue kanaa ungciy?
59004006	Cuorasala ama ta a hluv vie ta vi malie a hnyi; cacuonakawta, “Khazing ca a hruotlepa kha a du te, cuorasala a panepa kha vi a hnyi yi.”
59004007	Cacuonakawta Khazing ri kha a ngie tie ung. Setaa kha a du ungla niema'a taata aa ruo aa.
59004008	Khazing kha a ngie ungla ama zaw acaa ngie ra'a yi. Niema a suepa zaw, nama kuv kha a siy tie ung. Niema a palunghluvpa tie zaw nama pathiypalung kha pathe sa tie ung.
59004009	Nama ngiechisa pata angiy-aphie ungla caa tie ung. Nama pahnyiparingna kha angiy-aphiena ta thle ungla namaa nuonapa kha ngiechina ta thle tie ung.
59004010	Abyipa hmielie kha a pane la ama ta aca cyicalang aa.
59004011	Uvnu hne sieta zaw, pakha hne pakha kha nama thuo a pachi kha ung. Malie thuo a pachipa hne sue a phawpa ca phungbie thuo a pachipa hne sue a phawpa tana a cuo; cuorasala phungbie kha sue na phaw kieca nama ca phungbie a ziypa cuo li pata phungbie kha bie a ripa pa tana na cuo aa.
59004012	Phungbie malie a pituv hne bie chi khuna a hnyipa ca pakha dyi aw te ama ca malie a khuo khutuv hne malie a para khutuv ta a cuo. Na ingpaa zaw bie chipa riypata nama ca ahung tama na cuo?
59004013	“Ata ning a cuo li kie mawluo khiy capa khy luo ca si'a pate, capa lieca kung kha aw'a pate, sung pali'a pate tuokaa ma huv aa,” a tapa zaw, ata hingta a vaw ungla naathlie tie ung.
59004014	Mawluo hing khaama a lu aa tapa pachang va ungciy. Nama hringna hing khaapatama a cuo? Niema ca ata hing sungkhata a vya zu te a vie paluopa amyi haatana nama cuo.
59004015	“Khazing khingna ta a cuo kieca hring'a pate capa hne khapa kha ma tue aa,” tahriy tie ung.
59004016	Cadyiseca niema ca a hruo tle ung cate namaa pale; capa hruotlena bangkhuo ca pha lina tana a cuo.
59004017	Cakhutaata, hmangpha tue riypa pachang thluo pata a tue lipa ca suena a tuepa tana a cuo.
59005001	A hnyirungpa zaw, a vaw ungla nama cunglie a vya chiy riypa ruvnaana kawlie kha caa ungla a ngiy tie ung.
59005002	Nama hnyirungna ca hmaw diy te, nama caw ca a pabung diy tli.
59005003	Nama siyy hne nama ngu ca a se ta ce diy te, capa a se cata niema kha caa du'a yite nama saa kha myi haata aca ning'a yi. Niema ca ninghnangcepa cuo tana sue hne thiy kha namaa pacung.
59005004	Naathlie tie ung! Nama lu lie rehrietuv tie kha dya dung ung cate namaa pangaapa ama thavie muo una ueryi hne sa caa hriepatuv tie zaw khina ueryi na cungnungce Khazing naa luo a chiy tli.
59005005	Hing chuelyi lie hing lunghruotlungsa pata anuona chunglie nama hring; aca thiena riypa yi ning hne cuo cuota namaa pathu pacie.
59005006	Niema caa vielie lipa aa dangpa tie kha sue phaw ung cate nama thie.
59005007	Cacuonakawta duepa zaw Abyipa aa vawna te ta palung pasiysa pata aw tie ung. Lu a thlupa ta a lu taata a sungnaapa sa a vyi riypa kha palungpasiysa pata a huo taw. Cuovuo khy hne suepuvdaw khy aa vaw riypa kha palungpasiysa pata a huo.
59005008	Niema zaw nama palung a pasiy riypatana a cuo. Nama palung a pacu tie ung, tahematapakieca Abyipa a vawna riypa cuo ca aa ngie tli.
59005009	I duepa zaw, bie ripa pa nama cuo li riypata pakha hne pakha cunglie kha a cie kha ung. Mang tie ung, bieripatuv ca chiypakaa lie a daa khiy!
59005010	I duepa zaw, Abyipa ming ta bie a phupa profet tie te-angna hne palungpasiyna kha a mangpuo tie ung.
59005011	Hmisi ta kieca ang khuna a hnyipa tie kha thluechiypa tie ma ta yi. Job ang khuna kaw kha nama thyi mangtli. Abyipa aa tingna hne khatluv tama kawpacuona hnyi te nangduena a hnyi tapa kha nama hmung mangtli.
59005012	Cakhutaacata, i duepa zaw, vuoruo cuose, alyi cuose, a hrangpa suokhakha ming ta cuose chie a sa kha ung. Khazing suephawna nama ang li riypata a cuo nama tapa kha “a cuo” ta ungla, cuovyi nama tapa kha “cuovyi” ta tie ung.
59005013	Nama hrawlie ruvnaana a tawpa nama aw ma? Thlaa chuo yi se. A palung a tluopa nama aw ma? Pathuosana hlaa kha sa yi se.
59005014	Nama hrawlie a tluo lipa nama aw ma? Khrihsaa uvthyi tie kha ku yi sala, iema ta Abyipa ming ta chiytiy thuv yi sala thlaa chuopa yi se.
59005015	Zangna ta thlaa ama chuona khata a pasapa kha a khuo aa. Abyipa ta patluo sa'a te, suena a tuepa zaw kha a ngiethe aa.
59005016	Cacuonakawta pakha hne pakha'a lie kha nama suena a phu ungla, thlaa a chuopa tie ung, cacuokieca patluo sa pata nama cuo aa. Aa dangpa thlaachuona ca cahra te hmang tue khuna a hnyi.
59005017	Elijah kha kiema haapa cawsaa tana a cuo ra. Khy saa li riypata khuopuv ta thlaa a chuo tiyta, kung thung'a nata thlacaruv chung khy saa vyi.
59005018	Cakhutaata thlaa a chuo pakhaa ca avuo ta khy pasaa sa te alyi ta kung a pavyi sa.
59005019	I uvnu hne sieta zaw, biehmisipa taata a viepa pakhakha kha a hrangpa pakha ta a vya kaakhyi pakhaa tiyta,
59005020	capa a suepa a vya kaakhyi pakhaapa ca a suepa thlaapa kha thiyna taata khuo te, suena hluvpuv zaw kha a buvkhung tapa kha pachang tie ung.
