60001001	Zingsuv Khrih lucuotuv a cuopa Piter ta Pontas, Galatia, Kappadosia, Asia hne Bithinia luo carie rieciy ta aa chepatlaapa, Paa Khazing ta aa tlawpa tie,
60001002	Zingsuv Khrih ri a ngie riypa hne a thiyse ta pathe sa riypata a tlawpa tie'a luo caa ivya cape. Vihnyina hne diena ca niema'a lie tluotlingsa pata aw mangsue.
60001003	Ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih Paa hne Khazing ca pathuosa pata cuo mangsue. A lepa a duena chunglie kha Zingsuv Khrih thiyna taata a thupakhaana thueta a hringpa anguopuona chung luo cuose,
60001004	vuoruo lie niema cuota chipa, a ra khu li tlipa, a pyalyi khu lipa, a lang khu lipa chung luo kha a thaa ta malie a papuv sa.
60001005	Niema ca ningchuoningpa thueta a vya luo riypa khuona cuota zangna thueta Khazing cahrana ta mangchiypa tana nama cuo.
60001006	Atalie hing dyapasyana phangphang chunglie ruvnaana nama ang zaw ta hing hmang kawlie hing a law tie ung.
60001007	A ra thepa siyy khahmuo myi ta dyapasya pata a cuo. Siyy laata a muo ruv viepa nama zangna kha a hmisipa a cuo ma tapata dyapasya a cuopa ca Zingsuv aa luo thueta pathuosana hne rungnaana hne pa-uvsathyina nama hmungna riypatana a cuo.
60001008	Ama kha nama hmung li raalaa pata nama due; ata hing ama kha nama hmung li raalaa pata ama kha zang ung cate, pakaa ta ri khu lipa a sungnaapa palungtluona nama hnyi.
60001009	Tahematapakieca nama zangna muo, nama thlaapa khuona khana nama hmung.
60001010	Khuona hne a patuv pata, niema cuota a vya cuo riypa vihnyina kaw bie a phupa profet tie ta a phasa pata ama za huv pata a cuo.
60001011	Ama chunglie a awpa Thlaapa ta a pahmung sa na haayita Khrih cuota riy thlipuo ciepa ruvnaana hne a vya pazuepa rungnaana kaw kha tehte ama khuolu tiyta, ahungtama a cuo aa tapa hne khatiy tama a cuo aa tapa kha ama khieluo.
60001012	Iema ca iema cuota hrie lipa yi ta nama cuota ama hriepa kha pahmung sa pata cuo yite, capa hmang hne aa patuv pata, vuoruo taata a zuvpa Thlaapa Pathe hmuo pata niema'a luo thuophaabie zaa phyapa tie thueta ata hing niema'a luo pathyi sa pata a cuo tli. Hingpa hmang hing avuoming tahmuo ta ama za hmung khing hringhruo patana a cuo.
60001013	Cacuonakawta re hrie riypata nama pathiypalung ta a ting pacie pata aw tie ung; a ting pacie pata aw ungla Zingsuv Khrih aa luo thueta nama hmung riypa vihnyina lie kha namaa nguopuonapa ca bang tie ung.
60001014	Haatiy ri a ngiesapa haakhata aw ungla Khazing nama za pachang li ningta nama za hnyipa saapa khingna kha ziy kha ung.
60001015	Niema caa utuv Khazing ca a pathepa a cuo pahaata, nama tuepa bangkhuo lie kha pathe ra tie ung.
60001016	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta “Kama ca a pathepa i cuo pahaata niema zaw nama pathe ra aa,” a ta.
60001017	Cawsaa bangkhuo kha pahlyipale li pata ama tuena haata bie a ripatuv yi Khazing kha Paa tapata ngiechi namaa hie kieca, hing chuelyi lie khyche nama cuo chung bangkhuo hing ama kha ciyzaa pata aw tie ung.
60001018	Nama mingchingmingvuo tie'a taata ru nama cupa, khaahmuo thlahnena a hnyi lipa hringzya taata a thlapa nama cuopa kha nama pachang. A ra thepa hmang ta a cuopa siyy hne ngu ta cuo li pata
60001019	tluotling lina hne risie riy a aw lipa tuvtaata haapa, a muo sungpa Khrih thiyse ta a thlapa tana nama cuo.
60001020	Ama ca chuelyi sa hluo baataata a tlawpa ta cuo te, cuorasala ninghnanghnangpa cuo lie hing niema cuota paluohuo pata a cuo.
60001021	Ama kha thiyna taata pathu pakhaa te rungnaana a pituv Khazing kha ama thue cata nama zang. Canakaw cata nama zangna hne namaa nguopuona ca Khazing cunglie ta aa bang.
60001022	Biehmisipa kha nama ziyna thueta nama thlaapa ca pathe sapa cuo tli te, canakaw cata pakha hne pakha kha nama pathiypalung hmisi ta khuopuv ta namaa due.
60001023	A hringpa hne aa hmangpa Khazing bie thueta a ra thepa cuo li pata a ra the lipa saciy taata a thaa ta a puvpa ta nama cuo.
60001024	Tahematapakieca “Cawsaa bangkhuo ca aphuvpa haatana ama cuo, ama rungnaana bangkhuo zaw aphuvpa paa haatana ama cuo. Aphuvpa ca thiy te paapaapa zaw ama lang,
60001025	cuorasala Abyipa bie ca chuozaa ta aa hmang.” Capa bie ca niema'a lie phupa thuophaabie hingtana a cuo.
60002001	Cacuonakawta zyatena hne hanghiena bangkhuo, a dang linapa, malie hietliena hne malie kawchie rina bangkhuo kha thaw diy paatie ung.
60002002	A puv thaapa haaseta haata a pathepa thlaapa ahnungtiy kha khing ungla, capa thlaapa ahnungtiy thue cata nama hmungpa khuona chunglie kha nama lethaw aa.
60002003	Ata hing Abyipa phana ca namaa pacuo hmisi tli.
60002004	Cawsaa tahmuo thaw ra yi sala Khazing ta a sungnaapa ta ri te aa tlawpa, a hringpa alung, Abyipa'a luo ca a vaw tie ung.
60002005	A hringpa alung haata thlaapa ing sana lieca hmuopa cuo tie ung. Caca niema kha a pathepa tluobyi phang nama cuo riypa hne Khazing cuhluo tluo aa tlapa thlaapa luo hriykhungrina kha Zingsuv Khrih thueta nama tue khu na riypata a cuo.
60002006	Tahematapakieca Caapathepa lie a ripa ca, “Mang tie ung, alung suokha kha Zion lie i chi, a tlawpa hne muosungpa ingkiy lung tana a cuo; ama a zangpa ahunghmuo nangzaa pata aw'a vyi.
60002007	Cakhutaata niema a zangpa tie cuota ca ama ca muosung pata a cuo, cuorasala a zang lipa tie cuota ca, Ingsatuv ta a thawpa alung ca ingkiy lung ta a li'a te,
60002008	Iema a pachiyna alung, Iema a liena alungpuvnung ta a cuo aa,” a ta. Iema ca lieryiuopuopa ama cuopa haata Khazing bie kha amaa ngie li nakawta amaa pachiy.
60002009	Cuorasala niema ca a tlawpa phang, siepahruo tluobyi, a pathepa mingphang, Khazing cawsaa tana nama cuo. Khyzingna chung taata nang-uo aa chiypa khena luo caa kutuv yi Khazing ta kharuehaa hmang a tuepa tluo u khyi riypata a tlawpa tana nama cuo.
60002010	Ahluo taca niema ca Khazing cawsaa za cuo va ungciy, cuorasala ata hing ca Khazing cawsaa ta nama cuo; Ahluo taca niema ca nangduena ca za hnyi va yi, cuorasala ata hing ca nangduepa ta nama cuo.
60002011	Duepa zaw, khyche hne mingpe ta nama cuo pahaata thlaapa hne aa dupa saapa khingna kha cahriy tie ung tapata paa ica kie yi.
60002012	Jentail ming hrawlie kha ciyzaa tluo a tla pata aw tie ung. Pha lina a tuetuv tapata nama thuo ca pachi ra yi sala ciyzaa tluo a tla pata nama hring pakha hmung'a yite, Khazing ca cawsaa bie ri riypata aa vaw tiyta ama pathuo sa aa.
60002013	Khazing hmie mang pata cawsaa ta tuepa nawhnyina bangkhuo kha ziy ungla, a suocepa siepahruo kha cuose,
60002014	pha lina a tuepa tie kha duote pata hmangpha a tuepa tie kha pathuosana pi riypata pathliepa byi tie kha cuose, ama ri a ngie tie ung.
60002015	Tahematapakieca hmangpha nama tuenapa khata a ngaapa tie khicakhawna kha nama paduo sa riypa ca Khazing khingna ta a cuo.
60002016	Khazing changtaapa nama cuona haata, cawsaa hyazangpa haata aw tie ung, cuorasala nama hyazangna kha pha lina buvkhungna ta hmuo kha ung.
60002017	Cawsaa bangkhuo kha pa-uvsathyi tie ung. Zangna lieta nama uvnu kha due tie ung. Khazing kha ciy ungla siepahruo kha ciyzaa tie ung.
60002018	Sii zaw, nama ziy tie kha pa-uvsathyi ungla ama ri kha a ngie tie ung. Duena hnyi te a nang nepa dyi cuo li pata a pyathupa ri zaw kha a ngie tie ung.
60002019	Tahematapakieca Khazing khingna nama pachang nakawta a luo li pata ruvnaana nama ang kieca thluechiy na nama hmung aa.
60002020	Hmangsue nama tue nakawta tuvna nama ang kie ca khaapama a thlahne? Cuorasala hmangpha nama tuena kawlieta ruvnaana nama ang kieca, Khazing thluechiy na nama hmung aa.
60002021	Capa repa catana kupa nama cuo, tahematapakieca Khrih zaw kha niema cuota ang tli te, a phyihnie nama paziy the riypata a mangpuo riypa aca chipa siy tli yi.
60002022	Ama ca suena tue vyi, a pakaa taata hangna bie pya buo vyi.
60002023	Biechie ta ama chaw tiyta, biechie ta palie va yi; ruvnaana a ang tiyta a hru va yi; cuorasala aa dang pata bie a rituv Khazing tuv khana aa pi.
60002024	Suena taata law pata adangna chunglie ma hring the riypata ama hrahring ta a pangpa ta vieluo cunglie ma suena kha phya te, niema ca a hmaa ta nama tluo mangtli.
60002025	Tahematapakieca niema ca luo za pie ung cate, cuorasala ata hing ca tuvkhietuv hne nama thlaapa caa khietuvpa'a luo nama vya kaa tli.
60003001	Cahaa cata, napuv zaw nama navaapa ri kha a ngie tie ung. Iema chekha ca Khazing bie kha ama zang li kie zaw ma bie kaakha hmuo ri a hu li pata ama napuvnung awtuvzyazaa khata zangtuv a pacuo sa'a yi.
60003002	Tahematapakieca a pathepa hne pa-uvsathyi aa tlapa nama hringzya kha ama hmung nakawta a cuo.
60003003	Niema namaa panginapa ca ale luo taata hmung khupa nama suo a phiena zya, siyy hne ngu namaa tue zya, hne caw namaa tue zya lie zaw kha cuo li pata,
60003004	Khazing hmielie a muosungpa hne chung luo taata a panginapa, a puvthe paripa nangnena hne diena pathiypalung phya khata cuo hriy se.
60003005	Capacana hluo ningta Khazing a nguopuopa a pathepa canung zaw ta ama navaapa ri a ngie pata amaa pangi tawna zya ta a cuo.
60003006	Sarah ca Abraham ri kha a ngie te ama kha abyipa a ta. Niema zaw phana tue ung cate ciyna khaahmuo nama hnyi li kieca Sarah sacanung zaw tana nama cuo.
60003007	Cahaa ngiethie cata niema, navaapa zaw, nama napuvnung hne nama aw tiyta, niema laata a thaadya viepa ama cuopa hne iema zaw muosungpa hringna rucutuv ama cuopa kha pachang pata pa-uvsathyi tie ung, cacuokieca nama thlaachuona kha khaapa tahmuo ca pakhuo'a vayi.
60003008	A hnangcawce ta i ri khingpa ca nama bangkhuo ta, nama palung a lu se, kawpacuona a hnyi ung, pakha hne pakha a due ungla, nangnena hne rawcanawna hnyi tie ung.
60003009	Pha lina kha pha lina ta a thung kha ung, biechiepa kha biechiepa ta a vielie kha ung; cuorasala thluechiy pina ta a thung hriy tie ung.
60003010	Tahematapakieca, A nuosa pata hring khing te, ningcuo phapa a hmung khingpa ca, biechie ri kha a cadang yi sala, hanghiena bie zaw ri kha yi se
60003011	hmangpha lipa kha cahriy yi sala hmangphapa kha tue yi se; diena kha huv sala hmung a zue se.
60003012	Tahematapakieca Abyipa ta a dangpa tie ca a ming khata ve yite, ama thlaachuona kha a thyipa yi. Cuorasala pha lina a tuepa tie ca aa pali se yi.
60003013	Phana tue a khingpa na cuo kieca ahungma ruvnaana caa pi aa?
60003014	Cuorasala hmangpha na tue patana te-angna na hmung tapa kieca thluechiypa tana na cuo. Aca pachiy zaw yi ta ciy kha ung, nama kharue zaw haa kha se.
60003015	Cuorasala nama pathiypalung chunglie Khrih kha Abyi ta hnyi ungla ciyzaa tie ung. Nama hnyipa anguopuona kawlie ta caa hiehriypa pakhakha ama aw tiyta nama palie khu paluo riypata a ting pacie pata aw tie ung.
60003016	Nama palie tiyta nangnena hne pa-uvsathyina hneta palie tie ung. Nama chiephathleduona kha a pathe pata chi tie ung. Cakiedyina Khrih chunglie nama tuepa zyazaa phapa kawlie ta niema kha ca hue yite nama thuo caa pachipa tie kha ama nang a zaa aa.
60003017	Te-angna hingna Khazing khingpa ta a cuo tapata a cuo kieca, hmangpha lipa tuena kawlie ta te-angpa laa taca hmangpha tuena kawlie ta te-angpa a pha vie.
60003018	Tahematapakieca Khrih hrahring zaw kha suena cuota yikha ta aa dena te ta a thiy, niema kha Khazing'a luo a chiy riypata a dangpa ca a dang lipa zaw cuota a thiy. Ama ca saapa lie a thiy raalaa pata, thlaapa lieca pahring pakhaa pata a cuo.
60003019	Capa thlaapa cata thaw a tlapa thlaapa tie kha phung a va chang yi.
60003020	Capa thaw a tlapa thlaapa tie ca Noah ta tiypalaw a sa ning kha Khazing ta palung pasiysa pata a huo raalaa pa yi ta a ri a ngie lipa tie ta ama cuo. Capa lieca cawsaa a cawta, ama bangkhuo ta pacari dyi na tiy chung taakhata khuopa a zaa cuo yi.
60003021	Capa cata a paluosalupa tiynawna ta ata hing niema kha aca khuo yi. Tiynawna ca nama pangpa lie a pyalyipa pasiyna ta cuo vyi, cuorasala Zingsuv Khrih thupakhaana thueta a phapa chiephathleduona kha Khazing'a luo a hiena tana a cuo.
60003022	Zingsuv Khrih ca vuoruo luo kie te, a paa cacuo luo kuo ta a tu te, avuoming nawhnyina hne cahrana bangkhuo kha a uv diy yi.
60004001	Cacuonakawta Khrih ca a pangpa ta a za te-ang nakawta niema zaw cahaa cata ang khu riypata a ting pacie pata aw tie ung. Tahematapakieca saapa ta a te-angpa ca suena hneta aa che tli.
60004002	Caca hing chuelyi lie a ngaapa nama hringna hing cawsaa khingna haa cuo li pata Khazing khingna haata nama hring khuna riypatana a cuo.
60004003	Jentail ming ta ama tue khingpa hmang ta a cuopa saapa anuona, saapa khingna, sahmaa pariyna, khi-u pata anuona, khingta ningdangna, duv aa chiypa kuvtuezuv biena zaw kha ade-akhaw pata nama tue ra mangtli.
60004004	Niema ta kha haapaapa a luekhungpa anuopaana lie kha namaa te khyi li tli nakawta ama kharue haa te nama thuo aca pachi yi.
60004005	Cuorasala a thiypa hne a hringpa tie kha bie ripa riypata a ting pacie pata a awpa Khazing hmielie kha ama bie ca ripa pata ama cuo aa.
60004006	Cacuonakaw catana a thiypa tie'a luo zaw kha thuophaabie ca phu pata a cuo. Caca cawsaa bangkhuo kha bie ripa pata ama cuo pahaata iema zaw saapa lieca bie ripa pata ama cuo raalaa pata thlaapa lie ca Khazing haata ma hringna riypata a cuo.
60004007	Hmangting bangkhuo a chuona riypa cuo a ngie tli. Cacuonakawta thlaa nama chuo khuna riypata a cadangna hnyi ungla singvaasa pata aw tie ung.
60004008	Capa zaw khutaa cata, pakha hne pakha kha a due pari tie ung, tahematapakieca duena ca suena hluvpuv khana a buvkhung.
60004009	A ciepuo li pata pakha hne pakha kha ing a patlung sa tie ung.
60004010	Khazing lasaw phangphang mangchiykingkaatuv pha nama cuo pahaata ama'a taata nama hmungpa lasaw kha pakha cyicuo phana cuota hmuo tie ung.
60004011	Khazing ca Zingsuv Khrih thueta hmangting bangkhuo lie a rungnaa the na riypata phung a ripa ta Khazing bie hrahring kha ri sala, a re a hrietuv ta Khazing ta a pipa thaazuo ta hrie se. Rungnaana hne cahrana ca chuozaa ta chuozaa te ama huo cuo mangsue. Amen.
60004012	Duepa zaw, niema pasupaliy riypata niema hrawlie a tlapa riethyina myi cunglie kha hmang a tlung buo lipa na kiema'a lie a tlung tapata nama kharue haa kha se.
60004013	Cuorasala a rungnaana aa luo tiyta alawna hne palung tluo pata nama khi-u the riypata Khrih te-angna a hrawpa haakhata a law tie ung.
60004014	Zingsuv ming kawlie ta thuochi nama phya kieca, thluechiypa tana nama cuo, tahematapakieca rungnaana thlaapa, Khazing thlaapa na nama cunglie ta a aw.
60004015	Cuorasala niema pakha hinghmuo lienawna, paruvna, pha lina tuena kawlie hne cawsaa riethyi pina kawlie taca te-ang kha ung.
60004016	Cadyiseca khrihsaa cuona kawlie tana nama te-ang tapata a cuo kieca nama ngie chi kha se.
60004017	Tahematapakieca Khazing chungkhue tie taata patha pata bie rina cuo ca a vya tlung tli; capacana kiema'a taata a patha tapata a cuo kieca, Khazing thuophaabie kha siysaa a ri lipa tie ama chuona ca khaapama a lu aa?
60004018	Caapathepa ta, “Aa dangpa tie khuo riypa khahmuo a ruv pata a cuo kieca, A suepa tie hne Khazing a pachang lipa tie changchiy ca tuokhaama a cuo aa?”
60004019	Cacuonakawta, Khazing khingna haata a te-angpa tie ca phana ama tuepuo nguoluo pa khata zangtluo aa tlapa Satuv Khazing'a luo kha a pi karue yi se.
60005001	Khrihsaa uvthyi pakha a daahmang taata hne Khrih te-angna kha tehte a khuotuv pakha a daahmang taata cuose, a vya luo riypa rungnaana a hraw ra riypa a cuopa kama ta khrihsaa uvthyi tie kha ica pasu yi.
60005002	Nama mangchiy riypata aca pipa Khazing tuvrung kha na re a cuo nakawdyi cuo li pata palung thusa pata mangchiy tie. Hrie muo hmung khing nakawdyi cuo li pata hrie khingna pathiypalung hrahring hnyi ungla hrie tie ung.
60005003	Niema mangchiy riypata aca pipa yi tuvrung kha a uv ta uv kha ung, cuorasala acaa mangpuo riypa yita aw tie ung.
60005004	Cakiedyina tuvkhie byice aa luo tiyta a lang buo lipa rungnaana byilakhuv nama hmung aa.
60005005	Cahaa ngiethie cata niema kungnu vie tie ta uvthyi vie tie ri kha a ngie tie ung. Nama bangkhuo ta rawcanawna caw kha a hryi ungla pakha hne pakha kha a bya tie ung. Tahematapakieca Caapathepa ta, “Khazing ta a palepa tie kha a du yite, raw a canawpa tie kha vi a hnyi yi,” a ta.
60005006	Cacuonakawta a cuo a de tiyta calangpa nama cuo riypata a cahrapa Khazing kuv rawlie kha rawcanawna hneta khysa tie ung.
60005007	Niema kha aca mangchiy pari nakaw yi ta nama palung riethyina bangkhuo kha ama cunglie pachung tie ung.
60005008	Singvaasa pata hne padiypavuosa pata aw tie ung. Nama cariepa ta a cuopa Setaa ca aa rung nguoluopa chingde haata a sie riypa kha huv te a khie nguoluo.
60005009	Nama zangna kha a pacu ungla ama kha a du tie ung, tahematapakieca chuelyi lie a awpa nama uvnu hne sieta zaw bangkhuo hing cahaacatana ama te-ang tapa kha nama pachangpa a cuo.
60005010	Cuo pachangta chung nama te-ang khu taata Khrih chunglie chuozaa rungnaana luo caa kupa yi, vihnyina bangkhuo a hnyituv Khazing ama hrahring ta namaa hupa kha ca pi'a yite aca paraw pathiy'a yi, thaa ca patlung'a yite aca pacu'a yi.
60005011	Cahrana ca chuozaa ta ama huopa cuo mangsue. Amen.
60005012	Kama ta niema kha thaazuo pi riypa hne hingpa hing aa hmuopa Khazing vihnyina tana a cuo tapa kha tehtekhuona ta zangtluo aa tlapa uvnu tana a cuo tapata i ruepa Silvanus'a taata hingpa caa pachangta hing ica paphya yi. Hing vihnyina chunglie hing a cusa pata a daa tie ung.
60005013	Niema hneta a tlaw pakhawpa Babilon lie a awpa Khrihsaabuv hne i saacapaapa Marka zaw ta nama kuv aca patuv yi.
60005014	Pakha hne pakha kha nama kuv a patuv ungla duena ta a pahnuo tie ung. Khrih chunglie a awpa nama bangkhuo cunglie diena aw mangsue.
61001001	Khazing changtaapa hne lu-cuotuv a cuopa Simon Piter ta, Ma Khazing hne Khuotuv Zingsuv Khrih adangna thueta kiema zangna tluv ta a sungnaapa zangna a hmung rapa niema'a luo kha caa maca paphya yi.
61001002	Khazing hne ima Byipaapa Zingsuv nama pachangna thueta vihnyina hne diena ca nama cunglie a hmang pari mangsue.
61001003	Ama rungnaana hne phana thueta kiema malie a kutuv kha ma pachangna thueta hringna hne phana cuota maa hupa hmangting bangkhuo kha ama cahrana ta malie a pi tli.
61001004	A sungnaapa hne ale hringhruopa biekuona malie a pipa thue cata, karuo-awna nakawta hingpa chuelyi lie a awpa rana taata law khu'a ung cate Khazing cuona kha namaa hraw ra khu aa.
61001005	Cacuonakawta nama zangna lie phana chachiy kha a zue ungla, phana lie kha pachangna chachiy tie ung;
61001006	pachangna lie kha kiema hne kiema a uv khuna kha chachiy ungla, kiema hne kiema a uv khuna lie kha ang khuna chachiy tie ung;
61001007	ang khuna lie kha Khazing ciyzaana chachiy ungla, Khazing ciyzaana lie kha uvnu kawpacuona chachiy ungla, uvnu kawpacuona lie kha duena chachiy tie ung.
61001008	Hingpa cuona hing niema huopa cuo sala niema hrawlie a lethaw kieca, hingpa cuona hingta ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih pachangna chunglie kha thlahnena a hnyi lipa hne a thyi a pathyi lipa ca pacuo sa'a vayi.
61001009	Hingpa cuona a hnyi lipa ca luongieta te dyi a hmungpa hne mingcuepa cuote, a suena taata pathe sa tlipa a cuopa khahmuo a mawpa a cuo.
61001010	Cacuonakawta uvnu hne sieta zaw, aca kuna yi hne acaa tlawna yi hing pacu sa hryly tie ung, cahaa cata nama tue kieca a pachiy buo'a va ungciy.
61001011	Cahaa cata niema ca ma Byipaapa hne Khuotuv Zingsuv Khrih chuozaa pena chung luo a ngie riypa kha pahyasa pata pipa nama cuo aa.
61001012	Cacuonakawta hingpa zaw hing nama pachang ciepa hne niema'a lie a awpa biehmisipa chunglie a cusa pata a aw ciepa a cuo raalaa pata pathyi sa pakhaa icaa ting yi.
61001013	I pangpa ta i aw chung bangkhuo ca hingpa bie pachang sa pakhaa pari riypa hing a pha tapata i rue.
61001014	Tahematapakieca ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih ta a siesa pata ina pachang sa pahaata thiyna ta ina pha patang aa tapa kha i pachang.
61001015	I thiy khu taata hingpa hmang zaw hing namaa thyi pakhaa pari riypata i cuo khu na chung ta i zue aa.
61001016	Tahematapakieca ima Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih a cahrana hne aa vawna kaw kha maca pachang sa tiy yi ta singvaasa pata tuechawpa phungpahlaapa hmuo pata maca changpa yi cuo vyi, cuorasala a lesyina kha ming ta a hmungpa tana ma cuo.
61001017	Tahematapakieca Paa Khazing'a taata pa-uvsathyina hne rungnaana a hmung ningta Lesyi Rungnaapaa'a taata ueryi a zuvpa ca, “Hingpa hing i Duepa i Saacapaa, a cunglie i palung a tlingsapapaa tana a cuo,” a ta.
61001018	Ama hneta tluopathepa lie ma aw ningta vuoruo taata capa ueryi aa zuvpa ca kiema hrahring ta ma thyi.
61001019	Cacuonakawta profet tie ama ripa a cu viepa bie zaw ma hnyi. Khy kya dyi te nama palung chunglie dyivaa aasiy a kya khena te ta niema ta hingpa bie hing a zingna lieta a khepa myi-ing haata a biepuvsa pata nama rue riypatana a cuo.
61001020	Caapathepa lie a awpa profet-biephu hing pakha dyi ta ama khingna haata a siyluo ri khu a aw li pakha nama pachang riypata a cuo.
61001021	Tahematapakieca khaapa profet-biephu hmuota cawsaa khingna taata a vaw vyi, cuorasala Thlaapa Pathe ta a pahrapa tie ta Khazing'a taata bie kha ama ripa tana a cuo.
61002001	Cuorasala hluoning Israel ming hrawlie kha profetpakhipa tie ama za aw; cahaa cata niema hrawlie zaw pacuvtuv pha lipa aw'a yite malie a parapa ruena kha ama chiykhyi aa. Iema a thlatuv yi ama Byipaapa kha hmuo thaw'a yite ama cunglie kha a catlisa pata rana ama patlung sa aa.
61002002	Cata a cuona cang cata cawsaa hluvpuv ta a pyalyipa ama zyazaa kha ziy yite, iema nakaw cata biehmisipa luo ca ripachie pata a cuo aa.
61002003	Karuo aw pata niema kha dungviena bie ta dya aca pata'a yi. Hluoning taata thli ciepa iema duotena ca a lie a riy vyi, ama rana riypa zaw a hmung vyi.
61002004	Khazing ta avuoming a suepa tie kha pahlung li pata hell luo thaw yite biechinapa ning te pahuo sa riypata aa thuvcepa zingna thaabuoliriy ta a hre yi.
61002005	Hluo chuoning chuelyi zaw kha Khazing ta za pahlung ngiethie vyi. Adangna biephyatuv Noah kha a hrangpa pasariy hneta a khuo raalaa pata Khazing a ciyzaa lipa chuelyi kha tiypa-aa a patlung sa.
61002006	Sodom hne Gomorrah khypuv kha myi ta duote te buvcuo ta a pali; Khazing siysaa a ri lipa tie cuota a raaringna riypata a tue.
61002007	Zyazaa pha lipa a pyalyipa aw zya ta khuopuv ta a palung rie a pathyipa Lot kha a khuo.
61002008	Capa cawsaa aa dangpapaa ca iema'a lie kha khy sa te, ning kha hnang ning kha a hmungpa hne a thyipa ama tuepa a pha lipa khata a palung khuopuv ta a pasa sa.
61002009	Abyipa ta Khazing a ciyzaapa kha ruvnaana ama angpa chung taata tuokhaatama i khuo'a yi tapa kha pachang te, cawsaa pha lipa tie kha bierina ning te ta duotena chunglie chi riypa zaw a pachang.
61002010	Cahaapa tie ca a hlyi ta a pyalyipa saapa khingna luo ziy pata Khazing nawhnyina siysaa a ri lipa tie ta ama cuo. Iema ca ama rie pha te ama khing a pasa, rungnaana a hnyipa tie thuo pachi riypa khahmuo ciy vayi.
61002011	Avuoming hing iema laata a lesyi viepa hne a cahra viepa ama cuo raalaa pata Abyipa hmielie ca iema kha thuo pachi pata bie ripa'a vayi.
61002012	Cadyiseca, hingpa cawsaa tie hing ca a khingpa tue cakhaw riypata sapa, patuv pata thie riypata zaa puvpa, ruena a hnyi lipa saruopa hneta a lu yite,
61002013	ama tue suepa duotena a ang nguoluopa tana ama cuo. Iema ca ningchungsaaraa ta ningdang pata duvkhing ta khi-upa kha anuona ta ama ri. Iema ca nangzaa aa chiypa hne dutla lipa cuo yite, niema hne pyi nama tue pakhawna lie zaw amaa nuona chunglie duvkhing ta a khi-u pata ama cuo.
61002014	Nungvaathingsuena tue khingna ming dyi kha padyi yite, ama sue khingna ca die buo vyi. Ama palung a diydyapa tie kha ama dung. Karuo awna pathiypalung ama hnyi. Chiesapa saa zaw tana ama cuo.
61002015	Aa dangpa luo kha thuse yite luo ama pie, hmangpha lipa tuena muo a khingsapa Beor saacapaapa Balaam luopuv kha ama ziy.
61002016	Cuorasala a suena kawlieta chuopa cuote, bie a ri the lipa laata cawsaapa ryi cyi te profet ngaana kha a thlu.
61002017	Hingpa cawsaa tie ca a hnaa a ky tlipa acaa hne thliychie ta a phyalepa myiching haata cuo yite, aa thuvcepa zingna kha chipa pata ama cuo.
61002018	Tahematapakieca iema ca siyluo a hnyi lipa hruotlena bie kha ri yite, suena lie a awpa tie'a taata a vya law thaa baaningpa tie kha saapa suekhingna hneta ama dung.
61002019	Lawna na maca pi'a yi, tapata bie kuo yite, cuorasala iema hrahring kha rana sii ta ama cuo. Tahematapakieca cawsaa hing suokhakha ta a te kieca capa a tetuv sii catana a cuo.
61002020	Tahematapakieca ma Byipaapa hne Khuotuv Zingsuv Khrih pachangna thueta chuelyi pyalyina taata ama law khu taata capa chuelyi pyalyina cata patuv pakhaa te a te pakhaa kie yi ca ama cuona thaapa ca ama cuona hlungpa laa khata a chie vie.
61002021	Adangna luo kha ama pachang khu taata iema'a luo ama pipa nawbie pathepa kha thuse pata hnang luo ama kaapa laa taca za pachang bangby li pata aw yi sala a pha vie aa.
61002022	“Uv ta a paliy kha ning pakhaa te, Va ca pasiy khu taata zaw caakaw luo na aa naw pakhaa,” tapa aa hmuopa phungthluv haa khatana ma cunglie a tlung.
61003001	Duepa zaw, ata i caa hing niema'a luo i vya capepa a yihningnapa caa ta a cuo. Hing i caa suohning chunglie hing a pathepa nama pathiypalung pathu sa riypa khana ica pachang sa pakhaapa yi ta a cuo.
61003002	A pathepa profet tie ta hluoning ta ama za ripa bie hne Abyipa hne Khuotuv ta lucuotuv tie'a taata a ripa nawbie kha namaa thyi pakhaa riypatana a cuo.
61003003	Suokhana ta nama pachang riypa ca, ningchuoningpa thueta ca malie a tue hyalyapa tie kha ama saapa khingna ziy pata tuehyalyana hne a vaw'a yite,
61003004	“I vaw pakhaa'a ne tapa a biekuo ca khaapaliema a aw? Hluoning ma mingchingmingvuo tie ama za thiy taata pathu pata hmangting bangkhuo hing chuelyi sahruo thu ning haa khatana ama aw thluo!” ama ta aa.
61003005	Ahluo ningta Khazing bie ta vuoruo hing za aw te, chuelyi hing tiy chung taata hne tiy ta sapa a cuopa hne,
61003006	capa bie cata chuelyi hing tiy ta pasiypa cuote a ra pakha a pachang li hruo amaa cuo karue.
61003007	Cuorasala capa Khazing bie ngiethie cata ata chuelyi hing myi ta pathe riypata bierina ning hne Khazing siysaa a ri lipa tie parana ning te ta padue cawpa a cuo.
61003008	Cuorasala duepa zaw, hingpa suokha hing ca maw kha ung. Khazing cuota ca ning kha hing kung thawkha haata cuote, kung thawkha hing ning kha haata a cuo.
61003009	Cawsaa chekha ta ama ruepa haata, Abyipa hing a biekuona kawlieta haasaa vyi, cuorasala pakha hmuo ra li pata cawsaa bangkhuo sue a ngiepachiy riypa a khing nakawtana niema'a lie a palung a pasiy pata a cuo.
61003010	Cuorasala Abyipa ning ca a paruvpa haa khatana a vaw aa. Capa thueta ca vuoruo ca ueryi lesapa hneta li'a te, a chunglie hmangting bangkhuo zaw myi ta para pata ama cuo aa. Chuelyi hne a cunglie a awpa hmangting bangkhuo zaw ama vie diy aa.
61003011	Hmangting bangkhuo hing cahaa cata para riypa a cuo nakawta a pathepa hne Khazing ciyzaana hring lie hring riypata tuokhaapa cawsaa ma nama cuo a hu?
61003012	Khazing a vawna'apa ning kha a ngietie li pata huo tie ung. Tahematapakieca vuoruo ca myi ta ruepa cuo'a te a vie aa, a chunglie a awpa hmang zaw kha myi ta a tiy ta palangpa ama cuo aa.
61003013	Cuorasala, a biekuona haata, kiema ca adangna ta a pahruopa vuoruo thaapa hne alyi thaapa khana ma huo.
61003014	Cacuonakawta, duepa zaw, niema ca hingpa hmang nama huo ning hing a cawta hmuo sue phawpa nama cuo li riypa hne ama hne diena nama hmung riypata a zue tie ung.
61003015	Ma Byipaapa palung pasiyna kha khuona haata rue tie ung. Ma duepa Paul ta Khazing ta a pipa singna ta niema'a luo a vya capepa caa lie kha
61003016	capa kaw cana a caa bangkhuo lie a ripa haakhata a ri. Capa chunglie ca pachang a ruvsapa chekha aw te, pachangna a hnyi lipa hne a palung a diydyapa cawsaa zaw taca a hrangpa Caapathepa lie ama tue tawpa haakhata a siyluo kha a palipahnaa ta papya yite iema rana tuv kha ama chiykhyi.
61003017	Cacuonakawta, duepa zaw, a raaringna bie ica changlu pahaayita Khazing siysaa a ri lipa tie ta paana luo acaa chiy li riypa yi hne a bangsa pata nama awnapa kha nama pavie li riypata a raaring tie ung.
61003018	Cahaa cata ma Byipaapa hne khuotuv Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina hne pachangna chunglie kha lethaw tie ung. Rungnaana ca ata hne chuozaa ta ama'a lie aw pari mangsue. Amen.
62001001	Hringna bie hne aa patuv pata hluo ning taata zaa aw ciepa, ma za thyi ciepa, ma ming ta ma za hmung ciepa, ma za mang ciepa hne ma kuv ta ma za hrie ciepa kha niema'a luo maca pathyi sa yi.
62001002	Capa hringna ca paluohuopa a cuo tiyta, hmung pate a kaw kha tehte ma khuo. Kiema'a luo phu pata cuote Paa hneta a awpa capa chuozaa hringna kaw ca niema'a luo maca pathyi sa yi.
62001003	Kiema hne a viesaana hnyi ra naase ungciy tapata ma hmungpa hne pathyipa kha niema'a luo maca pathyi sa yi. Kiema maa viesaanapa hing Paa hne cuose, Saacapaa Zingsuv Khrih hne cuose a viesaa hmisina tana a cuo.
62001004	Maa lawna a ky riypatana hing caa hing niema'a luo ma vya cape pata a cuo.
62001005	Saacapaa'a taata thyi pate niema'a luo ma phupa bie ca, Khazing ca khena cuote ama chunglie ca zingna aw vyi, tapata a cuo.
62001006	Ama hnetana maa viesaa ma ta pata zingna chunglie ma aw thluo kieca a hanghiepa cuo pate biehmisipa lie hring va puv.
62001007	Cuorasala ama ca khena chunglie a aw pahaata khena lie ma aw kieca pakha hne pakha a viesaa'a pate Saacapaa Zingsuv thiyse ta ma suena bangkhuo taata malie a pasiy aa.
62001008	Kiema ta suena hnyi va puv ma ta kieca, kiema hne kiema a dungpa tana ma cuo. Ma chunglie biehmisipa aw vyi.
62001009	Ma suena kha ma phu kieca zangtluo aa tlapa hne a dangpa ama ta ma suena kha malie a ngiethe'a te, a pha lipa bangkhuo taata malie a pathe sa aa.
62001010	Kiema ta sue va puv maa ta kieca, ama kha a hangpa a pacuo sapa cuo pate, a bie ca kiema chunglie aw vyi.
62002001	I saa zaw, hingpa caa niema'a luo i vya capepa hing suena nama tue li na riypatana a cuo. Cuorasala pakhakha ta suena nama tue kieca Paa hmielie malie a rikuotuv, aa dangpa Zingsuv Khrih ma hnyi.
62002002	Ama ca kiema suena cuo dyi ta cuo li pata chuelyi suena bangkhuo cuota suemuo thungna riypata hriykhungrina tana a cuo.
62002003	A nawbie khana ma ziy tapa kieca ama ma pachangnapa kha maa pasie aa.
62002004	“Ama kha i pachang,” a ta raalaa pata a nawbie a ziy lipa ca a hanghiepa ta cuote, cahaapaapa cawsaa chunglie ca biehmisipa aw vyi.
62002005	Cuorasala a bie kha a ziypa ca Khazing duena kha a chunglie ta a bi. Cahaacatana Khazing chunglie ma awpa kha maa pacie aa.
62002006	Khazing chungliena i hring a tapa ca Khrih a hringzya haa khatana a hring aa.
62002007	Duepa zaw, niema'a luo ivya capepa hing nawbie thaapa ta cuo vyi, cuorasala a hruothu taata nama za hnyipa nawbie hlungpa khatana a cuo. Capa nawbie hlungpa ca nama za thyi ciepa khatana a cuo.
62002008	Cadyiseca, ata niema'a luo ivya capepa hingca Khrih'a lie hne niema'a lieta aa hmuopa nawbie thaapa tana a cuo, tahematapakieca zingna ca khung tli te khena hmisipa ca a khe mangtli.
62002009	Cawsaa pakhakha ta khena chungliena i aw a ta pata a uvnu hne sieta zaw kha a hue kalie kie yi ca zingna chungliena a aw kalie.
62002010	A uvnu hne a sieta a duepa ca khena chunglie a awpa cuote, cahaapa cawsaa ca a chunglie luo a pachiyna riypa aw vyi.
62002011	Cuorasala a uvnu kha a huepa pakhakha ca zingna chunglie a awpa cuote, zingna chunglie a cakuo nakawta a cakuo na riypa luo kha pachang vyi, tahematapakieca zingna khata a ming a pacue nakawta a cuo.
62002012	I saata zaw, niema'a luo kha caa ivya cape, tahematapakieca a ming thueta nama suena a ngiethepa nama cuo nakawtana a cuo.
62002013	Paa tie zaw, niema'a luo kha caa ivya cape, tahematapakieca ahungma a hruothu baataata a aw tapa kha niema na a pachang ungciy. Mingnu zaw, niema'a luo kha caa ivya cape, tahematapakieca pha lina kha nama te nakawta a cuo.
62002014	I saanu zaw, niema'a luo kha caa ivya cape, tahematapakieca Paa kha nama pachang nakawta a cuo. Paa tie zaw, niema'a luo kha caa ivya cape, tahematapakieca a hruothu taata zaa awpa kha ahungma tapa nama pachang. Mingnu zaw, niema'a luo kha caa ivya cape, tahematapakieca niema ca nama cahra, Khazing bie ca niema'a lie aw te, pha lina kha nama te.
62002015	Chuelyi hne a chunglie a awpa hmang kha tlechuo kha ung. Cahaapa chuelyi a tlechuopa tie chunglie ca Paa duena aw vyi.
62002016	Chuelyi lie a awpa saapa khingna, ming ta hmungkhingna, hnyirungna lie hruotlena tapa zaw bangkhuo hing chuelyi taata a vawpa selaw ta cuo yite Paa taata a vawpa cuo vayi.
62002017	Chuelyi hne chuelyi ta a khingpa zaw bangkhuo ca chuole lawmaw yite, cuorasala Khazing khingna a tuepa tie ca chuozaa ta ama hring.
62002018	I saanu zaw, cuo chuonapa ning ca ata ning tana a cuo! Khrih a dutuv ca a vaw nguoluo tli tapata nama thyi pahaata, Khrih a dutuv a hluvsa ca ata hing amaa vaw nguoluo tli. Cacuonakawta cuo chuonapa ca ata hing tana a cuo tapa kha ma pachang.
62002019	Iema ca kiema'a taata ama pya tli, cuorasala kiema cawsaa ta za cuo vayi; kiema cawsaa ta za cuo yi sala ca, kiema hne hingta ama aw thluo aa. Cuorasala kiema'a taata ama pyapa hingta pakha hmuota kiema cawsaa cuo vayi tapa kha a paluo sa.
62002020	Cuorasala niema ca A pathepapaa ta sathu pathuvpa ta cuo ung cate nama bangkhuo ta pachangna nama hnyi.
62002021	Niema'a luo caa ivya capepa hing biehmisipa nama pachang li nakaw cuo li pata nama pachang nakawta hanghiena ca biehmisipa taata cuo buo vyi tapa kha nama pachangna riypatana a cuo.
62002022	Ahungma a hanghiepa cata a cuo? Zingsuv ca Khrih ta cuo vyi a tatuv cata cuo vama? Paa hne Saacapaa a thawpa ca Khrih a dutuv tana a cuo.
62002023	Saacapaa a thawpa ca Paa zaw kha thaw te, Saacapaa a cuhluopa ta Paa zaw kha a cuhluo.
62002024	A hruothu baataata nama za thyipa kha nama chunglie pa-aw sa mya ung. A hruothu baataata nama za thyipa kha nama chunglie a aw kieca, niema zaw Saacapaa hne Paa chunglie nama aw aa.
62002025	Ama hingna Khrih ama hrahring ta bie malie a kuopa chuozaa hringna cata a cuo.
62002026	Niema dung caa nangpa tie kawlieta hingpa caa hing niema'a luo ivya cape.
62002027	Ama'a taata nama hmungpa thlaapa kha niema'a lie a aw nakawta ahungtahmuo pacuv a hu va ungciy. Cuorasala ama thlaapa ta hmangting kaw kha aca pacuv pahaayita hne capa aca pacuvpa yi ca hanghiena cuo li pata a hmisipa a cuo pahaata, aca pacuv pahaa yi cata ama chunglie aw tie ung.
62002028	I saata zaw, ama chunglie aw tie ung. Cakiedyina ama a vaw thueta anguona hnyi'a pate a hmiekunglie nangzaana hnyi li pata ma aw aa.
62002029	Khrih ca a dang tapa kha nama pachang kieca, adangna a tuepa bangkhuo ca Khazing'a taata a puvpa tana ama cuo tapa kha nama pachangpasie aa.
62003001	Khazing ta khatluv tama malie a due tapa hing pacuo tie ung. Khazing saata tapata kupa ma cuo; ma cuo hmisi saw. Chuelyi ta kiema malie a pachang li pahing Khazing kha a pachang li nakawtana a cuo.
62003002	Duepa zaw, ata hing kiema ca Khazing saata ta ma cuo ung; Hmie luo khaama ma lu aa tapa ca pachang valie puv. Ma pachangpa ca: Khrih aa luo thueta, kiema ca ama kha lu'a pate a cuona dadang haakhata ma hmung aa.
62003003	Ama'a lieta capa anguopuona a hnyipa bangkhuo ca Khrih a pathepa haakhata iema hne iema kha amaa pathe sa ra.
62003004	Suena a tuepa bangkhuo ca Khazing phungbie a parapa tana ama cuo; suena ca Khazing phungbie parana khatana a cuo.
62003005	Khrih ca cawsaa suena pathe sa riypatana a vaw tapa kha pachang ung cate, ama'a lieca suena aw vyi tapa kha nama pachang.
62003006	Khrih chunglie a awpa ahungtahmuo suena tue va tli yi; suena a tuepazuepa ahunghmuota Khrih kha a hmungpa hne a pachangpa aw vayi.
62003007	I saata zaw, ahunghmuo a padung sa kha ung. Khrih ca aa dangpa a cuopa haakhata aa dangpa hmang a tuepa bangkhuo ca aa dangpa ama cuo.
62003008	Suena a tuepa bangkhuo ca Setaa saata ta ama cuo; tahematapakieca Setaa ca a hruothu baataata suena a tuepa tana a cuo. Khazing Saacapaa aa luona ca Setaa rehriena para riypatana a cuo.
62003009	Khazing'a taata a puvpa ca suena kha tue vayi, tahematapakieca Khazing saciy kha ama chunglie aw te, sue khu vayi, tahematapakieca Khazing'a taata a puvpa ama cuo nakawtana a cuo.
62003010	Khazing saata a cuopa hne Setaa saata a cuopa ca cahaa cata a hnang yite; hmangphapa a tue lipa bangkhuo ca Khazing'a taata cuo vayi, a uvnu a due lipa zaw cuo ra vayi.
62003011	A hruothu taata nama za thyipa bie ca: pakha hne pakha a due ungla tapata a cuo.
62003012	Setaa'a taata a vawpa Kain, a nuta a thiepa haata ma cuo riypata cuo vyi. Khaapanakawma a nuta ca a thie? Tahematapakieca a hmang tuepa kha a dang li pata a nuta hmang tuepa kha a dang nakawta a cuo.
62003013	Uvnu hne sieta zaw chuelyi ta aca hue tiy yi ta nama kharue haa kha se.
62003014	Tahematapakieca pakha hne pakha maa due nakawta thiyna taata hringna luo ma caluo tli tapa kha ma pachang ung.
62003015	A uvnu hne a sieta a huepa bangkhuo ca lie a nawpa tana ama cuo, lie a nawpa ca chuozaa hringna hnyi vayi tapa kha nama pachang.
62003016	Abyipa ta kiema cuota a hringna a pi nakawta duena tapa kha ma pachang. Kiema zaw pakha hne pakha cuota ma hringna maa pi riypatana a cuo.
62003017	Pakhakha ca hnyirungsa te a uvnu a cuo li kie a sieta zaw ama siy a pasasa pakha a hmung thluo pata aa bya khing li kie yi ca Khazing duena ca a chunglie tuokhaatama a aw the aa?
62003018	I saata zaw, ryi hne kaa dyi ta cuo li pata biehmisipa hne tuena ta a due'a ungpuv.
62003019	Cahaa cata kiema ca biehmisipa taata ma cuopa kha pachang'a pate, ma pathiypalung ta sue malie a phaw kyry ta kiema ca biehmisipa taata ma cuopa kha a pachang'a pate ama hmielie ma hnaa a nguo aa.
62003020	Tahematapakieca Khazing ca ma pathiypalung laata lesyi vie te hmangting bangkhuo kha a pachang.
62003021	I duepa zaw, ma pathiypalung na sue malie a phaw va tapa kieca; Khazing hmielie riephana ma hnyi.
62003022	Tahematapakieca a nawbie kha ziy pate ama palung ma patluo nakawta ma hiepa bangkhuo kha ma hmung.
62003023	Abyipa nawbie ca, ama bie malie a pipa haata, a Saacapaa Zingsuv Khrih kha zang pata pakha hne pakha a due riypa khatana a cuo.
62003024	A nawbie a ziypa bangkhuo ca ama chunglie aw yite ama zaw iema chunglie a aw. Canakaw cata kiema chunglie ama a awpa kha malie a pipa a Thlaapa thueta ma pachang.
62004001	Duepa zaw, Thlaapa bangkhuo kha zang kha ung; cuorasala Khazing'a taata a vawpa thlaapa a cuo ma cuo vama tapa kha dyapasya tie ung; tahematapakieca profetpakhipa a hluvpuv kha hing chuelyi luo hing amaa ngie mangtli.
62004002	Hinghaahingta Khazing Thlaapa kha nama pachang aa: Zingsuv Khrih ca saapa cuona tana a vaw a tapa thlaapa bangkhuo ca Khazing'a taata a vawpa thlaapa cuote,
62004003	cahaa cata a ta lipa thlaapa bangkhuo ca Khazing'a taata a vawpa thlaapa cuo vyi. Khrih a dupa thlaapa tana ama cuo. Capa thlaapa ca a vaw nguoluo tli tapa kha thyi tli ung cate, ata hing hing chuelyi lie a aw tli.
62004004	I saata zaw, niema ca Khazing'a taata cuo ung cate iema kha nama te mangtli; tahematapakieca niema chunglie a awpa ca chuelyi lie a awpa laata a le vie.
62004005	Iema ca chuelyi taata ama cuo; cacuonakawta ama ripa ca chuelyi bie ta cuote, chuelyi ta iema bie kha amaa ngie.
62004006	Kiema ca Khazing'a taatana ma cuo. Khazing a pachangpa bangkhuo ta ma bie kha a ngie yite, Khazing'a taata a cuo lipa bangkhuo ca ma bie kha a ngie vayi. Capa taacata a hmisipa thlaapa hne a pakhipa thlaapa kha ma pachang.
62004007	Duepa zaw, pakha hne pakha a due ungsiy, tahematapakieca Khazing ca duena tana a cuo; duena a hnyipa bangkhuo ca Khazing'a taata cuo yite Khazing kha ama pachang.
62004008	Duena a hnyi lipa ca Khazing kha pachang vyi, tahematapakieca Khazing ca duena tana a cuo.
62004009	Saacapaa thueta ma hring thena riypata Khazing ca a Saacapaa pakha dyipa kha chuelyi luo a za pathlie; cahaa cata Khazing duena ca kiema'a luo kha a zaa phu.
62004010	Hingpa hing na duena ta a cuo: duena ma tapa ca kiema ta Khazing ma duepa kha cuo li pata, ama ta kiema kha malie due te ma sue hriykhung a rina cuota a Saacapaa a za pathliepa hingta a cuo.
62004011	Duepa zaw, Khazing ta kiema hing malie a duetuv hringhruo nakawta, kiema zaw pakha hne pakha maa due riypatana a cuo.
62004012	Ahungtahmuo Khazing kha hmung buo vyi; pakha hne pakha maa due kieca Khazing kha kiema chunglie aw te, a duena kha kiema chunglie aa ky.
62004013	Khazing ta a Thlaapa kha malie a pi nakawta, kiema ca ama chunglie aw pate ama zaw kiema chunglie a awpa kha ma pachang.
62004014	Paa ta a Saacapaa kha chuelyi Khuotuv ta a za pathliepa kha hmung pate tehte ma khuo.
62004015	Zingsuv ca Khazing Saacapaa tana a cuo a tapa tie chunglie Khazing aw te, iema zaw Khazing chunglie ama aw.
62004016	Cacuonakawta Khazing ta kiema'a lie a hnyipa duena kha pachang pate ma zang. Khazing ca duena tana a cuo, duena chunglie a awpa ca Khazing chunglie a awpa cuo yite, Khazing zaw iema chunglie a aw.
62004017	Hing chuelyi lie hing Khrih haata ma hring nakawta bierinapa ning thueta ma rie a phana riypata duena ca kiema chunglie hinghaahingta a tling.
62004018	Duena chunglie ca ciyna aw vyi, cuorasala a tlingpa duena ta ca ciyna kha a papya diy. Tahematapakieca ciyna ca duotena hneta aa patuv nakawta, ciyna a hnyipa taca a tlingpa duena luo kha chiy khu vyi.
62004019	Khazing ta kiema kha malie a due taa nakawta kiema zaw ta ma due.
62004020	Khazing na i due a ta raalaa pata a uvnu hne a sieta kha a huepa ca a hangpa tana a cuo; ming ta hmungpa a uvnu hne a sieta hmuo a due li kieca ming ta hmung lipa Khazing ca due khu the'a vyi.
62004021	Ama'a taata ma hmungpa nawbie ca hingpa hing tana a cuo: Khazing a duepa taca a uvnu hne a sieta zaw kha a due ra'a yi.
62005001	Zingsuv ca Khrih ta a cuo tapa a zangpa bangkhuo ca Khazing saata ta cuo yite, nungpaa a duepa bangkhuo ta saata kha ama due ra.
62005002	Khazing saata zaw ma duepa yi maa pachangna ca Khazing kha due pate a nawbie ma ziypa hingta a cuo.
62005003	Khazing na ma due ma tapa ca a nawbie ma ziypa hingta a cuo. Cakhutaa a nawbie ziypa ca ma cuota hmangriypa cuo vyi.
62005004	Tahematapakieca Khazing'a taata a puvpa bangkhuo taca chuelyi kha ama te.
62005005	Ahungma chuelyi hing a te? Zingsuv ca Khazing Saacapaa tana a cuo tapata a zangpa na a te cuo vama?
62005006	Tiy hne thiy ta a vawpa ca Zingsuv Khrih tana a cuo, tiy hne dyi ta cuo li pata tiy hne thiy hneta a cuo. Thlaapa ca tehtekhuotuv ta cuote, biehmisipa Thlaapa zaw ta a cuo.
62005007	Tehtekhuotuv suothung ama aw:
62005008	Thlaapa hne tiy hne thiy ta cuo yite aa lu pata tehte ama khuo.
62005009	Kiema ta cawsaa tehtekhuona kha ma cuhluo kieca Khazing tehtekhuona ca capa laa cata a le vie, tahematapakieca Khazing ta a Saacapaa kaw tehte a khuopa tana a cuo.
62005010	Khazing Saacapaa a zangpa tie ta ama palung chunglie tehte khuo riypa ama hnyi. Khazing a zang lipa ca Khazing ta a Saacapaa kawlie tehte a khuopa kha a zang li nakawta Khazing kha a hangpa ta a tue.
62005011	Capa tehtekhuona ca: Khazing ta chuozaa hringna malie pi te, capa hringna ca a Saacapaa chunglie a awpa ta a cuo.
62005012	Saacapaa a hnyipa ca hringna kha a hnyi. Khazing Saacapaa a hnyi lipa ca hringna kha hnyi vyi.
62005013	Khazing Saacapaa ming a zangpa tie ta chuozaa hringna nama hnyipa kha namaa pachangna riypata hingpa caa hing niema'a luo i vya cape.
62005014	Ama khingna hne aa ziy pata maa hie kieca ama ta malie a thyi tapata ama chunglie riephana ma hnyi.
62005015	Cakhutaata khaapa maa hie zaw malie a thyi tapa kha ma pachang kieca ama'a taata maa hiepa bangkhuo kha ma hmung tli tapata ma pachang.
62005016	Na uvnu a cuo li kie na sieta ta thiyna a phakhyi lipa suena a tuepa kha na hmung kieca Khazing'a luo kha thlaa chuopa la thiyna a phakhyipa suena a tue lipa cahaapa cawsaa ca Khazing ta hringna a pi aa. Thiyna a phakhyipa suena a aw; capa kawlie cata thlaa nama chuo aa i tapata cuo vyi.
62005017	Hmang tuesuepa bangkhuo hing suena ta a cuo, cuorasala thiyna a phakhyi lipa suena a aw.
62005018	Khazing'a taata a puvpa ca suena tuepazue vyi tapa kha ma pachang. Khazing saacapaa ta ama kha a daakhuo nakawta a pha lipapaa ta taw khu vyi.
62005019	Khazing saata ma cuopa hne chuelyi hing a pha lipapaa cahrana rawlie a awpa kha ma pachang.
62005020	Cakhutaata Khazing Saacapaa kha a vaw te a hmisipa ama ma pachang na riypa hne a hmisipa a Saacapaa Zingsuv Khrih chunglie ma awpa kha ma pachang na riypata nangvuona malie a pipa kha ma pachang. Ama ca a hmisipa Khazing hne chuozaa hringna ta a cuo.
62005021	I saata zaw, kuvtuezuv kha cahriy tie ung.
63001001	Khrihsaa uvthyi ta, Biehmisipa chunglie ta i duepa, a tlawpa nungcuo hne a saata zaw kha caa ica paphya yi. Kama dyi ta ica duepa yi cuo li pata biehmisipa a pachangpa bangkhuo ta aca due yi,
63001002	tahematapakieca ma chunglie a awpa hne chuozaa ta a aw riypa biehmisipa nakawta a cuo.
63001003	Paa Khazing hne Paa Khazing Saacapaa Zingsuv Khrih' a taata vihnyina, nangduena hne diena ca biehmisipa hne duena chunglie kiema'a lie aw mangsue.
63001004	Paa ta malie a changpa haata na saata zaw chekha na biehmisipa lie a hring yi tapa i hmung tiyta i palung a tluo hringhruo.
63001005	Cacuonakawta duepa nung, pakha hne pakha a due ungsiy tapata paa ica kie. Hinghing nawbie thaapa i vya cape pata cuo vyi, a hruothu taata ma za hnyipa khatana a cuo.
63001006	Duena ma tapa ca a nawbie ziy pata hringpa hingna a cuo. Capa a nawbie ca nama ziy aa tapata a hluo baataata nama za thyipa khatana a cuo.
63001007	Zingsuv ca thiysaa tana a vaw tapa a paw lipa dungvietuv hluvpuv kha chuelyi luo ama vya pya tli. Cahaapaapa cawsaa bangkhuo ca dungvietuv hne Khrih a dutuv tana ama cuo.
63001008	Ma hrie hnuochuopa kha namaa sung li riypa hne nama lawmuo kha a tlingsa pata nama hmung riypata a raaring pata aw tie ung.
63001009	Khrih pacuvna chunglie aw li pata a hlyi ta kuorakuo hliy te a hringpa ca Khazing kha hnyi vyi. Pacuvna chunglie a awpa bangkhuo ca Paa hne Saacapaa kha a hnyi.
63001010	Capa pacuvna a cyi li pata niema'a luo a vawpa ahunghmuo ing chung luo pangie kha ung; bie zaw a chang kha ung.
63001011	Tahematapakieca iema kha bie a changpa ca hmangpha lipa ama tuepa lie khana namaa hraw ra tanata a cuo.
63001012	Niema'a luo cape riypa a hluvpuv i hnyi raalaa pata caahnaa hne caatiy ca hmuo'a va ang. Maa lawna aa kyna riypata niema'a luo a vaw'a ang te hmie a hmung pata bie maa rue'a ung tapata i hnabie a syi.
63001013	A tlawpa na nutanung a saata zaw ta bie acaa chang yi.
64001001	Khrihsaa Uvthyi kama ta bie-hmisipa lieta i duepa Gaius'a luo caa ica paphya.
64001002	I duepa, thlaapa luota hnaatluo pata na aw pahaata hmangting bangkhuo hing na cuota aa rawsa pata aw sala, na hnaa a tluo riypata thlaa ica chuopa.
64001003	Viesaa chekha vya chiy yite biehmisipa lie zangtluo naa tlana zya hne biehmisipa lie na hringna zya kha tehte ama khuo tiyta i palung a tluo hringhruo.
64001004	I saata zaw na biehmisipa lie a hring yi tapa i thyipa laa hingta i palung naa patluo viepa aw vyi.
64001005	I duepa, caa pachang buo lipa ama cuo zaw ta, viesaa cuota a cuo zaw, na hriepa bangkhuo lie zangtluo a tlasa pata na hrie.
64001006	Na duena kaw kha khrihsaabuv lie tehte ama khuo. Khazing hne aa tlapa palungphya hnyi pata ama si khu riypa kha a bya tie yi.
64001007	Tahematapakieca zanglituv tie'a taata abyana khaahmuo la li pata Khrih cuota khy a tlawpa ta ama cuo.
64001008	Cacuonakawta biehmisipa lie rehriehnetuv ma cuo riypata cahaapa cawsaa zaw kha maa bya riypa yita a cuo.
64001009	Khrihsaabuv'a luo kha caa pachangta i cape; cuorasala ama hne ama kha pakhana lie a chi khingpa Diotrefes ta kiema ri kha a ngie khing vyi.
64001010	Cacuonakawta i vaw kieca a cuo li pata kiema kaw a ripa bangkhuo kha i phu diy aa. Cadyi cata a palung tling li pata uvnu zaw kha ing a patlung sa khing li pata ing a patlung sa khingpa tie zaw kha thlu yite khrihsaabuv taata a papya yi.
64001011	I duepa zaw, a pha lipa kha a mangpuo kha ung, a phapa tuv kha a mangpuo tie ung. Hmangpha a tuepa ca Khazing'a taata cuote, hmangpha lipa a tuepa ca Khazing kha hmung vyi.
64001012	Cawsaa bangkhuo ta Demetrias ca pathuo sa yite biehmisipa zaw ta a pathuo sa. Kiema zaw ta a cuo ta tehtekhuo pate ma tehtekhuona aa hmuo pakha nama pachang.
64001013	Niema'a luo caa a hluvsa i vya cape khing, cuorasala caasung hne caatiy hmuo pata cape hriy li pata;
64001014	niema hne a ru hluo ta hmie a hmung pata bie maa rue aa tapata i nguopuo.
64001015	Na cunglie diena aw se. Viesaa zaw ta bie a caa chang yi. Ma viesaa zaw pakha cyicuo kha bie malie a changpa mya yi.
65001001	Zingsuv Khrih changtaapa hne Jeim nuta ta a cuopa Judas ta, Khazing kupa, Paa Khazing ta a duepa hne Zingsuv Khrih mangsangna chunglie a awpa tie kha caa ica paphya yi.
65001002	Nangduena diena hne duena ca niema'a lie a kysa pata aw mangsue.
65001003	Duepa zaw, ma bangkhuo ta maa hrawpa khuona kaw hing niema'a luo cape riypata palung thusa pata i ting nguoluo ningta cawsaa pathepa tie'a luo yikha ta a tling pata a pipa yi zangna hing namaa daakhyi riypata paakie namaa hu hrahring tapata i hmung.
65001004	Tahematapakieca ma Khazing vihnyina kha a palipahnaa ta tue yite siyhrawna ta a hmuopa tie, pakha dyipa ma Ziypaapa hne Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih a thawpa tie ca niema hraw luo kha a paruvta tah amaa ngie tli. Iema ca Khazing a zang lipa ama cuona haata duotena ang riypata hluo ning taata thli paciepa tie tana ama cuo.
65001005	Abyipa ca Israel ming kha Izipt ruo chung taata khuo yite cakhutaata a zang lipa tie a parapa yi kha ica chang diy tli raalaa pa yi ta ica pachang sa pakhaa khing yi.
65001006	Ama nawhnyi khuna te chunglie aw li pata aa rawpusapa amaa daahmang a thusepa avuoming kha bierina Ning rungnaapa cuo thue huopa ta aa thuvcepa zingna chunglie kha chuozaa thaabuoliriy ta a hre yi.
65001007	Cahaa cata, Sodom hne Gomorrah hne a kiecahriy khypuv zaw kha iema palungphya ca hnyi yite, aparuvsuena tue yite a phung lipa saapa khingna ama hnyi nakawta chuozaa myi chunglie duotena ama angpa ca cawsaa bangkhuo a cadangna riypatana a cuo.
65001008	Cahaa cata, hingpa muo a sa thepa tie zaw hingta ama pangpasaa kha papyapalyi yite, nawhnyina kha ama i khu taata a rungnaapa tie thuo kha ama pachi.
65001009	Cuorasala avuoming byi Mikhael ca Moses riy kawlie setaa hne bie amaa i ning kha chiesana biechiepa risue nguo li pata, “Abyipa na caa chuo aa!” a ta.
65001010	Cuorasala hingpa cawsaa zaw hingta ca ama pachang lipa bangkhuo kha ripachie yite capa amaa puvkhyipa pachangna cata iema kha ruena a hnyi lipa saruopa haata a para yi.
65001011	Iema ca thluechiylipa tana ama cuo. Tahematapakieca iema ca Kain luopuv kha ziy yite, tuokaa vuota Balaam a sichiena luo kha ama si ra. Korah aduna luo lie kha ama ra.
65001012	Iema ca niema hneta pyi luo ama chiy ning kha kuochi li pata a nuo yite ama ningdang nakawta nama duena pyi zaw a papyapalyipa tana ama cuo. Iema ca thliy ta a phyalepa khytiy a vyi lipa amyi, a thariy te ama phiepuo nakawta yihning a thiypa a thyi a pathyi lipa thlasiypaa thingkung haatana ama cuo.
65001013	A nangzaanapa buv a papyapa riyliy tiylaw, hne a zulepa aasiy haata cuo yite, aa thuvcepa zingna kha iema cuota chuozaa ta chipa patana ama cuo.
65001014	Adam taata chuosariynapa Enok ta hingpa kaw hing a za rilupa ca, “Mang tie ung, Abyipa ca a mingpathepa thawhraa hneta a vaw te,
65001015	cawsaa bangkhuo kha bie a ripa'a yi. Khazing ciyzaa li pata cawsaa ta ama tuepa hmang bangkhuo cuo hne Khazing a ciyzaa lipa a suepa tie ta ama a du pata ama ripa bie bangkhuo cuota bie a chipa'a yi.
65001016	Iema ca a cie thepa tie hne malie suena a huv thepa tie, iema saapa khingna a ziypa tie; a bietung lepa tie, iema phana cuota malie a patapa tie tana ama cuo.
65001017	Cuorasala, i duepa zaw, ma Byi-paapa Zingsuv Khrih a ziytuv tie ta ama za rilupa kha maw lie ungciy;
65001018	Iema ta, “Ning chuonapa cuo thue ca malie a ese hyalyapa tie hne Khazing ciyzaa li pata iema saapa khingna a ziypa tie amaa vya luo aa.
65001019	Thlaapa a hnyi lipa capa chuelyi cawsaa zaw cata a chena ama chiykhyi aa.
65001020	Cuorasala i duepa niema zaw taca a pathecepa nama zangna lie kha a sathaw ungla, Thlaapa Pathe'a lie kha thlaa chuo tie ung.
65001021	Khazing duena chunglie kha aw ungla, chuozaa hringna luo malie a chiypa ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih nangduena kha a mangkhuo tie ung.
65001022	Asawdung-avadung ta a awpa tie cunglie kha nangduena hnyi ungla,
65001023	iema kha myi chung taata thue ungla khuo tie ung. Ciyzaana cangta malie kha nangdue ungla, cadyiseca ama saapa khingna ta aa hlawpa ama cawsie khaca hue tie ung.
65001024	A lie li pata caa pa-aw sa khutuv hne a hmiekunglie caw-yi riy khaa-hmuo aw li pata palung tluosa pata caa padaa sa khutuv yi,
65001025	maa khuotuv Khazing pakha dyipa cunglie, rungnaana, lesyina, cahrana, hne nawhnyina ca ma Byipaapa Zingsuv Khrih thueta, a chuo ciepa cuo hne ata hing hne hmie luo chuozaa ta aw mangsue. Amen.
66001001	“Hingpa hing Zingsuv Khrih biephu tana a cuo. A ru hluo ta a vya cuo riypa biephu kha a changtaapa tie'a luo pahmung sa riypata Khazing ta a pipa tana a cuo. A changtaapa Johan'a luo kha aa vuoming pathlie yite a pachang sapa yi ta a cuo.
66001002	Johan ca Khazing bie hne Zingsuv Khrih kaw a hmungpa bangkhuo kha a chang yi.
66001003	Hingpa profet-biephu hing aa thyisa pata a ripa hne ama ripa kha thyi te a chunglie aa capepa haata a ziypa ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo; tahematapakieca cuo na a ngie tli.
66001004	Asia ruo chunglie a awpa Khrihsaabuv suosariy tie'a luo kha kama Johan ta caa ica paphya yi: A aw nguoluopa, zaa aw tlipa hne a vya aw riypa Khazing'a taata cuose, byithude hmielie a awpa thlaapa suosariy'a taata cuose,
66001005	zangtluo aa tlapa pachaangkhyituv, thiyna taata a thupa tie hrawlie saacapaa taapa, hne chuelyi siepahruo tie siepahruo ta a cuopa Zingsuv Khrih'a taata vihnyina hne diena ca nama cunglie aw mangsue. Malie due te a thiyse ta ma suena chung taata malie a khuopa,
66001006	kiema kha pena ruo suokha cuo riypata malie tue te tluobyi ta malie a tuetuv Paa Khazing cunglie ca rungnaana hne nawhnyina chuozaa ta aw mangsue. Amen.
66001007	Mang tie ung! Ama ca amyi hne khiy ta a zuv'a te; cawsaa bangkhuo ta ama hmung aa, asyi ta a dawpa tie zaw khata hmung'a yite; chuelyi mingphang zaw bangkhuo ca ama kawlieta ama caa aa. Cahaa cata a cuo hrahring aa. Amen.
66001008	A aw nguoluopa, zaa aw tlipa hne a vya aw riypa A Lesyicepa Abyipa Khazing ta, “Kama ca Alfa hne Omega tana i cuo,” a ta.
66001009	Hrisaathieruena hne a pena hne palung pasiysa pata nama anglawna lie zaw Zingsuv ziytuv cuona taata a hraw rapa nama uvnupa kama Johan ca Khazing bie hne Zingsuv kaw tehte i khuona kawlieta Patmos parala lie ina chi yi.
66001010	Abyipa Ning ningtakha thlaapa ta bi ang te, i hnangkaa taata hmyakaa haata ueryi a paringsapa thyi ang te,
66001011	“Na hmungpa kha caa-uv chunglie cape la Efesa, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thiatira, Sardis, Filadelfia hne Laodisia khy lie a awpa khrihsaabuv suosariy luo kha paphya tie,” ina ta.
66001012	Cakhutaacata a ueryi ta bie naa changpa kha hmung riypata i pali tiyta siyymyivuonatung suosariy kha i hmung.
66001013	Capa siyymyivuonatung tie aa lala lieca a cacunghnaa lie siyy tesaw a saw te buohryipasiypa a hryipa Cawsaa Saacapaa hne aa lupa pakha kha i hmung.
66001014	A luv hne a suo ca tuvhming haata ruo te cahue haata a ngu; a ming ca myihlaa hneta amaa lu.
66001015	A phyi ca sumyi chunglie ama rue khu taata aa li dyi aa li nate ta ama hnapa thiyhring hneta aa lu. A ueryi ca tiysue lesapa pu hneta aa lu.
66001016	A cacuo luo kuv lie aasiy suosariy a cyi te, a pakaa taata kuo hning ta a cahrepa zueziy a kya pya. A hmie ca ningchungkhingkhuo ningkhepa haata a khe.
66001017	Ama i hmung pahne ta kama ca a thiypa haata a phyi thabaw lie i liepatyi. Cuorasala a cacuo luo kuv kha i cunglie chi te, “Ciy kha; kama ca a hmietaace hne a hnangcawce tana i cuo.
66001018	A hringpa zaw ta i cuo. I za thiy, cuorasala mang tie, chuozaa ta i hring tli. Cakhutaa Thiyna hne Athiykhy tawh zaw kha i hnyi.
66001019	Na hmungpa hmang, a cuo nguoluopa hne a vya cuo riypa hmang kaw zaw kha cape tie.
66001020	I cacuo luo kuv lie na hmungpa aasiy suosariy hne siyymyivuonatung suosariy tie ta ama ri khingpa bieparuv ca hinghaahingtana a cuo: aasiy suosariy ca khrihsaabuv suosariy tie avuoming cuo yite, siyymyivuonatung suosariy ca khrihsaabuv suosariy ta ama cuo.
66002001	Efesa khy lie a awpa khrihsaa-buv avuoming'a luo kha hinghaahingta cape tie: A cacuo luo kuv lie aasiy suosariy a cyi te siyymyivuonatung suosariy a lala lie a cakuolepa bie ca hinghaahingtana a cuo:
66002002	Na hriepa re, te namaa nguoluopa hne palung pasiysa pata na ang law napa kha i pachang. Hmangpha lipa a tuepa tie na chaw the lipa hne lucuotuv na i cuo amaa ta raalaa pata a cuo lipa tie na dyapasyanapa yi hne a hangpa ama cuopa na hmung khuna kha i pachang.
66002003	Na palung pasiysa pata ang cate i ming kawlie na te-angna hne riethyi ang cate na palung a chuo lipa zaw kha i pachang.
66002004	Cuorasala ica pasuenapa suokha ca a hruothu ta na za hnyipa duena kha hnyi va tli ciy.
66002005	Khaapa a daahmang taakhatama naa lie tapa kha a thyi la, a ngiepachiy la a hruothu ta na za tuepa hmang kha tue pakhaa tie. Cata cuo li pata na suenapa kha naa ngiepachiy li kieca namaa'a luo kha a vaw'a ang te na siyymyivuonatung kha a awna taata i palaw aa.
66002006	Cadyiseca ica rithuophaa khingpa suokha ca kama ta i huepa Nikolas ziytuv tie ama tuepa kha na hue rapa hingta a cuo.
66002007	Thlaapa ta khrihsaabuv tie'a luo a ripa hing thyina naa a hnyipa bangkhuo ta thyi mangyisue. Tena a hmungpa bangkhuo ca Khazing paradais lie a awpa hringna thingthyi khana ningna naw i pi'a yi.
66002008	Smyrna khy lie a awpa Khrihsaabuv avuoming'a luo kha hinghaahingta cape tie: A hmietaace hne a hnangcawce ta a cuopa, thiy te a hring pakhaapa bie ca hinghaahingtana a cuo:
66002009	Ruvnaana na angpa hne siypasana na angpa kha i pachang, cuorasala a hnyirung patana na cuo. Judah ming tana ma cuo ta raalaa yite a cuo lipa tie ta na thuo aca pachipa yi kha i pachang. Iema ca Setaa apungna-ing tana ama cuo.
66002010	Na te-ang riypa kha ciy khah. Naathlie tie, dyapasya riypata Setaa ta niema chung taa chekha kha thaw aca pathla'a yi. Ning hraa chung riethyina nama ang aa. Thiyna te ta zangtluo aa tla pata aw la hringna byilakhuv kha ica pi aa.
66002011	Thlaapa ta khrihsaabuv tie'a luo a ripa hing thyina naa a hnyipa bangkhuo ta thyi mangyisue. Tena a hmungpa ca yihning thiyna ta para khu'a va tli.
66002012	Pergamum khy lie a awpa khrihsaabuv avuoming'a luo kha hinghaahingta cape tie: Kuo hning ta a cahrepa zueziy a hnyituv bie ca hinghaahingtana a cuo.
66002013	“Na awna hmang kha ica pachang, capa hmang ca Setaa byithude awna hmang ta a cuo. Niema zaw hrawlie ama thiepa, zangtluo aa tlapa naa pachangkhyituv Antipas kha Setaa awna hmang lie ama thie ning tahmuo na zangna kha thaw lipa cata i ming kha a cusa pata naa patuv.
66002014	Cuorasala ica pasuenapa a cawta a aw: niema'a lieta Balaam pacuvnapa a ziypa cawsaa chekha ama aw. Balaam ta Balak kha Israel ming hmielie a pachiyna a cuo riypata kuvtuezuv amaa bienapa sa ning riypa hne aparuvsuena tue riypata a pacuv.
66002015	Cahaa cata Nikolas ziytuv tie pacuvnapa a ziypa zaw nama aw ngiethie.
66002016	A ngiepachiy tie ung, namaa ngiepachiy li kieca niema'a luo kha a vaw patang'a ang te i pakaa taata a pyapa zueziy ta iema kha i du'a yi.
66002017	Thlaapa ta khrihsaabuv avuoming'a luo a ripa bie kha naa a hnyipa bangkhuo ta naathlie mangyisue. Tena a hmungpa bangkhuo ca nupa mannaa chebuo kha i pi'a yi. Alung ruopa zaw kha pi'a yi ang te, capa alung ruopa cunglie ca a cutuv ri li pata ahungtahmuo ama pachang lipa ming thaapa kha aa cape.
66002018	Thiatira khy lie a awpa khrihsaa-buv avuoming'a luo kha hinghaahingta cape tie: Hingpa bie hing myihlaa haapa ming hnyi te sumyi chunglie ama rue khu taata aa li dyi aa li nate ta ama hnapa thiyhring haapa phyi a hnyipa Khazing Saacapaa bie tana a cuo.
66002019	Na rehriepa i pachang. Duena na hnyipa, zangna, na rehriepa hne palung pasiysa pata na ang lawpa zaw i pachang. Na za hrie taapa laata a hnang ta na hriepa hing a le vie tapa zaw i pachang. Cuorasala ica pasuenapa a cawta a aw:
66002020	Profet tana i cuo a ta te i changtaapa tie kha aparuvsuena tue riypa hne kuvtuezuv amaa bienapa sa ning riypata pacuv te a dungpa yi Jezebel kha na chawkhusapa hingta a cuo.
66002021	A ngiepachiyna cuo kha i pi, cuorasala aparuvsuena hring taata a ngiepachiy khing vyi.
66002022	Mang tie, ama kha iehmang cunglie thaw'a ang te, ama hne nungvaathingsuena a tuepa tie zaw kha ama suena amaa ngiepachiy li kieca a ruvsapa te-angna na amaa taw aa.
66002023	A saata zaw kha i thie'a yi. Khrihsaabuv bangkhuo ta kama ca pathiypalung hne palungphya a mangpasiepa i cuopa kha ina pachang'a yi. Niema pakha cyicuo kha nama hriepa hne aa phuvpa a muo ica pi'a yi.
66002024	Cuorasala hingpa pacuvna hing a ziy lipa, chekha ta, ‘aa thuvpa Setaa bieparuv,’ ama tapa kha a cuv lipa, Thiatira lie a awpa niema aa ngaapa tie cunglie capa hmangriypa ca nama cunglie ca khang khing va yi ang.
66002025	Nama hnyipa kha i vawna te a cusa pata a patuv tie ung.
66002026	Tena hmung te i re kha a chuona te ta aa pazue pata a hriepa bangkhuo ca, mingphang zaw cunglie nawhnyina kha i pi'a yi. Kama zaw i Paa'a taata nawhnyina i hmungpa haata iema kha nawhnyina i pi'a yi. Mingphang zaw cunglie thaakhuecahryi ta uvna naw hne alyi bi haata dechipatlaa khuna naw kha i pi'a yi. Dyivaa aasiy zaw kha i pi'a yi.
66002029	Thlaapa ta khrihsaabuv tie'a luo a ripa hing naa a hnyipa bangkhuo ta naathlie mangyisue.
66003001	Sardis khy lie a awpa khrihsaa-buv avuoming'a luo kha hing -haahingta cape tie. Khazing thlaapa suosariy hne aasiy suosariy a hnyipa bie ca hinghaahingtana a cuo. Na rehriepa i pachang, a hring tapata ming a hnyipa na cuo raalaa pata na thiy.
66003002	A kya cha la, vuotaa a thiy'a nangpa a tuopa kha thaa patlung tie, tahematapakieca i Khazing hmielieta na re kha tluo a tlingpa ta hmung va ang.
66003003	Na za cuhluopa hne na thyipa kha maw kha; capaca ziy la na suena kha a ngiepachiy tie. Naa kya cha li pata a cuo kieca a paruvpa haata a vaw'a ang te, nama'a luo kha khatiy tama i vaw aa tapa na pachang'a vaciy.
66003004	Cadyiseca Sardis khy lieta a cawsie a papyapalyi lipa cawsaa a cawta na hnyi kalie; iema ca aa phuvpa ama cuo nakawta pangruopa kha a buv'a yite kama hneta ama cakuo pakhawle aa.
66003005	Tena na hmung kieca iema haata pangruopa kha a buv ra'a cate, hringna caa-uv chung taata na ming kha ca hruv'a va ang. I Paa hne a avuoming hmiekunglieta na ming kha i daakhyi aa.
66003006	Thlaapa ta khrihsaabuv tie'a luo a ripa hing naa a hnyipa bangkhuo ta naathlie mangyisue.
66003007	Filadelfia khy lieta a awpa khrihsaabuv avuoming'a luo kha hing-haahingta cape tie. A pathepa hne biehmisipa a cuopa, David tawh a hnyipa, a khaa tiyta ahungtahmuo ama pahaw khu lipa, a pahaw tiyta ahungtahmuo ama khaa khu lipa bie ca hingpa hing tana a cuo:
66003008	“Na rehriepa i pachang. Mang tie, ahunghmuo ama khaa khu lipa ingchiypakaa kha na hmielie ica pahawpa. Na thaazuo a caw tapa kha ica pachang, cadyiseca i ming kha thaw khing lipa cata i bie kha na ziy.
66003009	Judah ming tana i cuo a ta raalaa yite a cuo lipa, a hangpa tie, Setaa apungna-ing ta a cuopa tie kha na phyi thabaw luo a vaw pata vya pabu sa'a yi ang te nama ica duena zya kha ama pachang riypata i tue'a yi.
66003010	Tahematapakieca i bie kha palung pasiysa pata anglawna hne na ziy nakawta chuelyi cunglie a awpa bangkhuo dyapasya riypata a vaw riypa ruvnaana taakhata ica khuo aa.
66003011	I vaw patang aa; na byilakhuv kha malie ta aca chuv li riypa yita na hnyi ciepa kha a cusa pata patuv tie.
66003012	Tena na hmung kieca i Khazing biena-ing chunglie kha asuvtung ta ca tue'a ang te; khatiy tahmuo capa biena-ing taacata pya'a va tli ciy. I Khazing ming hne vuoruo lie i Khazing'a taata zaa cungpa Jerusalem khypuv thaapa ming hne kama ming thaapa kha na cunglie i cape aa.
66003013	Thlaapa ta khrihsaabuv tie'a luo a ripa hing naa a hnyipa bangkhuo ta naathlie mangyisue.
66003014	“Laodisia khy lieta a awpa khrihsaabuv avuoming'a luo kha hinghaahingta cape tie: Khazing sapa bangkhuo lie a hruothuna ta a cuopa, zangtluo aa tlapa a hmisipa pachangkhyituv Amen bie tana a cuo.
66003015	“Na hriepa kha i pachang; nama ca a cakaa zaw cakaa ra vaciy, a sa zaw sa ra vaciy. Na cakaa kie cakaa, na sa kie sa tapa ica khing.
66003016	Cacuonakawta, nama ca lalung duodyi cuo cate, a cakaa zaw cakaa li, a sa zaw sa li pata na aw nakawta i pakaa taata ica pacha'a nang tli.
66003017	Nama ta, ‘I hnyirung, i ky i ca, khaahmuo a hu va ang,’ naa ta. Palung phakhyi aa chiy li tlipa, ngiechi aa chiypa, dawchiepa, mingcuepa hne na thliehripa ta na awpa kha a pachang vaciy.
66003018	Cacuonakawta na hnyirung na riypata myi ta rue pata pathe sa ciepa siyy kha kama'a taata na calyi riypata ruena ica pi. Na thliehripa ta na awpa na nangzaana caa pahruv riypata pangruopa naa calyi riypa cuose, na hmung the na riypata na ming lie naa thuv riypa mingsiy naa calyi riypata ruena ica pi.
66003019	I duepa zaw ca sue phaw yi ang te i pasiypa-ya yi. Cacuonakawta temaa lawla na suena kha a ngiepachiy tie.
66003020	Naathlie tie! Ingchiypakaa lie a daa ang te i cakhaw nguoluo; i ryi kha thyi cate ingchiy ina pahaw cakieca na ingchung luo kha a zaa ngie'a ang te, nama hneta sa i ning hne aa, nama zaw kama hneta sa na ninghne ra aa.
66003021	Tena a hmungpa ca, tena hmung ang te a byithude cunglie i Paa hne maa tuhne pahaata kama byithude cunglie a tuhnena naw i pi aa.
66003022	Thlaapa ta khrihsaabuv tie'a luo a ripa kha naa a hnyipa bangkhuo ta naathlie mangyisue.
66004001	Cakhutaacata i mang ca, vuoruo lie ingchiypakaa suokha aa pahawpa kha i hmung. Hmyakaa haata paring te kama'a luo bie a zaa ri nguoluopa i thyi taapa ca, “Hingpa luo hing kya kie la hingpa khu taahingta khaapama a vya cuo aa tapa kha ica pahmung aa,” ina ta.
66004002	Sungkhabala ta thlaapa ta bi ang te, vuoruo lie a tupa byithude suokha hne a cunglie a tupa pakha kha i hmung.
66004003	Capa lie a tupa ca jasper lungvaa hne karnelian lungvaa haata khe te, byithude ca emerald lungvaa haata a tapa buvtuvruoriy ta a cadung.
66004004	Byithude ca a hrangpa byithude suokiysuopaliy ta cadung yite, capa byithude zaw cunglie ca ama luv lie siyylakhuv a khuv yite pangruopa a buvpa uvthyi pakiypapaliy amaa tu.
66004005	Byithude taacata thinghlaa a cakang te khalung aa thy. Byithude hmiekunglieca myisaa vuopa suosariy aw te, capa tie ca Khazing thlaapa suosariy ta ama cuo.
66004006	Byithude hmiekunglieca thlaluo haata a pasingpa riyliy a aw. Byithude a kuo paliy lieca a hmie luo hne a hnang luo hne ming ta a bipa a hringpa saruopa sapaliy ama aw.
66004007	A sakhanapa saruopa ca chingde hneta a lu te a sahningnapa saruopa ca cuetungpa hneta aa lu, a sathungna saruopa a hmie ca cawsaa hmie hneta a lu te, a sapaliynapa saruopa ca aa zulepa hmungthlu hneta aa lu.
66004008	A hringpa saruopa sapaliy ca mathlaa suocaruv law hnyi yite ama chung luo hne ama le luo hne ming ta a bi diy. Chung hne zuo ta taw li pata hlaa sa yite, “A pathe, a pathe, a pathe, Abyipa Khazing A Lesyicepa, a zaa aw tlipa, a aw nguoluopa hne a vya aw riypatana a cuo.
66004009	A hringpa saruopa tie ta byithude cunglie a tupa, chuozaa taata chuozaa te a hringpa ca rungnaana, pa-uvsathyina hne alawna ta ama pathuo sa.
66004010	Cahaa cata ama pathuo sa ning ca uvthyi pakiypapaliy tie ca chuozaa taata chuozaa te a hringpa, byithude cunglie a tupapaa hmielie ca a bu yite amaa bie; ama byilakhuv kha byithude hmielie ca chi yite,
66004011	“Ma Byipaapa hne ma Khazing, Nama ca rungnaana, pa-uvsathyina hne cahrana cu tluo aa tlapa tana na cuo. Tahematapakieca, hmangting zawdya kha nama ta tue cate, Na khingna haata sapa hne a hringpa tana ama cuo.
66005001	Cakhutaata byithude lie a tupa pakha kuv chunglie kha caataw suokha i hmung. Capa caataw ca a chung luo hne a hnang luo ta caa aa cape diy te caakhe suosariy ta amaa cung.
66005002	Cakhutaata a lesyicepa avuoming pakha ta a ueryi lesapa ta, “Ahungma a caataw kha pahaw pata caakhe kha para riypata a tla aa?” a ta.
66005003	Cuorasala vuoruo lie cuose, alyi lie cuose, alyi rawlie cuose, capa caataw ca pahaw pata a chung luo a mang khu riypa pakhahmuo aw vayi.
66005004	Capa caataw ca pahaw pata a chung luo mang khu riypata aa tlapa pakhahmuo ama hmung khu li nakawta kama ca khuopuv ta i caa.
66005005	Catiyta uvthyi pakhapa khata, “Caa khah, Judah phang, David ciyhruo ta a cuopa ca tena kha a hmung tli. Ama ta caakhe suosariy hne caataw kha a pahaw khu aa,” ina ta.
66005006	Cakhutaata byithude hne a hringpa saruopa sapaliy a lala lie Tuvtaata aa daapa kha i hmung. Tuvtaata ca thie ciepa hneta aa lu. Kiy suosariy hne ming suosariy hnyi te, capa ming suosariy ca alyi cung bangkhuo luo pathliepa Khazing thlaapa pasariy tana a cuo.
66005007	Ama cata vaa te, byithude cunglie a tupapaa cacuo luo kuv lie caataw ca a la.
66005008	A la khupa hne a hringpa saruopa papaliy hne uvthyi pakiypapaliy tie ca tingtuo suokha law hne mingpathepa tie thlaachuona ta a cuopa rangpa-uepa hne a bipa siyy kuotung kha amaa hrie kaluo pata Tuvtaata hmiekunglie kha amaa vya bu.
66005009	Hlaa thaapa kha ama sa: Nama ca caataw la riypa hne caakhe pahaw riypata naa tla, tahematapakieca nama ca ca thie yite, na thiyse ta, phangting, ryi ting, cawsaa ting hne ruo ting chung taata mingpathepa tie kha Khazing cuota na calyi tli.
66005010	Iema ca ma Khazing rehrie riypata ruo suokha hne tluobyi ta tue yi cate, iema ta alyi hing ama uv aa,” ama ta.
66005011	Cakhutaaca i mang ca, byithude hne a hringpa saruopa tie hne uvthyi tie kha a cadungpa avuoming ri tie lipa tie ueryi kha i thyi.
66005012	Ama ueryi a aw zawdya ta ama sapa ca, Ama thiepa Tuvtaata ca, cahrana hne hnyirungna hne singna hne lesyina hne, pa-uvsathyina hne rungnaana hne thluechiy kha hmung aa tla! ama ta.
66005013	Cakhutaacata vuoruo hne alyi hne alyi raw hne riyliy hne ama chunglie a awpa sapa hmang zaw bangkhuo ta hlaa sa yite, Byithude cunglie a tupa hne Tuvtaata cunglie, thluechiyna hne pa-uvsathyina hne rungnaana hne lesyina ca chuozaa taa chuozaa te aw mangsue!” ama ta.
66005014	Cakhutaaca a hringpa saruopa papaliy tie cata, “Amen!” ta yite a bu yite amaa bie.
66006001	Cakhutaata Tuvtaata tah caakhe suosariy chung taata suokha a pahawpa kha i hmung. Cakhutaata a hringpa saruopa papaliy chung taa pakha ta khalung a thypa ueryi haata, “A vaw!” a tapa kha i thyi.
66006002	Mang ang te aruo ruopa sakha i hmung! A khangpapaa ta liy suokha a hnyi; byilakhuv kha pi yite tena hmung canyi lawmaw riypata a pyale.
66006003	Caakhe suohningna kha a pahaw tiyta, a hringpa saruopa pahningna ta a upa kha i thyi.
66006004	Aruo hrangpa sakha kya pya te a sepa ta a cuo. A khangtuvpapaa ca cawsaa pakha hne pakha amaa thie riypata chuelyi lie diena kha para riypata naw pi yite Zueziy lesapa zaw kha ama pi.
66006005	Tuvtaata ca caakhe suothungna kha a pahaw tiyta, a hringpa saruopa pathungna ta, “A vaw!” tapata a upa kha i thyi. I mang ca aruo vawpa sakha i hmung. A khangtuvpapaa ta a kuv lie cyipathlienapa suokha aa hriepa kha i hmung.
66006006	A hringpa saruopa papaliy hraw taata pakha ueryi haata i thyipa ca, “ning kha thavie ta jungsacuo kilogram suokha, barli kie kilogram suothung, cuorasala Oliv chiytiy hne mingsuv tiy ca para khah!” a ta.
66006007	Caakhe suopaliyna kha a pahaw tiyta, a hringpa saruopa papaliynapa ta, “A vaw!” tapata a upa ueryi kha i thyi.
66006008	I mang ca a thluopadyapa a ruo sakha i hmung. A khangtuvpapaa ming ca Thiyna tapata cuote ama ca Hell ta a vya paziyle. Chuelyi chepaliychekha cunglie nawhnyina pi pata cuo yite, zueziy ta cuose, cakuo tlungna ta cuose, puvtlungna ta cuose, aa hruopa saruopa ta cuose cawsaa thie khuna naw kha ama hmung.
66006009	Caakhe suopangaana kha a pahaw tiyta, Khazing bie kawlie cuose, tehte amaa khuona kawlie cuose ama thiepa thlaapa tie kha bienatluophie rawlie ta i hmung yi. Iema cata,
66006010	“A Lesyicepa Abyipa, a pathepa hne a hmisipa, khatiy te khiyma hing chuelyi cawsaa tie hing bie ripa li pata hne ma thiyse kawlie phuv la li pata na aw'a yi?” tapata khuosa ta ama khi.
66006011	Iema pakha cyicuo ca pangruopa kha pi yite, iema haata thie ra riypata a cuopa ama changtaapa tie hne ama uvnu hne sieta zaw ama tlingna te ta sungkha a pahy caw riypata ama chang.
66006012	Caakhe suocaruvna kha a pahaw tiyta, i mang ca aling khuopuv ta aa siy; ning ca pangcaw vawpa haata vaw te, thlaapa punglungpa ca thiyse haata aa li.
66006013	Avuo aasiy zaw ca khysuv ta cahang te thyikuv hipa a kung taata a zungpa haata alyi luo ama za zung,
66006014	Avuo ca caataw haata a vya kalang te a vie, tluo bangkhuo hne parala zaw ca ama awna taata ama palaw diy.
66006015	Chuelyi siepahruo tie, uvtuv tie, riebyi tie, a hnyirungpa hne nawhnyituv tie, cawsaa bangkhuo, sii hne hya a zangpa bangkhuo ca lungkaraw lie hne alungpuvnung a lala lie amaa nu diy.
66006016	Tluo hne alungpuvnung kha u yite, “Malie za vy ungla Tuvtaata hihaana taata hne byithude cunglie a tupa hmiekung taahingta malie nu thi tie ung;
66006017	tahematapakieca ama hihaana ningkhue lepuv ca vya tlung te ahungma a ang khu the aa?” tapata ama khi.
66007001	Cakhutaacata alyi kiy paliy lie avuoming papaliy amaa daapa kha i hmung. Alyi lie cuose, riyliy lie cuose, thingkung cunglie cuose a hruo li riypata thliy luopuv suopaliy kha ama patuv.
66007002	Avuoming a hrangpa pakha kha a hringpa Khazing caakhe kha a hrie te ningchiyna luo taata a kya kiepa kha i hmung. Alyi hne riyliy para riypata cahrana ama pipa avuoming papaliy kha ue a suopuv ta,
66007003	“Ma Khazing sii zaw kha ama puo lie caa ma khe diy hluo li yi alyi hne riyliy hne thingkungpa zaw kha para kha ung,” a ta yi.
66007004	Cakhutaata Israel mingphang mekaa taata caa ama khepa bangkhuo ca thaw zakha thaw sawliy thaw paliy a cuopa kha i thyi.
66007005	Judah phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning, Reubin phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning, Gad phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning,
66007006	Asher phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning, Naftali phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning, Manasseh phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning,
66007007	Simeon phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning, Levi phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning, Issakhar phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning,
66007008	Zebulun phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning, Josef phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning, Benjamin phang chung taata thaw hraa hlyihning ta ama cuo.
66007009	Cakhutaacata i mang ca ahung -tahmuo ama ri tie li riypa cawsaa-zaapuv kha i hmung. Iema ca ruo ting, phang ting hruo ting taa hne ryi ting taata cuo yite, pangruopa amaa hryi, ama kuv lie chanungbachuv hnaa a cyi yite byithude hmielie hne tuvtaata hmielie kha amaa daa.
66007010	Khuopuv ta khi yite, “Khuona ca byithude cunglie a tupa ma Khazing hne Tuvtaata huopa tana a cuo!” ama ta.
66007011	Avuoming bangkhuo ca byithude hne uvthyi tie hne a hringpa saruopa tie kha cadung yite amaa tu, byithude hmielie kha a khuv yite Khazing kha amaa bie.
66007012	Amen! Thluechiy hne rungnaana hne singna hne palungtluona bie hluona hne pa-uvsathyina hne cahrana hne lesyina ca chuozaa taata chuozaa te ma Khazing huopa ta cuo mangsue! Amen,” ama ta.
66007013	Cakhutaata uvthyi zaw hraw taata pakha ta kama kha, “Pang ruopa a buvpa tie hing ahung zaw tama ama cuo? Khaapa taata ma amaa vaw? ina ta.
66007014	Kama ta, “Abyipa, nama na a pachang ciy,” i ta. Cakhutaa ama ta, “Iema ca ruvnaana lesapa chung taata a vya lawpa tie tana ama cuo. Ama pang kha tuvtaata thiy lie pasuv yite a ruo phaalaa tli,” ina ta.
66007015	Canakaw catana Khazing byithude hmielie aw yite, Biena-ing chunglie chung hne zuo hne amaa bie. Byithude lie a tupa khata iema ca a mangchiy yi.
66007016	Ama nang diy li tli'a pata, ama tiy zaw hrie'a va tli; ningsaa ta e li tli'a pa yi ta, a lingpa khaapatahmuo riethyi pi'a va tli yi.
66007017	Tahematapakieca byithude liekhingkhuo lie a awpa Tuvtaata ca ama tuvkhietuv cuo'a te, Ama ta iema kha hringna tiyhnaa luo aa chiy'a yi. Khazing ta ama mingthliy bangkhuo kha a hruvpa thluv'a yi.”
66008001	Tuvtaata ta caakhe suopangaana a pahaw tiyta, siymaluo a che chung vuoruo lie kha a duokaring.
66008002	Cakhutaata avuoming pasariy Khazing hmielie amaa daa pakha hmung yi ang te iema kha hmyakaa suokha cie ama pi.
66008003	Ziyhmyi pakhuvnapa siyy bi a cyipa avuoming a hrangpa pakha a vaw te bienatluophie lie kha aa daa. Mingpathepa tie thlaachuona hneta byithude hmielie a awpa siyy bienatluophie cunglie biena pi riypata capa avuoming ca ziyhmyi a hluvsa ama pi.
66008004	Avuoming kuv taata ziyhmyi khuv ca mingpathepa tie thlaachuona hne Khazing hmiekung luo ca a khuv thaw.
66008005	Cakhutaata avuoming cata ziyhmyi pakhuvnapa bi kha la te, bienatluophie lie myi kha a khung chiy khu taata alyi luo kha a thaw ca alyi lieca khalung aa thy, paci a tla, thinghlaa a cakang te aling aa siy.
66008006	Hmyakaa suosariy a hnyipa avuoming pasariy ca hmyakaa tung riypata a ting cie pata ama aw.
66008007	A pakhanapa avuoming ta a hmyakaa kha a tung ca, thiy hne aa pyapa ari hne myi kha alyi luo za tla te alyi chethungchekha ca myi ta a kuo. Thingkungpa chethungchekha ca uv sa diy te aphuv hringpa chethungchekha zaw a kuo sa diy.
66008008	A pahningnapa avuoming ta a hmyakaa kha a tung ca, myi a hlaa nguoluopa tluo lepuv haata a tapa suokha ca riyliy luo kha aa thaw.
66008009	Riyliy chethungchekha ca thiy ta a li te, riyliy chunglie a awpa saruopa chethungchekha ca ama thiy. Tiypalaw chethungchekha zaw ama ra.
66008010	A pathungnapa avuoming ta a hmyakaa kha a tung ca, myisaa vuopa haata a tapa aasiy lesapa suokha ca cavaa hne acaa chethungchekha bangkhuo cung luo kha avuo taata a za tla.
66008011	Capa aasiy ming ca, “Khana,” tapata a cuo. Tiy chethungchekha ca a kha nakawta capa tiy a dangpa cawsaa hluvpuv ama thiy.
66008012	A papaliynapa avuoming ta a hmyakaa kha a tung ca, ning chethungchekha, thlaapa chethung-chekha, hne aasiy chethungchekha ta tuvpathla pata cuote, ama khena chethungchekha ca ama zing. Ning-chung chethungchekha ca khena hnyi li tli pata zuo haata a ta.
66008013	Cakhutaacata i mang ca, avuo khingkhuo lie a pathlaapa hmungthlu sakha khuosa ta a khipa kha i thyi. “Ciy aa chiy, ciy aa chiy, a hrangpa avuoming pathung ta ama tung riypa hmyakaa a vya paring kieca chuelyi ming cuota ciy aa chiy hringhruo,” a ta.
66009001	Cakhutaata a papangaanapa avuoming ta a hmyakaa kha a tung ca, avuo taata alyi luo aasiy suokha a za tlapa kha i hmung. Ama ca dena a hnyi lipa khue pahawna tawh kha ama pi.
66009002	Dena a hnyi lipa khue kha a pahaw ca capa khue chung taacata a lesapa susana myi taata a pyapa myikhuv haakhata myikhuv ca a tawpuv ta a kya pya.
66009003	Myikhuv taacata khawbyapa kha pya yite chuelyi luo ama za cung. Iema ca tluociekuo cahranapa haapa kha pi pata ama cuo.
66009004	Chuelyi lieta a awpa aphuv cuose, tuokhaapa a hringpa kung bangkhuo hne thingkungpa zaw kha para li pata ama puo lie Khazing caakhe a hnyi lipa cawsaa kyalya dyi kha para riypata changpa ama cuo.
66009005	Cawsaa kha thie tlung li pata thlapangaa chung hrisaana naw ama pi. Cawsaa ama hrisaa tiyta a pasana zya ca tluociekuo ta cawsaa a be ning haa khatana a pasa.
66009006	Capa ningkhue thue ca cawsaa ta thiyna kha huv'a yite, cuorasala hmung'a vayi, thiy khing hringhruo'a yite, cuorasala thiyna ta iema kha a ruose'a yi.
66009007	Capa khawbyapa tie hmingsuo ca rie tuv riypata pachie paciepa aruo hne tana amaa lu. Ama luv lieca siyy ta tuepa byilakhuv haapa kha a khuv yite, ama hmie ca cawsaa hmie kha ama lu.
66009008	Ama suo ca canung suo kha lu te, ama haa ca chingde haa kha a lu.
66009009	Thaa cacunghnaapakaw haapa phuvhling kha hnyi yite, ama mathlaa pu ca rietuvna luo a ruole nguoluopa aruole pu hne tana aa lu.
66009010	Malie a be thepa tluociekuo lahmyi haapa kha hnyi yite, capa lahmyi lieca cawsaa kha thlapangaa chung riethyi a pi khupa cahrana ama hnyi.
66009011	Dena a hnyi lipa khue avuoming kha siepahruo ta hnyi yite, a ming ca Hebru ryi ta Abaddon ta yite Grik ryi ta Apollyon ama ta.
66009012	A suokhanapa ciy aa chiypa ca chuo te, hingpa khu taahingta a vaw riypa a hrangpa suohning a aw kalie.
66009013	Cakhutaata pacaruvnapa avuoming ta a hmyakaa kha a vya tung ca, Khazing hmiekunglie a awpa siyy bienatluophie kiy suopaliy taakhata ueryi i thyi.
66009014	Hmyakaa a hnyipa a pacaruvnapa avuoming cata, “Cavaa lesapa Zufrates lie ama hrepa avuoming papaliy kha pathlie ung,” a ta.
66009015	Cacuonakawta avuoming papaliy ca ama pathlie. Iema ca capa cuo, capa ning, capa thlaa, capa kung, lie hrahring ta chuelyi cawsaa chethungchekha thie riypata chi paciepa ama cuo.
66009016	Aruo rieka mekaa ca million zahning ama ta, tapata i thyi.
