66009017	Muocuo i hmungpa lieta i hmungpa aruo hne a khangtuv tie ca hinghaahingta a cuo. A khangtuv tie ca myi haata a sepa, safaiar lungvaa haata a dungpa, ke haata a mepa cacunghnaapakaw kha amaa pakaw. Amaa ruo luv ca chingde luv kha lu te, ama pakaa taakhata myi, myikhuv hne ke kha ama pya.
66009018	Capa ama pakaa taata a pyapa myi, myikhuv hne ke taata a pyapa puvtlungna cata cawsaa chethungchekha ca a thie yi.
66009019	Aruo zaw ama cahrana ca ama pakaa lie hne ama lahmyi lietana a aw. Ama lahmyi ca pariy haakhata cuote luv ama hnyi; capa cata ruvnaana kha ama pi.
66009020	Capa puvtlungna ta a thie lipa, aa ngaapa cawsaa zaw ca ama kuv ta ama tuepa hmang kawlie kha a ngiepachiy vayi: Setaa abie kha cuose, siyy, ngu, thiyhring, alung hne thing ta ama tuepa, a hmung the lipa, a thyi the lipa hne a cakuo the lipa kuvtuezuv abie zaw kha thuse hlyi vayi.
66009021	Cahlyitaw taata cawsaa ama thiena, malie ama ca-iena, aparuvsuena ama tuena hne ama paruv thena taa zaw ta a ngiepachiy vayi.
66010001	Cakhutaata vuoruo taata a thaaruvsapa avuoming pakha a za cung pakha i hmung. Ama ca amyi ta pahlaw te a luv cunglie buvtuvruoriy a aw; a hmie ca ning haata cuote, a phyi ca myitung haata a cuo.
66010002	Ama ta caataw cawta pake ciepa kha a kuv lie aa cyi. A cacuo luo phyi kha riyliy lie cuose, a cavyi luo phyi kha alyi lie cuose chaa te
66010003	chingde aa hrungpa haakhata khuopuv ta a khi. Ama a khi tiyta khalung suo sariy aa thy.
66010004	Khalung suo sariy aa thy tiyta caa cape kha i nang. Cuorasala vuoruo taata ueryi suokha thyi ang te, “Khalung suo sariy aa thy pata a ripa kha cape li pata caakhe la chicaw tie,” ina ta.
66010005	Cakhutaaca riyliy lie hne alyi lie a daa pata i hmungpa avuoming khata a cacuo luo kuv kha avuo luo pazuu te,
66010006	avuo hne a chunglie a awpa, riyliy hne a chunglie a awpa, chuozaa ta chuozaa te a hringpa ming ta chie aa sapa ca, “Ru'a va tli,
66010007	cuorasala a pasariynapa avuoming ta a hmyakaa a tung ningpa ca ama ta a changtaapa profet tie'a luo a za pathyi ciepa Khazing bieparuv kha a tling aa.”
66010008	Cakhutaata vuoruo taata i za thyipa ueryi khata kama'a lie a ri pakhaapa ca, “Vaa la, riyliy lie hne alyi lie a daapa avuoming kuv lieta pake ciepa caataw kha va la tie,” ina ta.
66010009	Cacuonakawta avuoming'a luo kha vaa ang te, caataw cawta kha na pi tie, i ta ca, “A la lah ning tie; na pavaw chunglie kha a kha raalaa'a pata, na pakaa lieca khyitiy haatana a thlung aa,” ina ta.
66010010	Cacuonakawta caataw taata kha avuoming kuv taaca la ang te i ning ca i pakaa lie kha khyitiy haata a thlung. Cuorasala i ning khu taata i pavaw lie kha a kha.
66010011	Cakhutaata iema ta, “Nama ca cawsaa hluvpuv, mingphang hluvpuv, ryi hluvpuv hne siepahruo zaw'a luo khana biephu na ri pakhaa aa,” ina ta yi.
66011001	Cakhutaata khuecahryi a lupa taanapa asung suokha kha na pi yite, “A vaw la, Khazing biena-ing hne bienatluophie hne capa lieta abiepa tie kha vya taa tie yi,” ina ta yi.
66011002	Cuorasala biena-ing ahmie khaca taa'a vaciy; pangaa tie, tahematapakieca khapakha ca Khazing abie lipa tie'a luo pi pata cuote iema ta khypuv pathepa kha thla sawliy hne thlahning chung amaa ciybaruv diy aa.
66011003	Cakhutaata buri a hryipa i tehte pahning tie kha thawkha zahning angkha ning sawcaruv chung biephu ri khuna naw i pi'a yi.
66011004	Iema ca alyi Byi hmiekunglieta a daapa Oliv thingkung kung hning hne myivuona tung suohning ta ama cuo.
66011005	Pakhakha ta ruvnaana a pi'a nang kie yi ca, ama pakaa taata myi kya pya te ama carie tie kha a kuo'a yi. Iema riethyi a pipa ahunghmuo cahaa cata thiepa ama cuo aa.
66011006	Iema ta profet-biephu ama ri nguoluo ningta khy a saa li riypata avuo khaana naw kha ama hnyi. Tiy kha thiy ta pali riypa naw hnyi yite, ama khing ning bangkhuo ta alyi kha pasana phangphang ta ruvnaana ama pi khu.
66011007	Tehte amaa khuo khu taata dena a hnyi lipa khue chung taata saahruo kha kya pya te, iema kha rie a du'a yite a te khu taayita a thie'a yi.
66011008	Ama riy ca mingnupa ta Sodom hne Izipt ama tapa, ama Byipaapa vieluo lie ama za taanapa khypuvlepa luopuv cunglie kha a laa aa.
66011009	Phang ting ciy ting hne ryi ting taata cawsaa zaw khata ningthung angkha a che chung ama riy kha mang'a yite thluo chung luo paby riypa zaw ama thlu aa.
66011010	Alyi lie khy a sapa tie ca iema chiycuona kawlie kha ama palung tluo'a te, lasaw zaw amaa thle aa, tahematapakieca hingpa profet pahning tie hing alyi lie khy a sapa tie kha zaa tuechiepa tie tana ama cuo.
66011011	Cuorasala ningthung angkha a che khu taata Khazing'a taata hringna huv kha iema chung luo a ngie te ama phyi ta amaa daa, a hmungpa bangkhuo ca ama phuv te aa hling.
66011012	Cakhutaata vuoruo taata ueryi paringsapa kha thyi yite, “Hingpa luo hing kya kie ung!” a ta yi. Ama carie tie ta ama mang nguoluopa khata amyi chung vuoruo luo kha ama kie.
66011013	Capa cuota lieca aling khuopuv ta a siy te, khypuv ca chehraachekha ra te cawsaa thaw sariy ama thiy. A ngaapa tie ca ciy tuv hringhruo yite vuoruo Khazing rungnaana kha ama pathuo sa.
66011014	Suohningnapa ciy aa chiypa ca a chuo tli. Suothungnapa ciy aa chiypa kha a ru hluo ta a vaw aa.
66011015	Cakhutaata a pasariynapa avuo-ming ta a hmyakaa kha a tung ca vuoruo lie ueryi paringsapa ta, “Chuelyi pena ca ma Byipaapa hne Messiah pena ta a li tli te, chuozaa taata chuozaa te ama ta a uv aa,” a ta.
66011016	Cakhutaata Khazing hmiekung, amaa byithude cunglie a tupa uvthyi pakiy papaliy ca a bu yite Khazing kha hlaa sa yite amaa bie.
66011017	“A Lesyicepa Abyipa Khazing, nama ca maca pathuo sa, Nama ca atalie zaw aw cate hluoning zaw ta a awpa na cuo. Tahematapakieca a lesyipa na cahrana kha hmuo cate uv hruo kha naa pathu tli.
66011018	Mingphang zaw ca ama hihaa te, cuorasala a thiypa tie bieripa riypa cuo hne na hihaana ca a vaw tli, na changtaapa na profet tie hne, na mingpathepa tie hne na ming caa ciyzaapa bangkhuo, a le a caw bangkhuo kha lasaw pi riypata hne, chuelyi a parapa tie kha para riypata a cuo,” ama ta.
66011019	Cakhutaaca vuoruo lie Khazing biena-ing ca a pahaw te, a biekuona thingkaw kha biena-ing chunglie ca aa luo; thinghlaa aa cakang, khalung khuopuv ta aa thy, aling a siy te ari khuopuv ta a tla.
66012001	Cakhutaata avuo lie khiy kharuehaa hmang suokha aa luo. Canung pakha ca ning khiy a cawsie ta aa tue, thlaapa kha a phyi ta chaa te, aasiy suohraa hlyihning ta tuepa byilakhuv kha a luv lie aa khuv.
66012002	Nu phya te a puv'a nang tli nakawta nupazi te a khi nguoluo.
66012003	Cakhutaata avuo lieca a hrangpa kharuehaa hmang suokha aa luo. A lesapa riyhre sepa sakha, luv suosariy hne kiy suohraa a hnyipa a luo te, a luv lieca byilakhuv suosariy aa khuv.
66012004	A lahmyi ta avuo lie a awpa aasiy chethungchekha kha phiy pathla te alyi luo a thaw. Cakhutaacata a saata a za puv pahne paluo naa se ang tapata riyhre ca a saata zaa aw'a nang nung hmielie kha a daa.
66012005	Cawsaanung cata mingphang bangkhuo thaakhuecahryi ta a uv riypa saacapaa kha a sa. Cuorasala a saata ca la paluo yite Khazing hne aa byilakhuv hmie luo kha ama chiykhyi.
66012006	Cawsaanung ca ning thaw kha zahning sawcaruv chung mangchiypa a cuo riy'a pata Khazing ta a cuota a parawpa ruochung luo kha aa ruo.
66012007	Vuoruo lie rie thu te Mikhael hne aa vuoming khata riyhre kha amaa du. Riyhre hne aa vuoming ta ama tuv hriy,
66012008	cuorasala amaa sung nakawta iema cuota vuoruo lie hmang aw va tli.
66012009	Riyhre lesapa, khyhluo pariy, Khachie hne Setaa ama tapa, chuelyi bangkhuo a dungtuv ca aa vuoming hne khata alyi luo ama za thaw.
66012010	Cakhutaacata vuoruo taata ueryi lepuv kha thyi ang te, “Ata hing ca khuona, cahrana hne, Khazing pena hne, Messiah nawhnyina kha a vaw tli, tahematapakieca ma uvnu zaw kha Khazing hmielie chungzuo ta sue a phawtuv ca, thaw pathla pata a cuo tli.
66012011	Tuvtaata thiyse thue'a nata, tehte ama khuona thuophaabie thueta ama kha ama te mangtli, tahematapakieca ama hringna pi kha zaa pahya yite thiy zaw amaa zaa nguo.
66012012	Vuoruo hne a chunglie a awpa tie zaw, nama palung tluo se. Cuorasala alyi hne riyliy cuota ca ciy na a chiy hringhruo, Setaa ca khuopuv ta hihaana cangta niema'a luo a za cung tli, tahematapakieca ama cuota cuo a pachangsa tlipa khana a pachang!
66012013	Riyhre ca alyi luo ama thawpa kha aa hmung tiyta saacapaa a sapa cawsaanung kha a huv paluo.
66012014	Cuorasala cawsaanung ca pariy lepa awna taakhata ruochung luo aa zu khuna riypata hmungthlu lesapa mathlaa kha ama pi. Capa hmang lie ca cuokha chung, cuohning chung hne cuoche chung kha mangchiy pata a cuo aa.
66012015	Pariy cata cawsaanung phya naase tapata a pakaa chung taata tiy kha cavaa haata a papya.
66012016	Cuorasala alyi ta cawsaanung kha a bya te riyhre ta a pakaa taata a papyapa tiy kha a pakaa kya uo te a saw diy.
66012017	Riyhre ca cawsaanung cunglie kha a hihaasa te Khazing nawbie a ziypa hne Zingsuv kaw tehte a khuopa aa tuo kaliepa a saata zaw kha a du riypata a pya.
66012018	Cakhutaata riyhre ca riyliy kie viehnang cunglie kha aa daa.
66013001	Cakhutaata riyliy taata saahruo sakha a kya pya pakha i hmung. Kiy suohraa hne luv suosariy hnyi te, a kiy zaw cunglie ca byilakhuv suohraa aw yite a luv zaw cunglie ca Khazing rithuochina ming ama aw.
66013002	I hmungpa saahruo ca kyiching hneta a lu te, a phyi ca cavaw phyi hneta aa lu, a pakaa ca chingde pakaa hne aa lu. Riyhre ta a cahrana hne a byilakhuv hne nawhnyina lepa kha a pi.
66013003	A luv suokha ca thiykhyi tluopa hmaa zaa phya tlipa na a lu, cuorasala capa hmaa taacata a tluo tli. Alyicung bangkhuo ta ama kharue haa te ama kha ama ziy.
66013004	Iema ta riyhre kha amaa bie, tahematapakieca a nawhnyina kha saahruo a pi nakawta a cuo. Sahruo zaw kha abie yite, “Ahungma saahruo a lupa a aw, ahungma ama a du khu aa?” ama ta.
66013005	Saahruo ca Khazing rithuochina biechiepa ri kha pa-awpa cuote, thla sawliy thla hning chung hmuo the riypata nawhnyina ama pi.
66013006	Khazing rithuochi riypata a pakaa kha uo te, a ming, a awna hmang hne vuoruo lie a awpa tie kha a rithuochi yi.
66013007	Mingpathepa tie kha a du pata te riypa zaw kha pa-awpa a cuo. Mingphang ting, cawsaa bangkhuo, ryi phangting hne ruo zawdya cunglie kha nawhnyina ama pi.
66013008	Ama thie ciepa Tuvtaata hringna caa-uv chunglie chuelyi hruothu baataata ming cape lipa, chuelyi lie khy a sapa bangkhuo ta ama kha amaa bie aa.
66013009	Thyina naa a hnyipa ta thyi yi se:
66013010	Patuv pata a dale riypa bangkhuo ca, patuv pata hrepa ama cuo aa. Zueziy ta malie na thie kieca, zueziy ta thiepa tana na cuo ra aa. Hingpa hing ca mingpathepa tie ta ang khuna hne zangna ama hnyi riypata pasuna tana a cuo.
66013011	Cakhutaata saahruo sahningna alyi taata a kya pyapa kha i hmung. Tuvtaata haata kiy suohning hnyi te riyhre haata bie a ri.
66013012	Saahruo sakhana ta a hnyipa nawhnyina bangkhuo kha ama cuopa ta hmuo te alyi hne a chunglie a awpa bangkhuo kha thiykhyi tluopa hmaa za phya te a tluo pakhaapa saahruo pakhana kha a pabie sa yi.
66013013	Kharuehaa hmang a lepa puv zaw kha tue te cawsaa bangkhuo hmiekunglie caci kha avuo taata alyi luo myi a za pathla.
66013014	Saahruo suokhana cuopa ta tue khu riypata ama pa-awpa kharuehaa hmang kha hmuo te a dung yi. Zueziy hmaa phya te a tluo pakhaapa saahruo kuvtuezuv kha sa riypata a chang yi.
66013015	Saahruo sahningna ca Saahruo sakhana kuvtuezuv kha huv pi pata bie pari sa khuna hne ama abie lipa tie zaw thie khuna naw kha ama pi.
66013016	Capa saahruo cata a lepa hne a cawpa, a hnyirungpa hne siypasapa, a hyazangpa hne sii cuose ama cacuo luo kuv a cuo li kie ama puo lie a hnangna a patue sa yi.
66013017	Saahruo ming a cuo li kie a ming nangbaa, a hnangnapa kha a hnyi lipa ca hmang kha a calyi zaw calyi khu li pata a zaa zaw zaa khu ra vayi.
66013018	Hingpa lie hing singna hmuo aa hu ciemuo: singna a hnyipa ta saahruo nangbaa siyluo ca tue yi se, hingpa nangbaa hing cawsaa pakha nangbaa tana a cuo. Capa nangbaa ca zacaruv sawcaruv suocaruv tana a cuo.
66014001	Cakhutaacata i mang ca Zion Tluo lieta Tuvtaata aa daapa kha i hmung. Ama puo lieta ama ming hne a paa ming a capepa thaw zakha thaw sawliy thaw paliy ama hne ama awpa zaw kha i hmung.
66014002	Cakhutaacata vuoruo taata ueryi thyi ang te, capa ueryi ca tiysue lesapa pu hne khalung pu haata a cuo. Ueryi i thyipa ca tingtuo a tungpa tie ta ama tingtuo ama tungpa ue hneta aa lu.
66014003	Iema cata Byithude hne Saruopa a hringpa papaliy hmielie hne uvthyi zaw hmielie kha hlaa thaapa ama sa. Alyi taata khuopa thaw zakha thaw sawliy thaw paliy tie ri li pata ahungtahmuo capa hlaa ca the khu vayi.
66014004	Iema ca canung hne a papya a palyi lipa, a pathepa, hne Tuvtaata a cakuona luo mekaa ta a ziylepa tie ta ama cuo. Iema ca cawsaa hraw taata Khazing hne Tuvtaata cuota khuopa thyipaa taapa tie ta ama cuo.
66014005	Ama pakaa taata hangna bie pya vyi; risie riypa zaw aw vayi.
66014006	Cakhutaata avuoming hrangpa pakha avuo liekhingkhuo lie aa zu nguoluopa kha i hmung. Ama ca alyi lie a awpa ruo ting, mingphang bangkhuo, ryi phangting hne cawsaa zawdya'a luo pathyi sa riypa chuozaa thuophaabie pathyi satuv ta a cuo.
66014007	Ue paringsapa ta a ripa ca, “Khazing kha ciyzaa ungla rungnaana pi tie ung, A bierina ning na a vya tlung tli; vuoruo hne alyi, riyliy hne cavaa zaw a satuv kha abie tie ung,” a ta.
66014008	Cakhutaacata avuoming hrangpa, a pahningnapa ta paziy te a ripa ca, “Aa lie tli, a lesyipa Babilon ca aa lie tli! A saapa huenapa Khazing hihaana mingsuv kha mingphang ting a padangsatuv nung tana a cuo,” a ta.
66014009	Cakhutaata a pathungnapa avuoming a hrangpa ta ueryi lepuv ta a khipa ca, “Saahruo hne a kuvtuezuv kha abiepa hne ama puo lie hne ama kuv lieta a hnangna a hnyipa tie ca
66014010	Khazing hiihaana panuo chung luo khaahmuo pyapa aw li pata ama lyipa Khazing mingsuv khana ama dang aa. Iema ca a pathepa avuoming hne Tuvtaata hmielie kha myi hne ke ta hrisaana ang'a yite,
66014011	iema ama hrisaanapa myikhuv ca chuozaa ta a khuvthaw pari aa. Saahruo hne ama kuvtuezuv abiepa hne a ming a hnangnapa a hmungpa tie ca ama cuota chungzuo ta a hyna cuo aw'a vyi.
66014012	Hingpa hing na mingpathepa tie ang khuna hne Khazing nawbie a ziypa hne Zingsuv a zaa zang taapa tie cuota pasuna ta a cuo.
66014013	Cakhutaata vuoruo taata ueryi suokha thyi ang te, “Cape tie: Khazing zangna cangta a thiypa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo,” ina ta. Thlaapa ta, “A cuo,” ama tuena ta iema kha a paziyle nakaw yi ta ama rehriena taata amaa pahy'a mangtli,” a ta.
66014014	I mang ca amyi ruopa suokha hmung ang te, capa cunglie ca Cawsaa Saacapaa a lupa pakha kha a luv cunglie siyylakhuv a khuv te a kuv lie tuokyi cahresapa suokha aa cyi pata i hmung.
66014015	Avuoming a hrangpa pakha Biena-ing chung taata kya pya te amyi cunglie a tupa kha khuopuv ta u te, “Na tuokyi kha hmuo la uo tie, tahematapakieca alyi sa hing a hmingsa tli nakawta uo na cuo khana a de tli,” a ta
66014016	Cacuonakawta amyi cunglie a tupapaa ca a tuokyi kha vya pahie te sa ca a uo.
66014017	Cakhutaata avuoming a hrangpa kha vuoruo biena-ing chung taata kya pya te, ama zaw tuokyi cahresapa suokha a hnyi.
66014018	A hrangpa avuoming, myi cunglie naw a hnyituv kha bienatluophie taata kya pya te, tuokyi cahresapa a hnyituv avuoming kyihuo khata, “Mingsuv kha a hmingsa tli nakawta na tuokyi cahresapa kha hmuo la alyi mingsuv zaw kha pahmya tie,” a ta.
66014019	Cacuonakawta avuoming ta a tuokyi kha pahie te alyi taata mingsuv kha pahmya te Khazing hihaana mingsuv a ciyna chung luo kha a thaw.
66014020	Cakhutaata mingsuv ca khypuv le luo mingsuv a ciyna lie kha amaa ciy ca mingsuv a ciynapa chung taacata thiyse ca aruo hmyakhe te aa suo pata kilometer zathung tluv te ta a lang.
66015001	Cakhutaata avuo lie khiy a lesyipa hne kharuehaa aa chiypa pahmungsana hmang suokha i hmung. Avuoming pasariy hne puvtlung pasana suosariy cuo yite caca a hnangcawcepa ta a cuo. Tahematapakieca Khazing hihaana a chuona tana a cuo.
66015002	Cakhutaaca myi hneta aa pyapa thlaluo riyliy haapa suokha i hmung. Saahruo hne a kuvtuezuv hne a ming nangbaa a tetuv tie kha ama kuv lie Khazing tingtuo a cyi yite thlaluo riyliy kielie amaa daapa kha i hmung.
66015003	Iema ca Khazing changtaapa Moses hlaa hne Tuvtaata hlaa kha ama sa: “A Lesyicepa Abyipa Khazing, Khatluv tama na hmang tuepa hing lesyi te kharuehaa aa chiy! Aa dangpa hne aa hmuopa ca nama luopuv tana a cuo, Mingphang zaw Siepahruo!
66015004	Abyipa, ahungma nama ca ciy li pata, na ming ca parungnaa sa li pata a aw aa? Tahematapakieca nama pakha dyi hingna a pathe ciy. Mingphang bangkhuo hing na hmiekung luo a vaw'a yite, nama kha acaa bie'a yi. Tahematapakieca na biechina ca aa luo tli.
66015005	Cakhutaata i mang ca, tehtekhuona thluodaa biena-ing aa pahawpa kha i hmung.
66015006	Avuoming pasariy kha puvtlung pasana suosariy hne biena-ing chung taata ama kya pya. Iema ca a pathepa pangruopa kha a buv yite, ama cacunghnaa kha siyy cacunghnaapaze amaa paze.
66015007	Cakhutaacata a hringpa saruopa papaliy chung taa pakha ta avuoming pasariy ca chuozaa ta a hringpa Khazing hihaana ta a bipa siyy kuotung suosariy a pi yi.
66015008	Biena-ing ca Khazing rungnaana hne a cahrana taata a pyapa myikhuv ta bi te, avuoming pasariy tie puvtlung pasana suosariy ama chuo hluo li pakha hmuo a ngie khu vayi.
66016001	Biena-ing taata ueryi lesapa suokha ta avuoming pasariy kha, “Vaa ungla Khazing hihaana kuotung suosariy kha alyi cung luo va lyi tie ung,” a tapa yi kha i thyi.
66016002	Avuoming a pakhanapa ta a kuotung kha riyliy luo a bungh ca saahruo a hnangna a hnyipa hne ama kuvtuezuv abiepa tie cunglie kha a pahnuosapa hne a pasasapa hmaa a kya aw.
66016003	A pahningnapa avuoming ta a kuotung kha riyliy luo a bungh. Tiy ca a thiypa riy chung taata a pyapa thiy haata a li te riyliy chunglie a awpa a hringpa bangkhuo kha ama thiy diy.
66016004	A pathungnapa avuoming ta a kuotung kha cavaa hne acaa luo kha a bungh ca thiy ta amaa li.
66016005	Cakhutaata tiy a uvtuv avuoming ta, “Hluo ning taata za aw te atalie zaw a awpa A pathepa, nama ca aa dangpa tana na cuo, tahematapakieca hingpa hmang zaw cunglie hing nama na bie a chi ciy
66016006	Iema ta mingpathepa tie hne profet tie thiy kha ama za palang nakawta, ama dang riypata thiy kha na pi yi. Caca iema amaa phuvpa tana a cuo.
66016007	Cakhutaata bienatluophie ta a paliepa kha thyi ang te, “A cuo, A Lesyicepa Abyipa Khazing, na biechina ca a hmuo te aa dang,” a ta.
66016008	A papaliynapa avuoming ta a kuotung kha ning cungluo bungh te, ning ca cawsaa kha myi haata kuona naw pi pata a cuo.
66016009	Iema ca a lingsuesaapa myi ta kuo yite, cuorasala puvtlung pasana cunglie naw a hnyituv Khazing ming kha chie ama sa. A ngiepachiy pata Khazing ming kha pathuo sa vayi.
66016010	A papangaanapa avuoming ta a kuotung kha saahruo byithude cunglie a bungh. Saahruo uvna chunglie kha khyzingna a tlung. Cawsaa ca ama palyi kha a ce yite,
66016011	ama angpa pasana hne hmaa kawlieta Khazing kha chie ama sa. Ama tuepa hmangpha lipa kha a ngiepachiy vayi.
66016012	A pacaruvnapa avuoming ta a kuotung kha Zufrates cavaapuv cunglie a bungh. Ningchiy luo taata siepahruo tie cuota luo pa-aw riypata cavaa ca a ky.
66016013	Cakhutaata riyhre pakaa taata cuose, saahruo pakaa taata cuose, profetpakhipa pakaa taata cuose, ca-uv a lupa thlaapa pyalyipa pathung amaa vawpa kha i hmung.
66016014	Iema ca khuevuo thlaapa ta ama cuo, kharuehaa hmang kha tue yite, A Lesyicepa Khazing rietuvnapa ning thue huo cuota pahmya riypa yita ruo ting siepahruo tie'a luo kha ama si.
66016015	(“Mang tie ung, a paruvpa haatana i vaw aa! A thliehripa ta aa khie li riypa hne nangzaahmiechi pata a aw li riypata a hmung li pata aa tuepa cawsie a mangchiypa ca thluechiypa tana a cuo.”)
66016016	Cakhutaata khuevuo thlaapa tie cata siepahruo tie kha Hebru ryi ta Armageddon ama tapa hmang lie ama pahmya.
66016017	A pasariynapa avuoming ta a kuotung kha thliy lieta a bungh. Ueryi lesapa kha biena-ing chung byithude taata kya paring te, “Aa lang tli,” a ta.
66016018	Cakhutaacata thinghlaa aa cakang, khalung aa thy, paci tla te aling khuopuv ta aa siy. Chuelyi lie cawsaa ama aw baataata cahaapa aling ca a siy buo vyi, aling a siy buopa hrawlie a ruvcepa tana a cuo.
66016019	Khypuv lesyipa ca chethung ta a chechi te, ruo ting lie khypuv zaw ca ama ra. Khazing ta a lesyipa Babilon kha maw li pata a hihaana mingsuv panuo kha a padang sa.
66016020	Parala bangkhuo ca a ruo diy yite, tluo zaw kha hmung khu aw va tli yi.
66016021	Ari pangkalupa, paw zakha te aa riypa kha avuo taata cawsaa zaw cungluo ca a za tla. Ciy aa chiy hringhruopa, ari ta puv a patlung sana kawlie cata cawsaa ta Khazing kha chie ama sa.
66017001	Cakhutaata kuotung suosariy a hnyipa avuoming pasariy chung taa pakha kha a vaw te, “A vaw la, tiy cunglie a tupa a lesyipa siyhrawnung ta a ang riypa bieripana na ica pahmung sa aa.
66017002	Alyi siepahruo tie ta ama hne aparuvsuena tue yite chuelyi lie khy a sapa tie ta hingpa nung aparuvsuena mingsuv kha ama pariy,” ina ta.
66017003	Cacuonakaw ama ta thlaapa cahrana ta kama kha ruochung luo na sikhyi te, canung pakha ca chiesanapa ming ta a bipa, luv suosariy hne kiy suohraa a hnyipa, a sepa saahruo cunglie aa tupa kha i hmung.
66017004	Capa canung ca a medungpa hne a sehunglungpa caw kha a tue te siyy alung sungnaapa hne palelungvaa ta aa pangi. A kuv lie kha duvsamakhie aa chiypa hne a pathe lipa ta a bipa aparuvsuena a tuenapa siyy panuo kha aa hrie.
66017005	A puo lie aa capepa, bienupa a hnyipa a ming ca, “A lesyipa Babilon, chuelyi lie a awpa duvsamakhie aa chiypa hne siyhrawnung tie zaw nung,” tapata a cuo.
66017006	Capa canung ca mingpathepa tie thiy hne Zingsuv cuota tehte a cuopa tie thiy a pariy pakha i hmung. Capa nung ca i hmung tiyta, i nang ta a uo.
66017007	Cuorasala avuoming cata, “Khaapanakawma catluv nanaa na nang a uo? Canung nung hne ama a phyalepa a luv suosariy a hnyipa hne a kiy suohraa a hnyipa saahruo bienupa siyluo ca ica chang aa.
66017008	Na hmungpa saahruo ca a hluo ta za aw te, ata hing ca aw va tli. Dena a hnyi lipa khue chung taakhata kya pya'a te a ra aa. Chuelyi hruothu baataata hringna caa-uv chunglie ama ming cape lipa, chuelyi lie khy a sapa tie ta saahruo kha ama hmung tiyta ama nang a uo sa aa. Tahematapakieca a hluo ta za aw te, ata hing a aw li tli raalaa pata a vya aw pakhaa aa.
66017009	Hingpa kawlie hing singna hne pachangna aa hu: luv suosariy ca canungnung aa tunapa tluo suosariy ta a cuo; siepahruo pasariy zaw kha a cuo ra.
66017010	Capa siepahruo tie chung taacata papangaa ca ama thiy tli, pakha hring kalie te, a hrangpa pakha ca a vaw valie; aa vaw thue zaw ta cuo pachangta dyina a aw aa.
66017011	A hluo ta za aw te ata hing a aw li tlipa saahruo ca a pacarinapa a cuo raalaa pata siepahruo pasariy chunglie ta pakha ta cuote, rana luo a chiy riypatana a cuo.
66017012	Na hmungpa kiy suohraa ca uvpa ruo a hnyi li liepa siepahruo pahraa ta cuo yite, cuorasala saahruo hneta siymaluo pakha chung uv hne riypata siepahruo nawhnyina kha pipa ama cuo aa.
66017013	Iema ca saahruo'a luo ama cahrana hne ama nawhnyina kha pi riypata ama palung aa lusa.
66017014	Tuvtaata kha amaa du aa, cuorasala Tuvtaata tah a te'a yi. Tahematapakieca ama ca byi zaw hrawlie ta Byi hne siepahruo zaw hrawlie ta Siepahruo tana a cuo. Ama'a lie a awpa tie ca kupa tie, a tlawpa tie hne zangtluo aa tlapa tie tana ama cuo,” a ta.
66017015	Cakhutaacata, “Siyhrawnung aa tunapa na hmungpa tiy ca ruo ting taata ryi ting a cyipa mingphang ting tana ama cuo.
66017016	Na hmungpa kiy suohraa tie hne saahruo khata siyhrawnung kha huesa'a yite, ama kha para'a yite a thliehripa ta ama chi aa. A saa kha a ce chuv'a yite myi ta ama rue aa.
66017017	Tahematapakieca Khazing ta a bie ripa a tling hluo li, iema ama uvpa ruo kha saahruo'a luo pi pata ama aa tingnapa re ama hrie khing riypa kha ama palung chunglie a chi.
66017018	Na hmungpa canungnung hing chuelyi siepahruo tie a uvtuv khypuv tana a cuo,” ina ta.
66018001	Cakhutaacata avuoming hrangpa vuoruo taata a za cungpa kha i hmung. Nawhnyina lepuv kha hnyi te, a khena ta chuelyi kha a pakhe diy.
66018002	Ueryi lepuv ta u te, “A ra tli, a lesyipa Babilon ca a ra tli! khuevuo zaw awna hmang tana aa li. A pyalyipa thlaapa zaw tlena hmang, a pyalyipa pavaa zaw awna hmang hne, a pyalyipa hne duv aa chiypa saahruo zaw tlena hmang tana aa li.
66018003	Tahematapakieca mingphang bangkhuo ta, aparuvsuena a mingsuv kha pariy yite, alyi siepahruo tie ta ama hneta aparuvsuena kha ama tue. Alyi lie sung a palituv tie ca, ama saapa lunghruotlunghring cahrana kha ta a pa hnyirung sa yi,” a ta.
66018004	Cakhutaata vuoruo taata ueryi hrangpa kha thyi ang te, I cawsaa zaw, a suena chunglie namaa te ra li riypa hne, a angpa puvtlungpasana kha namaa hraw ra li riypata, ama'a taakhata kya pya tie ung.
66018005	Tahematapakieca a suena ca avuo dena te ta a pung te, Khazing ta a pha lina kha maw vyi.
66018006	Ama ta aca za tue pahaa yi khata ama kha tue ungla, a tuepa kha lehning ta thung tie ung. Ama ta a za pya ciepa panuo lie kha, ama cuo khata lehning ta pya ungla pi tie ung.
66018007	Rungnaana hne lunghruotlunghring ama hne ama a zaa pina zaa khata, riethyivuosuona hne ngiechina kha pi tie ung. Tahematapakieca a palung chunglie ta, siepahruonung a daahmang taatana ruo i uv; nunghlyi ta cuo va ang, ngiechina ca a taw buo'a va ang,” a ta.
66018008	Cacuonakawta puvtlungpasana, pasachiepa hne angiy-aphiena hne cakuona ca ning kha bie ta vya tlung'a te, Ama ca myi ta ruepa a cuo aa, Tahematapakieca a bie a ripa tuvpa ca a lesyicepa Abyipa Khazing tana a cuo,” a ta.
66018009	Ama hneta a aparuvsuena tue yite lunghruotlungsa pata zaa hringpa alyi cung siepahruo tie ca ama ruenapa myikhuv ama hmung tiyta pahya li pata ama caa aa.
66018010	A te-angna kha ama ciy nakawta luohlaa taakhata, Na puosa hringhruo, na puosa hringhruo, khypuv lesyipa, Babilon, a cahrapa khypuv! Na bie ripanapa ca siymaluo pakha chung ta liena a vya tlung de,” ama ta aa.
66018011	Cakhutaata chuelyi cung sung a palipa tie ta a muochie sa yite ama caa, tahematapakieca ama chechiy kha ahungtahmuo calyi va tli yi.
66018012	Siyy, ngu, alung sungnaapa, palelungvaa, palaa ta taapa caw, kadiypaa caw, puv ta taapa caw, a rang pa-uepa thing phangting, ale nue ta tuepa hmang phangting, thing muosungpa ta tuepa hmang phangting, thiyhring, thaa, alung ruopa ta tuepa hmang phangting,
66018013	thinghaw pa-uepa, tiyhuo ca-ienapa bangkhuo, maasalaa, mura ziyhmyi, frankinsens ziyhmyi, mingsuv, Oliv chiytiy, jungsacuo viedie, jungsacuochuo, cue, tuv, aruo hne aruole, sii hne cawsaa zaw kha ahungtahmuo calyi va tli yi.
66018014	“Na hringna ta a vuopa thyipaa bangkhuo ca, a khungle diy tli, tluesiyliy khata na awna hne na lesyina zaw ama vie diy tli, hmung pakhaa khu the'a va tli ciy!
66018015	Hingpa hmang hne chechiy ta sung a palipa, ama'a taata a hnyirungpa tie ca a te-angna kha ama ciy nakawta luohlaa taakhata a daa yite, ngiechina hneta ama caa aa.
66018016	Na puosa hringhruo, na puosa hringhruo, khypuv lesyipa, a sedungpa hne a sehunglungpa cawphapa kha a tue cate, siyy, alungsungnaapa hne palelungvaa ta naa pangi!
66018017	Capa hnyirungna ca siymaluo pakha chungliena ama vie diy thluo!” ama ta aa. Tiypalaw mawtuv byi bangkhuo, palaw a ziypa tie, palaw lie re a hriepa tie hne riyliy cunglie sung a palipa tie bangkhuo zaw ta
66018018	ama a kuonapa myikhuv kha ama hmung tiyta luohlaa taakhata a daa yite, “Khaapa khypuv ma hingpa khypuv haahingta zaa lesyi buo?” ama ta.
66018019	Cakhutaacata ama luv lie alyidiypa a phuv yite, Na puosa hringhruo, na puosa hringhruo, khypuv lesyipa, riyliy lie tiypalaw a hnyipa tie bangkhuo kha a hnyirungna ta a palesyi sa nung! ama ca siymaluo pakha chunglie tana parapa a cuo.
66018020	Vya vuoruo ama cawsaanung kawlie hingta na palung tluo se, niema mingpathepa tie hne lucuotuv tie hne profet tie zaw nama palung tluo se! Tahematapakieca Khazing ca niema kuo luota a daa tena ama kha bie a ripa tli,” tapata ama khi.
66018021	Cakhutaata a cahrasapa avuoming pakha ta sacuo rienapa lungtung haapa alung suokha kha riyliy luo thaw te, “Alesyipa Babilon khypuv ca, hinghaahingta riyliy luo kha thaasa ta thawpa cuo'a te, khatiy tahmuo hmung pakhaapa cuo'a va tli.
66018022	Cakhutaata tingtuo a tungpa tie hne, ramang a tungpa tie hne hmyakaa a tungpa tie ama tungpa hne hlaa sa a thepa tie ueryi kha, nama'a lie thyipa ta cuo buo'a va tli. Tuokhaapa kuvzung a thepa pakha khahmuo, nama'a lie hmungpa cuo'a va tli. Sacuo rienapa alung pu zaw kha khatiy tahmuo nama'a lie thyipa cuo'a va tli.
66018023	Cakhutaacata myi-ing khena kha, nama'a lie hmungpa cuo li tli'a pata, napuv a chiypa satlie hne navaa a hnyipa lesaa ueryi zaw kha thyipa ta cuo'a va tli. Tahematapakieca na sungpalituv tie ca alyi lie a lesyipa tie ta cuo yite, mingphang bangkhuo ca na pacuo thena ta na dung diy tli yi.
66018024	Na chunglie kha profet tie hne mingpathepa tie hne alyi lie za thiepa bangkhuo tie ama thiy kha hmung pata a cuo tli,” a ta.
66019001	Cakhutaata cawsaa hluvpuv ueryi haapa kha vuoruo taata thyi ang te, “Hallelujah! Khuona hne rungnaana hne cahrana ca Khazing huotana a cuo,
66019002	tahematapakieca a biechina ca a hmuo te aa dang Aparuvsuena ta alyi a para nung, a lesyinung siyhrawnung kha bie a ripa tli. A sii zaw thiyse kawlie ama kha phuv a la hriy mangtli,” ama ta.
66019003	Luokha khi pakhaa yite, “Hallelujah! Ama a kuonapa myikhuv ca chuozaa ta chuozaa te a khuvthaw pari,” ama ta.
66019004	Cakhutaata uvthyi pakiypapaliy hne a hringpa saruopa papaliy ca byithude lieta a tupa Khazing kha abie yite, “Amen. Hallelujah!” ama ta.
66019005	Byithude taata ueryi suokha ta, “Niema a sii zaw bangkhuo hne, ama a ciypa a le a caw ta, Khazing ca pathuo sa tie ung,” ama ta.
66019006	Cakhutaacata cawsaa hluvpuv ueryi hneta aa lupa ueryi, tiysue lesapa ryi hne khalung pu haapa ueryi suokha kha i thyi. “Hallelujah! Abyipa ma Khazing A Lesyicepa ca siepahruo a cuo nakawta,
66019007	a nuo ung sala a law ungsiy, a rungnaana kha pathuosa ungsiy, tahematapakieca Tuvtaata nungchiyna cuo a vya tlung tli. Navaa a hnyi riypa lesaanung ca a ting pacie pata aw te,
66019008	Cawphapa, a khepa hne a pathesapa kha, a tue riypata ama pi,” a ta. Tahematapakieca caw pathesapa ca mingpathepa tie hmangpha tuenapa tana a cuo, a ta.
66019009	Cakhutaata avuoming pakha ta, “Hingpa hing cape tie: Tuvtaata nungchiyna pyi saduona luo kupa ca thluechiypa tana a cuo,” ina ta. Cakhutaacata, “Hing bie hing Khazing biehmisipa tana a cuo,” ina ta.
66019010	Catiyta ama kha abie riypata a phyi thabaw lie i bu, cuorasala ama ta, “Haa khata tue khah! Kama zaw nama hne na viesaa zaw haakhata Zingsuv kaw tehte a khuotuv changtaapa pakha tana i cuo. Khazing kha abie hriy tie! Tahematapakieca Zingsuv ta a phupa biehmisipa hingna profet tie kha profet-biephu a pari sapa cahrana ta a cuo.
66019011	Cakhutaata vuoruo aa pahawpa kha hmung ang te aruo ruopa sakha aa luo. A khangtuvpa ca Zangtluo aa tlapa hne Biehmisipa ama ta. Adangna hneta bierina tue te rie aa du.
66019012	A ming ca myihlaa haata cuote a luv cunglie ta byilakhuv a hluvsa aa khuv. Cape ciepa ming suokha hnyi te ama ri li pata ahungtahmuo pachang vayi.
66019013	Ama ca thiy lie nawpa caw kha a tue te, a ming ca Khazing Bie ama ta.
66019014	A khesapa hne a pathepa cawphasapa aa tuepa vuoruo rieka tie ta aruo a khang yite ama ziyle.
66019015	A pakaa taata zueziy cahresapa kya pya te capa zueziy cata mingphang zaw kha a te yi. Iema kha thaakhuecahryi ta uv'a yite, Alesyicepa Khazing hihaana mingsuv a ciynapa khue lie kha mingsuv aa ciy aa.
66019016	A pang cunglie hne a baw lie kha a ming cape yite, “siepahruo tie Siepahruo hne abyi tie Byipaapa,” tapata a cuo.
66019017	Cakhutaata avuoming pakha ning cunglie aa daapa kha i hmung. Avuo khingkhuo lie a zulepa pavaa tie kha a ueryi lesapa ta ku yite, “A vaw ungla Khazing sa duona rungnaapa luo kha a vya hmya tie ung.
66019018	Siepahruo tie saa, riebyi tie saa, a lesyipa tie saa, aruo saa hne a khangtuv tie saa, hyazangpa tie hne sii tie saa, a cawpa hne a lepa tie saa ce riypa khata a vya hmya tie ung,” a ta.
66019019	Cakhutaaca saahruo hne alyi siepahruo tie kha ama rieka hneta a hmya yite aruo a khangpa hne a rieka tie kha rie amaa du.
66019020	Saahruo ca a hmiekunglie kharuehaa hmang a tue tawpa profetpakhipa hne khata ama patuv. Capa kharuehaa hmang a tuepa cata saahruo a hnangnapa a hmungpa tie hne a kuvtuezuv abiepa tie kha a dung yi. Iema pahning tie ca ama hringpa ta kemyi chung luo kha ama thaw.
66019021	A tuopa tie ca aruo a khangpapaa pakaa taata a pyapa zueziy ta thie diy yite ama saa ca pavaa bangkhuo ta ama riy bikaluv nate ta ama ning.
66020001	Cakhutaata a kuv lieta dena a hnyi lipa khue tawh hne thaabuoliriy a lesapa a cyi nguoluopa avuoming pakha vuoruo taata a za cungpa kha i hmung.
66020002	Ama ta hluoning pariy ta a cuopa riyhre, Khachie hne Setaa ta a cuopa kha patuv te kung thawkha a hre.
66020003	Cawsaa zaw a dung li tlina riypa yita kung thawkha a chuona te cakhiy te, khue chung luo kha pathla te khaakhung te caa a khe. Cakhutaacata cuo pachangta chung pathliepa a cuo aa.
66020004	Cakhutaata byithude zaw kha hmung ang te, a cunglie a tupa tie ca bie ripa khuna naw kha ama pi. Zingsuv kaw tehte ama khuo nakaw hne Khazing bie kawlieta ama luv ama tepa tie thlaapa zaw kha i hmung. Iema ca saahruo hne a kuvtuezuv kha abie lipa yi ta saahruo a hnangnapa zaw kha ama puo lie hne ama kuv lieta hnyi vayi. Iema ca kya hring yite Khrih hneta kung thawkha chung ama uv aa.
66020005	(Aa tuo kaliepa a thiypa tie ca kung thawkha a tlingna te ta kya hring'a vayi). Capaca a yikhanapa thupakhaana ta a cuo.
66020006	Yikha thupakhaana lieta a te rapa tie ca thluechiypa hne a pathepa tana ama cuo. Hingpa tie cunglie hing yihning thiyna ta naw hnyi vyi, cuorasala iema ca Khazing hne Khrih tluobyi ta cuo'a yite ama hneta kung thawkha ama uv aa.
66020007	Kung thawkha a chuo taata Setaa ca a thawtlana taata pathliepa cuo'a te,
66020008	alyi kiy paliy lieta a awpa Gog hne Magog tapa mingphang zaw kha dung riypata aa thu aa. Iema ca rie tuv riypata pahmya yite riyliy kielie viehnang zaa ama ta.
66020009	Iema ca alyi khy ting hne hmangting khata cahraw yite mingpathepa tie awnapa hne Khazing duepa khypuv kha ama cadung. Cuorasala avuo taata myi za tla te a kuo diy yi.
66020010	Cakhutaacata iema a dungpa yi Setaa kha saahruo hne profetpakhipa zaw awnapa kemyiliy luo ama thaw. Iema ca capa hmang lieca chungzuo ta chuozaa hrisaa pata ama cuo aa.
66020011	Cakhutaata a lepa byithude ruopa hne a cunglie a tupa pakha kha i hmung. Alyi hne vuoruo ca a hmiekung taata a ruo yite awna hmang hmung vayi.
66020012	Cakhutaacata a thiypa a le a caw ta byithude hmielie amaa daapa hne caa-uv zaw ama pakepa kha i hmung. Hringna caa-uv ama tapa caa-uv hrangpa suokha zaw kha ama pake. Caa-uv chunglie aa capepa haata, a thiypa tie ca iema ama tuena haakhata bie ama ripa.
66020013	Riyliy ta a chunglie a awpa a thiypa kha kya papya te, Thiyna hne Athiykhy zaw ta iema'a lie a awpa a thiypa tie kha kya papya yite, iema bangkhuo ca ama tuena haakhata bie ripa pata ama cuo.
66020014	Cakhutaacata Thiyna hne Athiykhy ca myiliy luo kha ama thaw. Hingpa myiliy hing yihning thiyna ta a cuo.
66020015	Hringna caa-uv lie a ming cape lipa bangkhuo ca myiliy chung luo ca ama thaw.
66021001	Cakhutaata vuoruo thaapa hne alyi thaapa kha i hmung, tahematapakieca vuoruo taapa hne alyi taapa ca vie yite riyliy ca aw va tli.
66021002	Cakhutaacata khypuv pathepa, Jerusalem thaapa kha vuoruo lie Khazing'a taata a za cungpa kha i hmung, navaa a hnyi'a nangpa lesaanung a navaapa a taw riypata aa pangipa haata aa pangi.
66021003	Byithude taata ueryi lesapa suokha i thyipa ca, “Mang tie ung, Khazing ing ca cawsaa hrawliena a aw. Iema'a lie kha khy sa'a te, ama Khazing ta a cuo aa. Iema ca a cawsaa ta cuo'a yite, Khazing ama hrahring kha iema'a lie a aw aa.
66021004	Ama mingthliy kha hruvpa'a yite, thiyna aw'a va tli, Ngiechina hne caana hne riethyi vuosuona zaw aw'a va tli. Zaa aw taapa hmang ca ama vie diy tli,” a ta.
66021005	Cakhutaata byithude cunglie a tupapaa ta, “Mang tie, hmang bangkhuo a thaapa ta i tue diy hing,” ina ta. “Hingpa hing cape tie, tahematapakieca hingpa bie hing zangtluo aa tlapa hne a hmisipa tana a cuo,” ina ta vie puo.
66021006	Cakhutaacata, “A tlung mangtli! Kama ca Alfa hne Omega, a hruothuna hne a chuona tana i cuo. A tiy a hriepa tie kha hringna tiyhnaa taata tiy kha lasaw ta i pi'a yi, ina ta.
66021007	Tena a hmungpa bangkhuo ca hingpa hmang zaw hing ru ta cu'a yite, kama ca ama Khazing ta cuo'a ang te iema ca i saata zaw ta ama cuo aa.
66021008	Cuorasala a riechiepa, a zanglituv, a pyalyipa, lie a nawpa tie, aparuvsuena a tuepa tie, mingpali a thepa tie, kuvtuezuv abiepa tie, hne a hanghiepa tie bangkhuo awna hmang ca kemyiliy, yihning thiyna khatana a cuo.
66021009	Cakhutaata avuoming pasariy chung taata pakha ta a cuopa, a hnangcawcepa, puvtlung pasana suosariy hneta a bipa kuotung suosariy a hnyipa kha a vaw te, “A vaw tie, Tuvtaata napuvnung riypa lesaanung khana ica pahmung aa,” ina ta.
66021010	Thlaapa ta bi ang te, avuoming cata a lesapa hne aa suosapa tluocung luo kha inaa chiy. Calieca vuoruo Khazing'a taata khypuv pathepa Jerusalem a za cung pakha ina pahmung.
66021011	Capa khypuv ca Khazing rungnaana ta bi te, jasper ama tapa alung sungnaapa haata khe te, krystal ama tapa thlaluo haata a pasing.
66021012	A lesapa hne aa suosapa khypuv cadungna piehu hnyi te thlake suohraa hlyihning a hnyi. Thlake zaw lieca avuoming pahraa hlyihning ama aw. Thlake zaw cunglie ca Israel ming phanghraa hlyihning ming kha a cape te,
66021013	capa thlake zaw ca ningchiy luo kuo ta suothung, chaluo kuo ta suothung, sungluo kuo ta suothung hne ningtla luo kuo ta suothung ta ama aw.
66021014	Khypuv cadungna piehu ca inghruo suohraa hlyihning hnyi te capa zaw cunglie ca Tuvtaata lucuotuv pahraa hlyihning ming kha aa cape.
66021015	Kama bie naa rihnetuv avuoming ca khypuv hne a thlake tie hne a piehu kha taa riypata taanapa siyy khuecahryi kha a hnyi.
66021016	Khypuv ca a tung hne a phyi aa khing diy. Avuoming cata a khuecahryi ta khypuv ca a taa ca, a tung, a phyi hne aa suonapa ca a khing diy yite, me thawkha zapangaa kaluo ta a cuo.
66021017	A piehu zaw kha a taa ca avuoming ta ama hmuopa cawsaa taana ta daw zakha sawliy suopaliy aa suo.
66021018	A piehu ca jasper lungvaa ta sa yite, khypuv ca thlaluo haata a pasingpa siyypathepa ta ama sa.
66021019	Khypuv cadungna piehu inghruo ca alung sungnaapa a phangphang ta ama pangi. A thabawce lieta jasper lungvaa, a paziypa ta safaiar lungvaa, a suothungna lieta agate lungvaa, a suopaliyna ta emerald lungvaa,
66021020	a suopangaana ta oniks lungvaa, a suocaruvna ta karnelian lungvaa, a suosariyna ta krisolite lungvaa, a suocarina ta beril lungvaa, a suocakyna ta topaz lungvaa, a suohraana ta khalseldon lungvaa, a hlyikhana ta jacinth lungvaa hne a hlyihningna ta amethist lungvaa ta a cuo.
66021021	Khypuv thlake suohraahlyihning ca pale lungvaa hlyihning ta cuote, thlake suokha cyicuo ca pale lungvaa suokha cie ta a cuo. Khypuv luopuvlepa ca siyypathepa ta tuepa cuote thlaluo haata a khe.
66021022	Khypuv chunglie ca biena-ing hmung va ang, tahematapakieca biena-ing ca A Lesyicepa Abyipa Khazing hne Tuvtaata khatana a cuo.
66021023	Khypuv ca a khe riypa ning hne thlaa zaw a hu vyi, tahematapakieca Khazing rungnaana kha a khena ta cuote, a myi-ing ca Tuvtaata khatana a cuo.
66021024	Mingphang bangkhuo ca a khena thue cata cakuona luopuv hmung'a yite chuelyi siepahruo tie zaw ta ca khypuv chung luo ca ama rungnaana kha ama'a vya ngiekhyi aa.
66021025	Khypuv thlake ca ningaw ta aa pahaw aa, tahematapakieca capa lieca zuo tapa aw'a vyi.
66021026	Cawsaa ta mingphang zaw rungnaana hne lesyina kha capa khypuv luo ca ama'a vya ngiekhyi aa.
66021027	Cuorasala a pathe lipa suokha hmuo capa khypuv luo ca a ngie khu'a vyi. Duvsamakhie aa chiypa hmang a tuepa tie hne a hanghiepa tie zaw a ngie khu'a vayi. Tuvtaata hringna caa-uv lie ming capepa tie dyina a ngie khu'a yi.
66022001	Cakhutaata avuoming ta thlaluo haata a pasingpa hringna cavaa tiy kha ina pahmung, capa cavaa ca Khazing hne Tuvtaata byithude taata za lang te,
66022002	khypuv liekhingkhuo lieta luopuv lie kha tathlyalya ta a lang. Cavaa kie kuovyicuo lieca a thyi phang hraa hlyihning kha thlakha phangkha ta thla ting ta a pathyipa hringna thingkung aw te, a hnaa ca mingphang zawdya cuota tluona a cuo.
66022003	Chiesapa hmang suokha hmuo capa hmang lie ca aw'a vyi. Cuorasala capa khypuv lieca Khazing hne Tuvtaata byithude dyi aw'a te, a changtaapa zaw ta ama kha amaa bie aa.
66022004	A hmie kha hmung'a yite, a ming kha ama puo lie cape pata ama cuo aa.
66022005	Capa lieca zuo aw li tli'a pata, myi-ing khena hne ning khena zaw a hu'a va tli, tahematapakieca Abyipa Khazing ca ama khena ta cuo'a te, iema ca chuozaa taata chuozaa te byi ama cuo aa.
66022006	Cakhutaata avuoming cata, “Hingpa bie hing zangtluo aa tlapa hne a hmisipa ta ama cuo, tahematapakieca profet tie ama thlaapa zaw Khazing ta a cuopa Abyipa ta a vya cuo paluo riypa hmang kha pahmung sa riypata a avuoming kha a pathlie yi,” ina ta.
66022007	“Mang tie, i vaw paluo aa! Hingpa caa-uv profet-biephu hing a ziypa ca thluechiypa tana a cuo”.
66022008	Hingpa hmang a thyituv hne a hmungtuv hing kama Johan tana i cuo. Hingpa hmang thyi ang te i hmung tiyta naa pahmung sa tuv avuoming kha abie riypata a phyi thabaw lie i bu ca,
66022009	ama ta, “Hinghaahingta tue kha! Kama zaw hing nama hne na viesaa profet tie hne hingpa caa-uv chunglie aa capepa bie a ziypa tie haakhata changtaapa tana i cuo ra, Khazing kha abie hriy tie,” ina ta.
66022010	Cakhutaaca ama ta, “Hingpa caa-uv chunglie aa capepa profet-biephu hing caakhe khah, tahematapakieca cuo na a ngie tli.
66022011	Hmang pha lipa a tuepa ca tue thluo sala, duv aa chiypa ca duv aa chiy pata hring thluo se. Cawsaa phapa ca a phapa kha tue pazue sala a pathepa ca a pathe pata hring pazue se,” ina ta.
66022012	“Mang tie, i vaw patang aa; cawsaa bangkhuo kha ama hriepa cyicuo haata pi riypata lawmuo kha i zaa cyi.
66022013	Kama ca Alfa hne Omega, a hmietaacepa hne a hnangcawcepa, a hruothuna hne a chuona tana i cuo,” a ta.
66022014	Ama pang kha a pasuvpa tie ca thluechiypa tana ama cuo, hringna thingkung kha hnyina naw hne thlake taata khypuv chung luo a ngie khuna naw ama hnyi aa.
66022015	Khypuv lelie a awpa tie ca uv tie hne ca-ie a thepa tie hne aparuvsuena a tuepa tie hne lie a nawpa tie hne kuvtuezuv abiepa tie hne hanghiepa kha tlechuo te a tuepa tie khatana ama cuo.
66022016	Khrihsaabuv cuota tehtekhuona hne niema'a luo a avuoming zaa pathliepa ca Kama, Zingsuv tana i cuo. Kama ca David samingsahlaa, a thabaw cuo ang te dyivaa aasiy khepa tana i cuo.
66022017	Thlaapa hne navaa a hnyi'a nangpa lesaanung khata, “Avaw tie,” a ta. A thyipa bangkhuo zaw ta, “A vaw tie,” ta yi se. Tiy a hriepa bangkhuo a vaw yi se. Hringna tiy a la khingpa bangkhuo a sepa ta a la yi se.
66022018	Hingpa caa-uv lie profet-biephu a thyipa bangkhuo hing a raaringna ica pi yi: hingpa bie lie hing ahungtahmuo bie hrangpa a chachiy kieca Khazing ta capa cawsaa ca hingpa caa-uv chunglie capepa puvtlungpasana kha a chachiy aa.
66022019	Ahung a cuo zaw hingpa caa-uv chunglie a awpa profet-biephu a thawpa ca Khazing ta hingpa caa-uv chunglie a capepa hringna thingkung taata a cu riypa hne khypuv pathepa chunglie a cu riypa kha a thawpa aa.
66022020	Hingpa bie bangkhuo tehte a khuotuv ta, “I vaw patang hrahring aa,” a ta. Amen. Abyipa Zingsuv, Avaw paatie!
66022021	Abyipa Zingsuv Khrih vihnyina ca mingpathepa tie bangkhuo cunglie aw mangsue. Amen.
